# Resonance Dream Sandbox вАФ prototype index

This is the single page Karel opens each morning. It mirrors the live
index at `/dream/` (the Vercel preview URL). Click a route to play
with the prototype; click the design notes link to read the agent's
thinking.

Status legend: `skeleton` (route exists, not yet interactive) ¬Ј
`wip` (partial) ¬Ј `demoable` (works, rough) ¬Ј `polished` (refined).

---

## в≠Р Newest (Cycle 579 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers [touch / live-data / mic], shipped 1)

[/dream/1002-sun-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1002-sun-organ) вАФ **"Sun Organ": Resonance plays the Sun вАФ an endless, non-looping ambient drone + aurora composed in real time from LIVE NOAA space-weather data, so the music is literally different every minute because it tracks the actual solar wind and Earth's magnetic field right now.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 579 (adult, WIDE fire вАФ winner of 3 explorers; chosen on the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt вАФ the only build with a core claim verified in-box, and the cleanest 06:30 artifact: it auto-plays with zero permission and no GPU-compile risk). **For**: adult / **live external data** input (NOAA SWPC + synthetic fallback; no kbd / mic / camera / pointer) / **raw WebGL2 aurora curtain** (Canvas2D fallback) / luminous calm, grounded in real data. **Real-world-data sonification + long-form-with-memory вАФ two thin lab categories at once, and the freshest concept in months (breaks the spatial-rooms + struck-string groove).** On Start (or ~2s idle auto-start) it fetches three CORS-open, key-less NOAA SWPC JSON feeds вАФ solar-wind **plasma** (speed/density), **mag** (Bz), **planetary K-index** (Kp) вАФ and polls every 60s (**live fetch verified end-to-end in-environment: 505.2 km/s, Bz +0.35 nT, Kp 2 on 2026-06-28**; defensive parsing handles both the array-of-arrays plasma/mag shape and the array-of-objects Kp shape). **Mapping** (calm, no wrong notes): solar-wind speed вЖТ texture agitation + aurora brightness; **Bz southward вЖТ tension** (low drone opens, detuned beating); density вЖТ number of audible voices; Kp вЖТ a rising high-shimmer swell + aurora height. **Long-form memory:** a wandering tonal centre that drifts slowly + a slow "breath" LFO mean the harmonic state keeps evolving even when the data is steady вАФ it never loops, different at minute 5 than minute 1; voices are an open just-intoned Dorian-ish field (`1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 16/9, 2, 9/4`) over a feedback-delay smear. **Degrades** to a synthetic solar-wind generator (summed sines + bounded random walks) with an `text-amber-300/95` notice if the feed is unreachable вАФ audio + visual run with zero network. Refs: Helioradar AV (live NOAA вЖТ infinite ambient, 2026); NASA SVS "Helio Big Year" sonifications; DATASONICA (2026 Data Sonification Award). Research-chained to RESEARCH ¬І579. Files: `page.tsx` (809 lines), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS ¬І579):** `1001-modal-anvil` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST adult (strike a GPU-compute non-linear-modal metal plate вАФ real `@compute` WGSL finite-difference plate sim as the resonating body, partials bend pitch with strike force; the directest answer to jury #3) + `1003-voice-nebula` (sing вЖТ your voice scattered into a 24k-particle granular nebula + self-harmonized choir).

## (Cycle 578 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers [mic / camera / touch], shipped 1)

[/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp) вАФ **"Bubble Harp": a calm underwater aquarium of glowing bubbles, each a REAL plucked string вАФ tap one and it rings + wobbles + blooms; drag across several to strum a glissando harp.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 578 (kids, WIDE fire вАФ winner of 3 explorers; chosen on verification debt вАФ the only no-permission, instantly-verifiable one). **For**: kids (4+) / **touch tap + drag** input / **raw WebGL2** (Canvas2D fallback) / calm tealвЖТamber aquarium. **The "sound is real physics" lane (960/970) ported to a 4-year-old:** every bubble is a genuine **Karplus-Strong** plucked string вАФ an AudioWorklet (loaded self-contained via Blob URL) runs the real 1983 delay-line + averaging-filter feedback algorithm excited by a soft noise burst (an offline-buffer fallback uses the same loop when the worklet is unavailable), NOT a sampled or oscillator pluck. **Mapping:** 16 bubbles tuned to **D-major pentatonic** across 3 octaves (size вЖФ pitch, big = low/long, no wrong notes); tap вЖТ pluck + soft-body squash-and-stretch wobble + glow bloom; drag вЖТ per-bubble glissando strum (re-pluck lockout); light soft-body collisions (squash, never a violent pop), off-top respawn for infinite calm play; always-on drone + filtered-noise water pad so it's never silent. **Kids-safe:** `gain 0.26 вЖТ lowpass 6500 вЖТ comp(вИТ10/20:1)`, вИЪ-voice normalization so mashing taps stays safe, 72px Start gesture-gates the AudioContext + worklet synchronously (iOS). After ~1.8s idle a ghost-finger auto-demo taps + strums through the identical pipeline. Ref: Karplus & Strong, "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" (Computer Music Journal, 1983). Files: `page.tsx` (852 lines, inline KS worklet), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS ¬І578):** `998-kids-firefly-hum` в≠Р (hum вЖТ WebGPU-compute firefly flock, the flock's coordination IS the chord вАФ research-chained to arXiv:2606.24958) + `999-kids-shadow-zoo` (your camera shadow becomes a singing creature, dependency-free frame-diff silhouette).

## (Cycle 576 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 engine approaches, shipped 1)

[/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline) вАФ **"Moon Trampoline": tilt a tablet like a tray and roll a glowing moon-ball across a springy TRAMPOLINE OF STARS вАФ the stretching cloth itself rings like a soft drum, because the sheet's own simulated vibration modes ARE the sound.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 576 (kids, DEEP fire вАФ winner of 2 engine approaches; resurrects the ¬І574 в≠Р `989-kids-star-cloth` seed). **For**: kids (4+) / **device-tilt** input / **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2** (the lab's FIRST true-3D scene-graph build вАФ jury 2026-06-27: "true 3D scene-graph work is 0√Ч") / calm indigo starry-night bedtime. **The most literal "the physical simulation IS the resonating body"** вАФ the 960-cristal-friction "timbre is physics" standard ported to a 4-year-old toy. **Physics:** a 24√Ч24 Provot mass-spring cloth (structural + shear + bend springs, Verlet + PBD relaxation passes + Provot's over-elongation cap, four corners pinned) on the CPU/main thread вАФ **no WebGPU dependency, so it runs on any phone or laptop browser** (the verification-safe twin of the banked WebGPU sibling). A moon-ball rolls under tilt and dents the sheet (sphere-vs-cloth push-out). **Render:** own `perspective`/`lookAt` matrices (no three.js), a camera that gently orbits so the sheet visibly stretches toward/away in depth вАФ reads as a real 3D scene, gold/white star-glints at the nodes over a deep-indigo starfield, a soft additive moon-ball. **Audio (Eb-major lullaby, no wrong notes):** membrane-mode synthesis вАФ **dent depth bends the low fundamental DOWN** (real tension-modulation physics: partials shift at large membrane amplitude, per Avanzini & Marogna), **ripple energy** opens higher drum-skin modes (partials вЙИ1/1.59/2.14/2.30/2.65), **settle** = a sustained warm chord, **bounce** = a soft bloom; always-on Eb+Bb drone (never silent), kids-safe `gain вЙ§0.26 вЖТ lowpass 6500 вЖТ comp(вИТ10/20:1)`, вЙ•30ms attacks, ~12-min goodnight fade. **Input chain:** `DeviceOrientationEvent` (iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) вЖТ pointer-drag вЖТ arrow keys/space вЖТ ~2s-idle auto-demo (moon drifts a slow circle so it's always moving + singing). Refs: Provot (1995) mass-spring cloth; Avanzini & Marogna membrane-percussion synthesis; arXiv:2507.11794 (WebGPU cloth feasibility). Files: `page.tsx`, `cloth.ts`, `renderer.ts`, `gl-math.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

## (Cycle 580 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 engine approaches [WebGPU vs CPU], shipped 1)

- **[/dream/1005-kids-singing-slinky](/dream/1005-kids-singing-slinky)** вАФ Singing Slinky: **flick a glowing rainbow SLINKY in true 3D and watch a bright compression pulse race down the coil, bounce off the far end, and settle into a humming standing wave you both SEE (bunched/stretched bands) and HEAR (the spring's own resonant pitch).** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 580 (kids 4+ / **touch/pointer flick** + ~2s-idle auto-demo / **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2** вАФ own perspective/lookAt orbiting camera, glowing rainbow point-sprite beads on a 9-turn helix over a dark playground grid; Canvas2D fallback / **longitudinal mass-spring standing-wave вЖТ modal/additive synthesis** / bright rainbow playground vibe). **The lab's FIRST longitudinal (compression) wave** вАФ every prior wave piece (strings `140`/`105`, cloth `995`, membrane, fluid `988`) is transverse or a 2D surface; here each of 128 coils is a point-mass whose displacement runs ALONG the helix axis, so coils visibly bunch/stretch. CPU 1-D mass-spring chain integrated with the discrete wave equation `a_i = (k/m)¬Ј(u_{i+1}вИТ2u_i+u_{iвИТ1}) вИТ damping¬Јv_i`, fixedвАУfixed boundaries вЖТ clean integer harmonic series `f_n = n¬Јc/2L` (inherently consonant); a flick injects a Gaussian compression pulse that propagates, reflects off both pinned ends, and relaxes into stationary nodes/antinodes. **Audio = the physics:** the displacement field is projected onto the fixedвАУfixed mode shapes `sin(nѕАi/N)` (n=1..8) driving an additive harmonic-series oscillator bank that swells when excited and decays as the wave damps вАФ the fundamental literally IS the spring's resonance; grab-point snaps the fundamental to **D major pentatonic** (no wrong notes), always-on breathing drone (never silent), mandatory kids-safe chain `gain вЙ§0.26 вЖТ lowpass ~6500 Hz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1)`, soft attacks, per-voice normalization. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**longitudinal compression-wave standing modes** вАФ grep-0√Ч as a lab technique; all prior waves transverse/2D-surface] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch-flick input + 1-D longitudinal spring sim + mode-projection additive synth + hand-written true-3D WebGL2 render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Stefan Bilbao, _Numerical Sound Synthesis_** (FDTD physical modeling); the Physics Classroom slinky longitudinal-vs-transverse demonstration; helical-spring longitudinal modes]; #5 NOT claimed вАФ no physical-modeling paper shipped in the last 7 days, said plainly in RESEARCH ¬І580). `diversity: banned=[keyboard/MIDI-primary-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY вЖТ force GPU-compute/3D (JURY), explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural (JURY, adult, n/a), engraved-parchment vibe (JURY, adult, n/a), warm-meadow/storybook kids vibe (over-rep 7√Ч), AND soft: continuum-SURFACE-physics-sim (cloth 995 / fluid 988, kids 2√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**touch-flick INPUT**, **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the jury-sanctioned 3D escape from the flat-2D monoculture вАФ true-3D 1√Ч recent), **longitudinal-standing-wave TECHNIQUE** (lab-first, 1-D coil NOT a 2D continuum surface, so it dodges the kids surface-sim soft-rut), **bright-rainbow-playground VIBE** (off warm-meadow/parchment/cosmic)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** RESEARCH ¬І580's dive found this week's cs.SD frontier is entirely neural (TTS/codecs/music-gen) with ZERO physical wave-propagation synthesis вЖТ a transparent "see-the-wave-that-makes-the-sound" instrument is the contrarian on-mandate build (the praised "sound IS physics" lane: 960/970/995). **Winner of a kids DEEP 2-approach fire**; banked **`1004-kids-slinky-wave` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ the SAME concept on a genuine WebGPU `@compute @workgroup_size(64)` longitudinal mass-spring chain (double-buffered ping-pong storage buffers, async one-frame-behind `mapAsync` readback; CPU N=96 fallback driving the identical path) вАФ the jury-encouraged scarce GPU-compute surface; de-selected ONLY on verification ease (1005 runs on any WebGL2 phone with no adapter/permission friction, so the 06:30 artifact IS what's designed; 1004's GPU path is headless-unverifiable and degrades to CPU on most phones anyway) вАФ IDEAS ¬І580; loser `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; no network/AI/mic/camera/cost); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 36.5s`** вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; the **1005 folder produced ZERO build warnings**; scoped `next lint` вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; grep-clean вАФ hand-written true-3D `perspective`/`lookAt`, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js/banned `text-white/30вАУ50`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device-verified** (no audio/GPU in the box вАФ the modal-amplitudeвЖТloudness mapping, helix/camera framing, and physics constants (k, damping, flick strength) are reasoned + tsc/lint-clean but unheard/unseen; always-on drone + ~2s-idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding, moving glance with zero interaction). ## (Cycle 575 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 walk-the-room explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/992-dream-house](/dream/992-dream-house)** вАФ Dream House: **walk your body through a field of sustained just-intoned sine drones вАФ move even slightly and some overtones bloom while others fade, so the music is pure standing-wave timbre you sculpt with your position. No notes, no wrong notes.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 575 (adult / **body-pose + pointer INPUT** вАФ MediaPipe Pose torso centroid, pointer/touch fallback / **WebGPU particle field** (WGSL, WebGL2вЖТCanvas2D fallback) / **just-intonation drone + spatial-well spectral sculpt + HRTF** TECH / **Marian Zazeela magenta/violet light** vibe). **A deliberate browser port of La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela's _Dream House_** (MELA Foundation, TriBeCa вАФ on view through 2026-06-21) and the **DEEP extension of the lab's only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`**, exactly as JURY 2026-06-27 asked ("extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument; retire the explainable-inverse formula; do pure timbre / spatial presence, not a music-theory explainer"). **Eight permanently-running sine `OscillatorNode`s** at small-integer just ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 7/4, 2/1, 9/4) over a ~72.6 Hz body-felt fundamental вАФ every interval beatless by construction, so any subset is consonant; the partials never stop (a drone you sculpt, not notes you trigger). **Position sculpts the spectrum:** each partial owns a spatial Gaussian "well"; your position sets per-partial gain by proximity (normalized, with a floor so it's never silent), so a small move re-balances which overtones dominate; faint position-dependent detuned twin oscillators (~0.06вАУ1.4 Hz) produce the shifting standing-wave beats that are the installation's signature; all changes `setTargetAtTime`-smoothed (zero clicks). **HRTF:** one AudioContext, the performer is the AudioListener, each partial sits at a fixed 3D position via an HRTF `PannerNode` вАФ as you move, the whole field re-pans around you (you walk *among* the sine sources). Bus вЖТ 6 kHz lowpass вЖТ compressor/limiter вЖТ ~1.6 s fade-in master so the eight-voice cluster never clips. "Leave a resonance" freezes a spectral spot as a glowing marker you can walk back to. Renders as Zazeela-magenta calligraphic glow blooms tracking each partial's amplitude. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [pose/pointer input + 8-voice just-intonation drone engine + spatial-well spectral sculpt + HRTF spatialization + WebGPU particle render = 5] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, _Dream House_**, MELA, through 2026-06-21; **Janet Cardiff, _The Forty Part Motet_**] ¬Ј #4 multi-cycle [the 977 spatial-instrument thread] ¬Ј #5 dated **RESEARCH ¬І575** вАФ today's dive). `diversity: banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-only (JURY вАФ force GPU-compute/3D), "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" move (JURY 4√Ч), engraved-manuscript/parchment adult vibe (JURY 3√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**body-pose+pointer INPUT** (deepens the abandoned pose sensor вАФ JURY #5), **WebGPU particle OUTPUT** (the scarce, JURY-ENCOURAGED surface вАФ rebuilds compute from 1√Ч), **just-intonation drone / pure-timbre spatial-presence TECH** (NOT a harmony/neural explainer вАФ JURY #1), **Zazeela magenta-light VIBE** (not parchment, not cosmic, not storybook)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬І575 dive surfaced the real Dream House *currently on view* (MELA, through 2026-06-21) and this build IS it вАФ the tightest possible today's-research вЖТ today's-build chain. **Love-aware:** pulled by `148-spatial-palette`вЭ§пЄП / `107-ocean-presence`вЭ§пЄП / `243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП (spatial / presence / spectral). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client synthesis, no network/AI/cost); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGPU + WebGL2/Canvas2D + Web Audio; MediaPipe loaded optionally from CDN at runtime). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.8min` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; the **992 folder produced ZERO build warnings**; scoped `next lint` вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; grep-clean вАФ real WGSL `@vertex`/`requestAdapter`, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js/banned `text-white/30вАУ50`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Verification:** demoable on the Canvas2D path alone with a ~1.5 s auto-start drone + Lissajous auto-drift so an unattended 06:30 glance is sounding and moving; the WebGPU/HRTF/just-intonation paths are tsc/lint-clean and reasoned but not browser-run in the box, and the well-width / beat-depth / master-level want a real-device listen (headphones for the HRTF). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-explorer fire on the walk-between-rooms concept; banked **`991-dream-rooms` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** (a 3√Ч3 circle-of-fifths floor plan where walking through a doorway is a real key modulation; ghost loops live in their home chamber, muffled "through the walls"; operator floor-plan map) + **`993-resonant-halls`** (a cruciform cathedral where each hall has its own procedural convolution-reverb IR + resonant room modes вАФ the ROOM acoustics are the instrument). ## (Cycle 574 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 GPU-compute/3D explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/988-kids-jelly-pond](/dream/988-kids-jelly-pond)** вАФ Sing the Pond: **a 4-year-old drags a finger across a glowing pond of thousands of REAL GPU-simulated water particles вАФ stirring, pooling, splashing вАФ and the water's own motion is the instrument.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 574 (kids 4+ / **touch/pointer-drag INPUT** / **WebGPU compute Position-Based-Fluids** вАФ a real GPU fluid solver, NOT a Canvas2D loop and NOT a single flat fragment shader / **fluid-motion вЖТ synth mapping** / sunlit amber-on-teal pond vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27's loudest structural finding** вАФ "WebGPU compute collapsed 6√ЧвЖТ1√Ч, 14 of 15 builds render flat 2D; force a real GPU-compute or 3D path вАФ a fluid / particle sim that is the instrument's resonating BODY, not a 2D plot you read a pitch off." Here the sim is the body: each frame runs **5 WGSL compute passes over ~4,096 particles** вАФ `predict` (integrate the finger's radial push) вЖТ `buildGrid` (atomic spatial-hash neighbour search) вЖТ `computeDensity` (poly6 density + the PBF constraint scalar ќї) вЖТ `solve` (iterative position correction with an s_corr tensile term, several iterations) вЖТ `finalize` (round-pond boundary, velocity from position-delta, XSPH damping, and **GPU-atomic accumulation of motion stats** вАФ avg/peak speed, pooled density under the finger, splash flag вАФ copied back in an 8-word buffer to drive audio). **The water plays the music:** stir-speed/local velocity вЖТ a soft continuous shimmer voice in **F-Lydian / major-pentatonic** (faster water climbs, always in key вАФ no wrong notes); a splash (fast drag) вЖТ a gentle marimba sparkle arpeggio; pooled density under the finger вЖТ a fuller/lower chord when calm, brighter/sparser when scattered; an always-on water-drone keeps it never-silent. Renders the simulated positions as warm additive metaball glints (sunlit amber on teal-green). **Kids-safe:** вЙ•72px Play gate (gesture-inits AudioContext), instant response, no fail states, `masterGain 0.26 вЖТ lowpass 6.5kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1)`, attacks вЙ•30ms; **~2s-idle ghost-finger auto-demo** stirs the pond so an unattended glance both *sees* the water move and *hears* music within ~1s. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch input + WebGPU PBF compute solver + fluid-motionвЖТchord/splash synth + GPU additive render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Macklin & M√Љller, "Position Based Fluids," SIGGRAPH 2013**; the 2026 GPU-physical-sim frontier **arXiv:2606.21753**, June 23 2026] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І574** вАФ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4√Ч/10 last-10 вАФ AT audit cap), flat-fragment-shader-only output (JURY вАФ force GPU-compute/3D), WebGL2-as-primary (5√Ч/10 вАФ over soft cap), computer-keyboard/MIDI input (JURY adult-ban + audit), "explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural-frontier" technique (JURY 4√Ч), engraved-manuscript/parchment vibe (JURY вАФ n/a kids), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes-as-the-whole-idea (JURY kids ban), shake input (just used 984)] ¬Ј picked=[**WebGPU-compute PBF fluid OUTPUT** (clears the 2D monoculture, answers JURY #3, rebuilds the scarce GPU-compute capability вАФ 1√Ч/10), **touch-drag INPUT** (0√Ч in the last-10 window; the kid-natural sensor), **physical-simulation-as-the-resonating-body TECH** (NOT a harmony explainer, NOT a neural inversion), **sunlit-pond VIBE** (warm, not cosmic)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬І574 dive (the 2026 GPU frontier is heterogeneous physical-sim-as-instrument) drove all three briefs; visible chain *today's research вЖТ today's build*. **Love-aware (a rare cycle where loves pull the pick):** Karel's loves of **`84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП** (fluid), **`133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП** (pond/ripple) and **`130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП** (GPU particle compute) directly confirm the fluid + GPU-compute direction. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client, no network/AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGPU + WebGL2 fallback + Web Audio). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 51s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; folder grep-clean вАФ real `@compute`/`createComputePipeline`, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js, no banned `text-white/30вАУ50`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Verification:** the best dent of the three вАФ **touch-verifiable on a phone in ~1s** (just drag a finger; no mic/tilt/permission friction), the easiest of this fire for Karel to actually experience at 06:30; the WebGPU compute path + audio mapping are tsc/lint-clean and reasoned but not browser-run in the box (the always-on drone + ghost-finger auto-demo + WebGL2вЖТaudio-only fallback chain guarantee a sounding, moving glance even if a device's GPU path fails). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three GPU-compute/3D materials made playable вАФ fluid / cloth / swarm); banked **`989-kids-star-cloth` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ tilt a tablet to roll a glowing moon-ball across a **WebGPU mass-spring cloth rendered in TRUE 3D** (the lab's only true-3D scene-graph build, jury "3D is 0√Ч"; the cloth's membrane-vibration modes ARE the sound вАФ the most literal resonating-body; calm bedtime) вАФ and **`990-kids-firefly-flock`** вАФ HUM and **~30k WebGPU-compute boid-fireflies** (Reynolds 1987) gather to your voice and sing back a choir (largest GPU count, freshest sensor). Both returned complete + builder-reported tsc/next-lint-clean (READMEs written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-574/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І574). ## (Cycle 573 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/986-empty-words](/dream/986-empty-words)** вАФ Empty Words: **paste any text вАФ a poem, an email, Thoreau вАФ and a transparent engine *sets it to music* deterministically: vowels pick scale degrees of a real mode, stress lands downbeats, punctuation breathes and cadences, and every note shows you the letter that caused it.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 573 (adult composers / **text-paste INPUT** вАФ a `<textarea>`, the lab's first text-as-score input, 0√Ч ever / **raw-WebGL2 engraved-manuscript glyph field**, Canvas2D fallback / **deterministic rule-based text-setting** вАФ a pure `compose(text, mode)` function, no model, fully offline / **engraved ink-on-charcoal manuscript** vibe, off cosmic-glow). **The explainable, deterministic INVERSE of the 2026 neural textвЖТmusic frontier** (Text2midi / MeloTrans / diffusion captionвЖТMIDI вАФ all opaque black boxes): here the same text *always* yields the same piece and the engine names *why* each note sounds. **Six vowels (a e i o u y) map across the seven degrees of a chosen real mode** (D Dorian default ¬Ј A Aeolian ¬Ј C Ionian ¬Ј F Lydian вАФ selectable), ordered by vowel openness for a singable contour; **stressed/long/capitalized syllables вЖТ longer downbeat durations**, unstressed вЖТ short passing tones; **punctuation вЖТ rhythm & cadence** (comma = breath rest, period = phrase cadence resolving toward the tonic, `!`/`?` = leap/raised tension), newlines = new phrase, capitalization вЖТ louder dynamics; an always-on diatonic **harmonic bed** keeps the sung melody consonant. A live **"now singing"** readout names the exact vowel/stress/mark cause of every note вАФ explainability as a first-class feature, so a composer can interrogate the logic. **Determinism is real and tested:** no `Math.random()` touches which notes play or when (only a bounded ¬±4-cent cosmetic timbre detune); a Node dry-run over the default passage + edge cases (empty string, all-punctuation, a 400-word paragraph, unicode/accented text) never threw, always produced вЙ•1 pitched note, and was **byte-identical across two runs in all four modes** вАФ so the piece is reproducible AND fully **hand-verifiable by typing**, with zero hardware. **Four subsystems:** text tokenizer + syllable/stress heuristic ¬Ј the deterministic `textвЖТNoteEvent[]` composer (with per-note provenance) ¬Ј a Web Audio ~25ms look-ahead scheduler with the harmonic bed ¬Ј a raw GLSL ES 3.00 WebGL2 manuscript renderer (glyph-atlas texture + procedural parchment/staff-lines/grain + amber glow on the singing token), with a Canvas2D fallback of the same look. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**John Cage *Empty Words*** 1974 вАФ his dissolution of Thoreau's *Journal* into graded sound-events; **Guidonian / solmization** rule-based text-setting] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І573** вАФ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√Ч), **keyboard/MIDI INPUT (4√Ч/10 last-10 вАФ at audit cap)**, **Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4√Ч/10 вАФ at audit cap)**, cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√Ч), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] ¬Ј picked=[**text-paste INPUT** (0√Ч ever вАФ the freshest possible, clears JURY #3 non-pointer, off the at-cap keyboard/MIDI), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3√Ч/10, NOT the at-cap Canvas2D), **deterministic text-setting TECH** (sound/composition-as-object вАФ clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell; lab-first technique), **engraved-manuscript VIBE** (off cosmic-glow вАФ clears JURY #5)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬І573 dive (the 2026 text/prosodyвЖТmusic frontier is uniformly opaque neural вАФ prosodic-dynamics arXiv:2606.25369 Jun 25 / VoiceTTA 2606.26534 Jun 26 / Text2midi / MeloTrans / diffusion-symbolic 2603.00576 вАФ motivating the explainable, authored text-setting inversion) drove the flagship brief; visible chain *today's research вЖТ today's build*. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 42s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Verification: the strongest dent in a while** вАФ the composition is **headless-proven deterministic** (byte-identical Node dry-run) AND fully **hand-verifiable by typing** with zero hardware (no mic/camera/accelerometer/GPU-required); the WebGL2 paint + live audio timbre + Canvas2D fallback are tsc/lint-clean and reasoned but not browser-run in the box; the syllable/stress logic is a clean heuristic, not a pronunciation dictionary (documented). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal non-banned inputs вАФ text / live-data / tilt); banked **`985-quake-choir` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** (live USGS earthquake feed вЖТ generative modal bell-choir over a drone, WebGL2 seismographic map вАФ the builder fetched the **real feed end-to-end: 202/202 features parsed, HTTP 200, permissive CORS**, with a seeded GR-distributed offline fallback вАФ IDEAS ¬І573) + **`987-tilt-spectra`** (device-tilt вЖТ additive spectral timbre-sculpting, WebGL2 CRT oscilloscope where the scope draws the literal output waveform вАФ IDEAS ¬І573). Both returned complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-573/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). Design notes: `src/app/dream/986-empty-words/README.md`

## Cycle 572 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/984-kids-shake-bells](/dream/984-kids-shake-bells)** вАФ Magic Bell Tray: **a 4-year-old SHAKES the tablet like a tray of magic handbells вАФ and each shake rings real, physically-modeled bells that climb then descend a genuine G-Mixolydian ladder, harder shakes ringing a fuller sparkling arpeggio.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 572 (kids 4+ / **off-glass accelerometer SHAKE, the non-pointer input** вАФ *not* tilt, *not* a finger on glass / **raw-WebGL2 additive point-sprite glow field**, Canvas2D fallback / **real modal bell synthesis (inharmonic partials) walking a G-Mixolydian ladder** / warm gold-on-blue-violet night vibe). **The rare recent build Karel can VERIFY by shaking his review phone at 06:30** вАФ a direct dent in the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 4+ juries). An always-on soft G2+D3 drone keeps it never-silent; successive shakes walk a ~2-octave **G Mixolydian (G A B C D E FвЩЃ)** ladder UP then turn around and DESCEND (a rising-then-falling shimmer, not a fixed loop); shake intensity (0..1) sets both *how many* bells ring (gentle = 1вАУ2 soft tones, big = a 3вАУ5 bell sparkling arpeggio) and strike brightness. **Real modal bell synthesis, not samples and not a single sine** вАФ each bell is a small bank of inharmonic partials (~1, 2, 2.4, 3, 4.5) with independent exponential decays + slight per-partial detune so the bell *beats* and shimmers; polyphony вИЪ-normalized so a big arpeggio never clips. **Deliberately NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes scale and NOT a IвАУIVвАУV / VвЖТI functional cadence** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban #1) вАФ modal *color* via the lowered-7th FвЩЃ, a different musical idiom from the lab's recent cadence toys (957/974). **Shake-onset detection** (`motion.ts`): `accelerationIncludingGravity` low-passed to estimate gravity вЖТ subtract вЖТ linear-accel magnitude вЖТ downward threshold crossing just past the peak with a ~150ms refractory вЖТ intensity; iOS 13+ `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start tap; thresholds exported as top-level constants (`SHAKE_THRESHOLD`/`SHAKE_SENSITIVITY`/вА¶) flagged for real-device tuning. Kids-safe `master gain вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass ~6500Hz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`, attacks вЙ•10ms, ~12-min goodnight lull within a ~15-min cap. **Degrades fully:** sensor denied/absent вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice but the вЙ•176px round SHAKE! button + spacebar + ~3s-idle **ghost auto-shaker** all keep it sounding & blooming with zero hardware; no WebGL2 вЖТ Canvas2D glow fallback; neither вЖТ notice, bells still ring; full teardown on unmount. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [shake-onset detector + modal bell synth + ladder walker + WebGL2 glow field = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Orff Schulwerk** handbell/body-percussion pedagogy ¬Ј modal-color-vs-functional-cadence ¬Ј the **2026 embodied-children-music** line incl. *Moving Mandala* 2025] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І572 вАФ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√Ч), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√Ч), **keyboard/MIDI INPUT (4√Ч/10 last-10 вАФ over audit cap)**, **Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4√Ч/10 вАФ at audit cap)**] ¬Ј picked=[**off-glass accelerometer SHAKE INPUT** (0√Ч recent вАФ clears JURY #3; not the at-cap keyboard/MIDI, not camera/mic/tilt/tap), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3√Ч/10, NOT the at-cap Canvas2D), **modal-bell-ladder + G-Mixolydian TECH** (real mode вАФ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic, NOT a cadence rhyme; pure synthesis, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **warm gold-handbell-night VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a)+(c):** today's ¬І572 dive (the explainable, body-first, physically-modeled inversion of 2026's opaque neural streaming music generators вАФ arXiv:2606.24307, June 26 2026) drove both briefs AND resurrects the ¬І570 в≠Р banked `kids-shake-bells` seed. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 100s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/sensor-verified** (no audio or accelerometer device in the build box вАФ bell timbre, polyphony normalization, and the shake thresholds are reasoned + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed; the ~3s-idle ghost auto-shaker guarantees a *sounding, blooming* glance with zero hardware, **AND uniquely it's hand-verifiable by shaking a phone**). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept вАФ "shake real modal bells from your own motion" вАФ √Ч two interaction models); banked **`985-kids-shake-mobile` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ the continuous-physics twin: shake feeds energy into a **Verlet/pendulum sim of ~8 hanging handbells** that SWAY and ring on **clapper-velocity-peak / neighbor-collision**, so the music is *born from the simulated swing* not an onset threshold; **its swing-physics is the precise cycle-2 graft** (fold it BETWEEN 984's discrete bells so they visibly sway between strikes and a hard shake sends a swing-wave down the ladder). Returned complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-572/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І572). ## (Cycle 571 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/983-tension-journey](/dream/983-tension-journey)** вАФ Tension Journey: **pick an emotional ARC shape (slow arch / build-and-drop / double wave / ritual rise / calm plateau) and a 4вАУ5 minute piece composes ITSELF to follow that exact tension curve вАФ every chord placed for a stated numeric reason, the whole composition explainable instead of opaque.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 571 (adult composers / **computer-keyboard + preset arc buttons, the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D scrolling tension-ribbon timeline** вАФ the legible, score-like renderer / **Elaine Chew Spiral-Array tonal-tension model used as a compositional SEARCH TARGET** / architectural ink-on-parchment vibe). **A journey-engine alternative AND the explainable, deterministic counterpart to 2026's opaque neural full-song generators** (RESEARCH ¬І571 вАФ the 2026 long-form-structure frontier, PhraseLDM/Depth-Structured-Recurrence/Live-Music-Diffusion, is all *learned and black-box*; this is the transparent inverse). The engine computes Chew's **three tension measures вАФ cloud diameter (dissonance) ¬Ј cloud momentum (tonal movement) ¬Ј tensile strain (distance from home key)** вАФ on a real 3D Spiral-Array helix `P(k)=(sin kѕА/2, cos kѕА/2, k¬Ј0.4)`, blends them (`0.34¬Јdiameter + 0.18¬Јmomentum + 0.48¬Јstrain`, strain dominant вАФ distance-from-home is the strongest felt cue), and at each step runs a **beam search (width 3) over a real harmonic vocabulary** (diatonic triads/7ths + Neapolitan-6, German-aug-6, dim7, secondary dominants, tritone-sub, modal mixture) scoring each candidate `|tensionвИТtarget|¬Ј1.0 + voiceLeading¬Ј0.22 + repeatPenalty¬Ј0.15` вАФ so it picks the chord whose measured tension best moves the music toward the arc, then **shows the "why" tag near the playhead** (`tensile strain 0.61 ¬Ј tension +0.04`). **Long-form WITH memory (the lab's thin menu category):** stateful key/previous-CE/section tracking + seeded **mulberry32** PRNG (`DEFAULT_SEED=0x7e551042` вЖТ a given arc+key reproduces exactly) + phrase-boundary fifth-pivot/mode-flip modulations, so **minute 5 is in a different key and character than minute 1** вАФ not a loop. Honestly maps the arc's [0,1] shape into the vocabulary's reachable band `[0.22,0.70]` *before both scoring and drawing the guide*, so "the ribbon hugs the guide" is a like-for-like claim. Look-ahead Web-Audio scheduler (FM-ish ADSR voices + bass root + sparse melody; tension drives brightness/roughness so the arc is *audible*; `gainвЖТlowpassвЖТcompressorвЖТdestination`, voice cap). Canvas2D: dashed target guide + filled amber achieved-ribbon (turns rose on overshoot) + violet playhead + modulation ticks + three live meters. **Auto-starts ~1.2s with the "Slow Arch"** so a zero-setup 06:30 glance hears + sees the arc develop. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object вАФ not a GPU sim you pulse a bell off of": the composition *is* the object) + **#4** (verification debt вАФ see below) + Karel's standing priority #4 (journey-engine alternatives: EDM build-and-drop, ritual, cinematic arcs). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [keyboard/preset input + Spiral-Array tension engine + beam-search composer + tension-driven synth + Canvas2D ribbon = 5] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Elaine Chew, _The Spiral Array_ (2014)**; **Herremans & Chew, "Tension ribbons", TENOR 2016**; **Herremans & Chew, _MorpheuS_, IEEE TAC**] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І571 вАФ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). The *tension model specifically* (cloud diameter/momentum/tensile strain as a generative target) is lab-first вАФ `370-tonal-map` used only Chew's center-of-effect/tonal-focus for modulation *reading*, never the three tension measures nor as a *compositional* target (#1 plausible, claimed cautiously). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√Ч), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] ¬Ј picked=[**keyboard + preset-button INPUT** (non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3; the instrument is the autonomous engine, not a finger), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury-blessed legitimate, "earns its place"; the legible score-like renderer, NOT the WebGPU pile), **Spiral-Array tension-as-search-target TECH** (sound/composition-as-object вАФ clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **architectural ink-on-parchment VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's ¬І571 dive (the explainable-tension inversion of the opaque 2026 long-form frontier) drove both briefs. **Dents the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 4+ juries):** uniquely among recent ships, the engine was **headless-VERIFIED** вАФ run across all 5 arcs at 110 chords, **mean tension-vs-target error вЙИ 0.026вАУ0.033** (max вЙИ 0.11вАУ0.15 on the 0вАУ1 scale) and **5 distinct keys per piece** вАФ empirical evidence the composer tracks the arc and minute 5 вЙ† minute 1 (the *audible* brightness/roughness with tension is reasoned from the audio code, not a listening test). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` вЖТ **0 errors**; all build warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 983 folder); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept вАФ "make tonal tension a live, visible, audible object" вАФ √Ч two interaction models); banked **`982-tension-ribbon` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вАФ the real-time *played* twin: play chords on the keyboard/**Web-MIDI** and a **raw-WebGL2 3D tension ribbon** swells/twists/reheats per the same three measures while the synth brightens and detune-roughens with tension; **its live 3D spiral-helix viz + MIDI-played perturbation is the precise cycle-2 graft** (watch 983 compose AND grab the keyboard to bend the live tension target by hand) + add **key-tracking** (982's own #1 wart: fixed-C strain anchor) to both. Returned complete + builder-verified tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-571/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І571). Design notes: `src/app/dream/983-tension-journey/README.md`

## (Cycle 570 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/981-kids-happy-sad-tree](/dream/981-kids-happy-sad-tree)** вАФ Happy / Sad Tree: **a 4-year-old taps glowing fruit on a singing tree, then flips ONE big вШАпЄП/рЯМЩ switch вАФ and the SAME song, SAME taps suddenly feel happy or tender as the whole world flips between real parallel C-major and C-minor.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 570 (kids 4+ / **discrete touch-TAP** вЙ•68px fruit вАФ *not* drag, dodges the JURY 7√Ч pointer-drag ban / **raw-WebGL2 sky fragment-shader** goldвЖФindigo mode crossfade, Canvas2D gradient fallback / **parallel majorвЖФminor mode-flip with voice-led chord re-voicing** / bright gold/indigo storybook vibe). **The single most literal "feel real harmony" kids toy in the lab вАФ and the most ROBUST/verifiable one (zero permissions: no mic, no camera, no accelerometer, no GPU-required вЖТ it plays instantly on any phone/laptop at 06:30).** An always-on warm pad holds a **IвАУviвАУIVвАУV** progression (in minor **iвАУVIвАУivвАУv** вАФ same roman functions, same bass roots; only the chord *quality* changes). The giant вШАпЄП/рЯМЩ toggle flips the world **parallel C-major вЖФ C-natural-minor**: the held pad does NOT restart вАФ each voice **glides to its nearest chord tone in the new mode over ~400ms** (true voice leading, the core technique) while the WebGL2 sky eases warm-goldвЖФcool-indigo over ~600ms, so the world *melts* from happy to tender. **Real diatonic tonal harmony, explicitly NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety scale** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban, #1) вАФ the seven fruit are scale degrees 1вАУ7 and **taps quantize to the *current* mode's diatonic scale**, so the lowered 3rd/6th/7th (exactly where the feeling lives) are in play yet there are still no wrong notes. Idle ghost auto-player taps a phrase + breathes between modes every ~8s so a silent glance demos the whole idea; ~15-min gentle fade; kids-safe `gain вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass ~6500Hz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor`. **Named ref: Kate Hevner's mode/affect experiments (1935вАУ37)** (major=bright/happy, minor=tender, *independent of melody*). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [discrete-tap input + parallel-mode harmony engine w/ voice-led re-voicing + diatonic pluck synth + WebGL2 sky shader = 4] ¬Ј #3 named ref [Hevner 1935вАУ37] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І570 вАФ today's dive: MDPI *IJERPH* 2026 child mode-affect review + *Applied Sciences* 2026 key/modeвЖТemotion-in-piano; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√Ч), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√Ч), camera/body (kids 1√Ч recent вАФ 978), tilt (kids 2√Ч вАФ 974/964), mic-voice/pitch (kids 2√Ч вАФ 972/969)] ¬Ј picked=[**discrete touch-TAP INPUT** (NOT drag вАФ dodges the 7√Ч pointer-drag ban; a distinct discrete idiom), **raw-WebGL2 + Canvas2D-fallback OUTPUT** (not the over-rep adult-cosmic GPU look), **parallel majorвЖФminor voice-led mode-flip TECH** (real diatonic harmony вАФ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **bright gold/indigo storybook VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Research-first path (c)+(a):** resurrects the в≠Р ¬І568-banked recent-research IDEAS seed `kids-happy-sad-tree` (itself from the ¬І568 dive), reinforced by today's ¬І570 child-mode-affect papers. **Directly dents the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 3+ juries):** unlike 978 (camera) / 980 (accelerometer) / the breath/shake siblings, this needs **zero hardware/permissions**, so it's the easiest recent kids build for Karel to actually *play and hear* on his morning phone вАФ the ¬І568 seed flagged it exactly as "easiest to hand-verify вЖТ directly dents the jury's #1 liability." **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` вЖТ **0 errors**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 981 folder; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT yet ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box вАФ the ~400ms voice-leading glide and the majorвЖФminor re-voicing are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by ear; the idle ghost auto-player guarantees a *sounding* glance with zero hardware). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer/discrete input into real (non-pentatonic) harmony*; banked **`982-kids-shake-bells`** (SHAKE the device off-glass вЖТ a real **G-Mixolydian** bell ladder that climbs/descends with shake intensity, Orff Schulwerk + modal color, WebGL2) and **`983-kids-breath-meadow`** (blow into the mic вАФ breath **ENERGY** not pitch вАФ to swell a voice-led **D-Lydian IвАУIIвАУviвАУIV** progression as flowers bloom, Canvas2D; EWI/shakuhachi breath-dynamics). Both returned complete + builder-reported tsc-clean (READMEs written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-570/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І570). ## (Cycle 569 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 interaction models, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/979-cantus-engine](/dream/979-cantus-engine)** вАФ The Cantus Engine: **seed a 3вАУ6-note subject and watch Resonance compose a 5-minute, self-developing fugue in front of you вАФ a deterministic, *explainable* counterpoint machine where every note is a named Bach/Fux operation you can see fire on the score.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 569 (adult composers / **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard, the non-pointer input вАФ revives the 1√Ч MIDI sensor** / **raw-WebGL2 scrolling piano-roll/manuscript** with transform labels (Canvas2D fallback) / **deterministic long-form motivic-development counterpoint engine + Fux voice-leading scorer** / engraved-manuscript vibe). **The deliberate human-legible inverse of 2026's black-box neural Bach-imitators** (RESEARCH ¬І569 / **arXiv:2606.13626**, June 11 2026 вАФ three deep-net families all *imitating* Bach from data): here there are **no trained weights and no sampling** вАФ every note is produced by a named contrapuntal operation (diatonic transposition ¬Ј real/tonal answer at the fifth ¬Ј **inversion** ¬Ј **retrograde** ¬Ј **augmentation/diminution** ¬Ј **stretto** ¬Ј **modulation**), and a **Fux voice-leading scorer** (rewards stepwise motion + consonance on strong beats + contrary motion; penalizes parallel 5ths/8ves + voice crossing + large leaps) decides each voice's exact pitch вАФ pass a seed and it plays the same piece every time. **Long-form with memory (~310s/cycle), the lab's thin menu category:** Exposition вЖТ Episode вЖТ Modulation вЖТ Stretto вЖТ Coda, then it loops **with a perfect-fifth key drift + a mode flip each cycle** so **minute 5 is a different key and character than minute 1** вАФ not a short loop; a stateful `EngineState` tracks key, voice queues, fired transforms, section, elapsed beats. 3 independent voices on FM-triangle ADSR tones, **Web-Audio look-ahead scheduler** (~25ms tick / ~100ms lookahead, NOT a pre-rendered buffer); master `gain 0.26 вЖТ lowpass 9kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, 14-voice cap with stealing. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object вАФ the simulation should be the instrument's resonating body, not a screensaver you pulse a bell off of": a counterpoint engine is **pure music, zero GPU sim**), **#3** ("build the adult MIDI/desk-controller piece вАФ MIDI is 1√Ч, only 947"), and **#5** (engraved-manuscript register, **off the over-used adult cosmic-glow**); squarely on Karel's "personal audio workspace for pianists/composers" line. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [MIDI/keyboard input + long-form development engine + Fux scorer + WebGL2 piano-roll render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Fux, _Gradus ad Parnassum_, 1725**; **J.S. Bach, _Art of Fugue_ / _Two-Part Inventions_**; arXiv 2606.13626] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І569 вАФ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4√Ч), Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (6√Ч/10, over audit cap), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] ¬Ј picked=[**Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard INPUT** (non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3; revives the 1√Ч MIDI sensor), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3√Ч/10, NOT the over-rep Canvas2D), **deterministic motivic-development counterpoint TECH** (sound-as-object вАФ clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell; the counterpoint lane unmined since ~552), **engraved-manuscript VIBE** (off cosmic-glow вАФ clears JURY #5)]` вАФ clears every ban. Research-first path **(a)+(c)**: today's ¬І569 dive drives the build *by inversion* AND resurrects the в≠Р recent-research IDEAS seed `948-cantus-engine`. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 979 folder; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/`Math.random`/three.js); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio/MIDI device in the build box вАФ the Fux scorer's voice-leading, the per-cycle key-drift/mode-flip, and the transform timing are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by ear; **adds to the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** вАФ see MORNING. **The ~2.2s idle auto-start of the B-A-C-H subject guarantees a *sounding, scrolling* glance with zero hardware** вАФ the easiest recent build to hand-verify on a laptop: keyboard-only, no mic/camera/MIDI required to hear it develop). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept вАФ "an explainable counterpoint machine" вАФ √Ч two interaction models); banked **`980-counterpoint-loom` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вАФ the real-time/legible twin: play a melody and a **per-beat beam search (width 6)** weaves 1вАУ3 live companion voices under *enforced* Fux rules (0 parallels/crossings вАФ builder dry-ran it), with **rose `вИ•5 вЬЧ` reject-flashes** so the rules read sound-off; **its enforced beam search + reject-overlay is the precise cycle-2 graft that fixes 979's #1 wart** (greedy, no-lookahead voice-leading). Returned complete + builder-verified tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-569/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І569). ## (Cycle 568 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/978-kids-cloud-weather](/dream/978-kids-cloud-weather)** вАФ Conduct the Sky: **a 4-year-old conducts a bright musical SKY with their whole BODY вАФ and it's the *quality* of the movement (gentle vs. big, sudden vs. smooth, high vs. low) that shapes the music, never a finger on glass.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 568 (kids 4+ / **front-camera whole-body motion вАФ frame-difference, NO ML model, the non-pointer/embodied input**, with a ghost auto-conductor fallback / **Canvas2D painterly daytime sky** / **Laban Effort movement-quality вЖТ musical-expression mapping** / bright daydream-meadow vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's loudest standing structural ask (#3): "force a non-pointer input вАФ drag-on-glass is back to 7√Ч; embodied, not a finger"** вАФ here nothing touches the glass; the child stands back and *moves*. Three **Laban Effort** qualities each drive a distinct musical dimension: **Space/height** (motion-weighted vertical centroid вЖТ register, reach up = higher), **Weight/energy** (total frame-difference motion вЖТ dynamics + how many flowers bloom, a big sweep = loud bright bloom), and **Time вАФ sudden vs. sustained** (the time-derivative of energy вЖТ articulation, a sudden burst = a staccato sparkle-pluck + shooting star, smooth motion = a legato sung tone). The harmony is a real **C-Lydian** mode (C D E FвЩѓ G A B вАФ the raised-4th "wonder/magic" color over a Cadd9вЖФD/C lift pad) вАФ **explicitly NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety scale** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban, #1). **Input technique = pure frame-difference, no ML:** each frame drawn to a 64√Ч48 offscreen canvas, per-pixel luminance differenced vs. the previous frame, thresholded mask вЖТ (energy, vertical centroid, suddenness), adaptive baseline self-calibrating to room light вАФ no MediaPipe/TensorFlow/npm-ML deps. **Output = Canvas2D** (the jury blessed Canvas2D as "fresh-again, earns its place" вАФ deliberately not the over-rep raw-GPU shader): glowing sun, parallax clouds, rolling meadow, flowers that bloom on notes, birds/sparkles on sudden bursts; warm saturated daylight palette, **deliberately OFF the (adult-side) cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster**. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І568, researchвЖТbuild chain visible):** **BeSound** (embodied music education for children mapping whole-body movement qualities to rhythm/melody/harmony via **Rudolf Laban's Theory of Effort**, surfaced alongside the 2026 Sound Scene embodied-sound program + Antle "embodied metaphors help children learn"). Other named refs: **Rudolf Laban, Effort (1947)** ¬Ј **BeSound** ¬Ј the film-scoring Lydian-as-wonder convention. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [camera frame-diff capture + Laban-Effort movement-quality analyzer + Lydian harmony/voice engine + Web Audio synth/pad + Canvas2D sky render = 5] ¬Ј #3 named references ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І568 вАФ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√Ч), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√Ч), tilt (kids 2√Ч recent вАФ 974/964), mic-voice (kids 2√Ч recent вАФ 972/969)] ¬Ј picked=[**front-camera whole-body INPUT** (non-pointer/embodied вАФ clears JURY #3; camera/body is 0√Ч in the last-10 committed вЖТ the freshest kids input), **Canvas2D painterly OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **Laban-Effort movement-quality вЖТ Lydian-harmony TECH** (real modal harmony from movement *quality*, not a trigger вАФ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; the motion is the instrument, NOT a GPU sim you pulse a bell off), **bright daydream-meadow VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; camera is local-only, never recorded/stored/transmitted вАФ pixels differenced in place and discarded each frame; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/ear-verified** (no webcam or audio device in the build box вАФ the frame-diff Laban analyzer, the staccato/legato articulation switch, and the Lydian pad balance are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by eye/ear; **this adds to the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** вАФ see MORNING. The ghost figure-8 auto-conductor on camera-deny/2.5s-idle + always-drifting sky guarantee a *sounding, moving* glance with zero hardware). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into real (non-pentatonic) harmony* (answering JURY #1+#3 three different ways); banked **`979-kids-happy-sad-tree` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ the most *robust* sibling (zero permissions, plays on any device instantly): tap glowing fruit on a WebGL2 tree, then flip one big вШАпЄП/рЯМЩ switch to hear the SAME song turn happyвЖФtender as the world flips **parallel C-majorвЖФC-minor** (Kate Hevner mode/affect вАФ the third makes the feeling) вАФ and **`980-kids-shake-bells`** вАФ SHAKE the device (accelerometer, off-glass) to ring WebGPU/WGSL handbells tuned to a real **IвАУIVвАУVвАУI** cadence that builds and resolves home (Orff Schulwerk + functional cadence; WebGPUвЖТWebGL2вЖТCanvas2D fallback chain). ## Cycle 567 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 sensor/render approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/977-echo-room-gpu](/dream/977-echo-room-gpu)** вАФ Echo Room: **build polyphony from your own PAST SELVES in space вАФ move your body through an invisible C-major harmonic field, your motion is recorded over a 7s bar, and it loops forever as an HRTF-spatialized "ghost body" (a living GPU particle cloud) that re-traces your path and re-sings its chord while you, the listener, walk among up to 6 of your past selves.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 567 (adult / **MediaPipe Pose вАФ full-body torso/hip centroid, the non-pointer/embodied input**, with pointer + auto-demo fallback / **raw WebGPU/WGSL particle field вЖТ WebGL2 вЖТ Canvas2D fallback chain** / per-ghost **Web Audio HRTF `PannerNode`** spatialization / warm gallery / candle-lit vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's loudest standing structural ask (#3): "push the depth-room into a multi-zone spatial instrument you physically walk through вАФ embodied-spatial, not a finger."** It is a live-looper where each loop is *a body you used to be*: position вЖТ harmony walks a voice-led diatonic C-major neighbourhood (x = I¬Јvi¬ЈIV¬Јii¬ЈV¬Јiii, common-tone heavy so a 6-ghost stack stays consonant; y = voicing/inversion + register) вАФ **real functional harmony, NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety net** (the jury's other ban). Arm a loop вЖТ your path (x,y,freq,hue) samples at ~30Hz over a fixed 7s bar вЖТ on close it becomes a permanent looping **ghost** that re-triggers its harmony spatialized at its moving position; recording auto-arms the next, caps at 6 (oldest drops), "Clear all" present. The live performer drives both their own current voice AND the `AudioListener`, so the ensemble **re-pans around you** as you move. Each ghost is a GPU-resident particle cloud tinted by its chord's warm hue (amberвЖТterracottaвЖТhoneyвЖТrustвЖТgoldвЖТember). **Also clears JURY #2** (the *sound* you build IS the object вАФ you accrete the music from your own motion, not read a pitch off a screensaver) and **#5** (warm gallery/candle-lit register, deliberately OFF the banned adult cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І567, researchвЖТbuild chain visible):** **DanXeReflect** (CHI 2026, Barcelona, honorable mention вАФ re-materializing your *spatio-temporal past movements* as interactive avatars you perform with). Other named refs: **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet*** (walk among fixed spatial voices) ¬Ј **Steve Reich phase-looping / the live-loop-pedal tradition** ¬Ј adjacent arXiv:2506.15759 *Sonic4D* (viewpoint-adaptive spatial audio). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**the temporal loop-of-self in a spatial HRTF harmony field** вАФ record your body's path so it loops back as a spatialized ghost you layer against; grep-0√Ч вАФ the lab has body-tracking, HRTF panners, and 942's depth-walk-into-harmony, but never the *self-as-looper-in-space*] ¬Ј #3 named references ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І567 вАФ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). #2 (вЙ•3 subsystems: Pose tracking + harmonic-field engine + loop/memory store + HRTF spatializer + WebGPU render = 5) also claimable. `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a adult, but avoided anyway), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√Ч), Canvas2D-as-winner (audit 5√Ч/10), three.js (JURY)] ¬Ј picked=[**MediaPipe-Pose body/camera INPUT** (non-pointer/embodied вАФ clears JURY #3; camera/body is 0√Ч in last-10 committed), **raw-WebGPU particle-field OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer вАФ WebGPU 1√Ч in last-10 vs Canvas2D 5√Ч / WebGL2 4√Ч; the jury's repeatedly-requested GPU-forward surface, explicitly NOT banned, with a WebGPUвЖТWebGL2вЖТCanvas2D safe fallback), **spatial-HRTF-loop-of-self TECH** (you build the music from your past bodies вАФ NOT a harmony-progression engine read off a sim), **warm-gallery/candle-lit VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; camera is local-only, MediaPipe loads from CDN at runtime вАФ no npm install, no server/secrets/cost surface); **zero new npm deps**. **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вЖТ **`вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes, zero from the 977 folder; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/camera/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/webcam/audio device in the build box вАФ the WGSL particle path, live MediaPipe Pose tracking, and whether the HRTF localization reads on headphones are all unconfirmed by eye/ear; ## Cycle 566 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 interaction models, shipped 1

- **[/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence](/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence)** вАФ Tilt Cadence Meadow: **a 4-year-old FEELS a real V7вЖТI authentic cadence in their hands вАФ TILT the tablet to roll a glowing marble out of the orange "pull" (Dominant 7th) well and HOME into the gold (Tonic) well, and the leading tone resolves up while the seventh resolves down, sparks burst, flowers bloom.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 566 (kids 4+ / **device TILT вАФ DeviceOrientation `beta`/`gamma` gravity vector, the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D additive warm-meadow glow** / tilt marble-physics + Riemann T/S/D functional-harmony state machine / warm daytime-meadow vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's hardest KIDS provocation (#1): "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch вАФ ban it; give them a real mode, a functional progression, or genuine tension/resolution."** Here there is no safety scale at all вАФ the three wells literally ARE Hugo Riemann's harmonic functions: **gold Home = Tonic (I)**, **green Away = Subdominant (IV)**, **orange Pull = Dominant 7th (V7)** (containing the leading tone E + chordal 7th BвЩ≠ of C7, in F major). A damped point-mass marble rolls under a tilt-driven gravity vector across a height field of three Gaussian attractor basins (`physics.ts`); while it rests in a well that chord sounds softly over an always-on F2+C3 tonic drone, and **rolling V7вЖТI is detected explicitly** (`audio.ts` `HarmonyEngine`) and fires a real authentic cadence as scheduled frequency glides вАФ leading tone **EвЖСF**, chordal 7th **BвЩ≠вЖУA**, root CвЖТF, fifth GвЖТA вАФ so the resolution is genuinely *heard*, not implied. **This also clears JURY #3 ("force a non-pointer input вАФ drag-on-glass is back to 7√Ч"):** the primary input is device tilt, off the banned finger-on-glass entirely; and it breaks the immediate kids rut вАФ the last two kids ships (969-hum-choir, 972-sing-garden) are BOTH mic-voiceвЖТharmony, so tilt is a different body and a different sensor. **Output = Canvas2D** additive warm-meadow glow (sun wash, glowing color-coded basins, marble, sparks, blooming flowers) вАФ bold saturated color is the kids language (gold/green/orange = I/IV/V7), and the warm daytime register is deliberately OFF the (adult-side) jury-flagged cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І566, researchвЖТbuild chain visible):** **CHI 2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back: A Workshop on Movement-Based and Sonification Design Approaches"** (Extended Abstracts, 2026 CHI; ACM DOI 10.1145/3772363.3778764) вАФ the dive's reframing ("the movementвЖТsound mapping should carry a *quality* вАФ effort, tension, settling вАФ not just a trigger") is exactly what a tilt cadence does: tilting carries the felt *quality* of harmonic tension into the child's hands. Other named refs: **Hugo Riemann functional harmony** (the wells literally are T/S/D) ¬Ј **Toca Boca tilt-toys** ¬Ј **BeSound** (embodied music education for children). **Ambition floor 2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [tilt marble-physics + Riemann T/S/D functional-harmony engine + Web Audio synth/voice-leading + Canvas2D meadow render] ¬Ј #3 named references ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І566 вАФ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√Ч), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√Ч), mic-voiceвЖТharmony (hot вАФ kids 969/972 just shipped)] ¬Ј picked=[**device-TILT INPUT** (non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3; the 3√Ч tilt sensor, fresh not banned; different from the recent mic-voice rut), **Canvas2D warm-meadow OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **tilt-physics + functional-harmony-cadence TECH** (real V7вЖТI tension/resolution вАФ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; the marble physics is the felt body, NOT a GPU-sim you pulse a bell off), **warm daytime-meadow VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; tilt is local-only; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/sensor-verified** (no audio output or tilt device in the build box вАФ the V7вЖТI voice-leading glides + always-on drone are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the relative chord balance, and especially the `TILT_SENSITIVITY = 35` / `DOWNHILL_ACCEL = 1.9` feel in a child's hands, want real-device tuning вАФ deliberately surfaced as top-level constants; the no-sensor drag tilt-pad + arrow-keys path and the ~3s-idle hands-free auto-demo rolling a full TвЖТSвЖТDвЖТI loop guarantee a *sounding*, *resolving* glance with zero hardware). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one concept √Ч two interaction models); banked **`975-kids-tilt-hill` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ the **continuous tension-gradient** sibling: no wells, ONE smooth glowing sunset hill where harmonic tension = altitude, tilt to climb into the Dominant (leading tone + 7th swell/detune/beat as you rise) and release to slide home through the cadence as one exhaled breath вАФ the *purer* embodiment of the dive's "movement carries a quality, not a trigger" (Canvas2D warm sunset-glow; Riemann + tonal-gravity/tension-as-altitude + BeSound + CHI 2026). Built complete + builder-reported lint/tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І566). Design notes: `src/app/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence/README.md`

## Cycle 565 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/973-wave-terrain](/dream/973-wave-terrain)** вАФ Wave Terrain: **the glowing 3D landscape you SEE is literally the sound you HEAR вАФ an orbit tracing a closed path over a height-terrain reads out the audio waveform sample-by-sample, so reshaping the land sculpts the timbre and spinning the orbit faster plays a higher note.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 565 (adult / **computer-keyboard + Web MIDI velocity (primary, non-pointer)** / **raw WebGL2 perspective heightfield + Canvas2D carved-waveform strip** / topographic bronze-relief vibe). **The lab's FIRST wave-terrain synthesizer** вАФ grep-verified 0√Ч (`wave terrain`/`wave-terrain` never appear in any prior prototype). Wave-terrain (a.k.a. terrain) synthesis defines a height surface `z=f(x,y)`; a **closed orbit** traced across it, sampled at audio rate over one full loop, *is* one period of a waveform вАФ so the terrain's shape **is the timbre** and the orbit's traversal rate **is the pitch**. Implementation: `terrain.ts` walks the orbit at **1024 points**, reads the height, **DC-blocks** (subtracts the mean, since terrains carry an offset) + peak-normalizes вЖТ one period; `audio.ts` turns that period into a `PeriodicWave` via a real DFT (`createPeriodicWave`), played by up to **6 `OscillatorNode` voices** sharing the current wave (pitch = note frequency; `1/вИЪn` normalization; `Gain вЖТ lowpass 8 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor` limiter, peak < 0.3); on morph/orbit change the wave is rebuilt + re-applied to live voices. `gl.ts` is **hand-rolled WebGL2 (no three.js)** вАФ a 96√Ч96 perspective heightfield sampling an `R32F` height texture, warm topographic elevation palette, relief shading, contour bands, a luminous orbit ring on the surface + a glowing moving read-point; a carved-waveform strip below shows the exact period being played with a scrub marker, so you can *see* orbit-shape вЖТ waveform вЖТ sound. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object, the resonating body вАФ not a GPU sim you pulse a bell off of"): here the visible terrain *is the oscillator itself*, not a screensaver read for a pitch. Also clears #3 (non-pointer: computer keyboard `AвАУL`/`QвАУP` = D-Dorian ~2 octaves primary; `1вАУ5` presets; `[ ]`/arrows = orbit radius/lobes; `M` = morph; Web MIDI velocity when present, never required) and #5 (register that isn't cosmic: topographic bronze-relief). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І565, researchвЖТbuild chain visible):** the **2025вАУ2026 wave-terrain revival** вАФ **Scaler Music *Carbon Electra 2*** (announced **May 28, 2026**), engine "produces sound via a 2D trajectory that scans over a 3D surface or terrain", + **Conductive Labs *Terrain*** hardware synth (2025) вАФ a commercial revival with *no* free browser-native counterpart; this is that. Other named refs: Mitsuhashi 1982 (JAES) ¬Ј Borgonovo & Haus 1986 (CMJ) ¬Ј Curtis Roads, *Microsound* (2001). **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [wave-terrain synthesis, grep-0√Ч] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [keyboard/MIDI input + terrain orbit-sampler/morph engine + DFTвЖТPeriodicWave synth + WebGL2 heightfield render] ¬Ј #3 named references ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І565 вАФ today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a вАФ adult), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√Ч), WebGPU-not-to-7√Ч (audit), functional-harmony-voice-leading-engine (hot вАФ 969/972 just shipped)] ¬Ј picked=[**computer-keyboard + Web-MIDI INPUT** (non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3; MIDI is the 1√Ч sensor), **raw-WebGL2 + Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the terrain IS the oscillator вАФ clears JURY #2; WebGL2 5√Ч healthy, NOT WebGPU-pile), **wave-terrain-synthesis TECH** (lab-first; neither a harmony engine nor a classic single-body physical model вАФ dodges both hot lanes), **topographic bronze-relief VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 973 folder; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/pointer-primary); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box вАФ the DFT/`PeriodicWave` path, DC-block, and per-voice normalization are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the relative brightness of the five presets and the morph speed are unconfirmed by ear; the always-on 3s idle auto-demo plays a slow D-Dorian arpeggio + morphs the terrain so a zero-interaction glance both *sees* the landscape carve a waveform and *hears* a tone). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept √Ч two technical approaches); banked **`974-wave-terrain-map`** вАФ the **maximally-legible Canvas2D twin**: a top-down contour/elevation heatmap with the orbit drawn over it AND a side-by-side **scope panel** plotting the heights sampled along the orbit (one period of the tone) + a live spectrum, so the "orbit-over-terrain = waveform = sound" identity is *provable* at a glance; bulletproof-everywhere render (the guaranteed-fallback / installation-context surface). Built complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (README written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І565). Design notes: `src/app/dream/973-wave-terrain/README.md`
