## Cycle 564 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/972-kids-sing-garden](/dream/972-kids-sing-garden)** вАФ Sing Garden: **a child SINGS any note and a real harmonic garden grows a chord that genuinely SUPPORTS it вАФ no wrong notes, but REAL functional harmony underneath, not a safe pentatonic.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 564 (kids 4+ / **microphone вАФ live voice pitch (YIN/autocorrelation), the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D watercolor-ink garden** / functional voice-leading accompaniment / ink-and-watercolor vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's hardest KIDS provocation (#1): "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch вАФ ban it; give them a real mode, a functional progression, or genuine tension/resolution."** Here the child's voice is the melody (snapped to C-major scale degrees so it's always in tune = no wrong notes), but the harmony is genuinely functional: each sung scale-degree drives its real diatonic triad (1вЖТI, 2вЖТii, 3вЖТiii, 4вЖТIV, 5вЖТV, 6вЖТvi, 7вЖТvii¬∞) and **three inner voices + a bass voice-lead** to the nearest chord tones by smallest-motion assignment (Aldwell & Schachter), so a drawn melody makes real chord changes emerge; landing on 5вЖТ1 or holding the leading-tone 7вЖТ1 fires a true **VвЖТI cadence** with an audible resolution + a warm gold "home" halo. **Input = mic** вАФ the live analyser time-domain buffer is run through a YIN-style cumulative-mean-normalized-difference pitch detector with parabolic refinement + an RMS gate + a 90 ms held-degree debounce (clamped to a child-voice 150вАУ700 Hz); the voice is **never recorded, stored, or transmitted** вАФ pitch is detected in place and thrown away every frame. This dodges the jury-banned **pointer-drag-as-primary-input** (7√Ч) and is NOT the jury-over-represented input (mic is uncommon; the tired "humвЖТRMS-paint" is explicitly *not* what this is вАФ it reads real pitch and builds real harmony). **Output = Canvas2D** watercolor/ink garden (the jury blessed Canvas2D as "fresh-again, earns its place" вАФ deliberately NOT WebGPU/three.js): singing higher grows a tall plant, lower a low spreading one (pitchвЖТheight); each chord blooms a flower whose **color encodes harmonic function** (tonic gold = home, dominant orange = tension, subdominant green, predominant/minor cool blue & violet), louder voice = bolder stroke; the painting accumulates as a calm, building garden. **Vibe = ink-and-watercolor on warm paper** вАФ explicitly OFF the (adult-side) cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster. Kids-safe throughout: `masterGain 0.26 вЖТ lowpass 6.5 kHz вЖТ compressor вИТ10 dB/20:1`; soft triangle/sine voices (вЙ•30 ms attacks); always-on tonic drone pad (never silent); singing louder never makes the synth harsh (accompaniment stays gentle/constant); вЙ•72 px Start gesture-gates AudioContext + getUserMedia; full teardown (rAF cancel, osc stop, mic tracks stop, disconnect, AudioContext close). **Degrades fully (tested path):** no/denied mic вЖТ visible `text-rose-300` notice + **seven вЙ•64 px color-coded sing-pads** (one per scale degree, color = function) routing through the **identical** voice-leading pipeline, AND a hands-free **auto-demo** that sings a phrase ending `7вЖТ1` within ~1 s of Start so a zero-interaction glance both *sees* the garden grow and *hears* a cadence resolve. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І564):** **arXiv:2602.06917 "Automatic Detection and Analysis of Singing Mistakes for Music Pedagogy" (Feb 6 2026)** вАФ cited as the deliberate **inversion**: that framework flags a child's vocal *errors*; this piece refuses to вАФ instead of marking a child wrong, the harmony BENDS to support whatever pitch they find (no-wrong-notes pedagogy, but with real functional harmony, not a safety scale). Other named refs: **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading*** (the voice-leading rules) ¬Ј **David Li / Google Arts & Culture *Blob Opera* (2020)** (child-singable harmony lineage). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [mic YIN pitch-detection + functional voice-leading SATB+bass engine + Canvas2D watercolor render = 3] ¬Ј #3 named references ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І564 вАФ today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4√Ч), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**mic / live-voice-pitch INPUT** (non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3; not the over-rep input), **Canvas2D watercolor OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **functional-voice-leading-accompaniment TECH** (real harmony from a child's voice вАФ clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic), **ink-watercolor VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; mic is local-only; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 972 folder; folder grep-clean вАФ no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096, raise = "Operation not permitted"; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/mic-verified** (no audio input device in the build box вАФ the YIN detector's robustness on a real breathy child voice in a noisy room, octave-error rate, and the harmony balance are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by ear; the always-on drone + auto-demo + sing-pads guarantee a sounding, blooming, cadencing glance with zero hardware). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into real functional harmony* (answering JURY #1+#3 three different ways); banked **`971-kids-tilt-cadence` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ **feel a V7вЖТI cadence in your hands by TILTing the tablet** to roll a glowing marble from the orange "Tense" Dominant well home into the gold "Home" Tonic well (DeviceOrientation gravity-physics + Riemann T/S/D state machine; the resolution blooms) вАФ and **`973-kids-step-parade`** вАФ **whole-body DANCING (front-camera optical-flow motion-energy) drives the tempo & dynamics of a real IвАУviвАУIVвАУV parade**, stand still вЖТ it slows to a lullaby on home (BeSound / Krueger *Videoplace* / "Moving Mandala" 2025). Both returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І564). ## Cycle 563 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal physical-modeling explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/970-tension-gong](/dream/970-tension-gong)** вАФ Tension Gong: **strike a metal gong on your keyboard and it bends вАФ a hard hit starts SHARP and glides DOWN in pitch as it rings out, because the synthesis itself is non-linear, the way real bronze blooms.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 563 (adult / **computer-keyboard + Web MIDI velocity (primary, non-pointer)** / **AudioWorklet non-linear modal synthesis + Canvas2D Chladni nodal plot**). **The lab's FIRST non-linear modal synthesis** вАФ every prior modal/Karplus piece (960-friction's modal body, plucked strings, bell banks) used a *linear* fixed-frequency resonator bank; this is the first where the mode frequencies **change with vibration energy in real time**, which is what gives metal its life. Each of four bodies (bell-plate / gong / tam-tam / cymbal-disc) is a bank of 12вАУ16 two-pole inharmonic resonators with three live non-linearities running per 128-sample control block in the worklet: (1) **tension modulation** вАФ a running `energy = ќ£ amp¬≤` resets every mode's instantaneous frequency `f_i = f0_i¬Ј(1 + beta_i¬ЈbetaScale¬Јenergy)`, so a loud strike rings sharp and **glides back down** to rest pitch as energy bleeds away (the gong "bloom" вАФ produced by the resonators *changing frequency*, not by pitch automation/LFO); (2) **mode coupling** вАФ while loud, a fraction of each mode's state transfers to its spectral neighbor (`coupleAmt¬Јenergy`), so the spectrum shimmers up during the attack then **clarifies and settles** as the coupling term vanishes; (3) **strike-velocity dependence** вАФ a hard hit (Shift) drives energy into the *high* modes (brighter) with a larger `betaScale` (bends more); a soft hit stays near the linear pitch on the low modes. **Directest answer to BOTH of JURY 2026-06-26's hardest adult provocations at once** вАФ #2 (*kill the "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" reflex вАФ make the SOUND the primary object, the resonating body, the way 960-friction and 965-oscilloscope did*) and #3 (*force a non-pointer input вАФ drag-on-glass is back to 7√Ч*). Here the sound IS the object (the non-linearity is the instrument, not a screensaver) and the playing surface is the **computer keyboard** (`A S D F G H J K` strike; **Shift** = hard pitch-bending hit; fast play + hold-duration shape velocity; `1вАУ4` switch bodies) with **Web MIDI** note-on velocity when a controller is present (silent keyboard fallback otherwise вАФ MIDI is the rare 1√Ч sensor the jury asked to revive). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І563, the researchвЖТbuild chain made visible):** **arXiv:2603.10240 "nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max" (March 2026)** вАФ which models exactly tension modulation, pitch glide, and mode coupling for real-time physical synthesis; this is a faithful simplified browser port. **Visual READS the audio, never drives it** (the inverse of the banned sim-pulse-bell move): Canvas2D **Chladni-style nodal field** вАФ each live mode draws its `sin(mѕАx)¬Јsin(nѕАy)` nodal lines, brightening as it rings and fading as it decays, so you *see* which modes are alive and watch the spectrum settle after a strike; a per-mode strip below shows amplitude + a **pitch-glide tick** marking how far above rest frequency each mode currently sits. **Palette = clinical / metallurgical** (brushed-steel greys on near-black, hot-amber/steel-cyan accents) вАФ deliberately OFF the banned adult cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (4√Ч). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**non-linear modal synthesis** вАФ energy-driven tension-modulation + mode-coupling; grep-0√Ч as a lab technique, all prior modal banks are linear] ¬Ј #3 named reference [**arXiv:2603.10240 nlm, March 2026** + the modal-synthesis lineage] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І563** вАФ today's dive, 28 straight cycles 535вАУ563). #2 (вЙ•3 subsystems) borderline-claimable [worklet modal engine + non-linear coupler + keyboard/MIDI input + Chladni render]; #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a вАФ adult), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**computer-keyboard + Web-MIDI-velocity INPUT** (non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3; MIDI revives the 1√Ч sensor), **AudioWorklet-DSP + Canvas2D OUTPUT** (sound IS the object вАФ clears JURY #2; viz reads audio, doesn't drive a bell), **non-linear-modal-synthesis TECH** (lab-first; the resonating body is the instrument, NOT a GPU sim), **clinical-metallurgical VIBE** (off cosmic-glow adult cluster + off kids)]` вАФ clears every ban, the directest double-provocation hit on the adult side. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Critically, the one recent build with NO hardware dependency** (no mic, no camera, no GPU compute вАФ just keyboard + Web Audio), so it is the **directest dent in the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** вАФ Karel can actually *hear* this on any laptop keyboard, unlike the camera/mic/GPU builds piling up unrun. **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder вЖТ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; tsc-strict on both files вЖТ zero errors; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box вАФ the non-linear modal engine, tension glide, and coupling are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the *feel* of the pitch-bloom and the metallic timbre are unconfirmed by ear; an auto-struck idle body could be added next cycle for the silent glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into a real physical-modeling instrument body* (answering provocations #2+#3 three different ways); banked **`971-air-column` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вАФ a contactless **blown digital-waveguide flute** played by **webcam optical-flow** (motion energy = breath pressure, motion centroid = pitch; self-oscillating jet model, overblows the octave; keyboard fallback) вАФ the lab's first blown air column AND the camera-sensor revival the jury wanted вАФ and **`972-resonant-bodies`** вАФ the **microphone as EXCITER** (not pitch-detector): tap/breathe/hiss to ring tuned modal bodies (bell/glass/wood/ceramic), exciterвЖТresonator modal synthesis, mic-as-exciter is a fresh cross-modal use. Both returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І563). Design notes: `src/app/dream/970-tension-gong/README.md`

## Cycle 562 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal embodied-harmony explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/969-kids-hum-choir](/dream/969-kids-hum-choir)** вАФ Hum Choir: **hum ONE note and a choir of soft glowing creatures instantly joins you in REAL harmony вАФ singing the diatonic chord that fits your note, leaning into tension and blooming home when you land on the note that pulls.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 562 (kids 4+ / **microphone voice-pitch (primary)** + tap-a-note fallback / **Canvas2D choir creatures**). **The lab's FIRST real-time pitch-detection instrument for kids, and the rarest input in the whole lab (the child's own VOICE).** The child hums; **NSDF (McLeod Pitch Method) autocorrelation** on the mic buffer returns `{hz, clarity, rms}`, clarity/RMS-gated and EMA+octave-smoothed so a wobbly 4-year-old hum reads as a stable note; that note snaps to a **C-major scale degree**, the real **diatonic triad** is built on it (IвАУvii¬∞), and **three companion choir voices glide in via greedy nearest-tone voice-leading** вАФ real functional harmony, NOT a can't-be-wrong pentatonic. **Felt tension/resolution:** landing on **V or the leading-tone (ti)** holds tension (brighter formant, the creatures lean/tighten, a homeвЖФtension meter fills); returning to a **tonic tone (C/E/G)** blooms and resolves вАФ a genuine VвЖТI a child *causes with their voice*, no reading. **Directest answer to BOTH JURY 2026-06-26 kids provocations at once** вАФ #1 (kill the pentatonic crutch; give kids real harmony with tension/resolution) and #3 (force a **non-pointer** input вАФ drag-on-glass is back to 7√Ч; voice is the most embodied, rarest channel). **Grounded in this cycle's research dive (RESEARCH ¬І562):** the embodied tonal-harmony pedagogy line (**Song Walker**, **AREmbody**, "Learning Tonal Harmony Through Bodily Interactions") + arXiv:2604.07612 real-time human-AI co-performance (Apr 2026) вАФ children have real harmonic sensitivity and learn tension/release through the body; here the body is the singing voice and the AI co-performer is a local non-ML voice-leading harmonizer. **Extends Karel's loved `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП** (the lab's prior hum-input kids piece) with real harmony. **Kids-safe + feedback-safe:** the mic is **analysis-only, never routed to the speakers** (no howl); choir is a warm source-filter "ahh" synth (detuned-saw вЖТ formant bandpasses, shared vibrato, portamento, synth reverb), master `gain вЙ§0.24 вЖТ lowpass ~7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor`, вИЪ-voice normalized, no harsh transients. **Mic-free path fully works:** a row of big friendly CвАУB note buttons drives the identical harmonizer, so a 06:30 glance with no mic permission still plays real chords; idle breathing + a soft held tonic so the creatures are alive and never fully silent + a "hum to meвА¶" hint. AudioContext + `getUserMedia` both gated behind one Start tap. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**real-time NSDF/McLeod-Pitch-Method pitch detection as a kids instrument**; grep-0√Ч for kids voice-pitch-as-input] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [NSDF pitch detector + diatonic harmonizer/voice-leading engine + formant choir synth + Canvas2D creature render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Google *Blob Opera* / David Li** ¬Ј **McLeod Pitch Method (NSDF)** ¬Ј **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І562** вАФ 27 straight cycles 535вАУ562). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7√Ч), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4√Ч), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY), GPU-sim+pulse-a-bell pattern (JURY 4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**mic-voice-pitch INPUT** (rarest/most-embodied; non-pointer вАФ clears JURY #3), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (bulletproof phone render; healthy/non-banned), **NSDF-pitch-detect + functional-diatonic-voice-leading TECH** (real harmony with felt VвЖТI вАФ clears the pentatonic ban; NOT a GPU sim), warm-choir-creatures VIBE (off cosmic-glow adult + off the kids pentatonic crutch)]` вАФ clears every ban, the directest double-provocation hit. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; mic processed locally, nothing uploaded; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 969 вАФ `useCallback` IS used [page.tsx:81/113/125]; the lone unused-`useCallback` lint warning is a pre-existing OTHER-file warning); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/mic-verified** (no microphone or audio device in the build box вАФ the NSDF detector + harmonizer + voice-leading are reasoned-correct + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, but pitch-tracking robustness, the choir timbre, and tension/resolution *feel* are unconfirmed by hand/ear; the tap-a-note fallback + idle tonic cover the silent glance). **This is now the jury's #1 standing liability вАФ verification debt** (16 straight build-green-but-unrun surfaces). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three an *embodied non-pointer input* into the SAME real-harmony idea; banked **`967-kids-home-hill` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ tilt a firefly through a **tonal-gravity field** (constant home-pull + a V tension hill = a VвЖТI you *feel*), Canvas2D вАФ and **`968-kids-shake-box`** вАФ **shake** to crank a real **IвАУviвАУIVвАУVвАУI cadence** music box, raw-WebGL2. Both returned complete + builder-reported lint-clean; `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І562). Design notes: `src/app/dream/969-kids-hum-choir/README.md`

## Cycle 561 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/965-phosphor-draw](/dream/965-phosphor-draw)** вАФ Phosphor Draw: **draw a shape on a glowing oscilloscope and you HEAR that exact shape вАФ because the green figure on screen and the stereo signal in the speakers are literally the same signal.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 561 (adult / **draw + pointer** input / **WebGL2 RGBA16F phosphor-feedback** scope). **The lab's FIRST true oscilloscope vector-synthesizer.** In an XY ("vectorscope") oscilloscope the left audio channel drives the horizontal beam and the right drives the vertical вАФ so a stereo signal *draws a shape*; this inverts it: any drawn closed loop is resampled to a constant-arc-length pen-path and **emitted AS the stereo signal** (`L[i]=x[i]`, `R[i]=y[i]`), looped at an audible rate, so **the shape you hear IS the shape you see** вАФ sample-for-sample, one signal feeding both senses. **Geometry becomes timbre** (a circle вЙИ near-sine, a square вЙИ rich odd harmonics, a star вЙИ bright buzz); the loop's **retrace rate is the pitch** (40вАУ400 Hz slider), set via `playbackRate` so retuning *never rebuilds the buffer* вАФ which is why the scope renders the played audio *continuously*, not in throttled steps. **Deliberately NON-sim and NON-harmony:** chosen *after* the research dive surfaced a fresh 2026 Neural-Cellular-Automata wave (arXiv 2601.16096 Jan 2026) AND a grep proved the lab has already mined the entire self-organizing-life family (Lenia `264`, physarum `327`, reaction-diffusion `9`, particle-life `8`, differential-growth `964`) вАФ JURY 2026-06-25 flagged "ship a sim, pulse a bell off it" as the hardening adult move вАФ so the pick pivoted OFF the sim it surfaced and ONTO its **mirror image**: an instrument where the signal IS the image, with no field/particles and no harmony engine (pitch is a byproduct of draw-speed, the *idea* is contour/timbre). It also breaks the **re-emerged harmony-engine monoculture** (7 of the last 10 committed reasoned about voice-leading: 954/952/950/947/942/941/957). **Phosphor render:** `phosphor-gl.ts` is a hand-written WebGL2 vectorscope вАФ an `RGBA16F` ping-pong feedback texture fades the previous frame (CRT persistence), the new beam is drawn additively as a `LINE_STRIP` with **dwell-based brightness** (slow beam = brighter, exactly like a real scope), then a bloom + filmic-tonemap pass blooms hot spots to white-green; Canvas2D `shadowBlur`-trail fallback (`phosphor-2d.ts`) if WebGL2/float-render-targets are unavailable. **Controls:** 6 one-tap presets (figure-8, circle, square, star, lissajous, heart) so it sings instantly; draw-your-own (Pointer Events вЖТ iPad-ready); pitch, spin (slowly rotates the figure вАФ audible *and* visible), brightness, persistence. **Autoplay:** after the single Start tap (creates+resumes `AudioContext` inside the gesture for iOS), a slowly-spinning figure-8 already draws itself and sings, so a hands-free 06:30 glance immediately sees + hears the idea. **Extends Karel's strongest loved cluster вАФ drawвЖТsound** (`223-fourier-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `153-paint-compose`вЭ§пЄП, `100`/`152`/`158`/`160`вЭ§пЄП) with a fresh technique (the drawn line and the sound are one thing). **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used-as-core [true oscilloscope/vector synth; grep-0√Ч shipped core вАФ `291-harmonograph` has only *decorative* idle Lissajous] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [arc-length path resampler + stereo-buffer synth w/ playbackRate pitch + WebGL2 phosphor-feedback render + draw/preset interaction = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Jerobeam Fenderson вАФ *Oscilloscope Music*** ¬Ј **Hansi Raber вАФ *OsciStudio* / osci-render** ¬Ј **Ryoji Ikeda вАФ *data-cosm [n¬∞1]*, 180 Studios, to 1 Feb 2026** ¬Ј **Lissajous 1857**] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І561** вАФ 26 straight cycles 535вАУ561). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), harmony/voice-leading-engine TECH (audit вЙ•4√Ч/10), GPU-sim+pulse-bell ADULT house style (JURY-flagged), Canvas2D-OUTPUT (recently at cap)] ¬Ј picked=[draw/pointer INPUT (non-mic; loved drawвЖТsound lineage), **WebGL2-RGBA16F-phosphor OUTPUT** (under cap; non-three.js/WebGPU/plain-Canvas2D), **oscilloscope/vector-synthesis TECH** (signal-IS-image; non-harmony, non-sim, grep-0√Ч as core), CRT/Ikeda signal-as-light VIBE (off cosmic-nebula adult + off kids)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вЖТ **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.1min`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero warnings/errors attributable to 965/phosphor вАФ all lint warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (no WebGL2 device or audio in container вАФ the resampler + stereo-buffer + phosphor shader are reasoned-correct + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean, but the CRT glow, geometry-as-timbre feel, and draw latency are unconfirmed by hand/eye/ear; autoplay figure-8 + presets cover the silent glance). **A small dent in the jury's verification debt:** because the scope reads the *exact* buffer that plays, "you see what you hear" is structurally provable, not asserted. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire (draw-a-2D-shape vs trace-a-rotating-3D-solid); banked **`966-osci-solids` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вАФ the "massively bigger" sibling where a rotating 3D wireframe solid (cube/torus/trefoil-knot/вА¶) is projected + traced as one pen-path so you *hear it spinning* (hand-written 3D projection, no three.js). Returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І561). Design notes: `src/app/dream/965-phosphor-draw/README.md`

## Cycle 560 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 render approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/964-kids-coral-garden](/dream/964-kids-coral-garden)** вАФ Coral Garden: **tilt the tablet and a glowing bioluminescent reef GROWS ITSELF across the screen вАФ and the coral *sings* the slow, warm melody its growing tip traces. A calm, never-silent, never-wrong bedtime toy.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 560 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt (primary)** + tap-to-seed / **pure Canvas2D bioluminescent glow**). **The lab's FIRST differential-growth piece** вАФ a genuinely never-used (grep-0√Ч) named generative-art technique, deliberately chosen *after a grep killed the obvious pick:* a squishy soft-body "jelly" toy would have been the lab's **6th** kids blob/jelly/Verlet piece (286/451/460/603/755) вАФ the exact "too similar in design and theme" trap the JURY 2026-06-25 named. Instead the coral is a real **differential growth** simulation: each strand is a polyline whose nodes (1) attract toward connected neighbors, (2) **repel all nearby nodes via an O(n) uniform-grid spatial hash** (so the line refuses to self-intersect and wrinkles into organic brain-coral folds), (3) smooth curvature, (4) **insert new nodes as edges lengthen** (so the line *must* fold into the space вАФ the algorithm's signature), and (5) occasionally **branch** a growing tip; ~2200-node cap вЖТ slows to a shimmer. A fresh garden looks like a reef after ~30вАУ60s and is denser/different after 3 min (**genuine long-form state + memory** вАФ answers the menu's thin "long-form generative" lane), with a ~12-min "goodnight" fade. **Music without a harmony engine:** a calm ~380вАУ520ms clock maps the most-active growing TIP's vertical position to a warm **C-major pentatonic** note (top = higher) on a soft sine/triangle bell, over an always-on low-C+G drone, with brighter octave-up bells on branch events вАФ **the coral literally composes the slow melody it traces** (pitch/melodic-CONTOUR IS the idea вАФ answers JURY #2 вАФ but melodic, NOT the over-used vertical voice-leading the kids lane hardened into: 941 voice-leading, 950 role-harmony, 957 cadence). **Calm + bedtime** directly answers the jury's "kids builds are too bright/active, calm is under-served." **Input = device-tilt PRIMARY** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap вЖТ a gravity/light vector the coral tips lean toward within ~0.5s; **tilt is 1√Ч/10 in the kids audit вАФ deliberately dodges the touch-drag monoculture, 5 of the last ~7 kids builds**); tap-to-seed is a secondary garnish; desktop pointer-drag + idle auto-demo so a hands-free 06:30 glance sees coral blooming + hears the melody within ~1s. **Output = pure Canvas2D** luminous glow (layered `shadowBlur` bloom/mid/core + radial-gradient seed/tip nodes + trailing-alpha persistence over an indigoвЖТvioletвЖТteal underwater gradient) вАФ the **bulletproof everywhere-render with zero GPU-context risk on a phone**, and the **fresher/scarcer surface** per the latest jury (three.js BANNED 7√Ч; WebGPU + raw-WebGL2 both recently hit the audit cap; Canvas2D collapsed to 3/15 вЖТ fresh-again). **Kids-safe audio:** `masterGain (вЙ§0.26) вЖТ lowpass ~6.5kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`, no wrong notes, loudness normalized 1/вИЪvoices (a busy garden never gets louder), no harsh/high transients. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**differential growth**; grep-0√Ч in INDEX/READMEs] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [differential-growth solver w/ spatial-hash repulsion + tilt/gravity input + melody/branch scheduler + Canvas2D glow render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Anders Hoff / *Inconvergent* "Differential Line"** ¬Ј **Entagma** differential-growth tutorials ¬Ј **arXiv:2504.18040 "Cabbage" (Apr 2025)**] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І560** вАФ 25 straight cycles 535вАУ560). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit cap), raw-WebGL2-OUTPUT (audit cap), touch-drag-pitch INPUT (kids monoculture 5√Ч), voice-leading/harmony-engine TECH (kids 941/950/957 + adult 7-of-10), soft-body/blob/Verlet THEME (5 prior kids jelly pieces)] ¬Ј picked=[device-tilt INPUT (1√Ч/10, non-touch, embodied), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh-again, bulletproof, non-three.js/WebGPU/WebGL2), **differential-growth TECH** (0√Ч; melodic-contour music, NOT a harmony engine, NOT soft-body), calm bioluminescent-underwater bedtime VIBE (off the bright-playful kids cluster + off cosmic-nebula adult cluster)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вЖТ **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.4min`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero warnings/errors attributable to 964/coral вАФ all lint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear-verified** (no tilt sensor or audio in container; the differential-growth solver + contourвЖТpentatonic mapping are reasoned-correct + tsc/eslint-clean, but the glow feel, growth pacing, and tilt response are unconfirmed by hand/eye/ear вАФ the always-on drone + auto-demo guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero interaction). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-render fire (Canvas2D vs WebGL2 of the same engine); banked **`963-kids-coral-bloom` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ the IDENTICAL differential-growth coral on **raw WebGL2 additive-glow quads** (the richer-bloom twin; resurrect on a desktop/Tauri context where the GPU lands, or fold its glow into 964). Returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І560). ## Earlier (Cycle 558 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 "real melody/harmony IS the toy" explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/957-kids-come-home](/dream/957-kids-come-home)** вАФ Come Home: **drag a glowing firefly up a hill and feel it want to fall *home* вАФ near the top it trembles at the leading tone, pulled toward the tonic, and when you let go it swoops down and lands on a warm chord. A real VвЖТI cadence a 4-year-old plays with one finger.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 558 (kids 4+ / **touch-drag (release = resolve)** / **raw WebGL2 вЖТ Canvas2D fallback**). **The first KIDS piece in the lab where real tonal tension-and-resolution IS the toy вАФ the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-25 #2** ("make music from PITCH again; pitch as expressive material, not the thing you apologize for omitting") on the kids axis, where *every* prior kids build held pitch deliberately dumb ("no wrong notes" + drone) вАФ the exact crystallized formula the same jury flagged as a pruning candidate (935-kids-shake-critters). Here the music is the **felt pull of harmony**: the hill is a C-major diatonic ladder (doвАУreвАУmiвАУfaвАУsolвАУlaвАУ**ti**); dragging the firefly up raises the pitch and the *tension* (hotter color, faster shimmer, a detune wobble), near the top the **leading tone (ti)** visibly trembles wanting home, and releasing swoops it down to the **tonic** with a warm I-chord "ahh" bloom вАФ a genuine **VвЖТI leading-tone cadence**. Under the melody an **auto-harmony crossfades IвЖФV** by tension¬≤ so the child hears the cadence, not a lone note. **Grounded in 1-day-old research:** Fran√Іois Pachet's **arXiv:2606.24911** ("Attractive and Repulsive Pattern Control in Sequence Generation," Jun 2026) frames a target pattern as an *attractor* the sequence is drawn toward вАФ the **tonic is the attractor**, the firefly is *pulled home*; the literal today's-researchвЖТtoday's-build chain. **Hands-off auto-demo within ~0.9s** вАФ a ghost firefly rises to the leading tone, trembles, releases, resolves home on a ~7.5s loop, so an untouched 06:30 glance is alive and sounding the cadence; real touch overrides, 4s idle resumes. **Renderer = raw WebGL2** (hand-written GLSL ES 3.00: dusk gradient that warms with tension, dark rolling hill, home glow, additive firefly bloom + trail, GPU tremble) вЖТ **Canvas2D fallback** painting the identical scene (`text-rose-300` "(showing the simple view)" notice) вЖТ context-loss handling + full teardown; **NOT three.js** (jury-banned 7√Ч), **NOT WebGPU** (at the diversity edge ~4√Ч/10 across 954/950/947/942 + unvalidated headless вАФ the robust WebGL2/Canvas2D cascade is the bulletproof kids surface for the unattended glance). **Kids-safe audio** (`gain 0.24 вЖТ lowpass 7000Hz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) вЖТ destination`): always-on soft pad, triangle+sine-octave melody voice with a tension detune-wobble LFO, `bloomHome()` warm C-E-G resolution; pitch quantized to 7 rungs so **no wrong note is possible**; AudioContext created/resumed in the Start gesture (iOS); вЙ•64px Start, вЙ•44px controls; dark-bg typography rules. **Single drag gesture, no permission flow, no mic, no granular, no network** вАФ the most robust straight-to-prod path of the three. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**functional tonal tension вЖТ VвЖТI cadence as the interaction itself**; grep-0√Ч in INDEX/READMEs вАФ the lab has scales, chords, JI, voice-leading, but never *the felt pull of resolution* as the toy, and never in the kids lane] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Pachet, arXiv:2606.24911, Jun 2026** ¬Ј "Sad syntax? tonal closure in children," arXiv:2008.01810 ¬Ј **Bernstein** on the appoggiatura] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І558** вАФ 23 straight cycles 535вАУ558). #2/#4 NOT claimed (single audio source+canvas = 2 subsystems; single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit ~4√Ч/10), voice-leading/chord-progression-engine (kids recipe 941/945/950)] ¬Ј picked=[touch-drag-release INPUT (non-mic/camera/tilt), **raw-WebGL2вЖТCanvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh, non-WebGPU/three.js, bulletproof), **functional-tension/VвЖТI-cadence TECH** (real harmonic *pull* IS the idea вАФ the opposite of pitch-held-dumb; NOT granular, NOT a voice-leading lookup), warm-dusk tender VIBE (off both the cosmic-nebula adult cluster and the bright-playful kids cluster)]` вАФ clears every ban and is the directest jury-#2 hit. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 957 вАФ every lint warning is pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL device or audio in container; the cadence mapping + IвЖФV crossfade are reasoned-correct, static-only). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three making real melody/harmony the toy via a *different* renderer √Ч input √Ч technique; banked **`959-kids-chord-kites` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ tilt to fly two kites, the *interval* between them is the harmony (organum), **raw WebGPU compute** particle wind-field вАФ and **`958-kids-stepping-stones`** вАФ place lily-pad stones at heights, a frog hops your melody's *contour* (step vs leap), **Canvas2D**. ## Earlier (Cycle 557 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/954-sync-bloom](/dream/954-sync-bloom)** вАФ Sync Bloom: **a field of 1024 coupled oscillators on the GPU вАФ scribble coupling into them and watch sub-populations spontaneously phase-LOCK into glowing colour-bands, each locked cluster snapping to a just-intonation pitch, so the chord you hear is literally the field reaching consensus.** `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 557 (adult / **pointer-brush + autonomous K** / **raw-WebGPU `@compute` вЖТ WebGL2/CPU fallback**). **The lab's first Kuramoto coupled-oscillator synchronization piece, and the single object that answers BOTH dominant jury provocations at once** вАФ JURY 2026-06-25 **#1** (WebGPU compute is *still* the scarce 1√Ч/15 surface вАФ push GPU onto **raw WGSL `@compute`**, NOT three.js) **and #2** (kill the "pitch held deliberately dumb" boilerplate; make real **harmony** the idea). **The concept is the surprise:** instead of looking a chord up from a grammar, you *grow* it вАФ harmony as **emergent synchronization consensus**. The mechanism is real physics: N=1024 oscillators step `dќЄ_i/dt = ѕЙ_i + K_i¬Јr¬Јsin(ѕИвИТќЄ_i)` via the mean-field order parameter `r¬Јe^{iѕИ}=(1/N)ќ£e^{iќЄ_j}` (O(N), not O(N¬≤)); when coupling K beats the natural-frequency spread, sub-populations **phase-lock** вАФ which is *physically what consonance is* (simple ratios phase-lock; dissonance beats). **On the GPU:** a WGSL `@compute` **reduce pass** (tree-reduction вЖТ order parameter) + **advance pass** (each phase steps toward the mean field) + instanced glowing render (hue=phase, bloom=sync); async `mapAsync` reads phases back, a histogram detects locked **clusters**, each cluster's effective frequency snaps to the nearest **just-intonation partial** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2) of a drifting root вЖТ the set of locked clusters = the current chord, voiced by warm **additive + FM** tones over a drone (NOT granular, NOT samples). **Interaction:** pointer brush drips coupling K into a soft region (scribble energy in вЖТ that patch crystallizes into sync and its pitch locks); a global-K slider sweeps scattered/beating вЖФ locked/resolved; **autonomous K-breathing** on a slow sine so an idle glance self-organizes within ~1s. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**Kuramoto coupled-oscillator synchronization вЖТ emergent JI harmony**; grep-0√Ч in INDEX/READMEs] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [WGSL `@compute` solver + GPU phase-readback/cluster-detector + JI-snap harmony synth + instanced render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Y. Kuramoto 1975** ¬Ј **Strogatz, *Sync* 2003** ¬Ј **KoPE, arXiv 2604.07904, 2026** вАФ the days-old DL revival of Kuramoto sync that prompted reading synchronization as a generative primitive] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І557** вАФ 22 straight cycles 535вАУ557). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular-texture synth (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[pointer-couple INPUT (non-mic), **raw-WebGPU `@compute` OUTPUT** (the scarce 1√Ч surface вАФ jury #1; WebGL2/CPU fallback, NOT three.js), **Kuramoto-syncвЖТemergent-JI-harmony TECH** (real harmony IS the idea per jury #2 вАФ NOT granular, NOT a drone, NOT a voice-leading lookup), luminous self-organizing sync-field VIBE (off the over-rep cosmic-nebula adult cluster)]` вАФ clears every ban and is the *only* recent build on raw-WebGPU-compute. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2; the repo's existing `webgpu.d.ts`/`@webgpu/types` resolve the WGSL types). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 954 вАФ all lint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU device or audio in container; the GPU readback timing + clusterвЖТJI mapping are reasoned-correct, static-only). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three answering jury #2 via a *different mechanism √Ч surface*; banked **`955-cadence-river` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вАФ an autonomous long-form **functional-harmony chorale** (TвЖТPDвЖТD grammar + SATB voice-leading + circle-of-fifths modulation, raw-WebGL2 voice-ribbons) вАФ and **`956-counterpoint-weave`** вАФ draw a cantus firmus, a **species-counterpoint** engine (Fux) weaves 1вАУ3 voices on Canvas2D. Both returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS ¬І557). Design notes: `src/app/dream/954-sync-bloom/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 556 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/953-kids-iron-garden](/dream/953-kids-iron-garden)** вАФ Iron Garden: **drag glowing magnet-flowers around a dark field and watch thousands of iron filings snap into the invisible lines of force between them вАФ then slide two flowers together and their notes bloom into a chord the instant their fields connect** рЯІ≤рЯМЄвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 556 (kids 4+ / **multi-touch drag** / **Canvas2D particle field**). **Invisible-physics-made-visible applied to MAGNETISM, not the over-done cymatics.** This cycle's research dive found the 2026 cymatics-toy resurgence (CymaVis, Cymatica, Chladni Screen вАФ all 2026), and the lab already did cymatics twice (`19-cymatics`, `165-cymatics`); so I applied the *same* "make the invisible field visible + audible" idea to a physics the lab has **never** touched вАФ Faraday's magnetic **lines of force**. **The field is real:** each flower is a 2D dipole (a + pole and a вИТ pole offset along its axis); ~4,200 iron filings each frame sample the superposed field `B(P)=ќ£ q¬Ј(PвИТpole)/|PвИТpole|¬≥` (`field.ts`), orient as short streaks **along** the local field direction, slide along it to pile into the visible lines of force, and take their nearest flower's hue вАФ drawn as additive (`globalCompositeOperation:"lighter"`) hue-bucketed strokes for glowing chains. **Harmony is emergent + physical, not a voice-leading engine:** 6 flowers on a pentatonic scale (C3 E3 G3 A3 C4 E4 вАФ **no wrong notes**); when two flowers' fields bridge (proximity¬≤), a glowing connecting ribbon draws and their two notes ring together as a soft chord (gain вИЭ proximity¬≤); grabbing one alone hums its single note scaled to motion. **Kid-safe audio chain:** two detuned triangle oscillators per voice вЖТ lowpass вЖТ convolver plate-reverb bloom + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вЖТ master; a very quiet in-key pad so a cold load isn't silent. **Self-demo:** untouched ~4s, the flowers drift along smooth incommensurate-sine noise paths, attracting/separating on their own (a "tap to begin" gate satisfies autoplay; `text-rose-300` notice if Canvas2D/Web-Audio is missing). **Distinct from `192-kids-magnet-notes`** (point-attraction between orbs) вАФ this renders the FIELD ITSELF, thousands of filings tracing the lines of force. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [real magnetic-dipole field + iron-filing alignment as the instrument; grep-0√Ч вАФ 192 is point-attraction, the existing cymatics are *acoustic* Chladni] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [multi-touch magnet drag + dipole-superposition field solver + filing alignment/advection sim + pentatonic synth + field-bridge harmony detector + Canvas2D render = 5] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Michael Faraday's "lines of force"**; the classic iron-filings demonstration] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH ¬І556** вАФ 21 straight cycles 535вАУ556). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; GPU-dense sibling banked). **Renderer choice = the jury read:** the jury flagged a **12-of-15 GPU monoculture**; my audit found WebGPU over the cap (950/947/942/941) and Canvas2D fresh (only 952 in the last-10), so a robust **Canvas2D** kids piece (runs on any iPad, no float-render-target dependency, no per-frame React churn) is the deliberate counter-swing. `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit вЙ•4√Ч/10), voice-leading/chord-progression-engine (kids recipe 941/945/950)] ¬Ј picked=[multi-touch-drag INPUT (non-mic/camera/tilt), Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh, non-WebGPU/three.js), magnetic-dipole-field + iron-filing-alignment TECH with field-bridge EMERGENT harmony (non-voice-leading, non-granular), science-wonder/tactile VIBE (off the harmony-garden recipe)]` вАФ clears every ban. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 43s`** вЖТ lint/type PASS, grep-confirmed zero "Failed to compile"/"Type error"; one type error caught + fixed in the one allowed attempt вАФ TS resets `canvas` null-narrowing inside nested closures, aliased to a declared-non-null binding); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/touch-verified** (no audio device or multi-touch in container). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`954-kids-iron-garden-gl` в≠Р** (same concept, **raw-WebGL2** GPU-advected ~80k filings вАФ denser/silkier; IDEAS ¬І556). Design notes: `src/app/dream/953-kids-iron-garden/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 554 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 role/render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor](/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor)** вАФ Sky Conductor: **two 4-year-olds, two iPads, one tiny orchestra вАФ one child CONDUCTS (sweeps the device to set the tempo and which warm chord the sky is on) and the other PLAYS notes that automatically fit the conductor's current chord, so they make real chords-and-melody together and nobody can play a wrong note** рЯОЉрЯМИрЯ§Э. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 554 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt conductor + tap player + serverless WebRTC multi-user** / **raw WebGPU вЖТ raw-WebGL2 fallback**). **The deepening of the lab's WebRTC category-opener** (`918-kids-starlight-friend`, where two kids fling *identical* twinkles with no roles/structure) into **"a conducted two-player ensemble with roles"** вАФ the *literal* phrasing of **JURY 2026-06-25 #4** ("develop the category-openers, don't open a fifth вА¶ the WebRTC room вЖТ a conducted two-player ensemble with roles"). Also the directest kids answer to **#1** (push GPU onto **raw WebGPU**, the scarcest 1√Ч/10 surface вАФ NOT three.js) and **#2** (make music from real **pitch/harmony** again вАФ here a warm **IвАУIVвАУVвАУvi** progression with the melody voiced into the live chord, the idea carried by the *role split* not a voice-leading engine, so it dodges the hardening 550/551/942 voice-leading template). **INPUT** device-tilt/sweep (conductor) + tap (player) + **serverless WebRTC** co-play (`harmony.ts` `voiceTap()` snaps every player tap to a chord tone of the conductor's current chord вЖТ no wrong note); on-screen **drag fallback** when tilt is unavailable; **NOT mic** (jury-banned 4√Ч). **OUTPUT** primary **raw WebGPU/WGSL** fragment sky (chord-colored gradient, tempo-pulsed shimmer, note-blooms) вЖТ hand-written **raw-WebGL2** fallback painting the identical `SkyState` вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice if neither; **NOT three.js**. **Networking** reimplements 918's serverless handshake (host `createOffer()` вЖТ ICE вЖТ **gzip SDP via `CompressionStream` вЖТ base64url `#join=` link** вЖТ guest answer code вЖТ host paste; data channel `ordered:false/maxRetransmits:0`; tiny `{role:'conductor',chord,bpm}` / `{role:'player',note}` events; both peers synth+render locally) вАФ **no signaling server, no TURN, zero backend, no api route / no `guard`**. **Ghost-friend** auto-plays whichever role the local child isn't, within ~1s, driving a full chord-progression-with-melody demo on a cold untouched device, and bows out the instant a real data channel opens (networking purely additive) вАФ guarantees a sounding, color-changing, two-player-looking glance with zero interaction. **Kids-safe chain** `gain(вЙ§0.24) вЖТ lowpass 6.5kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on warm pad chord-bed that glides on chord changes; bell/triangle melody (вЙ•20ms attacks); вЙ•64px tap targets; no reading; full teardown (rAF + oscillators + `ctx.close()` + deviceorientation/resize listeners + RTCPeerConnection/channel + ghost timer + GPU/GL resources). **Zero new npm deps** (WebGPU/WebGL2 + Web Audio + built-in WebRTC/CompressionStream + the already-present `@webgpu/types`). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [WebRTC role-networking + shared clock/progression engine + dual-role pad+melody synth + WebGPU/WebGL2 render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers**; **Orff Schulwerk** children's-ensemble pedagogy; the **Frontiers Psychology 2026** group-music-game study where the instrumental-*ensemble* phase itself drove cooperation] ¬Ј #4 multi-cycle [this IS cycle-2 of 918's stated commitment вАФ cycle-1 shared sky, cycle-2 roles/structure, cycle-3 3+ players] ¬Ј #5 in-README dated RESEARCH ¬І554 вАФ **19 cycles running** 535вАУ554). #1 NOT claimed (WebRTC + WebGPU both have lab priors; the fresh axis is *role-complementarity as the deepening*, not a lab-first technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[device-tilt + WebRTC-multiuser INPUT (non-mic; deepens the 1√Ч WebRTC opener per jury #4), raw-WebGPUвЖТWebGL2 OUTPUT (the scarce 1√Ч GPU surface вАФ jury #1; NOT three.js), role-split chord-context-+-voiced-melody harmony TECH (real IвАУIVвАУVвАУvi, pitch IS the idea, NOT granular, NOT a voice-leading engine), warm social kids-ensemble VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (1 concept √Ч 3 role/render approaches вАФ alternating after two WIDE nights 552/553, and jury #4 explicitly says "go DEEP on one" category-opener). **Love-aligned** вАФ extends the loved loop/layering + kids-character cluster (`172-loop-station`вЭ§пЄП, `111-kids-shape-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП, `317-kids-color-bells`вЭ§пЄП): "you and a friend make a song together" is the social form of that layered-build joy. **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬І554):** **`948-kids-duet-grove` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вАФ groove-keeper + melody-maker on ONE shared 8-step clock, **raw WebGL2** (the most viscerally legible "we made a song" + the bulletproof no-WebGPU twin; banked only because WebGL2 sits at the 4√Ч/10 audit ban-edge where the winner lands the scarce WebGPU) + **`949-kids-echo-birds`** вАФ call-and-response turn-taking bird-conversation, **Canvas2D** (the freshest renderer + most dialogic, but doesn't advance the GPU ask + harmonically thinnest). Both returned complete + self-reported clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed **zero** "950"/"sky-conductor"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS" вАФ all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/device/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio/motion-sensor/second-peer in container вАФ unverified: whether the WGSL compiles + the WebGL2 fallback matches on real hardware [robust cascade + ghost cover every path], whether two iPads connect over the serverless gzip-SDP link [great same-LAN/hotspot = the two-iPads-side-by-side case; symmetric-NAT pairs may not, but that path is purely additive], and whether a 4yo reads "tilt = conduct the sky / tap = sing into it"; the always-on pad + ghost-friend auto-co-play guarantee a sounding, harmonising, two-player glance regardless). Design notes: `src/app/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor/README.md`

## Cycle 553 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/947-overtone-loom](/dream/947-overtone-loom)** вАФ Overtone Loom: **play a chord and SEE why it sounds sweet or sour.** Each note is a stack of harmonic partials; a **raw WebGPU compute shader** paints the live **sensory-dissonance field** (PlompвАУLevelt roughness) between every pair of sounding partials along a log-frequency axis вАФ octaves & fifths **lock dark and smooth**, tritones & minor-2nds **churn bright** вАФ and a **timbre knob** moves which intervals read as consonant, making tangible the 2026 finding that *consonance is a property of the spectrum, not abstract ratios* рЯЯ¶рЯОєрЯУИ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 553 (adult / **note-keyboard + MIDI** / **raw WebGPU compute**). **The lab's first dissonance-curve-as-instrument** and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #1** (push GPU onto **raw WebGPU compute** вАФ the scarcest 1√Ч/10 surface, NOT three.js) **and #2** (make music from real PITCH/harmony again вАФ here the *psychoacoustic substrate of consonance itself* IS the idea, a fresh facet distinct from the 550/551 voice-leading cluster). **note-keyboard + Web-MIDI INPUT** (~1.75-octave on-screen chromatic keyboard, pointer/touch; optional `navigator.requestMIDIAccess` вАФ **NOT mic**, jury-banned 4√Ч). **raw-WebGPU/WGSL compute OUTPUT** вАФ one compute invocation per frequency bin (512 bins dispatched) sums roughness against every sounding partial, rendered as a clinical cyan/white Ikeda interference field; degrades **WebGPU вЖТ raw-WebGL2 fragment (same math) вЖТ Canvas2D CPU** with a visible amber notice. **Additive synthesis** (banks of Web Audio oscillators per voice, 1/n harmonic rolloff вАФ **NOT granular**, jury-banned 4√Ч) + the canonical **Sethares/PlompвАУLevelt** model (`dissonance.ts`: `pairRoughness`, `totalDissonance`, `fieldAt` вАФ the same math mirrored in WGSL + GLSL). A scalar **total-dissonance meter** rises/falls as you stack notes; the timbre/partial-count sliders prove the ¬І553 paper's point by shifting the consonant intervals. Master chain `gain(вЙ§0.22) вЖТ lowpass 7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; adding notes busies the field, never spikes loudness. **~1.2s-idle auto-demo** cycles unison вЖТ octave вЖТ fifth вЖТ triad вЖТ tritone вЖТ minor-2nd вЖТ cluster so a hands-off glance *hears & sees* the consonance/dissonance contrast within ~1s; full teardown (oscillators + `ctx.close()` + rAF + GPU buffers + MIDI/resize listeners). **No API route / no `guard`** (all client-side, no network). **Zero new npm deps.** README cites **RESEARCH ¬І553 (2026-06-25)** вАФ "Elementary spectrum for the dissonance curve" (*Journal of Mathematics and Music* 2026, DOI 10.1080/17459737.2026.2628778), **Helmholtz, *On the Sensations of Tone* (1863)**, **Plomp & Levelt (1965)**, **Sethares, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1998)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **18 cycles running** (535вАУ553). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [dissonance-curve / sensory-roughness field as a playable instrument вАФ grep-0√Ч in the lab] ¬Ј #3 named refs [Helmholtz ¬Ј PlompвАУLevelt ¬Ј Sethares ¬Ј the 2026 paper] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І553). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), cosmic-ambient adult vibe (5√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[note-keyboard/MIDI INPUT (off banned mic), raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (the scarcest 1√Ч GPU surface вАФ jury #1; degrades WebGL2вЖТCanvas2D), additive + Sethares-dissonance TECH (consonance IS the idea, non-granular), clinical Ikeda spectral-lab VIBE (off the cosmic-nebula cluster)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers; the 2026-06-25 jury is dominantly a spread/ban signal and its named DEEP targets were just-done [depth, by 551] or rotation-mismatched [AI-chain voice-ban, WebRTC is kids] вАФ so three fresh-tag bets beat one more harmony concept). **Love-aligned** вАФ sits exactly at the intersection of Karel's loved **spectral cluster** (`223-fourier-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП, `267-spectral-drift`вЭ§пЄП, `321-spectral-flight`вЭ§пЄП) and **GPU compute** (`130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП). **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬І553):** **`948-cantus-engine` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вАФ a long-form (5+ min) self-developing **counterpoint** engine (seed a 4-note motif вЖТ Fux/Bach inversion¬Јretrograde¬Јaugmentation¬Јstretto¬Јmodulation over a ~330s escalating arc; raw-WebGL2 scrolling score); the lab's long-form-stateful gap, lost only because WebGL2 is less scarce than WebGPU compute + the counterpoint lane was just mined (550/551/552). **`949-maqam-road`** вАФ a microtonal Arabic **maqam** instrument (4 maqamat by exact cents, true quarter-tone portamento + ornaments, tonic+fifth drone; Canvas2D "road"); the non-Western-pitch surprise. Both returned complete + self-reported clean; `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-553/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 110s`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS; one fix attempt landed = corrected a Web-MIDI ambient-type collision [`MIDIAccess` vs DOM `MidiAccess`] by adopting the DOM WebMIDI types like `902-harmonic-mirror`; 947 carries one **non-fatal** `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warning [ref-in-cleanup вАФ same class as the pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; warnings don't fail `next build`]; all other warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio in container вАФ unverified: whether the WGSL compute shader compiles + the roughness field reads as intended on real hardware [robust WebGL2 + Canvas2D + auto-demo fallbacks cover every failure], and whether the additive timbre + dissonance contrast are audible on a real speaker; the auto-demo guarantees a sounding, evolving glance with zero interaction).

## Earlier (Cycle 552 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/946-kids-bird-round](/dream/946-kids-bird-round)** вАФ Bird Round: a 4-year-old **drags a glowing bird up & down a tree to sing a little tune** (height = pitch, snapped to a friendly pentatonic so it's always musical); let go and the bird **remembers the melody and loops it**, then tap *add-a-bird* and a second bird sings the **same tune offset in time** вАФ a real **canon / round** ("Row, Row, Row Your Boat") that blooms into layered counterpoint as the flock grows рЯР¶рЯОґрЯМЕ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 552 (kids / **touch-drag** / **raw WebGL2**). **The lab's first KIDS canon/counterpoint piece** (302-mirror-canon was adult-only) and the directest kids answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (*make music from real PITCH/melody again* вАФ melody IS the playable idea here, breaking the banned "pitch held deliberately dumb" stance). **touch-DRAG INPUT** вАФ vertical finger position over time = a melody; live chirp under the finger (throttled), released drag вЖТ `makeMelodyFromDrag` quantizes the samples to 8 steps over ~4 beats + snaps each to a C-pentatonic scale вЖТ stored as the shared melody. **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (`gl.ts`, hand-written GLSL вАФ **NOT three.js**, jury #1) вАФ a soft dawn-gold treetop with additive glowing birds + light-trails that pulse when they sing; **Canvas2D fallback** renders the same scene if WebGL2 is unavailable. **Shared-clock CANON scheduler** (`audio.ts/makeScheduler`) вАФ ONE look-ahead clock anchored to a fixed start; each bird is a voice with a constant time offset (1 beat per added voice), all voices read the same melody so adding a bird = a time-shifted copy = a genuine round; loop wraparound handled, `pulses[]` exported so the renderer bobs/glows the exact bird that just sang. **Bright chirp synth** (triangle+sine with a quick upward pitch-glide attack, light 6.5 Hz vibrato, short bell/pluck env вАФ **NOT granular**, jury ban) + a quiet tonic+fifth **pad** bed. Master chain `gain(вЙ§0.26) вЖТ lowpass 7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; **more birds must NOT mean louder** вАФ `applyFlockGain = MASTER_CEIL/вИЪvoices`. **Kids-safe & hands-off:** gesture-gated AudioContext, вЙ•64вАУ96px emoji controls (вЦґпЄП start / рЯР¶вЮХ add-bird / рЯФД reset), no reading required, instant chirp/loop response; **~2s-idle auto-demo** sings a default tune and adds a 2nd bird so a hands-off glance hears a little round + sees two birds glowing within ~1вАУ2s; full teardown (scheduler interval + pad + rAF + `ctx.close()`). **No API route / no `guard`** (no network, no AI gen вАФ all client-side). **Zero new npm deps.** README cites the **round/canon** structure (Reich phasing as adult cousin), the **melodic-contour developmental finding**, and **Toshio Iwai's Electroplankton**. **Clears ambition floor 2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [drag-to-melody capture/quantizer + shared-clock canon scheduler + chirp synth + WebGL2 renderer = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [round/canon ¬Ј melodic-contour research ¬Ј Electroplankton]). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[touch-drag INPUT (touch scarce 1√Ч), raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (вЖТCanvas2D fallback; off banned three.js), melody-capture + CANON/counterpoint TECH (melody IS the idea; non-granular chirp synth), warm dawn-treetop kids VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers; deliberate alternation after two DEEP cycles 550/551 + a direct attack on the jury's "house style" critique). **Love-aligned** вАФ extends the loved loop/layering lineage (`172-loop-station`вЭ§пЄП, `111-kids-shape-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `160-kids-paint-loop`вЭ§пЄП). **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬І552):** **944-kids-melody-coaster** (draw a hilly track, a cart rolls + sings the contour as a diatonic melody; WebGL2) + **945-kids-harmony-garden** (tap to plant note-flowers; consonant pairs grow "friend-vines" + the chord nearest-tone voice-leads; Canvas2D вАФ the directest harmony/voice-leading answer, deferred only because it overlaps 941's harmony territory). Both returned complete + self-reported eslint-0; `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.0min`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero "946"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio in container вАФ unverified: whether the canon offsets read as a genuinely harmonious *round* on a real speaker [always-on pad + auto-demo guarantee a sounding, layered glance], and whether drag-to-pitch feels intuitive on a real iPad; robust Canvas2D + pointer fallbacks cover desktop review).

## Earlier (Cycle 551 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/942-depth-harmonic-room](/dream/942-depth-harmonic-room)** вАФ Depth Harmonic Room: stand in front of the webcam and your **distance + lateral position in the room** place you inside a neo-Riemannian **Tonnetz** of harmony вАФ walking through space glides you through smooth, **voice-led chord changes** (P / L / R), rendered as a candle-warm WebGPU lattice that blooms as you lean in рЯОєрЯХѓпЄПрЯЯ†. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 551 (adult / **webcam depth** / **raw WebGPU**). **THE DEEPENING OF 927-depth-room вАФ and the directest possible multi-provocation answer to JURY 2026-06-25.** It hits **#4** (develop a 0√Ч category-opener вАФ depth-camera вАФ *don't open a fifth*: this turns 927's "distance вЖТ texture" into a multi-zone spatial *harmonic instrument you walk through*), **#2** (make music from real PITCH / voice-leading again вАФ *harmony IS the idea here*, the literal opposite of 927's "pitch held deliberately dumb"), and **#1** (push GPU work onto **raw WebGPU**, the scarcest 1√Ч/10 surface вАФ NOT three.js). **webcam-DEPTH INPUT** вАФ **Depth Anything V2 (small)** runs in-browser on WebGPU via **Transformers.js** (CDN at runtime, no npm dep), a 256√Ч192 frame вЖТ per-pixel depth (larger = nearer) вЖТ 16√Ч12 grid вЖТ **nearEnergy** (proximity вЖТ brightness + chord openness), **centroidX** (lateral вЖТ Tonnetz column), **depthBand** (lean вЖТ row), **motion** (вЖТ shimmer/attack). Depth is the *deepened* category-opener (1√Ч in last-10, sanctioned by jury #4). **Raw WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** вАФ a full-screen fragment shader paints a warm volumetric room (amber/rose/deep-teal) with a triangular Tonnetz of glowing pitch-nodes; the **sounding triad-triangle glows brightest and blooms** with proximity, a transient fires on each transform, a focal glow marks where you stand. Degrades **WebGPU вЖТ raw WebGL2 (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same lattice) вЖТ DOM chord-view** вАФ a 3-tier render cascade. **Neo-Riemannian voice-leading ENGINE** (`harmony.ts`) вАФ every cell is a major/minor triad; adjacent cells differ by a single parsimonious **P** (parallel, third moves ¬љ), **L** (Leittonwechsel, root down ¬љ) or **R** (relative, fifth up a tone), each holding **exactly 2 of 3 common tones** (builder unit-verified across all 24 triads вАФ involutions + 2-common-tone retention + a real R/L progression CвЖТAmвЖТFвЖТDmвЖТBвЩ≠вЖТGmвЖТEвЩ≠). centroidX walks the R/L third-chain (related keys, one step at a time); lean in/out applies **P** (major-bright вЖФ minor-dark). **SATB nearest-tone voicing** (`voiceTriad`) вАФ bass=root low; each upper voice takes the octave of a chord tone nearest where it already sits (all 6 assignments tried, min total semitone motion вАФ Tymoczko's minimal voice-leading), so common tones literally don't move and the one changed tone slides shortest; warm pad voices (detuned sine+triangle вЖТ soft lowpass + slow vibrato) over a root **drone bed**, each re-voice **glides (portamento ~120вАУ300ms)** вАФ smooth, never clicky. Master chain `gain(вЙ§0.28) вЖТ lowpass 7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; additive/subtractive synthesis (**NOT granular** вАФ jury-banned). **Degrades fully:** no camera / model fails вЖТ **synthetic Lissajous presence-blob** auto-walks the Tonnetz within ~1s of Start (a hands-off glance *hears evolving harmony + sees the lattice glow*); laptop with no camera вЖТ **pointer** steers the lattice; on-device only (camera never recorded/uploaded); full teardown (rAF + listeners + webcam tracks + oscillators + `audioCtx.close()` + GPU destroy). **No API route / no `guard`** (no network, no AI image/voice gen вАФ all client-side). **Zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU + the runtime CDN Transformers.js import). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І551 (2026-06-25)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **17 cycles running** (535вАУ551). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [webcam-depth ML pipeline + neo-Riemannian Tonnetz/voice-leading engine + SATB synthesis + WebGPU/WebGL2 lattice render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Cohn, *Audacious Euphony* 2012**; **Tymoczko, *A Geometry of Music* 2011**; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***; **Depth Anything V2 / Transformers.js**] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І551). #1 NOT claimed (depth-camera has a lab prior вАФ 927; the Tonnetz appears as a ¬І533 seed `896-tonnetz-loom`; the lab-fresh axis is *depth-position вЖТ Tonnetz navigation on WebGPU*, not a brand-new technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), raw-WebGL2-as-primary (audit 4√Ч/10 edge), cosmic-ambient adult vibe (5√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[webcam-depth INPUT (deepening the 1√Ч category-opener per jury #4), raw-WebGPU OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface 1√Ч/10 вАФ jury #1; degrades to WebGL2/DOM), neo-Riemannian voice-leading harmony TECH (harmony IS the idea вАФ direct anti-"pitch-dumb" pivot, NOT granular), warm-inhabited-room VIBE (candle amber/rose вАФ off the cosmic-nebula cluster)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (one massively-bigger concept √Ч 2 render approaches; jury #4 explicitly said "go DEEP on one" category-opener, not WIDE). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬І551):** **`943-depth-tonnetz-room` в≠Р** вАФ the *same* depthвЖТTonnetz concept on **raw WebGL2** (warm depth-room + glowing constellation; same P/L/R engine + SATB voicing); the bulletproof no-WebGPU twin вАФ resurrect if 942's WebGPU path disappoints on real hardware, or when WebGL2 is cold again (its builder honestly flagged a rectangular-grid limitation: a 2D grid can't make *both* axes globally parsimonious, so it keeps the lateral axis perfectly P/L/R and lets proximity use P/Slide). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 42s`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero "942"/"depth-harmonic"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/depth/ear-verified** (no WebGPU / camera / audio in container вАФ unverified: whether Depth Anything V2 actually loads + runs on a real machine's WebGPU [robust synthetic + pointer + WebGL2/DOM fallbacks cover every failure], whether the warm pads + portamento read as genuinely *voice-led* on a real speaker, and whether body-distance maps intuitively to "lean in = brighter / step sideways = new chord"; the always-on drone + synthetic auto-walk guarantee a sounding, harmonising glance with zero interaction).

## в≠Р Earlier (Cycle 550 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom](/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom)** вАФ Choir Bloom: a 4-year-old conducts a choir by dragging singing blob-creatures up and down to PITCHES, and a voice-leading brain turns their little melody into real four-part harmony вАФ glowing GPU metaballs that bloom brighter as the voices come into a chord рЯОґрЯЂІрЯМИ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 550 (kids 4+ / **touch pitch-drag** / **WebGPU metaballs**). **For**: kids (4+) / a warm, cozy, sing-together playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST CONDUCT-A-CHOIR-BY-PITCH PIECE вАФ and the deliberate breaking of the "pitch held dumb" template the jury just banned.** This is a piece where **melody and harmony ARE the idea** (the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 provocation #2** вАФ "make music from real pitch / voice-leading / a harmonic arc again; it must BE the idea, not the thing you apologise for omitting"). **touch pitch-drag INPUT** вАФ drag the rose **soprano** blob up/down to set its pitch, snapped to a C-major diatonic scale (always in tune, but the child genuinely *chooses each note and hears a melody*); the blob is the вЙ•64px drag handle; inner voices are independently grabbable (gentle chord-tone re-snap on release). Touch is **0√Ч in the last-10 audit** вАФ the freshest input (off the jury-banned mic, off the recent tilt/camera/shake). **WebGPU/WGSL metaball OUTPUT** вАФ `navigator.gpu` fragment pipeline evaluates a four-source metaball iso-field вЖТ warm additive glow (soprano=rose, alto=amber, tenor=emerald, bass=violet) that **blooms brighter as the voices become consonant and close** (a `consonance()` measure drives it); WebGPU is **the scarcest GPU surface at 1√Ч/10** вАФ the directest answer to **jury provocation #1** ("ban three.js, push GPU work onto raw WebGPU compute"). **Voice-leading harmony ENGINE** (`voices.ts`) вАФ the soprano's scale degree implies a diatonic triad (1вЖТI, 2вЖТii, 3вЖТiii, 4вЖТIV, 5вЖТV, 6вЖТvi) and the bass/tenor/alto each glide (`setTargetAtTime` ~90вАУ140ms) to the **nearest chord tone within their range** (Aldwell & Schachter's smooth voice-leading), bass nudged toward the root, inner voices kept off unisons вАФ so **drawing a melody with the lead blob makes real chord changes emerge underneath, a harmonic arc you can hear**. **Formant source-filter "ahh" singing SYNTH** (`audio.ts`, NOT samples / NOT granular / NOT AI) вАФ each voice is two slightly detuned band-limited sawtooth glottal sources with ~5Hz vibrato вЖТ a parallel bank of 3вАУ4 bandpass formant filters (warm /a/ вЙИ F1 700 / F2 1100 / F3 2600 Hz), brighter highs / darker bass per register, so the blobs read as a *singing* choir, not a synth. **Kids-safe chain:** sum вЖТ `masterGain(0.26)` вЖТ lowpass 6.5kHz вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1)` вЖТ destination; a harder/faster drag NEVER gets louder or harsher вАФ only pitch changes; always-on (never silent). **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU вЖТ hand-written **raw WebGL2** fragment metaball render (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same field/bloom math, NOT three.js) вЖТ if neither GPU path, a plain-DOM radial-gradient glow + `text-rose-300` notice keeps audio alive; вЙ•72px **Start** gesture-gates the AudioContext + GPU init (iOS); ~2s-idle **auto-demo** drifts the soprano through a calm diatonic tune so a hands-free glance both *sees the metaballs bloom* and *hears the choir + harmony* within ~1s; full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + `device.destroy()` / `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (NO mic, NO network, NO AI model вАФ fully offline + private, exactly right for a kids app); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І550 (2026-06-25)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **16 cycles running** (535вАУ550). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch pitch-drag conductor + diatonic voice-leading SATB engine + 4-voice formant source-filter synthesis + WebGPU metaball render w/ WebGL2 fallback = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Blob Opera / David Li, Google Arts & Culture 2020**; **Cantor / Chorus Digitalis** formant gesture-singing, IRCAM/LIMSI; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І550). #1 NOT claimed (formant source-filter synthesis has lab priors вАФ 287-mirror-choir, 413-kids-mouth-mirror, ~61 README hits; the fresh axis is the *conduct-by-pitch Blob-Opera interaction + a real voice-leading engine as the playable idea*, not a lab-first technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7√Ч + audit), mic-as-primary (JURY 4√Ч), granular-texture synthesis (JURY 4√Ч), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10√Ч), raw-WebGL2-as-primary (audit 4√Ч/10 edge)] ¬Ј picked=[touch-pitch-drag INPUT (0√Ч/10, fresh), WebGPU-metaball OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface 1√Ч/10 вАФ jury provocation #1), formant + voice-leading harmony TECH (pitch/harmony IS the idea вАФ the direct anti-"pitch-dumb" pivot, NOT granular), warm playful kids-choir VIBE (off the recent cosmic-ambient cluster)]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (one massively-bigger concept √Ч 2 render approaches; deliberate alternation after 549 WIDE; the jury's dominant signal is a focused thematic pivot вАФ harmony-is-the-idea вАФ not breadth). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬І550):** **`940-kids-blob-choir` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same conduct-a-choir concept on **Canvas2D** вАФ soft glowing character-face blobs;
