## (Cycle 549 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/939-aurora-harp](/dream/939-aurora-harp)** вАФ Aurora Harp: hear space weather *right now* вАФ the live solar wind streaming past Earth raises a shimmering aurora curtain and plays the magnetosphere's resonances; calm wind = slow ULF drones, a gust or southward Bz = flares, beating and crimson sky рЯММрЯМ†рЯЯҐрЯЯ£. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 549 (adult / **live external data (NOAA SWPC)** / **raw WebGL2**). **For**: adult / nocturnal-cosmic-contemplative / desktop-or-iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST LIVE-PLANETARY-INSTRUMENT.** **live-external-data INPUT** вАФ two NOAA **SWPC** real-time solar-wind products fetched browser-side and polled ~60s: `plasma-5-minute.json` (density, speed, temp) and `mag-5-minute.json` (Bx/By/**Bz_gsm**/Bt) from ACE/DSCOVR at the SunвАУEarth **L1** point (0√Ч in the last-10 audit вАФ the freshest possible input). **raw-WebGL2 fragment OUTPUT** (GPU, NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/SVG): a full-screen **aurora curtain** вАФ fbm-folded vertical light sheets, greenвЖТvioletвЖТcrimson by activity, star field over a dark arctic horizon, folding faster with wind speed, reaching higher and shifting crimson-violet on southward Bz. **HARP-style space-weather sonification TECH** вАФ after NASA **HARP (Heliophysics Audified: Resonances in Plasmas)**: a sustained drone bed on inharmonic resonance **bands**, each a **detuned oscillator pair** producing real *beating* whose rate tracks Bt/turbulence + southward Bz; density gates how many partials sing; gust swells retrigger faster as wind speed rises; a southward-Bz crossing (вЙИ вИТ7 nT) fires a flare вАФ sub-rumble + ripple of beating tones synced to an aurora flash. **Pitch held deliberately non-melodic** (drone + resonance bands, NO chord, NO scale вАФ the *Sun* is the composer; music from data/resonance, the directest JURY 2026-06-24 #3 answer) and it deliberately **drops the consonant-mode safety crutch the jury BANNED** for external-data sonification (it audifies the actual resonances/beating, never an in-tune-by-construction chord). **Master compressor/limiter** for safety; always-on drone (never silent). **Degrades fully:** Start seeds an immediate **synthetic solar wind** so sound + a moving sky appear within ~0.6s before the live feed returns; any fetch failure (offline / CORS / feed gap) вЖТ the synthetic generator (with periodic southward-Bz "substorm" gusts) takes over behind a calm **amber notice**; no WebGL2 вЖТ audio-only + amber notice. A live readout (speed km/s, density p/cm¬≥, Bz nT, Bt nT) + a "what am I hearing" panel explain the mapping; pointer to look around. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (all client-side fetch, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2 + Web Audio). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І549 (2026-06-25)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **15 cycles running** (535вАУ549). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [live SWPC fetch+parse + HARP sonification engine + raw-WebGL2 aurora shader + Bz-event/smoothing state = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [NASA HARP; NOAA SWPC ACE/DSCOVR; OVATION] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І549). #1 NOT claimed (external-data sonification has a lab prior вАФ 836/877/898 вАФ but those are the jury-banned consonant-crutch template; the fresh axis is *HARP-style live-resonance audification that drops the consonant guarantee*). `diversity: banned=[three.js (4√Ч/10), Canvas2D, SVG, touch (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt (2√Ч consecutive + rejected-933 would 3-peat the concept)] ¬Ј picked=[live-external-data INPUT (0√Ч), raw-WebGL2 aurora OUTPUT, HARP space-weather-resonance sonification TECH (data/resonance not pitch), nocturnal-aurora/cosmic VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, after 3 consecutive DEEP cycles + a ban-heavy jury verdict). **Siblings banked (IDEAS ¬І549):** **`938-morphogenesis` в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST** (Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion on **WebGPU compute** вАФ the scarcest GPU surface вАФ вЖТ granular texture) and **`937-cathedral-phase`** (Euclidean + Steve Reich phasing вЖТ raymarched SDF cathedral, the cleanest rhythm-not-pitch build). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS, grep-confirmed zero "939"/"aurora-harp"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT data/GPU/ear-verified** (no live network / GPU / audio confirmation in container вАФ unverified: whether services.swpc.noaa.gov CORS resolves from the deploy edge [fully covered by the synthetic-wind fallback + amber notice], the beating-rateвЖТturbulence + Bz-flare mappings on a real speaker, whether real-day quiet wind reads as too calm [synthetic generator injects gust energy for the demo]; the always-on drone + synthetic fallback + immediate aurora guarantee a sounding/showing glance with zero network).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/939-aurora-harp/README.md`
- **[/dream/935-kids-shake-critters](/dream/935-kids-shake-critters)** вАФ Shake the Critters!: a 4-year-old shakes the iPad like a rattle and a little band of glowing jelly-creatures comes alive вАФ the rhythm you shake is caught into a loop the critters keep grooving рЯЂ®рЯЯ°рЯФµрЯЯ£рЯЯҐ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 548 (kids 4+ / **devicemotion-shake** / **three.js GPU**). **For**: kids (4+) / a bright, playful, laugh-first playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST SHAKE-DRIVEN STOCHASTIC-SHAKER INSTRUMENT** вАФ the rattle is **PhISEM (Physically-Informed Stochastic Event Modeling, Perry Cook 1997)**: a shaker is modeled as N virtual beans in a gourd, a per-frame *collision probability rises with shake energy*, and each collision is a short white-noise grain through a resonant bandpass at the shell frequency (~1.7вАУ6 kHz) with a few-ms exponential decay; summing many grains = the characteristic rattle. **Shake energy вЖТ grain RATE + resonance BRIGHTNESS, NEVER loudness** (harder shake = more+brighter grains, kids-safe). **devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT** (`acceleration` magnitude + jerk; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap вАФ the one fresh 4yo-native channel left: camera was AUDIT-banned 4√Ч/10, touch JURY-banned, mic 3√Ч / tilt-orientation 2√Ч recent; shake is distinct from the tilt-orientation 931/932 just used). **three.js GPU OUTPUT** (the *scarcer* GPU surface after 931+932 both shipped raw-WebGL2; NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): five blobby icosphere **critters** with a custom vertex-noise-displacement shader squash/stretch/jiggle on shake energy, collisions puff colored sparkle particles, a rim-glow/tonemap gives a bloom feel вАФ bold primary critter colors on a warm bright daylight sky (the jury's "active joyful middle", not calm bedtime glow). **PhISEM-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH** вАФ three voices (soft maraca / woody cabasa / bright shaker) + a low stomp on hard onsets sound like a small band over an always-on warm drone; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (single drone, NO chimes, NO melody, NO notes to miss вАФ music from **timbre + rhythm**, the directest kids answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3, and the deliberate inversion of `866-rainstick-sky`'s calm pentatonic). **The groove loop:** a rolling ~3.2s buffer samples the shake-energy envelope; pause вЖТ the window freezes into a **loop** the critters keep re-triggering, so a warm groove accretes (up to 3 stacked, oldest drops; рЯІє clears). **Kids-safe chain:** master-gain ceiling вЖТ lowpass ~6 kHz вЖТ soft compressor/limiter; always-on drone (never silent); full teardown (rAF + listeners + three.js dispose + audio nodes). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied вЖТ pointer/touch **drag** = shake (plays fully by mouse-swipe) + 3s idle auto-demo gently auto-shakes so a hands-free glance sees jiggle+sparkle and hears the rattle within ~0.6s; no WebGL вЖТ friendly amber notice, audio keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (three@0.182 already present + Web Audio). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І548 (2026-06-25)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **14 cycles running** (535вАУ548). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [devicemotion-shake + three.js GPU critter render + PhISEM stochastic-shaker synth + shake-rhythm groove-loop engine = 4] ¬Ј #3 named ref [PhISEM / Perry Cook 1997] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І548). #1 NOT claimed (PhISM cited once before in `429-kids-texture-paint-tap`; the fresh axis is shake-driven shaker *instrument* + groove-loop). `diversity: banned=[camera (audit 4√Ч/10), touch (JURY), Canvas2D/SVG (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt-orientation (2√Ч recent), mic (3√Ч recent), raw-WebGL2 (931+932 consecutive)] ¬Ј picked=[devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT, three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarcer surface), PhISEM-stochastic-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH (texture+rhythm not pitch), bright-playful daylight-critter-band VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (kids input palette too narrow for WIDE's distinct-input-per-brief rule вЖТ 1 concept √Ч 2 GPU approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬І548):** **`936-kids-rattle-bloom`** (the same shakeвЖТPhISEMвЖТgroove concept as a raw-WebGL2 **metaball** fragment shader вАФ gooey candy-bright blobs that merge with energy; de-selected because abstract blobs read less "band of creatures" than characters, and raw-WebGL2 is hot after 931/932). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: exit 0, zero "Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS", zero 935-folder refs in errors, reached "Collecting page data"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear/GPU-verified** (no shake sensor / GPU / audio in container вАФ unverified: iOS DeviceMotion permission flow + accelerationвЖТenergy feel on a real iPad, PhISEM grain balance on a real speaker, whether the groove-loop reads as "the critters kept my rhythm"; the always-on drone + pointer-drag + 3s idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding/jiggling glance with zero hardware).

## Cycle 547 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/932-tilt-orrery](/dream/932-tilt-orrery)** вАФ Tilt Orrery: tilt your device and a little cosmos tips like a bowl; every body that swings through perihelion rings, and the music is the emergent polyrhythm of orbits рЯ™РрЯФФ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 547 (adult / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGPU WGSL compute**). **For**: adult / cosmic-contemplative / iPad-or-desktop. **The whole N-body sim AND the perihelion detection run on the GPU** вАФ an inline **WGSL compute shader** integrates 3000 bodies in double-buffered (ping-pong A/B) storage buffers (semi-implicit Euler, central inverse-square gravity + a tilt acceleration "tipped bowl"); perihelion is flagged on the GPU as a local max of 1/r and only a tiny per-frame flag buffer is read back **non-blocking** via `mapAsync` (last frame's flags, вЙ§24/readback, 90ms per-body gate) to fire Web Audio bells. **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap; tilt 1√Ч/10 вАФ fresh, off the over-used touch/mic). **raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest GPU surface вАФ 0√Ч in last-10, the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1 "swing to the scarce GPU surface"; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D/SVG). **gravitational perihelion-polyrhythm TECH** вАФ bell timbre from radius+speed (close+fast = bright bell, far+slow = soft thud), **stereo pan from `cos(angle)`** so you hear the cosmos rotate, tilt-steepness вЖТ pulse density; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (fixed pentatonic over a sub-bass drone, NO harmony engine вАФ music from rhythm/space, JURY #3). **The soul / research enrichment:** seven amber bodies are seeded in the **TRAPPIST-1 mean-motion resonance chain** (adjacent period ratios вЙИ 8:5,5:3,3:2,3:2,4:3,3:2) on locked analytic orbits, so a steady hypnotic pulse **self-organizes inside** the chaotic violet field вАФ Kepler's 1619 *Harmonices Mundi* "harmony of the spheres" made literal, after NASA / SYSTEM Sounds' 2017 TRAPPIST-1 sonification. **Render:** instanced additive glowing quads + a translucent indigo trail veil. **Audio chain:** master gain 0.26 вЖТ `DynamicsCompressorNode` limiter вЖТ destination (dense bursts never clip). **Degrades fully:** `navigator.gpu` missing or any WebGPU init throw вЖТ a 360-body **CPU N-body sim** runs identical physics + perihelion detection and renders additive glow on a 2D `<canvas>`, still sounding (calm amber notice, never a crash); no motion sensor вЖТ auto-drift Lissajous + pointer-drag + tilt x/y sliders (sounding/moving glance within ~0.6s, zero hardware). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGPU + Web Audio). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І547 (2026-06-25)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **13 cycles running** (535вАУ547). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [tilt sensor + WGSL GPU N-body solver + GPU-perihelion-flag `mapAsync` readback + granular bell synth + WebGPU render = 5] ¬Ј #3 named refs [Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* 1619; TRAPPIST-1 / NASA SYSTEM Sounds 2017; Gillon et al. *Nature* 2017] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І547). #1 NOT claimed (raw WebGPU/WGSL compute has a lab prior вАФ loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`; the fresh axis is *tilt-driven N-body gravitational-rhythm + resonance-chain-in-chaos*). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10] ¬Ј picked=[device-tilt INPUT (fresh, 1√Ч), raw-WebGPU-WGSL-compute OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface, 0√Ч), gravitational-perihelion-polyrhythm + TRAPPIST-resonance-in-chaos TECH (rhythm/space, not pitch), cosmic/orrery VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (the в≠Р standing adult resurrect-first concept `928-tilt-orrery` √Ч 2 approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬І547):** **`933-tilt-orrery`** в≠Р **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept as a lush three.js `WebGLRenderer` galaxy + a dynamic-`import()` `WebGPURenderer`+TSL compute enhancement вАФ the proven render path + a reusable build-safe way to use `three/webgpu` here). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS, grep-confirmed zero "932"/"tilt-orrery"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/GPU/ear-verified** (no tilt sensor / WebGPU / audio in container вАФ unverified: the live WebGPU ping-pong + flag-readback path [falls back to CPU on any init error], the UвЖТHz / resonance-pulse-vs-chaos "feel" [README flags `RESONANCE_PERIODS` + tilt-eccentricity may want live tuning]; the CPU fallback + auto-drift guarantee a sounding/animating glance regardless).

## Cycle 546 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/931-kids-tide-pool](/dream/931-kids-tide-pool)** вАФ Moonlit Tide Pool: tilt the iPad at bedtime and a glowing sea of light flows downhill, pools in the low corner, and every pool rings a soft bell рЯМКрЯФФ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 546 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGL2 all-GPU shallow-water**). **For**: kids (4+) / a calm bedtime playspace / iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST ALL-GPU SHALLOW-WATER SIM** вАФ the *entire* physics state (water height + four per-cell pipe fluxes) lives in ping-pong **RGBA32F float textures** (256√Ч256) and is advanced every frame by two fragment-shader passes, so a 4-year-old's tilt makes the light-water *genuinely* run downhill and **pool** (real conserved flux, not a faked damped membrane). **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent` beta/gamma вЖТ gravity uniform; iOS `requestPermission()` gated inside the Start tap; tilt 0вАУ1√Ч in last-10 kids вАФ the freshest input, off the banned touch). **virtual-pipes shallow-water TECH** (Mei/Decaudin/Hu 2007): flux-update pass (neighbour height-diff + tilt-gravity, damped, outflow-scaled so depth never goes negative, closed no-flux walls) вЖТ height-update pass (net inflow вИТ outflow + slow central trickle so it breathes). **Pooling rings the bells** вАФ a handful of fixed "lily" probes read back cheaply (1√Ч1 `gl.readPixels` from the sim FBO, throttled ~30ms) and on a depth rising-edge (0.22s cooldown) ring one warm pentatonic note {C4 D4 E4 G4 A4 C5 D5 E5} вАФ **NO harmony/interval engine, pitch held deliberately dumb; the music lives in the RHYTHM of how the child tilts** (gentle rock = sparse drops, fast sway = a flurry). **raw-WebGL2 GPU OUTPUT** (the scarce surface JURY #1 wants вАФ NOT three.js, NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): a shade pass renders the height field as a moonlit sea (deep = cool indigo, pooled = warm gold, additive glow + height-normal specular shimmer), lily nodes brighten the instant they ring so the rhythm reads sound-off. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1** (swing all-in to GPU вАФ the *whole sim* is GPU) **and #3** (music from rhythm/space, NOT pitch theory). **Kids-safe envelope:** `masterGain(0.24) вЖТ lowpass 6kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`, a hard tilt makes MORE soft bells never louder; always-on C2+G2 drone (never silent); bells вЙ•40ms attack, gentle decay. iOS gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + listeners + all GL textures/FBOs/programs/buffers/VAOs + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied вЖТ pointer-drag tips the sea + idle auto-demo rocks the tide so a hands-free glance sees flow+pool and hears bells within ~0.6s; no WebGL2/float-texture вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, drone keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І546 (2026-06-25)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **12 cycles running** (535вАУ546). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [tilt sensor + GPU virtual-pipes solver + bell scheduler + WebGL2 render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named ref [virtual-pipes / Mei, Decaudin & Hu 2007; lisyarus/webgpu-shallow-water 2025] ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH ¬І546). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10 kids] ¬Ј picked=[device-tilt INPUT (freshest, 0вАУ1√Ч), raw-WebGL2 all-GPU-solve OUTPUT (scarcer than three.js), virtual-pipes flowвЖТpooling-RHYTHM TECH (not pitch theory), serene moonlit tide-pool VIBE]`. **Mode = DEEP** (the в≠Р standing kids resurrect-first concept √Ч 2 approaches; AGENT.md: develop/resurrect the bench). **Sibling banked (IDEAS ¬І546):** **`930-kids-tilt-tide`** в≠Р **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept solved on CPU [56√Ч56] + rendered with three.js вАФ the bulletproof no-float-texture render path). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 112s`** вЖТ Linting/type-check PASS, zero warnings/refs in the 931 folder; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear/GPU-verified** (no tilt sensor / GPU / audio in container вАФ unverified: the iOS DeviceOrientation permission flow, the RGBA32F float-texture path + `gl.readPixels` readback timing on a real iPad, whether the pooling tilt-feel reads as "I poured the light," the audio balance on a real speaker; the always-on drone + pointer-drag + idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding/flowing/pooling glance with zero hardware).

## (Cycle 541 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 second-model approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/915-resonant-cinema](/dream/915-resonant-cinema)** вАФ Resonant Cinema: your playing dreams a short FILM of itself вАФ your music distilled to a still, bloomed into a living video, then kept moving by your own live sound рЯОђвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 541 (adult / **mic + synth bed** / **three.js + AI-image + AI-video**). **For**: anyone with a voice/instrument / immersive listening / a stage projection ¬Ј **THE LAB'S FIRST TRUE MULTI-MODEL AI PIPELINE CHAIN** (JURY 2026-06-24 #4, 0√Ч after being named every jury; Karel's #1 directive "AI image generation INSIDE audio-visual experiments"). **mic/synth INPUT** (a generative ambient pad bed over ONE fixed A2 drone вАФ pitch deliberately dumb; optional live mic swaps the analysis source, never routed to destination [anti-feedback]; AnalyserNode FFT-2048 вЖТ energy/centroid/flux/hue every frame). **2-model FAL chain TECH**: audio mood вЖТ poetic prompt вЖТ **`fal-ai/flux/schnell`** (still seed, 16:9, 4 steps) вЖТ **`fal-ai/ltx-video/image-to-video`** (blooms the still into a 5s clip). **three.js + AI-VIDEO OUTPUT** (0√Ч output surface): the returned clip is a `THREE.VideoTexture` on a fullscreen quad, and the **live FFT runs a fragment-shader pass over it every frame** вАФ ripple/displacementвИЭenergy, bloom/exposureвИЭcentroid (brightness), chromatic-aberration/RGB-splitвИЭflux. **The AI video is the SEED; the live audio is the ongoing ANIMATOR.** **What if you didn't prompt an AI to make a music video вАФ what if you PLAYED, and the AI only dreamed the canvas your sound then keeps moving?** **Cinematic / Anadol latent-cinema VIBE.** **Cost-safe for public prod**: the paid chain (~$0.003 still + $0.02 video) fires **only on an explicit "Dream the film" click** (disabled in-flight, **zero timers**, never on load/idle); page-load / idle / "dreamingвА¶" / error / no-FAL_KEY all run a **synthesized GPU nebula** (domain-warped FBM cloud, audio-driven) so a hands-off glance is **always a living, sounding scene**. `api/route.ts` is **guarded** (`guard(req)` first, FAL_KEYвЖТ501, try/catchвЖТ500). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #4** (AI-pipeline-chain, 0√Ч) **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") **and #3** (music from NOT pitch theory вАФ one drone, the idea lives in image/chain). **Named ref:** **Refik Anadol's latent cinema (*Machine Hallucinations*)** вАФ the AI-dreamed image as living projection. README cites **RESEARCH ¬І541 (2026-06-24)** вАФ in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **7 cycles running** (535вАУ541). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#1 **never-used technique** вАФ first true multi-model AI chain / first AI-video output [441 was a single audioвЖТimage model; this adds the video model in series] ¬Ј #2 вЙ•4 subsystems [synth+mic audio engine + feature/prompt extractor + 2-model FAL chain + three.js GPU compositor + synthesized fallback] ¬Ј #3 named ref ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH вАФ honestly 4-of-5). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвЖТstructure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬Ј picked=[mic/synth (non-touch), three.js + AI-image + AI-VIDEO output (all GPU/0√Ч), audioвЖТimageвЖТvideo 2-model chain (pitch held to ONE drone), cinematic/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 massively-bigger concept, 3 second-model approaches; AGENT.md maps "jury calls for massively bigger" вЖТ DEEP). **2 sibling chains banked (IDEAS ¬І541):** **`916-latent-loom`** в≠Р (flux вЖТ **flux-redux** img2img re-dream loop, GPU crossfade morph, cost-bounded вЙ§6 steps; **resurrect-first** on a desktop morph cycle) + **`917-the-telling`** (**any-llm** writes a prose-poem of the music вЖТ flux paints it, kinetic typography, **text-not-voice**). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 36.3s`**, lint+type phase ran with **zero warnings/refs in the 915 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio/WebGL/FAL in container вАФ the LTX clip quality, the fluxвЖФmood prompt fit, VideoTexture CORS from the fal CDN, and per-frame shader cost on a phone are unverified; the always-alive nebula + explicit-click gating guarantee a sounding/moving glance and zero idle cost regardless).

## (Cycle 540 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance](/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance)** вАФ shadow dance: a 4-year-old DANCES and their whole body becomes a cloud of light + rhythm рЯХЇвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 540 (kids 4+ / **camera whole-body pose** / **three.js GPU particles**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad/phone / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *moving body*, not notes ¬Ј **camera POSE INPUT** (front camera вЖТ **MediaPipe Pose** 33 whole-body landmarks via runtime CDN import, `webpackIgnore`, never bundled; video analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded; **zero pitch detection** вАФ per frame we compute the three children's-sonification *movement qualities*: **energy** = mean landmark speed, **impulsivity** = high-passed jerk, **fluidity** = inverse speed-jitter; non-touch, full-body вАФ fresh for kids vs 862 *hands* / 869 adult; no-camera вЖТ synthetic ghost-dancer auto-demo) ¬Ј **three.js `THREE.Points` GPU OUTPUT** (~5,000 additive-blended particles, custom `ShaderMaterial`, indigoвЖТvioletвЖТwarm-gold; energyвЖТdensity/brightness, impulsivityвЖТoutward burst shockwave, fluidityвЖТswirl-vs-scatter; the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) ¬Ј **movement energy/fluidity/impulsivity вЖТ granular-percussion TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **luminous shadow-dance VIBE**. **What if a kid makes music by DANCING вАФ their whole body's movement (not fingers, not voice, not any pitch) scatters a glowing cloud of light and grants rhythm + texture?** Energy вЖТ warmth/brightness of an always-on granular texture bed; a sudden move (impulsivity) fires a soft *capped* percussive bloom + a particle burst вАФ **the kid's sharp moves ARE the beat**; smooth motion (fluidity) brightens a shimmer pad and streams the particles. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** вАФ one warm always-on drone (C2+G2+C3) + a few fixed safe accent tones; no scale, no chord, no melody the kid "plays." Kids-safe master chain `masterGain(0.26) вЖТ lowpass(вЙ§6.5 kHz) вЖТ Compressor(вИТ10, 20:1)`, attacks вЙ•10ms, full teardown (rAF, mic tracks, `pose.close()`, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`, `audioCtx.close()`). **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space вАФ NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this makes music from the *quality of a child's free movement*. **Named refs:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace*** (full-body interactive, 1970s) ¬Ј the children's-movement-sonification model (energy/fluidity/impulsivity granular mapping, **Frontiers in Neuroscience, PMC5104747**) ¬Ј **"The Moving Mandala"** (2025 вАФ rhythmic music + embodied movement вЖТ child synchrony). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І540 (2026-06-24)** вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **6 cycles running** (535вАУ540). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вЙ•4 subsystems [pose tracking + energy/fluidity/impulsivity extractor + granular/percussion synth w/ dumb-drone + three.js GPU field + ghost auto-demo] ¬Ј #3 named refs ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed вАФ pose/granular/particle all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвЖТstructure-w/-consonant-crutch (last-10-kids + JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬Ј picked=[camera whole-body pose (non-touch), three.js GPU particles (scarce), motionвЖТgranular-percussion (pitch held to ONE drone), luminous shadow-dance]`. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers on one "body-not-pitch" theme; deliberate alternation after 539 DEEP). **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І540):** **`913-kids-spin-galaxy`** в≠Р (device **gyroscope** spin ¬Ј hand-written **WebGPU `@compute`** 40k-particle galaxy + WebGL2 fallback ¬Ј ring-crossing percussion вАФ the purest JURY-#1 GPU answer; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window) + **`912-kids-wind-garden`** (mic-**breath/blow** via spectral flatness ¬Ј **three.js** grass field ¬Ј wind force + dandelion-seed chimes вАФ calm dawn-meadow). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 56s`**, lint phase ran with **zero warnings in the 911 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/hand-verified** (no camera/audio/WebGL in container вАФ whether MediaPipe Pose tracks a small child across lighting/angle, the motion-scaling constants, and whether the bloom reads as "I am the light" are unverified; the always-on drone + ~1s ghost-dancer auto-demo guarantee a sounding/blooming glance regardless).

## (Cycle 539 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 GPU-render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/909-resonant-field-volume](/dream/909-resonant-field-volume)** вАФ Resonant Field: sing, and your voice blooms as a volume of light + grains placed in space by its **timbre, not its pitch** вШБпЄПрЯФК. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 539 (adult / **mic** / **three.js raymarched volume**). **For**: anyone with a voice or instrument / immersive listening / headphones ¬Ј **mic INPUT** (non-touch вАФ sing/hum/speak/play; **zero pitch detection** вАФ a pitch-free extractor reads only RMS, spectral centroid [brightness], flatness [noisyвЖФtonal], flux [change], and an 8-band silhouette; micвЖТAnalyser + a rolling ~3.5s capture ring, **never routed to destination** [anti-feedback]; no-mic вЖТ synthetic auto-demo) ¬Ј **three.js fullscreen raymarched volumetric OUTPUT** (a fragment-shader nebula вАФ 24-step domain-warped FBM whose density/turbulence/hue/altitude ARE the timbre, with a `uAge` **memory** accumulator that warms while you sound and slowly cools in silence so it evolves like a long-form cloud, not a VU meter; runs on **any WebGL** вЖТ actually GPU-renders on a phone; Canvas2D glow fallback on no-WebGL) ¬Ј **timbre-features вЖТ HRTF spatial-granular re-synth TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **immersive / Anadol-volumetric VIBE**. **What if you composed by TIMBRE √Ч SPACE instead of pitch вАФ your own captured sound scattered back as a 3D cloud of grains, each placed around your head by how bright / noisy / loud it is, over a single dumb drone so harmony is held deliberately flat?** Each Hann-windowed grain reads from the rolling capture buffer and is panned through its **own HRTF `PannerNode`** at a 3D position dictated by timbre (brightnessвЖТelevation/forward, flatnessвЖТazimuth spread, RMSвЖТgrain density); grains keep the source's own pitch вАФ we never repitch by any musical rule. A fixed 55 Hz + 82.5 Hz drone pins harmony flat so the piece **lives entirely in texture and placement**. Master chain `gain(вЙ§0.28) вЖТ lowpass(7 kHz) вЖТ compressor вЖТ destination`; idle nebula breathes from load; ~1s auto-demo (synthetic evolving-noise + formant sweep through the identical pipeline) blooms + sounds on mic-deny or 2.5s silence; full teardown (rAF, oscillators, mic tracks, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, **timbre, texture or space** вАФ NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") in one piece. **The inversion of a brand-new instrument:** Delta Sound Labs **XStream** (NAMM, 25 Jan 2026) is a *spatial live granular* synth where the **producer hand-dials** grain placement; this makes placement **automatic & timbre-driven** вАФ played by sounding, not by tweaking. **Named refs:** Delta Sound Labs XStream (2026) ¬Ј **Curtis Roads *Microsound*** (2001) ¬Ј **Trevor Wishart *Audible Design*** (timbral morphology) ¬Ј Refik Anadol (volumetric light). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І539 (2026-06-24)** вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **5 cycles running** (535/536/537/538/539). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вЙ•4 subsystems [pitch-free timbre extractor + HRTF spatial-granular engine + dumb drone + raymarched GPU volume w/ memory + auto-demo] ¬Ј #3 named refs ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed вАФ granular/spatial/WebGPU-compute all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвЖТstructure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬Ј picked=[mic (non-touch), three.js raymarched-volume (GPU, scarce), timbreвЖТspatial-granular (pitch held to ONE drone), immersive/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 concept, 3 GPU-render approaches; breaks a 3-WIDE adult streak). **2 sibling approaches banked (IDEAS ¬І539):** **`908-resonant-field-compute`** в≠Р (the frontier **WebGPU WGSL compute** version вАФ 120k curl-noise particles; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window once WebGPU phone support clears + ScriptProcessorвЖТAudioWorklet) + **`910-resonant-field-flow`** (**three.js GPGPU** ping-pong float-RT flow field вАФ ~147k points "river of light"). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 52s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 909 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio/WebGL in container вАФ whether the HRTF grain cloud reads as "my own sound around me," whether the raymarched volume reads as "my timbre's shape," and per-grain PannerNode CPU cost on a low-end phone are unverified; the breathing idle nebula + ~1s auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/909-resonant-field-volume/README.md`

## (Cycle 538 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden](/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden)** вАФ stomp garden: clap a beat, grow a garden, it loops back рЯМ±рЯСПрЯМЄ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 538 (kids 4+ / **mic-rhythm** / **three.js**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *beat*, not notes ¬Ј **mic-ONSET INPUT** (claps / stomps / table-taps / "buh-tss" вАФ a spectral-flux onset detector with adaptive threshold + 120ms refractory; **pitch is NEVER estimated**, the centroid is read only to pick a thump-vs-shaker *timbre*; mic used live, never recorded/stored; no-mic вЖТ tap-the-garden fallback + auto-demo groove) ¬Ј **three.js (WebGL GPU) OUTPUT** (a procedural glowing garden вАФ elastic-ease plants spring up per beat, always-on breathing, loop-pulse sway/glow, warm fog & lighting; deliberately the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) ¬Ј **onset-detect + quantize-and-loop-back + procedural-growth TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **bright/warm/garden VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could CLAP, STOMP, or beat-box and their RHYTHM (no note, no tune) grew a glowing garden that then loops their beat back so they can dance along and lock into it?** Each detected beat grows a plant + plays a soft capped percussion hit (<50ms); after ~3 beats a rolling-window looper infers tempo (median IOI), lightly quantizes, and **replays the rhythm continuously** while the garden pulses in time вАФ handing the child the steady external pulse the developmental literature says scaffolds the still-forming beat-synchronization skill. Steady clap вЖТ orderly rows; wild rhythm вЖТ a swaying jungle; the child keeps layering beats. Always alive (ambient pad + heartbeat + breathing from load; auto-demo groove with no mic). Kids-safe master chain `busIn вЖТ Gain(0.26) вЖТ lowpass(6 kHz) вЖТ Compressor(вИТ12, 12:1) вЖТ destination`, 6-voice cap (oldest-steal) so even a loud clap can't blast, full teardown. **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space вАФ NOT pitch theory"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this is its first true **rhythm-loop** piece. **Named refs:** the TR-808 / live loop-station "record your rhythm, it loops back" model ¬Ј spectral-flux onset detection (Bello et al., IEEE TASLP 2005). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І538 (2026-06-24)** вАФ the developmental beat-synchronization anchor (*"Development of full-body rhythmic synchronization in middle childhood,"* Nature Sci Rep) вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **4 cycles running** (535/536/537/538). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [onset detect + tempo-infer/loop + procedural garden + percussion synth] ¬Ј #3 named refs ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвЖТstructure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] ¬Ј picked=[mic-onset/rhythm, three.js (GPU, scarce), onset-loop-back, kids-garden]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І538):** **`905-kids-water-bowl`** в≠Р (mic-hum ¬Ј **three.js** ¬Ј *Faraday* standing-wave water surface вАФ the pattern you see is the sound you sing; **resurrect-first**, needs no motion sensor) + **`906-kids-tilt-fireflies`** (device-tilt ¬Ј **three.js** GPU particles ¬Ј gravity-herded firefly swarm whose density & flower-bumps drive a soft pulsing rhythm; ref Reynolds *Boids* 1986). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 85s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 907 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вАФ whether the looped beat reads as lock-onto-able, onset sensitivity across real claps vs room noise, and small-iPad garden legibility are unverified; ambient bed + auto-demo groove guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 537 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/902-harmonic-mirror](/dream/902-harmonic-mirror)** вАФ harmonic mirror: your chord, completed in just intonation рЯОєвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 537 (adult / harmony / **Canvas2D**). **For**: pianists & composers (Karel's exact audience) / harmony-curious / playable with zero hardware ¬Ј **MIDI / on-screen-piano / computer-keyboard INPUT** (Web MIDI `requestMIDIAccess` + a clickable white/black one-octave piano + `a w s e d f t g y h u j k` map вАФ all feed the identical pipeline; no-MIDI вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + the on-screen paths still play) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (a circle-of-fifths constellation вАФ bright white held nodes, soft violet **mirror** halos joined to the root by luminous completion lines carrying ratio labels `5/4`/`3/2`, the inferred chord name at center, 60fps amplitude pulse; deliberately the JURY-scarce Canvas2D surface, **no WebGL2/three.js/WebGPU/SVG**) ¬Ј **just-intonation chord-completion TECHNIQUE** (deterministic Riemann-template inference + JI retuning вАФ fresh for the lab) ¬Ј **harmonic / luminous-clinical VIBE** (violet on near-black). **What if, as you play, your instrument completed the chord you imply вАФ adding the 1вАУ2 notes you DIDN'T play, tuned in pure JUST INTONATION to your root вАФ so the harmony locks beat-lessly under your hands?** You play the keys you press in **equal temperament** (warm detuned saws); a **mirror** reduces your held notes to a pitch-class set, matches it against a small template bank (dom7 `0 4 7 10` ¬Ј maj `0 4 7` ¬Ј min `0 3 7` ¬Ј sus4 `0 5 7` ¬Ј bare-fifth `0 7`; anything else вЖТ a **cluster** heuristic completed with a safe fifth), and synthesizes the **missing** template tones in **just intonation** (small-integer ratios 9/8 ¬Ј 6/5 ¬Ј 5/4 ¬Ј 4/3 ¬Ј 3/2 ¬Ј 5/3 ¬Ј 9/5 ¬Ј 15/8 over the inferred root's fundamental) so their partials align and the beating cancels вАФ the just `5/4` third (~386¬Ґ) locks where the ET third (400¬Ґ) is restless. When the root shifts (C maj вЖТ A min) the persisting mirror voices **glide-retune** over ~180 ms rather than re-attack. **The deterministic, zero-latency cousin of a predictive AI accompanist** (RESEARCH ¬І537 / **arXiv 2604.07612**, Apr 2026): it predicts nothing вАФ it *finishes the chord you are already playing*. 2s-idle вЖТ a gentle **IвАУviвАУIVвАУV** auto-demo arpeggiates through the identical path so a silent 06:30 glance is sounding + moving; first real note stops it. **Named refs:** Harry Partch & Ben Johnston (JI / small-integer ratios) ¬Ј Hugo Riemann (functional-harmony templates) ¬Ј arXiv 2604.07612. README cites **RESEARCH ¬І537 (2026-06-24)** as the build hook вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) JURY flagged **0-for-15 across five windows**, now **3 cycles running** (535/536/537). **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [MIDI/kbd input + chord-template inference + JI synth w/ glide-retune + Canvas2D constellation] ¬Ј #3 named refs ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2, dataвЖТroughness/detune, no-wrong-notes-safe-scale, 3rd-renderer-pass-on-847/872] ¬Ј picked=[MIDI/keyboard, Canvas2D (scarce 2√Ч), just-intonation-chord-completion, harmonic/clinical]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І537):** **`903-living-stave`** в≠Р (mic ¬Ј **SVG** ¬Ј live NSDF pitch+onset detection inks a self-drawing engraved treble staff вАФ owns the 0√Ч SVG lane, **resurrect-first**) + **`904-tide-organ`** (live **NOAA** tide data ¬Ј **three.js** ¬Ј the sea decides which organ pipes enter/leave & the arc's form вАФ dataвЖТSTRUCTURE, ref the Zadar Sea Organ). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 102s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 902 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вАФ whether the JI completion *audibly* locks vs the ET played notes, the glide-retune feel, and constellation legibility are unverified; the zero-hardware on-screen piano + auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/902-harmonic-mirror/README.md`

## (Cycle 536 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/899-kids-moire-beats](/dream/899-kids-moire-beats)** вАФ moir√© beats: roughness & calm гА∞пЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 536 (kids 4+ / **touch** / **Canvas2D**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad / immediate-cause-and-effect / no-reading ¬Ј **touch-drag INPUT** (one finger, Pointer Events вЖТ touch + mouse; ~280px swing covers the full range, huge & forgiving) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (two op-art grids вАФ fixed concentric **rings** under twistable **stripes**, composited `multiply` so they physically interfere into a rolling moir√© band; deliberately the JURY-reopened scarce Canvas2D surface, **no WebGL2/three.js/SVG**) ¬Ј **moir√©-interference TECHNIQUE** (grep-verified **0√Ч in the lab**) ¬Ј **op-art VIBE** (Bridget Riley cream/ink, fresh for the lab). **What if a 4-year-old could SEE and HEAR a sound's roughness at the same time вАФ by sliding two striped patterns over each other so the moir√© band they make IS the acoustic beating they hear?** A warm consonant **fifth drone (A2 + E3)** is always playing, each pitch built from two sine oscillators. The child's twist doesn't change the *pitch* вАФ it changes the **detune** of the second oscillator (0вЖТ~9 Hz). Lined up: the moir√© band slows to almost nothing AND the tones converge to **one clear calm tone** (a green ring shrinks to a dot); twisted apart: the band shimmers fast AND the sound throbs **WAH-WAH-WAH** (amber ring pulses). The coupling is literal вАФ the visual band's roll speed and the audio beat rate are driven by the **same** `twist` value, so *moir√© beat = acoustic beat*. **The clean template-break:** the child plays **roughnessвЖФcalm over a fixed consonant fifth вАФ NOT a scale**, sidestepping the no-wrong-notes pentatonic crutch entirely; nothing can ever be "wrong." Kids-safe (master вЙ§ 0.24, 6 kHz lowpass, soft fades, never silent), 2s-idle auto-demo drifts the layer so a hands-off 06:30 glance is moving + sounding within ~1s, `text-rose-600` notice + live visuals if Web Audio is unavailable, full teardown. **Named refs:** Gerald Oster *Moir√© Patterns* (Scientific American, 1963) ¬Ј Bridget Riley op-art ¬Ј acoustic beating. README cites **RESEARCH ¬І536 (2026-06-24)** as the build hook вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) JURY flagged **0-for-15**, now 3 cycles running. **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#1 never-used technique [moir√© 0√Ч] ¬Ј #3 named refs ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2, three.js, dataвЖТroughness, no-wrong-notes-safe-scale] ¬Ј picked=[touch, Canvas2D (scarce 2√Ч), moir√©-interference (0√Ч), op-art]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І536):** **`900-kids-rope-singer`** в≠Р (touch ¬Ј **SVG** ¬Ј a *catenary* hanging-rope you hang beads on to sagвЖТlower the pitch, pluck for a damped twang вАФ owns the 0√Ч SVG lane, resurrect-first) + **`901-kids-water-bowl`** (mic-hum ¬Ј **three.js** ¬Ј *Faraday* standing-wave patterns bloom on a vibrated water surface in time with the note you sing). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 899 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вАФ whether the band reads as "the same wobble I hear," small-iPad op-art readability, and the twist feel are unverified; always-on drone + auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/899-kids-moire-beats/README.md`

## (Cycle 535 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/898-tremor-score](/dream/898-tremor-score)** вАФ tremor score рЯМНрЯОЉ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 535 (adult / data-sonification / **SVG**). **For**: adults / contemplative / data-curious ¬Ј **live external-data INPUT** (USGS `all_day.geojson` earthquake feed, fetched **client-side**, public + CORS, no key, no API route вЖТ no guard needed; offline вЖТ synthetic ~30-quake fallback + `text-rose-300` notice) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (an Ikeda-restrained data-score вАФ time axis, per-quake register marks/circles, a sweeping violet playhead, a lon/lat epicentre dot-field; **no canvas, no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU, no three.js** вАФ deliberately the scarce SVG surface, answering JURY 2026-06-23 #1 "raw-WebGL2 is the new wall") ¬Ј **data-driven event-scheduling TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **geologic / clinical / Ikeda VIBE**. **What if a *live* planetary earthquake feed *composed* a piece вАФ not by fouling the harmony, but by deciding who plays, when, and in what register?** The last 24 h of global seismicity is compressed onto ~90 s: each quake becomes a **new voice entering** вАФ **magnitude**вЖТregister/loudness/duration (big = low/long/loud; small = brief high glint), **depth**вЖТtimbre brightness (shallow = bright/more partials, deep = dark via lowpass), **longitude**вЖТstereo pan, **latitude**вЖТscale-degree, **temporal clustering**вЖТdensity (an aftershock swarm = a dense overlapping flurry; a quiet stretch = a sparse solo). All pitches snap to a fixed consonant **Bb pentatonic/Dorian** mode across 3 octave bands, so **the data decides FORM while the mode keeps it in tune вАФ data вЖТ structure, NEVER вЖТ roughness/detune.** This is the **direct answer to JURY #3** ("the next data piece must sonify STRUCTURE; `842`вЖТ`864` already cloned the detune move вАФ retire it"). Per-voice chain: `OscillatorNode(triangle + sine partials) вЖТ Gain envelope вЖТ lowpass Biquad вЖТ StereoPanner вЖТ master вЖТ ConvolverNode(algorithmic IR) + dry вЖТ DynamicsCompressor limiter вЖТ destination` (shared `AudioContext` on the gesture; reverb IR synthesized in code; limiter keeps swarms un-clipped). README cites **RESEARCH ¬І535 / OpenSeisML, arXiv 2605.20539 (May 2026)** (seismic catalogues as *generative compositional input*) + Ryoji Ikeda *data.path*/*datamatics* + Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology* вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) that JURY flagged **0-for-15 across five windows**. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І535): **`899-harmonic-mirror`** в≠Р (the lab's FIRST Web MIDI вАФ a JI chord-completion partner) + **`900-flow-grains`** (the lab's FIRST optical-flow input вАФ camera motion вЖТ three.js particles + granular synth). **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems ¬Ј #3 named reference ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[touch, raw-WebGL2] ¬Ј picked=[external-data, SVG, data-driven-event-scheduling, geologic/Ikeda]`. **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully` + lint/type passed); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вАФ identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вАФ the sound of a real USGS day + small-screen SVG crowding unverified; synthetic fallback guarantees a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/898-tremor-score/README.md`

- **[/dream/896-tonnetz-loom](/dream/896-tonnetz-loom)** вАФ tonnetz loom рЯОµрЯ™°. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 533 (adult / geometric-music-theory / **SVG**). **For**: adults / music-theory-curious / contemplative-precise ¬Ј **touch/pointer INPUT** (tap a triangle to strike its triad; P/L/R buttons to move) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (a 7√Ч5 Tonnetz patch вАФ 48 tappable triangles, note-labeled nodes, glowing path ribbon вАФ built with `createElementNS`/React SVG; **no canvas, no webgl, no three.js, no GPU at all** вАФ the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-23 #1 "raw-WebGL2 is the new wall, go deliberately non-WebGL2"; SVG is a scarce surface) ¬Ј **neo-Riemannian Tonnetz + just-intonation TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the lab) ¬Ј **geometric / music-theoretical VIBE**. **What if you could WALK the geometry of harmony?** The Euler/Riemann triangular pitch lattice rendered as crisp luminous SVG: every node a pitch class, every triangle a consonant triad, the three axes the perfect fifth (+7), major third (+4), minor third (+3). **Tap a triangle вЖТ hear that triad in just intonation** (major 4:5:6, minor 10:12:15; two detuned triangle oscillators per voice вЖТ envelope вЖТ procedural-IR ConvolverNode reverb + limiter). **P / L / R** apply the three classic neo-Riemannian transforms вАФ each glides exactly ONE voice while the two common tones hold, so you both *hear* and *see* smooth voice-leading as the highlight hops to the adjacent triangle. Your path weaves a glowing ribbon over the lattice and **exports as a standalone `.svg`** (scarce vector output). A **drift auto-walk** runs a gentle hands-free P-L-R-LвА¶ loop so it sounds + moves on load with zero input (a guaranteed sounding 06:30 phone glance); touch-only, no mic/camera/network вЖТ bulletproof unattended. README cites the **freshest anchor of the cycle вАФ RESEARCH ¬І533 / arXiv 2606.11246** ("Nineteen to the Dozen: Embedding the Neo-Riemannian TonnetzвА¶", **June 2026**, last-30-days) plus Euler / Cohn / Lewin вАФ landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) that JURY flagged 0-for-15. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І533): an audio-only "room-raga" where the room's ambient pitch tunes a JI drone в≠Р + a Canvas2D self-similarity-matrix "recurrence room" of Karel's piano. **Clears 4/5 of the ambition floor** (#1 never-used technique ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems ¬Ј #3 named reference ¬Ј #5 dated RESEARCH citation).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/896-tonnetz-loom/README.md`

## Newest (Cycle 532 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path](/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path)** вАФ sing a path рЯО§рЯ™∞. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 532 (kids / storybook-night / **SVG**). **For**: kids (iPad/phone, 4yo-usable, no reading) ¬Ј **mic/voice INPUT** (`getUserMedia` вЖТ `AnalyserNode`; real-time fundamental-frequency estimate via a normalized-square-difference / YIN-lite `trackPitch` + RMS loudness gate, so quiet = no draw) ¬Ј **animated SVG OUTPUT** (a scrolling glowing `<path>` extended point-by-point + a firefly riding the tip + trailing sparkles + gradient night sky/moon/stars, all driven by rAF mutating SVG attributes вАФ **no canvas, no webgl, no three.js**; SVG is the freshest visual surface, 1√Ч/10, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND Canvas2D's near-cap 3√Ч) ¬Ј **real-time pitch-contour TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the lab) ¬Ј **warm storybook-night VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING and watch their own voice draw a glowing path a firefly flies along вАФ and it always sounds beautiful because we follow the SHAPE of their voice, not whether they hit a "correct" note?** The key move (RESEARCH ¬І532 / **PESTO**, arXiv 2508.01488 вАФ *transposition-equivariance*): the robust, meaningful quantity in a sung signal is the **contour** (relative up/down/hold motion), not absolute Hz. A `ContourEngine` maps the pitch stream to relative motion against a slow-drifting baseline (the child can wander up forever and stay on screen) вЖТ path height; a **`HarmonyVoice`** sings a soft companion tone back, **quantized to C-major pentatonic** with portamento, over a gentle pad drone + sparkle twinkles, through a master limiter (kids-safe, never harsh). The result is a **no-wrong-notes piece that is NOT the banned snap-to-safe-scale template** вАФ the visual follows the child's raw gesture (never "wrong"); only the audio is quantized. Hands-free auto-demo (~0.6s) drives the *same* pipeline so the page sings + animates with zero hardware; a giant рЯО§ Sing! button requests the mic; `text-rose-300` notices for demo/denied. README cites the dated **RESEARCH ¬І532 / PESTO**. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS ¬І532): a tilt+shake audio-led "listening jar" (the lab's first audio-only-led kids piece) в≠Р + a three.js 3D glass-harmonica "glass rain" tank.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path/README.md`

## Newest (Cycle 531 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/888-living-reverie](/dream/888-living-reverie)** вАФ living reverie рЯММ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 531 (adult / cinematic / long-form / **three.js**). **For**: adults / deep listening / live-ambient ¬Ј **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano streamed from the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519вА¶` route, played quietly under the generative voices + chroma-folded to re-seed the melody; ~350ms non-zero analyser вЖТ **emerald "playing Karel's piano"** else **amber "generative piano вАФ live recording unavailable"**; zero-network generative fallback starts in ~1.5s) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (a single high-detail displaced membrane вАФ vertex-shader FBM noise on an icosphere, additive glow shell + fog, drag-orbit; **non-particle on purpose**, dodging the `859-paths-compute-bloom` particle field; fresh three.js surface 2√Ч/10 vs Canvas2D's near-cap 3√Ч, and dodges the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 ban) ¬Ј **long-form generative state-machine-with-memory TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the rolling window) ¬Ј **cinematic / deep / ambient VIBE**. **What if Karel's own recorded piano became a 10-minute LIVING reverie вАФ genuinely different at minute 8 than minute 1 вАФ a generative engine with MEMORY that re-voices and re-orchestrates his motifs across an irreversible arc, never looping?** A **two-tier memory engine** (RESEARCH ¬І531 / *Fusing Memory and Attention*, arXiv 2603.21282): a **LOCAL** bank of recent scale-degree pitch-cells (transposed/varied/re-quantized so each minute sounds like the last вАФ continuity), coupled to a **GLOBAL** monotonic irreversible `age` (0вЖТ1 over 600s) + a four-section state machine (**sparse вЖТ blooming вЖТ dense вЖТ dissolving**) that owns density, note-rate, register spread, brightness and reverb depth, plus a **modal journey** (ionianвЖТlydianвЖТmixolydianвЖТdorianвЖТaeolian with a creeping tonic, every note quantized). The membrane IS the arc: flat/dark вЖТ warm rising ridges вЖТ turbulent folded terrain вЖТ collapse to deep-violet stillness. FM-piano + detuned-saw pad + granular shimmer вЖТ runtime-rendered ConvolverNode reverb вЖТ compressor. README cites the dated **RESEARCH ¬І531** finding + **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports*/*Reflection*). A **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 of N) вАФ 2 sibling visual approaches banked (IDEAS ¬І531): a three.js volumetric raymarch twin + a Canvas2D ink-strata twin (the future WebGL-unavailable fallback).

## Newest (Cycle 530 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/886-kids-marble-music](/dream/886-kids-marble-music)** вАФ marble music machine рЯОҐ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 530 (kids / playful / **Canvas2D**). **For**: kids (iPad/phone, 4yo-usable, no reading) ¬Ј **tap + tilt INPUT** (tap the top to drop a glowing marble / tap a stuck one to free it; device-orientation `gamma` tilt to steer, with **two big hold-to-tilt buttons** as a no-permission fallback вАФ fully playable with zero sensors) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (`getContext("2d")` вАФ scarce 2√Ч/10 + jury-re-legitimized; **no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js**, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND a 4th GPU surface) ¬Ј **material-based modal impact synthesis TECHNIQUE** (fresh mapping; tilt-input is 0√Ч/10) ¬Ј **warm playful self-playing-machine VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could conduct a self-playing music machine just by tilting вАФ rolling glowing marbles through a track of materials where the SOUND of every collision is the object's MATERIAL (wood thuds, glass rings, metal shimmers, drums boom) and how hard it was hit?** Each of ~16 objects has a fixed pentatonic pitch + a material; a real **modal synthesizer** fires that material's bank of decaying sine partials per impact (slightly-stretched harmonics = wood, clean long partials = glass, inharmonic bar ratios 1/2.76/5.40/8.93 = metal, circular-membrane ratios 1/1.59/2.14/2.30 = drum), and **impact normal-speed scales both loudness AND brightness** so a soft graze and a hard slam on the same bell are audibly different. Self-contained 2D physics (circles + capsules, restitution + tangential friction, sub-stepped + clamped), motion trails, per-hit glow pulses, one gentle "sticky mud" stakes element (a trapped marble waits until the child taps it free). The machine never repeats вАФ a generative instrument in the spirit of **Wintergatan's Marble Machine** + **Jem Finer's self-generative marble machine**. README cites the dated **RESEARCH ¬І530** finding. 2 sibling approaches banked (IDEAS ¬І530): a three.js 3D-gravity twin + a Canvas2D build-your-own machine.

## Newest (Cycle 529 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/883-negative-space](/dream/883-negative-space)** вАФ negative space рЯ§Ђ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 529 (adult / conceptual-critical / **Canvas2D**). **For**: adults ¬Ј **microphone INPUT** (analysis-only вАФ connected to an AnalyserNode and nothing else; never routed to output, never recorded, never sent anywhere; **no API route**) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (`getContext("2d")` вАФ scarce 1√Ч/10 + jury-re-legitimized; **no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js**, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND a 4th WebGPU) ¬Ј **silence-reward / negative-space generative bloom TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **Cage-conceptual, meditative, critical VIBE**. **What if you played an instrument by being SILENT вАФ a piece that blooms only in the GAPS of your sound, and ducks to nothing the instant you make noise, so you compose it by what you withhold?** The lab's **conceptual/critical** lane (a menu category the jury notes hadn't appeared in ~15 cycles) and the directest answer to Karel's "massively bigger concepts / surprise" ask: a true **inversion** вАФ every mic instrument ever made maps loudвЖТactive; this one maps **silenceвЖТmusic**, so the performer's instrument is *restraint*. Short-term RMS feeds a **stillness timer**: while you stay below threshold the timer grows and a warm additive chord-bloom rises one consonant voice at a time (rootвЖТfifthвЖТoctaveвЖТthirdвЖТtwelfthвЖТhigh color) toward a full chord; any sound above threshold rushes a fast **duck** (reverse-sidechain) and **freezes** the bloom where it is вАФ it **resumes building from there** when quiet returns (no reset). Signal chain voices вЖТ master вЖТ `ConvolverNode` synthesized-impulse reverb вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вЖТ destination; an always-on near-silent root means it's never fully dead. **Visual:** Canvas2D вАФ silence blooms a luminous field outward from center (monochromeвЖТviolet as the chord fills + faint concentric "voice" rings per lit partial); sound floods dark grain/static inward from the edges + a closing vignette and the light recedes; sized via `ResizeObserver`, animated by a single rAF that runs energyвЖТstillnessвЖТaudioвЖТdraw in lockstep. iOS-safe: AudioContext + `getUserMedia` created inside the Begin tap. **Degrades fully:** mic denied/absent вЖТ a scripted **synthetic** energy envelope (silenceвЖТburstвЖТsilence) runs through the **identical** `stepStillness` pipeline so the inversion proves itself hands-free within ~1.5вАУ4s + a `text-rose-300` "no mic вАФ showing a demo" notice; a **"Make a sound"** button lets a no-mic reviewer trigger the duck/erode manually; live mic yields the demo the moment real audio arrives. Full teardown (cancel rAF, `track.stop()` the mic, stop/disconnect oscillators, `audioCtx.close()`, clear timers, remove listeners). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2вАУ3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [mic RMS/stillness gate + silence-reward generative harmony engine + Canvas2D negative-space renderer + synthetic auto-demo = вЙ•4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**John Cage *4вА≤33вА≥*** вАФ silence as the content ¬Ј **Pauline Oliveros "Deep Listening"**] ¬Ј **#5 вАФ README cites the dated RESEARCH ¬І529 (2026-06-23)** cross-modal soundвЖФperception thread, the jury's 0-for-15 criterion finally landed for the second straight cycle). **Source:** ¬І529 dive (cross-modal "It Sounds Squishy" DIS 2025 + Jan√°ƒНek/Cage/Eno named anchors) вЖТ AGENT.md path (a) implement a dive hook + Karel's "surprise / bigger concepts" вЖТ adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-23 #1 + audit, last 10 = 859,862,864,866,868,869,872,874,877,880)=[OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 (HARD jury вАФ new 6-of-15 monoculture) ¬Ј a 4th WebGPU (would hit 4√Ч) ¬Ј the "external-feedвЖТroughness/detune" data mapping (jury #3) ¬Ј kids vibe (5√Ч, n/a this adult cycle)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 883)=[microphone INPUT ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (scarce 1√Ч + jury-re-legit, dodges both GPU walls AND the back-to-back SVG repeat 880 would cause) ¬Ј silence-reward/negative-space-inversion TECH (lab-novel) ¬Ј Cage-conceptual VIBE (the cold conceptual/critical menu lane)]` вАФ clears every active ban. **WIDE forks (banked, IDEAS ¬І529):** **`882-prosody-score`** в≠Р (type a sentence вЖТ a real functional-harmony phrase notated live in **inline SVG**: punctuation drives VвЖТI cadences, keystroke timingвЖТrhythm, word lengthвЖТcontour; keyboard input вЙИ0√Ч + SVG = freshest surface/coldest input; **de-selected only because 880 was also SVG** вАФ back-to-back surface repeat вАФ NOT quality; Jan√°ƒНek *n√°pƒЫvky mluvy* inverted) + **`884-living-reverie`** в≠Рв≠Р (**TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST**: Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano вЖТ a 10-min **three.js** long-form generative reverie with a memory bank + four-section state machine + irreversible `age`/modal journey so minute 8 вЙ† minute 1; the highest-ambition explorer at 3вАУ4/5 [#2+#4+#3+#5] and executes TWO standing directives вАФ the thin long-form-generative lane + "use his actual Paths music"; de-selected on a mild "too-similar" overlap with `859-paths-compute-bloom`'s additive-particle field + GPU/CORS runtime risk, NOT quality вЖТ **ship it on a dedicated DEEP long-form adult cycle**) вАФ both built complete + self-reported clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route), `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І529. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 37.8s` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; 883 grep-clean of the build log вАФ every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; the one initial TS-lib error [`getFloatTimeDomainData` wants `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>`] fixed in the single allowed attempt by backing the analyser buffer with an explicit `ArrayBuffer`). **Env note:** fresh container `npm ci` aborted on `sharp`'s native libvips download (a `@capacitor/assets` transitive dep, unused by `next build`) вЖТ installed with `npm ci --ignore-scripts` (CLI flag only; no package.json/lockfile/.npmrc edits). **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra; fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear/eye: whether the live-mic RMS threshold reads stillness cleanly on a real device, and whether the bloomвЖФerode contrast lands perceptually; the synthetic auto-demo + "Make a sound" button guarantee a sounding, blooming, eroding glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 528 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band](/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band)** вАФ Rubber-Band Band рЯОЄрЯМИ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 528 (kids / freedom-to-be-wrong / **SVG**). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **drag-pluck + drag-the-tuning-peg INPUT** (pointer/touch; off the touch-only rut by being a *drag-to-pluck + drag-to-retune* gesture) ¬Ј **inline SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (animated `<path>`/`<rect>`/`<circle>` вАФ **0√Ч in the last 10 ships**, the single freshest surface, the jury's explicit "SVG and audio-only are 0√Ч" target; clears the jury #1 WebGL2 HARD-ban вАФ NOT canvas, NOT WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js) ¬Ј **damped-spring SVG string physics + KarplusвАУStrong pluck + a latched detune/retune state machine** technique ¬Ј **warm playful colorful band-stage vibe**. **What if a kid's first instrument were a wall of stretchy glowing rubber-bands you pluck вАФ and pulling one TOO FAR leaves it slack and out-of-tune until you earn the fix by turning its tuning peg?** **The third piece that breaks the always-consonant kids template (JURY 2026-06-23 #4** вАФ "let the wrong choice *persist and matter* вАФ no auto-resolve like 849 вАФ the way 868 makes the child earn the calm; build the third one and the template is broken for good"). ~7 horizontal bands across a dark warm stage, each a color + a note in C major-pentatonic; **drag a band sideways and release** вЖТ it twangs a **KarplusвАУStrong**-style plucked tone (noise burst вЖТ tuned `DelayNode` feedback comb with in-loop low-pass) and visibly wobbles on an integrated **damped spring** (mid-point displacement, stiffness/damping scale with tension) before settling. Pluck gently вЖТ a sweet in-tune note. **The stakes:** over-stretch a band and it **latches `detuned`** вАФ sags, glow dies, twangs ~2 semitones flat/dull/sub-buzzy, an amber halo pulses on the loose peg вАФ and it **STAYS that way** (no timeout, no auto-resolve). To fix it the child **drags the tuning-peg knob back up** until `taut` crosses the threshold and the band snaps true + glows again. The wrong choice is visible, audible, lasting; the child earns the fix вАФ mapped onto a real-world intuition (tension sets pitch; you tune a string with a peg). Kids-safe chain `master 0.26 вЖТ lowpass 7.2kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, always-on soft warm pad (never silent), the out-of-tune note an **unmistakable LARGE contrast** but **never louder/harsher** (quieter decay, loop filter drops ~5.2вЖТ1.4kHz, soft sub-buzz вАФ per the developmental finding that a 4yo registers dissonance only with a large contrast). Large hit areas (70px band strokes, 38вАУ76px peg halos). iOS gesture-gated Start (AudioContext created/resumed inside the tap). **Degrades fully:** no AudioContext вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, the SVG bands still play visually. **Auto-demo:** within ~1вАУ2s of Start with no input, it plucks a couple of bands sweetly, over-stretches one into the slack/detuned state, then retunes it taut+true вАФ a hands-free 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS the full stakes arc; stops on first real touch. Full teardown (cancel RAF, stop/disconnect nodes, `ctx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2вАУ3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [drag-pluck + drag-retune + damped-spring SVG string sim + KarplusвАУStrong synth + detune state machine = вЙ•4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Karplus & Strong (1983)** "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" ¬Ј the **monochord / rubber-band** as a child's first tunable string] ¬Ј touches #5 [README cites the dated RESEARCH ¬І528 consonance-contrast law]). **Source:** ¬І528 dive (the consonance-development design law вАФ a 4yo registers dissonance only with a LARGE unmistakable contrast вЖТ tunes the size of "wrong") вЖТ AGENT.md path (a) implement the dive hook + JURY #4 (break the kids template for good) вЖТ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-23 #1 + audit, last 10 = 877,874,872,869,866,864,862,859,856,853)=[OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4√Ч/10 (HARD jury вАФ the new 6-of-15 monoculture) ¬Ј always-consonant no-wrong-note kids template (jury #4) ¬Ј auto-resolve-the-mistake (849 critique)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 880)=[drag-pluck + drag-retune INPUT ¬Ј SVG/DOM OUTPUT (0√Ч/10 вАФ the single freshest surface, the jury's named SVG-is-0√Ч target) ¬Ј latched-detune/retune-by-peg TECH (genuine persistent wrong, child earns the fix вАФ NOT the banned always-consonant or auto-resolve) ¬Ј warm-playful band-stage vibe]` вАФ clears every active ban; lands on the scarcest render surface in the lab. **WIDE forks (banked, IDEAS ¬І528):** **`879-kids-grumble-garden`** в≠Р (tap a dark night-garden to plant C-pentatonic flowers; a clashing tap sprouts a **grumble-weed** that *spreads* via a Canvas2D diffusion growth sim and drones with **no auto-resolve** вАФ the child "waters" it with consonant taps to re-bloom it; **another full template-break, de-selected on diversity** вАФ Canvas2D was just shipped 877 + the garden/growth vibe is thick in the lab [248/322/799], NOT quality) + **`881-kids-thunder-marbles`** (TILT a glowing 3D **three.js** bowl to roll marbles that ring bells; a hard collision cracks a persistent **storm-marble** the child calms by rolling it slow into the center cradle вАФ **love-aligned 169-kids-marble-runвЭ§пЄП + 83-kids-tilt-rainвЭ§пЄП**, de-selected on three.js 2√Ч vs SVG 0√Ч + WebGL/DeviceOrientation-permission failure surface for an unattended glance, NOT quality) вАФ both built complete + self-reported tsc/eslint clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route), `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І528. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; `npx eslint src/app/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band/` вЖТ 0; 880 grep-clean of the build log вАФ every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the live SVG pluck-wobble feel, whether the out-of-tune contrast reads as "wrong" to a real 4yo, and the retune-the-peg gesture's discoverability; the always-on pad + the full pluckвЖТdetuneвЖТretune auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, story-telling glance with zero hardware.
