## (Cycle 527 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 renderer approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/877-biosphere-score](/dream/877-biosphere-score)** вАФ *"Biosphere Score": every bird, mammal, insect and fungus just observed on Earth becomes an orchestra вАФ the live **GBIF** biodiversity feed decides which taxonomic **section** plays when. Each observation brings its section's voice in; pitch is **always** a scale-degree quantized to that section's register band against a slowly-modulating modal scale, so it stays harmonic by construction вАФ the data shapes the **ensemble and the form, never the detuned pitch of a note.*** A deliberately **structural** sonification (the jury's standing #3 ask: stop mapping a feed to "roughness fouls the harmony" вАФ sonify who-plays-when/form instead); a sibling lab piece (`233-earth-pulse`) already does note-per-datum, so this is different *in kind*. Taxonomic class вЖТ orchestra section in its own **acoustic-niche register band** (birdsвЖТbright flute/high, mammalsвЖТcello/low-mid, insectsвЖТpizzicato ticks, plantsвЖТsustained pad, fungiвЖТsub-drone, herpsвЖТmid pluck, fishвЖТwatery bell) вАФ **Bernie Krause's acoustic-niche hypothesis as orchestration**; temporal **clustering**вЖТrhythmic density; cumulative taxonomic **richness**вЖТa long-form arc (fuller/brighter over minutes вАФ minute 5 вЙ† minute 1); longitudeвЖТstereo pan; scale modulates ~every 36s. INPUT external-data (GBIF, keyless + CORS-open) + pointer-to-solo-a-section ¬Ј OUTPUT **Canvas2D** (0√Ч in the last 10 ships + **jury-re-legitimized** this window вАФ the freshest legit surface; raw-WebGL2 was jury-HARD-banned as the new 6-of-15 monoculture) ¬Ј TECHNIQUE dataвЖТmusical-FORM/who-plays-when structural sonification ¬Ј PALETTE living-biosphere / soundscape-ecology / aurora-dark. Safety `master 0.22 вЖТ lowpass вЖТ comp(вИТ10,20:1)`, always-on ambient pad (never silent), вЙ•30ms attacks, analyser off master, iOS gesture-gated Start. Degrades: live fetch fails/offline вЖТ seamless curated 40-occurrence fallback + hands-free auto-demo sees+hears within ~1s; no Web Audio вЖТ visuals only. Full teardown. Refs: **Bernie Krause (*Great Animal Orchestra*) ¬Ј Andrea Polli ¬Ј *Data Melodification FM* (arXiv 2510.00222)** вАФ the last **cited in the README itself** (criterion #5, the jury's 0-for-15 provocation, finally landed). Ambition 3/5 (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 dated-research-in-README). **Status: demoable** (compile/type/lint-clean; not device/ear-verified вАФ container has no audio; review device runs the labeled offline auto-demo). ¬Ј *1 more explored вАФ the **WebGPU** globe twin `878-biosphere-globe` (WGSL @compute particle globe, same structure engine) banked to IDEAS ¬І527 as the WebGPU resurrect-first; de-selected on Canvas2D-diversity + robustness, not quality.*

## в≠Р (Cycle 526 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/874-kids-frost-garden](/dream/874-kids-frost-garden)** вАФ *"Frost Garden": a 4-year-old TOUCHES the dark screen to plant glowing seeds, and a luminous magic coral/frost-tree grows outward **on its own** вАФ every newly-frozen sparkle-tip ringing a soft pentatonic chime, the garden swelling a warm drone as it fills. A calm, endless bedtime garden of light.* The branching is a **genuine diffusion-limited-aggregation sim** (Witten & Sander, 1981 вАФ the physics of frost-on-glass, coral, lightning): ~420 random-walking "walker" particles stick irreversibly on contact with the aggregate, so the dendritic structure *emerges* from the local rule, never hand-drawn. Tap/drag plants seeds + pulls nearby walkers toward your finger (branches reach for you); multiple colonies grow and merge. **Lab-first technique** (DLA grep-0√Ч across 481 prototypes) and the first **DLA-as-instrument** anywhere in 2026 (verified unexplored). INPUT touch (0√Ч in last 10 shipped вАФ the starved input) ¬Ј OUTPUT hand-written **WebGL2 / GLSL ES 3.00** additive `gl.POINTS` glow (deep-dusk gradient + indigoвЖТtealвЖТgold height palette + fresh-stick flash; NOT three.js вАФ three.js was 4√Ч-banned this cycle) ¬Ј TECHNIQUE diffusion-limited aggregation ¬Ј PALETTE calm bedtime / bioluminescent. Kids-safe `master 0.26 вЖТ lowpass 6000 вЖТ comp(вИТ10,20:1)`, height-mapped C-pentatonic chimes (вЙ§8/s token-bucket, no wrong notes), always-on swelling C2+G2+C3 drone, analyser off master. iOS gesture-gated Start (вЙ•72px). Degrades: untouched ~1.5s вЖТ auto-seeds + chimes hands-free within ~1s; no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio survives. Full teardown. Ref: **Witten & Sander (1981)**. Ambition 3/5 (#1 DLA never-used + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems + #3 named ref + touches #5 RESEARCH ¬І526). **Status: demoable** (compile/type/lint-clean; not device-verified вАФ container has no GPU/audio/touch). ¬Ј *2 more explored вАФ Gielis-superformula `875-kids-shell-creature` + WebGL2 `876-kids-shadow-zoo` вАФ banked in IDEAS ¬І526.*

## (Cycle 525 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 2 GPU approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/872-living-topology](/dream/872-living-topology)** вАФ Living Topology рЯМАрЯФК. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 525 (adult / feedback-instrument / long-form generative). **For**: adults ¬Ј **pointer + sliders INPUT** (no camera/mic вАФ the dynamical system *is* the content; dodges the jury's touch+mic-only over-rep) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (2√Ч/10 вАФ the freshest GPU surface; shipping it kept WebGPU off a 4th-night monoculture; Canvas2D stays HARD-banned, raw-WebGL2 at the 4√Ч audit-ban) ¬Ј **chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring coupling topology** technique (lab-first) ¬Ј **adult dynamical-system / feedback-instrument vibe**. **What if a feedback instrument's coupling topology REWIRED ITSELF over minutes, steered by a chaotic attractor вАФ so the network reorganizes and the sound never repeats?** **Cycle 3 of the `820-feedback-ecology` thread** and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("develop what you have instead of always opening a new tab вАФ ship 820's cycle-2 [Lorenz-drifting coupling weights so the topology evolves] or push 837 deeper"). 11 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators tuned to the **overtone series on A1** (~55 Hz), each in a `filter вЖТ delay вЖТ feedbackGain вЖТ filter` loop, cross-coupled through a small-world adjacency matrix (ring backbone always present + chaos-gated shortcuts). In 820 that matrix was **STATIC**; here a **Lorenz attractor** (ѕГ=10, ѕБ=28, ќ≤=8/3, dt=0.005) is integrated each frame and its evolving (x,y,z) state continuously rewires the coupling: **zвЖТglobal density, xвЖТa rotating active-arc over the shortcut chords, yвЖТbackbone/shortcut weighting** вАФ connections strengthen and fade, node-pairs trade dominance, and the emergent drone reorganizes and **never repeats** (long-form generative; minute 5 вЙ† minute 1). Because the chaotic drift runs on its own, the piece **evolves with zero input**. The signature visual makes the driver legible: 11 glowing nodes on a Fibonacci sphere, an orbiting camera, additive edges whose brightness/pulses track **live weight √Ч energy**, and a faint **gold Lorenz ghost-curve + live bead** drifting at center that the topology visibly tracks. **Ear-safety:** every path ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вИТ8 dB, 20:1) вЖТ master gain (default 0.22) вЖТ destination; self-feedback ramp-clamped to 0.78 (below divergence); 2 s startup ramp (no blast); panic mute + always-safe master volume always live. **Controls:** coupling density ¬Ј chaos-drift speed ¬Ј master volume; "seed network" perturbs all nodes. iOS gesture-gated (AudioContext created/resumed inside the вЙ•44px "Awaken the Topology" tap). **Degrades fully:** no audio/WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice (no throw). **Auto-demo:** on Start with no interaction, seeded impulses + the Lorenz drift make it sound + animate within ~1 s, so an unattended 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS it evolve hands-free. Full teardown (rAF cancel + dispose geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three.js is already a project dep). Ambition honest **3/5** (#4 multi-cycle [820 thread cycle-3] ¬Ј #1 never-used technique [chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring topology вАФ 820's matrix was static; grep-0√Ч prior] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Edward Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow" 1963** ¬Ј the **2026** *Chaos, Solitons & Fractals* paper on synchronization of coupled Lorenz oscillators on **Watts-Strogatz small-world networks** (pii S0577907326001188) ¬Ј **David Tudor *Rainforest*** / **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input mixing as feedback-instrument lineage]). **Source:** ¬І525 dive (the 2026 Watts-Strogatz/Lorenz-sync paper вЖТ invert it: let a Lorenz system *drive* the small-world coupling graph) вЖТ AGENT.md paths (a) implement the dive hook + (b) develop the 820 multi-cycle thread вЖТ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 849,853,856,859,862,864,866,868,869)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D (HARD) ¬Ј OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 (4√Ч/10 audit-ban) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only ¬Ј recently-used camera/MediaPipe inputs]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 872)=[pointer+sliders INPUT (no camera/mic) ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT (2√Ч/10, freshest GPU; ## (Cycle 524 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/868-kids-monster-keys](/dream/868-kids-monster-keys)** вАФ Monster Keys рЯСєрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 524 (kids / freedom-to-be-wrong / raw WebGL2). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **on-screen creature-keys + Web MIDI INPUT** (12 big toggle-to-stack keys as the always-available primary; native `requestMIDIAccess` as an optional bonus вАФ MIDI is the scarce stage input, off the jury's touch+mic-only ban) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (hand-written additive GLSL ES 3.00 glow-creatures вАФ the SCARCEST GPU surface, 2√Ч/10; shipping it kept three.js [867] off the 4√Ч audit-ban AND avoided a 4th-WebGPU-in-4-cycles monoculture [870]; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D) ¬Ј **interval-clash scoring вЖТ spawn-a-wobble-monster вЖТ resolve-by-consonance** technique ¬Ј **warm playful friendly-monster vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old had the freedom to play a genuinely WRONG (dissonant) note вАФ and dissonance was a friendly wobbly MONSTER they could CALM by resolving it, instead of a forbidden mistake?** **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-22 #3** вАФ the #1 unfilled kids ask ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG вАФ dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence; 841 only *gestures* at this, commit to it fully"). **Every one of the 12 chromatic notes always plays** вАФ no pentatonic gating, no lockout, no "wrong note." Tap a glowing creature-key to toggle its note on; tap again to remove вАФ stacking 2вАУ3 builds a chord with no precise multi-touch-hold. When the sounding set contains a **clearly-beating clash** (minor-2nd / major-7th / tritone вАФ `harmony.ts` flags only the LARGE, unmistakable interval classes, per the developmental finding **PMC11336827** that a 4yo perceives consonance preference only with a *large* dissonant contrast), the offending creature grows shivering soft spikes (WebGL) + a **~+6-cent beating partner partial + a 3.2 Hz shimmer LFO** (Web Audio) вАФ the wobble/beating is the **ONLY** change, **never louder, never harsher, never higher**. `suggestResolution` computes the one consonant note (a 3rd / 5th / octave) that removes the clash and that key gently **pulses as a glowing invitation**; adding it settles the monster into a round steady happy creature with a soft bloom reward + a warm resolved chord. Real tensionвЖТrelease, **zero fail state, zero scolding sound**. Kids-safe chain `osc вЖТ voiceGain вЖТ masterGain(0.26) вЖТ BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10,20:1) вЖТ destination`, вЙ•40 ms attacks, always-on warm ambient pad (never silent), `AnalyserNode` taps master but never routes to output. iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `requestMIDIAccess` both inside the first вЙ•72px "Play" tap. **Degrades fully:** no AudioContext вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 (or renderer init throws) вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio + auto-demo keep playing (keys still sound); no Web MIDI вЖТ "tap the keys" status, on-screen keys remain primary (connected/none = "рЯОє connected" / "рЯОє plug in a keyboard вАФ optional"). **Auto-demo:** untouched ~1.5 s вЖТ the page loops the full arc hands-free (sound two clashing notes вЖТ a visible+audible wobble-monster spawns вЖТ add the resolving 5th вЖТ it settles + blooms), so an unattended 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS the spawn-then-calm story within ~1 s with zero hardware. Full teardown (rAF cancel + osc stop + delete GL programs/buffers/VAO/texture + `WEBGL_lose_context.loseContext()` + remove MIDI listeners + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2; native WebMIDI DOM types вАФ a redundant local shim was deleted). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [on-screen keys + Web MIDI + interval-clash/resolve harmony engine + raw-WebGL2 glow-creatures + ambient pad = 5] ¬Ј #3 named refs [consonanceвЖТdissonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** ¬Ј **Toca Band** relational-character model ¬Ј **PMC11336827 (2024)** large-contrast developmental finding]). **Source:** ¬І524 dive (PMC11336827 вАФ 4yos need a LARGE dissonant contrast вЖТ tunes the wobble; WebGPU now device-real on iPadOS) вЖТ AGENT.md path (c) resurrect the ¬І522 banked `868-kids-monster-keys` re-skinned to raw-WebGL2 per the ¬І522 note вЖТ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 869,866,864,862,859,856,853,849,847,846)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D (HARD) ¬Ј always-consonant-morph kids template ¬Ј touch+mic as ONLY inputs]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 868)=[keys+Web MIDI INPUT (MIDI scarce, dodges touch-only) ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU, 2√Ч/10) ¬Ј interval-clash-resolve TECH (genuine dissonance вАФ NOT the banned always-consonant-morph) ¬Ј playful-monster vibe]` вАФ clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS ¬І524):** **`867-kids-shadow-zoo`** в≠Р (whole-body camera frame-diff motion вЖТ three.js glowing creature zoo, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*; **TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST** вАФ de-selected on three.js вЖТ 4√Ч audit-ban + freeform-pentatonic register + camera-dependence, love-aligned 104вЭ§пЄП/234вЭ§пЄП, NOT quality) + **`870-kids-ripple-pond`** (tap вЖТ WebGPU `@compute` 2D wave height-field whose edge-reflections re-ring chimes; calm bedtime вАФ de-selected because calm was JUST shipped 866 + WebGPU would be 4-in-4 monoculture, NOT quality) вАФ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І524. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.1min` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; 868 log-clean of errors вАФ only two non-fatal `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warnings [stable consts; lint passed *past* them], every other warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the live raw-WebGL2 creature render + the wobble-monster's beating + shivering-spike feel, the MIDI path, and whether a real 4yo reads "calm the wobbly monster" unaided; the always-on pad + the full spawn-then-calm auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, story-telling glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 523 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/869-spatial-grove](/dream/869-spatial-grove)** вАФ Spatial Grove рЯМ≤рЯОІ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 523 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults ¬Ј **whole-body MediaPipe-Pose INPUT** (torso-x вЖТ lateral pan, shoulder-width depth-proxy вЖТ walk deeper; the COLD embodied input the jury keeps asking for вАФ body 1√Ч/depth 0√Ч in the window, off the touch+mic 8√Ч over-rep) ¬Ј **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` canopy field вАФ the SCARCEST GPU surface, 2√Ч in last 10; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the raw-WebGL2 4√Ч audit-ban) ¬Ј **HRTF binaural navigation of a fixed field of long-form-evolving generative voices** technique ¬Ј **installation / forest-at-dusk vibe**. **What if you could physically WALK through a living grove of generative song-trees вАФ your body's lateral position panning you across it and your distance to the camera walking you deeper in вАФ each tree a spatialized, slowly-evolving voice you wander among, never the same twice?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #2** вАФ the loudest standing OPEN adult ask ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring вАФ a pose-driven *spatial-audio room*; depth-camera 0√Ч, the whole spatial/installation menu is cold") вАФ with a FRESH concept (not a second motet room): **16 fixed "song-trees"** at static world positions around an `AudioListener` at the origin, each a warm bell/marimba or drone on a soft mode (Lydian/pentatonic) routed through its own **`PannerNode` `panningModel="HRTF"`**; the trees never move вАФ only `listener.positionX/Z` glides via `setTargetAtTime` as your body walks, blooming the nearest tree in your ears. **Long-form evolution:** each tree drifts on a ~25вАУ70 s timer (transpose a scale step / change rhythm density / swap timbre brightness + canopy hue) so the grove at minute 5 differs from minute 1 вАФ never the same twice. **Output = a WGSL `@compute` pass** swirling ~42k particles (2,600/tree) into glowing canopies pulled toward each tree's live bloom, additive point-quads, dusk indigoвЖТvioletвЖТwarm-gold, nearest tree brightest. iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext resume + `getUserMedia` + MediaPipe init all inside the вЙ•44px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a hand-written **WebGL2** grove on the SAME mapping (audio keeps playing); neither вЖТ notice, audio still plays; no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail вЖТ notice + an **auto-demo** (a synthetic listener walks a slow figure-8 so voices bloom within ~1s, zero hardware) + pointer-drag manual steering. Full teardown (rAF cancel + camera `track.stop()` + PoseLandmarker close + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D; MediaPipe is a CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [MediaPipe Pose whole-body tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field of fixed voices + WGSL `@compute`+render canopies + per-tree long-form generative evolution = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** вАФ *inverted*: there the choir is fixed and you walk among it, here the field is fixed and the listener walks ¬Ј **AudioMiXR** arXiv 2502.02929 + **MoXaRt** arXiv 2603.10465 вАФ 2026 6DoF spatial-audio-object work ¬Ј **Brian Eno** generative ambient drift]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first вАФ its value here is being the scarcest surface in the window + the jury's GPU-only target. **Source:** ¬І523 dive (AudioMiXR/MoXaRt spatial-audio-object 6DoF, MotionBeat embodied music) вЖТ AGENT.md path (a) implement the dive hook + jury #2 (pose-driven spatial-audio room) вЖТ adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 866,864,862,859,856,853,849,847,846,842)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√Ч/15 (HARD) ¬Ј OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4√Ч/10 (audit-ban threshold) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only 8√Ч]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 869)=[whole-body MediaPipe-Pose INPUT (cold вАФ body 1√Ч/depth 0√Ч) ¬Ј WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest GPU, 2√Ч/10) ¬Ј HRTF spatial-navigation TECH ¬Ј installation vibe]` вАФ clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS ¬І523):** **`870-live-accompanist`** в≠Р (Web MIDI + tempo/chord detection вЖТ a generative jazz trio that FOLLOWS you вАФ walking bass + comping that track your tempo and chord; three.js club scene; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** вАФ de-selected on three.js вЖТ 4√Ч audit-ban + mic over-rep, NOT quality; the directest "live-performance fitness / jazz-responsive arc" answer) + **`871-solar-wind-aurora`** (live NOAA SWPC solar-wind/Kp data вЖТ a sonified aurora drone-scape where geomagnetic storms intensify it; WebGPU compute curtains вАФ de-selected to avoid back-to-back data-sonification right after 864, NOT quality) вАФ both built complete + verified clean (eslint 0 / tsc 0), removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І523. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 34s` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; ## (Cycle 522 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky](/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky)** вАФ Rainstick Sky рЯМІпЄПвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 522 (kids / calm bedtime / WebGPU compute). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **accelerometer-SHAKE INPUT** (DeviceMotion *jerk* = high-passed change-in-acceleration вЖТ shake-energy, explicitly NOT device-orientation tilt вАФ the coldest input in the window, off the jury's touch+mic 8√Ч over-rep, off the recently-used hands/gamepad/tilt) ¬Ј **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` rain field вАФ the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч in last 10, the jury's explicit "make next builds GPU-only, WebGPU 0√Ч" target; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the WebGL2 4√Ч audit-ban threshold) ¬Ј **shake-bounded density-only granular rain scheduler (auditable safe-envelope)** technique ¬Ј **calm night-blue bedtime vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could make a calm rainstorm of music by gently SHAKING the tablet like a rainstick вАФ and stillness settles it into a sleepy drone of glowing stars?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #4** (the regressed ask: "bring back a CALM kids piece вАФ 7 of 8 kids builds are bright/warm-active, only 805 is calm") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned вЖТ a GPU surface, here the scarcest one). Shake-energy drives **only rain density** (`densityToRate` ~1.2вЖТ14 droplets/sec, hard-capped) + drift вАФ **never loudness, never harshness**: a hard shake just makes *more soft drops*, which IS the "auditable safe envelope" (arXiv 2602.22813, Feb 2026). Warm C-pentatonic marimba/bell droplets (вЙ•40ms attacks, no wrong notes) over an always-on C2+G2+C3 drone, all through the fixed kids-safe chain `masterGain(0.26) вЖТ BiquadFilter lowpass(6kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10,20:1) вЖТ destination`; analyser tapped off master, never routed to output. Visual = a **WGSL `@compute` pass integrating 60k falling raindrop/star particles** (gravity + gentle curl wind + wrap-around) вЖТ additive glowing point-quads, indigoвЖТvioletвЖТwarm-gold (stars brighter when calm). iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the вЙ•72px Start-cloud tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU вЖТ a hand-written ~3k-particle **WebGL2** version on the SAME shakeвЖТdensity mapping (audio keeps playing); no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio still runs; no motion sensor / desktop вЖТ pointer drag-to-"shake" + an **auto-demo** that rains + chimes + drifts on its own within ~1s (a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES and HEARS it). Full teardown (rAF cancel + remove devicemotion listener + stop drones + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). No API route вЖТ no guard; zero new npm deps (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). **Ambition 2/5:** #2 (вЙ•3 subsystems: shake-detection + density chime scheduler + WGSL compute field + WebGL2 fallback = 4) + #3 (named refs: Exploratorium Chilean rainstick ¬Ј arXiv 2602.22813 I-E-O auditable safe-envelope ¬Ј Brian Eno generative ambient). **WIDE fire вАФ 2 more explored, banked to IDEAS ¬І522:** `867-kids-shadow-zoo` в≠Р (whole-body camera motion-energy вЖТ three.js creatures, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*) + `868-kids-monster-keys` (MIDI/keys вЖТ three.js; genuine freedom-to-be-wrong, jury #3).

## Cycle 521 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 GPU-surface approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/864-marine-gamelan](/dream/864-marine-gamelan)** вАФ Marine Gamelan рЯМКрЯФФ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 521 (adult / live-data sonification / WebGL2). **For**: adults ¬Ј **live-external-API INPUT** (keyless Open-Meteo Marine wave data, 4 ocean presets вАФ a starved input, only 842 in the last 10; clears the jury's touch+mic 8√Ч over-rep) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a GPU surface вАФ clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban; 3√Ч/10, under the audit-ban threshold) ¬Ј **modal physical-modeling bronze gamelan + wave-data sonification with audible consequence** technique ¬Ј **oceanic/Ikeda data-sonification vibe**. **What if the real, live state of the world's oceans played a bronze gamelan вАФ and rough seas audibly DETUNED the metal into a beating clang while calm seas stayed sparse and sweet?** **Resurrects the в≠Р TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST `860-marine-gamelan` (IDEAS ¬І519)** вАФ answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** (the loudest standing adult ask: "stop the banked build from ghosting / develop what you have, don't open a new tab") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned вЖТ a GPU surface), and landing the **842-air-veil jury-standout register** (real-world data where rising severity *fouls* the harmony вАФ here rough seas detune the bronze). A keyless, CORS-enabled **Open-Meteo Marine API** fetch (client-side, **no api route, no guard**) pulls live `wave_height/period/direction/swell` for four contrasting presets вАФ **Oahu North Shore ¬Ј Bay of Biscay ¬Ј Drake Passage (big seas) ¬Ј Maldives (calm)** вАФ re-polling every 5 min. One normalized `seaToDrive()` signal feeds BOTH a **modal physical-modeling bronze engine** (each key = a filtered noise exciter вЖТ a bank of **high-Q BiquadFilter bandpass resonators** at inharmonic partial ratios `[1, 2.76, 5.4, 8.93]`, slendro/pel√ґg) AND a hand-written **WebGL2 GLSL-ES-3.00 caustic water-light shader** (domain-warped value-noise interference, ridged veins, foam crests, violet strike-bloom) вАФ so sound and image never disagree. **The consequence is the point and it's audible:** a single `roughness` (clamp `wave_height/6`) simultaneously **(a)** densifies strike rate (~0.8вЖТ~7/s), **(b)** drops register, **(c)** collapses resonator **Q** (~38 *sings* вЖТ ~6 *clangs*), and **(d)** detunes each bronze partial up to **¬±35¬Ґ** вАФ heavy seas beat into a detuned clang, calm seas stay sparse/high/sweet; `period`вЖТtempo+wave-speed, `direction`вЖТpan+shader-drift, `swell`вЖТdrone+undulation. **Deepening 1:** a **groove-quantize toggle** snaps strikes to a tempo grid derived from `wave_period` (the swell becomes a GROOVE; off = free Poisson-ish ocean pings). **Deepening 2:** a **dual-sea equal-power crossfade** + its own B-location picker вАФ hear **Drake Passage's storm beating against the Maldives' calm**, each sea driving its own strike stream + roughness. **Ear-safety:** master compressor вЖТ brick-wall limiter, 2s fade-in, panic mute, gesture-gated AudioContext in the Start tap (iOS), analyser taps the master for the bloom (never routes to output). **Degrades fully:** fetch fails/blocked вЖТ a **synthetic evolving sea** per preset (Drake stays stormy, Maldives stay calm) keeps it sounding + animating within ~1s + a `text-rose-300` "(live feed unavailable вАФ simulated sea)" badge; no WebGL2 вЖТ notice, audio keeps playing; no Web Audio вЖТ notice, visuals keep running. Full teardown (rAF cancel + abort both fetches + clear intervals + delete GL program/buffers/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `ctx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D вАФ the only `getContext` is `webgl2`, so the main viz is genuinely GPU). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [live fetch + preset state-machine + synthetic fallback ¬Ј modal bronze synth w/ groove-quantize scheduler ¬Ј dual-sea crossfade routing ¬Ј WebGL2 caustic shader = 4вАУ5] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**gamelan slendro/pel√ґg tuning** ¬Ј **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*** data-as-music stance ¬Ј **Bob Sturm вАФ *Music from the Ocean*** wave-undulationвЖТmusic data-mappings]; #4 soft вАФ cycle-2 of the 860 thread, the two README-queued deepenings). **Source:** ¬І521 dive (Sturm *Music from the Ocean* / Plymouth wave-tank / WHOI-OOI ocean-sonification lineage) вЖТ AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS ¬І519's в≠Р 860 + path (b) continue the 860 thread вЖТ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√Ч (HARD) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only 8√Ч ¬Ј kids vibe (N/A adult)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 864)=[live-external-API INPUT (1√Ч/10) ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (3√Ч/10, under threshold) ¬Ј wave-data sonification w/ consequence TECH ¬Ј oceanic/Ikeda vibe]` вАФ clears every active ban. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS ¬І521):** **`865-tide-gamelan`** в≠Р (the SAME concept as a **three.js** 3D scene вАФ a CPU-displaced sum-of-sines ocean mesh with a floating emissive bronze gong-field that bobs/tilts/blooms, additive halos, drag-orbit; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** вАФ de-selected on runtime risk [80√Ч80 CPU vertex displacement may want a lower segment count / strike cap on weak mobile] + an approximate strikeвЖФgong mapping, NOT quality) вАФ built complete + eslint/tsc-clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS ¬І521. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 111s` вЖТ Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; 864 folder grep-clean вАФ zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, no `getContext("2d")`); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear: the mix balance + resonator decay tails + the `lvl > 0.32` bloom threshold, and whether the live Open-Meteo schema is identical across all four presets (Oahu's `current` fields verified against a real response; the rest use the identical query shape); the synthetic-sea fallback + always-on limiter + 2s fade guarantee a sounding + animating glance with zero hardware/network.

## (Cycle 520 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 rendering approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs](/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs)** вАФ Sing With Your Hand вЬЛрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 520 (kids 4+ / camera-hands / three.js / warm-wondrous). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **MediaPipe-hands INPUT** (off-glass embodied вАФ the jury's "do something a touchscreen can't"; 1√Ч in the last 10, dodges the touch+mic 8√Ч over-rep) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (the SCARCER GPU surface вАФ 2√Ч last 10 vs raw-WebGL2 4√Ч; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬Ј **solf√®ge-hand-sign classification вЖТ scale-degree choir + call-response** technique (never used in the lab) ¬Ј **warm-wondrous kids-choir vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING A MELODY with their bare hand вАФ making the classic Curwen/Kod√°ly solf√®ge hand-signs in the air (вЬК fist = do, вЬЛ flat hand = mi, рЯСО thumb-down = fa, вШЭпЄП point-up = ti вА¶) вАФ and a choir of glowing creature-orbs sang the matching scale degree back?** Real, named music pedagogy (the hand-signs teachers use with children worldwide), made playable by a toddler. **Resurrects the в≠Р TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST `855-kids-solfege-signs` (IDEAS ¬І518)** вАФ answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("stop the banked 4/5 from ghosting / ship a banked sibling") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned вЖТ a GPU surface). A front-camera **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `tasks-vision@0.10.14`, analysis-only, never bundled) вЖТ a geometric **7-sign classifier** (`classify.ts`: per-finger extended/curled booleans + coarse hand orientation вЖТ do/re/mi/fa/sol/la/ti) with a **~250 ms dwell** so only a HELD shape rings (flicker never triggers); **hand height** shifts octave + brightness; after **~2 s of stillness** the choir replays the last ~6 signed notes as a gentle tune (the **Kod√°ly echo** call-and-response game). **three.js (v0.182)** choir: 7 **additive-halo glow orbs** in a warm rising arc, color-coded by a consistent pitchвЖТhue palette, the signed orb blooms + lifts with hand height, a faint starfield breathes; a tiny **Canvas2D HUD** draws the live hand skeleton so the child feels "seen" (the ONLY 2D surface). Kids-safe `voices вЖТ masterGain(0.26) вЖТ BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10,20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on soft **open-fifth drone (C+G)** so it's never silent; gentle вЙ•40 ms attacks; analyser taps the master, never routes to output; **NO wrong notes possible**. **iOS:** AudioContext + getUserMedia both inside the вЙ•72px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a **ghost-hand auto-demo** (cycles a do-re-mi-sol-mi phrase through the IDENTICAL classifierвЖТchoirвЖТscene pipeline, drawing a believable ghost skeleton in the HUD, so a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES the orbs bloom and HEARS the tune within ~1 s) + a row of **вЙ•72px press-and-hold tap-sign buttons** (emoji + color, no reading) driving the same pipeline (fully playable, zero camera); no WebGL вЖТ notice, choir keeps singing. Full teardown (rAF + camera tracks stop + landmarker close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()` + osc stop + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three present; MediaPipe is a CDN runtime import, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + geometric 7-sign Curwen classifier + kids-safe choir synth w/ Kod√°ly-echo scheduler + three.js additive-glow choir scene = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**John Curwen 1870** Tonic Sol-fa hand-signs ¬Ј **Zolt√°n Kod√°ly** method + echo game ¬Ј **arXiv 2604.27957, April 2026** "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures" вАФ conducting as a musical sign-language recognized in real time]; soft lab-first вАФ solf√®ge-sign *classification* is grep-0√Ч though MediaPipe-hands as input exists [853/731/444]). **Source:** ¬І520 dive (conducting-as-recognized-sign-language, museum-robust) вЖТ AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS ¬І518's в≠Р 855 + path (a) the dive hook вЖТ kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√Ч/15 (HARD) ¬Ј OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4√Ч/10 (audit-ban threshold) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only 8√Ч ¬Ј kids always-consonant-morph 5√Ч]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 862)=[MediaPipe-hands INPUT (1√Ч/10, off-glass) ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT (scarcer GPU, 2√Ч/10) ¬Ј solf√®ge-sign-classification TECH (never used) ¬Ј warm-wondrous kids vibe]` вАФ clears every ban AND dodges the raw-WebGL2 over-rep that decided the curation. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS ¬І520):** **`863-kids-solfege-choir`** в≠Р (the SAME concept as a raw-WebGL2 GLSL **"ladder of light"** вАФ 7 luminous rungs doвЖТti bottomвЖТtop that renders **Kod√°ly's pitch-height innovation literally**; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** вАФ de-selected purely because raw-WebGL2 is 4√Ч/10, the audit-ban threshold, NOT quality) вАФ built complete + clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS ¬І520. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 118s` вЖТ Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; 862 folder grep-clean вАФ zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, the single `getContext("2d")` is the permitted skeleton HUD); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by hand/eye/ear: whether the 7-sign classifier reliably distinguishes the signs on a real child's hand across lighting/angles (`classify.ts` favours distinct shapes over clinical accuracy), and the choir balance + orb bloom feel; the always-on drone + ghost-hand auto-demo + press-and-hold tap fallback guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 519 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom](/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom)** вАФ Compute Bloom рЯОєвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 519 (adult / GPU-compute / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults ¬Ј **audio-file INPUT** (drag-drop / file-picker your own piano recording вАФ Karel's-music directive; built-in generative tape-piano default so it plays with zero interaction) ¬Ј **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST surface in the lab вАФ **0√Ч in the rolling 15-window**; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban head-on) ¬Ј **FFT-band-driven 500k-particle curl-noise GPU-compute sim with memory** technique ¬Ј **cosmic/Anadol latent-flow vibe**. **What if a piano performance bloomed a living particle ecosystem computed entirely on the GPU вАФ half a million points pushed by the music's spectral bands via a WGSL compute shader?** Directly answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** вАФ the loudest standing directive ("Canvas2D back to 7-of-15; **WebGPU 0√Ч**, WebGL2 1√Ч, three.js 2√Ч вАФ make the next 3-4 builds GPU-only") вАФ by landing the literal scarcest surface. An `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT (sub-bassвЖТair) packs a uniform read each frame by a WGSL **compute pass** that integrates **500,000** particles: sub-bass+bass swell the core outward, low-mid pulls a gentle gravity return (it breathes, not explodes), highs scatter sparkle at the rim, and every onset blooms the whole cloud then settles. **Memory:** velocity damping (`0.965 вИТ energy¬Ј0.02`) keeps the cloud visibly expanded during a loud passage and settled inward during silence вАФ different at minute 5 than minute 1. A WGSL **render pass** draws each particle as a 6-vertex additive glow quad, coloured deep-indigo вЖТ violet вЖТ magenta вЖТ warm-gold by speed; drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, live 8-band meter. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start tap. **Degrades:** no WebGPU вЖТ `text-rose-300` "(WebGPU unavailable)" + a **WebGL2 ~6k-particle fallback** on the SAME bandвЖТforce mapping (audio keeps playing, never a dead screen); no WebGL2 either вЖТ notice but audio plays. Full teardown (rAF cancel + buffer stop + `audioCtx.close()` + revoke object URL + destroy all GPUBuffers/GPUDevice or GL resources). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (built-in piece synthesised locally, user files via `decodeAudioData`, no external fetch); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [audio decode/playback + drag-drop intake ¬Ј OfflineAudioContext tape-piano ¬Ј `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT + onset ¬Ј WGSL compute sim ¬Ј WGSL additive render = **4вАУ5**] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Refik Anadol** latent/particle-flow aesthetic *Machine Hallucinations* ¬Ј **Robert Bridson, *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow*, SIGGRAPH 2007** вАФ divergence-free curl-of-noise field in WGSL]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first (60√Ч historically) вАФ its novelty here is being **0√Ч in the rolling window** (the diversity axis that matters now). **Source:** ¬І519 dive (**WebGPU just became iOS-deployable** вАФ Safari 26 / three.js r171, Sep 2025; compute-particles are the live June-2026 register) вЖТ jury #1 (WebGPU 0√Ч / GPU-only) вЖТ adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22, last 15)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√Ч (HARD ban) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only 8√Ч ¬Ј kids always-consonant-morph 5√Ч (N/A adult)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 859)=[audio-file/his-piano INPUT (dropped) ¬Ј WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest, 0√Ч) ¬Ј FFTвЖТcurl-noise GPU-particle TECH ¬Ј cosmic/Anadol VIBE]` вАФ clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS ¬І519):** **`860-marine-gamelan`** в≠Р (live **Open-Meteo wave data** вЖТ modal bronze-gamelan where rough seas audibly DETUNE the metal ¬±35¬Ґ; WebGL2 caustics; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** вАФ lowest runtime risk, the jury-praised real-world-data-with-consequence register) + **`861-flow-veil`** (**webcam optical-flow** вЖТ advected dye veil + granular audio; WebGL2; needs a 1-line `OffscreenCanvas`вЖТ`ImageBitmap` texImage2D fix before resurrect) вАФ both built complete, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І519. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; the one type error found вАФ `webgl-fallback.ts:191` `gl` possibly-null in a closure вАФ was the single permitted fix, bind to `const gl: WebGL2RenderingContext`); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye: whether the WebGPU device actually initialised (the builder verified the WebGL2-fallback path's shape only) and the render's perspective point-size tuning; the fallback guarantees a sounding + living visual on any GPU.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom/README.md`

## (Cycle 518 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/856-kids-rumble-band](/dream/856-kids-rumble-band)** вАФ Feel the Beat рЯОЃвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 518 (kids 4+ / embodied off-screen input / cross-modal haptic / playful-calm). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **GAMEPAD input** (the starved, off-camera, off-glass embodied input вАФ `navigator.getGamepads()`, 0√Ч in the last 10; a Bluetooth controller pairs with iPads and most homes have one; on-screen virtual-stick + drum-button touch *fallback* + auto-demo) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface вАФ clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬Ј **dual-analog-stick conducting of two pentatonic creature-voices + beat-synced controller RUMBLE (haptic "felt beat")** technique ¬Ј **playful-but-calm warm/cool glow vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could play music with a GAME CONTROLLER they already hold вАФ push the two thumbsticks to conduct two glowing creature-voices, mash the big colored buttons to drum вАФ and the controller BUZZES in their hands on the beat, so they FEEL the music as well as hear it?** Directly serves **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** (force a GPU surface вАФ raw WebGL2) + the standing **#-embodied/sensor** ask ("push embodied/sensor inputsвА¶ do something a touchscreen can't" вАФ a controller that rumbles is literally that) and fills the lab's **coldest menu category: cross-modal / embedded-haptic** ("haptic-only experiments вАФ test the screen bias"). Left stick вЖТ a warm melody creature (snapped C-major pentatonic, no wrong notes), right stick вЖТ a cool harmony creature a consonant interval away; **A/B/X/Y** вЖТ four warm tuned drums; bumpers/triggers вЖТ a sparkle. **Haptics:** `gamepad.vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", вА¶)` (feature-detected; minimal typed interface, no `any`) pulses gently on every beat, accents every 4th, and bumps on each drum вАФ and the whole glow field visibly pulses on the beat so you SEE the felt beat even with no controller. Always-on soft groove + drone (never silent). **Kids-safety chain:** `voices вЖТ masterGain(0.26) вЖТ BiquadFilter lowpass(вЙ§6.5kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10, 20:1) вЖТ destination`; soft вЙ•40ms attacks; no harsh transients. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the first вЙ•72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no controller вЖТ вЙ•96px on-screen virtual sticks (drag) + вЙ•76px colored drum buttons + a friendly `text-white/75` hint ("Connect a game controller, or play with the buttons below") + an auto-demo (Lissajous sticks + downbeat drums) that sounds + animates + visibly pulses within ~0.6s; no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps playing; no haptics вЖТ honest "(no rumble on this pad)" label. Full teardown (rAF + gamepad poll cancel + haptic `reset()` + delete WebGL programs/buffers + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [Gamepad polling/edge-detect + dual-stickвЖТpentatonic harmony engine + beat-synced haptic scheduler + raw-WebGL2 additive glow render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Gamepad API + `GamepadHapticActuator.playEffect`** ¬Ј **√Йmile Jaques-Dalcroze eurhythmics** вАФ rhythm learned through the body / the felt beat, here delivered as touch]). **Source:** ¬І518 dive (embodied music pedagogy вАФ Dalcroze/Orff/Curwen-Kod√°ly solf√®ge-hand-signs, CHI "Music Corner" + the June-2026 WebGPU audio-reactive wave) вЖТ the jury's GPU-surface + embodied-input mandate + the cold cross-modal/haptic menu вЖТ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 853,849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 4√Ч (HARD jury ban) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only over-rep + recently-used MediaPipe-hands (853) and tilt (849)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 856)=[GAMEPAD INPUT (starved, 0√Ч last 10, off camera) ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU) ¬Ј dual-stick-conduct + haptic-felt-beat TECH (cross-modal/haptic cold menu) ¬Ј playful-calm glow VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban and avoids the MediaPipe-hands streak (853 last cycle). **WIDE fork:** banked **`855-kids-solfege-signs`** в≠Р (make the Curwen/Kod√°ly **solf√®ge hand-signs** in the air вЖТ a choir sings the matching scale degree вЖТ build a melody by signing; MediaPipe HandLandmarker + three.js; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** вАФ strong pedagogy, de-selected only to avoid a 4th MediaPipe-hands build right after 853) + **`857-kids-color-wand`** (wave any bright **colored toy/scarf** вЖТ camera color-blob tracking вЖТ a glowing comet that sings, hue=instrument/height=pitch; **WebGPU** compute particles + WebGL2 fallback вАФ the freshest GPU surface) вАФ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І518. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: compile вЖТ **Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; **856 folder grep-clean of the build log** вАФ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/856-kids-rumble-band/` вЖТ 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the actual `playEffect` rumble on a physical controller (feature-detected + labeled when absent), the mix balance + glow intensity on real audio/GPU; the auto-demo + touch fallback + visible on-beat pulse guarantee a sounding, animating, pulsing glance with zero hardware.

## (Cycle 517 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/853-motet-room-reach](/dream/853-motet-room-reach)** вАФ The Motet Room (Reach) рЯОЉрЯЦРпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 517 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults ¬Ј **two-hand bare-hand-tracking INPUT** (MediaPipe HandLandmarker вАФ the starved embodied input the jury demanded; NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer + auto-demo fallback) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1√Ч in the last 15 вАФ beats the over-represented three.js, clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬Ј **HRTF binaural spatialization + two-hand gestural conducting of a FIXED voice field with persistent re-sculpting** technique ¬Ј **sacred-ambient installation vibe** (cool violet bed warming to conductor's gold). **What if you stood at the center of a fixed constellation of ~18 HRTF-spatialized choir voices and CONDUCTED it with your bare hands вАФ reach toward a section to swell it, spread your arms to bloom the whole choir open, bring your hands together to collapse it to a tight resolved cluster, and pinch-and-fling a single voice across the room where it STAYS, permanently re-sculpting the field?** Answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #2** ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring вАФ a pose-driven spatial-audio room"; body 1√Ч/depth 0√Ч, the coldest category) + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D, force a GPU surface). Each of ~18 voices = two detuned saws вЖТ bandpass **formant** (vowel) вЖТ lowpass brightness вЖТ its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel="HRTF"`) on a shell around a listener fixed at origin (looking вИТZ); hand "magnets" swell+lean the nearest voices, spread/together opens/collapses the whole field, **pinch** grabs the nearest voice and `setTargetAtTime`-glides it to its new home вАФ you HEAR it fly around your head. Master: sum вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вЖТ master вЙ§0.28. Raw WebGL2 additive billboarded glow point-sprites (hand-rolled perspective) + glowing hand cursors; **auto-demo** (two virtual hands gesture/spread/pinch on their own) + mouse fallback so it's fully demoable with **no webcam**; `text-rose-300` notice on camera/WebGL2 failure; full teardown (rAF + camera tracks + `AudioContext.close()` + GL buffers/programs/textures). **Differs from `677-presence-field`** (which attaches a voice to each body JOINT вАФ sources follow your limbs): here voices are PINNED and the hands sculpt the fixed field. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`; zero new npm deps** (MediaPipe via CDN `webpackIgnore`, never bundled/in package.json). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [camera hand-tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field + raw-WebGL2 render + gesture-sculpting engine = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [object-/scene-based spatial audio; **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** вАФ 40-channel Tallis *Spem in Alium* you walk among, inverted here to a still listener moving the voices]). **Source:** JURY #2 вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І517 (webcam-MediaPipe head/hand-tracked browser binaural вАФ listener pose drives the WebAudio `AudioListener` over a fixed HRTF field) вЖТ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (HARD jury ban) ¬Ј touch+mic-only INPUT ¬Ј always-consonant-morph kids template]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 853)=[bare-hand-tracking INPUT (body, starved) ¬Ј raw WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU) ¬Ј HRTF spatial-sculpting TECH ¬Ј adult installation VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **DEEP siblings (banked, IDEAS ¬І517):** `852-motet-room-walk` в≠Р (MediaPipe Pose вАФ physically WALK the listener through the fixed oval; three.js; the literal Cardiff gallery walk; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `854-motet-room-lean` (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker head-tracking вАФ turn your head, the field stays world-anchored; true head-tracked binaural; three.js) вАФ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І517. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 98s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; **853 folder grep-clean of the build log** вАФ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the live MediaPipe hand path + CDN model load, the raw-WebGL2 render, and whether HRTF localization reads convincingly on headphones (it collapses to L/R + level on laptop speakers); auto-demo + mouse guarantee a sounding, moving glance regardless.

## Cycle 516 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/849-kids-star-bowl](/dream/849-kids-star-bowl)** вАФ Star Bowl вЬ®рЯ•£. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 516 (kids 4+ / freedom-to-be-wrong / calm bedtime / long-form-ish generative). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **device-orientation TILT input** (the starved embodied input the jury asked for вАФ NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer-drag + auto-drift fallback) ¬Ј **three.js GPU output** (the scarce GPU surface вАФ breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) ¬Ј **tilt-gravity marble physics вЖТ position-in-bowl вЖТ consonanceвЖФdissonance harmony with audible glide-resolution** technique ¬Ј **calm night-blue bedtime vibe** (the regressed register вАФ only 1 of the prior 8 kids builds was calm). **What if a 4-year-old could TILT a tablet like a bowl of glowing stars and discover that wandering out to the "spiky" rim makes a soft, safe dissonance they can then RESOLVE by tilting home вАФ a real harmonic decision made with the body, not a steered always-consonant vibe?** This is the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #3** ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG вАФ dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence, not a steer through a pre-vetted field") AND **#4** ("bring back a calm kids piece вАФ 7 of 8 are bright/active"). ~48 glowing star-marbles roll inside a 3D bowl under simulated gravity driven by `DeviceOrientationEvent` (beta/gamma вЖТ gravity vector). The cluster's mean radius (0 center вЖТ 1 rim) drives the harmony: **center** = a warm fully-consonant chord over a low A2 drone (root+fifth+octave+tenth), stars round and gentle; **toward the rim** = two "tension voices" glide up toward a soft minor-2nd/tritone cluster with gentle beating partials + a slow shimmer-tremolo, and the star shader grows prickly shivering spikes (reads as "ooh, wobbly," never harsh); **tilt home** = the tension voices glide back to consonance via `setTargetAtTime`, shimmer fades, stars round out, and a soft consonant **bloom** rewards the return. Always-on Eno-style drone means it's never silent; auto-drift keeps an untouched device gently rolling + sounding within ~2s. **Kids-safety chain:** `sources вЖТ masterGain(0.24) вЖТ BiquadFilter lowpass(вЙ§6.4kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10, 20:1) вЖТ destination`; soft вЙ•40ms attacks; tension voices peak at gain ~0.16; no analyser wired to output. **iOS:** AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the first вЙ•72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no orientation (desktop / denied) вЖТ pointer drag-to-tilt + auto-drift + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps running; no Web Audio вЖТ visuals alive + notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose three.js geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (`three` v0.182 already present; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [device-orientation physics/permission + tilt-gravity marble sim + positionвЖТconsonance/dissonance harmony engine with glide-resolution + three.js additive-glow roundвЖФspiky shader render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [the dissonanceвЖТconsonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** вАФ MasterClass 2026 *"Dissonance in Music"* + the *"Dissonance to Consonance"* family-learning lesson plan (mapflc.com): the resolve builds a child's confidence ¬Ј the love-aligned tilt lineage **`83-kids-tilt-rain`**вЭ§пЄП ¬Ј **Brian Eno**-style calm bedtime ambient drone]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 #3 + #4 вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І516 (tensionвЖТrelease is the named musical-growth lever; the toys deny it) вЖТ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 6√Ч (HARD jury ban) ¬Ј INPUT touch+mic-only 8√Ч over 15 ¬Ј the "drag-one-thing вЖТ always-consonant-morph" kids template 5√Ч]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 849)=[device-orientation TILT INPUT (starved, 1√Ч) ¬Ј three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarce) ¬Ј tilt-gravityвЖТreachable-resolvable-dissonance TECH (NOT always-consonant) ¬Ј calm night-blue VIBE (regressed register)]` вАФ clears every ban. **WIDE fork:** banked **`851-kids-hand-choir`** в≠Р (bare-hand MediaPipe conducting вАФ spread=tension/together=resolve; raw WebGL2; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST**, the embodied build the jury most wants) + **`850-kids-monster-keys`** (every chromatic note plays вАФ dissonance is a friendly wobble-monster you calm; Web MIDI + raw WebGL2) вАФ both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS ¬І516. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 35.9s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; **849 folder grep-clean of the build log** вАФ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/849-kids-star-bowl/` вЖТ 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the toddler "feel" of the tilt-gravity tuning on real hardware (`TILT_FORCE`/`WELL_PULL`/damping may want a hands-on nudge), and whether the rim dissonance reads as "safely wobbly" vs flat (the always-on drone + auto-drift + drag fallback guarantee a sounding, rolling glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/849-kids-star-bowl/README.md`

## (Cycle 515 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii](/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii)** вАФ Feedback Ecology II рЯМА. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 515 (adult / dynamical-system emergent / long-form generative / live no-input). **For**: adults ¬Ј **no-input / self-oscillating input** (it runs itself вАФ the starved input category the jury asked for; dodges the touch+mic over-rep, 8√Ч across the last 15) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface вАФ 1√Ч in the last 15; breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban which had relapsed to 7-of-15) ¬Ј **coupled-resonator feedback network whose topology evolves itself вАФ a Lorenz attractor drifting the coupling + Hebbian edges that strengthen-or-die вАФ rendered with ping-pong FBO feedback trails** technique ¬Ј **dynamical-system / David-Tudor feedback-ecosystem vibe (active, not ambient)**. **What if the feedback-resonator network from `820` took its hands off the wheel вАФ a chaotic attractor weathering the coupling through bifurcations while the graph rewires itself via Hebbian plasticity вАФ so it's a long-form instrument that is genuinely different at minute 5 than at minute 0, and never loops?** This is **cycle-2 of [820 ¬Ј Feedback Ecology](/dream/820-feedback-ecology)**, building exactly the deepening 820's own README queued: *"add Lorenz-attractor coupling weights that drift over time."* It inherits **820's ear-safe Web Audio engine wholesale** (eight high-Q `BiquadFilter вЖТ DelayNode вЖТ feedback GainNode` resonators on a small-world coupling graph, root 55 Hz, every path ending in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter before a master gain вЙ§0.3). On top: **(1) Lorenz drift** вАФ a classic ѕГ=10/ѕБ=28/ќ≤=8/3 system (dt=0.005, 6 Euler sub-steps/frame) integrated each frame; its normalized xвЖТglobal coupling (sweeps isolated-pings вЖФ entrainment вЖФ drone on its own), yвЖТself-feedback "edge of chaos," zвЖТslow timbre (filter-Q + gentle ¬±detune), every target passed through 820's existing hard clamps (`MAX_COUPLING=0.35`, `MAX_FB_GAIN=0.88`). Because the Lorenz trajectory is aperiodic it never settles вАФ the instrument *weathers*. **(2) Hebbian self-rewiring edges** вАФ each edge carries a live weight: when both endpoints are energetic the edge potentiates ("fire together, wire together"); idle edges decay toward a non-zero floor (`[0.12, 1.0]` clamp) вАФ *seldom-used links die, heavily-used links strengthen* вАФ and the live weights both drive the coupling gains and set the edge brightness on screen, so you **watch** the graph rewire. **(3) Autonomous seeding** вАФ every ~5.5s a gentle impulse is fired into the lowest-energy node so the ecology never dies (tapping a node still perturbs it, but it is not the primary input). **GPU render (raw WebGL2):** additive point-sprite node blobs (size/brightness вИЭ energy, 820's per-node palette), GPU `LINES` edges whose alpha вИЭ live Hebbian weight √Ч signal flow, a **ping-pong FBO feedback-trail accumulation** (fade-and-feed-back each frame so energy leaves luminous decaying trails вАФ the "David Tudor feedback ecosystem" look Canvas2D can't do cheaply, and thematically apt for a feedback instrument), plus a faint drifting Lorenz "weather" point-cloud + background tint so the autonomous drift is visible as well as audible. Shaders compiled/linked with error checks; on teardown all programs/buffers/VAOs/textures/framebuffers deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context`. **Ear-safety inherited from 820 unchanged** (limiter, hard-clamped gains, gentle 2s start ramp, always-visible **panic mute**, gesture-gated `AudioContext`). **Degrades:** `webgl2` null вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice but **audio keeps running** (sound is the point); no Web Audio вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **3/5** (#4 **multi-cycle commitment** вАФ explicit cycle-2 of 820, the deepening 820's README itself queued ¬Ј #1 **first chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring network topology in the lab** вАФ 820 had a *static* small-world graph + manual sliders; here the adjacency matrix is itself a dynamical system [Lorenz + Hebbian], and the ping-pong FBO feedback-trail is a GPU technique the lab is thin on ¬Ј #3 named refs [**E. N. Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow," J. Atmos. Sci. 20 (1963)** ¬Ј adaptive/time-varying pulse-coupled oscillator networks (Hebbian plasticity) ¬Ј inherited **David Tudor вАФ *Rainforest* (1968) / *Pulsers* (1976)** + **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input lineage from 820]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 **#5** ("820-feedback-ecology is your only net-new high-ambition build вАФ ship its cycle-2 [Lorenz-drifting coupling] instead of always opening a new tab; develop what you have") + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D вЖТ force a GPU surface) вЖТ AGENT.md path (b) "continue a multi-cycle ambitious build already underway" вЖТ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822,816)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7√Ч (HARD jury ban) ¬Ј INPUT touch 4√Ч (+ touch/mic-only 8√Ч over 15)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 847)=[no-input/self-oscillating INPUT (starved, 2√Ч) ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU, 1√Ч) ¬Ј Lorenz+Hebbian self-rewiring TECH ¬Ј dynamical-system feedback-ecosystem VIBE]` вАФ clears both jury bans. **DEEP fork:** the parallel sibling **`848-feedback-ecology-ii`** (the SAME concept rendered as a luminous orbiting **three.js** 3D graph вАФ emissive spheres + weight-colored `LineSegments` + a Lorenz `THREE.Line` weather-trail, additive-halo bloom fallback) was built complete + verified clean (tsc 0 / eslint --max-warnings=0) and **de-selected on diversity + ambition** вАФ three.js is 2√Ч in the last 15 (847's raw WebGL2 is the scarcer GPU surface) and 847's ping-pong FBO feedback-trail is the more substantive + thematically-apt GPU technique. 848 banked to IDEAS ¬І515 (top adult RESURRECT-FIRST for a cycle where three.js isn't over-rep'd), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-515/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winner not committed). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 53s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`**; **847 folder grep-clean of the build log** вАФ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii/` вЖТ 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the Lorenz drift reads as a *coherent* hour-long weather rather than random wander, whether the Hebbian rewiring is visually legible as links brighten/die, and whether the bifurcation sweep stays musical across its whole range (the always-clamped limiter + gentle ramp + panic mute guarantee a safe, sounding, evolving glance regardless; honest caveat вАФ GPU `lineWidth` is alpha-faked since most platforms clamp it to 1, so edge strength reads through brightness not thickness).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii/README.md`

## (Cycle 514 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/846-kids-sing-garden](/dream/846-kids-sing-garden)** вАФ Sing the Garden рЯМї. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 514 (kids 4+ / warm-daylight living garden / long-form generative). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **mic/voice input** (off the over-represented touch tag the audit banned this cycle) ¬Ј **three.js WebGL `THREE.Points` + custom `ShaderMaterial` output** (the cold renderer вАФ 0√Ч in the last 10 shipped; a GPU point-field of thousands of pollen/petal points) ¬Ј **voice-fed EMERGENT phyllotaxis (largest-gap + local inhibition on an expanding growth front) + long-form self-organizing/self-singing field** technique ¬Ј **calm warm-daylight living-garden vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old's voice didn't just *place* flowers but GREW an organic garden whose spiral arrangement emerges on its own вАФ the way a real sunflower head self-organizes вАФ and the garden keeps breathing and growing even when the room is quiet?** The child hums/sings; a hand-rolled autocorrelation (Chris Wilson ACF) pitch detector with an RMS noise-gate snaps each note to a **C-major pentatonic** (no wrong notes) and deposits a new growth site **in the largest angular gap on the current front**, with an inhibition rule that relaxes as the head fills вАФ so the angular increment self-organizes toward the golden angle (~137.5¬∞) **without hardcoding it**, a lightweight Keller-Segel-flavoured phyllotaxis (arXiv 2509.06498, Sept 2025). Pitch вЖТ hue (low warm rose/gold вЖТ high cool sky/violet) + which chord voice it feeds; loudness вЖТ growth vigor + bloom brightness; a held note accelerates growth. **State + memory (long-form):** the field keeps seeding faint ambient sites and decaying bloom pulses during silence, and after ~2.5s quiet plays a soft generative bell arpeggio from already-grown sites вАФ visibly and audibly richer at minute 5 than minute 1. Kid-safe `master gain 0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7000 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad (never silent); analyser never wired to output; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; **mic-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + ghost-hum auto-singer + tap-anywhere-to-grow** (fully demoable without a mic); WebGL-null вЖТ friendly notice; full teardown (rAF + `audioCtx.close()` + three.js geometry/material/renderer dispose + mic tracks stopped). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (no samples/network/recording вАФ mic used only for live pitch/RMS, never stored or transmitted); **zero new npm deps** (three.js v0.182 already installed; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [mic ACF pitch-detect + emergent largest-gap growth field + shader point-render + generative self-singing bell arpeggio = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**arXiv 2509.06498 "Phyllotaxis in a Keller-Segel model" (2025)** ¬Ј **H. Vogel (1979)** sunflower golden-angle baseline ¬Ј **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976)** vibe ¬Ј **Chris Wilson** autocorrelation] ¬Ј #5 references RESEARCH ¬І514, added this cycle <14 days). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #5 (ship a banked sibling вАФ this is the в≠Р top kids RESURRECT-FIRST `800-kids-sing-meadow`, elevated) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І514 (phyllotaxis is *emergent*, not just drawn) вЖТ kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10)=[INPUT touch 4√Ч ¬Ј OUTPUT Canvas2D 6√Ч]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 846)=[mic/voice INPUT ¬Ј three.js shader point-field OUTPUT (cold) ¬Ј emergent-phyllotaxis TECH ¬Ј warm-daylight-living-garden VIBE]` вАФ clears both bans. **DEEP fork:** the discrete/legible sibling **`845-kids-sing-meadow`** (one sung note вЖТ exactly one flower on the literal Vogel spiral, three.js `InstancedMesh`, call-and-response replay вАФ the *most 4yo-legible* take) was built complete + clean (tsc 0 / eslint 0) and **de-selected on ambition/research-fit** (846 realizes today's actual research finding and is long-form; 845 plots the static formula). 845 banked to IDEAS ¬І514 (top kids RESURRECT-FIRST), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-514/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winner not committed). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`; **846 folder grep-clean of the build log** вАФ zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/846-kids-sing-garden/` вЖТ 0; `tsc --noEmit` вЖТ 0 in folder; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the emergent spiral reads as a recognizable sunflower head on a real GPU, whether a 4-year-old's hum reliably plants via ACF on a phone mic, and whether the abstract point-field reads as "I made that" the way discrete flowers (845) would (the ghost-hum + tap-to-grow fallback + always-on pad guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/846-kids-sing-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 511 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/837-quasicrystal](/dream/837-quasicrystal)** вАФ Quasicrystal рЯФЈ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 511 (adult / generative / long-form / clinical-crystalline). **For**: adults ¬Ј **autonomous-generative input** (it plays itself; you tune tempo / ѕЖ-inflation / traversal / reseed вАФ NOT a touch-performance, off the over-represented touch tag) ¬Ј **Canvas2D pentagrid-tiling output** (deep-near-black ground, cyan fat-rhomb + violet thin-rhomb glowing edges, Ikeda crystalline) ¬Ј **de Bruijn pentagrid вЖТ Penrose P3 aperiodic tiling вЖТ aperiodic-order music** technique (grep-0√Ч вАФ the lab's FIRST aperiodic/quasicrystal composition) ¬Ј **geometric crystalline / Ryoji-Ikeda vibe**. **What if a piece of music had the structure of a quasicrystal вАФ perfectly ordered, self-similar, yet NEVER exactly repeating вАФ so it can play for an hour and stay coherent without ever looping?** A real **de Bruijn pentagrid** (5 line-families at 36¬∞ steps, offsets ќ≥вВАвА¶ќ≥вВД) is dual-transformed into a true **Penrose P3 rhomb tiling** with exact 5-fold symmetry and provable aperiodicity вАФ fat rhombs (|jвИТk|=1,4) and thin rhombs (|jвИТk|=2,3). A **traversal** (spiral / sweep / growth-front) visits each tile and sonifies it: the 7 Penrose **vertex configurations** (sun/star/ace/deuce/jack/king/queen) map to **just-intonation ratios** (sunвЖТ1/1, queenвЖТ3/2, kingвЖТ4/3, jackвЖТ5/4, starвЖТ6/5, deuceвЖТ**7/4** harmonic seventh, aceвЖТ9/8), register rises with distance from center, fat rhombs use warm additive partials (1f¬Ј2f¬Ј3f) and thin rhombs bright partials + FM shimmer, over a slow drone that shifts as the traversal travels outward. Because the tiling is aperiodic but built from a finite local vocabulary, the line is **non-repeating yet self-similar** вАФ motifs recur transposed and re-spaced but the exact sequence never returns, so it's genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (the lab is thin on true **long-form generative**). **ѕЖ-inflation** zooms the world by powers of ѕЖ=(1+вИЪ5)/2 вАФ the same patterns reappear at larger scale, a slow harmonic-rhythm change. An in-app **Design Notes** overlay explains the tiling, the mapping, and why it never repeats. Voices glide with `setTargetAtTime`/ramps (no clicks); master `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, modest gain; gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + `audioCtx.dispose()`). **Degrades:** no Web Audio вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, the crystal still grows silently. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (Canvas2D, NOT three.js). Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **first aperiodic-order/quasicrystal music in the lab** вАФ builder grep of penrose/aperiodic/quasicrystal/de-bruijn/pentagrid found only 3 *incidental* mentions, no prior aperiodic-music ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [de Bruijn pentagrid tiling generator + traversalвЖТsequencer + additive/FM synth voices + drone + Canvas2D render = 4+] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Roger Penrose** P3 (1974) ¬Ј **N.G. de Bruijn** pentagrid/"Algebraic theory of Penrose's non-periodic tilings", 1981 ¬Ј **Dan Shechtman** quasicrystals, Nobel 2011 ¬Ј **"Quasiperiodic Music"** arXiv 2009.04667; aesthetic kin Ryoji Ikeda]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #1 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І511 (Skylight made the sky *visible* but silent вЖТ data/structure sonification; "Quasiperiodic Music" arXiv 2009.04667 вЖТ aperiodic order as musical structure) вЖТ this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21 + audit)=[his-recording-as-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording/answering-agent ¬Ј pentatonic-never-wrong ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default ¬Ј touch-input (5√Ч in last 10)]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 837)=[autonomous-generative INPUT (off touch) ¬Ј Canvas2D crystalline-tiling OUTPUT ¬Ј de-Bruijn-pentagrid/aperiodic-order TECH (grep-0√Ч, NOT his-recording, NOT answer/follow, NOT pentatonic) ¬Ј geometric-crystalline-Ikeda VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **WIDE fan-out вАФ 2 explored, banked to IDEAS ¬І511:** `836-flightpaths` (sonify the live ADS-B sky as a clinical radar organ вАФ each real aircraft a sustained spatial voice; the genuine real-world-data lab-first that answers JURY #3, de-selected because its live feed is often CORS-blocked вЖТ most visitors see the simulated sky; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `838-hocket-loom` (play one live MIDI/keyboard line вЖТ it shatters across an interlocking hocket/kotekan/phase ensemble; de-selected because canon/echo/interlock is the lab's most-trodden ground). Both built complete + build-verified (tsc 0 / eslint 0), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-511/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winners not committed). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 42s` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types вЖТ Collecting page data**; `npx eslint` on the folder вЖТ 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the aperiodic sequence reads as "coherent but never looping" to the ear and whether the vertexвЖТJI mapping sounds as intended on a real device (the always-on drone + autonomous traversal guarantee a sounding, crystallizing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/837-quasicrystal/README.md`

## (Cycle 510 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer](/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer)** вАФ Paint Mixer рЯО®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 510 (kids 4+ / bright painterly / color-as-language). **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **touch drag-paint input** (no reading) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 output** (the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0√Ч in the last 10 shipped) ¬Ј **physically-correct Kubelka-Munk subtractive pigment mixing вЖТ GPU readPixels вЖТ gliding chord** technique ¬Ј **bright cream finger-paint vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old finger-paints by MIXING REAL PAINT вАФ and the color they mix IS the chord they hear?** Three big glowing pigment blobs (red/magenta, yellow, blue) drag around a cream paper canvas; where they overlap the paint mixes like REAL paint вАФ **blue + yellow makes GREEN**, not the muddy gray that ordinary RGB mixing gives вАФ because a GLSL ES 3.00 fragment shader runs full **36-sample Kubelka-Munk spectral mixing per pixel** (RGBвЖТK/S absorption+scattering, mix in spectral space, integrate over CIE XYZ color-matching functions, back to sRGB), with a domain-warp smear for a wet-paint feel. Each ~20 Hz frame, `readPixels` samples the actual mixed pixels under the blob centroid вЖТ HSV вЖТ drives a live, always-in-tune chord over a fixed C+G pad: **warm/gold вЖТ bright major/add9 ¬Ј green/teal вЖТ open sus ¬Ј blue/violet вЖТ tender minor ¬Ј magenta вЖТ dreamy maj7**, with saturationвЖТrichness and valueвЖТbrightness, all gliding click-free via `setTargetAtTime` (voices never retrigger). So the heard chord **exactly equals the seen mixed color** вАФ the child paints harmony, never a wrong note (the fixed center holds it in tune; color shapes only quality + richness). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-21 #4** (kill the kids "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch вАФ let harmony be *shaped*) and **#5** (ship a banked sibling вАФ this is the ¬І508 в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST `829-kids-color-blend`, rebuilt and upgraded from approximate RGB blend to physically-correct pigment optics + real GPU pixel-readback). Kids-safe `masterGain 0.27 вЖТ lowpass вЙ§7 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1)`; always-on pad (never silent); вЙ•64вАУ72px tap targets; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; auto-drift after ~1.5s idle so an unattended phone keeps painting + singing; **WebGL2-null вЖТ CSS `mix-blend-mode:multiply` fallback that still drives the same audio** + `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вЖТ visuals stay alive + notice; full teardown (program/buffer/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2, no three.js). Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **first Kubelka-Munk physical pigment mixing in the lab** вАФ grep-0√Ч; every prior "pigment" is metaphorical Anadol data-as-pigment вАФ and **first GPU `readPixels`вЖТaudio coupling** ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch drag-physics + per-pixel Kubelka-Munk spectral mixing + readPixels colorвЖТchord-quality synth + WebGL2 render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Isaac Newton's 7-colorвЖФ7-note mapping** ¬Ј **Scriabin's *clavier √† lumi√®res*** ¬Ј **Mixbox / "Practical Pigment Mixing for Digital Painting," Sochorov√° & Jamri≈°ka, SIGGRAPH Asia 2021** + **Spectral.js** Kubelka-Munk]) ¬Ј soft #5 (RESEARCH ¬І510 вАФ Mixbox/Spectral.js GLSL + CoolerSpace 2026 color tooling). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 + #5 вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І510 (RGB additive mixing is physically WRONG вАФ blue+yellow=gray;
