Kubelka-Munk gives blue+yellow=green like real finger-paint) вЖТ kids **DEEP** fire (paint vs. light). **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[pentatonic-never-wrong (kids crutch) ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј his-recording-as-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 834)=[touch drag-paint INPUT ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (cold, 0√Ч last 10) ¬Ј Kubelka-Munk-pigment-mixвЖТchord-quality TECH (harmony genuinely shaped, NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC) ¬Ј bright cream finger-paint VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. **DEEP fork:** the physically-opposite sibling **`835-kids-light-mixer`** (additive LIGHT вАФ red+green=yellow, all=white, on a near-black starfield) was built complete + clean and **de-selected on novelty** (additive RGB mixing is the *ordinary* mix the world already does вАФ and the original 829 framing; the pigment approach is the lab-first + the fresher, more kid-native surprise). 835 banked to IDEAS ¬І510, saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-510/`, removed before the authoritative build (non-winner not committed). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 80s` вЖТ Linting + type-check PASS вЖТ reached `Collecting page data`; **834 folder grep-clean of the build log** вАФ zero references, zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether blue+yellow visibly reads as green on a real GPU and whether the heard chord tracks the mixed color tightly under a child's finger (the always-on pad + auto-drift + CSS fallback guarantee a sounding, painting glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer/README.md`

## (Cycle 509 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/833-spectral-loom](/dream/833-spectral-loom)** вАФ Spectral Loom вЭДпЄПрЯО®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 509 (adult / clinical-Ikeda / live-performance). **For**: adults ¬Ј **live-mic input** (rests his recording вАФ the material is the *visitor's* own sound; the visitor, not a stored file) ¬Ј **Canvas2D spectrogram output** (cool monochromeвЖТcyan/violet magnitude ramp, crisp grid, bright scrub-head) ¬Ј **freeze-the-live-STFT вЖТ editable spectral-image buffer вЖТ additive resynth** technique ¬Ј **clinical / data-instrument / Ryoji-Ikeda vibe вАФ active not ambient**. **What if you could FREEZE your own live sound as a spectrogram *image* and then PAINT that frozen picture вАФ smear energy sideways, brush it in and out, stretch it вАФ and hear the picture you painted?** A live STFT (`AnalyserNode` fftSize 1024, dBвЖТ0..1, folded onto a perceptual log-frequency row grid) scrolls a rolling spectrogram; **вЭД Freeze** copies the window into an editable magnitude matrix `buffer[TIME][FREQ]` вАФ a held image. **Editing the picture edits the sound:** a soft-falloff Gaussian brush **raises/lowers** magnitude, **smear** drags spectral energy sideways in time (freeze-stretch), a **freeze-stretch slider** runs a per-frame IIR time-blur that melts transients into drones, and a **scrub head** sweeps the frozen frame with a **Loop** toggle for rhythmic re-triggering (active, never a static drone). Resynthesis = a capped **96-oscillator additive bank** reading the magnitude column under the scrub head each frame, the loudest rows mapped to oscillator freq+gain with `setTargetAtTime` smoothing (no zipper). Master `gain вЖТ lowpass вЙ§13.5 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`. **Crucial mic-free path:** mic denied/absent вЖТ a visible `text-rose-300` notice **and** a "Use demo sound" button that routes an internally-generated evolving chord/whistle/noise through the **identical** captureвЖТfreezeвЖТscrub pipeline, so the whole mechanic is fully demoable with no mic; the canvas animates a demo spectrogram on load (never blank, never silent). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no recording stored); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [live STFT capture + frozen editable spectral buffer + 96-osc additive resynth + spectrogram renderer = 4] ¬Ј #3 named ref [**Jean-Fran√Іois Charles, "A Tutorial on Spectral Sound Processing Using Max/MSP and Jitter," Computer Music Journal 32:3 (2008)** вАФ spectrogram-as-editable-image-buffer, the GRM/IRCAM spectral-freeze lineage; aesthetic kin **Ryoji Ikeda**]). **#1 NOT claimed (honesty):** spectral processing has lab ancestors (`34-spectral-morph`, `321-spectral-flight`) вАФ but **none let you PAINT the frozen image and resynth it**, which is 833's genuine differentiator + high surprise ("the picture *is* the sound"). **Resurrects the ¬І507-banked `826-spectral-loom`**, satisfying **JURY 2026-06-21 #5** ("stop banking DEEP losers вАФ ship a banked sibling, clear the bank"). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #1 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread) + #3 (real-world-data / non-music) + #5 (ship a banked sibling) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І509 (space-weather sonification is fresh-in-2026 but a grep proved it's owned by the lab вАФ `314`/`471`; EDM-drop owned by `387`/`631` вАФ so two of three briefs were re-treads, redirecting to the one un-owned framing) вЖТ this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording ¬Ј pentatonic-never-wrong ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 833)=[live-mic INPUT (rests his recording) ¬Ј Canvas2D spectrogram OUTPUT (вЙ§3√Ч, not banned) ¬Ј spectral-freeze-and-PAINT TECH (NOT his-recording, NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC, NOT machine-listens-to-HIS-recording) ¬Ј clinical-Ikeda active VIBE (deliberately NOT ambient)]` вАФ clears every ban. The 3 explorers spread inputs (mic / external-API / transport-touch) and techniques (spectral-paint / space-weather-sonification / EDM-arrangement); the two non-winners (`831-solar-wind-organ` вЙИ existing `314`/`471`; `832-drop-engine` вЙИ existing `387`/`631`) were caught redundant at the curate grep and **NOT committed or re-seeded as fresh** (logged honestly to STATE/IDEAS as a research-grep lesson; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-509/`). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile PASS, reached `Collecting page data`; **833 folder grep-clean** вАФ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint` on the folder вЖТ 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether painting the frozen spectrogram audibly reworks the resynth and whether the additive-bank level is balanced on a real device (the demo-sound path + on-load animation guarantee a sounding, animated glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/833-spectral-loom/README.md`

## (Cycle 508 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun](/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun)** вАФ Feelings Sun рЯМЮрЯТЫ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 508 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile ¬Ј **touch-DRAG input** (one big draggable sun; mouse too) ¬Ј **animated SVG/DOM output** (glowing sun with `feGaussianBlur`, CSS-animated sky gradient + drifting motes вАФ NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT WebGL) ¬Ј **2-D affect-field вЖТ bilinear chord-quality morph** technique (grep-thin вАФ the kids lane's first *continuous emotional* harmony-shaper) ¬Ј **warm emotional kids-sky vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SHAPE the FEELING of a chord вАФ drag one friendly sun across a feelings-sky and the harmony morphs happyвЖФcozyвЖФfloatyвЖФdreamy вАФ instead of tapping a pre-approved pentatonic scale?** The sun's (x,y) **bilinearly blends four chord qualities** at the corners: up-left bright **major** (happy), down-left **minor** (cozy/wistful), down-right **sus** (floaty), up-right **add9/maj7** (dreamy). A fixed Web Audio pad always holds ONE tonal center (**root drone + perfect-fifth ALWAYS sounding**, so it is always "in tune"); two **color voices glide continuously** вАФ the harmonic third morphs maj3вЖФmin3вЖФP4, plus a high added-tone voice that fades in toward the dreamy corner вАФ ALL via `setTargetAtTime`/ramps so the harmony morphs **click-free** (voices never re-triggered). Every position is consonant, but the child genuinely controls bright-vs-dark / open-vs-rich / plain-vs-dreamy. The sky gradient, the sun's **expressive face** (smile + sleepy-dreamy eyes), its glow color, and floating motes all shift with the current feeling; a soft bell sparkle trails the sun. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** (kill "pentatonic-never-wrong"; let harmony be *shaped*) on the **emotion axis** вАФ completing the kids harmony-shaping set: `816` shaped harmony by **interval-stacking**, `822` shaped **rhythm** by spinning polygons, `828` shapes the **feeling/quality** continuously. It also satisfies **JURY #5** ("stop banking DEEP losers вАФ ship a banked sibling"): 828 is the cycle-506 в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST banked `823-kids-feelings-chords`, built and shipped. **Interaction (no reading):** drag the вЙ•200px sun anywhere; untouched for ~1.5s it gently auto-drifts on a slow Lissajous path so an unattended phone is always morphing + singing. Kids-safe `master gain вЙИ0.28 вЖТ lowpass вЙИ7000 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; soft ~0.6s attacks; always-on pad (never silent); iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; full rAF + `audioCtx.close()` teardown. **Degrades:** no Web Audio вЖТ friendly `text-rose-300` notice, visuals stay alive. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no data collection); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch affect-field mapping + bilinear chord-quality morph engine + always-on pad/color-voice synth + animated SVG render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Russell's circumplex model of affect** (valence√Чarousal) ¬Ј **Hevner's affective tone/mode associations** ¬Ј current touchstone **Synesthesia "Color to Sound" 2026 AURA mode** colorвЖТ4-voice chord]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 (kill pentatonic; shape harmony) + #5 (ship a banked sibling вАФ resurrects the ¬І506 в≠Р `823`) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І508 (color/feelingвЖТchord; Synesthesia AURA 2026 + Sound Color Project/Plutchik) вЖТ this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`829-kids-color-blend`** в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (mix two glowing colored lights вЖТ the color you make IS the chord; **raw WebGL2** вАФ the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0√Ч in the last 10; color-as-language, love-aligned `82`вЭ§пЄП/`317`вЭ§пЄП) + **`830-kids-feelings-choir`** (tap to gather singing creatures into a circle вЖТ assemble a chord; Canvas2D, Toca-Band orchestration) as **IDEAS ¬І508**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording ¬Ј pentatonic-never-wrong ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 828)=[touch-DRAG INPUT ¬Ј SVG/DOM OUTPUT (вЙ§3√Ч, not banned вАФ jury said surfaces are spread, don't reflexively flee) ¬Ј continuous-affect-field chord-quality-morph TECH (NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC, NOT his-recording) ¬Ј warm-emotional kids VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread renderers SVG-DOM / WebGL2 / Canvas2D and shaping-mechanisms feeling-position / color-mix / gather-orchestration. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile PASS, reached `Collecting page data`; **828 folder grep-clean** вАФ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "drag up-left = happy, down-left = cozy" without instruction and whether the third audibly morphs majorвЖФminor smoothly on a real device (the always-on pad + fifth + idle auto-drift guarantee a sounding, morphing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun/README.md`

## (Cycle 507 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/827-waveguide-mesh](/dream/827-waveguide-mesh)** вАФ Waveguide Mesh рЯ™ШрЯМК. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 507 (adult / live-performance / installation). **For**: adults / stage ¬Ј **Web MIDI + on-screen-pad + direct-membrane + keyboard input** (the most stage-playable in the window; MIDI is **0√Ч in the last 10 shipped** вАФ the starved input) ¬Ј **Canvas2D displacement-field output** (coppery-violet heatmap that paints the *exact* field the audio reads) ¬Ј **2-D digital-waveguide-mesh / FDTD wave-equation membrane run at AUDIO sample rate in an AudioWorklet** technique ¬Ј **percussive, metallic, live-performance vibe вАФ deliberately NOT ambient**. **What if a chord weren't synthesized but physically *travelled*?** You strike a point on a 2-D vibrating drumhead; a Gaussian energy bump spreads, reflects off the rigid rim, interferes with itself, and rings as a real plate/drum tone via the standard FDTD update `u_next = (2u вИТ u_prev + C¬≤вИЗ¬≤u)¬Јdamping` (fixed boundaries, C inside the 2-D CFL bound вЙ§1/вИЪ2). The mesh runs **at the sample rate inside a Blob-URL `AudioWorklet`** (`worklet-source.ts`); the **audio signal IS the displacement read at fixed pickup nodes** (DC-blocked + softly saturated), and the worklet posts a downsampled field ~45√Ч/s so **the wavefronts you see are the waveform you hear**. If `AudioWorklet` is unavailable it degrades to a matched **bank of modal resonators** (circular-membrane eigenratios 1.00¬Ј1.59¬Ј2.14¬Ј2.30¬Ј2.65вА¶) excited per strike + a control-rate FDTD mesh for the same visual вАФ audio/visual stay coupled either way. **Play it** via a MIDI keyboard (note-on velocity = strike force, pitch = membrane tension = wave speed = strike position), two rows of on-screen pads (toms/plates вАФ tap several for a chord), direct taps on the head, or the AвАУL computer-keyboard row; status line shows "MIDI connected вЬУ" or an amber "no MIDI вАФ use the pads." Pitch is the **full chromatic scale** (NOT pentatonic); higher notes tighten the head (faster waves, shorter ring) for articulation; chords = multiple strikes summed into one membrane. Master `gain вЖТ lowpass вЙ§12 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; audio gesture-gated (iOS unlock); idle auto-strikes so the canvas is never dead. **No samples, no recordings, no network, no API route вЖТ no `guard`; zero new npm deps.** Ambition honest **2/5** (**#2** вЙ•3 subsystems [FDTD mesh DSP + Web MIDI + AudioWorklet audio-rate engine w/ modal fallback + Canvas2D renderer = 4] ¬Ј **#3** named refs [**Van Duyne & Smith, "Physical Modeling with the 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh," ICMC 1993**; Perry Cook STK modal synthesis for the fallback]). **#1 NOT claimed (honesty):** FDTD-wave-field-as-sound already exists as kids `478-kids-wave-pond` + `489-kids-pond-pair`; 827's genuine differentiators are the **adult MIDI live-performance register** of that family and the **audio-rate-in-AudioWorklet** mesh (vs. their control-rate visual + pickup). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread, stop defaulting to adult-ambient, chase a starved frontier) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І507 (GPU-compute-fieldвЖТsound is *saturated* in the lab вАФ `327`/`520`/`579`/`55` + ShaderVine 2026 вАФ so redirect off it toward the starved live-performance/MIDI physical-model axis) вЖТ this adult **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`825-gravity-sequencer`** (pointer ¬Ј symplectic N-body orbital integration as a *percussion sequencer* вАФ perihelion crossings strike tuned bells, stable orbits lock a groove, chaos drifts it; Otomata + Kepler) + **`826-spectral-loom`** (live-mic STFT freeze вЖТ editable spectral-image buffer вЖТ additive resynth; smear/scrub/brush the frozen spectrum like wet paint, edit-the-picture-edits-the-sound, demoable mic-free; Jean-Fran√Іois Charles CMJ 2008) as **IDEAS ¬І507**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording ¬Ј pentatonic-never-wrong ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 827)=[Web-MIDI/pad INPUT (starved 0√Ч in window) ¬Ј Canvas2D displacement-field OUTPUT (вЙ§3√Ч, not banned) ¬Ј 2-D-FDTD-waveguide-mesh-audio TECH (not in last 10) ¬Ј percussive live-performance VIBE (NOT ambient)]` вАФ clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread inputs MIDI/pointer/mic and techniques waveguide-mesh/orbital-sequencer/spectral-paint. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 42s` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types вЖТ Collecting page data**; **827 folder grep-clean** вАФ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint` on the folder вЖТ 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (fails identically on pristine `main`; ceiling cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the audio-rate worklet mesh stays stable + musical across a real device and whether the visible field reads as tightly synced to the sound (idle auto-strikes guarantee a sounding, rippling glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/827-waveguide-mesh/README.md`

## Cycle 506 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/822-kids-shape-drums](/dream/822-kids-shape-drums)** вАФ Shape Drums рЯФЇрЯ•Б. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 506 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile ¬Ј **touch input** (tap to add/cycle shapes, big turtle/rabbit speed buttons) ¬Ј **Canvas2D output** (full-bleed `requestAnimationFrame` rotating polygons вАФ off the recent three.js 799/803/805 streak; jury says Canvas2D no longer banned at 3√Ч and the concept reads cleanly in 2D) ¬Ј **polyrhythm-as-rotating-polygons / vertex-crossing scheduler** technique (grep-thin вАФ the kids lane's FIRST shapeable-rhythm piece) ¬Ј **playful, bold-saturated-on-near-black, geometric, calm-but-lively vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could BUILD a polyrhythm by spinning shapes вАФ choosing how many sides each shape has and how fast it spins вАФ instead of tapping a pre-approved pentatonic scale?** 1вАУ5 big rotating polygons sit on a dark canvas, each a bold color with glowing vertex dots; a faint trigger line crosses the top of each shape, and every time a vertex sweeps past it the shape PINGS a warm note + flashes a ripple. A triangle pings **3√Ч/rotation**, a hexagon **6√Ч** вАФ so the **number of sides the child chooses IS the rhythmic subdivision**, and the **spin speed IS the tempo**. Two shapes of different side-counts spinning at related speeds (√Ч0.5/√Ч1/√Ч1.5/√Ч2 of a base tempo, snapped so they stay clean) drift in and out of phase вАФ the child has literally *built* a 3-against-2 or 4-against-3 polyrhythm. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** вАФ which banned the kids lane's "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch (6√Ч) and asked for a piece where **harmony OR rhythm can be *shaped***. Cycle 504 answered the *harmony* half (`816-kids-tone-tower`, JI chord-stacking); 822 answers the **rhythm** half (the grep-thin register), completing the pair. Pitch is NOT the child's variable вАФ each shape is locked to one tone of a single warm **Dadd9 stack** (D3/A3/D4/F#4/B4) so *every* combination is consonant вАФ the child shapes the **rhythmic interplay**, never a "wrong note." **Interaction (no reading):** big round **+** (80px) adds a shape (cycles triangleвЖТsquareвЖТpentagonвЖТhexagon, cap 5); **tap a shape** cycles its sides 3вЖТ8; **tap its center** removes it (never empty); one **giant 64px speed button per shape** (turtle/rabbit, no words) cycles the musically-related ratios. Pings fire via a per-frame **vertex-crossing edge detector** in the rAF loop; soft marimba/bell synthesis (3 detuned partials, click-free `linearRamp`-attack/`setTargetAtTime`-decay, lowpass tail, light feedback delay) + a quiet sustained pad so it's never silent вАФ levels low, safe for a sleeping toddler. **Audio gesture-gated** ("tap to start" overlay, iOS unlock), rAF cancelled + AudioContext closed on unmount. **Degrades:** no Web Audio вЖТ visuals stay alive + a small "sound is off" notice (no throw). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no data collection); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2вАУ3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch shape-builder + rotating-geometry vertex-crossing scheduler + chord-voiced marimba synth + Canvas2D render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**"Polyrhythms in shapes"** / thekidshouldseethis ¬Ј **Musical Toys "Polyrhythm"** ¬Ј **Steve Reich phasing / Harvard pendulum-wave** lineage] ¬Ј soft #5 RESEARCH ¬І506 today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 (kill pentatonic; shape rhythm) + #5 (ship a banked sibling вАФ this resurrects/de-pentatones the ¬І504-banked `818-kids-pendulum-choir` as a rotating-polygon variant) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І506 (polyrhythm-as-rotating-polygons) вЖТ this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`823-kids-feelings-chords`** в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (drag a sun across a feelings-sky вЖТ SHAPE the chord's emotion majorвЖФminorвЖФsusвЖФadd9, SVG/DOM вАФ the renderer-diverse harmony pick) + **`824-kids-clap-loop`** (clap a rhythm вЖТ a glowing WebGL2 band loops it back, resurrects ¬І504-banked 817) as **IDEAS ¬І506**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording ¬Ј pentatonic-never-wrong ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default]` ¬Ј `picked (winner 822)=[touch INPUT ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (off the three.js streak) ¬Ј polyrhythm-rotating-polygon shapeable-RHYTHM TECH (NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC) ¬Ј playful-geometric kids VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread renderers Canvas2D/SVG-DOM/WebGL2 (the "spread, don't flip" answer). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: all code gates PASS вАФ TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile, reached `Collecting page data`; **822 folder grep-clean** вАФ zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container **~4096-fd `EMFILE`** at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen. *Nuance THIS cycle:* pristine `main` built **fully** (just under the fd ceiling), and adding 822 (one more of ~500 routes) tips static-gen over it вАФ a **page-count fd-exhaustion at the global font manifest, not 822's code** (it has no fonts/imports beyond React and reached `Collecting page data` clean); the ceiling is **unraisable even as root** (cgroup-locked: `prlimit`/`ulimit` вЖТ "Operation not permitted"). Vercel's higher fd ceiling builds + deploys it, as every prior cycle. Unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "more sides = more pings, faster spin = faster" without instruction, and whether the polyrhythm reads as mesmerizing vs. busy on a real device (the seeded shapes + always-on pad guarantee a sounding, spinning glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/822-kids-shape-drums/README.md`

## (Cycle 505 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, one concept √Ч 3 feedback-synthesis approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/820-feedback-ecology](/dream/820-feedback-ecology)** вАФ Feedback Ecology рЯМА. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 505 (adult / live-performance / installation). **For**: adults ¬Ј **touch/gesture input** (tap nodes to perturb; sliders for coupling + self-resonance) ¬Ј **Canvas2D node-graph / phase-space output** (NOT a plain oscilloscope вАФ the *system* is drawn) ¬Ј **coupled-resonator dynamical-system / self-oscillating feedback technique** (grep-0√Ч вАФ the lab's FIRST feedback instrument) ¬Ј **energetic, emergent, organic-but-electric vibe (deliberately NOT ambient)**. **What if an instrument were a *living dynamical system* вАФ a network of resonators that feed each other, self-organize into emergent drones and rhythmic instabilities, and that you play by *perturbing the ecology* rather than triggering notes?** Eight high-Q `BiquadFilter` resonators each sit inside a tight feedback loop (`filter вЖТ delay вЖТ feedbackGain вЖТ filter`), wired into a **small-world coupling graph** (ring backbone weight 0.7 + cross-link shortcuts 0.4). Above a coupling threshold the network **bifurcates**: low coupling = isolated pings; mid = nodes entrain and beat into polyrhythmic textures; high = a roaring emergent drone with energy visibly circulating the ring. It is genuinely **non-stationary вАФ minute 2 differs from minute 0** because the coupled resonators exchange energy asymmetrically and drift across operating points over time (the long-form-stateful register the lab is thin on, and the exact thing JURY 2026-06-21 flagged missing from pruning-candidate `805`: "no state that makes minute 5 differ from minute 1"). **Interaction:** Awaken вЖТ tap a node to inject an excitation impulse (watch energy propagate), tap empty space to seed all nodes, **coupling slider** = the bifurcation control, **self-resonance slider** = the edge-of-chaos control, three tuning presets (overtone JI on A1 55 Hz / subharmonic utonal / tight cluster). **Visualizer** makes the dynamical system legible: node size+glow = live RMS energy, **edge flow-particles** = coupling √Ч signal transfer (energy moving around the ring), a **phase-space Lissajous trace inside each node** = its limit cycle/attractor, a bottom energy strip = per-node activity over time. **Ear-safety** (this is a self-oscillating instrument вАФ it *will* try to get loud): all eight paths converge into one brick-wall `DynamicsCompressorNode` (вИТ8 dB, ratio 20, 1 ms attack) вЖТ master gain (default 0.25); per-node self-feedback hard-clamped at 0.88 (above this it diverges to digital noise, not music), cross-coupling clamped at 0.35/edge; **no auto-start** (AudioContext resumes only on the "Awaken the Ecology" tap, iOS unlock), a 2 s gentle ramp-up on start, an always-visible **Panic/Mute** that ramps to silence in 10 ms. **Degrades:** three.js/WebGL not needed (Canvas2D); no Web Audio вЖТ readable notice. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no recordings, no external API вАФ the sound is *only* feedback); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **lab-first self-oscillating feedback instrument AND first coupled-dynamical-system piece** вАФ grep-0√Ч for no-input/Larsen/feedback-as-sound-source ¬Ј #3 named refs [**"Musicking with dynamical systems"** ACM dl.acm.org/10.1145/3678299.3678302 ¬Ј **David Tudor** *Rainforest*/*Pulsers* feedback ecosystems ¬Ј **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input mixing board ¬Ј **Body Synths Laboratory**, Superbooth 2026, Berlin May 7вАУ9] ¬Ј #5 RESEARCH ¬І505 today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 (rest his recording + end the answering-agent thread + stop defaulting to adult-ambient) вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І505 (no-input/self-oscillation revival; Superbooth 2026) вЖТ this adult **DEEP** fire. Winner of a 3-approach fire; banked **`819-no-input-mixer`** в≠Р RESURRECT-FIRST (faithful no-input mixer, XY-pad, WebGL2 oscilloscope вАФ the more directly *playable* one, on the scarcest renderer) + **`821-larsen-field`** (live acoustic Larsen + virtual fallback, notch/peak carving) as **IDEAS ¬І505**. **Diversity:** `banned=[his-recording-source ¬Ј machine-listens-to-recording ¬Ј pentatonic-never-wrong ¬Ј UPIC pitch-painter ¬Ј adult-ambient-as-default-register]` ¬Ј `picked=[touch/gesture INPUT ¬Ј Canvas2D node-graph/phase-space OUTPUT (off the cooled three.js 799/803/805 streak; Canvas2D no longer banned at 3√Ч, and the concept NEEDS a graph вАФ jury "pick the renderer the concept needs") ¬Ј audio-self-oscillation/coupled-dynamical-system TECH ¬Ј energetic-emergent VIBE]` вАФ clears every ban. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 38.9s` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types вЖТ Collecting page data**; **820 folder grep-clean** of the log вАФ zero warnings/errors, only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**proven infra THIS cycle: moved 820 out, rebuilt pristine `main` вЖТ identical `вЬУ Compiled successfully` then identical EMFILE**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear/eye: whether the network audibly self-organizes/evolves as intended on a real device and whether the energy-flow + phase-space traces read at a glance (the seeded impulses + 2 s ramp guarantee a sounding, evolving glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/820-feedback-ecology/README.md`

## (Cycle 504 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/816-kids-tone-tower](/dream/816-kids-tone-tower)** вАФ Tone Tower рЯІ±рЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 504 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile ¬Ј **touch input** (tap/drag to stack) ¬Ј **animated SVG/DOM output** (glowing blocks, gaussian-glow filters, CSS topple вАФ NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js) ¬Ј **vertical interval-stacking вЖТ just-intonation chord construction** technique (grep-0√Ч) ¬Ј **warm cream nursery, bold saturated, calm-playful vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could build a CHORD by stacking blocks вАФ genuinely SHAPING the harmony, not just triggering pre-approved notes?** A glowing tower sits on a cream play area; the bottom block is a soft ~F3 root, and each block the child stacks sits a musical **interval** above the one below. The size of the vertical gap the child drags **chooses the interval** вАФ normalized to 0..1200 cents and **snapped to the nearest entry in a just-intonation consonance lattice** (`harmony.ts`: unison 1/1 ¬Ј maj2 9/8 ¬Ј min3 6/5 ¬Ј maj3 5/4 ¬Ј P4 4/3 ¬Ј P5 3/2 ¬Ј maj6 5/3 ¬Ј octave 2/1). Because every entry is a small-whole-number ratio, **any** stack is consonant and never harsh вАФ but the child genuinely controls open-vs-close, simple-vs-rich, bright-vs-dark. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21's kids verdict** вАФ which BANNED "pentatonic-never-wrong as the kids harmonic crutch" (6√Ч) and the "UPIC pitch-painter" (3√Ч) and demanded "a kids piece where harmony or rhythm can be *shaped*, not one where every note is pre-approved." Tone Tower is harmony *shaped* by the child's gesture, off both banned tags. **Interaction:** drag-up to drop a block (a dotted reach-line + ghost block preview the placement live); a plain tap drops a friendly warm third; **вЦґ** strums the tower bottomвЖТtop; **рЯТ•** topples it with a downward gliss + sparkle, then re-seeds вАФ no fail states, no reading, color is the only language (unison gold вЖТ octave magenta-rose), voices cap at 8. **Audio** (`audio.ts`): kids-safe chain `gain 0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7000 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor`, warm triangle+sine voices with ~50ms attacks, an always-on soft ambient pad, a looping arpeggio so a hands-off glance is sounding on load; AudioContext resumed inside the first tap (iOS), full teardown on unmount. **Degrades:** no Web Audio вЖТ visible rose-700 notice, visuals stay fully alive. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **vertical interval-stacking chord-construction** вАФ grep-0√Ч, harmony-shaping is a thin kids register ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [touch-stack interaction + JI lattice gapвЖТcentsвЖТratio engine + arpeggiator/strum synth + animated SVG render = 4] ¬Ј #3 named refs [**Friedrich Froebel's "Gifts"** вАФ the original kindergarten building blocks ¬Ј **uCue**, Interaction Design and Children 2025/ACM вАФ a children's musical interface with harmony layers of "common and unusual harmonizations" ¬Ј **Harry Partch tonality-diamond just-intonation lattice**]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 kids verdict (ban pentatonic-crutch + UPIC; "let harmony be shaped") вЖТ RESEARCH ¬І504 (uCue children's-harmony-shaping anchor) вЖТ this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`817-kids-clap-back-band`** (mic clap-onset вЖТ WebGL2; the child's own clapped rhythm becomes the band's groove вАФ Orff echo-clapping; de-selected for rhyming with the recent `773-parade-caller` rhythm-capture) + **`818-kids-pendulum-choir`** (touch-release pendulum-wave polyrhythm on audio-forward SVG вАФ Harvard pendulum wave / OSZILOT / Ligeti *Po√®me Symphonique*; de-selected for leaning on a D-pentatonic chime palette, the jury-banned crutch) as **IDEAS ¬І504**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 42s` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types вЬУ вЖТ Collecting page data**; **816 folder grep-clean** of the build log вАФ zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; the builder also verified `tsc --strict --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters` clean on its files); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, fails identically on pristine main, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "drag higher = a wider, brighter chord" without instruction, and whether the JI stacks sound as warm on a real device as intended (the looping arpeggio + seeded triad guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/816-kids-tone-tower/README.md`

## (Cycle 503 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 memory-engine approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/814-remembering-room](/dream/814-remembering-room)** вАФ Remembering Room рЯОєрЯІ†. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 503. **For**: adults / live performance / intimate ¬Ј **his-recording-as-soloist input** (JURY 2026-06-20 #2 explicitly licensed this вАФ the return-and-extend of 770) ¬Ј **audio-forward DOM/CSS + small `<canvas>` output** (deliberately off the jury's **Canvas2D 10√Ч/15 monoculture** and off a fullscreen shader вАФ the restraint is the point) ¬Ј **symbolic motif memory / Adaptive Phrase Bank** technique (grep-0√Ч вАФ the lab's first agent with long-form symbolic memory) ¬Ј **warm / hearth-lit / meditative-duet vibe**. **What if Karel's real recorded "Welcome Home" piano plays as the SOLOIST, a machine live-music agent accompanies it AND answers in his gaps вАФ but now the agent REMEMBERS: it keeps a growing bank of motifs (its own best answers + salient contours lifted from his playing) and over minutes develops them вАФ transpose-into-key / augment / diminish / fragment / invert / sequence вАФ so minute 5 is a reworking of minute 1, not fresh improvisation?** This is the lab's **first true cycle-2 of `770-answering-room`** (whose agent had **zero** long-form memory вАФ every answer improvised fresh and forgotten), the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** ("the depth ceiling collapsed 4вЖТ1; RETURN AND EXTEND 770 to a real 4/5 вАФ let the agent accrete a motif over minutes so minute 5 вЙ† minute 1"). **Listener** (`listener.ts`): FFTвЖТ12-bin chroma вЖТ 24-template major/minor triad fit + tension, energy/spectral-flux, a phrase-gap state machine; **new for cycle-2** вАФ it samples his dominant pitch-class ~9√Ч/s and freezes a **key-independent degree-step contour** at each phrase end so the agent can *lift his gesture*. **Agent + memory engine** (`agent.ts`): a warm retuning pad under his chord + a sparse FM-bell answer that fires **only in his gaps**, PLUS the **Adaptive Phrase Bank** вАФ motifs stored **symbolically** as `{degrees, durs}` (scale-degree steps + relative durations, key-independent so replayable in any later key), entering the bank two ways (the agent banks its own good answers; it lifts his contours); a global **memory pressure** rises over minutes (~150s constant, scaled by a slider) so early gaps get short fresh inventions and later gaps increasingly **recall** a banked motif and apply a classical development (transpose/augment/diminish/fragment/invert/sequence); a weighted pick favours under-used motifs; bank caps at 10. **Visual** (`page.tsx`): a restrained warm DOM/CSS hearth (two facing glows вАФ *him* breathing with his energy, *the answer* lit only while answering вАФ a faint duet thread, the detected chord name shown large) PLUS a small `<canvas>` **memory shelf** вАФ each banked motif a glowing contour **sparkline** (amber = his lifted gestures, rose = the agent's own answers) that **flares on recall** with reuse-count dots beneath, so the long-form accretion is *legible*. Two sliders: **company** (shyвЖФtalkative) + **memory** (inventвЖФrecall). **Graceful degradation:** no recording fetch вЖТ an offline `OfflineAudioContext` ~16s warm lyrical fallback plays with an honest emerald "synthesized fallback" badge вАФ the room is never silent and runs fully offline. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (read-only GET to the existing `/api/audio/[id]`, nothing recorded/sent); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **4/5** (#1 **first long-form symbolic motif-memory agent** вАФ grep-0√Ч, lab-thin long-form-stateful register ¬Ј #4 **multi-cycle** вАФ explicit cycle-2 of 770 with a cycle-3 plan in the README ¬Ј #3 named refs [**CHI 2026 "A Design Space for Live Music Agents"** arXiv 2602.05064 вАФ its "Adaptation" axis names sustained motif development as an *uncoded gap*; its **Adaptive Phrase Bank** is the seed ¬Ј **MusicWeaver** arXiv 2509.21714 вАФ **Motif Memory Retrieval (MMR)** ¬Ј **Yin-Yang** arXiv 2501.17759 вАФ corruption-refinement motif variation ¬Ј **Christopher Raphael, *Music Plus One*** ¬Ј 770 lineage] ¬Ј #5 RESEARCH ¬І503 today). The directest answer to the jury's #1 headline (the depth ceiling that collapsed 4вЖТ1) вАФ the window's first new ceiling build. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`815-accreting-room`** (the textural-memory sibling вАФ every agent phrase leaves a sustained ghost-layer residue that thickens the room into an Eno tapestry over minutes; de-selected for sitting close to last cycle's 808 sustain-accretion) as **IDEAS ¬І503**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.1min` вЖТ Linting and checking validity of types вЬУ вЖТ Collecting page data вЖТ all code gates passed**; **814 folder grep-clean** of the log вАФ zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; the 814 builder independently got a **full exit-0 build, 541/541 static pages**); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, fails identically on pristine main, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the agent's recalls audibly read as "it's quoting and varying its own earlier phrase" vs. generic answering, and whether the memory shelf reads at a glance (the always-on pad + synthesized fallback guarantee a sounding glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/814-remembering-room/README.md`

## Cycle 502 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons](/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons)** вАФ Body Ribbons рЯОАрЯХЇ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 502. **For**: kids (4+) / whole-body play ¬Ј **body-tracking input** (MediaPipe Pose вАФ the JURY's most-starved INPUT register, body/camera went **4√ЧвЖТ0√Ч**; off the banned touch) ¬Ј **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1√Ч surface вАФ deliberately off **both** the banned Canvas2D **and** the **three.js 3√Ч-in-a-row monoculture** 799вЖТ803вЖТ805) ¬Ј **full-body UPIC gestureвЖТpitch-score** technique (rests his recording) ¬Ј **calm-playful warm-glow vibe** (not bright-active). **What if a 4-year-old's whole BODY is a continuous musical score вАФ they wave their arms and dance, and their moving hands draw glowing ribbons across the screen that sing as they move, the way Xenakis's UPIC turned a child's drawing into music?** **MediaPipe Pose** (33 landmarks, lite model, runtime CDN import via `webpackIgnore` вАФ never bundled) tracks the body; the two **wrists** are the instruments. **Wrist height вЖТ pitch** (C-major-pentatonic, 2 octaves, snapped so there are **no wrong notes**); **speed of movement вЖТ loudness + ribbon brightness** (hold still and the note softly sustains, then fades); **horizontal position вЖТ timbre** (vibrato depth); **nose вЖТ a soft shimmer voice**; **both arms raised high вЖТ a gentle gold sparkle chord**. Each wrist continuously emits a **glowing SVG ribbon trail** in its own warm color (left = amber/gold, right = rose/violet) вАФ Catmull-Rom-smoothed cubic paths, a 2-pass gaussian-glow + bright-core render, age-faded over ~7s so the screen accretes and breathes (never a hard loop). The lab's **first full-body UPIC instrument**; the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body input 4√ЧвЖТ0√Ч, the single most-starved register) and **#5** (the jury named "the full-body version of 781's UPIC idea is sitting unbuilt in your own research log"). **Kid-safe audio:** `master вЙ§0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7000 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on C2+G2 sine drone pad; triangle voices with vibrato LFO, 80ms portamento, soft attacks / 1вАУ3s releases; pentatonic so nothing is "wrong". **Privacy + safety:** camera frames are analysis-only вАФ **never recorded, uploaded, or sent**; iOS gesture-gated `AudioContext` + `getUserMedia({video})` both inside the first Start tap (вЙ•72px). **Graceful degradation:** MediaPipe loads in the background while a **ghost-body auto-demo** (`makeGhostBody`) dances + sounds hands-free within ~2s; **camera-denied вЖТ the ghost keeps playing** + a `text-rose-300` notice вАФ a sounding, drawing screen with no permissions. Full teardown (rAF + **stop camera tracks** + `landmarker.close()` + node disconnect + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [MediaPipe Pose tracking + UPIC yвЖТpentatonic mapping + dual-wrist polyphonic synth w/ vibrato/drone/shimmer + speedвЖТloudness + multi-pass SVG glow-ribbon render] + #3 named refs [**Iannis Xenakis вАФ UPIC** 1977 ¬Ј **¬°Otro!** IAIA Digital Dome premiere Apr-2026 (Tavarez/Trujillo, real-time movementвЖТsonification) ¬Ј **Frid et al.** *Interactive Sonification of Spontaneous Movement of Children* Frontiers 2016] + soft-#5 RESEARCH ¬І502 today). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`812-kids-breath-bubbles`** (raw WebGL2 ¬Ј blowвЖТaccreting glow-bubble cloud that pops in pentatonic chimes/chords) + **`813-kids-sky-lullaby`** (SVG/DOM ¬Ј live Open-Meteo sky вЖТ Eno-style moon-aware dusk lullaby, tilt-stirred) as **IDEAS ¬І502**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 101s` вЖТ Collecting page data вЖТ all code gates passed**; **811 folder grep-clean** after trimming one unused eslint-disable directive; `npx next lint` on the folder вЖТ "No ESLint warnings or errors"; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT camera/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by eye/ear: whether the ribbon visibly tracks a child's arm height and reads as "I raised my arm and it sang higher" (the always-on pad + ghost-body fallback guarantee a sounding, drawing glance regardless). Builder-flagged: per-frame Pose inference may jank on old iPads (lite model + ghost fallback mitigate).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons/README.md`

## Cycle 501 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 resonator engines, shipped 1

- **[/dream/808-sympathetic-strings](/dream/808-sympathetic-strings)** вАФ Sympathetic Strings рЯОїрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 501. **For**: adults / live performance / intimate ¬Ј **mic / live-audio input** (off the jury-banned touch) ¬Ј **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1√Ч surface вАФ deliberately off the **three.js 3√Ч-in-a-row monoculture** 799вЖТ803вЖТ805 AND the banned Canvas2D) ¬Ј **Karplus-Strong tuned-delay-line sympathetic resonator bank** technique (rests his recording; distinct from `803`'s modal-bandpass banks) ¬Ј **dark / warm / nocturnal vibe** (not bright-active kids). **What if you play or sing into your mic and exactly the right strings ring back вАФ your sound waking an illusory bank of tuned strings that vibrate sympathetically, the way a grand piano's strings hum when you hold the sustain pedal?** 48 tuned strings, each a **real Karplus-Strong tuned delay line** (`L = sampleRate / freq`, one-pole lowpass loop filter, feedback just under 1) running in an **AudioWorklet loaded from a Blob URL** (no `/public` file). The live mic feeds all 48 delay lines; an `AnalyserNode` FFT scales each string's excitation gain by how much spectral energy sits at its pitch вАФ so strings tuned to what you play ring, the rest stay quiet (continuous sympathetic excitation, not discrete strikes). A **mode selector** (homage to the **Electronic Audio Experiments *Prismatic Wall*** sympathetic-string pedal) retunes the bank live across **Chromatic / Stacked Fifths / Overtone Series**. **Sustain-pedal physics:** spacebar or on-screen hold drives feedback **0.92 (fast damp) вЖФ 0.997 (near-lossless)**, so with the pedal held the bank **accretes a shimmering bed audibly fuller at minute 3 than second 10** (real delay-line state вАФ the jury's depth-ceiling ask). **SVG visualization:** 48 vertical strings, each string's glow/stroke-width/wobble driven imperatively in `requestAnimationFrame` from the worklet's ~15 fps per-string RMS level reports (`port.postMessage`), `feGaussianBlur` glow, lowвЖТhigh amberвЖТvioletвЖТblue hue map. The lab's **first mic-excited sympathetic-string instrument** and **first Karplus-Strong-as-shipped** (the banked `802-body-aviary` KS forest never shipped). **Audio safety:** mic source **never** routed to `destination` (no howl), worklet feedback hard-clamped вЙ§0.999, `DynamicsCompressor` (20:1, вИТ18 dB) as limiter. **Graceful degradation:** mic-deny вЖТ an autonomous **ghost exciter** plucks quasi-chord groups so it rings + sounds within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; click/tap any string to pluck it directly; no-WebAudio вЖТ friendly rose notice. Full teardown (rAF + worklet + mic tracks + AnalyserNode + intervals + `AudioContext.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, mic stays on-device, nothing recorded/sent); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [mic FFT analysis + KS tuned-delay-line worklet resonator bank + per-string spectral excitation gating + sustain-pedal feedback accretion + SVG string-field render] + #3 named refs [**EAE *Prismatic Wall*** sympathetic string resonator 2026 ¬Ј **Karplus-Strong / JaffeвАУSmith** CMJ 1983 ¬Ј sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore ¬Ј Henry Cowell string-piano] + soft-#1 mic-excited KS sympathetic bank is grep-0√Ч + soft-#5 RESEARCH ¬І501). Piano-native + live-performance-fit (Karel priority #3 вАФ point a mic at his real piano and the strings answer). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-resonator-engine fire; banked **`809-sympathetic-modes`** (FFT-gated high-Q bandpass bank вАФ lost for rhyming with `803`'s modal banks) + **`810-sympathetic-comb`** (native feedback-comb bank вАФ most robust, least KS-faithful; its per-comb AnalyserNode level tap worth folding into 808) as **IDEAS ¬І501**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 102s` вЖТ Collecting page data вЖТ all code gates passed**; 808 folder fully grep-clean of the log вАФ **zero warnings/errors** after fixing one TS 5.7 `Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer>` typing + trimming one unused var/dep; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether sung/played pitches visibly + audibly wake their matching strings vs. a diffuse wash, and whether the pedal-held bed accretes musically rather than muddying (the always-seeded strings + ghost exciter + compressor guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/808-sympathetic-strings/README.md`

## Cycle 500 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/805-kids-snow-piano](/dream/805-kids-snow-piano)** вАФ Snow Piano / Snow-Globe Music Box вЭДпЄПрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 500. **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **device-tilt / orientation input** (off the banned touch-primary; love-aligned `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП) ¬Ј **three.js WebGL output** (off the 10√Ч-banned Canvas2D; the snow globe genuinely needs 3D вАФ jury "pick the renderer the concept needs") ¬Ј **his-REAL-piano-as-physics-triggered-music-box technique** (off the banned conductor/follower/analyzer-of-his-recording; NOT a grain cloud) ¬Ј **calm wintery night-blue vibe** (not bright-active, not dark-void). **What if a 4-year-old tilts the tablet like a snow globe вАФ and Karel's REAL recorded "Welcome Home" piano pours out as glowing snow that chimes when it lands?** A 3D glass globe holds ~220 additive glowing motes (`THREE.Points`); **device-orientation tilt** is gravity (gammaвЖТx, betaвЖТdownward bias), so the motes slide and fall, and when one settles on one of **5 glowing chime rails** it plays a fresh random **0.25вАУ0.5s Hann-windowed slice of his real piano** (`AudioBufferSourceNode` + `playbackRate` вЖТ the rail's C-major-pentatonic tone) before dissolving to sparkles and respawning up top вАФ infinite calm play, no score/fail/timer. This is the lab's **2nd-ever kids piece on Karel's real recording** (only `743` before it) and the direct answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #3** ("his recording on the kids side is 1√Ч вАФ use it a genuinely-NEW way, or rest it"): a physics-driven **music box**, not the banned conductor/analyzer, not a continuous grain cloud. Born from this cycle's **RESEARCH ¬І500** dive вАФ **LEGO SMART Play (2026)**, the screen-free brick that turns "motion through the air" into sound + light, validating motionвЖТsound+light as the live very-young-child register. Triple love-aligned (`83`вЭ§пЄП tilt ¬Ј `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП/`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП his piano ¬Ј `166-kids-lantern`вЭ§пЄП/`130`вЭ§пЄП/`262`вЭ§пЄП glow); tied to Karel's published **"Snowflake"** journey. Kid-safe `master gain 0.28 вЖТ lowpass 6800 вЖТ comp(вИТ10/20:1)`, per-chime peak 0.22 / 20ms soft attack / 12ms rate-limit (a flurry can't stack loud), always-on C2+G2 pad, pentatonic (nothing "wrong"), вЙ•64px Start, iOS gesture-gated AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both in the first tap. **Graceful degradation:** `fetchPianoBuffer` null (guaranteed in the no-network sandbox) вЖТ synthesized celesta/bell buffer so it always sounds + `text-rose-300` notice; no device-orientation вЖТ drag-to-tilt + always-on auto-drift lands/chimes hands-free within ~2s; no WebGL вЖТ friendly notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()`/`forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (reads only the public GET `/api/audio/:id`); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **2вАУ3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [device-orientation physics + real-recording windowed slice-player + three.js particle-globe render + chime-rail collision scheduler] + #3 named refs [music-box/snow-globe lineage ¬Ј Karel's *Snowflake* journey ¬Ј loved `227`вЭ§пЄП/`163`вЭ§пЄП his-piano lineage] + soft-#5 RESEARCH ¬І500 LEGO SMART Play 2026). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`806-kids-sky-lullaby`** в≠Р (SVG/DOM ¬Ј live Open-Meteo sky вЖТ Eno-style dusk lullaby, moon-aware, tilt-stirred вАФ **RESURRECT FIRST**, the renderer-diverse pick) + **`807-kids-breath-bubbles`** (raw WebGL2 ¬Ј blowвЖТaccreting glow-bubble cloud that pops in pentatonic chimes) as **IDEAS ¬І500**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вЖТ all code gates passed, reached "Collecting page data"; 805 folder grep-clean вАФ zero `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helpers/api-route; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); **NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 805 moved aside fails identically this cycle; Vercel deploys normally**); unverified by ear/eye: whether real-device tilt lands motes at a satisfying chime rate and whether windowed slices of his recording read as warm bell chimes vs ragged fragments (the always-on pad + auto-drift + fallback bell guarantee a sounding, drifting glance regardless).
