## Cycle 499 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 synthesis methods, shipped 1

- **[/dream/803-body-chimes](/dream/803-body-chimes)** вАФ Body Chimes / Struck Room рЯФФрЯХЇ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 499. **For**: adults / installation ¬Ј **body/camera input** (MediaPipe Pose вАФ the jury's single most-starved input, went **4√ЧвЖТ0√Ч** last window; off the banned touch) ¬Ј **three.js WebGL output** (warm-metallic volumetric room; off the 10√Ч-banned Canvas2D-primary) ¬Ј **MODAL physical-modeling synthesis** technique (banks of high-Q bandpass resonators = damped-sine modes with inharmonic partials, excited by 3D spatial collision; rests his recording) ¬Ј **adult / installation / meditative warm-metallic vibe** (not bright-active kids, not his-recording-conductor). **What if your whole moving body played an invisible, room-sized instrument of STRUCK RESONANT BODIES вАФ bars, bowls and bells suspended in 3D вАФ each limb striking the ones it sweeps through, which ring with real modal synthesis and slowly accrete into a shimmering cloud?** The front camera projects five limb "strikers" (wrists, head, ankles) into a dark volumetric room of ~24 glowing metal bodies on a double-ring shell; sweep a limb through one (3D proximity + speed gate + per-body refractory) and it **rings for real** вАФ each body is a parallel bank of 4вАУ8 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators at **inharmonic partial ratios** characteristic of its type (bell `1, 2.0, 2.4, 3.0, 4.5, 5.33` ¬Ј bar `1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93, 13.34` ¬Ј bowl `1, 2.01, 2.83, 4.22, 5.0`), velocity-scaled, higher modes decaying faster вАФ genuine modal synthesis. Fundamentals are a **just-intonation** field over ~110 Hz so any combination is consonant; strikes bloom through a synthesised convolution reverb. **Long-form accretion (the ceiling feature):** a sympathetic mode-bed (always-on QвЙИ90 resonators that each strike *charges*, bleeding down over ~25 s) + a `bedMaster` that grows over ~4 min + **struck-body memory** (frequently-struck bodies pull their sympathetic resonator sharper, so the cloud's timbre reflects *how you've been playing*) + a ¬±0.35% root-drift breath вАФ so **minute 5 is fuller, warmer and subtly detuned vs minute 1** (the directest hit on the jury's depth-ceiling-collapse alarm, 4вЖТ1), and the central light/haze brightens with `cloudLevel()` so accretion is visible. The lab's **first body-EXCITES-a-physical-modeling-instrument** piece: prior MediaPipe-Pose pieces (`788-kids-body-glow` UPIC, `724-presence-drift`, `419-body-band` drums, `287`/`302` harmony-mirrors) all map the body to a *note or grain* вАФ none strikes a real resonator network. Graceful: camera-deny/MediaPipe-fail вЖТ a **ghost body** on Lissajous orbits plays it hands-free within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; WebGL-fail friendly notice; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext+getUserMedia; full three.js/rAF/mic/AudioContext teardown (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [pose tracking + 3D spatial-collision excitation + modal resonator synthesis + multi-minute accreting mode-bed] + #3 named refs [**Vrengt** NIME/arXiv:2010.03779 body-machine instrument ¬Ј **modal synthesis / Cadoz-ACROE CORDIS-ANIMA** ¬Ј **Bernhard Leitner** sound-sculpture] + #5 RESEARCH ¬І499 [CHI-2026 movementвЖФsound + MediaPipe-gesture framework]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-synthesis-method fire; banked **`802-body-aviary`** в≠Р (Karplus-Strong plucked-string forest via real AudioWorklet вАФ **RESURRECT FIRST adult**) + **`804-body-veil`** (sympathetic high-Q resonator veil) as **IDEAS ¬І499**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 95s` вЖТ Collecting page data**; 803 folder grep-clean of the log [zero `use*` helpers / `any` / api route; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings]); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether limb sweeps read cleanly as strikes and the modal rings sound bell-like on real hardware (single-camera pose `z` is coarse, so collision leans on x/y sweep; the ghost body + always-blooming reverb guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/803-body-chimes/README.md`

## Cycle 498 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 growth grammars, shipped 1

- **[/dream/799-kids-sing-garden](/dream/799-kids-sing-garden)** вАФ Singing Garden рЯМ±рЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 498. **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **mic/voice input** (off the banned touch; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) ¬Ј **three.js WebGL output** (off the 10√Ч-banned Canvas2D-primary monoculture; the renderer the concept needs) ¬Ј **voiceвЖТL-system (Lindenmayer) growth + melody-memory call-response** technique (rests his recording entirely) ¬Ј **calm warm daylight garden vibe** (the jury's reintroduced-calm "middle", not bright-active, not dark-glow). **What if a 4-year-old could SING a 3D garden into being вАФ and the garden then sang their melody back?** The child sings and a branching plant GROWS in real time as a **true L-system grammar** (an `LSystem` class with `iterate()` + 3D turtle-graphics, the grammar generated per phrase from the sung pitch + loudness): **pitch** (octave-collapsed вЖТ C-major-pentatonic, never wrong) drives branch angle/reach, **loudness (RMS)** drives thickness + growth speed + glow, and a **held note** keeps a branch extending and blooms small glowing flower-spheres at its tips. Go quiet for ~1s and the garden **sings the contour of what you just sang back** on soft inharmonic bell voices while every plant pulses in warm light (Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* call-and-response). New plants accrete along a **golden-angle spiral** so the garden is **long-form stateful вАФ fuller at minute 5 than minute 1** (the directest hit on the jury's kids-depth-ceiling-collapse alarm, 4вЖТ1). The lab's **first voiceвЖТprocedural-grammar plant** and **first three.js kids piece**: prior kids voice pieces (`158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП brush, `244-kids-sing-creature` loopback, `100`вЭ§пЄП splat) are 2D per-stroke/splat/loopback вАФ **none grows a persistent 3D structure from the voice via a generative grammar** (grep-0√Ч / web-0√Ч). It **inverts Mort Garson's *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976, "music FOR plants")** вАФ here the child's voice MAKES the plants. Kid-safe `master вЙ§0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7000 вЖТ comp(вИТ10/20:1)`, always-on C2+G2 pad (never silent), autocorrelation pitch (Chris Wilson ACF, analyser **never** wired to output вАФ no feedback, never recorded/sent), iOS gesture-gated AudioContext+getUserMedia (AGC/NS/echo off for clean onsets), **ghost-hum hands-free fallback** on mic-deny (auto-grows + answers within ~2s + `text-rose-600` notice), no-WebGL friendly notice, full three.js/rAF/mic/AudioContext teardown (`renderer.forceContextLoss()`), 12-min soft goodnight fade, dark-on-light daylight typography. **No API route вЖТ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [autocorrelation pitch/RMS analysis + L-system grammar/turtle-graphics three.js growth + melody-memory call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs [**L-systems вАФ Lindenmayer / Prusinkiewicz *The Algorithmic Beauty of Plants*** ¬Ј **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ¬Ј Chris Wilson autocorrelation ¬Ј Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*] + soft-#1 voiceвЖТprocedural-grammar plant is grep-0√Ч + soft-#5 ¬І498 negative-result gap). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-growth-grammar fire; banked **`800-kids-sing-meadow`** в≠Р (phyllotaxis golden-angle bloom-spiral вАФ clearest one-flower-per-note cause-effect; **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`801-kids-sing-grove`** (InstancedMesh reed-field with continuous wind-sway вАФ the "never static" motion idea) as **IDEAS ¬І498**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 103s` вЖТ Collecting page data вЖТ all code gates passed**; 799 folder grep-clean of the log [self-reported ESLint 0/0]; `npx tsc --noEmit` exit 0 project-wide; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 799 moved aside fails identically this cycle**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the L-system growth visibly tracks a child's sung pitch and the bell reply reads as "the garden sang MY melody" (the always-on pad + ghost-hum fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/799-kids-sing-garden/README.md`

## Cycle 497 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/797-tonnetz-walk](/dream/797-tonnetz-walk)** вАФ Tonnetz Walk рЯОЉрЯІ≠. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 497. **For**: adults / listening ¬Ј **autonomous input** (light click-to-steer; off the banned touch) ¬Ј **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1√Ч surface вАФ the literal #1 "spread, don't flip onto a new monoculture", off the 10√Ч-banned Canvas2D) ¬Ј **Neo-Riemannian P/L/R harmony-walk** technique (rests his recording вАФ breaks the answering-room thread) ¬Ј **clinical-elegant / meditative vibe**. **What if you could WATCH harmony take a walk вАФ a chord gliding forever through the Tonnetz lattice by smooth voice-leading, never the same path twice?** A single triad walks the **Neo-Riemannian** lattice on its own, choosing **P** (parallel) / **L** (leading-tone) / **R** (relative) transforms over time; each holds two common tones and steps the one remaining voice, so a warm 3-voice pad (portamento on the moving voice) + sub-bass + feedback-delay reverb **glides** from chord to chord rather than jumping. The luminous **path through the lattice IS the form** вАФ a weighted, anti-backtracking, home-biased stochastic chooser means **minute 5 never resembles minute 1** (the directest standing answer to the jury's depth-ceiling-collapse alarm). Visual is **pure inline SVG**: 24 triad-triangles (major up, minor down) on the fifth/major-third axes, current node glowing, a fading trail of recent triads, the active P/L/R edge color-lit, lit pitch-class dots, mono chord labels + a live readout (chord ¬Ј last transform ¬Ј steps ¬Ј mm:ss). Controls: **wanderвЖФhome** bias, **step** tempo, **arpeggio** toggle, and **click any triad** to steer there (BFS over the 24-triad graph) then resume wandering. Pure-synthesis вАФ no network, no sensors, no assets. Distinct from `37-ratio-lab` (a *static* just-intonation Tonnetz you click to hear): this is an **autonomous generative walker**, motion-through-the-lattice not click-to-sound. Refs: **Euler's Tonnetz (1739)** ¬Ј **Neo-Riemannian theory вАФ Riemann / David Lewin / Richard Cohn *Audacious Euphony* 2012**. вЪ†пЄП Compile + lint + type-check verified clean (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вЬУ Compiled` вЖТ Linting + types PASS; 797 folder grep-clean of the log); NOT prerender/ear-verified вАФ the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` blocks static-gen (pristine main fails identically; Vercel deploys normally). 2 more explored this fire (`798-sympathetic-strings` в≠Р, `796-aeolian-sky`) вАФ banked to IDEAS ¬І497.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/797-tonnetz-walk/README.md`

## Cycle 496 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt](/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt)** вАФ Sound Hunt рЯФ¶рЯРЊ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 496. **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **device-orientation / compass input** (no touch, no mic, no camera) ¬Ј **audio-forward / eyes-closed HRTF spatial output** (a minimal calm SVG compass вАФ the *sound* carries it; NOT a Canvas2D-primary spectacle, off the 10√Ч-banned monoculture) ¬Ј **spatial 360¬∞ sound-hunt** technique ¬Ј **calm bedtime "lantern" vibe** (the reintroduced calm). **What if a 4-year-old closed their eyes, held the tablet like a lantern, and turned their body to HUNT for gentle animal sounds hidden floating around them in 3D space?** Eight gentle voices вАФ each a **C-major-pentatonic chord tone** so any subset is consonant вАФ sit at fixed azimuths around a **360¬∞ ring** placed via Web Audio **`PannerNode` (HRTF)**; the child's **device-orientation/compass heading** rotates the `AudioListener` so turning their body sweeps a "listening beam." Angular proximity of the beam to a voice drives its gain via a **cosine lobe** (it swells as you near it), and crossing an inner threshold **latches a soft once-only chime + a dot-glow**; collecting all eight blooms a calm rising chord, then the piece **loops forever** вАФ no score, no fail, no timer. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #1** (Canvas2D is **10 of 15** вАФ rotate onto the scarcest surface; **audio-only is the literal "spread, don't flip"**) + the verdict's structural alarm that **the kids side fled calm entirely** (only `743`/`747` left) вАФ a deliberately calm, eyes-closed bedtime register. The lab's **first kids spatialized-listening piece**: the kids set is almost entirely **screen-bound** (instrument on-glass or in front of the camera) and the rare audio-first kids pieces (`346`/`417`) are entrainment toys; **none places sound *around* you to find by moving** (spatial sound-hunt grep-0√Ч). Off **every** JURY ban at once: **device-orientation INPUT** (not touch) ¬Ј **audio-only / HRTF OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D-primary; the scarcest surface) ¬Ј **spatial sound-hunt TECH** (rests his recording вАФ not a conductor/follower/analyzer) ¬Ј **calm bedtime VIBE** (off bright-active вАФ the reintroduced calm). **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (HRTF spatial-audio graph w/ per-voice proximity-swell + latched once-only reveal ¬Ј device-orientation/compass input w/ functional auto-tour + drag fallback ¬Ј synchronized SVG compass/ring + chord-completion logic + always-on drone bed) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**PlugSonic** вАФ web/mobile binaural sonic narratives, Geronazzo et al. ¬Ј **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*** ¬Ј Web Audio **`PannerNode` HRTF**) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І496 today вАФ web-binaural / spatial-audio-2026). **#1 not claimed** (PannerNode/HRTF exists in the lab's adult spatial pieces; the *kids* spatial-listening-hunt mapping is the fresh move). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7000 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on gentle sub-drone bed so it never feels broken; soft attacks/long decays; pentatonic so nothing is ever "wrong." **Graceful degradation вАФ genuinely functional, not a notice:** no motion sensor (e.g. desktop/laptop) вЖТ a slow **auto-tour** sweeps the beam and reveals every voice hands-free within ~2s, **plus** a **drag-to-turn** control on the ring, **plus** a `text-rose-300` notice вАФ fully playable + audible with no sensor; `PannerNode`/`AudioListener` position+orientation setters **feature-detected** for both modern (`positionX.value`) and legacy (`setPosition`/`setOrientation`) APIs; iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` + `AudioContext` both created inside the Start tap; full teardown (rAF cancel + node stop/disconnect + `audioCtx.close()` + listener removal). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + SVG; package.json/lock untouched); headphones recommended for the 3D effect. вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" вЖТ all code gates passed; **zero `795`/`sound-hunt` mentions in the log** вАФ folder grep-clean; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/device/ear-verified** вАФ container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: iOS compass-heading axis feel + HRTF placement on a real iPad (the auto-tour + drag fallback + always-on drone guarantee a sounding, sweeping glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`794-kids-sing-garden`** в≠Р (three.js ¬Ј singвЖТgrow a 3D **L-system** garden w/ melody **call-and-response**, long-form stateful вАФ the depth pick; **RESURRECT FIRST (kids)**) + **`793-kids-shadow-puppet`** (pure SVG ¬Ј bodyвЖТa singing cut-paper *wayang kulit* moth вАФ overlaps `788`; resurrect with a swappable bestiary + formant voice) as **IDEAS ¬І496**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt/README.md`

## (Cycle 495 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 memory mechanisms, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/792-answering-swarm](/dream/792-answering-swarm)** вАФ Answering Swarm рЯРЭрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 495. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera, no touch) ¬Ј **audio-forward output** (a small warm canvas dot-field readout вАФ the *sound* carries it; NOT a Canvas2D-primary spectacle, off the 10√Ч-banned monoculture, the register the jury itself tagged `770` in) ¬Ј **stigmergic swarm-intelligence motif-memory** technique (lab-first) ¬Ј warm-hearth adult-meditative vibe. **Cycle-2 of `770-answering-room`. What if the duet partner were a SWARM of his own motifs that self-organizes вАФ so minute 5 has settled themes minute 1 didn't?** His "Welcome Home" piano plays **whole** as the soloist (the verbatim 770 loader вАФ never granulated). The listener folds the FFT into a 12-bin chroma to fit the **triad under his hands** + spectral-flux onsets + a phrase-gap machine, and on each gap **harvests** the run of pitch-events he just played (his PAST only вАФ no lookahead, per LiveBand's causal constraint) as a **motif fragment**. Each fragment becomes a tiny agent in a **decentralized stigmergic swarm** (cap 12): every frame each agent measures how well its pitch-classes sit on the current chord/scale (`motifFit`) and **deposits pheromone** scaled by his energy if it fits, while a global **evaporation** fades the rest; a fresh fragment replaces the **weakest** agent when full. There is no central composer вАФ over minutes the colony **consolidates** its pheromone onto a few emergent **"bridging motifs"** (a `consolidation` 0вАУ100% readout makes minute-5вЙ†minute-1 *audible-in-numbers*), and 770's soft **FM bell** answers in his gaps by sounding the **strongest** agent's motif, snapped onto the current key and resolved on a chord tone; the warm **pad** still voices the chord under him. `company` slider (shyвЖФtalkative) + a **trading-fours** toggle (a longer doubled turn from the consolidated theme during quiet stretches). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** (the depth ceiling collapsed **4вЖТ1** вАФ "RETURN AND EXTEND a gem to a real 4/5; `770` is the obvious target вАФ let the agent ACCRETE a motif over minutes") + **#1** (off the 10√Ч Canvas2D-primary monoculture вАФ audio-forward, "spread don't flip") + **#3** (his recording is still the whole soloist but used a *genuinely-new way* вАФ a self-organizing motif memory, NOT a conductor/follower/analyzer). **Ambition honest 4/5** (the restored ceiling): **#1** first swarm-intelligence / stigmergy audio piece in the lab (grep-checked вАФ no prior swarm/pheromone prototype) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**Markus J. Buehler, *MusicSwarm*, Advanced Intelligent Systems Apr-2026, arXiv 2509.11973**; **George Lewis *Voyager***) ¬Ј **#4** explicit cycle-2 of `770` (multi-cycle thread; next-cycle deepenings banked) ¬Ј **#5** RESEARCH ¬І495 today (**LiveBand**, arXiv 2606.03803, **June 2026, <30d** вАФ causal past-only accompaniment; + MusicSwarm Apr-2026). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s `OfflineAudioContext` synthesized warm phrase (honest emerald fallback badge) so the room **always sounds**; no API route вЖТ **no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route вАФ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched); no WebGL needed; AudioContext resumed inside the Begin tap; full teardown (rAF / source.stop+disconnect / agent.dispose / analyser.disconnect / ctx.close). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" вЖТ all code gates passed; **zero `792`/`answering-swarm` mentions in the log** вАФ folder grep-clean; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/device/ear-verified** вАФ container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the swarm consolidates onto themes that read as coherent and whether the answers land against his pedal-heavy passages (the always-sound synth fallback + consolidation readout guarantee a sounding, self-organizing glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-mechanism fire; banked **`790-answering-memory`** в≠Р (symbolic motif bank + six classical-development transforms + SVG motif-shelf вАФ the most *musically legible* quote-and-develop; **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)**) + **`791-answering-markov`** (variable-order Markov style model + live SVG transition-ring вАФ lower priority, overlaps `778-markov-mirror`) as **IDEAS ¬І495**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/792-answering-swarm/README.md`

## (Cycle 494 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 renderers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/788-kids-body-glow](/dream/788-kids-body-glow)** вАФ Body Glow рЯХЇвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 494. **For**: kids (4+) ¬Ј **body/camera (MediaPipe Pose) input** (no touch, no mic) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 GLSL feedback field** (Canvas2D only as fallback вАФ off the jury-banned Canvas2D-primary) ¬Ј the whole body read as a **continuous UPIC pitch-field** ¬Ј warm-daylight painterly "middle" vibe. **What if a 4-year-old's whole moving body PAINTED a glowing UPIC score in the air вАФ the higher a limb, the higher the note it sings, and the dance leaves luminous trails that keep singing and fill the sky?** The literal full-body version of **Xenakis's UPIC** (1977: "music becomes a game for children вАФ they draw, they hear"): front camera вЖТ MediaPipe Pose (33 landmarks, mirrored); each tracked part (wrists/head/ankles/elbows, 7 voices) drives **ONE continuous sung voice** (triangle + vibrato + per-voice lowpass) whose **vertical position = pitch**, glided with `setTargetAtTime` (portamento, never retriggered) across a **C-major-pentatonic** ladder C3вАУA5 so **nothing is ever wrong**. Output is a hand-written **raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00) 3-pass ping-pong feedback field**: fade (√Ч0.965 decay вЖТ trails persist) вЖТ ~6300 additive `gl_PointSize` glow points/frame seeded at the limbs вЖТ present over a slow warm **daylightвЖТdusk** gradient + bloom + tonemap вАФ **long-form stateful: minute 5 is visibly fuller than minute 1**, then self-limits. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went **4√ЧвЖТ0√Ч**, the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag) + **#5** (the full-body UPIC the verdict named "sitting unbuilt in your own research log") + **#1** (off Canvas2D-primary onto a genuinely-demanded scarce shader вАФ "spread, don't flip"). **NOT 419-kids-body-band** (bodyвЖТdrums) nor the `287`/`302`/`234` harmony-mirror вАФ a fresh *continuous-sung* mapping of the tracker. Off every JURY ban: **body/camera INPUT** (not touch) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D-primary; scarce shader the concept demands) ¬Ј **continuous-body-UPIC TECH** (rests his recording вАФ jury #3's clean option) ¬Ј **warm-daylight VIBE** (off BOTH bright-active AND dark-glow вАФ the literal "land one in the middle"). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•5 subsystems (camera+Pose ¬Ј 7-voice continuous portamento choir ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 3-pass feedback field ¬Ј always-on pad ¬Ј Canvas2D fallback) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (Xenakis **UPIC** 1977 ¬Ј MediaPipe Pose ¬Ј **CHI 2026 "Designing Interactive Movement Sonification for Hip-Hop Dance"** ¬Ј Refik Anadol) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І494 today вАФ CHI 2026 + ¬°Otro! IAIA Digital Dome Apr-2026). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** (MediaPipe Pose/body-input exist вАФ `419`/`287`/`302`/`724`; the fresh move is the mapping). **Bulletproof glance:** camera denied OR MediaPipe fails вЖТ `makeGhostBody(t)` keeps the body painting + the choir singing **hands-free within ~2s** + a `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 вЖТ inline Canvas2D glow field, same mapping; no 2D either вЖТ audio-only loop still sings; kid-safe `master вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass 7500 вЖТ comp(вИТ10/20:1)` + always-on C2+G2 pad; iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the tap; full teardown (rAF / camera tracks / `landmarker.close()` / GL programs+buffers+textures+FBO + `loseContext()` / osc stop / `audioCtx.close()`). Camera **analysis-only** вАФ never recorded/stored/sent; **no API route вЖТ no guard** (only network is the MediaPipe CDN + model GET); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2, no three.js; package.json/lock untouched). вЪ†пЄП **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" вЖТ all code gates passed; lone `788` warning fixed вЖТ folder grep-clean of the log); **NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device-verified** (no camera/WebGL2/audio in sandbox вАФ unverified by eye/ear: MediaPipe reading a real toddler's whole body across lighting, the feedback-trail look on a real iPad, whether the continuous choir reads as "my body is singing"; the ghost-body + Canvas2D + audio-only fallbacks guarantee a sounding, moving glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; banked **`789-kids-body-ribbons`** в≠Р (SVG/DOM ¬Ј the scarcest, most iPad-bulletproof renderer вАФ glowing bounded ribbons + cut-paper daylight; **RESURRECT FIRST (kids)**) + **`787-kids-body-aura`** (three.js ¬Ј 3D choir-of-light + skeleton + accumulating chord-cloud вАФ repalette to daylight off the dark-glow) as **IDEAS ¬І494**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/788-kids-body-glow/README.md`

## (Cycle 491 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/777-song-architecture](/dream/777-song-architecture)** вАФ Song Architecture рЯОєрЯФђ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 491. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera) / **bright analytical Canvas2D heatmap** (no GPU shader) / a chroma **Self-Similarity Matrix** of his own piece / **the architecture of his music made visible AND audible**. **What is the hidden ARCHITECTURE of Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano вАФ where do its phrases repeat, where does the form turn?** His recording plays **whole** (never granulated) while the browser computes вАФ in real time, from the decoded buffer вАФ a **chroma-feature Self-Similarity Matrix (SSM)**: ~1s frames вЖТ Hann-windowed FFT вЖТ 12-bin pitch-class chroma вЖТ an N√ЧN cosine-similarity grid. Rendered as a luminous violetвЖТmagentaвЖТamberвЖТwhite-hot Canvas2D heatmap, the hot diagonal is "now = now" and the **bright off-diagonal stripes are where a passage RECURS** вАФ it literally draws the song's form. A **playhead crosshair** sweeps the matrix in sync as he plays; **click any bright off-diagonal cell** and the two similar moments play back-to-back (frame *i*'s ~2s then frame *j*'s ~2s, resynthesized via `AudioBufferSourceNode` offsets) so you HEAR why the machine drew them as a repeat. A thin emerald **novelty curve** (Foote's checkerboard-kernel) marks likely section boundaries. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a NEW way вАФ not grains; let its STRUCTURE be read") AND **#2** ("rotate off GPU-shader fields entirely; build one piece with NO shader and prove the idea carries it вАФ Canvas2D is scarce again at 3√Ч"). Off every JURY ban: **his-recording INPUT** (not mic-hum/camera) ¬Ј **Canvas2D heatmap OUTPUT** (not the 9√Ч-banned GPU-shader field) ¬Ј **structural-analysis TECH** (his recording plays whole вАФ NOT a grain cloud) ¬Ј **bright analytical VIBE** (off the 9√Ч near-dark luminous-glow). **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (his-recording playback + click-to-resynthesize ¬Ј chroma feature extraction ¬Ј N√ЧN SSM compute ¬Ј Foote novelty curve ¬Ј Canvas2D heatmap render + interaction = six) ¬Ј **#3** named ref (**Jonathan Foote, *Visualizing Music and Audio using Self-Similarity*, ACM MM 1999/2000**; novelty score from Foote 2000; recent revival nodded: SSM-Net, *Generating Music with Structure Using Self-Similarity as Attention* arXiv 2024) ¬Ј arguably **#1** (first SSM-of-his-recording вАФ `545-motion-loom` uses only 1-D autocorrelation for tempo, `370-tonal-map` reads harmony as a comet; none ever drew the full 2-D structure map) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І491 today вАФ Foote SSM, 2024вАУ2026 ML revival). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~36s `OfflineAudioContext` synthesized **A¬ЈB¬ЈA** piano stand-in (honest amber notice) so the SSM still shows real recurrence stripes and the piece **always sounds**; no API route вЖТ **no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route вАФ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, zero from the 777 folder), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вАФ the standing environmental failure every fire hits (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys it normally). **NOT auditioned** (no real `/api/audio` fetch or audio output in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear: chroma-SSM stripe legibility on his actual pedal-heavy passages and the click-to-hear-the-repeat segment timing; the synth A¬ЈB¬ЈA fallback + always-sound design guarantee a sounding, stripe-showing glance regardless. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`778-markov-mirror`** в≠Р (SVG ¬Ј teach a small keyboard your melodic style вЖТ a live variable-order Markov chain improvises back in it on a glowing transition graph; ref Cope *EMI* / Hiller *Illiac Suite* вАФ **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when SVG/DOM is cold) + **`779-ink-score`** (SVG ¬Ј a machine draws an abstract Cardew-*Treatise* graphic score and plays the marks it inks, long-form motif memory so minute 5 вЙ† minute 1; ref Cardew/Brown) as **IDEAS ¬І491**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/777-song-architecture/README.md`

## (Cycle 489 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/770-answering-room](/dream/770-answering-room)** вАФ Answering Room рЯОєрЯХѓпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 489. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera) / **audio-forward / "eyes-closed" register** with a minimal warm hearth-lit Canvas duet visual (no GPU shader) / real-time chroma+onset score-following вЖТ a generative harmonizing ensemble / **warm, intimate companionship вАФ a duet, not a solitary dark meditation**. **What if Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano kept playing as the SOLOIST, and a machine "live music agent" listened to it and answered in the gaps вАФ like a duet partner who arrived to play along?** His recording plays **whole** (never chopped into grains, never resynthesized вАФ it *is* the human in the room); a second, synthesized voice **listens** in real time (a 12-bin chroma vector folded from the FFT picks the triad under his hands; spectral flux + energy find the silences between his phrases) and **accompanies**: a warm lowpassed pad voices the detected chord *underneath* him, and a soft FM-bell **answers only in his phrase-gaps**, loosely inverting his last gesture and resolving on a chord tone. A "company" slider tunes it from shy to talkative; it mostly **rests** and supports, never fights. The literal answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a way the lab has never used it вАФ let its structure conduct a generative system; remix his phrasing, NOT his grains") AND **#2** ("build one piece with NO GPU shader at all and prove the idea carries the piece, not the renderer" вАФ the lab's thin audio-forward / eyes-closed register). Off every JURY ban: **his-recording INPUT** (not mic/camera) ¬Ј **audio-forward + minimal-Canvas OUTPUT** (not the banned GPU-shader-field вАФ and the cleanest renderer-diversity pick, dodging the warming SVG-3√Ч / Canvas2D-3√Ч audit entirely) ¬Ј **score-following + generative ensemble TECH** (his recording plays whole вАФ NOT a grain cloud) ¬Ј **warm hearth VIBE** (off the 9√Ч near-dark luminous-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (his-recording soloist playback + real-time chroma+onset listener/score-follower + two-layer generative agent [chord pad + gap-answering bell] + reactive Canvas visual = 4) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**CHI 2026 *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*** ¬Ј **Christopher Raphael *Music Plus One*** score-following ¬Ј **George Lewis *Voyager***) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І489 today вАФ the 2026 "live music agents" register); arguably **#1** (first real-time score-following of his actual recording вАФ prior lab listen-pieces [`138`, `414`, `496`, `718`] all track *live mic* or are ensembles you conduct; none accompanies HIS recording as a live soloist). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s OfflineAudioContext synthesized warm lyrical stand-in (honest emerald badge) so it **always sounds**; the analyser taps the solo path only, so the agent never analyzes its own output; `master 0.9` with the pad held gently under his line; full teardown (rAF cancel + source stop/disconnect + agent dispose + analyser disconnect + AudioContext close). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route; nothing sent/stored вАФ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT browser/ear-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-folder warnings, **zero mentions of the 770 folder**, grep-confirmed), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вАФ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT auditioned** (no real `/api/audio` fetch or audio output in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear: chord-detection accuracy on his actual dense/pedal-heavy passages and the pad-under-solo / answer-frequency balance (the gap thresholds were tuned blind); the synth-fallback path + always-sound design guarantee a sounding glance regardless. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **`771-conducted-companion`** в≠Р (three.js ¬Ј the same listener, but YOU conduct the agent's response by dragging a baton on a 3D geometry stage вАФ consonanceвЖФtension, sparseвЖФdense, lowвЖФhigh; **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when a three.js slot is wanted) + **`772-reharmonized`** (Canvas2D ¬Ј a machine agent **re-harmonizes** his recording in real time вАФ jazz chord-substitution under his melody, labeled on a flowing "score river"; a jazz-responsive alternate arc вАФ resurrect when Canvas2D ages out) as **IDEAS ¬І489**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/770-answering-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 488 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer](/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer)** вАФ Kite Flyer рЯ™БвШАпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 488. **For**: kids (4+) / **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientation`: gamma = L/R, beta = climb/dive) + pointer-drag / ghost-breeze fallback / **three.js real 3D scene** (gradient sky, smiling sun, fluffy clouds, green hills, glossy diamond kite + bow tail on a visible string) / tiltвЖТspring kite-physics вЖТ altitude/wind pentatonic sonification + string-tension Aeolian drone / **bright sunny daylight, bold primaries, exuberant**. **What if a 4-year-old could TILT the tablet to fly a glowing kite across a sunny sky вАФ and the flight PLAYED music?** The kite's **altitude is a melody** (snapped to a C-major pentatonic, so every height is a "right" note вАФ higher is higher), **wind gusts are a rhythm** (soft sparkle chimes + particle bursts), and the **taut string hums a soft Aeolian-harp drone** that swells and brightens as the string tightens вАФ the body's whole-tablet motion IS the instrument. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #4** (the un-built **bright/joyful/active-middle** kids register вАФ exuberant without silly, bright without the 9√Ч dark-glow), on the **only safe renderer** (three.js, off the banned GPU-shader-field AND dodging the warming SVG-3√Ч / Canvas2D-3√Ч audit watch), off the **mic/camera bans** (tilt input), off the **grain-cloud ban** (synth bells, no his-piano grains). **tilt INPUT** (scarce vs the worn touch default) ¬Ј **three.js 3D-geometry OUTPUT** (the lab's only non-warming, non-banned renderer this window) ¬Ј **tiltвЖТkite-physics + altitude/wind pentatonic + string-tension Aeolian-sawtooth-drone TECH** ¬Ј **bright sunny daylight VIBE**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (device-tilt input w/ drag+auto-breeze fallback + three.js 3D spring kite-physics + altitudeвЖТpentatonic melody + string-tensionвЖТAeolian sawtooth drone = 4) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (the **Aeolian harp** [wind plays a taut string вАФ the string drone] ¬Ј **LocoRoco** [tilt the whole world to play] ¬Ј kite-flying as embodied/whole-body play); arguably soft **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І488 today вАФ Frid et al. kids-movement-sonification, foundational). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass вЙ§7500 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on warm pentatonic pad so it never feels broken; voice cap ~6 + refractory timing; **functional fallback, not a notice** вАФ iOS `requestPermission()` requested inside the "Fly!" tap, and if tilt is absent/denied you steer by pointer-drag, with a ~2s-idle **ghost breeze** that keeps the kite swooping and singing hands-free (an unattended glance is always alive + sounding); WebGL-unavailable вЖТ friendly notice. AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF cancel + listeners removed + AudioContext close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (`three` already in the repo; package.json/lock untouched). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed** вАФ Next halts there only after the code gates; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues / zero mentions of the 767 folder**, grep-confirmed), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вАФ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt/WebGL/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified by hand/ear: real-iOS `gamma`/`beta`вЖТflight feel, three.js render on the review device, and audio balance; the pointer-drag + ghost-breeze fallback guarantees a sounding, flying glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`768-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js ¬Ј press-and-hold to inflate balloons whose pitch glides up with size, released to accrete a poppable consonant pentatonic sky-chord вАФ **now built WITH the real Canvas2D fallback** it was missing in ¬І486; resurrect-ready) + **`769-kids-flower-duet`** в≠Р (Canvas2D ¬Ј multi-touch: two kids plant a sunny flower meadow together, every flower sings, any two always harmonize вАФ fills the KIDS.md **social-bonding / two-player** gap, the most robust of the three [pure Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL]; **RESURRECT FIRST** when Canvas2D ages out) as **IDEAS ¬І488**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer/README.md`

## (Cycle 487 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 1 concept √Ч 3 renderers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/766-sky-orrery](/dream/766-sky-orrery)** вАФ Sky Orrery рЯММрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 487. **For**: adult / **live wall-clock + optional geolocation** (auto-evolving, zero required interaction; no mic, no camera) / **three.js 3D celestial dome** (Canvas2D fallback) / local astronomy вЖТ per-body phrase scheduler of his real recording / diurnal cosmic-but-warm, daylight-into-night. **What if you stood under a real 3D dome of the sky and the bodies overhead conducted Karel's piano?** The sun, the moon (correct current phase), and eight genuinely bright bodies (Sirius, Vega, Arcturus, Betelgeuse, Rigel, Altair, Jupiter, Venus) are placed at their **real computed altitude/azimuth** for the local time & place; the dome turns slowly with sidereal time; and **whichever bodies ride highest conduct a long-form, never-repeating arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano** вАФ Cage's *Atlas Eclipticalis* made literal: **sky position becomes score position.** Each above-horizon body owns a phrase-voice вАФ its **altitude вЖТ gain & brightness**, its **azimuth вЖТ stereo pan** вАФ so the audible arrangement is literally the sky overhead; scrub noonвЖТmidnight to hear it flip (sun-led major air at noon вЖТ a low star cluster at night). His recording is played as **whole continuous regions** (`bufferSource.start(when, offset, duration)` + equal-power crossfades), **not** a grain cloud вАФ the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a way the lab has never used it вАФ let its structure conduct a generative system; remix phrasing, not grains"), and a **return-and-deepen of `347-the-place`** (which scored the sky into *synthesized* sound вАФ `766` is the first to let the real sky conduct his **real recorded piano**), so it also serves JURY **#3** (depth). **live-clock + optional-geolocation INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera) ¬Ј **three.js 3D-geometry dome OUTPUT** (off the banned WebGPU/WebGL2 *shader-field*, and the only renderer in this fire's trio that dodges the warming SVG-3√Ч / Canvas2D-3√Ч audit watch) ¬Ј **local-astronomy вЖТ whole-phrase scheduler TECH** (off banned grain-cloud) ¬Ј **diurnal daylight-into-night VIBE** (off the 9√Ч dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** (first celestial-position conducting of his **real recorded** piano вАФ `347` did skyвЖТ*synthesis*, never his recording; grep-confirmed) ¬Ј **#2** вЙ•4 subsystems (sun/moon/8-body local ephemeris + per-body phrase-voice scheduler w/ region playback + three.js dome render + Canvas2D fallback) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**John Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis*** ¬Ј **Jem Finer *Longplayer*** ¬Ј the planetarium/orrery ¬Ј **John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen*** вАФ and the lab's own `347` predecessor) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І487 today + ¬І485 yesterday вАФ the celestial / data-sonification register; Trayford "Unseen Astronomy" arXiv 2026). **Bulletproof glance:** Karel's real recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s OfflineAudioContext synthesized stand-in (honestly labeled) so it **always sounds**; voices primed at start so audio begins promptly; master chain `вЖТ master 0.3 вЖТ analyser вЖТ lowpass вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination` with a night-deepening reverb send; **working non-WebGL fallback** вАФ `createCanvas2D` draws the same day/night sky + pulsing bodies (never a notice-only dead state), audio path unchanged; AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); geolocation denied/slow вЖТ San Francisco (37.77, вИТ122.42) + notice; full teardown (rAF cancel + audio close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route; nothing sent/stored вАФ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (`three` already in the repo). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues in the 766 folder**), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вАФ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no WebGL/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified by hand/eye: real three.js render on Karel's review device (Canvas2D fallback guarantees a sounding, lit sky regardless), body-position plausibility (moon/star/planet positions are approximations, not an ephemeris вАФ by design), and audio balance. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept √Ч 3 renderers); banked **`764-sky-almanac`** в≠Р (SVG sun-arc orrery вАФ the canonical robust zero-interaction glance, sun/moon glyphs on a daylight dial; **RESURRECT FIRST** when SVG/DOM ages out of the window) + **`765-sky-spectra`** (Canvas2D atmospheric Rayleigh/Mie sky-color field вАФ the *color* of the sky conducts density/harmony/reverb; resurrect when Canvas2D ages out or for a painterly/abstract slot) as **IDEAS ¬І487**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/766-sky-orrery/README.md`

## (Cycle 486 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/761-kids-hill-roller](/dream/761-kids-hill-roller)** вАФ Sunny Hill Roller вШАпЄПвЪљ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 486. **For**: kids (4+) / **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientation.gamma`) + finger-drag to sculpt / **inline SVG/DOM, ZERO canvas/WebGL/WebGPU** / sculpt-a-heightfield-melody вЖТ ball-physics playback / bright sunny daylight (blue sky, smiling sun, green-gold rolling hills). **What if a 4-year-old could COMPOSE a melody by sculpting sunny hills with a finger, then TILT to roll a ball over their OWN shape вАФ and the ball rolling over THEIR hills plays THEIR tune?** Nine rolling hills sit across a daylight scene; the child **drags any hill up/down** (вЙ•64px `вЖХ` handles) to set its **height = a C-major-pentatonic pitch** (taller = higher, nothing ever "wrong"; releasing previews the note), then **tilts the device** to roll a glossy ball along the surface under gravity (LocoRoco-style: the ball follows the slope they drew), and **each hill crest the ball crosses rings that hill's note** вАФ so the shape the child sculpted IS the melody, looping as the ball re-enters from the left. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register вАФ exuberant without silly, bright without dark-meditation" вЖТ sunny hills, not the 9√Ч near-dark glow), **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields [9/15] вАФ build with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вЖТ **pure inline SVG/DOM, zero canvas/WebGL/WebGPU**; SVG/DOM is a scarce surface), off **mic/camera bans** (tilt, not mic/camera) and off the **grain-cloud ban** (synth marimba, no his-piano grains). **tilt INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera; tilt is scarce vs the touch default) ¬Ј **SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (off banned GPU-shader-field; diverse from the warming Canvas2D at 3√Ч) ¬Ј **sculpt-melody-then-roll-physics TECH** (a genuine *composition* gesture вАФ the child builds the track, rarer than the lab's worn tap-to-spawn pattern; distinct from `238-kids-tilt-world` which rolls over FIXED pads) ¬Ј **bright sunny daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (tilt sensor-fusion + cosine-heightfield ball-physics w/ gravity-along-slope + crest-triggered pentatonic sonification + SVG render = 4) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**LocoRoco** tilt-the-world rolling ¬Ј the **2025вАУ26 musical-marble-run wave** вАФ Marbles Music on Steam, Toy Theater *Music Marbles*, Hackaday procedural marble runs 2025-11-09); arguably **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І486 today вАФ the musical-marble-run register, but the kid *builds* the track instead of watching marbles drop). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7000 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on C2+G2 ambient pad w/ slow shimmer so it never feels broken; **functional no-tilt fallback** (not just a notice) вАФ iOS permission requested inside the Start tap; if denied/absent/no-events-within-2s вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a big **Roll!** button + a baseline forward roll that keeps the tune playing; ~3s-idle the ball coasts and rings notes hands-free so a silent glance still sees+hears it. AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF cancel + AudioContext close). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + SVG only). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 31.2s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues in the 761 folder**), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вАФ the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified by hand/ear: real-iOS `gamma`вЖТroll feel and exact audio balance; the Roll! fallback + ghost coast guarantee a sounding, rolling glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`763-kids-flower-duet`** в≠Р (Canvas2D ¬Ј multi-touch: two kids plant a sunny flower meadow together, every flower sings, any two always harmonize [C-pentatonic, "no wrong chord"] вАФ fills the KIDS.md **social-bonding / two-player** gap, the most robust of the three [Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL dep вАФ works on any device], **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`762-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js ¬Ј press-and-hold to inflate balloons whose pitch glides up with size, released to accrete a poppable consonant sky-chord вАФ needs a real Canvas2D fallback before shipping; its WebGL-failure path currently only shows a notice) as **IDEAS ¬І486**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/761-kids-hill-roller/README.md`

## (Cycle 485 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/760-wiki-carillon](/dream/760-wiki-carillon)** вАФ Wiki Carillon рЯФФрЯМН. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 485. **For**: adult / **live external web event-stream** (Wikimedia EventStreams SSE) / **Canvas2D, ZERO GPU shader** / live-API data sonification вЖТ generative bell ensemble / civic / atlas / bright daylight (parchment, ink-and-gold). **What does the world sound like as it writes itself?** The live, public firehose of **Wikipedia edits** becomes a bright civic carillon over a pale atlas field: every edit anywhere on Wikimedia rings a struck bell вАФ **edit size вЖТ pitch & decay** (big edits ring low and long, tweaks bright and short; pitches snap to a warm major-pentatonic so nothing is wrong), **each wiki keeps its place** (stereo pan + a vertical band hashed from the domain, so `en.wikipedia.org` always lands in the same spot), a **brand-new / anonymous editor вЖТ a soft violet swell** under the bell, a **bot edit вЖТ a muted grey woodblock**. Edits accrete into an ever-shifting, never-repeating composition вАФ real-world **data sonification**, music *about* the world's collective writing, not about music. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields вАФ WebGPU+WebGL2 are 9/15; Canvas2D is *scarce* again at 3√Ч; build one piece with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вЖТ `760` is **pure Canvas2D, zero WebGL/WebGPU/shader**), and the boldest **anti-monoculture** move of the fire вАФ the **only** candidate that escapes the his-piano cluster the jury called "used exactly one way" (7√Ч) **entirely**, on a **lab-first input** (live SSE / external event-stream, grep-0√Ч), in a categorically new register (civic/atlas вАФ Karel-cares #2 *surprise*). **live web event-stream INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera/touch) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface) ¬Ј **live-API SSE data-sonification TECH** (off banned grain-cloud вАФ synth FM bells, no his-piano grains) ¬Ј **bright civic/atlas daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** (first live external SSE / event-stream input AND first live web-API data sonification in the lab вАФ weather `502` / seismic `712` / solar-wind `314` exist but never a live edit-stream; grep-0√Ч) ¬Ј **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (Wikimedia SSE feed w/ transparent synthetic fallback + FM-bell/woodblock/swell synth ensemble + Canvas2D atlas-bloom render + musical throttle/voice-cap) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**Hatnote *Listen to Wikipedia*** вАФ Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi ¬Ј **Brian Eno** generative ambient ¬Ј **KLING KLANG KLONG *Sounds of the Unseen***) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І485 today вАФ the live data-sonification / never-repeating-stream register). **Bulletproof glance:** `master вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass вЙ§8kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ12/12:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on open-fifth drone bed so silence between edits has a floor; **14-voice cap + ~55ms refractory + ~6 bells/sec throttle (queue cap 8, drop-oldest)** so a busy firehose stays musical not noise; **transparent offline fallback** вАФ if the SSE errors / doesn't connect within ~3s / `EventSource` is unavailable, a Poisson-ish **synthetic edit generator** drives the piece (honest status badge: emerald `live: en.wikipedia + 40 wikis` vs amber `demo stream (offline)`), so it **always rings + blooms**; AudioContext created+resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (EventSource close + rAF + audio nodes + listeners + timers). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (SSE read directly client-side; nothing sent or stored вАФ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + Canvas2D + native `EventSource` only). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 34.3s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, nothing in the `760` folder), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вАФ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 80s` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/network/Canvas in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear/eye: whether `stream.wikimedia.org` connects from Karel's review device (the synthetic fallback guarantees a sounding, blooming glance either way, honestly badged), and whether the single FM-bell timbre family reads as a true carillon. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`758-sky-almanac`** в≠Р (SVG sun-arc orrery ¬Ј the local clock + computed sun/moon position conduct a long-form, non-looping arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano вАФ daylight palette, zero-interaction autoplay, the best unattended glance + highest ambition floor of the three; refs Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* / Finer *Longplayer*; **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`759-phrase-loom`** (SVG ¬Ј drag a luminous phrase-timeline to re-weave whole phrases of his recording via a Markov transition model вАФ the literal "remix his phrasing, not his grains" answer; refs Eno / Burroughs-Bowie cut-up) as **IDEAS ¬І485**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/760-wiki-carillon/README.md`

## (Cycle 484 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/755-kids-bounce-house](/dream/755-kids-bounce-house)** вАФ Bounce House рЯ§Є. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 484. **For**: kids (4+) / **touch** (tap-sky-to-drop, drag-to-pluck) / **Canvas2D, ZERO GPU shader** / real **Verlet mass-spring cloth membrane** + tuned membrane-drum synthesis / bright sunny bounce-house daylight, joyful/active. **What if a 4-year-old could bounce bright balls on a giant stretchy TRAMPOLINE that SINGS вАФ the sheet's wobble and each landing turning into warm tuned drum-and-bell notes?** A sunny sky scene: a big candy-purple trampoline stretched across the lower screen, drawn as a **real deforming 24√Ч10 Verlet mass-spring cloth** (structural + shear springs, Jakobsen constraint relaxation, pinned rim). The child **taps the sky** to drop a fat glossy primary-colored ball вАФ it falls, deforms the sheet for real, and **bounces**; each landing plays a tuned membrane-drum hit (center = low & round, edges = brighter), loudness from impact velocity, pitch quantized to C-major-pentatonic so nothing's ever "wrong." **Dragging the sheet** plucks a wobble that travels outward. Multiple balls pile up вЖТ a gentle emergent polyrhythm of warm hits; the cloth's averaged displacement modulates an always-on open-fifth pad. The deforming soft-body's motion *is* the score, not a faked wobble. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields вАФ WebGPU+WebGL2 are 9/15; Canvas2D is *scarce* again at 3√Ч; build one piece with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вЖТ 755 is **pure Canvas2D, zero WebGL/WebGPU/shader**), **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register вАФ exuberant without silly, bright without dark-meditation" вЖТ sunny bounce-house, not the 9√Ч near-dark glow), and off **#1/#3/mic-cam bans** (no grain-cloud, no GPU shader, touch not mic/camera). **touch INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera; touch is scarce again at ~2√Ч) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface) ¬Ј **Verlet cloth membrane + membrane-percussion-synthesis TECH** (the lab's FIRST structured mass-spring cloth вАФ blobs exist at `286`/`451` but never a structured sheet; and the FIRST *sonified membrane*; deliberately OFF the saturated dropвЖТcollisionвЖТnote register of `184`/`451`/`553`/`619`/`350`) ¬Ј **bright joyful daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3вАУ4/5**: **#1** (first structured Verlet cloth membrane + first membrane sonification in the lab вАФ grep-verified trampoline/bounce-membrane 0√Ч) ¬Ј **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (multi-touch input + Verlet mass-spring cloth solver w/ ballвЖФcloth collision + tuned membrane-drum/bell synth + Canvas2D render) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**Thomas Jakobsen** "Advanced Character Physics" GDC 2001 ¬Ј **Xavier Provot** 1995 mass-spring cloth ¬Ј **JellyCar Worlds** / **Toolkit for Verlet Motion 2026** soft-body lineage ¬Ј membrane percussion synthesis) ¬Ј **#5** (RESEARCH ¬І484 today вАФ the live soft-body/Verlet-physics 2026 creative-coding wave). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass 7500 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; always-on open-fifth pad that brightens with sheet activity; **3s-idle ghost auto-demo** drops a ball every ~1.5s + soft ping so a glancing reviewer sees+hears it bouncing and singing hands-free; canvas visuals run before audio (gesture-gated AudioContext, iOS); try/catch around audio + the step loop (never throws into rAF); full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + resize listener). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вЬУ Compiled` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, nothing in the 755 folder), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вАФ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.0min` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/touch in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear/eye: whether a deliberate all-balls pile-up briefly over-stretches the cloth before the springs recover (self-corrects within a frame, never a fail state), and whether the membrane-drum timbre reads as warm-and-tuned; the ghost auto-demo guarantees a sounding, bouncing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`756-kids-hill-roller`** в≠Р (SVG/DOM ¬Ј tilt: sculpt sunny hills then tilt to roll a ball over them = play the drawn melody вАФ love-aligned `83`вЭ§пЄП, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`757-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js: hold-to-inflate balloons whose pitch rises with size, released to accrete a poppable sky-chord) as **IDEAS ¬І484**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/755-kids-bounce-house/README.md`

## (Cycle 482 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 speechвЖТmusic mappings, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/752-kids-word-band](/dream/752-kids-word-band)** вАФ Word Band рЯМИрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 482. **For**: kids (4+) / **live speech recognition** (Web Speech API) / **SVG/DOM, ZERO GPU shader** / phonetic wordвЖТpentatonic-xylophone riff + look-ahead groove / bright rainbow daylight, joyful. **What if a 4-year-old could SAY a word and HEAR its sounds turn into music вАФ say "banana" and the rainbow xylophone bounces out ba-na-na as a happy climbing riff?** The child taps START, then speaks; the **Web Speech API** recognizes each word, maps its letters to an 8-bar **C-major-pentatonic rainbow xylophone** (vowels spread across the scale, consonants fill the gaps вАФ a stable, deterministic riff, nothing ever "wrong"), plays it immediately, and tumbles the spoken letters in as big bouncing colored type. Each word lays a short looping ostinato that joins a gentle **Chris-Wilson look-ahead groove** (25ms/120ms, вЙ§4 simultaneous word-loops, oldest drops) so you build a little band. The lab's **first KIDS speech-recognition piece** (real `SpeechRecognition` exists only in adult `570`/`189`; voice-for-kids has always meant pitch/RMS `88`/`158`/`179`, never the *recognized word itself*) and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#5** ("build the un-built in-browser-ASR finding вАФ a 4yo says a word and hears it become a sound"), **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register"), **#2** ("the lab is thin on SVG/DOM вАФ build one piece with NO GPU shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вЖТ 752 is **pure SVG/DOM, zero canvas/WebGL/WebGPU**), **#1** (off the banned grain-cloud вАФ wordвЖТriff). **live-speech INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera/touch) ¬Ј **SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface; off banned GPU-shader-field) ¬Ј **phonetic wordвЖТxylophone-riff TECH** (off banned grain-cloud) ¬Ј **bright rainbow daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5** (#2 вЙ•4 subsystems [Web-Speech recognition + wordвЖТletterвЖТbar phonetic map + look-ahead groove scheduler + SVG/DOM render] + #5 [RESEARCH ¬І411 in-browser ASR, 6 days old, in-window; reinforced by ¬І482 today вАФ Web Speech spec milestone 2026-05-21 + iOS-Safari 14.5+ support] + qualified-#1 [first kids speech piece; first wordвЖТxylophone mapping]). Refs: **Incredibox** (additive band-building) ¬Ј **Toca Band / Sago Mini** (bigger-bar-lower-note, pentatonic-only safety) ¬Ј **Web Speech API** ¬Ј **Chris Wilson** look-ahead scheduler. **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вЖТ lowpass 7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; warm marimba timbre; always-on C2/G2 pad; **graceful fallback** вАФ speech unsupported/denied (Firefox, incognito) вЖТ a big 26-letter tap keyboard (each tinted its bar color) + PLAY runs the identical riff + `text-rose-300` "Tap the letters to play!" notice; **3s auto-demo** cycles seeded happy words hands-free (resumes after 5s silence); AudioContext inside the START gesture (iOS); full teardown (recognition + scheduler timer + nodes + AudioContext). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.2min` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вАФ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вЬУ Compiled` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no speech/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear/eye: iOS-Safari `webkitSpeechRecognition` latency (0.5вАУ2s typical, could feel laggy), `onend` auto-restart race, and whether spelling-driven riffs read as *musical* per-word (deterministic + pentatonic so never wrong); the tap-keyboard + auto-demo guarantee a sounding glance with zero mic. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-mapping fire; banked **`751-kids-say-a-zoo`** в≠Р (semantic: spoken word вЖТ bouncing Canvas2D creature that sings, accreting chord-garden вАФ most pure-4yo delight, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`753-kids-spell-parade`** (rhythmic/stateful: word letters вЖТ accumulating Canvas2D marching-band groove) as **IDEAS ¬І482**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/752-kids-word-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 480 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent explorers)

- **[/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom](/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom)** вАФ Inkblot Bloom рЯ¶ЛрЯЦЛпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 480. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic hum/blow** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU** Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion (Canvas2D-CPU fallback) / kaleidoscopic ink-bloom / contemplative, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could hum and watch living, mirror-symmetric inkblots bloom and unfold like a butterfly вАФ and hear each fold sing?** A near-dark calm screen: the child **hums or blows** into the mic; soft ink blooms outward from the centre and unfolds in **kaleidoscopic mirror symmetry** (a living Rorschach butterfly/flower) вАФ the ink is a **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** field run as a **WGSL compute shader** on a 256¬≤ ping-pong buffer (the lab's first *kaleidoscopic-symmetry* RD), folded with mirror symmetry to a full-screen quad. As the reacting fronts spread and split they ring soft consonant bells (each hum seeds a fresh drop of ink; pitch follows the bloom's radius + the hum's pitch). No beat, no loop, no "wrong" note вАФ C-major-pentatonic snap. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("give a kid the *scarce* renderer вАФ ban the Canvas2D monoculture": WebGPU is primary, Canvas2D only as fallback) + **#2** ("texture/transformation, NOT a loop-groove, vary the register вАФ not silly"). **mic INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; serves KIDS.md vocalization) ¬Ј **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (scarce вАФ off the raw-WebGL2-4√Ч-audit-ban AND banned Canvas2D-primary [fallback only]) ¬Ј **kaleidoscopic Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion TECH** (NOT a step-sequencer groove) ¬Ј **contemplative ink-on-light/Rorschach VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5** (`#2 + #3`, arguably `#1`): **#2** вЙ•4 subsystems (analysis-only mic [RMS breath + zero-crossing pitch] + WGSL Gray-Scott compute + kaleidoscope-fold render + RD-driven additive-bell sonification) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (**Bileam Tschepe (elekktronaut)** feedback/inkblot TouchDesigner lineage ¬Ј **Entagma "Easy Houdini: Inkblots вАФ Steal from TouchDesigner" (May 2026)** ¬Ј **Gray-Scott** / Pearson 1993 / Turing 1952) ¬Ј arguably **#1** (first mirror/kaleidoscope-symmetric RD, and first mic-driven RD, in the lab вАФ RD exists at `9` but never symmetric/voice-driven). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вЙ§0.26 вЖТ lowpass 7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never wired to destination, never recorded/sent); always-on C2/G2/C3 drone; **ghost-hum auto-demo** keeps the ink blooming + singing hands-free on mic-deny/idle (zero permission); **WebGPU вЖТ Canvas2D-CPU fallback runs the identical Gray-Scott model** (96¬≤ grid, same kaleidoscope fold) so it blooms+sings end-to-end with no GPU; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF / mic tracks / WebGPU device+buffers / AudioContext). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (no network at all вАФ fully on-device; rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (WebGPU via `navigator.gpu`, usage bits hardcoded вАФ no `@webgpu/types`). вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вАФ authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 39.3s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вАФ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вЬУ Compiled` then failed identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (read the page.tsx: no module-top-level browser-API access) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 480). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear/eye: whether WGSL compiles first-run on a real iPad (Canvas2D fallback is the safety net), whether the RD regime reads as a *butterfly*, whether breath onsets seed cleanly; the ghost-hum + Canvas2D fallbacks guarantee a sounding, blooming glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`748-kids-aurora-silk`** в≠Р (tilt вЖТ three.js mass-spring CLOTH aurora veil вАФ the iOS-bulletproof first-cloth sibling, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`749-kids-shadow-garden`** в≠Р (camera body-silhouette вЖТ WebGPU instanced flower-growth вАФ the gentle-giant sibling) as **IDEAS ¬І480**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom/README.md`

## Cycle 478 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, ONE concept [cycle-2 of 738] via 3 musical models

- **[/dream/743-kids-song-family](/dream/743-kids-song-family)** вАФ Song Family рЯМЯрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 478. **For**: kids (3+) / **mic voice/hum** (analysis-only) / **raw WebGL2** GLSL companions (Canvas2D fallback) / accreting **chord-harmony** memory voiced by CataRT grains of **Karel's real Welcome Home piano** / tender companion, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old's hummed songs hatched a growing FAMILY of glowing companions who remembered the child's melodies and sang them back in stacked HARMONY вАФ and their voices were made from grains of Karel's OWN real recorded piano?** The **cycle-2 of `738-kids-song-sprout`** (the lab's first long-form/stateful kids piece, which was *monophonic*): this builds the harmonic/multi-voice dimension 738 explicitly banked for cycle-2 вАФ the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH, RETURN and extend the ceiling, stop banking and walking away") AND simultaneously **#5** ("use Karel's real music вАФ it's in 1 of the last 15; a kids one could use his piano grains"). Hum a phrase вЖТ a glowing friend hatches & remembers it; hum more вЖТ a whole family (cap 4) appears, each visibly growing (bigger/brighter/warmer) as it hears more; go quiet вЖТ the family sings the remembered melodies back as a **chord choir** (each companion on a different consonant chord tone, the stack deepening unisonвЖТoctaveвЖТ5thвЖТ3rd+9th with maturity), so a single line blooms into warm 3вАУ4-part harmony and minute-5 differs from minute-1. Nothing's ever wrong вАФ D-Dorian snap. **mic-voice INPUT** (off banned touch-primary) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest non-banned renderer вАФ off banned Canvas2D-primary [fallback only], off WebGPU-4√Ч-now-audit-banned, off three.js-3√Ч-would-ban; iOS-bulletproof) ¬Ј **accreting chord-harmony memory + CataRT grains of his real piano TECH** (free/rubato chord-choir, emphatically NOT a step-sequencer loop-groove) ¬Ј **tender/wonder companion VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 4вАУ5/5** (`#1+#2+#3+#4+#5`): **#1** first multi-voice/harmonic memory in the lab (738 + all 700+ priors are monophonic) AND first kids piece voiced by concatenative grains of his real recording in a *harmony* context (721 used his grains as a single breath-bloom) ¬Ј **#2** вЙ•5 subsystems (mic autocorrelation pitch/phrase capture + phrase-memory & growth store + harmony scheduler + CataRT grain corpus from his piano w/ offline-synth fallback + raw-WebGL2 GLSL renderer) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (arXiv `2506.18143` *AI Harmonizer* [four-part harmony from one voice] ¬Ј Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* ¬Ј Brian Eno *Reflection*) ¬Ј **#4** cycle-2 of 738 (cycle-3 = roundвЗДchordвЗДphase toggle [merge 742/744], more voices, seasons) ¬Ј **#5** RESEARCH ¬І478 same-day. **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вЙ§0.3 вЖТ lowpass 7.5k вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never to destination); always-on warm drone; **ghost auto-demo** (a virtual child hums, hatching & growing the family hands-free, zero permission) on mic-deny/idle; his-piano loader (`fetch /api/audio/<id>`, 4s abort) вЖТ on ANY failure/offline a gentle offline-rendered synth voice so it ALWAYS sounds; AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D glow-dot fallback for no-WebGL2; full teardown (rAF/tracks/audio nodes/GL resources/listeners). **No API route вЖТ no guard** (only READS the existing public `/api/audio/<id>` GET; no secret, no DB write, no side effect вАФ rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep**. вЪ†пЄП **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вАФ authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вАФ pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (grep-verified: no module-top-level browser-API access) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 478). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) вАФ unverified by ear/eye: whether autocorrelation tracks a small child's hum, whether the chord-harmony reads as *a family answering*, whether the real-piano grain voice resynthesizes cleanly (the synth fallback is the likely-reviewer path), growth/cadence tuning, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + synth fallback + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-model fire; banked **`742-kids-song-round`** в≠Р (raw WebGL2 developing ROUND/canon, synth вАФ the bulletproof zero-network sibling) + **`744-kids-song-phase`** в≠Р (raw WebGL2 Steve Reich PHASING, phase-rings visible) as **IDEAS ¬І478**.
