Born from **RESEARCH ¬І444**: the dive's headline hook (cast-shadow/silhouette interaction) was **KILLED by a corpus grep** (`268-kids-shadow-theater` + `513-kids-shadow-still` + `617-kids-shadow-monster` + `463-terra-gamelan` already exist вАФ the "grep before claiming 0√Ч" discipline), which surfaced the genuinely-unmined axis: **his real music is 0√Ч for kids**. **Kid-safe chain** (`padBus/flowerBus вЖТ master gain (3.5 s fade-in, вЙ§0.5) вЖТ lowpass вЙ§7 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; soft grain attacks, no harsh transients; ~13-min lullaby fade-down). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~2.5 s idle вЖТ a synthetic-tilt auto-demo** rolls the seed, blooms flowers, and breathes the piano hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive with **zero hardware**; DeviceOrientation denied/absent вЖТ **drag-anywhere + Arrow keys** with a `text-rose-300` notice (fully playable on a laptop); audio fetch fail вЖТ synth fallback (amber-free, transparent in the HUD). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643 вАФ no network secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` exit 0 вЖТ `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 2.3 min, вЬУ Generating static pages (480/480)** [479 from cycle 443 + 658, confirming the non-winner absent], `/dream/658-kids-piano-garden 7.38 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ; one non-blocking unused-eslint-disable Warning, tidied). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/tilt/GPU in sandbox вАФ unverified by ear/hand: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-вА¶` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether grain density / dwell threshold / tilt sensitivity feel right for a real child on real hardware [runtime tuning, builder-flagged], the granular timbre + loudness of his piano through the kid-safe chain, and iOS DeviceOrientation + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + drag/key fallbacks guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one concept вАФ his-real-piano garden вАФ via 2 interaction models): beat **`657-kids-piano-garden`** (tilt = a **WIND** that scatters his piano into a swarm of singing fireflies in a WebGL2 point-field вАФ a bulletproof, instantly-joyful *momentary* instrument, but no accumulating state where 658's flowers persist and grow the garden) вАФ banked as **IDEAS ¬І444**, the fastest momentary-register resurrect. Design notes: `src/app/dream/658-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 443 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers across the jury's open adult lanes)

- **[/dream/655-breath-sanctuary](/dream/655-breath-sanctuary)** вАФ Breath Sanctuary рЯМђпЄПрЯХѓпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 443. **For**: adult / off-screen / eyes-closed / ritual-ceremonial / breath-steered. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED вАФ a ceremonial sound-space you steer with your BREATH alone?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #3** ("Don't let 626 become the next 576 вАФ build the THIRD embodied/non-screen piece NOW"), and the highest-leverage move against the lab's deepest structural problem the jury names: **14-of-15 recent prototypes render to a glass screen** вАФ off-screen/audio-first was exactly 1√Ч (626). This is the lab's **2nd-after-626 audio-FIRST piece** and a **ritual** journey-engine alternative Karel explicitly asked for. **Input вАФ BREATH via the mic (amplitude only, NO pitch):** `getUserMedia` вЖТ lowpass ~1.2 kHz вЖТ `AnalyserNode` вЖТ time-domain RMS вЖТ a slow attack/slower-release **envelope follower** tracking the swell (inhale) and ebb (exhale); a rising-then-falling envelope above threshold fires a **peak** (strike a bowl) and counts a **breath cycle** (drives the arc). Mic routes ONLY to the analyser вАФ no output path, **no howl risk** even on speakers. **Sound (вЙ•3 subsystems вЖТ 4):** (1) a **just-intonation overtone choir** вАФ stacked sine partials at pure ratios `1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2` (beat-free), each with its own slow amplitude LFO so it shimmers; breath energy swells loudness + opens a brightness lowpass; upper partials gated by the arc's "openness"; (2) **struck singing-bowl resonators** вАФ a damped modal model, a few *inharmonic* partials per bowl with long (~5.5вАУ12 s) exponential decay, struck at the top of each breath, ringing into a feedback-delay tail; (3) a **breath-RMS envelope follower** (the input layer); (4) a **long-form ritual STATE MACHINE**. **The stateful arc (вЙ•5 min, NOT a loop):** four phases вАФ **Gathering вЖТ Invocation вЖТ Presence вЖТ Release** вАФ each advanced only when BOTH a breath count AND a time gate are met, so minute 5 вЙ† minute 1: the **fundamental drifts down a fifth** (C2 вЖТ ~43.6 Hz), **more overtones enter**, the **bowl set rotates**, the **tail lengthens**, and the halo's **hue drifts** violetвЖТcyan. **Visual вАФ minimal, audio-first (SVG, no WebGL):** a single faint breathing halo (radius + opacity follow the breath envelope, hue follows the phase) + sparse readable text (phase name ¬Ј instruction ¬Ј breath/time counter); everything else dark вАФ the point is to look away. **mic-breath INPUT** (FRESH вАФ mic 0√Ч in the rolling-10; breath-as-control is a cross-modal sensor the lab hadn't used; off the jury-banned **touch 5√Ч**) ¬Ј **audio-only/off-screen OUTPUT** with a faint SVG halo (the SCARCEST renderer вАФ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√Ч** AND the hot **three.js 3√Ч / Canvas2D 3√Ч**) ¬Ј **long-form JI ritual + breath-envelope TECH** (not sonification, not a sim, not the banned physical-feed template) ¬Ј **ritual/ceremonial VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles вАФ sacred/spacious, neither the adult doom autopilot nor cozy). **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5:** **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4: breath-envelope follower ¬Ј JI overtone choir ¬Ј struck-bowl resonator bank ¬Ј ritual state machine) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Pauline Oliveros вАФ *Deep Listening* / *Sonic Meditations*** [breath-based eyes-closed listening, the direct lineage] ¬Ј **La Monte Young / Theatre of Eternal Music** [JI sustained drone] ¬Ј Tibetan singing bowls ¬Ј the **Lyria RealTime / Live Music Models** continuous-steered-stream frame). **#1 SOFT** (additive JI drone + modal bowls are foundational; breath-as-the-steering-control + the off-screen ritual framing are fresh, not hard-claimed) ¬Ј **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE, no prior thread вАФ the diurnal-arc-with-state is long-form *within* one piece, not a multi-cycle commitment, discounted not over-claimed) ¬Ј **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (Lyria 3 ~4 mo + server-side; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І443** (the 2026 frontier is the *continuous, live-steered, never-landing stream* вАФ Lyria RealTime; here the steering control is the breath, the lab-feasible no-network ancestor). **Ear-safe chain** (`choir + bowl buses вЖТ master gain вЙ§0.5 (5 s fade-in) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; delay feedback <0.8; AudioContext + mic both requested INSIDE the "Begin ¬Ј breathe" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** mic denied/unavailable вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + an **autonomous breath LFO** (~5.5 s/breath, asymmetric) drives the same params so it ALWAYS plays; **~2.5 s idle вЖТ autonomous-breath auto-demo** (no permission prompt) so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the halo pulse and (once unlocked) HEARS the drone breathing with zero hardware; honest caveat вАФ the idle auto-demo builds the context without a gesture so audio may stay suspended until the first click, the visual still animates. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG вАФ mic is local, no network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 38.3 s, вЬУ Generating static pages (479/479)** [478 from cycle 442 + 655, confirming the two non-winners absent], `/dream/655-breath-sanctuary 4.73 kB / 108 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox вАФ unverified by ear/breath: whether the RMS envelope reliably reads real breathing vs. room noise [headphones + a quiet space help; the amplitude detector can mis-read fans/speech], whether the phase transitions land emotionally, the JI/bowl timbres, and iOS mic+AudioContext unlock; the autonomous fallback + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (off-screen-ritual / ecstatic-lift / AI-chain), each bent toward the RESEARCH ¬І443 continuous-steered-stream paradigm; banked **`654-latent-chain`** (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline CHAIN вАФ audioвЖТFLUX-imageвЖТFlorence-2-captionвЖТre-seed, Karel's most-wanted "AI image INSIDE an AV piece"; lost AGAIN on glance-verifiability + paid/network/uncertain-model-id risk for an unattended ship вАФ resurrect when Karel's awake to exercise the chain with a confirmed prod `FAL_KEY`) + **`653-endless-lift`** (the **ecstatic** missing-middle вАФ a gospel-house key-lift that Shepard-folds so it climbs forever and never drops; WebGL2; **tsc+eslint VERIFIED clean**, the fastest euphoric resurrect) as **IDEAS ¬І443**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/655-breath-sanctuary/README.md`

## (Cycle 440 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's "active-wonder middle")

- **[/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures](/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures)** вАФ Piano Creatures рЯОєрЯМ±. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 440. **For**: kids (4+) / Web MIDI + keyboard / active-wonder musical / play-an-instrument. **What if a 4-year-old could PLAY a real keyboard and instantly sound like a musician вАФ every note blooms a living creature, and an invisible band plays along in real time so there are no wrong notes?** The lab's **FIRST kids MIDI piece** (grep-verified 0√Ч вАФ no prior kids prototype calls `requestMIDIAccess`), and the kids-register answer to the **JURY 2026-06-15** "missing middle" (the kids side is "warm-or-silly with nothing between" вАФ this is the active-wonder *musical* register where the child PERFORMS). **Input (NON-touch primary):** **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()` in try/catch, `noteon`/`noteoff` on all inputs, `onstatechange` hot-plug) вЖТ falls through to a **computer-keyboard** piano row (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` upper octave + `Z X C V B N M` lower, no auto-repeat) вЖТ last-resort вЙ•64 px on-screen pads. **No-wrong-notes engine:** every incoming note `snapToPenta`'d to C-major pentatonic вЖТ always consonant вЖТ a soft two-partial bell/marimba voice. **The accompaniment "agent" (4 subsystems):** a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms horizon) driving (1) an **auto-harmony PAD** on an 8-bar diatonic progression that advances per bar, (2) a **walking root/fifth/octave BASS**, (3) a **groove bed** (kick + noise hats) that grows/thins with a decaying `energyRef` raised on each played note вАФ so the more the child plays, the fuller the band, and the harmony evolves so minute 2 вЙ† minute 0; (4) the MIDI/keyboard input + snap layer. **Visual (three.js):** a garden of orbiting emissive **note-creatures** (color by pitch class, radius/height by register) that pulse on strike and breathe with band energy; DPR-aware, resize-handled, full geometry/material/renderer disposal on unmount. **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard INPUT** (the lab's FIRST kids MIDI вАФ off the jury-banned **touch 5√Ч**; love-adjacent via the kids-keyboard loves `82-kids-color-piano`вЭ§пЄП/`317-kids-color-bells`вЭ§пЄП) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (2√ЧвЖТ3√Ч in rolling-10, under the 4√Ч ban line вАФ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√Ч** and the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D-at-3√Ч) ¬Ј **rule-based real-time accompaniment-agent TECH** (a look-ahead scheduler that answers the player вАФ grep-fresh) ¬Ј **active-wonder MUSICAL VIBE** (neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids MIDI (grep-verified 0√Ч, the genuine never-used-technique claim the recent SOFT-#1 cruise lacked) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Toshio Iwai вАФ *Electroplankton* / *TENORI-ON***; the live-co-performance frame **arXiv 2604.07612** *Real-Time HumanвАУAI Musical Co-Performance* + **arXiv 2602.05064** *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*). **#4 NOT claimed** (the advancing progression is long-form *state within one piece*, not a multi-cycle commitment вАФ discounted rather than over-claimed, the "theater" the jury roasts); **#5 NOT claimed** (the 2026 co-performance papers are server-side + older than 30 days; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І440** (real-time co-performance = a look-ahead scheduler answering the performer a beat ahead вЖТ implement the browser-feasible rule-based ancestor as a no-wrong-notes kids instrument). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain вЙ§0.55 вЖТ lowpass 7500 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ18,6,12) вЖТ destination`, a quiet never-silent drone; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** no MIDI вЖТ `text-rose-300` "press letter keys to play!" + the keyboard path; WebGL fail вЖТ rose notice while AUDIO keeps working; **~2.5 s idle вЖТ a ghost player auto-plays an evolving melody** (creatures bloom, the band plays along) so a silent 06:30 glance with NO MIDI hardware SEES creatures bloom and (unmuted) HEARS a full song; first real note hands control to the child. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web MIDI + Web Audio + three.js вАФ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already present). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 117 s, вЬУ Generating static pages (476/476)**, `/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures 5.34 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no MIDI/WebGL/audio in sandbox вАФ unverified by ear/hand: whether the rule-based accompaniment FEELS like a band answering the child vs. generic backing, the bell timbres + kid-safe loudness, Web MIDI hot-plug + iOS unlock, three.js visual tuning; the ghost-player auto-demo guarantees it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-register fire (PLAY/MOVE/PULSE); banked **`647-kids-clap-parade`** (the **PULSE/danceable** register вАФ mic-RHYTHM/onset [NOT pitch] вЖТ an inline-SVG marching parade that BUILDS with the beat; the directest fill of the jury's missing groove-middle + cleanest glance [SVG, zero GPU], the fastest kids-groove resurrect) + **`646-kids-sky-conductor`** (the **MOVE** register вАФ webcam frame-differencing вЖТ conduct a Canvas2D constellation orchestra; lowest ambition, camera/conducting trodden via 113/217/617) as **IDEAS ¬І440**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures/README.md`

## (Cycle 439 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, a TRUE cycle-3 of the `606`вЖТ`630` piano spine)

- **[/dream/643-piano-constellation](/dream/643-piano-constellation)** вАФ Piano Constellation рЯОєвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 439. **For**: adult / audio-file (Karel's real piano) / clinical-analytical / make-an-instrument-of-his-own-touch. **What if Karel's solo piano could be taken apart down to its 12 individual notes вАФ each pitch class isolated from the recording вАФ and then PLAYED BACK as an instrument made of his own touch, where tapping a note re-fires that note's isolated material?** The lab's **first cycle-3** вАФ the genuine continuation of the `606-piano-vivisection` вЖТ `630-piano-refract` arc, claiming **ambition #4 (multi-cycle commitment) honestly** (the move the jury says is "theater вАФ banked every DEEP cycle, claimed never," the reason the lab has **zero 4/5s in two juries**). 606 split the piano into HARMONIC (strings) vs PERCUSSIVE (hammers) via median-filter HPSS; 630 fanned the harmonic layer by NMF into **4 register bands**; 643 goes **finer than register bands** вАФ it isolates the **12 PITCH CLASSES** (C, C#вА¶B) of his playing **and makes them playable**. **The cycle-3 leap = a NEW interactive layer (REPLAY).** **Isolation method (salience-mask, 4 subsystems):** (1) the proven **HPSS ground** isolates a clean harmonic layer; (2) on the harmonic complex STFT, a **Klapuri salience** function scores each candidate fundamental as the summed harmonic-comb amplitude (ќ£ over 6 partials, weights decaying 0.78^(hвИТ1)) so a real note lights its whole comb while spurious single bins don't; (3) each candidate's salience is splatted back onto its comb bins and **folded by octave into its pitch class** (Fujishima chroma) вЖТ 12 dense per-bin support spectra вЖТ **soft masks that form a partition of unity** (`M_c = S_c / ќ£_j S_j`; the 12 masks sum to 1 at every bin, scaling re+im together вЖТ phase preserved, exact reconstruction), each ISTFT'd вЖТ **12 isolated pitch-class buffers + the Hammers buffer**; (4) a **three.js** constellation renderer. **The REPLAY layer (the distinguishing cycle-3 feature):** every isolated buffer also feeds a replay bus вАФ tapping a note-orb or pressing a key (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` вЖТ the 12 chromas, `X` вЖТ hammers) plucks a **~0.34 s enveloped grain** from a salient region of that note's own material, with a tiny random playback-rate shimmer so layered taps don't phase-cancel; **multiple taps stack** вЖТ you re-perform Karel's recording as chords and rhythms built from his own notes (granular per Roads). The 13 base voices always loop sample-aligned; solo/mute/gain are instant click-free gain ramps. **Visual:** 12+1 **orbiting star-constellations** (three.js) that brighten/expand with each note's live level and **FLARE** when you replay it; soloed pulled forward + glowing, muted dimmed; idle orbit on mount + a 2.5 s-idle auto-demo that cycles the soloed note **and replays it** (showing off the REPLAY layer); full geometry/material/renderer disposal. **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real recording вАФ only 1√Ч in the rolling-10; his explicit "use his actual music" directive) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (under-used, 1√Ч in rolling-10 вАФ off the jury-banned **WebGPU** and off the over-rep **Canvas2D 3√Ч/WebGL2 3√Ч**) ¬Ј **salience-chroma partition-of-unity isolation + granular-replay TECH** ¬Ј **clinical/analytical VIBE** (the register the jury PRAISED in 606 вАФ "his own music, clinical not cozy" вАФ neither the banned doom nor the banned warm). **Ambition honest 3/5, reaching for the lab's first 4/5:** **#4** real multi-cycle commitment (an honest cycle-3 of 606вЖТ630 вАФ the rare criterion the jury says is claimed *never*) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (HPSS ¬Ј salience/chroma isolation ¬Ј granular replay engine ¬Ј three.js constellations = 4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Fujishima 1999** chroma/pitch-class profiles ¬Ј **Klapuri 2006** summed-harmonic-amplitude salience ¬Ј **Fitzgerald 2010** median-filter HPSS ¬Ј **Roads 2001** *Microsound* granular). **#1 SOFT** (granular exists in the lab via `227-paths-granular`; per-pitch-class partition-of-unity isolation is fresh but not hard-claimed), **#5 NOT claimed** (the backing restoration paper arXiv 2603.16926 is ~3 mo, not <14 days). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І439** (the 2026 source-separation frontier moved from *masking* вЖТ *reconstruction*; 630's own README banked exactly this cycle-3, "supervised NMF вЖТ true pitch classes, not register bands"). **Graceful degradation / glance:** scene orbits + core breathes immediately on mount so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive; idle auto-demo solos+replays notes with no input; recording fetch fail вЖТ synthesized-piano fallback (amber notice); WebGL absent вЖТ rose notice + **audio stays fully playable**; AudioContext built inside the "Begin ¬Ј isolate Karel's 12 notes" gesture (iOS-safe); heavy DSP chunked with `await` yields behind a single progress bar. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вАФ no network beyond the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` recording fetch, no mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already in package.json). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 88 s, вЬУ Generating static pages (475/475)**, `/dream/643-piano-constellation 8.78 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/WebGL in sandbox вАФ unverified by ear/hand: the actual separation quality of the comb masks on Karel's real recording, the grain envelope feel, three.js visual tuning, and iOS unlock; the auto-demo holds a second internal copy of the replay-grain logic to avoid a hook-dep cycle [intentional duplication, no code-health risk]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-3 concept, 3 technical approaches): beat **`642-piano-chroma`** (supervised harmonic-comb NMF вЖТ SVG chroma wheel вАФ the most *faithful* but incremental reading: 4вЖТ12 voices with no new interaction = a clean 3/5, not the 4/5 reach; self-reported a full build pass, banked as the safe-glance companion) and **`644-piano-respeak`** (maskedвЖФadditive-resynth PURITY lever вЖТ Canvas2D вАФ the boldest *reconstruction*, but **diversity-blocked**: Canvas2D would hit 4√Ч in the rolling-10); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І439** seeds. Design notes: `src/app/dream/643-piano-constellation/README.md`

- **[/dream/640-kids-day-wind](/dream/640-kids-day-wind)** вАФ A Day on the Wind рЯМђпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 438. **For**: kids (4+) / tilt / contemplative-wonder / long-form generative. **What if a 4-year-old TENDS a self-evolving day-meadow by TILTING the iPad вАФ steering a glowing wind that PLANTS where it lingers AND PLAYS the garden like a wind-harp where it sweeps, with no touching at all?** The lab's **first honest cycle-2 on the kids side** вАФ a genuine deepening of the jury-named kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` ("A Whole Day"), directly answering **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #1** ("finish a cycle-2 for once") while honoring **provocation #4's touch ban** (input swapped touchвЖТ**tilt**, pulled by Karel's loved `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП). **Engine (reimplemented compactly from 624, NOT imported вАФ 4 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** вАФ a ~9-min day (`DAY_SECONDS=540`) cross-faded through dawnвЖТmorningвЖТmiddayвЖТduskвЖТnight via soft circular smoothstep weights (scale, root, tempo, brightness, 3-stop sky gradient, sun/moon arc, star opacity all blended); (2) a **motif-memory bank** вАФ every planted thing stores an abstract scale-degree motif that `voiceDegree()` **re-voices into the day's current scale** and `mutatedDegrees()` ages (transpose/ornament/thin) so minute 8 вЙ† minute 1; (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed + ostinato + every planted voice + the traveling-motif replay; (4) a painterly **Canvas2D** side-on meadow diorama. **The cycle-2 contribution:** `DeviceOrientation` `gamma`/`beta` (neutral-hold-zeroed, clamped, eased) steer a **luminous wind spirit**; **dwell-to-plant** (lingering ~0.75 s over empty ground grows a flower/bird/star вАФ no tap); **sweep-to-play the wind-harp** (passing within ~46 px of a planted thing rings its motif's next note in passing order, rate-limited 120 ms/thing вАФ the child draws glissandi by leaning); and a **traveling-motif memory** вАФ the last ~8 brushes (degree + octave + inter-brush timing) are captured into a rolling buffer the scheduler **replays quietly, re-voiced into the current phase + transposed a step**, so a gesture swept at morning returns transformed at dusk. Everything scale-snapped вЖТ no "wrong", no fail, no score, no reading. **tilt INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5√Ч**; arrow-key fallback) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√Ч** and over-rep WebGL2; zero GPU failure surface) ¬Ј **embodied wind-harp + procedural-MMR TECH** over a generative diurnal arc ¬Ј **kids contemplative-wonder VIBE** (the active-wonder *middle* the jury says the kids side lacks вАФ neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5** (a reach above the 2/5 kids norm): **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (a real cycle-2 of 624, the move two juries say the lab never finishes вАФ claimed honestly) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (diurnal machine ¬Ј motif bank ¬Ј scheduler ¬Ј wind-harp sweep-play = 4); **#1** SOFT (the tilt-wind-harp "play your own garden" is grep-fresh but the diurnal/motif engine is 624's), **#5** NOT claimed (refs ~4вАУ9 mo old, conceptual grounding only). Named refs that DRIVE it: **MusicWeaver вАФ *Motif Memory Retrieval*** (arXiv **2509.21714**, 2026 вАФ stores realized motifs + retrieves/re-voices with controllable variation, not looping/drifting; the traveling-motif replay is a procedural take) ¬Ј **Toshio Iwai, *Electroplankton*** (2005) ¬Ј **Brian Eno, *Bloom***. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І438** (2026 long-form-coherence literature independently converged on exactly 624's remembered-and-re-voiced-motif architecture вЖТ deepen by making that memory *playable*). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain вЙ§0.55, 2.5 s fade-in вЖТ lowpass вЙ§7000 Hz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вИТ18/6/12 вЖТ destination`; AudioContext created inside the "Begin the day вША" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2.5 s idle вЖТ the wind drifts a Lissajous path, planting + brushing autonomously at **~13√Ч accelerated day rate** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel, sky shift, creatures wake/sleep, and the wind sweep the garden with zero interaction or hardware; on first real tilt/key the rate eases to the full ~9-min day; iOS `requestPermission()` path with retry button; arrow-key fallback. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вАФ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 81 s, вЬУ Generating static pages (474/474)**, `/dream/640-kids-day-wind 7.89 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt sensor/audio in sandbox вАФ unverified by hand: whether the tilt sensitivity [¬±30¬∞вЖТfull deflection] and 46 px brush radius produce a satisfying easily-triggered sweep vs over-triggering on a real iPad [the two likely tuning knobs, no code-health risk]; the osc timbres by ear; iOS unlock). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one cycle-2 concept, 2 interaction models): beat **`641-kids-tilt-meadow`** (tilt-as-gravity-on-the-whole-scene + semi-implicit-Euler **seed physics** rolling into sculpted valleys to sprout) on kids-legibility (640's direct "steer the glowy wind" beats 641's indirect physics where the child can't plant where they intend), cleaner *deepening* of 624's recognizable plant-a-thing interaction, less overlap with the ¬І436-banked `634-kids-tilt-river`, and zero physics-jank surface; banked 641 as a strong **IDEAS ¬І438** seed (resurrect with its own "save a persistent valley" sculpting payoff). Design notes: `src/app/dream/640-kids-day-wind/README.md`

## (Cycle 437 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's named "missing middle")

- **[/dream/637-slow-burn](/dream/637-slow-burn)** вАФ Slow Burn рЯХѓпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 437. **For**: adult / tender-sensual / after-hours / make-the-mechanism-legible. **What if Resonance could make the invisible *pocket* of a groove VISIBLE?** A ~72 BPM after-hours **neo-soul vamp** whose centerpiece is an **SVG grid-vs-actual onset plot**: it draws the 16th-note grid, and for every drum hit a hollow ring at the *grid* time + a connecting line out to where the hit **actually landed** + a glowing velocity-sized dot at the real onset. A single **FEEL / looseness lever** (slider + вЖР/вЖТ or [/]) scales every voice's microtiming lean вАФ kick dead-on, **snare laid-back (~+32 ms)**, **hats pushed early (~вИТ11 ms)**, bass a touch behind вАФ from `0` (robotic/quantized) through `~1.0` (in the pocket) to `1.8` (too loose); as you raise it you **watch the dots peel off the grid** and hear the beat start to breathe. The directest fill of the jury's (2026-06-15) single most-absent corner вАФ the **tender/sensual** register (the adult side went 5√Ч doom; warmth is all kids-side) вАФ and the same "make an invisible musical mechanism legible" quality the jury praised in its TOP standout `606-piano-vivisection` (the grid-vs-actual plot is to *rhythm* what HPSS is to *timbre*). **Engine (4 subsystems):** (1) a **microtiming look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval` ~25 ms poll, notes ~120 ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`) applying each voice's per-hit timing deviation √Ч FEEL + a hair of human jitter; (2) **from-scratch multi-voice synth** вАФ sine kick, brushed bandpass-noise snare, lazy filtered-noise hats, gliding sine sub-bass, **FM Rhodes** (sine carrier + 1:1 modulator, decaying tine) over **Fm9 вЖТ Bbm9 вЖТ Eb13 вЖТ Abmaj9**, with vinyl crackle + lowpass haze; (3) a **reharmonization state machine** drifting upper-extension voicings, walking-bass passing tones, and ghost-snare fills over "eras" (laps through the progression) so minute 3 вЙ† minute 0 (long-form, not a loop); (4) the **SVG grid-vs-actual renderer**. **keyboard + autonomous INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5√Ч**, off mic/real-data) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, 0√Ч in the window вАФ off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6√Ч** AND the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D) ¬Ј **per-voice microtiming-deviation engine TECH** (grep-0√Ч in the lab вАФ not sonification, not a sim) ¬Ј **tender / sensual / after-hours VIBE** (the directest opposite of the jury-banned **5√Ч doom autopilot**; distinct from banned kids-WARM by being lean/grown/dissonant). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems вЖТ 4 + #3 named refs that DRIVE it: ***Does it Swing? Microtiming Deviations and Swing Feeling in Jazz*** Sci. Rep. 2019 / arXiv 1904.03442 ¬Ј **Dan Charnas, *Dilla Time*** 2022 ¬Ј grounded by **arXiv 2605.10281 *Drum Synthesis from Expressive Drum Grids via Neural Audio Codecs*** May 2026; **#1 SOFT** вАФ the microtiming-deviation engine + grid-vs-actual plot are grep-0√Ч but groove/scheduler infra exists (387/632) so discounted, NOT a faked 4/5; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ 2605.10281 is server-ML, refs foundational). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І437** (groove humanization = measurable microtiming deviation; the "expressive drum grid" as interface). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~1.8 s idle auto-demo** self-starts the vamp and sweeps FEEL on a ~14 s breathing cycle, so a silent 06:30 glance with **no audio hardware** still SEES the dots peel off the grid; pure SVG = **zero GPU failure surface** (unlike the recent run of build-verified-not-browser-verified GPU ships). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG вАФ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 113 s, вЬУ Generating static pages (473/473)**, `/dream/637-slow-burn 5.88 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox вАФ whether the snare-late/hats-early magnitudes *feel* like the pocket, the FM-Rhodes timbre, and iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the SVG plot + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-register fire; banked **`638-gospel-lift`** (the **ecstatic/euphoric** corner вАФ three.js ascending light column + gospel key-LIFT modulation +1 semitone/16 bars, NO drop, genuinely distinct from `387-drop-engine`) + **`639-afro-pulse`** (the **joyful/danceable** corner вАФ Canvas2D afrobeat/highlife, bell-timeline + interlocking 7-vs-5 melodic ostinati; resurrect with a NON-ring viz, its rings overlap `632-polymeter-loom`) as IDEAS ¬І437. Design notes: `src/app/dream/637-slow-burn/README.md`

## (Cycle 433 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal **off-GPU / scarce-renderer** explorers)

- **[/dream/626-empty-room](/dream/626-empty-room)** вАФ Empty Room рЯОІ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 433. **For**: adult / eyes-closed / off-screen / embodied-spatial. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED?** An **audio-FIRST, off-screen** piece: put on headphones, stand in an otherwise empty room, and **invisible presences drift around you in real 3D binaural sound**. Each is a soft sustained voice in a dark modal register (close, intimate, slightly haunted вАФ an empty-cathedral feeling, *not* warm/cozy). **Turn to face a presence** (phone compass via `DeviceOrientationEvent`, or drag on desktop) and it brightens, opens, and sings more clearly while the others recede вАФ **active listening is the whole game**. The lab's **FIRST audio-FIRST off-screen piece** вАФ the screen is deliberately near-black, showing only an austere Canvas2D compass/radar as a glance-aid; the experience lives in the headphones. This finally gives the **off-screen / embodied-spatial lane its second real entry** beyond the screen-led `576-presence-room` вАФ the 0√Ч lane the jury has named "every fortnight." **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) true binaural spatialization вАФ each of 5 presences is a Web Audio `PannerNode` (`panningModel:"HRTF"`, `distanceModel:"inverse"`) in 3D world space; the `AudioListener` forward vector rotates as you turn (modern `forwardX/Z` AudioParams, feature-detected fallback to deprecated `setOrientation`); (2) a generative moving-presence engine вАФ each voice has its own orbit `azimuth(t)`, a radius wobble that brings it close past your head, two detuned oscillators + a breath-tremolo LFO, and slow multi-minute pitch-detune drift so the room is genuinely different at minute 4 than minute 1 (it evolves, it doesn't loop); (3) a facing-reward layer вАФ per-frame `cos(angle)` between heading and each presence (cubic-sharpened) swells gain and opens a brightness lowpass on the faced voice. Dark modal pitch set (G-Phrygian-ish over a drone with b2 + tritone tension); damped feedback-delay "empty-cathedral" tail (no IR file). **device-orientation INPUT** (off the glass; drag fallback) ¬Ј **audio-only OUTPUT** (Web Audio binaural вАФ the *scarcest* renderer, 0√Ч in the rolling-10; austere Canvas2D compass is a glance-aid only вАФ off the diversity-banned **WebGPU 5√Ч + WebGL2 4√Ч**) ¬Ј **HRTF moving-source binaural TECH** ¬Ј **intimate / dark / unsettling VIBE** (edges, not cozy). **Graceful degradation:** no orientation sensor / declined вЖТ drag-to-turn (rose notice); no HRTF panner вЖТ equal-power `StereoPannerNode` (amber note); **~2.5 s idle вЖТ heading auto-rotates** so a silent reviewer still HEARS presences sweep the stereo field and SEES the compass dots orbit, zero interaction. **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 distinct subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Janet Cardiff вАФ *The Forty Part Motet* / *Her Long Black Hair***; **Pauline Oliveros вАФ *Deep Listening***; HRTF background **ImmersiveFlow arXiv 2601.12950** + **ASAudio survey arXiv 2508.10924**]; **#1 SOFT, said plainly** вАФ NOT lab-first binaural [`576-presence-room` did head-tracked binaural], the fresh axes are the **audio-FIRST / eyes-closed off-screen register** + the **facing-reward mechanic**). **Consumes the ¬І429-banked `620-empty-room` seed** (research-grounded, the perennially-0√Ч off-screen lane) вАФ a clean "build a queued research-bound idea" path. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вАФ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 37.5s, вЬУ Generating static pages (469/469)**, `/dream/626-empty-room 4.06 kB / 107 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no headphones/orientation sensor in sandbox вАФ the HRTF localization + compass-heading reliability + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the auto-rotate + StereoPanner/drag fallbacks make it real and alive at a glance even on desktop with no sensor). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`627-latent-piano`** (Karel's piano вЖТ AI image вЖТ reactive Canvas2D warp вАФ **flagged DUPLICATIVE of `441-latent-listening-room` + `448-piano-phrase-painter`**, resurrect only with a genuinely new twist) + **`628-data-matrix`** (a strobing **inline-SVG** Ikeda/Euclidean-rhythm score вАФ the cleanest *edges* + scarcest-renderer swing, a near-instant resurrect for the next abrasive/clinical fire) as IDEAS ¬І433. Design notes: `src/app/dream/626-empty-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 432 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, ONE long-form concept √Ч 3 non-GPU renderers)

- **[/dream/624-kids-day-meadow](/dream/624-kids-day-meadow)** вАФ A Whole Day рЯМЕ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 432. **For**: kids (4+) / long-form generative journey / calm-contemplative. **What if a kids music toy were a whole DAY?** A slow, self-evolving **~9-minute journey** through **dawn вЖТ morning вЖТ midday вЖТ dusk вЖТ night вЖТ back to dawn** that is genuinely *different at minute 8 than at minute 1* вАФ not a loop, not a one-shot. The piece **plays itself** and the child decorates it: **tap low** вЖТ a **flower** (blooms by day, closes & sleeps at night), **tap mid** вЖТ a **bird** (glides & sings in the morning, roosts at night), **tap the sky** вЖТ a **star** (only twinkles & sings at night). The lab's **FIRST kids long-form generative journey-arc with state & memory** вАФ a kids-register answer to Karel's standing "journey-engine alternatives" priority (a diurnal/cinematic arc, not the psychedelic 6-phase one), and the long-form-generative menu category the jury keeps flagging as thin. **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** вАФ a continuous `phaseвИИ[0,1)` over `DAY_SECONDSвЙИ540` cross-fades 5 musical regions with soft circular-bump weights (no hard cuts): dawn = major-pentatonic/Lydian shimmer, slow, indigoвЖТrose; morning = bright major, livelier, clear blue; midday = fullest playful major, brightest, sun at arc-top; dusk = warm Mixolydian, amberвЖТviolet, slowing; night = low glassy lullaby pentatonic + drone, near-black + stars + moon вАФ phase also drives the sky gradient, the **sun/moon traveling a visible arc**, star opacity, brightness, cloud tint. (2) a **motif-memory bank** (the ambition вАФ the "anchor" idea from **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation**): each planted creature stores an abstract **scale-degree** motif that `voiceDegree` re-projects into whatever scale the day is in *right now*, so everything stays in-key as the harmony moves, and `mutatedDegrees` slowly transposes/ornaments/thins it with age вАФ coheres yet evolves. (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms pump, notes ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed (never silent) + an evolving ostinato + every planted voice; notes never scheduled from rAF. **touch-to-plant + watch INPUT** (off recent camera 617 / mic 603,609 / real-data 613,618) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the diversity-audit-banned **WebGPU 5√Ч + WebGL2 4√Ч** of the rolling-10 вАФ the lab over-corrected INTO GPU, so Canvas2D at 1√Ч is now the scarce renderer; the jury's 2026-06-14 Canvas2D ban is ~10 cycles stale + the data inverted) ¬Ј **diurnal generative state-machine + motif-memory re-voicer TECH** (distinct from recent CA/physics/sonification/segmentation) ¬Ј **calm / awe / journey VIBE** (deliberately OFF the kids **funny** autopilot вАФ 603/609/617 went funny 3√Ч in a row). **Renderer**: a single `<canvas>` 2D painterly **side-on landscape diorama** вАФ full-height day-cycling sky gradient, a sun/moon traveling an arc, drifting tinted clouds, layered parallax hills, twinkling night stars, and **cut-paper creatures with simple friendly faces whose eyes close as they fall asleep**; DPR-aware, resize listener, rAF + scheduler + AudioContext torn down on unmount. Kid-safe master `gain (вЙ§0.55) вЖТ lowpass (вЙ§7.5 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) вЖТ destination`, 2.5 s master fade-in, AudioContext created inside the first gesture (iOS unlock). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first kids long-form generative journey-arc with state/memory [qualified вАФ kids "evolving" toys are short loops/one-shots; this is a stateful multi-minute arc] + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Brian Eno вАФ *Music for Airports* / *Bloom***; **Gary Hustwit вАФ *ENO* 2024**, the generative film that plays differently every time; **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation** вАФ the motif-anchor]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** вАФ the 2026 papers are heavy server-side DNNs, the engine implements their browser-feasible Eno-generative ancestor, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І432** (long-form coherence is the live 2026 cs.SD problem вАФ ACG anchor-features + MusicWeaver plan-then-render). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved contemplative/persistent kids cluster (`133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `166-kids-lantern`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП, `152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП; additive вАФ the gates governed). **~2.5 s idle auto-demo**: a ghost hand plants a flower/bird/star and the day runs at an **accelerated ~14√Ч preview** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel + sky shift through indigoвЖТblueвЖТamberвЖТnear-black + creatures wake/sleep AND HEARS the music evolve; on the first real tap it eases to the full ~9-min day. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вАФ no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 32.8s, вЬУ Generating static pages (468/468)**, `/dream/624-kids-day-meadow 6.5 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/canvas in sandbox вАФ the region scale-snap smoothness at cross-fade midpoints + the per-voice balance under a dense 24-creature garden are reasoned, gain-crossfaded + capped by the limiter; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a DEEP 3-renderer fire; banked **`623-kids-day-journey`** (the "massively bigger" **three.js** immersive 3D day-world + Canvas2D fallback вАФ the bolder swing, resurrect when GPU renderers cool) + **`625-kids-day-paper`** (the calmest **inline-SVG** matte cut-paper storybook вАФ resurrect for the explicit bedtime register / to give SVG a fresh entry) as IDEAS ¬І432. Design notes: `src/app/dream/624-kids-day-meadow/README.md`

## (Cycle 429 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D-or-off-screen / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/618-solar-organ](/dream/618-solar-organ)** вАФ Solar Organ вШАпЄПрЯММ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 429. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / cosmic-geomagnetic. **What does the space weather hitting Earth right now sound like? вАФ the live solar wind plays a magnetospheric organ while you watch the aurora that same data is driving.** The lab's **FIRST solar-wind / geomagnetic real-data sonification** вАФ the natural non-duplicative next real-data lane after `613-seismic-choir`'s seismic, and a clean hit on TWO open **JURY 2026-06-14** lanes at once: **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean вАФ mine UNMINED real-world data" (the jury literally named *aurora/Kp*; 613 took seismic, 618 takes the named-next вАФ explicitly NOT the twice-occupied ocean) and **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6√Ч)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback). **Data**: three **keyless, CORS-open NOAA SWPC** feeds fetched in parallel client-side (`AbortController` 6 s, header-row skip, NaN guards, resampled to a 240-bin/24h series) вАФ planetary **K-index** (`вА¶/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json`), interplanetary **magnetic field** (`вА¶/solar-wind/mag-1-day.json`; **`bz_gsm` southward = the substorm trigger**), and **plasma** speed/density (`вА¶/solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json`) вАФ with a built-in **synthetic geomagnetic-storm** fallback (a plausible 24h curve with a substorm spike) so it's fully alive with zero network. The last ~24h replays as an evolving ~75 s sweep, then loops. **Mapping (the magnetospheric organ вАФ deliberately NOT a warm just-intonation drone; it has edges)**: a bank of **inharmonic** partials at non-just ratios `1, 2.04, 3.11, 4.33, 5.78, 7.19, 9.02√Ч`; **wind speed вЖТ base pitch** (вЙИ300вЖТ800 km/s lifts вЙИ70вЖТ165 Hz вАФ higher, more urgent); **southward Bz вЖТ the aurora opens** (a lowpass sweeps open + upper partials fade in = the substorm crescendo; northward Bz = quiet/closed); **Kp вЖТ intensity AND dissonance** (high Kp detunes the partials up to ~38 cents + raises offset beating oscillators вЖТ a tense slow alarm, not a hymn); **density вЖТ granular noise texture**. Master `per-partial gain вЖТ bus вЖТ lowpass вЖТ masterGain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, `webkitAudioContext` fallback, gesture-unlock, ~2.5 s **autostart**. **Visual**: a fullscreen **WGSL** fragment shader builds vertical auroral curtains warped by a **curl of an fBm potential field** (divergence-free flow вАФ Bridson's curl noise); `south`/`kp`/`speed`/`density` drive turbulence, height, flicker, drift, palette вАФ quiet вЖТ faint green `#7CFFB2` low on near-black, storm-south вЖТ curtains rise + bleed **violet вЖТ crimson** at the crown, Kp adds fast shimmer; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected вЖТ a real **Canvas2D** aurora fallback sharing the same four uniforms, `WEBGPU/CANVAS2D` backend badge. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): live 3-feed fetch/parse/resample + synthetic fallback (`space-weather.ts`) ¬Ј inharmonic sonification engine (`audio.ts`) ¬Ј WGSL curl-noise aurora renderer (`aurora.ts`) ¬Ј Canvas2D fallback. **real-world-data (live NOAA solar wind/Kp/Bz) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4√Ч / mic; never-sonified feed, explicitly NOT ocean, distinct from 613 seismic) ¬Ј **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√Ч) ¬Ј **geomagnetic-data sonification + inharmonic organ + curl-noise aurora TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬Ј **cosmic / geomagnetic-storm / ominous-at-peak VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9√Ч). Controls: Start (gesture-unlock), VOL/MUTE, autostart; HUD shows current UTC + live Kp + Bz. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first solar-wind/geomagnetic real-data sonification [grep-verified 0√Ч; 613 seismic вЙ† solar wind] + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Andrea Polli вАФ *Sonic Antarctica* / atmospheric data sonification**; **auroral substorm physics вАФ the Dungey cycle / southward-Bz reconnection**; **Robert Bridson вАФ curl noise**]; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ this cycle's June-2026 spatial-audio finding seeded the banked `620`, not the winner, and the curl-noise/sonification methods are foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І429** (NOAA SWPC verified keyless + CORS-open via two live `curl`s this cycle). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster вАФ esp. `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП (which was *synthetic*; 618 is the REAL aurora driver), plus `321-spectral-flight`вЭ§пЄП/`323-latent-condensation`вЭ§пЄП/`130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП (additive вАФ the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: any feed fails вЖТ synthetic storm + a `text-rose-300` "using sample data" notice; no WebGPU вЖТ Canvas2D + badge; ~2.5 s idle вЖТ autostart so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the aurora curtains move AND HEARS the organ with zero interaction or network. **No API route, no guard** (pure client `fetch` of the public keyless NOAA feeds вАФ GET, no key, no side effects, CORS `*`; no secret). No new npm deps (no CDN, no three.js). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates **exit 0** + all three prerendered static; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 113s, вЬУ Generating static pages (465/465)**, `/dream/618-solar-organ 7.36 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вАФ the live-wire NOAA parse was unexercised [only the synthetic-storm path ran]; the WGSL aurora + WebGPUвЖТCanvas2D downgrade + the sonification feel are reasoned; the autostart + synthetic + Canvas2D fallbacks mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`619-combustion`** ("Combustion" вАФ keyboard/tilt вЖТ a procedural **PTR combustion-engine** instrument [pulse-train fired at `cyl/2√ЧRPM/60` Hz вЖТ recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators вЖТ redline `tanh` scream + overrun backfire, self-contained Blob-URL **AudioWorklet**] on a **WGSL** tachometer; implements arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` and 618 is alive with real planetary data where the engine needs playing вАФ **the strongest resurrect for the next edges fire, now built twice**) + **`620-empty-room`** ("empty room" вАФ device-orientation/head-turn вЖТ **HRTF binaural** "inharmonic presences move around you in the dark, hiding when faced + creeping closer when behind you," audio-FIRST off-screen with an austere near-black Canvas2D radar; refs Cardiff *Forty Part Motet* / Oliveros / Sonic4D arXiv 2506.15759; LOST: the boldest diversity swing at the perennially-0√Ч off-screen lane, but the payoff lives entirely in headphones + eyes-closed head-turning [most unverifiable, weakest at a near-black glance] and overlaps `576-presence-room` вАФ **the ready build-complete resurrect to finally give off-screen its 2nd entry**) as IDEAS ¬І429. Design notes: `src/app/dream/618-solar-organ/README.md`

## (Cycle 428 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-fingertip / off-Canvas2D / funny explorers)

- **[/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster](/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster)** вАФ Shadow Monster Stage рЯСєрЯО≠. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 428. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / embodied-spatial. **Stand in front of the camera and your whole BODY becomes a giant glowing googly shadow-puppet monster on a lit stage вАФ wave and the air WHOOSHES, jump and it BOINGs, get big (step in / arms wide) and it ROARs.** The directest KIDS-register answer to TWO standing **JURY 2026-06-14** provocations at once: **#2** ("commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js, 6√Ч") вАФ the primary renderer is **hand-written WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback; and **#5** ("embodied-spatial got exactly one entry [576] this window then went cold вАФ don't let it be a singleton") вАФ this is the whole-body, off-the-glass follow-through, in a 4-year-old's register. **INPUT вАФ body SILHOUETTE mask**: the webcam frame вЖТ **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter** (selfie/person segmentation, loaded dynamically from the jsDelivr CDN at runtime вАФ **no npm dep**, wrapped in one `try/catch`), the filled body **mask** downsampled into an occupancy grid (deliberately the MASK, *not* pose/skeleton landmarks вАФ grep-distinct from the lab's landmark vision pieces 234/419/568 hands+pose, 258/423/576 face). **Signals from the mask each frame** (`mask.ts`): frame-to-frame change (motion energy) вЖТ **WHOOSH** intensity; centroid rising fast (a jump) вЖТ **BOING**; mask area growing (steps toward camera / arms up) вЖТ a swelling **ROAR**. **CREATURE**: the mask becomes a dark friendly puppet body with a glowing wobbling breathing outline (squash-and-stretch), a soft inner glow that pulses with the roar, whoosh streaks that smear with motion, and two procedural **googly eyes** placed near the top of the mask's bounding box with pupils rolling toward the body's motion. **OUTPUT вАФ WGSL/WebGPU**: the mask uploads as an `r8unorm` texture вЖТ a hand-written fragment shader renders the glowing creature field on a spotlit stage; a **full Canvas2D fallback** (`render2d.ts`) draws the same silhouette + glow + googly eyes, auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent or WebGPU init fails (live backend badge). **SOUND** (`audio.ts`): an always-on warm theatre bed (never silent), a continuous airy whoosh, a soft-attacked heavily-low-passed ROAR (a happy dinosaur, never a scary growl), and a comic spring boing вАФ kid-safe master `gain (0.55) вЖТ lowpass 7.5 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) вЖТ out`, pre-created voices (<50 ms). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): camera capture + MediaPipe ImageSegmenter mask + WGSL/WebGPU stage renderer (+Canvas2D fallback) + motion-energy-driven foley synth. **camera/body-segmentation INPUT** (whole-body, off jury-banned touch 4√Ч / mic; camera/vision was 0√Ч in the rolling-10) ¬Ј **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√Ч) ¬Ј **silhouette-maskвЖТcreature + motion-energyвЖТsynth TECH** (grep-distinct from the lab's landmark/pose vision pieces; NOT warm-JI [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬Ј **silly-friendly giant-shadow-monster-theater VIBE** (funny/edges вАФ the kid-safe form of "off cozy"; NOT a warm drone). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**shadow-puppet / wayang-kulit theatre**; **Daniel Rozin's mechanical mirrors** вАФ a viewer's silhouette materialised as a living reflection; **Tex Avery / Looney Tunes squash-and-stretch**; **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter**]; **soft #1 / #5 NOT hard-claimed** вАФ segmentation-mask-as-creature is grep-distinct but body vision isn't lab-first, and the technique is foundational with no <30-day bind, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І428**. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved camera/body/mirror kids cluster (`217-dance-avatar`вЭ§пЄП, `234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП, `101-camera-song`вЭ§пЄП; additive вАФ the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: the whole camera+MediaPipe init is in **one `try/catch`** вАФ any failure (denied / blocked / CDN-WASM-model load error / unsupported) вЖТ friendly `text-rose-300` notice + three вЙ•88px **ROAR / WHOOSH / BOING** buttons + keys **A/S/D**; no WebGPU вЖТ Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle вЖТ a **ghost-silhouette auto-demo** drifts/waves/jumps/grows on a loop so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the monster move AND HEARS it with zero interaction. **No API route, no guard** (pure client camera + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D вАФ camera frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent; no network/secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe via CDN; three.js avoided). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates exit 0; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вЬУ Compiled successfully in 93s, вЬУ Generating static pages (464/464)**, `/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster 9.36 kB / 116 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox вАФ the segmentation-mask legibility + the whoosh/boing/roar mapping feel are reasoned; the idle ghost-silhouette demo + no-camera buttons mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`615-kids-face-monster`** ("Silly Face Monster" вАФ camera/**FaceLandmarker blendshapes** вЖТ WebGL2 SDF rubber-monster mirror: jawвЖТroar, browsвЖТboing, smileвЖТgiggle, puckerвЖТtoot; refs Tex Avery / Toca Boca / Blendshapes GHUM arXiv 2309.05782; LOST: charming + the most legible causeвЖТeffect, but renders WebGL2 not the demanded WebGPU, and face-puppet overlaps the lab's existing face cluster 258/423/576) + **`616-kids-tilt-zoo`** ("Tilt Zoo" вАФ **device-tilt вЖТ WGSL/WebGPU** instanced googly creatures rolling/bonking + cartoon foley, **camera-FREE**; refs Carl Stalling/Raymond Scott, Treg Brown, one-man-band; LOST: the most reliable at-a-glance + a full WebGPU spectacle, but a physics tray is a smaller concept than becoming a giant monster вАФ **banked precisely as the camera-free WebGPU safety net if 617's camera path proves flaky on review**) as IDEAS ¬І428. Design notes: `src/app/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster/README.md`

## (Cycle 427 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/613-seismic-choir](/dream/613-seismic-choir)** вАФ Seismic Choir рЯМНрЯМЛ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 427. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / ominous-geological. **What does the planet sound like right now? вАФ the live global earthquake feed of the last 24 hours, turned into an ominous trembling sonification: every real quake on Earth becomes a deep resonant groan over a slowly rotating WGSL/WebGPU globe of tectonic light.** The lab's **FIRST seismic / this-class real-data piece** вАФ and the only build this fortnight to hit **THREE JURY 2026-06-14 provocations at once**: **#1** build with EDGES, off cozy (deep inharmonic rock-rumbles + a tritone tectonic drone вАФ the opposite of the banned warm chord); **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6√Ч)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback); **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean вАФ mine UNMINED real-world data" (live **seismic**, explicitly not the now-twice-occupied ocean). **Data**: USGS `summary/all_day.geojson` (every quake on Earth past 24h; no key, CORS, fetched client-side), with a bundled ~46-quake **synthetic fallback** across real fault zones (Honshu/Cascadia/Chile/Sumatra/Tonga/Nepal/Italy + a deep-Benioff subset + a late-day aftershock swarm) so it's fully alive with zero network вАФ a `DATA: LIVE/SAMPLE` badge says which. **Mapping**: magnitude вЖТ loudness + rumble duration + lower fundamental + sub-bass swell (вЙ•4.2); depth_km вЖТ brightness (shallow = bright crack, deep = dull groan); longitude вЖТ stereo pan; latitude вЖТ resonance tilt. The 24h window replays in ~60s on a loop (speed-adjustable) so you hear the **day's seismic rhythm** вАФ clusters, swarms, the silence between. **Synthesis**: each quake = a filtered-noise impact excitation through a bank of **low, slightly-inharmonic bandpass resonators** (ratios 1/1.94/2.41/3.77 over 32вАУ120 Hz вАФ inharmonic so it reads as *rock*, not a synth pitch), mag-scaled decay, sub-bass sine swell on the big ones; under it a continuous dark **tectonic drone** built on tension intervals (minor-2nd beat, tritone-ish, inharmonic) вАФ explicitly NOT a warm JI chord. Ear-safe master `gain вЖТ lowpass ~7k вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter) вЖТ Analyser вЖТ out`, capped gains, soft sub attacks. **Visual**: a WGSL fragment shader raymarches a dark rotating globe of tectonic light; each quake blooms at its true (lon,lat) and ripples outward as an expanding geodesic ring, the whole field trembling in sympathy with the audio (uniforms driven by the `AnalyserNode`) вАФ big quakes flare + shake the screen, shallow = magma-orange, deep = oxblood-red, over ash-grey ridges on black; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected вЖТ a real **Canvas2D** globe fallback (same map/pulses/graticule), `RENDER: WebGPU/Canvas2D` badge. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 3 independent): live USGS fetch/parse (`quakes.ts`) + physical-modeling sonification engine (`audio.ts`) + WGSL WebGPU renderer (`gpu.ts`) + Canvas2D fallback (`render2d.ts`). **real-world-data (live seismic) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4√Ч / mic; explicitly NOT ocean) ¬Ј **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√Ч) ¬Ј **data-sonification + inharmonic physical-model resonant-body rumble TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬Ј **ominous/geological/tectonic VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9√Ч). Controls: **Start** (audio gesture-unlock + `webkitAudioContext`), `Space` play/pause, `M` mute, `[`/`]` slow/speed the timeline; on-screen buttons mirror all (вЙ•44px); ~2.5s idle auto-start so a muted 06:30 glance already shows the globe pulsing. **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5** (#1 first seismic/this-class data in the lab [grep-verified; ocean вЙ† seismic] + #2 вЙ•3 distinct subsystems + #3 named ref [**Florian Dombois вАФ *Earthquake Sounds* / auditory seismology**]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** вАФ this cycle's bound research finding [arXiv 2603.09391 engine-synthesis] seeded the banked `614`, not the winner, said plainly). Honest weak spots (per builder): the WGSL globe is procedural (graticule, not real coastlines) and the per-quake resonator bank is a stylized physical model, not a literal seismogram convolution вАФ so it's *Dombois-adjacent*, not a 1:1 seismogram-to-audio transform. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster (`323-latent-condensation`вЭ§пЄП/`321-spectral-flight`вЭ§пЄП/`262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП; additive вАФ the gates governed the pick). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`612-piano-larynx`** (LPC cross-synthesis "talking piano" on Karel's material вАФ WebGL2 "spectral throat", refs Lansky *Six Fantasies* / Dodge *Speech Songs*; LOST: strong but `606` just mined the his-material vein, and its "his material" is diluted by a synthesized default modulator [file-drop is the real-piano path]) + **`614-combustion`** (procedural combustion-engine instrument вАФ pulse-train fired at RPM вЖТ recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators, AudioWorklet, off-glass keyboard+tilt, WebGPU; implements this cycle's research dive arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` two adult cycles ago) as IDEAS ¬І427. **No API route, no guard** (client-side `fetch` of the public USGS feed вАФ GET, no key, no side effects; no secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0 after a `.next`-corruption clean [3 concurrent builder builds raced the shared `.next` вЖТ ENOENT pages-manifest вЖТ `rm -rf .next` rebuilt clean], `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 38.6s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (464/464)`, `/dream/613-seismic-choir 8.9 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/network in sandbox) вАФ the auto-start + sample dataset + Canvas2D fallback mean the globe pulses + groans on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel sees the real planet's last 24h at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/613-seismic-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 426 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal funny / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/609-kids-blow-parade](/dream/609-kids-blow-parade)** вАФ Blow Parade рЯОИрЯТ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 426. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / loud. **BLOW into the mic and a parade of googly balloon-creatures puffs up bigger and bigger вАФ then rips a whoopee-cushion RASPBERRY and zooms off when you stop.** A full hand-written **WGSL/WebGPU** spectacle (Canvas2D fallback) driven by **breath** вАФ the directest KIDS-side hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #2**: "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6√Ч)." Now that **Safari 26 (Sept 2025) put WebGPU on iPad/iOS** (RESEARCH ¬І426), a WGSL kids spectacle is an iPad-native path, not a desktop flex. Technique: a **breath-energy blow detector** (`detect.ts`: spectral **flatness** + **peakiness** + energy gate over ~120 HzвАУ6 kHz, fast-attack/slow-release smoothing) fires only on loud-AND-noise-like-AND-non-tonal breath, so a yell or sung note is **rejected** вАФ only true breath inflates; the active balloon's radius grows with sustained blow (rising stretched-neck squeak), and on release it enters a fly/tumble/deflate/recycle phase while a **whoopee raspberry** (detuned saw+square through a flutter-square-LFO'd moving lowpass + escaping-air noise, falling pitch) rips. **WGSL renderer**: one instanced quad per balloon, per-instance data (center/radius/hue/squash/spin/eye-look/blink/mouth) вЖТ storage buffer each frame, the fragment shader draws the whole googly creature procedurally; a **Canvas2D fallback** draws the identical parade (auto-selected on no `navigator.gpu`, live backend badge). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): blow detector + inflation physics + raspberry synth + WGSL renderer + Canvas2D fallback. **mic-BLOW/breath INPUT** (non-fingertip вАФ off jury-banned touch 4√Ч; grep-distinct from yell/voice) ¬Ј **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6√Ч; the spectacle lane the jury keeps begging to revive) ¬Ј **breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth TECH** (NOT a warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) ¬Ј **giggly-raspberry FUNNY VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9√Ч; extends the lone 603 funny register so it isn't a singleton). Kid-safe: `masterGain (вЙ§0.55) вЖТ lowpass 7.5 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (-18/6:1/12) вЖТ out`, soft attacks, capped gains, pre-built nodes (<50 ms first blow), never-silent playful bed (NOT a warm drone), no fail states, вЙ•64px targets. Full graceful degrade: no mic вЖТ big **рЯТ® hold-to-blow** button + **Space**; no WebGPU вЖТ Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle вЖТ a **ghost-blow auto-demo** inflates + pops on a loop so the silent 06:30 glance still sees + hears it. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs that drive it [party-blower/whoopee-cushion foley; balloon inflateвЖТrelease physics; Toca Boca]; **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ `95-kids-breath-bubbles` already did blow-via-loudness, so this is a *refinement* [flatness/peakiness blow-vs-voice gate], not a first-breath-input, said plainly; **#5 soft** вАФ WebGPU-on-iPad is the enabling shift but ~9 mo old). Born from RESEARCH ¬І426; resurrects the ¬І424-banked seed `605` (research-grounded, cycle-424 soft-body-WebGPU dive). Love-aligned to Karel's playful kids cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП/`169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП; additive). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`610-kids-stomp-band`** (device-motion shake/stomp вЖТ three.js cartoon junk-pile foley; LOST: rides the relocated three.js monoculture + close to 566) + **`611-kids-face-monster`** (camera/MediaPipe face вЖТ WebGL2 silly-monster mirror; the most novel вАФ first comedic face-puppet вАФ but the MediaPipe-CDN load is the riskiest 06:30 surface + camera was 3√Ч) as IDEAS ¬І426. **No API route, no guard** (pure client mic + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D вАФ no network/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/609-kids-blow-parade` in `app-path-routes-manifest.json` + prerendered static `.html` 22.5 kB), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/mic in sandbox вАФ blow-vs-voice thresholds + the raspberry timbre are reasoned/heuristic; the idle auto-demo + hold-to-blow fallback mean it puffs + pops on a glance with zero hardware). Design notes: `src/app/dream/609-kids-blow-parade/README.md`

## (Cycle 425 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, ONE concept on 3 decomposition techniques)

- **[/dream/606-piano-vivisection](/dream/606-piano-vivisection)** вАФ Piano Vivisection рЯОєрЯФђ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 425. **For**: adult / his real music / clinical-dissective. **Take Karel's OWN recorded piano APART into the singing strings (harmonic) vs. the hammer/key noise (percussive) вАФ and remix the two layers live.** The lab's **FIRST audio source-separation instrument** (grep-verified: NMF/HPSS/SMS/source-separation/stem-split all **0√Ч** across 600+ prototypes) вАФ and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #4**: "mine the vein that produced both 4/5s [557 splat, 583 musaicing] вАФ a fresh analysis/resynthesis technique on *his own* material; do it again вАФ neural source separation, NMF, DDSP." The jury named **583 as the gem to EXTEND** вЖТ AGENT.md maps that to **DEEP**. Technique: **median-filter HPSS** (Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010) вАФ his real solo piano is fetched, sliced (~9s mono @22kHz), STFT'd (Hann 1024/hop 256, complex bins kept), then a **time-median** filter (~17 frames/bin) isolates the sustained horizontal harmonic trails (strings) while a **freq-median** filter (~17 bins/frame) isolates the vertical transient strikes (hammers); soft power-2 Wiener masks вЖТ phase-preserving ISTFT overlap-add вЖТ two independently-mixable layers. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): STFT analysis + median-filter HPSS solver + phase-preserving mask resynthesis/ISTFT + WebGL2 vivisection render (harmonic = cyan/steel horizontal streaks, percussive = magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead, R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback) + off-glass keyboard/tilt control. **audio-file (his piano) + keyboard/tilt off-glass INPUT** (NOT a fingertip [jury-banned touch], NOT mic, NOT camera) ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D [jury-banned 6√Ч]) ¬Ј **median-filter HPSS source-separation TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [jury-banned], NOT onset/beat, NOT concatenative) ¬Ј **clinical/dissective "vivisection" VIBE** (REVEALS the machine inside his warm piano вАФ the opposite of the cozy register the jury banned ~9√Ч). Controls: keyboard `1`/`2` solo/mute strings/hammers, `вЖР/вЖТ` morph balance, `вЖС/вЖУ` gain, `space` play/pause; iOS-gated device-tilt morphs balance on mobile; secondary on-screen faders. ~2.5s idle auto-demo sweeps the balance so a silent 06:30 glance shows the field separating + (un-muted) hears the layers. Synthesized solo-piano fallback if the `/api/audio` fetch fails (emerald "Karel's piano" vs amber "fallback" badge) so it ALWAYS decomposes. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio + raw WebGL2). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first source separation in the lab [grep-verified 0√Ч] + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs [Fitzgerald DAFx 2010; the CataRT/musaicing lineage 583 extends]; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the 2026 DNN source-separation papers [arXiv 2603.04032] are ~3 mo and the classical median-filter method is foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І425**. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one "take his piano apart" concept on 3 techniques); banked **`607-piano-prism`** (NMF: factor his piano into 6 learned spectral components to solo/mute/re-mix вАФ the most technically ambitious, the strongest cycle-2 deepening) + **`608-piano-sieve`** (SMS: sift tonal partials vs the stochastic residual, with freeze + stretch) as IDEAS ¬І425. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 101s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (461/461)`, `/dream/606-piano-vivisection 8.35 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean the field separates on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can morph his own piano apart at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/606-piano-vivisection/README.md`

## (Cycle 420 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers off grep-verified *un-simulated physical instruments* in the 588-deep lab. Ships **`593-kids-sun-shadows`**: *a 4-year-old drags a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts SING вАФ a sundial turned into a sequencer.* A few objects (tree/rock/crystal) throw long cast shadows that sweep the ground as you move the light (gnomon geometry `L = H/tan(altitude)`, swinging away from the sun); scattered glowing **chime stones** ring a warm note when a shadow's tip crosses them вАФ so the music **emerges from where the shadows fall**, not from tapping a note. A slow sun-drag pulls every shadow across the ground in turn, ringing the spatially-ordered stones as a gentle assembling **arpeggio**; tap empty ground to plant another object = another moving playhead. The **lab's first shadow-as-playhead** (cast-shadow geometry as a musical sequencer вАФ grep-verified 0√Ч across 588 prototypes; sundial/gnomon/shadow-sequencer all NONE). Chime stones tuned to a **just-intonation** golden-hour set (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8 Lydian #4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2/1, 9/4`) over a low warm root вАФ spatially ordered so you hear intervallic motion (a chord assembling), deliberately **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-ever-wrong" wash. The sky runs a **dawn rose/amber вЖТ pale noon gold вЖТ dusk violet** journey as the sun rises/sets, the ambient pad deepening at dusk; kids-safe master (`gain вЖТ lowpass вЙ§7k вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ out`), capped object count, soft attacks. The warmest + most surprising of the three explorers and the directest **kids-side** hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks: **#4 chase WARMTH, tension you FEEL not solve** (you drag light, nothing to decode) and the *spirit* of **#1 off the glass / spatial** (light is a movable spatial agent, not a finger-on-a-dot). **touch-drag-the-sun INPUT** (+ optional feature-detected DeviceOrientation tilt, pointer-drag guaranteed) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6√Ч], NOT SVG [jury 5√Ч], NOT the mic [jury 5√Ч] вАФ every ban dodged) ¬Ј **shadow-geometry-as-spatial-sequencer TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬Ј **kids golden-hour contemplative-warm VIBE** (NOT a creature [jury froze the 549/569 spine], NOT the pentatonic-tap wash). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 shadow-as-playhead [grep-verified 0√Ч] + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [sun/gnomon model + per-object shadow-cast geometry + shadowвЖФstone strike sequencer + JI chime synth + sky-color/time-of-day pad journey = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [the **sundial / gnomon** вАФ a shadow as the measure of the sun's motion, here playing time instead of measuring it; **Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project*** (Tate Modern Turbine Hall, 2003) вАФ the single room-filling artificial sun + golden-hour palette]; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ foundational physical phenomenon newly simulated, no <14-day bind, soft RESEARCH ¬І420). Born from RESEARCH ¬І420 (in a 588-deep lab, grep for a real-world acoustic/physical phenomenon nobody has modeled yet вЖТ three 0√Ч gaps: Galton board, jal-tarang/glass-armonica friction resonator, sundial shadow-sequencer). **Resonates with Karel's loved contemplative-sky/water cluster** (`152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `107-ocean-presence`вЭ§пЄП; additive). Degrades fully: no tilt вЖТ drag only; no audio until the Tap-to-begin gate; idle ~2.5s вЖТ the sun auto-drifts so the silent 06:30 glance sweeps shadows + sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вАФ no mic/camera/network/secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`592-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water" вАФ **jal-tarang + glass-armonica**: tap to ring, **RUB to make it SING** via a friction-excited resonator [high-Q bandpass noise + shimmer partials, drive = drag speed]; the deepest fresh *audio primitive*; LOST: most technically novel but 593 is warmer at a glance вАФ **strongest unshipped kids seed, ship next kids cycle**) + **`591-kids-plinko-bells`** ("Bell Drop" вАФ a sonified **Galton/quincunx board (1894)**: balls cascade through pegs into 9 JI bins, the histogram blooms *as a warm major chord* "richest in the middle"; emergent/autonomous, love-aligned to 236/130/262; LOST: richest concept but cooler/STEM-first) banked IDEAS ¬І420. Build-verified (`npm run build` OK, `/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox вАФ the shadowвЖФstone feel, JI tuning by ear, and iOS audio-unlock follow proven patterns but are unexercised here). ¬Ј *(Cycle 419 shipped `588-tidal-organ`, adult WIDE вАФ not separately re-blocked here; doc drift. Cycle 417 below.)*

- **[/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows](/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows)** вАФ Move the Sun вШАпЄПрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 420. **For**: kids (4+). Drag a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts sing: each object throws a long cast shadow that sweeps the ground, and when a shadow's tip crosses a glowing chime stone it rings a warm note вАФ a sundial turned into a sequencer. The lab's first shadow-as-playhead (grep-verified 0√Ч). Touch-drag input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D (NOT three.js/SVG), just-intonation golden-hour chimes over a dawnвЖТnoonвЖТdusk sky journey (NOT the pentatonic wash), no creature (the jury froze that spine). The warmest + most surprising of a WIDE 3-explorer kids fire. Refs: the sundial/gnomon; Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project* (2003). No API route / no guard (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D). Design notes: `src/app/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows/README.md`

## (Cycle 417 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 technical approaches on one concept. Ships **`583-piano-mosaic-field`**: *reach INTO Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it вАФ drag a luminous probe through a 2-D timbre field and the instrument answers with his own closest-matching grains, painting with his timbre in real time.* The lab's **first concatenative-musaicing / corpus-based resynthesis** вАФ Karel's real Welcome-Home solo piano is decoded client-side and shattered into a corpus of ~120 ms Hann grains, each precomputed (per-grain FFT) with a **spectral centroid** (brightness вЖТ field X), **RMS loudness**, and a **crude dominant pitch** (FFT peak + parabolic refine вЖТ register, field Y). On a steady ~18 grains/sec tick a **CataRT-style matcher** scores the whole corpus by weighted distance to the cursor target in (brightness, pitch) space вАФ plus a small loudness preference, a short repeat penalty (never machine-guns one grain), and a touch of jitter вАФ launches the best grain, and overlaps ~4вАУ8 through Hann envelopes so the stream glides and never clicks (warmth lowpass + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter). **This is target-driven grain SELECTION, not blind random granular scatter** вАФ the cursor's position MEANS a timbre and his corpus answers with its nearest sound (the genuine distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП's blind scatter). Visual = one additive point per grain laid out in the timbre field, dim violet at rest вЖТ blooming **warm ember** when voiced, a soft luminous probe + haze following the cursor; the field breathes while idle and a slow **Lissajous auto-demo** drives the cursor after 2.5 s idle so the silent 06:30 glance still sings. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks for the adult side: **extend the 4/5 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` model** ("a *fresh technique* in service of his own music") and **#4 chase WARMTH, not a puzzle** вАФ you don't decode anything, you smear your hand through his own sound. **audio-file (Karel's piano) + pointer/touch-drag INPUT** (NOT camera [3√Ч in the last 10: 568/576/582], NOT the mic [jury-banned 5√Ч]) ¬Ј **WebGL2 additive particle-field OUTPUT** (WebGPU-detected, Canvas2D fallback вАФ NOT three.js [jury 6√Ч], NOT SVG [jury 5√Ч]) ¬Ј **concatenative-musaicing / corpus grain-matching TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo extraction) ¬Ј **adult warm tactile-immersive VIBE** (NOT a cerebral tuning/time puzzle вАФ the jury's named adult disease). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [piano fetch/decode + per-grain spectral-feature corpus build + CataRT matching/concatenation engine + WebGL2 particle render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Diemo Schwarz вАФ CataRT real-time corpus-based concatenative synthesis (2006); Tralie & Berger вАФ *The Concatenator* (arXiv:2411.04366, 2024) / MACataRT (arXiv:2502.00023, Feb 2026); Curtis Roads *Microsound*]; **soft #1** [first target-MATCHED concatenative resynthesis in the lab вАФ distinct from blind granular scatter at 227; said honestly]; **#5 soft/NOT clean-claimed** вАФ RESEARCH ¬І417 dive into the concatenative-musaicing wave, but the technique is foundational (Schwarz 2006), so a soft bind not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH ¬І417 (concatenative musaicing вЖТ reach into his recording and re-voice it). **Pulled by Karel's loves**: the spectral/granular-piano cluster (`227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП, `243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП, `267-spectral-drift`вЭ§пЄП, `321-spectral-flight`вЭ§пЄП, `323-latent-condensation`вЭ§пЄП) + his "use my real Paths music" directive. Degrades fully: no WebGPU вЖТ WebGL2 вЖТ Canvas2D; failed fetch вЖТ a synthesized warm solo-piano fallback so it ALWAYS sounds and ALWAYS has a corpus (emerald **"Karel's piano"** vs amber **"synthesized fallback"** chip). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio вАФ no secret). No new npm deps.
