Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`584-piano-spectral-tide`** (a **phase-vocoder spectral FREEZE** of his piano вАФ grab any moment and stretch it into an infinite warm harmonic tide you scrub through, additive top-48-bin resynthesis with a crispвЖФveil depth axis, WebGL2 oceanic strata; Flanagan&Golden/Dolson + Radigue/Basinski; LOST: beautiful but overlaps his loved spectral cluster [243/267/321] вАФ resurrect once that cluster is out of the 10-window) + **`585-piano-grain-orrery`** (his grains become **gravity-bound orbiting bodies** you stir with your hand, each voicing as it swings past the core/cursor/sounding-ring вАФ n-body physicsвЖТgranular retrigger, WebGL2 feedback-trail orrery; Roads/Xenakis + Ventrella *Particle Life*; LOST: gorgeous but particle/n-body systems are heavy in the lab [`130`вЭ§пЄП/`236`вЭ§пЄП/`262`вЭ§пЄП] вАФ resurrect for a physics-forward fire) banked IDEAS ¬І417. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вАФ the real-audio fetch + GPU render paths follow the proven `557` patterns but are unexercised here). ¬Ј *(Cycle 416 shipped `582-kids-dance-sky`; below.)*

- **[/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field](/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field)** вАФ Piano Mosaic Field рЯОєвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 417. **For**: adult / his real music / warm-tactile. Reach into Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it: his solo piano is shattered into a corpus of tiny grains laid out by timbre, and dragging a warm probe makes the instrument answer with his own closest-matching sound вАФ concatenative musaicing in real time. Target-driven grain SELECTION (CataRT-style), not blind scatter вАФ the distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`. Audio-file + touch-drag input (NOT camera, NOT the mic), WebGL2 additive particle field (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D + synth-piano fallbacks. The 557 model (a fresh technique in service of his own music) + the jury's "chase warmth not a puzzle." Refs: Diemo Schwarz CataRT; Tralie & Berger *The Concatenator*; Curtis Roads *Microsound*. No API route / no guard (public `/api/audio/[id]` fetch + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field/README.md`

## (Cycle 416 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`582-kids-dance-sky`**: *a 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir вАФ they stand in front of the iPad and DANCE; raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens.* The lab's **first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument** (568 was hands only, 576 head only) and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s standing **#1** вАФ "get off the glass; the lab still has zero embodied-spatial prototypes after 570 builds, and the mic is over-used 5√Ч." The front camera tracks **33 body landmarks** (MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker**, loaded **at runtime from a CDN** via `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ вА¶)` вАФ byte-identical to the already-shipping `576-presence-room`, never added to `package.json`; the lighter `pose_landmarker_lite` model for fast load). Pose drives a warm choir + a **Canvas2D glowing skeleton with a blooming aura** (NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2): each **hand's height** вЖТ a distinct warm voice (higher = brighter, left low / right bright); **body spread** (wrist distance) вЖТ **chord openness** (narrow = close root+fifth; arms wide = an open shimmering add-6/9 voicing); **how high the arms are raised** вЖТ master brightness (lowpass opens to 7.5 kHz) + aura glow; **feet / hip motion** вЖТ a soft low bass swell. Harmony = a warm **just-intonation Lydian cluster** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 45/32, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2 over a low A) atop a **constant root+fifth drone** вАФ "no wrong notes" for kids but the expression lives in the *body pose*, **felt not solved**, explicitly **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic kids wash. Kids-safe master (`gain вЖТ lowpass вЙ§7600 вЖТ compressor вИТ10/20/6 вЖТ out`); AudioContext born in the Start tap; all changes `setTargetAtTime`; a Chris-Wilson 25 ms look-ahead pump steadies the ramps; always-on soft drone so it is never silent. **whole-body camera/pose INPUT ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6√Ч], NOT SVG [jury 5√Ч], NOT WebGL2 [4√Ч in the last 10], NOT the mic [jury 5√Ч] вАФ every ban dodged) ¬Ј **pose-keypoint вЖТ harmony/brightness TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬Ј **kids embodied-dance warm-modal VIBE** (NOT a creature, NOT a pentatonic-tap toy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [pose tracking + spreadвЖТJI-chord-openness + arms-raisedвЖТbrightness + feetвЖТbass + Canvas2D aura render = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974) вАФ the original full-body responsive environment where your silhouette *is* the instrument; Daniel Rozin body-as-pixels lineage]; **soft #1** [first whole-figure motion instrument in the lab вАФ hands/head don't count]; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ PoseLandmarker is foundational/months-old, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH ¬І416 (whole-body video-keypoints вЖТ real-time music + Krueger responsive-environment). **4-tier graceful degradation** keeps it alive on any device: pose works вЖТ full skeleton; pose model fails вЖТ Canvas2D frame-difference motion blob drives a simplified mapping; no camera вЖТ finger-drag; no input ~3 s вЖТ a synthetic dancing-skeleton **auto-demo** so the silent 06:30 glance still sings (cancels on real input, resumes after idle). Privacy: frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio вАФ no network to our backend, no secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe is a runtime CDN load). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`581-kids-shadow-band`** (the same concept in **pure Canvas2D frame-differencing** вАФ zero deps, no model download, bulletproof on any iPad; 6 zoned warm voices painted as glowing light-trails, the Krueger/Rozin "body as light"; LOST: a hair closer to the spatial-grid reflex than 582's semantic body mapping вАФ resurrect as the no-download fallback if pose proves flaky on Karel's iPad) + **`583-kids-light-ribbons`** (**Canvas2D optical-flow** вЖТ a *continuous* body-bowed warm choir, speed+upward motion gliding the voices via portamento, flowing light-ribbons advected along the flow; Ondes Martenot/Theremin lineage; the freshest *musical* idea of the three but conceptually adjacent to last week's `579-silk-choir` [another continuous-bent warm choir] вАФ LOST on diversity THIS cycle only; resurrect once 579 is out of the 10-window) banked IDEAS ¬І416. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/582-kids-dance-sky` 5.84 kB / 112 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/pose/audio in sandbox вАФ the one real risk is whether MediaPipe pose loads on Karel's actual iPad at 06:30). ¬Ј *(Cycle 415 shipped `580-tide-breath`; below.)*

- **[/dream/582-kids-dance-sky](/dream/582-kids-dance-sky)** вАФ Sky Choir рЯХЇрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 416. **For**: kids (4+). A 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir вАФ stand in front of the iPad and DANCE: raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens. The lab's first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument: MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (33 landmarks, runtime CDN load, no package.json change) вЖТ a Canvas2D glowing skeleton + blooming aura; hand height вЖТ warm voices, body spread вЖТ chord openness, arms raised вЖТ brightness, feet вЖТ bass swell. Whole-body camera/pose input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D output (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2), warm just-intonation Lydian over a root+fifth drone (NOT the pentatonic wash). The directest answer to the jury's #1 "get off the glass / zero embodied-spatial." 4-tier fallback (pose вЖТ frame-diff blob вЖТ drag вЖТ auto-demo). Refs: Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974); Daniel Rozin. No API route / no guard (pure client camera + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/582-kids-dance-sky/README.md`

## (Cycle 415 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers all chasing the jury's WARMTH dare. Ships **`580-tide-breath`**: *the real ocean breathes a warm chord вАФ a direct, keyless, client-side fetch of your coast's LIVE marine conditions makes the actual swell the breath of a sustained just-intonation drone, over a WebGPU water-surface that rises and falls with the live tide.* The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13** on THREE axes at once: **#1** revive the starved WebGPU (1√Ч across the last 15; the lab fled into a three.js monoculture) вАФ 580 renders a WGSL fragment-shader water-surface with a Canvas2D hot-downgrade; **#2** real-world-data sonification (**0√Ч the whole window**, named-starved every jury) вАФ I curled the endpoint live (`marine-api.open-meteo.com/v1/marine`, no key, `access-control-allow-origin: *`, returned wave 1.28 m / swell 12.1 s); **#4** chase WARMTH, not a puzzle вАФ no interaction after the play gesture, no melody, no beat, just a luminous sea and a chord the ocean is playing. On play: optional geolocation (3 s timeout вЖТ silent Monterey-Bay default) вЖТ keyless Open-Meteo Marine fetch (baked sample on offline/failure, shown amber **"Sample swell (feed offline)"** vs emerald **"Live ¬Ј Open-Meteo Marine ¬Ј {place}"**). Three live numbers drive the whole piece: **swell_wave_period** вЖТ a sine breath LFO on master gain + lowpass (one inhale/exhale per swell cycle, ~6вАУ18 s), **wave_height** вЖТ breath depth, **sea_surface_temperature** вЖТ timbre warmth. Sound = six detuned oscillator pairs tuned to a **D2 just-intonation chord** (1, 3/2, 2, 5/2, 3, 7/4) through a warm `gain вЖТ lowpass вЖТ compressor вЖТ out`; **no note-tapping, no melody, no onset/beat вАФ one continuous breathing chord.** Visual = a sum-of-sines water surface breathing in sync; WebGPU (WGSL: waterline + horizon glow + shimmer + temperature-tinted palette) with a Canvas2D hot-fallback, alive from frame one. **real-marine-data INPUT ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback вАФ NOT three.js [jury 6√Ч], NOT SVG [jury 5√Ч], NOT the mic [jury 5√Ч] вАФ every ban dodged + revives the starved renderer) ¬Ј **tidal-data sonification TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬Ј **warm-oceanic-drone VIBE** (NOT a cerebral puzzle). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [marine fetch + marineвЖТJI breath/harmony mapping + WebGPU/Canvas2D water render + breathing-drone synth = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Andrea Polli вАФ ocean/climate-data sonification; √Йliane Radigue & La Monte Young вАФ warm long-form just-intonation drone]; **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ real-data sonification broadly exists [`314-solar-wind` space-weather, `437-wiki-pulse`, `575-kids-sky-song` weather, `355` seismic], so a live-MARINE breathing-drone is a fresh source + breath structure, not a fresh primitive; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ Open-Meteo Marine is infrastructure, not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH ¬І415 (NOAA space-weather is keyless+live BUT `314-solar-wind` already owns it вЖТ grep saved a near-duplicate; the unmined warm real-data source is the OCEAN). **Resonates with Karel's loved ocean cluster** (`107-ocean-presence`вЭ§пЄП, `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП; additive). Degrades fully: no location вЖТ Monterey Bay; no/failed network вЖТ baked sample swell, always plays; no WebGPU вЖТ Canvas2D; autonomous so the silent 06:30 glance always shows a breathing sea that sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (public read-only no-key client fetch вАФ no secret; CSP allows `https:` connect-src). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`581-still-bloom`** (off the glass: device-motion *stillness* вЖТ an audio-first warm Radigue/Oliveros drone that BLOOMS from silence only while you hold the phone still, motion scatters it; minimal Canvas2D bloom вАФ the off-glass/audio-only/conceptual lane the jury keeps naming 0√Ч; LOST: lowest ambition, no WebGPU, payoff needs a held-still device so a silent glance sees only the breathe-demo) + **`582-piano-aurora`** (a warm piano's *harmony* вАФ 12-bin FFT chroma, NOT onset/beat вАФ paints a WebGPU curl-noise aurora confined to a warm amberвЖТroseвЖТviolet arc; built-in generative pad + drop-your-own file; Anadol/Akten/Bridson; LOST: a beautiful audio-reactive *visualizer* but the lab's flow-field/aurora lane is crowded [130вЭ§пЄП/262вЭ§пЄП/441] and it carries no real data вАФ resurrect bound to Karel's actual `/api/audio/[id]` tracks) banked IDEAS ¬І415. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **451/451** pages, `/dream/580-tide-breath` 6.6 kB / 113 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/audio/geolocation/network in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 414 shipped `579-silk-choir`; below.)*

- **[/dream/580-tide-breath](/dream/580-tide-breath)** вАФ Tide Breath рЯМКрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 415. **For**: adult / meditative / real-world-data. The real ocean breathes a warm chord: a keyless client-side fetch of your coast's LIVE marine conditions makes the actual swell the breath of a sustained just-intonation drone (swell period вЖТ breath rate, wave height вЖТ breath depth, sea-surface-temp вЖТ timbre), over a WebGPU water-surface that rises and falls with the live tide. Real-marine-data input (NOT the mic), WebGPU (NOT three.js/SVG вАФ revives the jury-starved renderer), Canvas2D fallback; autonomous, no puzzle. The directest answer to the jury's #1 (revive WebGPU) + #2 (real-world-data, 0√Ч the window) + #4 (warmth). Refs: Andrea Polli; √Йliane Radigue; La Monte Young; Open-Meteo Marine. No API route / no guard (public no-key client fetch). Design notes: `src/app/dream/580-tide-breath/README.md`

## (Cycle 414 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`579-silk-choir`**: *grab a luminous sheet of silk and PULL it вАФ the membrane's tension bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord, so pulling it taut makes the voices rise and brighten and letting it billow lets them sigh and fall.* The pitch is **continuous and physical вАФ you bend the chord with your hands, you never tap a discrete note** вАФ the directest break from **JURY 2026-06-13**'s banned kids **pentatonic-tap-wash** (вЙИ6 of 7 kids pieces are "tap вЖТ a discrete consonant note вЖТ pretty viz"), on the **jury-starved WebGPU** renderer it explicitly wanted back (starved 1√Ч; the lab fled into a three.js monoculture). The sheet is a 2-D grid of point masses (34√Ч24) integrated with **verlet / position-based dynamics** (velocity implied by `position вИТ previousPosition`; relaxation passes satisfy structural + shear springs; top edge pinned so it hangs like a curtain). When `navigator.gpu` exists the whole solver runs in a **WebGPU compute shader (WGSL)** вАФ integrate + relax passes over storage buffers, read back per frame вАФ with a **runtime hot-downgrade** to a byte-equivalent CPU solver if WebGPU is absent/fails (so it looks + plays identically on an older iPad); both render the same glowing additive filaments (Canvas2D), violet at rest вЖТ gold where pulled taut. Multi-touch grabs the nearest node; the sheet is split into six regions and each region's **mean stretch past rest length** (a 0..1 tension) continuously **bends one voice of a just-intonation major-add9 over A2** (ratios 1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1, 9/4) up to ~5 semitones via `setTargetAtTime` portamento, opening a per-voice lowpass as you pull вАФ the chord physically warps under your hands and resolves home on release; **there is no note-tapping anywhere.** Kids-safe master (`gain вЖТ lowpass вЙ§8 kHz вЖТ compressor вЖТ out`); AudioContext born in the first tap; the silk shimmers from frame one and a silent idle **auto-demo** sweeps a grab across it so the 06:30 phone glance sings with zero setup. **multi-touch-stretch INPUT ¬Ј WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback вАФ NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2-at-edge, NOT the mic вАФ every jury ban dodged + revives the starved renderer) ¬Ј **verlet-membrane tensionвЖТcontinuous-pitch TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) ¬Ј **warm/silky/continuous-expressive-pitch VIBE** (NOT a pentatonic-tap toy, NOT a creature). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [verlet/PBD solver + multi-touch grab + tensionвЖТcontinuous-bowed-chord synth + GPU/Canvas2D render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Thomas Jakobsen *Advanced Character Physics* (GDC 2001) вАФ the silk *is* a Jakobsen verlet cloth; Ondes Martenot / Theremin вАФ the continuous-hand-bent-pitch lineage, the reason there are no discrete taps]; **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ verlet exists at `303-kids-wind-harp` as 1-D strings, so a 2-D grab-stretch *membrane* sounding continuous tensionвЖТpitch is a fresh interaction + musical structure, not a fresh primitive; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ no <14-day bind, WebGPU-production-ready is a months-old 2026 trend, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH ¬І414 (WebGPU production-ready across all browsers in 2026 + verlet membrane вЖТ a stretchable singing sheet). Degrades fully: no WebGPU вЖТ CPU/Canvas2D; no touch вЖТ mouse drag; failures in `text-rose-300`. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D вАФ no network, no secrets). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`580-silk-veil`** (the same grab-stretch concept in pure **Canvas2D** вАФ the bulletproof-iPad path; LOST: most reliable but Canvas2D-only so does NOT revive the jury-starved WebGPU; resurrect for a max-reliability fire) + **`581-silk-ripple`** (a different interaction вАФ **flick/slap вЖТ traveling waves** that bend the chord in ripples; WebGPU + Canvas2D; LOST: most fun for a 4yo + also revives WebGPU but a *variant* of the headline with a subtler bend; resurrect for a playful fire / fold in as 579's cycle-2 gesture) banked IDEAS ¬І414. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **450/450** pages, `/dream/579-silk-choir` 5.83 kB / 109 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/touch/audio in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 413 shipped `576-presence-room` вАФ the lab's first head-tracked binaural, adult WIDE вАФ not separately blocked in INDEX; doc drift. Cycle 412 below.)*

- **[/dream/579-silk-choir](/dream/579-silk-choir)** вАФ Silk Choir рЯ™°рЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 414. **For**: kids (4+). Grab a luminous sheet of silk and pull it вАФ the membrane's tension bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord, so pulling it taut makes the voices rise and brighten and letting it billow lets them sigh and fall; the pitch is continuous and physical, you bend the chord with your hands and never tap a note. A 2-D verlet / position-based-dynamics membrane on a **WebGPU compute shader** (with a runtime hot-downgrade to a CPU/Canvas2D solver), six regions each bending one voice of a JI major-add9 by stretch via `setTargetAtTime` portamento. Multi-touch stretch input (NOT the mic), WebGPU (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2 вАФ revives the jury-starved renderer), Canvas2D fallback. The directest break from the banned kids pentatonic-tap-wash. Refs: Thomas Jakobsen *Advanced Character Physics* (2001); Ondes Martenot / Theremin. No API route / no guard (pure client). Design notes: `src/app/dream/579-silk-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 412 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`575-kids-sky-song`**: *today's REAL current weather writes a child a little song вАФ and the child plays it.* The piece does a direct client-side fetch of the child's **live local weather** (Open-Meteo вАФ free, no-key, no-auth, CORS; geolocation with a silent default-coordinate fallback, a baked "example sky" if offline) and lets the **real weather COMPOSE an evolving generative piece**: WMO `weather_code`+`is_day` pick the key/mode/instruments (clearвЖТbright major celesta ¬Ј overcastвЖТsuspended pads ¬Ј rainвЖТminor-pentatonic plucks ¬Ј snowвЖТglassy maj7 bells ¬Ј fogвЖТlow drone ¬Ј thunderвЖТhushed dorian ¬Ј nightвЖТdropped an octave), `wind_speed`вЖТtempo, `cloud_cover`вЖТnote density, `temperature`вЖТtimbral warmth, `precipitation`вЖТan overlaid droplet voice. A Chris-Wilson **look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms pump, notes scheduled ~120 ms ahead) plays an 8-step ostinato that **mutates + re-seeds over time** (Eno-style recombination) so it's a moving piece, not a loop; the child **touches a raw-WebGL2 aurora field** to add their own glowing voice, always snapped to today's key (no wrong note, no fail state). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13 #2** (real-world-data sonification вАФ **0√Ч the whole window**) + **#4** (chase warmth, not a puzzle), and a grep-verified **kids-first real-data sonification** (the lab's prior weather toys `115`/`120`/`83` are all *synthetic*/"Zero API"; the only real-data pieces `355`/`337` are adult, out of frame). **live-weather-data + touch INPUT ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 aurora OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback вАФ NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT the mic вАФ every jury ban dodged) ¬Ј **real-data generative-sonification TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo *extraction* вАФ this *generates*) ¬Ј **warm/dreamy/wonder VIBE**. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 qualified kids-first real-external-data sonification + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [live Open-Meteo fetch + weatherвЖТgenerative-song engine + look-ahead Web Audio scheduler + WebGL2 aurora render = 4] + #3 named refs [Andrea Polli climate-data sonification; Natalie Miebach woven weather-scores; Brian Eno generative recombination]; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the sonification lineage is foundational, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Degrades fully: WebGL2 absent вЖТ Canvas2D field that still drifts + sings; geolocation denied вЖТ silent default city; fetch failed вЖТ baked example sky + `text-rose-300` note, always plays. **No API route, no `guard`** (Open-Meteo is a public read-only no-key client fetch вАФ CSP-verified the enforced `connect-src вА¶ https:` allows it; no secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`573-kids-sky-window`** (raw-WebGL2 luminous GLSL sky вАФ fbm clouds/sun/rain/lightning; the richest atmosphere renderer вАФ LOST: 575's generative engine is the bigger concept leap; resurrect for an atmosphere-forward fire) + **`574-kids-weather-today`** (Canvas2D cut-paper diorama with a smiling sun + paper critter вАФ the warmest, most 4yo-legible, most iPad-safe вАФ LOST: closest in *form* to the lab's existing synthetic weather toys) banked IDEAS ¬І412. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **448/448** pages, `/dream/575-kids-sky-song` 8.21 kB / 114 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGL2/audio/geolocation in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 411 shipped `570-spoken-spell`; below.)*

- **[/dream/575-kids-sky-song](/dream/575-kids-sky-song)** вАФ Sky Song рЯМ¶пЄПрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 412. **For**: kids (4+). Today's REAL local weather writes a little song and the child plays it: the live Open-Meteo conditions compose an evolving generative piece (key/mode/tempo/density/timbre all from the real sky), a look-ahead scheduler plays an ostinato that mutates + re-seeds over time (Eno-style), and the child touches a WebGL2 aurora field to add their own voice in today's key вАФ no wrong note, no fail state. Live-weather + touch input (NOT the mic), WebGL2 aurora (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D fallback. The lab's first kids real-data sonification (prior weather toys are synthetic). Refs: Andrea Polli, Natalie Miebach, Brian Eno. No API route / no guard (public no-key client fetch). Design notes: `src/app/dream/575-kids-sky-song/README.md`

## Cycle 411 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers. Ships **`570-spoken-spell`**: *speak, and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation вАФ Resonance hears your speech (real Web Speech API recognition), maps each word's letters to a D-pentatonic pitch, vowel-ratio to duration, and freezes finished phrases into looping ostinati, so the longer you speak the denser the canon and you can hear your own sentence inside it.* The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-12 #2** ("find sound in **language**, not a simulated physical field") and its #5-revival ask: born from this cycle's dive into the **2026 in-browser ASR wave** (transformers.js running Whisper/LiteASR/Cohere Transcribe fully client-side via ONNX/WASM вАФ RESEARCH ¬І411). **live-speech-recognition INPUT** (voice вАФ NOT the jury's 7√Ч finger-on-glass default) **+ SVG word-river OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [rolling-10 4√Ч вЖТ BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬Ј **continuous-transcriptionвЖТlinguistic-musicвЖТaccretive-loop TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвЖТdrone вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **ritual/incantatory/cerebral VIBE**. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 qualified lab-first [first piece where *continuous* speech transcription drives the composition itself вАФ distinct from `189-voice-scene`'s keyword-switch and `345-speech-melody`'s *typed* text] + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [Web Speech ASR + deterministic phonemeвЖТpitch engine + sample-accurate look-ahead scheduler + accretive loop-voice memory + SVG render = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Steve Reich *Different Trains*/*It's Gonna Rain* вАФ speech-melody; Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* вАФ languageвЖТresonance]; **#5 soft/honest** вАФ the ASR-wave bind is ~3 months, not <14 days, so not claimed as a clean 5). Degrades fully: no Web Speech API (iOS/Firefox) вЖТ typed-text fallback runs the same mapping; an auto-demo "speaks" a seeded incantation from frame one so the silent 06:30 glance always shows + hears the accreting canon. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG + Web Speech API вАФ mic is analysis-only, no recording/upload/network, no secrets; imports the existing read-only `@/lib/browser/speech-recognition` util). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`571-the-withholding`** (music you can only hear by staying silent вАФ mic as an *inverse* gate, a conceptual/critical piece on attention-as-cost; Cage *4'33"*/Christine Sun Kim вАФ LOST: strongest pure concept but a quiet-room/"imagine the silence" demo is less glance-legible; resurrect to open the missing conceptual lane) + **`572-orrery-tunings`** (turn/tilt your phone to tune into a just-intonation harmonic sky вАФ gyro вЖТ raw WebGL2 aurora; La Monte Young *Dream House*/Oliveros вАФ LOST: lowest ambition 2/5, adjacent to existing soundfield/tilt/JI rooms + flagged FBM frame-drops on iPad) banked IDEAS ¬І411. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 447/447 pages, `/dream/570-spoken-spell` 5.68 kB / 109 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no mic/audio in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 410 shipped `569-kids-ember-keeper`; below.)*

- **[/dream/570-spoken-spell](/dream/570-spoken-spell)** вАФ Spoken Spell рЯЧ£пЄПвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 411. **For**: adult / live-performance / language-as-music. Speak and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation вАФ each word's letters map to a D-pentatonic pitch, finished phrases freeze into looping ostinati, so the canon thickens the longer you speak and you hear your own sentence inside it. Web Speech API (live ASR) вЖТ deterministic phonemeвЖТpitch + look-ahead scheduler вЖТ SVG word-river that glows each word as it sounds. Voice input (NOT a finger), SVG (NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Typed-text fallback + seeded auto-demo for iOS/Firefox/silent glances. Refs: Steve Reich *Different Trains*; Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room*; the 2026 in-browser ASR wave. Design notes: `src/app/dream/570-spoken-spell/README.md`

## (Cycle 410 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`569-kids-ember-keeper`**: *a glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped body each day a child comes back вАФ and never resets to zero.* The lab's **FIRST cross-session persistent state** in 569 prototypes (grep-verified: no prior dream piece writes a creature/world to `localStorage` and reloads it across visits/days) вАФ the directest answer to the **JURY 2026-06-12 #6**: *"518-living-ember is the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days вАФ extend THAT: a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow, instead of another 90-second glow toy."* The body is not stored as pixels or a model file вАФ it is **regrown from a saved "genome"** (`genome.ts`, `localStorage` key `resonance.ember-keeper.v1`) every load. The genome **only ever accumulates**: `visits`, `distinctDays`, learned pentatonic `palette`, and an append-only list of growth `tokens`. **Day-aware growth** (the big visible change): on load it compares stored `lastVisitDay` to `new Date().toDateString()`; a new calendar day adds a big glowing **limb** placed on a golden-angle (phyllotaxis) spiral вАФ so today's creature is visibly bigger than yesterday's. Within a day, humming/petting adds small permanent **fronds** + brightens the ember. **Deterministic regrowth**: each token seeds a `mulberry32` PRNG so the same genome always regrows the same body (limbs never jump between loads вАФ D'Arcy Thompson made literal). **Voice feeding**: mic вЖТ autocorrelation pitch detection (Chris Wilson method, `pitch.ts`) вЖТ quantized to C-major pentatonic (nothing ever wrong) вЖТ the degree is echoed back softly + saved to the palette; the **mic is analysis-only** (dead-end `AnalyserNode`, never recorded/stored/transmitted вАФ only the derived integer degree persists). **three.js** render; kids-safe `gain вЖТ lowpass(8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext in the Wake gesture (iOS unlock). **For the 06:30 hands-free review** (the reviewer can't wait a real day): a fresh device with empty storage SEEDS a believable history вАФ **5 visits across 4 days, a 5-note palette, 10 growth tokens (4 day-limbs + 6 fronds)** вАФ so the glance always shows a rich, many-limbed creature breathing from frame one and singing on wake; and a clearly-secondary **рЯМЩ next-day** button TIME-TRAVELS so Karel can watch a brand-new limb sparkle into place on demand, in seconds. **mic-voice + tap INPUT** (off-glass core вАФ NOT the jury-flagged finger-on-glass default) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [3√Ч in the rolling-10, nudging the ban], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬Ј **cross-session-persistent procedural-morphology TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвЖТdrone вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **companion/relationship/growth VIBE** (NOT a calm-sensory 90-second glow toy вАФ it rewards *returning*, the jury's exact #6 ask). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first-ever cross-session persistent state [grep-verified lab-first] + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems [autocorrelation pitch + accumulating-genome persistence engine + deterministic phyllotaxis morphology + three.js render + Web Audio = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Tamagotchi (Maita/Bandai 1996) вАФ lives in the device & rewards returning; Steve Grand's *Creatures* (1996) вАФ accumulating internal state drives outward form; D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form* (1917) вАФ golden-angle limb placement taken directly] + #4 multi-cycle Ember spine cycle 1; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ no <14-day bind, cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly; the dive confirmed the live thread [Niantic Peridot generative-AI creatures, the rctAI "AI pets" wave]). Graceful degradation on both axes: mic-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-to-pet still grows; WebGL-fail вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a DOM/CSS orb with one petal per token. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic + Web Audio + three.js вАФ no network, no secrets). No new npm deps (three already installed). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вАФ *a creature genuinely different each day you return* вАФ via what evolves); siblings **`570-kids-ember-song`** (the song-memory take: hummed phrases append to a persistent library, woven into a longer/richer piece each return вАФ WebGL2 luminous strands; LOST: payoff is audible/abstract, least glance-legible at a silent review вАФ the biggest *concept*, resurrect for a music-forward fire) + **`571-kids-ember-nest`** (the accumulating-world take: each visit plants a persistent SVG cut-paper flower/star/friend вЖТ a fuller world + denser additive chord; LOST: closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden` self-seeding garden + another SVG nudges the 4√Ч ban) banked IDEAS ¬І410. Extends Karel's loved companion/embodied lane (`234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП, `217-dance-avatar`вЭ§пЄП). Build-verified (`npm run build`), not browser-verified (no audio/WebGL in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 409 shipped `568-conductor-hands`; below.)*

- **[/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper](/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper)** вАФ Ember Keeper рЯФ•рЯР£. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 410. **For**: kids (4+) / companion / cross-day memory. A glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped body each day you come back вАФ and never resets. The lab's first cross-session persistent state: the body is regrown from a saved `localStorage` genome that only accumulates; a new calendar day adds a phyllotaxis limb, humming/petting adds fronds. Hum to feed it (analysis-only mic вЖТ pentatonic), tap to pet, рЯМЩ time-travel to watch it grow. three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU); off-glass voice input. The jury's #6 ("a creature genuinely changed tomorrow") answered literally. Refs: Tamagotchi (1996) / Steve Grand *Creatures* / D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form*. Design notes: `src/app/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper/README.md`

## (Cycle 409 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`568-conductor-hands`**: *raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi вАФ your **left hand beats one voice, right hand the other**; the system snaps the two tempi to the nearest irrational ratio (вИЪ2, ѕЖ, e/2, ѕА/2) so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can **NEVER share a downbeat** вАФ metric dissonance you feel in your own arms.* **Cycle 2 of the polytempo spine** (`514-polytempo-loom` = cycle 1, the autonomous 5-voice loom the **JURY 2026-06-12 #1 named: "take it to cycle 2 AND chase a 4/5"**, and #4: *"514 had no embodiment вАФ build the SECOND time-tension piece where gestures set incommensurable tempi"*). Where 514 was set *for* you, 568 you *conduct*: **MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction** (`tracking.ts`) tracks each wrist's vertical motion, fires a downbeat at the bottom of each conducting stroke (velocity zero-crossing downвЖТup, 150 ms debounce), and averages the last 3 inter-beat intervals вЖТ that hand's tempo (clamped 37вАУ300 BPM). The **incommensurability lock** (`snapToIrrational`): voice A = your gestured base period; voice B is forced to `periodA / ratio` where ratio is the irrational *nearest in log-space* to what you actually gestured вАФ you choose roughly the spread, the math guarantees the pulses are non-periodic against each other. **Web Audio** (`audio.ts`): two warm pluck voices (triangle + octave sine, fast envelope) playing the same D-pentatonic cell (voice B up a perfect fifth вАФ consonant, distinguishable), each on its OWN sample-accurate **"Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms pump, `start(t)` 120 ms ahead); master `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dB, 20:1) вЖТ destination` limiter; AudioContext in the Start click (iOS unlock). **three.js** (`render.ts`): a Nancarrow **phase-space** вАФ two emissive markers orbit their rings (one revolution per beat-period) tracing a **Lissajous ribbon that NEVER closes** because the ratio is irrational (the visible proof they never realign); each marker flashes on its scheduled beat; violet=voice A, amber=voice B, dark indigo field. **camera hand-tracking INPUT** (off-glass вАФ the directest dodge of the jury's 7√Ч finger-on-glass ban, and the freshest input vs the last 4 cycles: mic @406, audio-file @405/407, shake @408, tilt @404) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [rolling-10 4√Ч вЖТ BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬Ј **conducting-gestureвЖТtempoвЖТpolytempo-scheduler TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвЖТdrone вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **embodied/cerebral-rhythmic/Nancarrow VIBE** (the directest literal answer to jury #4 "two gestures set incommensurable tempi"). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [MediaPipe beat-extraction + irrational-lock + dual look-ahead schedulers + three.js phase-space = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Conlon Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* вАФ the irrational-ratio canon IS the lock; Ligeti *Continuum/D√©sordre*; Reich phase pieces вАФ but the irrational lock means resolution is mathematically impossible, "Reich phasing that can never close"] + #4 spine cycle 2 вАФ the jury's exact ask; **#1 contestable** вАФ MediaPipe Hands exists [234/258/287/302/419/524] but *gestureвЖТtempo* is a new cross-modal input, discounted honestly; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ no <14-day finding to bind, cs.SD still server-ML [the jury's own #5 call-out], said plainly). From frame one a silent auto-demo orbits two synthetic conductors at ѕЖ, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the drift; camera-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + two tap pads (fully playable). Camera/landmark data is **local only** (no recording, no upload, no network); **no API route, no `guard`**. No new npm deps (three already installed; MediaPipe via CDN dynamic import). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`569-conductor-batons`** (two-thumb tap-tempo вЖТ WebGL2 scrolling Nancarrow piano-roll, the cleanest + most legible вАФ LOST on finger-on-glass + least embodied) + **`570-conductor-baton-motion`** (DeviceMotion baton вЖТ three.js вАФ LOST: device-motion repeats cycle 408's input) banked IDEAS ¬І409. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 445/445 pages, `/dream/568-conductor-hands` 5.5 kB / 297 kB First Load [three.js + MediaPipe] prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/audio/GPU in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 408 shipped `566-kids-shake-band`; below.)*

- **[/dream/568-conductor-hands](/dream/568-conductor-hands)** вАФ Conductor's Hands рЯЂ±рЯОЉ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 409. **For**: adult / embodied / time-tension. Raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi вАФ left hand one voice, right hand another, each snapped to an irrational ratio so the two consonant pulses drift forever and never share a downbeat (metric dissonance in your own arms). Cycle 2 of the 514-polytempo-loom spine, made embodied. MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction вЖТ dual look-ahead schedulers вЖТ three.js never-closing Lissajous. Off-glass camera input (NOT a finger), three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Refs: Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* / Ligeti / Reich. Design notes: `src/app/dream/568-conductor-hands/README.md`

## (Cycle 408 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 orthogonal off-glass explorers. Ships **`566-kids-shake-band`**: *shake the tablet like a maraca and a whole Brazilian **batucada** band dances and plays back in time вАФ gentle jiggles ring the chocalho shimmer, big arm-swings bring in the surdo bass drum; five glowing 3D characters bounce + flash on a darkened stage, one per instrument.* The child's **whole arm is the instrument** вАФ off-glass, embodied, joyful. **DeviceMotion shake-onset detection** (`accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude вЖТ adaptive threshold 1.4√Ч rolling-avg, 3.5 m/s¬≤ floor, 80 ms refractory; iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) with intensity tiers (вЙИ3/9/18 m/s¬≤) selecting which of **five from-scratch synth percussion voices** fires (surdo sine 130вЖТ42 Hz pitch-drop ¬Ј caixa bandpass-noise+triangle snap ¬Ј repique sine+transient ¬Ј agog√і three sine partials ¬Ј chocalho soft noise grain). A look-ahead **92-BPM groove bed** plays a real 16-step batucada pattern always-on so the child's shakes layer on a musical bed. **three.js stage** вАФ five emissive `IcosahedronGeometry` characters with per-character `PointLight` flash + spring-physics bounce. Master `gain вЖТ lowpass(7.5 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dB, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter so even a hard slam can't spike a child's ears. Zero-permission CSS auto-demo bounces the orbs from frame one (audio waits for Start); motion-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + pointer-drag-velocity fallback. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [DeviceMotion onset + percussion pool + groove scheduler + three.js stage + drag fallback = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Brazilian batucada bloco вАФ shake-intensity tiers ARE the ensemble's dynamic hierarchy; also Evelyn Glennie's whole-body rhythm]; **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ accelerometer input [417/553] and synth percussion both exist; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the dive's bind was to the jury-flagged camera-body lane, deliberately avoided). **device-motion / shake INPUT** (off-glass вАФ distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs: mic @406, tilt @404; the directest finger-reflex dodge) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [rolling-10 4√Ч вЖТ BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) ¬Ј **accelerometer-onsetвЖТpercussion-pool TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвЖТdrone вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **energetic/celebratory/embodied VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ answers jury #6 directly). **Ideal for Karel's 06:30 mobile review вАФ he can literally shake his phone to play.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`565-kids-sing-choir`** (mic-sing live pitch вЖТ WebGL2 particle creatures вЖТ Jacob Collier-style 4-voice live vocal harmonizer; the biggest *concept* вАФ LOST on the diversity gate: mic repeats cycle 406's input) + **`567-kids-color-garden`** (rear-camera dominant-color вЖТ WebGL2 instanced glowing plants вЖТ Scriabin hueвЖТpitch garden the real world grows; LOST: camera-color adjacent to `368-rainbow-quest` + the trodden camera lane + lighting-fragile) banked IDEAS ¬І408. Extends Karel's loved rhythm/device-play lane (`98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП, `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП). Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 444/444 pages, `/dream/566-kids-shake-band` 5.07 kB / 293 kB First Load [three.js] prerendered static), not browser-verified (no accelerometer/audio/WebGL in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 407 shipped `564-piano-splat-cathedral`; below: cycle 405's `557-piano-splat-galaxy`.)*

- **[/dream/566-kids-shake-band](/dream/566-kids-shake-band)** вАФ Kids Shake Band рЯ•Б. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 408. **For**: kids (4+) / off-glass / embodied rhythm. Shake the tablet like a maraca вЖТ a Brazilian batucada band of five glowing 3D characters dances and plays percussion in time; gentle jiggle = chocalho shimmer, hard swing = surdo bass drum. DeviceMotion shake-onset вЖТ synth percussion pool + 92-BPM batucada groove bed; three.js stage; brick-wall limiter (safe sounds). Off-glass input (NOT a finger), three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Ref: Brazilian batucada bloco / Evelyn Glennie. Design notes: `src/app/dream/566-kids-shake-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 405 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`557-piano-splat-galaxy`**: *every note Karel plays BIRTHS a bloom of glowing **Gaussian splats** вАФ his real Welcome Home piano accretes into a living galaxy of light you orbit, where transients are bursts, sustained notes are slow drifting nebula, and pitch paints the color.* The lab's **FIRST Gaussian-splatting renderer** in 553 prototypes (grep-verified: the only prior "splat" is fluid-force injection in `119-poem-fluid`, a categorically different thing). Spectral-flux **onset detection** on his real piano (fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-вА¶`, with an always-on synth-piano fallback) fires bursts of 80вАУ300 camera-facing billboard quads with a radial Gaussian falloff `exp(-4¬Јr¬≤)`, additively blended (depth test off вЖТ order-independent, no sort вЖТ robust + glowing), spawned on a growing ring with outward shell velocities + curl-noise turbulence + galactic shear, so a ~13k-splat pool swirls into arms tracing the phrasing. **THE FIRST HONEST 4/5 IN ~8 JURIES** вАФ `ambition: #1 never-used technique (Gaussian-splat / point-based radiance-field rasterization) + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (real-audio fetch+FFT+onset/pitch detection / generative bloom particle system / WebGL2 additive splat rasterizer + orbit cam) + #3 named refs (Kerbl/Kopanas/Leimk√Љhler/Drettakis "3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering," SIGGRAPH 2023; the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol volumetric data sculptures) + #5 binds a genuinely <14-day finding (BrightCoding "Run Gaussian Splatting in Your Browser with WebGPU," 2026-06-05, 7 days old; corroborated by arxiv cs.GR June 8вАУ12 point-based-radiance-field papers + the DNE√ЧGracia 4DGS Amy May musical performance)`. Directly serves Karel's directive to use his **real Welcome Home recordings**. **audio-file INPUT** (off-glass вАФ dodges the jury's 7√Ч finger-on-glass ban) **+ WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU вАФ both banned at 4√Ч; a wholly new rendering paradigm for the lab) ¬Ј **Gaussian-splat radiance-field TECH** (the sound is his RECORDED music driving a renderer вАФ the exact inverse of the banned GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone move) ¬Ј **volumetric/immersive/Anadol VIBE**. Auto-rotates + auto-blooms hands-free pre-Begin, so the 06:30 glance shows a living galaxy with zero setup. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`556-piano-splat-spectrogram`** (3D scrolling spectrogram solid вАФ the legible/analytical variant) + **`558-piano-splat-body`** (a breathing "body of light," tightest bind to the 4DGS Amy May piece вАФ lost as conceptually adjacent to `283-piano-isosurface`) banked IDEAS ¬І405 as the alternate renderers for the new splat spine. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 441/441 pages, `/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy` 5.96 kB / 112 kB prerendered), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycle 404 shipped `553-kids-tilt-fountain`; below: cycle 403's `552-dream-house`.)*

- **[/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy](/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy)** вАФ Piano Splat Galaxy рЯММ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 405. **For**: adult / immersive / his-real-piano. **The lab's first Gaussian-splatting renderer** вАФ Karel's real piano accretes into a swirling galaxy of glowing Gaussian splats you orbit; onsets bloom, pitch colors, phrasing draws the arms. References: Kerbl et al. "3D Gaussian Splatting" (SIGGRAPH 2023); the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol. The first honest 4/5 in ~8 juries (#1+#2+#3+#5). Design notes: `src/app/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy/README.md`

## (Cycle 403 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`552-dream-house`**: *the xenharmonic lattice comes ALIVE вАФ a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that slowly walks the just-intonation / BohlenвАУPierce Tonnetz on its own, sustains a pure-ratio drone, drifts forever via the comma pump so it never returns home, and is audibly a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1.* **Cycle 2 of the Xenharmonic Drone spine** (`538-xenharmonic-lattice` = cycle 1, the static tap-a-Tonnetz piece the **JURY 2026-06-12 named: "make it a spine and it's the first 4"**). Where 538 was something you *tap*, 552 is a room you *leave running*: an autonomous walker steps the lattice every 4вАУ8 s biased to unvisited nodes (the **syntonic comma 81/80** guarantees loops never reclose вЖТ permanent drift), sustaining the nearest 2вАУ6 nodes as a slow-crossfading **pure-ratio drone** (sine + odd partials + shimmer LFO, multi-second `setTargetAtTime` attacks). The headline is a genuine **long-form (~14-min) arc**: an 8-phase cycle smoothstep-interpolates **density** (2вЖФ6 voices), a **drifting master lowpass** (700вЖФ4800 Hz), a **¬±0.4-octave register breath**, and a **4-stop tuning migration** (5-JIвЖТBohlenвАУPierceвЖТ19-EDOвЖТback). **SVG Tonnetz** with a glowing comet-trail + accumulating visited-ghost dots makes the pilgrimage visible; HUD shows elapsed/phase. **none/autonomous INPUT** (the purest dodge of the jury's 7√Ч finger-on-glass ban, and its #3 "leave-it-running / off-the-glass" dare) **+ SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вАФ both banned at 4√Ч; NOT three.js which 545 just shipped) ¬Ј **JI-lattice-walkвЖТpure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics sim вАФ the banned meta-technique) ¬Ј **La-Monte-Young / hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids). Zero permission, runs itself вАФ the strongest 06:30 glance-safety of any recent piece; tap = optional "exhale." **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems [walker + crossfading drone synth + long-form arc engine + SVG render = 4] + #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Zazeela *Dream House* / √Йliane Radigue / Euler Tonnetz / BohlenвАУPierce / Partch / syntonic comma] + #4 spine cycle 2 вАФ the jury's exact ask; **#1 contestable** [first deliberate long-form >5min stateful piece, but 514/526 arguably already long-form вАФ discounts honestly]; **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ arxiv cs.SD June 5вАУ12 had zero JI/microtonal papers, still server-ML; LIMITER arXiv 2507.08675 is July-2025, used as a *named ref* not a <14-day bind). Winner of a DEEP 3-steering fire; siblings **`550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage`** (voice-steered: autocorrelation pitch вЖТ nearest-node pull вАФ lost: detector flagged basic + less glance-robust) + **`551-tilt-pilgrimage`** (tilt-steered: iOS deviceorientation вЖТ fifths/thirds drift bias + desktop tilt-pad вАФ lost: needs permission + a real device) banked IDEAS ¬І403 as the cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layers. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 439/439 pages, `.next/.../552-dream-house/page.js` prerendered), not browser-verified (no audio device in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycles 402 & 401 shipped `549-kids-song-friend` and `545-motion-loom` вАФ see entries below.)* ¬Ј Earlier header (Cycle 400 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`541-kids-liquid-light`**: *a 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light, and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.* A **WebGPU stable-fluids** (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999) solver built as a **kids sensory instrument** вАФ drag injects swirling dye into a real GPU fluid sim (192¬≤ `rgba16float` grid, 28-iter Jacobi pressure solve, divergence-free projection), and swirl-speedвЖТlowpass brightness + vertical-positionвЖТ**C-pentatonic** register (C3вАУC5) make it sing, nothing ever wrong. **touch/drag INPUT + WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0√Ч in the kids rolling-10 вЖТ the diversifying renderer; a Canvas2D curl-noise "lite fluid" fallback is baked in for WebGPU-absent iPads) ¬Ј **luminous / sensory / calm VIBE** вАФ distinct from the recent joyful-awe (537) / prosocial (505) / aurora (500) / feeling-map (493) kids cluster. Extends Karel's loved fluid/particle/glow lane (`84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП, `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП). Always-on C2+G2 pad; kids-safe `gain вЖТ lowpass(вЙ§8k) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 20:1) вЖТ destination`; ghost-finger auto-demo swirls + sings from frame one. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems + #3 Stam 1999 / Dobryakov WebGL-Fluid lineage + #4 "Liquid Light" spine cycle 1; #1 NOT claimed вАФ GPU fluid exists; #5 NOT claimed вАФ cs.SD is server-ML). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; siblings **`542-kids-liquid-light-gl`** (WebGL2 ping-pong stable-fluids w/ vorticity confinement вАФ lost: WebGL2 over-represented) + **`543-kids-liquid-light-flow`** (Canvas2D ~6500-particle advection вАФ lost: redundant with the winner's own fallback) banked IDEAS ¬І400. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 436/436 pages, `/dream/541-kids-liquid-light` 7.13 kB / 110 kB), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/audio in sandbox). ¬Ј *(Cycles 399 & 398 shipped `538-xenharmonic-lattice` and `537-kids-sky-murmuration` вАФ see entries below.)* ¬Ј Earlier header (Cycle 397 вАФ **adult** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 divergent explorers. Ships **`532-vocoder-veil`**: *you sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano вАФ your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.* The lab's **FIRST channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` 0√Ч in built prototypes), a classic 16-band Homer-Dudley analysis/synthesis filterbank вАФ the live mic (modulator) drives the per-band gains of Karel's actual piano recording (carrier, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-вА¶`), so the piano "talks" in your formants. **Directly serves Karel's standing directive to use his real Welcome Home recordings.** **mic-voice INPUT + WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer at 1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч) ¬Ј uncanny-intimate, responsive вАФ dodges the rolling-10 banned "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE (the piano *responds* in real time) AND the 4√Ч renderer trap (Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG all 3√Ч; ships on WebGL2). A no-permission vowel auto-demo (ahвЖТeeвЖТohвЖТooвЖТmm) makes the piano sing + the 16-rung ladder animate from frame one; degrades to a synth carrier if the fetch fails and a Canvas2D ladder if no WebGL2. The three WIDE explorers spanned WebGL2/three.js/audio-first, none pushing a 3√Ч renderer to 4√Ч. 2 siblings banked IDEAS ¬І397: **`533-hollow`** (three.js comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension вАФ "tension is *absence*", the jury-named untouched primitive; Lucier/Amacher) + **`534-third-ear`** (combination/difference *Tartini* tones вАФ a melody that exists only inside your ear; audio-first; clean lab-first; Tartini/Amacher). ¬Ј *Previous (Cycle 396 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`529-kids-doodle-choir`**: *a 4-year-old draws a simple doodle; a real in-browser neural net (TensorFlow.js + DoodleNet) recognizes WHAT they drew; the drawing comes alive вАФ animates and SINGS its own warm motif вАФ and joins a growing choir of singing creatures.* The lab's **FIRST TensorFlow.js / ML-recognition piece** (grep-verified: 0√Ч `@tensorflow`/`tfjs` across ~360 prototypes вАФ the single cleanest unused *major* technique left), on Karel's **loved draw/paint lane** (100/104/152/153вЭ§пЄП), in a JOYFUL register that dodges the now-4√Ч "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE AND the WebGPU 4√Ч renderer trap. **finger-drawing INPUT + Canvas2D OUTPUT** ¬Ј TF.js DoodleNet (QuickDraw 345-class CNN) вЖТ 8 storybook archetypes, each with its own animation + a C-pentatonic motif so nothing sounds wrong. A scripted ghost-finger **auto-demo bypasses the classifier** (draws + sings on load even if the model never loads); a no-ML **geometric heuristic fallback** keeps it playable offline. 2 DEEP siblings banked IDEAS ¬І396: **`530-kids-sketch-garden`** (no-ML geometric stroke classifier вЖТ WebGL2 glowing particle creatures вАФ bulletproof offline; fold its glow into 529) + **`531-kids-drawing-band`** (same DoodleNet, but each doodle joins a tempo-locked 96-BPM groove вАФ tied on ambition, lost on the saturated kids loop/band lane). ¬Ј *Previous (Cycle 395, adult WIDE):* Ships **`526-jazz-room`**: *a living, self-playing late-night jazz trio вАФ walking upright bass, Bill Evans rootless piano comping, brushed drums вАФ that performs a full arc (head вЖТ piano solo вЖТ bass solo вЖТ trade-fours вЖТ head-out) over an F Jazz Blues, with you free to "sit in."* The lab's **FIRST jazz piece** (grep-verified: zero jazz/swing/bebop/walking-bass folders in 350 prototypes) and an alternate dramatic arc to Resonance's psychedelic 6-phase journey engine вАФ directly serving Karel's explicit **priority #4** (journey-engine alternatives: "jazz responsive"). **autonomous-arc INPUT + Canvas2D OUTPUT** ¬Ј swinging-warm-noir вАФ dodges BOTH rolling-10 banned VIBE poles (solitary-never-resolves 4√Ч AND tension-resolved-through-action 4√Ч: a jazz arc simply *plays*, neither an empty drone nor a tension-puzzle). The three WIDE explorers spanned Canvas2D/SVG/WebGL2, deliberately NONE on the already-3√Ч WebGPU. The trio plays itself from the first frame, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a swinging, glowing scene. 2 siblings banked IDEAS ¬І395: **`527-cipher-score`** (SVG type-textвЖТliving-score, Messiaen letter-cipher) + **`528-market-veil`** (WebGL2 live-cryptoвЖТambient-drone вАФ lost on a `502-atmosphere-veil` overlap + Binance US geo-block).))

- **[/dream/552-dream-house](/dream/552-dream-house)** вАФ Dream House рЯЫХрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 403. **For**: adult / leave-it-running / xenharmonic, hypnotic.

  **The xenharmonic lattice comes alive вАФ a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that walks the just-intonation Tonnetz on its own and is a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1.** Cycle 2 of the **Xenharmonic Drone** spine (extends `538-xenharmonic-lattice`; the JURY 2026-06-12 named 538: *"make it a spine and it's the first 4"*). An **autonomous walker** steps the 2-D lattice (u=fifths 3/2, v=thirds 5/4) every 4вАУ8 s, biased to unvisited nodes; the **syntonic comma (81/80 вЙИ 21.5¬Ґ)** means loops never reclose, so the pitch drifts forever ("never returns home"). Sound = the walker's node + its 2вАУ5 nearest neighbors held as a **sustained pure-ratio chord** at EXACT rational ratios (sine + 3rd/5th odd partials + a ~0.07 Hz detune shimmer LFO), all attacks/releases via `setTargetAtTime` (3вАУ4 s) so chords never hard-start. **The long-form arc** (the headline): an 8-phase ~14-min cycle (gatheringвЖТascendingвЖТfloweringвЖТtritaveвЖТradianceвЖТdissolvingвЖТrecedingвЖТstillness) smoothstep-interpolates density (2вЖФ6 voices), a drifting master lowpass (700вЖФ4800 Hz), a ¬±0.4-octave register breath, and a 4-stop tuning migration (5-JIвЖТBohlenвАУPierceвЖТ19-EDOвЖТback) вАФ so the harmonic world itself changes. **SVG Tonnetz** render: nodes glow via `feGaussianBlur`, a **comet-trail** polyline + accumulating dim visited-ghost dots make the journey visible; viewBox pans to follow the walker; rAF mutates SVG attributes directly (no per-frame React churn); HUD shows tuning, root ratio, voice count, **elapsed clock + phase word**. Optional **tap = "exhale"** (fade current chord, bloom a fresh region); doing nothing is the default. Master `gain вЖТ drifting lowpass вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(20:1, вИТ10 dBFS) вЖТ destination`; per-voice gain `0.55/voiceCount`, 8-voice hard cap; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG вАФ no mic, camera, network, secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, *Dream House*** (sustained just-intonation drone installation, 1993вАУpresent, MELA Foundation NYC) вАФ primary; **√Йliane Radigue** (long-form drone); **Euler's *Tonnetz*** (1739); the **syntonic comma / comma pump**; **BohlenвАУPierce** (Bohlen 1972 / Pierce 1984); **Harry Partch**, *Genesis of a Music* (1949); LIMITER (arXiv 2507.08675, 2025) as a recent gamified-JI-interface reference. Born from RESEARCH ¬І403 (the honest read вАФ arxiv cs.SD June 5вАУ12 2026 has zero JI/microtonal/pitch papers, still server-ML, so #5 is unclaimable; the jury named 538 to spine-ify and dared the "leave-it-running / off-the-glass" lane). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (walker + crossfading drone synth + long-form arc engine + SVG render = 4) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** multi-cycle (Xenharmonic Drone spine cycle 2 вАФ the jury's exact ask). (**#1 contestable** вАФ first deliberate long-form >5min stateful piece, but 514/526 arguably already long-form, so it discounts to 3/5 honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ cs.SD is server-ML; LIMITER is July-2025; said plainly. No clean #1 in any steering approach вАФ Web MIDI is in 12 files, tilt/voice well-used.) **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15) = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT 4√Ч ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT 4√Ч ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH 4√Ч ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT 7√Ч ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE 4√Ч] ¬Ј picked(552) = [**none/autonomous INPUT** (off-glass вАФ the purest dodge of the 7√Ч finger reflex + the jury's #3 dare; "none" only 3√Ч in window) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU; NOT three.js which 545 just shipped) ¬Ј **JI-lattice-walkвЖТpure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics sim) ¬Ј **La-Monte-Young/hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` вАФ clean on every jury ban; takes the jury's #3 "leave it running, off the glass" dare head-on. **Love signal:** none directly applicable (cerebral drone lane); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-steering fire** (one living-Dream-House concept via three off-glass steering attacks): siblings `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (voice-steered вАФ autocorrelation pitch вЖТ nearest-node pull; the most musical, lost: detector flagged basic + less glance-robust) + `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (tilt-steered вАФ iOS deviceorientation вЖТ fifths/thirds bias + desktop tilt-pad; the most physical, lost: needs permission + a real device) banked IDEAS ¬І403 as the cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layers. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner вАФ exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 29.5s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (439/439)`, `.next/server/app/dream/552-dream-house/page.js` prerendered), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio device in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether minute 12 *perceptually* differs from minute 1 over a real 14-min listen (the arc is structurally sound; HUD phase-word is the short-glance crutch); long-run gain/limiter interaction over 20+ min (mathematically capped, not stress-tested); iOS AudioContext suspend on screen-lock (`ctx.resume()` tap-to-resume not yet wired вАФ the builder's flagged risk); extreme octave-folded frequencies at far lattice positions (clamped, perceptual balance unauditioned). Because it's fully autonomous with zero permission, the 06:30 glance reliably shows a drifting, glowing, singing pilgrimage with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/552-dream-house/README.md`

- **[/dream/541-kids-liquid-light](/dream/541-kids-liquid-light)** вАФ Liquid Light рЯТІвЬ®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 400. **For**: kids (4+) / iPad / sensory, calm.

  **A 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light вАФ and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.** Drag a finger and you inject swirling colored dye into a *real fluid simulation*; the speed and direction of the swirl drive a warm, ever-evolving pentatonic wash. No goal, no words, no wrong move вАФ infinite calm sensory play. The primary renderer is a real-time **stable-fluids (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999)** solver running entirely on the GPU via **WebGPU compute shaders (WGSL)**: a velocity field + colored dye field on a 192√Ч192 `rgba16float` grid, stepped each frame through add-forces (finger impulse + Gaussian dye injection) вЖТ semi-Lagrangian advect velocity вЖТ divergence вЖТ **28-iter Jacobi pressure solve** (ping-pong) вЖТ subtract-gradient (divergence-free projection) вЖТ advect dye, then a full-screen-triangle render pipeline tone-maps the dye to luminous glow on dark. **Sonification:** swirl-speed вЖТ lowpass brightness + simultaneous voice count; vertical position вЖТ **C-major pentatonic** register (C3вАУC5, nothing ever wrong); additive triangle/sine wash with `setTargetAtTime` glides; always-on C2+G2 breathing pad (never silent); kids-safe master `gain вЖТ lowpass(вЙ§8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 20:1 brick-wall) вЖТ destination`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **Always-on auto-demo:** a hands-free "ghost finger" wanders a Lissajous path injecting dye + sound from frame one (cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle) so the 06:30 glance always shows swirling, singing light. **Graceful degradation:** `navigator.gpu` missing / adapter-device-context failure вЖТ a Canvas2D curl-noise **"lite fluid"** (a few thousand additively-blended dye particles over a fading dark trail) + a `text-rose-300` "Playing in lite mode вЬ®" notice вАФ still swirls, still sings (this is the safety net for iPads where Safari WebGPU is recent/uneven). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Jos Stam, "Stable Fluids," SIGGRAPH 1999** (the advection + Jacobi pressure-projection method implemented here); lineage note to **Pavel Dobryakov's WebGL-Fluid-Simulation** (the luminous dye-on-dark interaction, reimplemented on raw WebGPU compute). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І400** (the dive's honest read вАФ cs.SD this week is server-side ML so #5 is unclaimable, and a grep audit confirmed tension/time/tuning + the easy kids #1s are spent at 540 prototypes; the actionable pivot is "the biggest love-aligned sensory lane on the scarcest kids renderer"). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (WebGPU stable-fluids solver + Canvas2D fallback fluid + swirlвЖТpentatonic sonification engine + ghost-finger auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named ref (Stam 1999 / Dobryakov) + **#4** multi-cycle ("Liquid Light" spine cycle 1 вАФ cycle 2: two-finger dye-mixing duet + a longer-form settling pool). (**#1 NOT cleanly claimed** вАФ GPU fluid already exists in the lab; the fresh element is *a WebGPU-compute fluid as a kids sensory instrument* вАФ a context/audience, not a 0√Ч primitive вАФ honest. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ cs.SD is server-ML; said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned/over-rep (kids rolling-10)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT trending toward 4√Ч (505/493/489)] ¬Ј picked=[**touch/drag INPUT** (the core kids verb) ¬Ј **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0√Ч in the kids window вЖТ the diversifying renderer; Canvas2D fallback only when WebGPU absent) ¬Ј **GPU stable-fluids вЖТ swirl-driven-pentatonic TECH** (not a roughness/DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **luminous/sensory/calm VIBE** вАФ distinct from the recent joyful-awe/prosocial/aurora/feeling-map cluster]` вАФ no over-represented tag in the picked set. **Love signal:** directly extends Karel's loved fluid/particle/glow lane (`84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП, `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП); additive вАФ the kids/ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a kids DEEP 3-renderer fire** (one "singing liquid light" concept on three renderers): siblings `542-kids-liquid-light-gl` (WebGL2 ping-pong stable-fluids with vorticity confinement + cheap bloom вАФ complete + clean, lost on the diversity audit: WebGL2 at 2√Ч in the kids window) + `543-kids-liquid-light-flow` (Canvas2D 56√Ч56 velocity grid + ~6500 additive particles + curl-noise ambient вАФ best legibility/compatibility, lost as essentially the winner's own fallback) banked IDEAS ¬І400. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner вАФ exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 36.6s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (436/436)`, `/dream/541-kids-liquid-light 7.13 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static; one real ESLint fix on build: a local named `module` вЖТ `shaderModule` per `@next/next/no-assign-module-variable`), **NOT browser-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the WGSL compute/render bind-group layout compiles + runs on a real WebGPU adapter (binding validation is strict; the Canvas2D fallback covers WebGPU-absent AND any first-run WGSL hiccup); iOS Safari WebGPU presence/stability on Karel's iPad (fallback covers absent); audio balance (pad vs wash) + limiter feel behind the вИТ6 dB brick-wall; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; ghost-finger pacing on a real device. The ghost-finger auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows swirling, singing light.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/541-kids-liquid-light/README.md`

- **[/dream/532-vocoder-veil](/dream/532-vocoder-veil)** вАФ Vocoder Veil рЯОЩпЄПрЯОє. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 397. **For**: adult / live, intimate, voice-through-piano.

  **You sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's real Welcome Home piano вАФ your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.** The lab's **first channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` 0√Ч in built prototypes вАФ only an INDEX mention). A classic Homer-Dudley **16-band analysis/synthesis filterbank**: the live mic (modulator) is split into 16 log-spaced bandpass bands (120 HzвАУ7 kHz); each band's energy is followed (squared via a `WaveShaperNode` x¬≤ вЖТ smoothed by a ~20 Hz lowpass) and that audio-rate envelope is connected straight into the `.gain` AudioParam of the matching band on the **carrier вАФ Karel's actual piano**, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (the confirmed WH track id used by 283/165) and looped. Highpassed noise is injected into the carrier so sibilants read. The piano *talks in your formants.* **Serves Karel's standing directive to use his real Welcome Home recordings** (carried open for many cycles). A **WebGL2 band-ladder** (16 glowing rungs) animates from the envelopes. **No-permission auto-demo:** a built-in vowel-cycle modulator (saw + peaking formant filters, ahвЖТeeвЖТohвЖТooвЖТmm) makes the piano sing vowels + the ladder animate from frame one. **Three-layer degradation:** mic denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` note + auto-demo continues; piano fetch fails вЖТ `text-amber-300` note + a 6-voice synth carrier (still fully works); no WebGL2 вЖТ Canvas2D ladder. Master `gain вЖТ lowpass(7.5 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 16:1) вЖТ destination`; `setTargetAtTime` params; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (only network is the read-only same-origin `/api/audio/[id]` GET + the mic вАФ no writes, no secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Homer Dudley** вАФ the Bell Labs *Vocoder* (1939), the original channel vocoder ¬Ј **Wendy Carlos & Robert Moog** вАФ vocoder on *A Clockwork Orange* (1972) ¬Ј **Imogen Heap** вАФ "Hide and Seek" (2005), the intimate-vocoder model. Born from RESEARCH ¬І397 (the dive's honest cs.SD meta-finding вАФ this week's real-time music ML is server-side MAX/MSP + Python inference, so #5 is unclaimable вАФ pivoted to the ambition manual's named-but-untouched, client-feasible DSP lane). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (channel vocoder вАФ grep-verified lab-first, 0√Ч built) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (mic analysis filterbank + Karel's-piano carrier bank + audio-rate envelope-follower modulation + WebGL2 ladder + vowel auto-demo = 5) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed вАФ single-cycle, opens a "his-real-music / cross-synthesis" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ cs.SD this week is server-ML; said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вЙ•4√Ч) = ["solitary-never-resolves" VIBE (520/518/514/513/502)] ¬Ј also-avoid (wouldвЖТ4√Ч) = [Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG OUTPUT, all 3√Ч] ¬Ј picked=[**mic-voice INPUT** (fresh; not the touch/draw/tilt comfort reach) ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer, 1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч; the three explorers spanned WebGL2/three.js/audio-first, none pushing a 3√Ч renderer to 4√Ч) ¬Ј **channel-vocoder TECH** (lab-first) ¬Ј **uncanny-intimate / responsive-playful VIBE** (NOT the banned solitary drone вАФ the piano *responds* to your voice in real time)]` вАФ dodges the banned VIBE AND the 4√Ч renderer trap. **Love signal:** aligned via Karel's repeated "use my real recordings" directive + paths interest; additive вАФ the ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (three orthogonal directions on three renderers): siblings **`533-hollow`** (three.js comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension вАФ "tension is *absence*", the jury-named untouched primitive; a drone carved by two stacked feedforward combs, notches swept through a 2-D field, a cylindrical shell hollowing at analytic notch positions; Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* / Amacher; ambition 3/5 with a *scoped* #1) + **`534-third-ear`** (combination/difference *Tartini* tones вАФ two sines whose difference traces a pentatonic melody that exists only inside the listener's ear; audio-first / minimal Canvas2D, with an honest phantom-only/reinforced A/B toggle; Tartini 1714 / Amacher; clean lab-first, ambition 2/5) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬І397. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner вАФ exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 67s`, `/dream/532-vocoder-veil` prerendered static 6.48 kB / 109 kB; one TS fix on build: `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic for the `WaveShaperNode.curve`), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic/WebGL2/network in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: **envelope-follower scaling** (the x¬≤-smoothed band envelopes may sit ~0вАУ0.1 and not drive the carrier gains to unity вАФ the vocoder could read too quiet on a real voice without a scale factor; the hand-tuned vowel auto-demo likely masks this; the single most important live check); the `/api/audio/[id]` `decodeAudioData` + CORS behind the CDN (any exception drops to the synth carrier, still playable); mic permission + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + `webkitAudioContext`; WebGL2 on old Android WebView (Canvas2D ladder covers it). The vowel auto-demo + synth carrier + Canvas2D fallbacks are the safety nets so absent mic/piano/WebGL2 never blocks the 06:30 glance.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/532-vocoder-veil/README.md`

- **[/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir](/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir)** вАФ Doodle Choir вЬПпЄПрЯОґ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 396. **For**: kids / iPad / draw-and-sing.

  **A 4-year-old draws a simple doodle with their finger; a real in-browser neural net recognizes WHAT they drew; the drawing comes alive вАФ animates and SINGS its own warm little motif вАФ and stays on the page as part of a growing, gently-looping choir of singing creatures.** "Quick, Draw! that sings." The lab's **first use of TensorFlow.js / any ML recognition** in ~360 prototypes (grep-verified: zero `@tensorflow`/`tfjs`) вАФ the single cleanest unused *major* technique left, and an explicit counts-as-#1 in the ambition manual. TF.js loads via **CDN dynamic import** (`@tensorflow/tfjs@4/+esm`, `webpackIgnore` so Next never bundles it вАФ the `493`/MediaPipe pattern, no npm dep); the drawing is rasterized to 28√Ч28 grayscale and run through **DoodleNet** (yining1023 вАФ a CNN trained on Google's Quick, Draw! 345-category dataset, ported to TF.js), and the top-1 class maps to one of **8 storybook archetypes** вАФ sun (rises & pulses), fish (wiggles), bird (flutters), plant (sways), cloud (drifts), star (twinkles), critter (bounces), home (breathes) вАФ each with a distinct warm motif in **C major / C pentatonic** so no two creatures ever clash. Each keeps its faint original stroke and loops its motif into the choir. A scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** traces sunвЖТfishвЖТbirdвЖТplantвЖТstarвЖТcritterвЖТcloudвЖТhome on load, **bypassing the async classifier** (it assigns the archetype directly), so a hands-free 06:30 glance ALWAYS shows animated, singing creatures even if the model never loads. **Two-layer graceful degradation:** TF.js/model fail вЖТ a hand-coded **geometric heuristic** (bounding box / ink density / aspect) keeps it fully playable with a `text-rose-300` "вЧИ shape matching" badge; Canvas2D absent вЖТ a notice. Master `gain вЖТ lowpass(вЙ§7.8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 20:1)`; `setTargetAtTime` envelopes; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; only network is the public TF.js CDN + DoodleNet model вАФ no mic, camera, secrets, writes). No new npm deps.

  References: **Google *Quick, Draw!*** (Jongejan, Ha, et al., 2016) вАФ the dataset/game this classifier descends from ¬Ј **DoodleNet** (yining1023) вАФ the TF.js port of a QuickDraw-trained CNN. Born from RESEARCH ¬І396 (the dive's honest cs.SD meta-finding вАФ this week's audio ML is server-side diffusion only, so #5 is unclaimable вАФ pivoted to the ambition manual's named-but-untouched **TF.js realtime-inference** lane, with DoodleNet supplying the model). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (TensorFlow.js realtime ML inference вАФ grep-verified lab-first, 0√Ч in ~360 prototypes) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (TF.js/DoodleNet classifier + heuristic fallback + Web-Audio choir + Canvas2D storybook + ghost-finger auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named refs above. (#4 NOT claimed вАФ single-cycle, opens a "drawing-comes-alive / browser-ML" spine. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ DoodleNet is foundational ml5-era, not a <14-day finding; said plainly.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вЙ•4√Ч) = [WebGPU OUTPUT wouldвЖТ4√Ч (520/518/502) ¬Ј "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE 4√Ч (520/518/514/513/502)] ¬Ј picked=[**finger-drawing INPUT** (touch ~2√Ч, not banned; the core kids verb + Karel's loved lane) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (2√ЧвЖТ3√Ч, not banned; not WebGPU, not the 3√Ч SVG) ¬Ј **TF.js semantic sketch-recognition TECH** (lab-first; adds *meaning*, not a roughness/DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **joyful drawings-come-alive-and-sing VIBE** (NEITHER banned pole вАФ pure accumulative delight, the deliberate JOYFUL swing like the loved 524)]` вАФ dodges the banned never-resolves VIBE AND the WebGPU trap. **Love signal:** strongly aligned вАФ Karel loves the draw/paint lane (`100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП, `152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `153-paint-compose`вЭ§пЄП); 529 is "your drawing comes alive" + the lab's first ML; additive вАФ the ambition/diversity/kids gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach kids fire** (one concept вАФ drawвЖТrecognizedвЖТcomes-alive-and-sings вАФ via three classifier√Чrenderer√Чform attacks): siblings **`530-kids-sketch-garden`** (no-ML geometric stroke classifier вЖТ WebGL2 additive-glow particle creatures; Patatap / $1-Recognizer; ambition 2/5 вАФ forgoes the TF.js #1; the bulletproof-offline approach, fold its glow into 529) + **`531-kids-drawing-band`** (same DoodleNet, but each doodle joins a tempo-locked 96-BPM groove on one shared lookahead scheduler; ambition 3/5 вАФ **tied** with the winner, lost on the saturated kids loop/band lane) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked IDEAS ¬І396. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only the winner вАФ exit 0, `/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir` prerendered static; `webpackIgnore` confirmed on the TF.js CDN import, no `use*`-named helpers, `'use client'` present), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: the DoodleNet model URL is community-documented / best-effort (if it 404s the piece runs in heuristic "вЧИ shape matching" mode вАФ still playable; the auto-demo is unaffected); the 345-label list is from community docs not the model binary; whether a 4yo's rough 28√Ч28 doodle classifies well enough that recognition feels *magic* vs *random* (all-pentatonic motifs mean a misread still sounds good, but the "it knew it was a bird!" delight is unverified); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + `webkitAudioContext` on iOS <15; TF.js CDN reachability under the env network policy. The ghost-finger auto-demo + heuristic fallback are the safety nets so absent model/CDN never blocks the 06:30 glance.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/529-kids-doodle-choir/README.md`

- **[/dream/526-jazz-room](/dream/526-jazz-room)** вАФ Jazz Room рЯОЈ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 395. **For**: adult / warm, swinging, live.

  **A living, self-playing late-night jazz trio вАФ walking upright bass, Bill Evans rootless piano comping, and brushed drums вАФ that performs a complete jazz arc over an F Jazz Blues, with you free to "sit in."** The lab's **first jazz piece** and an alternate dramatic arc to Resonance's psychedelic 6-phase journey engine (Karel **priority #4**: journey-engine alternatives вАФ "jazz responsive" is named in the directive). A real **generative jazz-theory engine** (`jazz.ts`, 391 lines): F Jazz Blues 12-bar changes (F7вАУBвЩ≠7вАУвА¶вАУD7вАУGm7вАУC7), **Bill Evans Type A/B rootless voicings** (3-7-9 / 7-9-3 shells) with distance-minimizing voice-leading, a four-beat **walking bass** (rootвЖТ5thвЖТ3rdвЖТchromatic-approach-on-beat-4), **2:1 swing**.
