the fresh move is the **bare-hands continuous calm GPU-scale *singing galaxy for kids***. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the dive hits community tutorials, not a <14-day paper. **Diversity** (vs cycle bans): **camera hand-tracking INPUT** (the clean dodge of the count-banned touch [5√Ч] + jury-banned mic) ¬Ј **WebGPU-compute-particles OUTPUT** (0√Ч in last-10 вАФ the cleanest renderer dodge vs three.js 3√Ч & WebGL2 3√Ч; WebGL2 fallback present) ¬Ј hand-driven attractor/repulsor GPU-particle TECHNIQUE (dodges Kuramoto) ¬Ј kids-cosmic-continuous-NON-percussion VIBE (breaks the kids-percussion rut). **Build-verified (exit 0, `npx eslint` on the folder exit 0 / zero warnings), NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/camera/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether WebGPU initializes + the 60k galaxy reads as "massive and alive" on Karel's hardware (WebGL2 fallback covers absence), whether the HandLandmarker CDN load + open/closed-hand openness heuristic tracks a 4-year-old's small hands reliably, whether the gather/scatter gesture *feels* magical vs. fiddly, `StereoPanner` + 12-voice balance on phone speakers, iOS AudioContext-in-tap, and the WebGPU-on-mobile-Safari path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/444-kids-aurora-hands/README.md`

## Cycle 362 вАФ **kids** build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated NON-percussion registers; the winner is a real **GPU fluid finger-paint** вАФ a 4-year-old smears glowing liquid that swirls like ink in water and *hums*, breaking the recent kids-percussion rut and riding the most-loved paint + `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП lineage

- **[/dream/433-kids-fluid-paint](/dream/433-kids-fluid-paint)** вАФ Fluid Paint рЯО®. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 362.

  **For kids 4+ вАФ finger-paint where the paint is REAL flowing liquid, and the motion of the fluid IS the music.** Pick one of five big (вЙ•72px) emoji color swatches вАФ violet ¬Ј teal ¬Ј amber ¬Ј rose ¬Ј cyan вАФ then drag anywhere: glowing color pours out and **keeps swirling and blending like ink in water long after you lift your finger**, and the painting **hums** a soft, sustained, consonant chord that swells when you paint and settles when you rest. It is a deliberately **calm, dreamy, NON-percussion** kids instrument вАФ the answer to the recent kids rut (the last several kids ships, `419` pose-beat / `423` face-beat / `429` noise-foley, were all rhythm/percussion) and to KIDS.md's named market gap (the *contemplative, parent-tolerable* option in a space full of loud high-energy toys). Rides the lab's most-loved lineage in one move: the **paint** family (`100`вЭ§пЄП/`104`вЭ§пЄП/`152`вЭ§пЄП/`160`вЭ§пЄП/`223`вЭ§пЄП) **and** `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП (GPU fluid).

  Three subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`fluid.ts`** вАФ a faithful **Jos Stam "Stable Fluids" (SIGGRAPH 1999)** incompressible Navier-Stokes solver on **WebGL2** ping-pong framebuffer textures (RGBA 16/32-bit float): semi-Lagrangian **advect velocity** вЖТ **splat** Gaussian velocity+dye on drag (force вИЭ drag speed) вЖТ **divergence** вЖТ **20-iteration Jacobi pressure solve** (`вИЗ¬≤p=вИЗ¬Јu`) вЖТ **gradient-subtract** (enforce `вИЗ¬Јu=0` so it swirls rather than expands) вЖТ **advect the separate dye field** by the divergence-free velocity вЖТ tone-mapped display (`1вИТexp(вИТdye¬Ј2)` soft-HDR, dark-suppressed). 128¬≤ velocity/pressure grid, 512¬≤ dye grid (the standard Stam real-time tradeoff). (2) **`audio.ts`** вАФ sustained/evolving, **never percussion**: a five-oscillator open major-9 pad (C2 G2 E3 B3 D4, sine+triangle, ¬±4¬Ґ detune) whose gain tracks a **JS-side energy accumulator** (`energy*=0.985`/frame вАФ no GPU readback to stall the pipeline), the active swatch's **hue вЖТ lowpass cutoff** (cool=dark ~350 Hz, warm=bright ~3200 Hz вАФ cross-modal colorвЖФtimbre), **drag-speed вЖТ 0.3вАУ4.3 Hz tremolo LFO** (shimmer on fast strokes), a near-silent bandpassed noise bed (never silent), all through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вИТ8 dB / 20:1) вЖТ master 0.22 (can't blast small ears). (3) **input/auto-demo/lifecycle** in `page.tsx` вАФ pointer splat injected synchronously (<50 ms), a hands-free **auto-demo** at 1.8 s that strokes all five colors on a loop (a phone reviewer sees swirling glowing color with zero taps), a **tap-to-start** overlay creating/resuming the `AudioContext` in-gesture (iOS-safe), DPR-aware (capped 2√Ч) `ResizeObserver` sizing, full teardown (`cancelAnimationFrame`, `sim.destroy()` deletes all GL resources + `WEBGL_lose_context`, `audio.destroy()`). Degrades cleanly: no WebGL2 вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice; autoplay blocked вЖТ tap prompt. Camera/mic: **none**. **No API route, no `guard` needed вАФ no network at all** (no mic, camera, fetch, secrets, FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps.

  References: **Jos Stam, "Stable Fluids"** (SIGGRAPH 1999) вАФ the foundational semi-Lagrangian incompressible solver this follows ¬Ј **Mark Harris, "Fast Fluid Dynamics Simulation on the GPU"** (GPU Gems Ch. 38, NVIDIA 2004) вАФ the canonical GPU/ping-pong-FBO mapping ¬Ј **Pavel Dobryakov, WebGL-Fluid-Simulation** вАФ the definitive browser lineage. Born from RESEARCH ¬І362. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire (three genuinely different non-percussion registers); siblings `434-kids-lantern-sky` (tap to launch glowing lanterns into a 3D night sky, true **HRTF binaural** spatial audio that tracks your head as you tilt the phone, three.js вАФ the cosmic-wonder/headphone take) + `435-kids-air-ribbon` (paint music in the AIR вАФ MediaPipe HandLandmarker fingertip вЖТ a glowing singing light-ribbon, a sustained air-theremin, the melodic *inverse* of the recent face/pose beats) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І362. **Ambition 2/5** (stated plainly, no stretch): вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ Stam GPU fluid solver + evolving Web-Audio pad + WebGL2 render + pointer/auto-demo = 4) + named-reference(#3 вАФ Stam 1999 ¬Ј Harris 2004 ¬Ј Dobryakov). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** вАФ Navier-Stokes fluid is saturated in the lab (`3-fluid` WebGL2, `15-webgpu-fluid`, `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП, `119-poem-fluid`); the fresh move is a **kids finger-paint application** of the technique + the calm liquid register, not a new primitive (grep audit, RESEARCH ¬І362). **Diversity**: **touch INPUT** (3√Ч recent, allowed; clean dodge of jury-banned mic) ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the decisive dodge вАФ 1√Ч recent, fresher than the over-represented Canvas2D 3√Ч and jury-banned SVG; also dodged sibling `435`'s Canvas2D) ¬Ј Stam-fluid TECHNIQUE ¬Ј **liquid-dreamy non-percussion VIBE** (the explicit break from the recent kids-percussion rut; calm consonant is fine for kids вАФ VIBE is parity-exempt). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: half-float FBO completeness on mobile GPUs (the `EXT_color_buffer_(half_)float` fallback path), whether the dye actually reads as "ink-in-water swirling" vs. a smear at 128¬≤ velocity res on a phone, perceived loudness/tremolo feel (compressor + master are conservative first-guesses), and the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture path (no audio/GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/433-kids-fluid-paint/README.md`

## Cycle 361 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers; the winner makes **gravity compose the music** вАФ a chaotic N-body orbit that never repeats, the most elegant answer yet to the jury's "make the one that doesn't harmonize" mandate

- **[/dream/432-three-body](/dream/432-three-body)** вАФ Three-Body. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 361.

  **What if Resonance's music was generated by gravity?** Press **Begin** and 3вАУ6 massive bodies start orbiting under a real-time Newtonian N-body simulation вАФ they slingshot, perturb, and chaotically swing around each other, and the **motion itself is the score**: a **close approach** swells into a Doppler-glide event (pitch rises into the encounter then falls), a **slingshot** fires a downward noise-whoosh, and every body emits a continuous drone whose frequency tracks its speed. Because the three-body problem is deterministic but non-repeating (Poincar√©: sensitive dependence on initial conditions), the piece is **genuinely different every minute and never resolves or loops** вАФ that unresolved, ever-evolving quality is the whole point and the most direct answer to the **JURY 2026-06-08** central mandate ("make the one that *doesn't* harmonize"; ~13/15 recent pieces converged to gentle consonance). The default `chaos trio` seed is tuned to fire audible close-approaches within seconds, so a phone reviewer hears+sees a mesmerizing gravitational ballet hands-free.

  Three subsystems: (1) **physics engine** вАФ a **velocity-Verlet** symplectic integrator (substepped 6√Ч per frame for stability вАФ naive Euler blows up), **softened gravity** `a_i = ќ£ G¬Јm_j¬Ј(r_jвИТr_i)/(|r_jвИТr_i|¬≤+ќµ¬≤)^(3/2)` so close approaches slingshot dramatically without singularity-exploding, plus a soft radial bowl + tiny velocity damping past `BOUND` so no body is ever ejected to infinity and the piece never goes empty; three presets (`chaos trio`, the ChencinerвАУMontgomery `figure-8` choreography, `random cluster`) + re-seed; (2) **audio** вАФ per-body triangle + inharmonic-sine (√Ч2.41) drones mapped from speed via a stretched non-linear curve (**continuous, never snapped to any scale** вАФ the deliberate anti-consonance move), close-approach sawtooth swells with Doppler glide derived from relative velocity + combined mass, slingshot filtered-noise whooshes, and total **kinetic energy** opening a master brightness lowpass so violent epochs sound turbulent and calm orbits spacious; always-on quiet bed; master `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + 0.55 gain so a burst of simultaneous close-approaches can never blast; (3) **Canvas2D render** вАФ glowing mass-sized discs with **comet trails** (translucent-dark-rect fade trick), close-approach flash lines, a cosmic per-body-hue palette; DPR-aware (capped 2√Ч), resize-handled. **Interaction:** drag a body to fling it, drag empty space to drop a new mass (up to 7 bodies), forgiving grab radius, all controls вЙ•44px. Degrades cleanly: no Canvas2D вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice; AudioContext blocked/throws вЖТ visuals keep running silently + a `text-rose-300` "audio was blocked" notice (sim still interactive); AudioContext created **inside the Begin gesture** (iOS). Full teardown (cancel rAF + close AudioContext) on unmount. **No API route, no `guard` needed вАФ no network at all** (Web Audio + Canvas2D + touch; no mic, camera, fetch, secrets, FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps.

  References: the **three-body problem** & **Henri Poincar√©**'s discovery of deterministic chaos / sensitive dependence on initial conditions; the **figure-8 choreography** (**Chenciner & Montgomery, 2000**, one preset). Born from RESEARCH ¬І361. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire (three genuinely unrelated *go-weird* directions, one per renderer lane); siblings `430-wiki-pulse` (the **live Wikimedia edit firehose** sonified, bots-vs-humans timbre, three.js) + `431-test-signal` (Ikeda/Alva-Noto clinical **glitch-wall**, raw WebGL2) build-reviewed (tsc + ESLint clean) and banked in IDEAS ¬І361. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1 вАФ N-body gravity sim, **grep-verified lab-first**: `n-body`/`gravity`/`orbit`/`three-body` all clean) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ Verlet physics + Doppler/whoosh synth + comet-trail render) + named-reference(#3 вАФ Poincar√© / ChencinerвАУMontgomery 2000). **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-08 bans): touch INPUT (mic banned/rested) ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (3√Ч last-10, under the вЙ•4 ban) ¬Ј N-body-gravity-sonification TECHNIQUE (lab-first, 0√Ч) ¬Ј **cosmic-chaos NON-RESOLVING VIBE** (the decisive dodge вАФ a system that never repeats is the literal inverse of the banned consonant-resolving register). **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: whether the default seed fires audible close-approaches in the first seconds on real hardware (tuned, first-guess), whether Doppler-glide + inharmonic drones read as "physical/uncanny" vs. noise on phone speakers, the figure-8 preset's numerical drift to chaos (acknowledged, on-theme), and the iOS AudioContext-in-tap path (no audio/GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/432-three-body/README.md`

- **[/dream/422-shatter-piano](/dream/422-shatter-piano)** вАФ Shatter рЯ©ї. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 357. **A calm, consonant piano phrase вАФ and we refuse to let it land.** Tap **Shatter it** and a gentle ascending/descending figure (C4 D4 E4 G4 E4 D4, voiced to *want* to resolve to C4) plays once clean, then a **granular spectral-freeze engine** disassembles it: short 20вАУ160 ms grains (Hann-windowed) are re-scattered at jittered read-positions, detuned ¬±180¬Ґ, and played reversed (вЙИ25%вЖТ45% across the demo arc); a **FREEZE** locks the read-head on the leading-tone "almost-cadence" and lets it *drift* so it hangs forever without arriving. The auto-demo makes the move audible in one tap вАФ **clean phrase (0s) вЖТ dissolving (2.2s) вЖТ chaos (5s) вЖТ frozen cloud (8.2s)**. **The lab's deliberate Ikeda/Akten counter-piece** вАФ where Conchordal blooms into consonance and the cradle hums you to sleep, this one keeps the warm material and *denies its resolution* (jury #2/#1). **Subsystems (4):** (1) `OfflineAudioContext` phrase synth (the consonant source, rendered once, zero network); (2) granular/freeze engine (grain scheduler + position jitter + detune spread + reverse-probability + freeze-drift); (3) **AnalyserNode-driven DOM/CSS spectral grid** вАФ 512 absolutely-positioned `<div>`s (32√Ч16 freq-bin √Ч time-smear), opacity/scale/hue/blur/transform mutated per rAF (no canvas, no SVG, no WebGL); (4) optional source-loader doors. **Input = synthesized phrase** (default) with **optional doors to Karel's real music** вАФ paste a recording ID вЖТ `fetch('/api/audio/[id]')` (an *existing* route, not created here) or drag-drop an audio file, both `decodeAudioData` wrapped in try/catch that fails silently back to the synth phrase. **Output = pure DOM/CSS.** Master through a **DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter** (вИТ6 dB, ratio 12) so dense grain clouds can't clip. Clean teardown (cancel rAF, stop grains, close AudioContext). No API route, no `guard` (the only network is the *optional* read of the existing `/api/audio/[id]`; no mic, no camera, no recording, no secrets, no FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps. Typography-compliant (вЙ•44px buttons, `text-amber-300/95` notices, `text-2xl` hero). **Ambition 2/5:** вЙ•3-subsystems (#2 вАФ the 4 above) + named-reference (#3 вАФ **phase vocoder: Flanagan & Golden 1966 / Dolson 1986**; **granular: Roads *Microsound* 2001 / Xenakis *Formalized Music* 1971**; contemporary touchstone **arXiv:2507.19202 "Latent Granular Resynthesis," 2025**). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** вАФ granular synthesis exists in the lab (`227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП); the fresh move is the *consonance-denial framing* + the DOM/CSS spectral render, not the grain engine. **#5 honestly NOT claimed** вАФ the granular-resynthesis touchstone is 2025, not <30d (this fire's fresh anchor, the NOAA-SWPC transition, went to the banked `421-solar-drone` sibling). **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-08 bans + the audit): **synth-phrase/audio-file INPUT** (dodges the banned **mic**) ¬Ј **DOM/CSS OUTPUT** (dodges BOTH over-represented renderers вАФ **SVG** 4√Ч and **Canvas2D** 5√Ч in the last 10 вАФ and WebGL2/three.js; DOM/CSS = 0√Ч in the last 10) ¬Ј **granular spectral-freeze TECHNIQUE** (dodges the banned **Kuramoto**) ¬Ј **abrasive consonance-denial VIBE** (the explicit answer to the banned **just-intonation / consonant-resolving** register). **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire**; siblings `420-slime-static` (WebGPU compute physarum slime sonified as an abrasive roar) + `421-solar-drone` (live NOAA solar-wind audio-only off-screen drone вАФ the real-data lane's cycle-2) build-verified (tsc+ESLint clean) and banked in IDEAS ¬І357. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the frozen cloud reads as "deliberately denied/suspended" vs. "broken" on phone speakers (the legible cleanвЖТdissolve arc hedges it), the iOS AudioContext-in-tap path, DOM-grid perf with 512 cells on a low-end device, and whether the `/api/audio/[id]` door succeeds against a real Welcome-Home ID (defaults to the synth phrase regardless). Design notes: `src/app/dream/422-shatter-piano/README.md`

## Cycle 356 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to ONE concept: *your body, seen through the camera, generates a BEAT, not a chord*; the winner answers the jury's #1 "rhythm/timbre/noise, not tuning" **and** #6 "camera embodiment / MediaPipe" in one fire вАФ pure percussion that breaks the consonance rut

- **[/dream/419-kids-body-band](/dream/419-kids-body-band)** вАФ Body Band рЯ•Б. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 356. **For kids 4+ вАФ dance in front of the camera and your whole body plays a live DRUM kit: no melody, no tuning, just the beat you're making.** Tap the big **Start the band рЯ•Б** and the front camera (mirrored, dimmed, with a glowing skeleton over your joints) turns your body into a drum kit via **MediaPipe Pose** (33 real-time landmarks): **left hand up вЖТ TOM ¬Ј right hand up вЖТ SNARE/clap ¬Ј both hands thrown wide/up fast вЖТ CRASH ¬Ј knee-lift / body-drop вЖТ KICK ¬Ј head-bob вЖТ HI-HAT ticks.** A **groove engine** runs a steady ~100 BPM 16th-note grid and **quantizes every gesture onto the nearest slot**, so even a flailing toddler locks into a beat; a soft always-on pulse keeps a groove when still, and motion energy raises its fullness. Hit velocity = how fast/big the move; each hit fires a colored burst at the triggering limb + lights its drum pad. **PURE PERCUSSION** вАФ synthesized kick (pitch-enveloped sine + click), snare/clap (filtered noise burst), hi-hat (high-passed noise), tom (pitched sine), crash (bright bandpassed noise) вАФ all through a master **DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter** (вИТ6 dB, ratio 12) + soft master gain so it can **never blast small ears**. **The lab's first body-tracking piece that makes a BEAT instead of a chord** вАФ every prior pose piece (`287-mirror-choir`, `302-mirror-canon-round`, `234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП) maps the body to *harmony*; this maps it to *rhythm/noise* (jury #1) and uses **camera** input (jury #6) to dodge the over-represented mic. **Subsystems (4):** (1) `pose.ts` вАФ MediaPipe-fed **stateful forgiving gesture detector** (per-gesture cooldowns, per-limb speedвЖТvelocity, head-bob zero-crossing hi-hat, smoothed motion energy) + a sine-driven **ghost dancer**; (2) `groove.ts` вАФ ~100 BPM 16th-grid look-ahead scheduler with gesture quantization + energy-scaled always-on pulse; (3) `drums.ts` вАФ limiter'd pure-percussion Web-Audio synthesis; (4) Canvas2D render (mirrored cover-fit video, dark veil, glowing bones/joints, additive limb-flash bursts, DPR/resize-aware). **Input = camera / MediaPipe Pose** (NOT mic). **Output = Canvas2D.** **Graceful degradation:** AudioContext + getUserMedia + MediaPipe all start inside the **one tap**; if the camera is denied or MediaPipe fails to load, a **ghost dancer** drives the *identical* gesture-detector + groove so a 06:30 phone reviewer hears + sees a full beat **hands-free within ~2s**, and the five drum pads are directly **tappable** as a third input path. Clean unmount teardown (rAF / `landmarker.close()` / stop tracks / `ctx.close()`). No API route, no `guard` (camera is local; the only network is the public MediaPipe CDN вАФ no mic upload, no recording, no secrets, no FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps (MediaPipe via the proven runtime CDN dynamic-import). Typography-compliant (84px start button, `text-rose-300` denied notice). **Ambition 3/5:** вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ the 4 above) + named-reference(#3 вАФ **"Dance Motion-Guided Music Generation via RVQ," *Electronics* 15(10):2098, May 2026**; **BlazePose**, Bazarevsky et al. 2020; **Lee et al. "Dancing to Music," NeurIPS 2019**) + recent-research(#5 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І356 this fire, the May-2026 RVQ paper, <30d). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** вАФ MediaPipe Pose/Hand/Face were used before (`287`/`302`/`234`/`258`); the *fresh* move is the bodyвЖТ**percussion** mapping, not the tracker. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-08 bans): **camera/body-pose INPUT** (dodges the banned **mic**; camera = 0√Ч in the last 10 shipped) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (dodges the banned **SVG**) ¬Ј **body-motionвЖТquantized-drum-kit TECHNIQUE** (dodges the banned **Kuramoto**) ¬Ј **kids energetic/percussive VIBE** (dodges the banned **just-intonation / consonant-resolving** register вАФ pure noise/rhythm, the explicit counter to "everything resolves to gentle consonance"). Squarely in Karel's **loved camera-body-kids lineage** (`101-camera-song`вЭ§пЄП, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП, `217-dance-avatar`вЭ§пЄП, `234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП). **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire**; siblings `420-kids-motion-storm` (a **no-ML** webcam frame-differencing motion-energy groove вАФ dependency-free, builds even if the CDN is down) + `421-kids-beat-puppet` (a MediaPipe-Pose **continuous polyrhythm** where each limb drives a layer's density) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І356. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the gesture thresholds feel right against a real moving toddler (first-guess constants вАФ the central tuning bet), whether MediaPipe Pose loads + tracks fast enough on a phone, the iOS getUserMedia + AudioContext gesture path, and whether the discrete hits read as "I'm playing drums!" vs. noisy on phone speakers (the always-on pulse + tappable pads hedge it). Design notes: `src/app/dream/419-kids-body-band/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 355 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers; the lab's **first real-world-data sonification** вАФ the planet's actual last-24h earthquakes, sonified so it *never resolves*)

- **[/dream/418-seismic-pulse](/dream/418-seismic-pulse)** вАФ Seismic Pulse рЯМН. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 355. **Hear the whole planet shaking: the last 24 hours of real earthquakes (live USGS feed), sonified so it never lands on a chord.** Press **вЦґ Play the last 24 hours** (or wait 2.5 s for the auto-demo) and the day's seismicity вАФ compressed into a 75-second loop вАФ plays across a dark equirectangular world map: each quake fires an expanding ring at its true lon/lat and a sound transient mapped from the data вАФ **magnitude вЖТ loudness + sub-bass weight, depth вЖТ filter pitch (shallow = bright crack, deep = low rumble), longitude вЖТ stereo pan, latitude вЖТ filter resonance.** Big events (M3.5+) drop a short non-musical sine **boom** (~38вАУ65 Hz, raw data value вАФ *no scale snapping*); shallow small ones snap a high **crack**; underneath, a continuous **tectonic drone** of two detuned sub-oscillators (28.3 / 31.7 Hz) **beats at ~3.4 Hz** so even the silent gaps feel like a restless, unresolved planet. **The lab's FIRST real-world-data sonification** вАФ the jury's named "music about something other than music," which it flagged as *zero in 15 cycles* and the move that "breaks the mic rut **and** the consonance rut in one fire." It is also the lab's first piece whose audio source is a **live external API** (USGS GeoJSON, public-domain, no key, CORS), with a robust **offline fallback** (43 hard-coded Ring-of-Fire quakes + an amber "feed unreachable вАФ playing a recorded day" notice) so it's always demoable. **Subsystems (4):** (1) `data.ts` вАФ USGS fetch with 5 s AbortController timeout + offline fallback; (2) the 24hвЖТ75s **scheduling engine** (`setTimeout`-sequenced events, looped); (3) `sonify.ts` вАФ data-mapped **noise-burst + sub-sine + high-crack** synthesis through per-event `StereoPanner` + `BiquadFilter`, master `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, no scale quantization anywhere; (4) Canvas2D **world-map + 24h timeline** render (graticule, continent polylines, persistent dots, expanding flash rings, moving playhead, live M/place/depth readout). **Input = external data (USGS)** вАФ NOT mic, NOT camera, NOT touch. **Output = Canvas2D.** No API route, no `guard` (USGS is a public read-only client-side GET; no secrets, no FAL_KEY). Zero new deps. Typography-compliant; graceful amber/"tap to enable sound" fallbacks. **Ambition 3/5:** never-used-technique(#1 вАФ **first external-API real-world-data sonification**, grep-verified lab-first) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ the 4 above) + named-reference(#3 вАФ **Ryoji Ikeda *data-cosm*, 180 Studios, on view through Feb 2026**; **USGS audification вАФ "From Wiggles to Pops, Booms and Rumbles," AGU/Eos**). #4/#5 honestly NOT claimed (single-cycle; the seismic-audification corpus is foundational). **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-08 bans): **external-data-API INPUT** (dodges the banned **mic**) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (dodges the banned **SVG**) ¬Ј **real-world-data audification TECHNIQUE** (dodges the banned **Kuramoto**) ¬Ј **geologic / Ikeda-clinical / abrasive-unresolved VIBE** (dodges the banned **just-intonation / consonant-resolving** register вАФ it is atonal noise, the explicit counter-piece). **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire**; siblings `419-webgpu-storm` (the lab's first **WebGPU compute shader** вАФ a 500k-particle curl-noise storm + abrasive bed; answers jury #3, build-reviewed, banked because its GPU headline is unverifiable here and degrades to CPU on mobile Safari) + `420-test-pattern` (a Ryoji-Ikeda **test-tone / beating / glitch** piece that flatly refuses to resolve; answers jury #2) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І355. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/network in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the live USGS fetch + CORS works in prod (sample fallback hedges it), whether the data-mapped booms/cracks read as "the planet, abrasive-but-intentional" vs. just noise on phone speakers, and the iOS AudioContext-autoplay gesture path. Design notes: `src/app/dream/418-seismic-pulse/README.md`
- **[/dream/417-kids-cradle-song](/dream/417-kids-cradle-song)** вАФ Cradle Song рЯМЩ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 354. **For kids 4+ вАФ an almost-screenless, audio-first lullaby you ROCK like a cradle: a humming companion locks to your rhythm, then gently leads your rocking *down* toward sleep.** Tap **Begin**, close your eyes, and rock the tablet gently side to side. A soft humming voice (additive sine/triangle partials shaped by two vowel-formant bandpass filters вАФ pure synthesis, **no AI/sampled voice**) hums a whole-tone arpeggio in time with each rock over a warm drone, panned with a slow stereo sway; over ~12 minutes its tempo **drifts from ~65 down to ~45 rocks/min**, and because the music is *coupled* to you, it carries your rocking down with it вАФ then fades to "Goodnight." **The lab's first BIDIRECTIONAL sensorimotor-entrainment piece** (the music both follows *and leads* you) and its **second truly off-screen / audio-first** piece (after `346-sound-hunt`) вАФ the running screen is near-black with a **single faint breathing dot** as the only visual; *all* the information lives in the ears. This is the **DEEP off-screen cycle the JURY 2026-06-07 explicitly asked for** (#5: "still only ONE truly off-screen piece вА¶ spend a DEEP cycle on the non-screen / spatial-audio / haptic shelf вА¶ the lab keeps *researching* embodiment and never building it"). It's distinct from the lab's existing movement piece `402-kids-steady-walk`, which only *analyzes* your beat one-way (steadiness вЖТ a creature's gait) and never leads. Subsystems: (1) **`entrain.ts вЖТ stepMusicOsc`** вАФ a genuine **Kuramoto** single-pair coupling `dќЄ_music/dt = ѕЙ(t) + K¬Јsin(ќЄ_rock вИТ ќЄ_music)` (K=2.2, Euler-integrated), where the music's natural frequency `ѕЙ(t)` drifts linearly from `OMEGA_WAKE` (~65 cpm) toward `OMEGA_SLEEP` (~45 cpm) over the session вАФ the `sin(¬Ј)` nonlinearity makes it a true coupled oscillator (stable lock near ќФќЄ=0, graceful saturation far away), not a PLL; (2) **`makeRockDetector`** вАФ EMA-smoothed gravity-tilt (`accelerationIncludingGravity.x`), upward zero-crossing detection вЖТ IIR-smoothed rock-period estimate вЖТ interpolated instantaneous rock phase; (3) **additive formant hum-voice synth** (fundamental sine + octave triangle + 3rd-harmonic shimmer, routed through bandpass formants at ~680/1150 Hz "aah/ooh") + warm drone + code-generated **ConvolverNode** reverb + **StereoPanner** phase-sway, all вЖТ **DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter** (вИТ8 dB, ratio 12, 1 ms attack) + master gain so it can never blast small ears. **Input = DeviceMotion** (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` + `AudioContext` both created inside the **Begin** tap), with a **pointer-drag fallback** (drag left-right to "rock") and a **2.5 s auto-demo** that synthesises a gentle 0.82 Hz rock and feeds the same Kuramoto step вАФ so a sensor-less 06:30 phone reviewer hears the full hum-and-lead-to-sleep arc **hands-free**. Optional tiny `navigator.vibrate(28)` per rock (guarded; iOS ignores it). рЯОІ headphones recommended. **Degrades gracefully:** motion denied вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + drag fallback + auto-demo still runs; no Web Audio вЖТ readable notice; clean unmount teardown (rAF / listener / timer / `ctx.close()`). **No `<canvas>`, no SVG, no WebGL, no three.js** (audio-only render вАФ dodges the JURY-banned raw-WebGL2/three.js, the over-represented Canvas2D, *and* SVG, which just hit 4√Ч in the last 10 shipped and is banned this cycle). No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + DOM only, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no network, no recording, no secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **bidirectional humanвЖФmusic entrainment вАФ a music oscillator that LEADS the listener's tempo** вАФ grep-verified lab-first; `402` only analyzes one-way, `384`'s Kuramoto couples organismвЖФorganism, never humanвЖФmusic) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, rock-detector + Kuramoto entrainment engine + formant hum synth + drone/reverb/sway) + named-reference(#3, **Kuramoto 1975** ¬Ј **D-Jogger / Moens, Leman et al. ~2014** ¬Ј **interactive-RAS / Hove et al. 2012** ¬Ј **Repp 2005** SMS review ¬Ј **Oliveros *Deep Listening* 2005**) + multi-cycle-commitment(#4, **cycle 1 of a new bidirectional-entrainment thread** вАФ cycle 2 = the DOM-CSS *visible* leads, ¬І354 siblings; cycle 3 = Karel's *Welcome Home* piano as the entrainment bed). **#5 honestly NOT claimed** (the entrainment corpus is foundational, 2005вАУ2014; the dive's only <90d hits were spatial-audio pieces the build doesn't use вАФ RESEARCH ¬І354). **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the SVG-now-4√Ч / Canvas2D over-rep): **device-motion (rocking) INPUT** (NOT touch/tap, NOT MIDI/keyboard) ¬Ј **audio-only / off-screen OUTPUT** (NOT WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D, NOT SVG) ¬Ј **bidirectional Kuramoto-entrainment TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **whole-tone / just-intonation calm VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вАФ *music that locks to your movement and leads your tempo* вАФ three engines/directions); siblings `415-kids-rock-the-moon` (DOM/CSS breathing-moon wind-down, **Large & Jones 1999 adaptive oscillator**, JI-major) + `416-kids-wake-the-band` (DOM/CSS parade *wake-up* with a legible "Together!" phase-lock meter, **ADAM phase+period correction**, Lydian вАФ leads tempo *up*) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І354. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no sensor/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the downward lead *perceptibly* carries a real child's rocking toward sleep within the session (K / ѕЙ-drift constants are first-guess and the central bet), whether the formant-hum reads as a *soothing companion* vs. uncanny on phone speakers, the gravity-tilt rock detector on a real tilting hand (vs. the synthetic demo), the iOS DeviceMotion-permission + AudioContext gesture path, and whether a near-black audio-only screen reads as "intentional/calming" vs. "broken" at a 06:30 glance (the single breathing dot is the hedge). Design notes: `src/app/dream/417-kids-cradle-song/README.md`

## (Cycle 353 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, one LISTENING-A-LIFE concept via 3 renderers; winner makes the lab's emergent-harmony garden **LISTEN to real piano** вАФ cycle 3 of the a-life/JI thread, stacking the two *expensive* ambition criteria the jury said are nearly absent)

- **[/dream/414-conchordal-listen](/dream/414-conchordal-listen)** вАФ Conchordal Listen рЯОЉ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 353. **The living chord that LISTENS вАФ play piano and a self-composing pure-intonation harmony grows itself *around what you play*.** Cycle 1 (`410-conchordal-garden`) was the lab's first **artificial-life audio piece** вАФ sound-organisms forage a continuous PlompвАУLevelt consonance landscape and emergent just intonation arises *in a vacuum*, no scale ever specified. This cycle adds the missing third leg: **a "listen" subsystem** so the organisms forage around the pitches of *real audio*. Tap **"вЦґ Self-play demo"** and within ~2 s an internal gentle JI piano phrase begins; amber SVG "sunlight wells" bloom at the heard pitches and 28вАУ40 microtonal flower-organisms visibly drift toward them, assembling pure intervals (octaves, fifths, just-thirds) around the phrase вАФ **hands-free, so the 06:30 phone reviewer sees+hears it self-organize untouched.** Or tap **"рЯОє Play piano"** to feed a live mic, or paste a **Welcome Home recording ID** to forage around Karel's real piano (the `163-paths-visualizer` `/api/audio/{id}` pattern; graceful `text-rose-300` error, demo keeps running). **Why it matters:** the JURY 2026-06-07's loudest call (#3) was *"deepen, don't defer вАФ stack the EXPENSIVE criteria #4 multi-cycle + #5 recent research, extend a thread instead of opening a fresh explorer."* This is exactly that: **cycle 3** of the JI/roughness/a-life thread (404 adaptive-JI вЖТ 410 emergent-JI вЖТ **414 listening-JI**), and it honors Karel's standing **real-music directive** (use his actual *Welcome Home* tracks as input). Five subsystems: (1) **`engine.ts вЖТ plRoughness`** вАФ the **PlompвАУLevelt 1965** critical-band roughness curve `aвВБaвВВ(e^{-3.5sx}вИТe^{-5.75sx})`, summed over all partial-pairs against *both* the heard spectrum and the other organisms; (2) **a-life organism sim** вАФ each organism is an additive Web-Audio voice at a *continuous* microtonal pitch (no fixed scale, **no D-Dorian**) foraging via **MetropolisвАУHastings** pitch moves (accept-if-better, accept-worse with `exp(вИТќФF/T)`, T cooling) toward lower roughness + a harmonicity bonus to the strongest heard partial; consonant organisms thrive, chronically dissonant ones die and **re-seed near heard partials**; (3) **the listen subsystem (the cycle-3 addition)** вАФ `extractFftPeaks` finds the top ~4 spectral peaks (robust for polyphonic piano вАФ *no* full in-browser transcription, per musicalboard.com 2026-05-05) and `detectFundamental` adds one monophonic fвВА via **MPM/autocorrelation** (McLeod & Wyvill 2005) with parabolic interpolation; these become the landscape's attractor wells; (4) **Kuramoto phase coupling** (`ќЄбµҐ += dt¬Ј(ѕЙбµҐ + K¬Јќ£в±Љ sin(ќЄв±ЉвИТќЄбµҐ))`, K=1.5) over mutually-consonant voices so a discovered chord *breathes together* (empirical backing: consonance increases interpersonal phase sync вАФ **PMC11534602, 2024**); (5) **audio chain** вАФ additive voices вЖТ master вЖТ ConvolverNode reverb + **DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter** (вИТ6 dB, ratio 12) so it can never clip or blast. **Renderer: inline SVG** (dodges the JURY-banned raw-WebGL2/three.js *and* the now-over-represented Canvas2D вЙ•5√Ч in the last 10): amber radial-gradient wells at heard pitches, 5вАУ8-petal blooms that open with health and pulse with Kuramoto phase, swaying B√©zier stems, consonant-pair connection threads, and a legible HUD (heard-pitch note names + a mean-consonance meter that climbs as harmony settles). **Degrades gracefully:** `AudioContext` created inside the Start tap (autoplay-safe); mic denied/absent вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + the self-play demo still runs (never blank); failed recording fetch вЖТ readable error, demo continues. No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; mic is analysis-only вАФ never recorded/uploaded; the only network call is a read-only fetch of the existing prod `/api/audio/{id}` route, try/catch-wrapped). Zero new deps. **Ambition 4/5**: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, input-analysis + PlompвАУLevelt landscape + a-life sim + Kuramoto + synth = 5) + named-reference(#3, **Conchordal arXiv:2603.25637** ¬Ј **PlompвАУLevelt 1965** ¬Ј **McLeod MPM 2005** ¬Ј **PMC11534602 2024**) + **multi-cycle-commitment(#4 вАФ the EXPENSIVE criterion, cycle 3 of a deliberate thread)** + **current-quarter-research(#5 borderline вАФ musicalboard.com 2026-05-05, ~34d, the freshest concrete client-buildable anchor in ~10 dives)**. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the Canvas2D over-rep): **audio/mic-listen INPUT** (fresh, non-banned) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT the over-represented Canvas2D) ¬Ј **input-conditioned a-life consonance-foraging TECHNIQUE** (cycle-3 extension) ¬Ј **emergent no-fixed-scale microtonal VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вАФ *a living chord that listens to your piano* вАФ three renderer/metaphor attacks); siblings `415-conchordal-orbit` (the same listening engine on an **SVG log-spiral pitch space** where one turn = an octave, so emergent pure intervals snap into recurring color-coded geometric constellations вАФ the "geometry of harmony" take) + `416-conchordal-aura` (the same engine in **pure DOM/CSS** glow-blobs, no canvas/SVG вАФ the renderer-diversity wildcard) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І353. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the heard-pitch wells *perceptibly* pull the population into "harmony around your playing" vs. a generic settle within the first minute (the attraction/metabolism/Metropolis constants are first-guess), whether real polyphonic piano's FFT peaks give clean enough wells (the central bet), the mic getUserMedia + iOS AudioContext gesture path, whether an actual `/api/audio/{id}` recording loads + decodes through MediaElementSource in prod (the real-music door is unverified here), and per-frame SVG rebuild perf at ~40 organisms on a low-end tablet. Design notes: `src/app/dream/414-conchordal-listen/README.md`

## (Cycle 352 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, one ARTICULATORY-MIRROR concept via 3 renderers; winner is the lab's first formant-to-tongue **articulatory-inversion** toy + its first use of real **LPC** formant tracking вАФ a child sings a vowel and *sees inside the mouth*)

- **[/dream/413-kids-mouth-mirror](/dream/413-kids-mouth-mirror)** вАФ The Magic X-Ray Mouth Mirror рЯСД. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 352. **For kids 4+ вАФ sing a vowel and SEE INSIDE the mouth: a friendly side-view cartoon head whose tongue, jaw, and lips physically move to the shape your voice implies, then sings the vowel back.** Tap **Start рЯО§**, sing a long `aaah` / `eee` / `ooo` and watch the paper-cream animal head (drawn in cross-section, facing left) glide its articulators in real time вАФ `aaah` drops the jaw and flattens the tongue low-and-back; `eee` nearly closes the jaw and pushes the tongue high-and-front; `ooo` purses the lips and pulls the tongue back. A little **vowel-quadrilateral inset** plots where your tongue is; after ~1.2 s of quiet the head **sings your vowel back** in a dreamy **whole-tone** voice. **The lab's first articulatory-inversion toy and its first use of real LPC formant tracking.** This answers JURY 2026-06-07 **provocation #6** head-on ("a *kids* listening/analysis toy вАФ a child sings, the machine shows what it heard вАФ would break both macro-ruts in one fire") and feeds the standing legible/instructional lane: it's the AURORA formant-to-tongue-inversion idea done **literally** (you see the tongue, not a flat color) and it fixes the exact gap the lab's prior vowel piece `393-kids-vowel-color` flagged вАФ 393 used crude FFT peak-picking and its own README concedes that is **unreliable precisely for children's high voices** (wide harmonic spacing makes the "formant" peak land on whichever harmonic falls in-band). Three subsystems: (1) **`lpc.ts`** вАФ real **Linear Predictive Coding**: pre-emphasis (0.97) вЖТ Hamming window вЖТ autocorrelation вЖТ **LevinsonвАУDurbin recursion (order 14)** вЖТ evaluate the all-pole spectral envelope on a frequency grid вЖТ peak-pick **F1** (~250вАУ900 Hz) and **F2** (~900вАУ2800 Hz) with parabolic interpolation вЖТ **articulatory inversion** to (jaw, tongue-height вИЭ 1/F1, tongue-frontness вИЭ F2, lip-rounding вИЭ low-F2) вЖТ ќ±=0.15 exponential smoothing вЖТ PetersonвАУBarney nearest-vowel label. LPC models the *vocal-tract filter* independent of pitch, which is exactly why it survives a child's f0 where FFT peak-picking fails; (2) **`page.tsx`** вАФ an all-**SVG** side-profile head whose tongue-body path, jaw, and lip curves are rebuilt every frame from the *raw smoothed* (F1,F2) so the articulators **glide continuously**, never snapping between 5 fixed poses, plus the vowel-quadrilateral dot, a big readable vowel label, and a live F1/F2 readout; (3) **`synth.ts`** вАФ a **whole-tone** sing-back (C-D-E-F#-G#) shaped through **two bandpass filters tuned to the heard F1/F2** so the machine actually *sounds* like the vowel, soft attack/release, idle-breath pad, everything вЖТ master gain вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so it can never blast small ears. The mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` **only** вАФ never recorded, routed to speakers, or transmitted. **Degrades gracefully:** mic denied/absent вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a hands-free **attract mode** that cycles the head through /a/вЖТ/e/вЖТ/i/вЖТ/o/вЖТ/u/ (moving the tongue + singing each) so a no-mic 06:30 phone reviewer sees+hears the whole call-and-response within a few seconds; with mic, ~4 s of silence drifts to a gentle idle breath; `AudioContext` created inside the Start tap (autoplay-safe). **No WebGL2, no three.js, no Canvas2D** (SVG only вАФ dodges both the JURY-banned GPU renderers and the now-over-represented Canvas2D). No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; no camera, no network, no recording, no secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **real LPC / LevinsonвАУDurbin formant tracking + articulatory inversion** вАФ grep-verified lab-first; 393 used FFT peak-picking and explicitly lacked LPC) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, LPC formant tracker + articulatory-inversion SVG renderer + formant-shaped whole-tone sing-back) + named-reference(#3, **AURORA formant-to-tongue inversion, arXiv:2603.17543, Mar 2026** ¬Ј **Peterson & Barney 1952** ¬Ј the **vowel-quadrilateral / IPA articulatory model** ¬Ј **LevinsonвАУDurbin / Fant 1960 sourceвАУfilter**). **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the Canvas2D watch): **mic-voice INPUT** (breaks the banned touch/tap reflex) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D) ¬Ј **LPC-articulatory-inversion TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **whole-tone VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic). Crosses **JURY #6** вАФ a kids *listening/analysis* toy (breaks the kids emergence-sim reflex). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вАФ *a creature that physically copies your mouth from a sung vowel and sings it back* вАФ three attacks); siblings `411-kids-copycat-mouth` (front-facing SVG clay creature, **LPC**, just-intonation вАФ the warmest/most kid-delightful, cleanest modular code) + `412-kids-vowel-puppet` (Canvas2D gooey clay puppet, **cepstral** formant extraction, gamelan slendro вАФ the distinct-technique A/B) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І352. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether real children's voices track cleanly on the F1/F2 bands (LPC order/band edges are first-guess and the central bet of the whole piece), whether the moving tongue reads as *delightful* vs *clinical* at a 06:30 phone glance, the silence-gate timing for sing-back in a noisy room, and iOS Safari AudioContext gesture-unlock. Design notes: `src/app/dream/413-kids-mouth-mirror/README.md`

## (Cycle 351 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, one EMERGENT-HARMONY concept via 3 renderers; winner is the lab's first ARTIFICIAL-LIFE / a-life audio piece where a chord is alive and discovers just intonation with no scale specified)

- **[/dream/410-conchordal-garden](/dream/410-conchordal-garden)** вАФ Conchordal Garden. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 351. **The lab's first ARTIFICIAL-LIFE audio piece вАФ a chord that's *alive*. A garden of ~24 sound-organisms drifts through continuous pitch space hunting consonance; the ones that find it bloom and grow loud, the ones that clash wilt and die, and a self-composing just-intonation-like harmony *emerges with no scale ever specified* вАФ genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 0.** Tap **Start Garden** (it plays itself вАФ no interaction needed) and watch: each organism is a sustained additive voice plotted by pitch on the vertical log axis (130вАУ780 Hz). A **PlompвАУLevelt roughness** model (the standard `aвВБaвВВ(e^{-3.5x} вИТ e^{-5.75x})` critical-band curve summed over 5 partials per voice) plus a **harmonicity bonus** for proximity to small-integer ratios (1/1, 9/8, 6/5, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1) defines a continuous **consonance fitness landscape**; each organism proposes small Gaussian pitch moves (¬±15¬Ґ) and accepts them **greedily-or-via-Metropolis** if dissonance drops, with a **crowding penalty** so they don't pile onto one note. **Metabolism**: consonant organisms gain health (bloom: petals open, glow brightens), persistently rough ones lose it and **die** (wilt, red dissonance ring, fade out); healthy ones **reproduce** (a seed sprouts nearby), so the garden self-sustains and re-seeds if it crashes. **Kuramoto phase coupling** synchronizes the amplitude tremolo + visual breathing among consonant clusters, so a discovered chord visibly/audibly **pulses together** вАФ the "togetherness" payoff. Rendered in **inline animated SVG** (radial-gradient blooms, glow auras, curved vine-threads between consonant pairs that pulse with shared phase, Kuramoto-swayed stems) вАФ **no Canvas2D, no WebGL/three.js**. Audio = additive sine voices (gain вИЭ health √Ч tremolo, frequency **glides** via `setTargetAtTime`) вЖТ synthetic-IR `ConvolverNode` reverb вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; calm, ambient, never harsh. Optional **click-to-plant** a seed at a chosen pitch (NOT required вАФ the piece is fully autonomous). Live stats: elapsed time, population, **mean-consonance** climbing as the garden self-organizes. **Degrades gracefully:** no Web Audio вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + the visual ecosystem keeps running silently. No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; no mic/camera/network/recording/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **artificial-life consonance-foraging / agents that survive on consonance** вАФ grep-verified lab-first; the lab has *fixed-ratio* JI (397/400) and *adaptive* JI (404) but never an *emergent, scale-free, evolutionary* harmony) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, PlompвАУLevelt fitness-landscape engine + a-life organism life-sim + Kuramoto coupling + additive Web-Audio synth + SVG garden render = 5) + multi-cycle(#4, **cycle 2 of the JI/roughness thread** that 404вЖТ405 opened вАФ promotes roughness from a *readout* to the *physics that drives the population*; designed to deepen with Karel's real piano as future organisms) + recent-research(#5, **"Conchordal: Emergent Harmony via Direct Cognitive Coupling in a Psychoacoustic Landscape," arXiv:2603.25637, submitted 2026-03-26** вАФ current-quarter, directly on-technique; honest caveat: ~74 days, not strictly <30, so claimed as **borderline/current-quarter**, the freshest on-technique anchor in ~9 dives). **Stacks the two *expensive* criteria (#4 + #5) the jury said are nearly absent**, and crosses **jury #6** вАФ it's an *adult emergence-sim sonified as a generative form*, breaking the adult-analysis-engine reflex. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the now-over-represented Canvas2D): **autonomous-generative INPUT** (NOT MIDI/keyboard, NOT touch-as-instrument) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js, **NOT Canvas2D** вАФ which appeared вЙ•4√Ч in the last 10 shipped, so it was banned by the diversity audit this cycle) ¬Ј **a-life consonance-foraging TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **emergent microtonal, no-fixed-scale VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic вАФ the literal antidote to the jury's #2). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вАФ *a chord that is alive, foraging a psychoacoustic landscape* вАФ three visual attacks); siblings `409-conchordal-field` (the same a-life engine rendered as a **Canvas2D dissonance heatmap** вАФ agents settle into glowing consonance *valleys*; the most faithful realization of the paper's "psychoacoustic landscape") + `411-conchordal-spiral` (the same engine on a **Canvas2D log-spiral** where one turn = an octave, so emergent pure fifths/thirds snap into recurring color-coded geometric constellations) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І351. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio hardware in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the emergent chord *perceptibly* reads as "settling from chaos into consonance" by ear on phone speakers within the first minute, whether the population finds stable JI intervals or wanders (the metabolism/Metropolis/coupling constants are first-guess), per-frame SVG `innerHTML` rebuild perf at ~36 organisms on a low-end tablet, and the iOS AudioContext gesture-unlock path. Design notes: `src/app/dream/410-conchordal-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 350 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, one long-form-STATEFUL concept via 3 renderers; winner is the lab's first BREATH-GROWN LONG-FORM piece that *remembers every breath* + replays its own growth)

- **[/dream/408-kids-breath-grove](/dream/408-kids-breath-grove)** вАФ Breath Grove. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 350. **The lab's first LONG-FORM STATEFUL kids piece: breathe slowly and a glowing tree grows branch-by-branch over a few minutes вАФ and because it *remembers every breath*, you can tap "replay" and watch the whole grove's growth race by in seconds.** Tap the big Begin button (or just wait вАФ it auto-demos) and breathe out: a mic **RMS breath-envelope** detector (smoothed RMS + an **auto-calibrating noise-floor EMA** so a quiet child still crosses the gate; analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded) fires ONE event per exhale, carrying its duration + strength. Each exhale feeds an **L-system-inspired recursive-branching grove** (`grove.ts`): early breaths sprout saplings, later ones extend tips and **split branches** (split probability + length scale with breath strength), maturing branches accrete leaves вЖТ flowers вЖТ embers. Every segment and blossom is stamped with the **breath index that created it**, so the grove carries genuine memory вАФ and a deterministic xorshift RNG seeded per session means `buildTimelapse()` can faithfully **rebuild the entire growth history from the recorded breaths** for the replay. A 4-stage arc driven by cumulative breath count gates the look: **(1, breaths 1вАУ4)** bare saplings rise ¬Ј **(2, 5вАУ9)** branches split, first leaves ¬Ј **(3, 10вАУ14)** blossoms open, fireflies drift among the branches ¬Ј **(4, 15+)** the night sky deepens to violet, a moon + aurora glow, the grove is full. Audio (`audio.ts`) is a **pelog-like INHARMONIC** drone вАФ 5 stage-gated sine voices (55 / 82.41 / 110 / 164.81 / 185 Hz, each bent 8вАУ22¬Ґ off 12-TET with a per-voice vibrato LFO + a soft 2nd-partial) that **thicken voice-by-voice as the grove grows**, plus a per-exhale **inharmonic bell bloom** (partials 1 : 2.756 : 5.404 вАФ a real metallophone-like spectrum, not a harmonic tone), all through a **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** at low master gain so it can never blast small ears (KIDS-safe: no harsh transients, never silent). Renderer is **Canvas2D** (DPR/resize-aware; background gradient + aurora + moon + stars + glow-pass branches + leaves/flowers/embers + drifting fireflies) вАФ **no WebGL/three.js** (the jury's standing output ban). **Degrades + auto-demos:** deny/ignore the mic вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + an **auto-demo** that fires synthetic breaths every ~3.2s (also auto-triggers after 8s of mic silence) so the full arc grows hands-free and reaches **Stage 4 in ~48s** вАФ a 06:30 phone reviewer sees grassвЖТgroveвЖТmoon and the timelapse replay with zero permission; provenance badge shows emerald "Listening рЯО§" vs amber "Auto-demo (breathing)". No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio mic-analysis + Canvas2D, all client-side; no recording/upload/network/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, breath-RMS detector + L-system grove state-machine + Canvas2D renderer + pelog drone/bell synth = 4) + **multi-cycle / long-form-STATEFUL(#4, the *expensive* criterion the jury said is nearly absent вАФ the grove is genuinely different at minute 3 than minute 0, accretes indefinitely, and the timelapse makes the "remembers every breath" thesis literal)** + named-reference(#3, **L-systems (Aristid Lindenmayer)** recursive branching ¬Ј **pelog / Indonesian gamelan inharmonic tuning** ¬Ј Brian Eno generative-ambient lineage). Honest #5: no <30-day client-buildable hit this dive (the dive surfaced the live 2026 generative-ambient + guided-breathing wave as supporting context, soundverse 2026 / isotonik generative-worldscape вАФ but no dated technique anchor), so #5 is **not** claimed. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans): **breath-RMS INPUT** (NOT MIDI/keyboard, NOT touch/tap) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js) ¬Ј **L-system-grove / breath-accretion TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **pelog long-form-stateful VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic) вАФ and it directly stacks the categorical menu's thin **"long-form generative вАФ state, memory, evolution, not loops"** shelf. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вАФ *your breathing grows a night-garden that remembers every breath* вАФ three technical attacks); siblings `407-kids-breath-garden` (the canonical **inline-SVG** meadow: grass вЖТ swaying flowers вЖТ fireflies вЖТ crescent-moon violet sky вАФ the most legible literal-imagery bedtime read) + `409-kids-breath-tidepool` (a **pure DOM/CSS** bioluminescent reef: each breath blooms a glowing anemone/jellyfish/plankton that pulses forever вАФ extreme renderer diversity) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І350. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic hardware in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the pelog detuning reads as "warm + other" vs merely "out of tune" on phone speakers, whether a quiet child's exhale reliably crosses the auto-calibrated gate on a real phone mic in a bedroom, the iOS AudioContext gesture-unlock path, and per-frame Canvas2D redraw perf as branch/blossom counts grow on a low-end tablet. Design notes: `src/app/dream/408-kids-breath-grove/README.md`

---

## (Cycle 349 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, one fresh foreign-tonal concept via 3 approaches; winner is the lab's first ADAPTIVE / DYNAMIC just-intonation piece)

- **[/dream/404-comma-pump](/dream/404-comma-pump)** вАФ Comma Pump. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 349. **The lab's first piece in ADAPTIVE (dynamic) just intonation вАФ and a piece of music that, by mathematical necessity, can never come home.** Press **Start**: an autonomous, slow, soft pad-progression `I вЖТ IV вЖТ ii вЖТ V вЖТ I` plays, but unlike the lab's earlier *fixed-ratio* JI pieces (394/397/400) every chord is voiced from PURE 5-limit ratios above a root that is itself reached by PURE interval *root motions* (√Ч4/3, √Ч5/6, √Ч4/3, √Ч2/3). The product of one full loop is exactly **80/81** вАФ the **syntonic comma** вАФ so the tonic sinks вЙИ **вИТ21.5 ¬Ґ per cycle, indefinitely**: a long-form **stateful** drift where minute 5 sits audibly flat of minute 1 (вЙИ a whole tone down after ~15 min). The Canvas2D **"pitch river"** scrolls time leftвЖТright over a log-frequency axis; a dim blue line marks the original home tonic (A3 = 220 Hz, fixed forever) and a bright violet line marks the current drifting root вАФ you literally *watch home sink away from the music*, with a live **cents-from-home** counter. The payoff control is **JI вЗД 12-TET**: flip to equal temperament and every voice snaps to the nearest tempered pitch вАФ the drift stops (ET *tempers out* the comma) but you immediately hear the **beating** of impure thirds (400¬Ґ vs the pure 386¬Ґ) and fifths; flip back and the chords lock beat-free. A **tempo** slider scales the harmonic rhythm without touching the tuning math. Synth = additive pad (5 sine/triangle partials per voice) вЖТ `ConvolverNode` reverb вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (never blasts). No mic/camera/MIDI/touch-as-instrument, **no WebGL/three.js** (Canvas2D only), no API route, no `guard` (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D; no network/recording/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **adaptive/dynamic JI + comma-pump drift** вАФ grep-verified lab-first; prior JI is fixed-ratio, and 37-ratio-lab is a *static* click Tonnetz) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, adaptive 5-limit tuner + generative progression scheduler + additive pad/reverb/limiter synth + Canvas2D scrolling river) + named-reference(#3, **syntonic comma / comma pump (81/80)** ¬Ј **Pivotuner arXiv:2306.03873** adaptive real-time JI ¬Ј **Ben Johnston / Harry Partch** ¬Ј **La Monte Young, *The Well-Tuned Piano***). Honest #5: no <30-day client-buildable hit again (the dive widened to the AI-music/hardware changelog space вАФ soundverse 2026, SONICWARE Ambient √Ш 1.5 вАФ but Pivotuner is 2023/foundational), so #5 is **not** claimed. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans): **autonomous-generative INPUT** (NOT MIDI/keyboard, NOT touch-as-instrument) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js) ¬Ј **adaptive-JI / comma-pump TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **5-limit-JI drift VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic) вАФ answers JURY #1 (non-GPU renderer) + #2 (foreign tonal world) + #6 (generative, not the adult analysis reflex), and stacks the long-form/stateful menu shelf the lab is thin on. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire; siblings `405-pure-lock` (autonomous chords gliding 12-TETвЖТJI under a live **PlompвАУLevelt roughness meter** that collapses to zero as partials lock вАФ the lab's most legible/pedagogical JI demo) + `406-drifting-choir` (5вАУ7 sustained voices that **glissando-retune to pure ratios** as a wandering pivot moves, Pivotuner-style ambient drone) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І349. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio hardware in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the JI-vs-ET beating contrast reads as *striking* on phone speakers, whether the comma drift is *perceptible* as "sinking" by ear over minutes (it's slow by design), reverb/limiter balance, and whether the pitch-river home/root lines read clearly at a 06:30 phone glance. Design notes: `src/app/dream/404-comma-pump/README.md`
