## (Cycle 348 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 listening/analysis toys each on an un-centered analysis dimension, all SVG output + non-D-Dorian; winner is the lab's first pulse-STEADINESS / entrainment toy)

- **[/dream/402-kids-steady-walk](/dream/402-kids-steady-walk)** вАФ Steady Walk. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 348. **The lab's first pulse-STEADINESS / entrainment toy: a little creature walks *smoothly* only while you keep a steady beat вАФ clap or say "bup bup bup" вАФ and *stumbles* the moment your beat gets wobbly.** Tap **Start** (or **Watch it play** for the no-mic demo) and clap a pulse: a mic **onset detector** (half-wave-rectified **spectral flux √Ч high-frequency-content**, adaptive running-mean threshold, ~120 ms refractory per Repp 2005) fires one step per clap/percussive vocal hit; the last 8 **inter-onset intervals** feed a steadiness score = **1 вИТ CV** (CV = stddev/mean of the IOIs) and a tempo = 60000/median(IOI). **Steadiness drives the gait** вАФ high вЖТ even alternating SVG walk-cycle at your tempo, smiling, clear spots; low вЖТ lurching uneven legs, body wobble, a worried face. Each step plays a footstep tone cycling a **slendro** pentatonic (Indonesian gamelan, вЙИ[196, 226, 258, 296, 342] Hz + octave вАФ a non-Western, **non-D-Dorian** world); hold steady for 8 steps and the creature **hops** and a flower blooms ahead on the scrolling path. This is the single-fire **double-rut break** the JURY (2026-06-07) asked for in provocation #6: it takes the lab's *adult analysis-engine reflex* (onset/IOI/tempo tracking вАФ the 358/365/370/375/380 family) and turns it into a *kids listening toy*, and it scores the child's **internal pulse steadiness** (sensorimotor entrainment), NOT pattern recall вАФ so it's distinct from the existing clap-*echo* toys (154-clap-back, 371-clap-along). **Renderer is inline SVG** (creature, scrolling path, footprints, steadiness meter, reward flowers) вАФ the direct answer to jury #1 ("raw-WebGL2 is the new Canvas2D вАФ ban it"): zero canvas, zero WebGL. **Degrades + auto-demos:** deny/ignore the mic вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a **Watch it play** demo that scripts a steadyвЖТwobblyвЖТsteady onset stream so the whole mechanic (smooth walk вЖТ stumble вЖТ recover) is legible hands-free at a 06:30 phone glance; a **Use mic** button promotes the demo to live. No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio mic-analysis + SVG, all client-side; no recording/upload/network/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, IOI-variance **steadiness / entrainment scoring** вАФ grep-verified lab-first; prior clap toys echo *patterns*, none score *pulse steadiness*) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, spectral-flux onset detector + IOI/tempo/steadiness tracker + SVG gait/scene render + slendro footstep synth) + named-reference(#3, **Repp, "Sensorimotor synchronization: A review of the tapping literature," Psychon. Bull. Rev. 2005**). **Diversity** (vs jury bans): **mic-onset INPUT** (NOT MIDI, NOT touch) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2/three.js/Canvas2D) ¬Ј **onset/IOI-steadiness TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **slendro / entrainment VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; siblings `403-kids-breath-garden` (long-form **stateful** breathвЖТnight-garden that *evolves over minutes & remembers every breath*, pelog-inharmonic drone вАФ the strongest bank, an explicit multi-cycle thread for the next kids DEEP) + `401-kids-sound-zoo` (voice-**timbre** classifier via spectral-flatness / Wiener entropy вЖТ wake the matching animal, no pitch/scale) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І348. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic hardware in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether a child's claps reliably cross the onset threshold on a real phone mic vs. room noise (the adaptive threshold + 0.05 floor may need tuning), whether the CVвЖТgait mapping *reads* as "smooth vs stumbling" by eye, and the slendro footstep balance on phone speakers. Design notes: `src/app/dream/402-kids-steady-walk/README.md`

---

## в≠Р (Cycle 347 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches to "walk through + feel the ambisonic room" ¬Ј cycle 2 of the spatial-audio thread)

- **[/dream/400-soundwalk-room](/dream/400-soundwalk-room)** вАФ Soundwalk Room. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 347. **Cycle 2 of the spatial-audio thread вАФ and the lab's FIRST HAPTIC OUTPUT. Where 394 let you *rotate* a fixed first-order ambisonic field (turn your head), this lets you *walk through* it (6DoF translation) and *feel* each voice brush past via the Vibration API.** Tap Start (headphones, eyes can be closed) and a wandering auto-pilot walks you on a looping path between **seven just-intonation overtone voices** of A1вЙИ55 Hz (1/1, 3/2, 5/4, 2/1, 5/3, 9/4, 3/1) standing at fixed spots on the floor of a ~9√Ч9 m room. Each voice **swells** as you approach, **swings around your head front вЖТ side вЖТ behind** as you pass it (the parallax "wow," which falls straight out of recomputing each source's relative azimuth from your live position), and **recedes + dulls** behind you (inverse-distance gain + a distance-driven low-pass = air absorption). Brush within 1.5 m of a voice and your phone fires a short vibrotactile **tap** whose feel encodes *which voice, how close, how loud* вАФ a lightweight signal-processing **Sound2Hap** (pulse length/gap scale inversely with pitch; density scales with proximity + live per-voice RMS; one tap per genuine pass, throttled). **6DoF math from the Google "Ambisonics soundfield navigation (directional decomposition + path-distance estimation)" recipe** вАФ we get the directional decomposition free (each synthesized source IS a known direction) and implement the path-distance re-render via one HRTF `PannerNode` per source (robust, never drifts, identical perceptual result; keeps 394's ambisonic vocabulary, lets the panner be the final decode). Master chain through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + inverse-distance clamp so it can **never blast** your ears. **Degrades + auto-demos:** tap Start and do nothing вАФ within seconds voices swell/pass/recede, the dot moves on the dim Canvas2D map, and (if supported) you feel taps; no Vibration API вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + the map **ring-pulses** on each pass as a visual stand-in; no device-orientation вЖТ heading follows the auto-walk + drag-to-steer; no Canvas2D вЖТ notice (audio walk keeps running, eyes-closed by design). No WebGL/three.js (dodges the jury's output ban) ¬Ј device-orientation + auto-walk + drag INPUT (no MIDI/touch-as-instrument) ¬Ј just-intonation overtone VIBE (not D-Dorian/C-pentatonic). No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + Canvas2D + Vibration API, all client-side; no mic/camera/network/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 5/5**: never-used-technique(#1, 6DoF soundfield translation + haptic output вАФ both grep-verified lab-first; 394 only rotated) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2, JI synth + path-distance re-spatialiser + Sound2Hap haptic engine + auto-walk locomotion + Canvas2D map) + named-reference(#3, Google soundfield-navigation ¬Ј Sound2Hap ¬Ј Janet Cardiff ¬Ј Zotter & Frank 2019) + multi-cycle(#4, cycle 2 of the deliberate spatial thread; cycle 3 = Karel's *Welcome Home* tracks as the spatial sources) + recent-research(#5, **Sound2Hap arXiv:2601.12245, CHI 2026** вАФ the freshest dated anchor, directly on the haptic technique). **The expensive criteria (#4 + #5) the jury said are nearly absent, stacked.** Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire; sibling `401-feel-the-room` (haptic-LED "metal detector for sound" вАФ a parking-sensor pulse train quickens toward the nearest voice, eyes-closed wayfinding, screen optional) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І347 as the cycle-3 / next-off-screen candidate. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/sensor/haptics hardware in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: real binaural quality + how convincingly the parallax swing reads through HRTF, whether the air/distance constants feel balanced by ear, real `navigator.vibrate` pattern feel + throttle in the hand, and `DeviceOrientationEvent` axis/sign conventions across iOS/Android. Design notes: `src/app/dream/400-soundwalk-room/README.md`

---

## Cycle 346 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers each in a different foreign tonal world + non-GPU renderer + non-banned input

- **[/dream/397-kids-crystal-bloom](/dream/397-kids-crystal-bloom)** вАФ Crystal Bloom. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 346. **The lab's first kids piece that lives in JUST INTONATION вАФ blow or hum into the mic and grow a tower of crystal bells tuned to PURE harmonic ratios, whose stacked chord is *beating-free*: a glassy stillness a 12-tone-equal-tempered piano physically cannot make.** Tap to begin, then breathe/hum вАФ mic *loudness only* (RMS envelope, never pitch) climbs a tower of 9 faceted **animated-SVG** gem-bells, each its own bold color (color = the language for pre-readers), lighting + ringing in sequence as the bloom rises; sustained input keeps the whole stacked chord shimmering. Each bell is a pure integer-ratio over A2вЙИ110 Hz вАФ 1/1, 9/8, 5/4 (the pure major third the piano sharpens by ~14¬Ґ), 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1, 9/4, 5/2 вАФ built from a few sine partials with a fast attack + long shimmer tail, over a sustained f0+3/2 drone, through a soft-clip + compressor limiter so nothing ever spikes (kids-safe: no harsh transients, nothing piercing). **Degrades + auto-demos:** deny/ignore the mic and a synthetic ~7s breath swell blooms and rings the tower hands-free in a calm loop, so a phone reviewer at 06:30 hears it sing with zero permission; press-and-hold the tower is the manual fallback; mic errors show in readable `text-rose-300`. **Foreign tonal world by design** вАФ pure just intonation, **not** the jury-banned D-Dorian/C-pentatonic вАФ and a **rare renderer** (animated SVG, used only once before in 393), the deliberate break from the lab's raw-WebGL2 rut. No mic-monitoring (no feedback), no API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + mic analysis, all client-side; no network/recording/upload/secrets). Zero new deps.
  **Why it matters / what's new:** it answers the JURY's (2026-06-07) three sharpest provocations at once вАФ **#1** force a non-GPU renderer the lab avoids (SVG), **#2** build in a genuinely foreign tonal world (just intonation вАФ the jury said D-Dorian is the new C-pentatonic), and **#6** turn the adult analysis-reflex into a kids listening toy. It leads with the **expensive** ambition criterion the jury said has failed ~7вАУ8 dives running: **#5 genuinely-recent research** вАФ the dive this fire surfaced the 2026 microtonal-browser wave (**purified-synth / "Pure Intonation"** computing exact JI ratios in Web Audio, presented at **RubyKaigi 2026**; plus **Scale Workshop** and **Tune.js**) вАФ paired with **#3 named reference** (Harry Partch; Scale Workshop; Tune.js) and **#2 вЙ•3 subsystems** (mic-RMS follower + animated-SVG render loop + JI additive-bell synth with limiter chain + drone). Honest note: just intonation is **not** lab-first by grep (136/272/etc. used JI before), so **#1 is not claimed** вАФ the build stacks #5+#3+#2 instead. **Diversity** (vs jury bans): **mic breath/hum loudness INPUT** (NOT MIDI, NOT touch) ¬Ј **animated-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2/three.js/Canvas2D) ¬Ј **just-intonation additive-bell TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **pure-JI A-overtone VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; siblings `398-kids-rainbow-roll` (tilt вЖТ **pure DOM/CSS** gong courtyard in Balinese **slendro** with detuned-pair *ombak* shimmer вАФ the most literal answer to jury #1) + `399-kids-aurora-step` (camera frame-difference motion вЖТ Canvas2D aurora + **whole-tone** chimes, the floating Debussy sound) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І346. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: whether a child's quiet breath/hum reliably crosses the RMS gate on a real phone mic, and whether stacked pure ratios *perceptibly* read as "beating-free / glassy" vs. just "a nice chord" on phone speakers.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/397-kids-crystal-bloom/README.md`

## Cycle 345 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 spatial-audio approaches to one off-screen concept вАФ "a room you navigate by turning your head, eyes closed"

- **[/dream/394-soundfield-room](/dream/394-soundfield-room)** вАФ Soundfield Room. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 345. **The lab's first true Ambisonic soundfield вАФ six just-intonation drone voices float around you in 3D, and turning your head rotates the *entire field as one coherent space*, not source-by-source.** Tap "Enter Space" + headphones + eyes closed. Each voice is encoded into first-order **Ambisonic B-format** (W/X/Y/Z first-order spherical harmonics, ACN/SN3D) and summed into a shared 4-channel field bus; device-orientation (head tracking) builds a **3√Ч3 SO(3) rotation matrix** (yaw¬Јpitch¬Јroll) that rotates the whole soundfield coherently; it's decoded to binaural through **8 virtual loudspeakers** (6 horizontal + 2 elevated, **max-rE** weights from Zotter & Frank 2019), each a Web-Audio `PannerNode` in **HRTF** mode. This is the genuine technical leap past the lab's *existing* binaural pieces (7-spatial / 29-scene-spatial), which pan each source independently вАФ here the field is a unified rotatable whole, the way JSAmbisonics / Google Omnitone do it, implemented from scratch in plain Web Audio. **Off-screen-first by design:** the screen is just a dim Canvas2D radar of voice positions + your facing arrow; the piece is *for the ears*. Degrades cleanly вАФ no sensor / denied / desktop вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + drag-to-rotate + an **auto-demo** that slowly sweeps the field hands-free ~3s after Start, so a phone reviewer at 06:30 *hears the whole space rotate around them* without touching anything. Tonal world is **just intonation on the A2 overtone series** (110/165/220/275/330/385 Hz, 1/1¬Ј3/2¬Ј2/1¬Ј5/2¬Ј3/1¬Ј7/2), two voices placed at elevation to prove the vertical axis вАФ **not D-Dorian, not C-pentatonic** (both jury-banned). No mic, no API route, no `guard` needed (synthesis + sensor, all client-side; no network/secrets). Zero new deps.

  **Why it matters / what's new:** this is the most direct answer to the JURY's (2026-06-07) provocation **#5** вАФ "the lab keeps *researching* the 2026 ambisonics wave and never building itвА¶ spend a DEEP cycle on the untouched off-screen / spatial-audio / haptic shelf" (only 1 of the prior 15 pieces was off-screen). It is also the cleanest stack of the two **expensive** ambition criteria the jury said are nearly absent: **#5 genuinely-recent research** вАФ the research dive this fire surfaced two ambisonics-*encoding* papers from **June 4, 2026** (~3 days old: SHB-AE, arXiv:2606.04584; Flow-HOA, arXiv:2606.04570), the freshest dated anchors the lab has cited, directly on this prototype's technique вАФ and **#4 multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 of a spatial-audio thread; the two banked siblings are the designated deepenings). Plus **#1 never-used-technique** (grep-verified: Ambisonic B-format / spherical-harmonic soundfield rotation has never appeared in the lab вАФ prior "spatial" pieces are per-source PannerNode panning) + **#3 named reference** (JSAmbisonics/polarch; Google Omnitone; Zotter & Frank 2019). **4вАУ5 of 5.** Three subsystems beyond the synth (SH encoder + SO(3) field rotator + 8-speaker max-rE HRTF decoder). **Diversity** (vs jury bans): **device-orientation/head-tracking INPUT** (NOT MIDI, NOT touch) ¬Ј **binaural-spatial-audio OUTPUT + dim Canvas2D radar** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js) ¬Ј **Ambisonic soundfield-rotation TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **just-intonation A-overtone VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вАФ *an eyes-closed room you turn your head inside* вАФ three spatial-audio attacks); siblings `395-listener-orbit` (rotate the *AudioListener*, not the field вАФ minimal-DSP per-source HRTF) + `396-soundwalk` (locomotion + **Vibration-API haptics** вАФ you *walk through* the field and *feel* each voice; Janet Cardiff audio-walk lineage) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І345 (copies in `/tmp/dream-losers/`). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: whether the coherent-field rotation *perceptually* reads as one rotating space vs. eight moving speakers, the generic Web-Audio HRTF's localisation accuracy (elevation especially), the 20ms `setTargetAtTime` rotation-smoothing feel under fast head turns, the rotation-by-inverse-speaker-direction equivalence vs. a reference ambisonic decoder, and iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission` on real hardware (no audio/sensor/GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/394-soundfield-room/README.md`

## в≠Р (Cycle 344 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 "listening-mirror" toys of "a child sings, the machine joyfully shows what it heard вАФ no targets, no wrong")

- **[/dream/393-kids-vowel-color](/dream/393-kids-vowel-color)** вАФ Vowel Mirror. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 344. The lab's **first formant / vowel-tracking** piece and its **first pure-DOM/CSS color field** as the main visual. A 4-year-old makes a long vowel вАФ **aaah / eee / iii / ooo / uuu** вАФ and a real-time formant detector (2048-pt FFT, F1/F2 peak-pick, Bark-scale classification vs PetersonвАУBarney centroids) paints the **whole screen** a different bold living color per vowel, then **sings the vowel back** through two bandpass filters tuned to the detected formants over a **just-intonation A3** triad. No reading, no targets, no "wrong" вАФ your mouth is a color knob. Renderer is animated CSS gradients on real DOM (zero canvas/WebGL вАФ the deliberate break from the lab's 7/15 raw-WebGL2 rut); graceful attract-mode demo cycles all vowels with no mic. ResearchвЖТbuild from the **AURORA formant-biofeedback model (arXiv:2603.17543, Mar 2026)** вАФ whose lesson "show a friendlier proxy, not the raw formant" becomes *color for a 4yo*. Banked 394-kids-sound-monster (Bouba/Kiki timbreвЖТmorphing-SVG-blob) + 392-kids-voice-mirror (pitchвЖТSVG-ribbon-choir) вАФ IDEAS ¬І344.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/393-kids-vowel-color/README.md`

## в≠Р Cycle 338 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 self-organized-criticality cascade-models of "tap a little, watch the whole world tumble вАФ the avalanche IS the song"

- **[/dream/377-kids-cascade-bloom](/dream/377-kids-cascade-bloom)** вАФ Cascade Bloom. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 338. The lab's **first self-organized-criticality** piece, made for 4-year-olds: a bioluminescent garden of glowing seed-pods running the canonical **Abelian sandpile** (BakвАУTangвАУWiesenfeld 1987). Tap a pod to add light; at 4 grains it **bursts**, flinging one grain to each neighbour вАФ which can burst in turn, so a single tap sometimes triggers a screen-spanning **bloom** that rings out as a D-Dorian cascade. Most taps shimmer; rarely one avalanches вАФ that power-law surprise *is* the toy. Raw WebGL2 (SDF pods + ring bursts), bell synth + drone through a limiter, auto-demo attract mode, every tap maps directly to a cell. ResearchвЖТbuild from arXiv:2507.14947 ("Echoes of the Land", 2025). Banked 378-kids-quake-meadow (OFC 3-D heightfield quakes) + 379-kids-domino-forest (toppling dominoes) вАФ IDEAS ¬І338.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/377-kids-cascade-bloom/README.md`

## в≠Р Cycle 335 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 legibility approaches to "watch your music's tonal center of gravity travel through tonal space"

- **[/dream/370-tonal-map](/dream/370-tonal-map)** вАФ Tonal Map. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 335. The deepening of the Spiral-Array thread, made legible: a comet of tonal gravity (Chew's center-of-effect) glides across labeled circle-of-fifths key territories; a modulation is a literal map crossing, and the comet's halo widens as the **tonal-focus** scalar drops (arXiv:2603.27035). three.js top-down map; internal modulating demo (CвЖТGвЖТDвЖТEmвЖТC) + Web MIDI. Banked 369-tonal-orbit (3-D helix) + 371-tonal-journey (modulation-journey timeline) вАФ IDEAS ¬І335.

## в≠Р Cycle 334 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 play-models of "Color Hunt: point the camera at real colors, each sings"

- **[/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest](/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest)** вАФ Kids Rainbow Quest. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 334.

  Open `/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest`. **For kids (4+).** A friendly unicorn shows a glowing color and *wants* it вАФ go **point the phone camera at something that color in the real world** (something red, then orange, then yellowвА¶). Get close and the creature **glows warmer** (a rising musical shimmer); hold the match ~0.6s and it **celebrates** вАФ a fanfare, a sparkle burst, and that color fills a **rainbow arc** across the top. Collect all seven вЖТ the arc lights up in order and plays a **rainbow song**, then loops with a fresh shuffle. No reading, no timer, no score, no fail вАФ only "found it!" moments, and it gets the child *off the couch and into their room*.

  The lab's **first color-foraging *game*** вАФ the camera sends the child into the physical world to hunt color, rather than tapping the screen (the most direct answer yet to the JURY's "stop staring at the screen"). ColorвЖТpitch is the most legible mapping the kids lane can make (KIDS.md: "color is the language"): each rainbow hue maps to a note in **D-Dorian** (D E F G A B C вАФ **not** C-major-pentatonic), grounded by an always-on D+A perfect-fifth drone so any found note rings consonant. **Camera is analysis-only** вАФ central-region `getImageData` вЖТ averaged RGB вЖТ HSV вЖТ angular hue-distance warmth score; never recorded, never uploaded, no network. Dodges every gate this fire: **camera INPUT** (fresh in the last-10 window; JURY banned touch/mic, diversity audit banned raw-WebGL2 4√Ч; camera dodges all and sits in Karel's loved `101-camera-song`вЭ§пЄП/`86-sound-to-video`вЭ§пЄП cluster), **DOM/CSS OUTPUT** (the lab's cool renderer вАФ not WebGL2, not SVG), color-extraction TECHNIQUE, kids VIBE.

  Subsystems: (1) **color detection** вАФ invisible offscreen canvas samples the central ~40√Ч40 patch each frame, RGBвЖТHSV, hue angular-distance вЖТ warmth (0вАУ1), match requires hue-within-tolerance AND min saturation (rejects whites/greys) AND min brightness, with a 0.6s dwell-lock so it can't accidentally trigger; (2) **audio** (`audio.ts`) вАФ D-Dorian fanfare (rootвЖТfifthвЖТoctave) + warmth shimmer (3 detuned high partials amplitude-mapped to proximity) + 7-note rainbow song + always-on D+A drone, all through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (sleeping-toddler-safe), AudioContext created inside the tap (iOS-safe); (3) **DOM/CSS visuals** вАФ `<video>` background, a `radial-gradient` warmth glow, the rainbow arc as flex `<div>`s, CSS-custom-property sparkle bursts, an emoji creature scaled by warmth; (4) **graceful degrade / auto-demo** вАФ if camera is denied or no frames arrive in ~2s, a `text-rose-300` notice shows and the **identical** matchвЖТfanfareвЖТrainbow pipeline plays itself, completing the whole 7-color quest hands-free and looping (so it's fully alive at the 06:30 phone review with no camera).

  References: **Newton's *Opticks* (1704)** spectrumвЖТscale-degree mapping, **Scriabin's *clavier √† lumi√®res* (1911)**, and the **Reggio Emilia** "hundred languages of children" (Malaguzzi, 1993 вАФ color/sound as pre-literate languages). Born from RESEARCH ¬І334 (camera-as-controller is commodity вАФ Google "Jump to Play", 2026-03-24 вАФ but the lab has no color-foraging game). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-play-model kids fire; siblings `366-kids-color-hunt` (free-forage + the melody you built replays as memory) + `367-kids-color-chord` (the whole room as a morphing 4-note chord) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І334. **Ambition 2/5**: вЙ•3 subsystems (#2) + named references (#3). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: real hue-extraction feel under a phone camera's auto-white-balance/mixed lighting (the saturation/tolerance thresholds may need tuning), iOS AudioContext resume, and the auto-demoвЖТlive-camera handoff (no camera in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest/README.md`

- **[/dream/365-cadence-ladder](/dream/365-cadence-ladder)** вАФ Cadence Ladder. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 333.

  Open `/dream/365-cadence-ladder`. A real-time **tonal/functional harmonic analyst**: press **вЦґ Begin** and a known progression plays while the analyzer names the **KEY** you're in (Krumhansl-Schmuckler key-finding), the **Roman-numeral function** of every chord, and renders harmony's pull-and-resolve as a three.js **tension ladder** вАФ Tonic (rest, bottom) / Subdominant (departure, middle) / Dominant (tension, top). Each chord drops into its functional zone; **cadences flash named resolving arcs** вАФ VвЖТI *authentic* (emerald), IVвЖТI *plagal/"amen"* (violet), VвЖТvi *deceptive* (amber); when the music **modulates** a ripple sweeps and every Roman numeral re-contextualises (the same chord changes function as the key shifts). Connect a **MIDI keyboard** to play your own chords into the identical pipeline.

  The lab's **first key-estimation + functional/cadence analysis** вАФ `229-chord-canvas` names chords but does NO key, NO Roman numerals, NO cadence/function. Proves itself 358-style: an internally-authored progression (C major with authentic/deceptive/plagal cadences вЖТ modulates to G major) is **known ground truth**, so it's watched proving itself on a phone with no hardware. The most faithful answer to the JURY's #1 adult provocation вАФ *feed the legible/instructional lane* (its named wins were 358/353/345) and *starve the JI-drone monoculture*. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 lab-first technique ¬Ј #2 вЙ•3 subsystems ¬Ј #3 Krumhansl & Kessler 1982 / Temperley 2001 / Riemann functional harmony / Aldwell & Schachter cadence tradition ¬Ј #5 RESEARCH ¬І333). Input=internal-demo+MIDI ¬Ј Output=three.js ¬Ј Vibe=instructional. *Two siblings explored this DEEP fire вАФ `364-tonal-orbit` (Chew Spiral Array, 3D tonal space) + `363-key-compass` (circle-of-fifths wheel) вАФ banked in IDEAS ¬І333.* **Build-verified, not browser-verified.** Design notes: `src/app/dream/365-cadence-ladder/README.md`

- **[/dream/360-kids-sand-choir](/dream/360-kids-sand-choir)** вАФ Kids Sand Choir. `demoable`

  Open `/dream/360-kids-sand-choir`. **For kids (4+).** Press the big amber **вЦґ**, then **tilt your phone or iPad** вАФ a spout pours glowing warm sand that piles into dunes, and tipping the tablet swings gravity so the dunes flow left / right / down and reshape. Seven glowing harp strings cross the lower field; **every grain that comes to rest on a string sings a note**, so the *shape of the dune you build is the song*. No reading, no timer, no fail; it sways and plucks itself hands-free if nobody touches it.

  The lab's **first falling-sand granular cellular automaton** (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes вАФ the lab had Lenia `264`, Game-of-Life `25`, reaction-diffusion `9`, particle-life `8`/`16`/`236`, Navier-Stokes fluid `3`/`84`, n-body and physarum `327`, but never the most famous CA of all). It's also the kids lane's most **legible** cross-modal mapping yet вАФ the direct answer to the JURY's standing #1 ("make it legible"): a 4-year-old sees causeвЖТeffect (build sand onto a low string вЖТ low note; cascade across all seven вЖТ a rippling arpeggio), where a glowing abstract cloud teaches nothing. Pulls on Karel's kids tilt/pluck love-cluster: `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП (tilt), `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (Karplus pluck), `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП (build-it-вЖТ-it-sings).

  Four subsystems in one pipeline: (1) **falling-sand granular CA** (`sand.ts`) вАФ a 180√Ч120 grid where each cell is empty or one colored grain; each frame, scanning *against* gravity so a grain advances at most one cell, every grain tries to move in the gravity direction, then the two diagonal-down cells in randomized order (which is what makes sand slump into natural slopes); a top spout drips warm grains and emits a settle event when a grain stops on a string row; (2) **tiltвЖТgravity input** (`page.tsx`) вАФ `deviceorientation` ќ≤/ќ≥ become a smoothed 2D gravity vector quantized to a dominant fall axis + diagonal bias, so tipping the world flows the dunes; (3) **D-Dorian sonification** (`audio.ts`) вАФ seven strings tuned D E F G A B C (lowвЖТhigh by row; **not** C-major-pentatonic), each a pre-rendered **KarplusвАУStrong** pluck pitched by row, stereo-panned by grain x, with an 80 ms per-string refractory so an avalanche never machine-guns; a soft always-on D+A triangle pad + a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (safe-sounds rule); (4) **WebGL2 render** (`gl.ts`) вАФ the CA grid is uploaded to an RGBA8 texture each frame and drawn by hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, warm grains over a deep-indigo field with matte alpha-over glowing goldвЖТviolet strings that flash on pluck (no additive bloom, per the lab's anti-glow house style). Degrades at every step so it's alive at the 06:30 phone review: iOS 13+ `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` is called inside the Start tap (denial вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` note); **pointer-drag** tilts gravity on desktop; and a gentle **auto-sway** runs when no tilt events arrive so the choir plays itself with no hands; no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, audio still runs. `AudioContext` is created inside the Start tap (iOS-safe). No API route, no `guard` needed (Web Audio + WebGL2 are client-side; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets). Zero new deps.

  References: **Max Bittker's *Sandspiel*** + the **Noita / "powder game" falling-sand cellular-automaton tradition**; **Karplus & Strong, "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" (Computer Music Journal, 1983)** for the pluck. Born from RESEARCH ¬І332. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `361-kids-coral-bloom` (shake вЖТ Diffusion-Limited Aggregation coral growth, WittenвАУSander 1981) + `362-kids-tumble-bells` (tilt вЖТ Abelian sandpile / SOC avalanche cascade, BakвАУTangвАУWiesenfeld 1987) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І332 вАФ both grep-verified lab-first CAs. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique (#1) + вЙ•3 subsystems (#2) + named-reference (#3). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: the `deviceorientation`вЖТgravity feel and pluck cadence on a real tilting hand, the iOS permission branch, the 180√Ч120 CA's 60fps budget on a phone GPU, and exact shader output (no sensor / GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/360-kids-sand-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 331 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/358-beat-mirror](/dream/358-beat-mirror)** вАФ Beat Mirror. `demoable`
  **An adult, real-time beat & tempo tracker that makes the machine's *listening* legible вАФ the lab's FIRST beat-tracking / tempo-induction piece (grep-verified: "beat track" only appears as passing mentions, no prior tracker prototype).** It hears a pulse in live audio, tells you the **BPM** (large and unmistakable), shows how sure it is, and locks a clinical visual pulse to the predicted beat вАФ with a scrolling scope where you can SEE the alignment between *what was heard* (onset ticks) and *what the tracker predicts* (beat ticks). Instructional, not a glowing nebula вАФ the direct adult answer to **jury #1 (make it legible)** and to **Karel's stated priority #3 (live-performance fitness)**: a tool a performing pianist would find magic ("it found my tempo"). **It autoplays on one tap with an internal 112 BPM drum loop** (kick/snare/hat, lookahead-scheduled) so the pipeline self-demos against a *known answer* with no mic and no permission prompt вАФ the most self-verifying demo path the lab has shipped; switch the source to **Mic** to clap/play at it and watch it relock (analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded/routed to speakers вАФ no feedback). **DSP (`tracker.ts`)**: per frame, window the `AnalyserNode` time-domain block вЖТ **hand-written radix-2 FFT** вЖТ **spectral-flux onset strength** (half-wave-rectified positive magnitude change vs previous frame) вЖТ rolling 6 s onset envelope resampled to 100 Hz, mean-subtracted/smoothed вЖТ **autocorrelation tempo induction** over the 60вАУ180 BPM lag range (octave-checked, soft perceptual prior near 120) вЖТ **OBTAIN-style cumulative-score beat-phase tracker** that nudges a predicted beat grid toward recent onset peaks; **confidence** = autocorrelation peak prominence. **Audio (`audio.ts`)**: internal kick/snare/hat groove synth (lookahead scheduler) + analysis-only mic path, both terminating in one shared `AnalyserNode`. **Render (`scene.ts`)**: an orthographic **three.js** scene вАФ a pulse (disc + confidence-colored ring) that flashes exactly on each predicted beat + a scrolling scope (onset envelope in violet, detected onsets as white ticks, predicted beats as tall emerald ticks); when the emerald ticks sit on the onset peaks, it's locked. One rAF loop reads PCM вЖТ tracker вЖТ scene; React state updates the slow BPM/confidence readout ~8√Ч/s; full three.js teardown on unmount. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ real-time beat tracking / tempo induction is a lab-first; FFT exists elsewhere but no beat tracker does)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ spectral-flux+autocorrelation+beat-phase DSP ¬Ј dual audio sources internal-synth+mic ¬Ј three.js pulse/scope = 3)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Masataka Goto & Yoichi Muraoka *"A Real-time Beat Tracking System for Audio Signals"* ICMC 1995 ¬Ј *OBTAIN* arXiv:1704.02216)** [+#5 RESEARCH ¬І331, this fire]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **mic + internal-synth-groove INPUT** (NOT touch вАФ the over-represented 4√Ч input; NOT his-recording) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (the freshest renderer, 1√Ч recent вАФ NOT Canvas2D jury-banned, NOT raw-WebGL2 3√Ч, NOT HRTF) ¬Ј **beat-tracking/tempo-induction TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) ¬Ј **clinical/instructional/data-readout VIBE** (NOT kids 5√Ч, NOT cosmic, NOT Anadol-cloud). Typography compliant: `text-6xl` tabular-nums BPM hero, confidence amberвЖТvioletвЖТemerald, вЙ•44px controls, `text-rose-300` mic/WebGL notices, graceful WebGL-absent fallback (audio + tracking keep running). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`357-euclidean-orrery`** (a self-playing polyrhythmic clockwork of five coprime Euclidean/Bjorklund rings phasing over `lcm=5040` pulses, raw-WebGL2, Toussaint 2005 + Reich вАФ **strong next-adult, build-clean, banked**) + **`359-tonnetz-walk`** (a self-touring Euler Tonnetz walked by neo-Riemannian P/L/R voice-leading in just intonation, every chord named, DOM/CSS вАФ **the closest runner-up, the lab's most legible *harmony* piece, banked**) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј WIDE ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: mic analysis-only + Web Audio + three.js; no network, no recording, no upload, no secrets) ¬Ј 6.44 kB (**294 kB First Load вАФ includes the three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH ¬І331. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` вЬУ exit 0, `вЧЛ Static`, only the winner present), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: tempo lock on real *external* audio via the mic path (the internal-groove lock is engineered-reliable, the mic path is best-effort); mic/output **latency** is not measured or compensated, so the absolute phase of the visual pulse vs the room sound on the mic source is approximate; three.js pulse/scope visual fit and iOS AudioContext/getUserMedia unlock on real hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/358-beat-mirror/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 330 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 play-models for one concept)

- **[/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica](/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica)** вАФ Glass Armonica. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ a Benjamin Franklin glass armonica you TUNE with water, then PLAY by swiping across the rims. The lab's FIRST fill-to-tune instrument and first rubbed-glass continuous-armonica voice (grep-clean for glass-harp/armonica/water-glass-tuning across 110 kids + 350+ total).** A row of 8 glasses: **drag a glass UP/DOWN to fill it** вАФ more water = lower pitch вАФ so the water level you SEE *is* the pitch you hear (the most literal cross-modal mapping the lab can make, the direct kids answer to jury #1 "make it legible"). Then **swipe a finger continuously across the rims** and each glass the finger crosses *sings* вАФ a sustained, breathy, overlapping wash (the famous "otherworldly" armonica sustain, NOT a struck bell). Sweep back and forth for chord-like washes; hold one rim to sustain a single note. A **ghost-finger auto-demo** sweeps the pre-tuned glasses back and forth for ~12s so the instrument plays itself at the 06:30 open (the rig is built on mount so it SOUNDS wherever autoplay is permitted; iOS stays silent until the first touch resumes the context вАФ no regression). **Synthesis (`audio.ts`)**: each glass is a continuously-running oscillator bank (fundamental sine + 3rd-harmonic triangle at 7% + 7th-partial shimmer at 1.5%) gated by an **amplitude envelope** (~200ms attack / ~900ms release вАФ the slow swell is the signature rubbed-glass tone), with a slow ~5Hz LFO for the wet-rim wavering; **water level вЖТ frequency** retunes the voice live (`freq = baseHz / (1 + water√Ч0.65)`); 8 glasses pre-tuned to **D-Dorian** (D3вАУD4, NOT C-pentatonic); quiet always-on D-minor pad so it's never silent; master вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so a full sweep never blasts. **Interaction (`page.tsx`)**: Pointer Events + `setPointerCapture` + **bounding-rect hit-testing** (required because pointer-capture suppresses child enter/leave events), vertical-dragвЖТtune vs horizontal-swipeвЖТplay discrimination, an rAF amplitude-envelope tracker that drives **CSS box-shadow/opacity glow** per glass. **Render: DOM/CSS only** вАФ glasses are styled divs, water is a child div whose height animates, the singing glow is CSS box-shadow driven by live amplitude вАФ **NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT SVG, NOT WebGL/WebGPU/three.js** (actively cools the warm raw-WebGL2 renderer). No reading; tap/swipe targets вЙ•44вАУ64px; no timer/score/fail. Graceful: no Web Audio вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ first fill-to-tune instrument + first rubbed-glass armonica voice; HONEST caveat: continuous-excitation synthesis itself is NOT a lab-first вАФ `320-kids-light-loom` did a bowed stick-slip string вАФ so #1 rests on the water-fill-tuning mechanic + the armonica voice + their combination)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ water-fill tuning model + continuous oscillator-bank armonica voices + swipe pointer-capture/hit-test + amplitude-driven CSS glow = 4)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Benjamin Franklin's *glass armonica* 1761 ¬Ј Mozart *Adagio* K.617 ¬Ј folk *glass harp* / Jamey Turner)** [+#5 RESEARCH ¬І330, this fire вАФ saturation audit]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **touch INPUT** (1√Ч clean вАФ drag-to-fill + swipe-across-rims) ¬Ј **DOM/CSS OUTPUT** (the coolest renderer вАФ cools the warm raw-WebGL2 3√Ч; NOT Canvas2D, NOT SVG) ¬Ј **glass-armonica fill-to-tune + rubbed-glass-sustain TECHNIQUE** (grep-fresh) ¬Ј **kids-playful VIBE** (sanctioned). **Deliberately NOT the queued `348-kids-domino-song`/`349-kids-marble-bells`** вАФ both are chain-reaction pieces and `350-kids-bump-along` (chain-reaction) shipped *last* kids cycle, so a second would be the "too similar" the mandate bans (and with `350` shipped they can no longer claim ambition #1). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-play-model kids fire on ONE concept (a tuned water-glass instrument); siblings **`356-kids-pour-organ`** (pour water between vessels вАФ conservation puzzle, "fill one, empty another" вАФ the richest concept; **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build**, simplify the two-vessel pour gesture first) + **`354-kids-water-glasses`** (pure struck glass-harp, tap-to-play; cleanest/simplest; banked) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј DEEP ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: touch + Web Audio + DOM/CSS; no mic, no network, no secrets) ¬Ј 5.56 kB (**112 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH ¬І330. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` вЬУ 34.7s, `вЧЛ Static`, only the winner present), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: the waterвЖТpitch ratio (√Ч1.65 max) is a musical approximation, not calibrated physics; whether the tune-vs-swipe gesture split reads cleanly for a 4yo on a real touch screen (the 10px threshold is adult-tuned); whether 8 overlapping armonica voices sound gorgeous vs muddy on a phone speaker; iOS AudioContext unlock on real hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 329 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/353-collapse-score](/dream/353-collapse-score)** вАФ Collapse Score. `demoable`
  **An adult generative piece that COMPOSES ITSELF in front of you, by Wave Function Collapse вАФ the lab's FIRST WFC piece (grep-verified: 0 prior). An 8√Ч16 lattice (8 voice layers √Ч 16 beat columns) starts with every cell in superposition; the solver collapses the lowest-entropy cell to a weighted-random allowed note, then propagates harmonic adjacency constraints to its neighbours вАФ and you WATCH it happen: dim superposition cells (showing their candidate count) snap to bright note-labelled cells, constrained neighbours flash as the ripple spreads. A playhead sweeps leftвЖТright and SOUNDS each collapsed note, so the score is heard as it is written. Composition as a visible logical process вАФ the exact inverse of the "abstract glowing cloud" the jury asked us to kill.** It auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if the browser blocks autoplay; alive at the 06:30 review, never the same twice вАФ when the grid fills it auto-reseeds and continues, long-form). **WFC solver (`wfc.ts`)**: classic loop вАФ Shannon-entropy cell selection (weighted by tile frequency, tiny PRNG tie-break) вЖТ weighted-random collapse вЖТ BFS arc-consistency propagation, with a contradiction guard that holds the previous mask (graceful recovery, the solve never stalls); seeded **mulberry32** PRNG so any seed deterministically reproduces an exact run (**Replay** a seed; **New Seed** for a fresh piece). **Musical constraints**: 14 tiles = 7 D-Dorian degrees √Ч 2 octaves; **horizontal** (time) adjacency forbids tritone leaps (FвЖФB, the EвЖФC substitution) so motion stays stepwise/consonant; **vertical** (voice-layer) adjacency requires the two tiles share a unison/third/fourth/fifth so stacked rows always voice consonant harmony; weighted toward the root/4th/5th with lower-octave gravity. **Synthesis (`audio.ts`)**: per note a warm **FM pad** (sine carrier + √Ч2.01 modulator, depth fading 90%вЖТ30% over 400 ms, 50 ms attack / 1.5 s release) + a **bell click** (√Ч4 + inharmonic √Ч7.1 partial, fast decay) for the pluck transient; master вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вИТ6 dB, 20:1). **Render**: a **pure DOM/CSS grid** (CSS-transitioned cell opacity/colour, ref-mutated вАФ **no per-cell React setState**, dodging the perf trap; **NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT SVG (warm 4√Ч), NOT WebGL/WebGPU/three.js**), which is both the cleanest renderer and reads as a legible board. Controls (вЙ•44px): Begin, Pause/Resume, New Seed, Replay-by-seed, Slow/Normal/Fast solve speed. `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ the lab's FIRST Wave Function Collapse / constraint-propagation composition; grep-clean across all 350+ prototypes)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ WFC solver + harmonic adjacency constraint model + FM/bell synth + DOM/CSS legible lattice = 4)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Maxim Gumin *Wave Function Collapse* 2016 ¬Ј Paul Merrell *Model Synthesis* 2007 ¬Ј Brian Eno generative lineage)** [+#5 RESEARCH ¬І329, this fire вАФ field-direction]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **seed/none INPUT** (**NOT his-recording** вАФ the jury-banned adult input) ¬Ј **DOM/CSS lattice OUTPUT** (the COOLEST renderer, 1√Ч recent вАФ actively cools the warm SVG 4√Ч / raw-WebGL2 3√Ч; **NOT Canvas2D, NOT SVG, NOT WebGPU**) ¬Ј **WFC/constraint-propagation TECHNIQUE** (fresh) ¬Ј **systems/legible VIBE** (**NOT cosmic, NOT Anadol-cloud, NOT kids**). The most faithful adult answer to **jury provocation #1** (make it LEGIBLE вАФ you can watch a cell *decide* and understand why neighbours light up) and to **Karel's #2 value, SURPRISE** ("music composes itself by visible logic" is a genuine "I didn't know we could do that"). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`351-erosion`** (a Basinski-style tape that physically WEARS OUT more each morning until it's gone вАФ lab-FIRST generative-degradation, pure DOM/CSS, **now triple-banked + build-clean вЖТ escalated to Karel**) + **`352-breath-tide`** (a near-non-screen drone you play with your BREATH, entraining toward 0.1 Hz resonance breathing вАФ the strong jury-#2 SECOND-non-screen answer; banked for next adult) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј WIDE ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: seed + Web Audio + DOM/CSS; no mic, no network, no secrets) ¬Ј 5.56 kB (**108 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH ¬І329. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` вЬУ 19.5 s, `вЧЛ Static`, only the winner present), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: audio tuning (FM depth, bell balance, limiter feel) and iOS Safari AudioContext unlock on real hardware; whether an 8√Ч16 grid of note-names reads as legible-but-not-busy in the hand; whether the WFC output sounds purposeful vs. meandering over a long listen (the contradiction guard is a mask-hold, not true backtracking вАФ a next-cycle deepening).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/353-collapse-score/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 328 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 physics/interaction approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/350-kids-bump-along](/dream/350-kids-bump-along)** вАФ Bump Along. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's FIRST chain-reaction music machine for kids (110+ kids prototypes, zero chain-reaction pieces before this вАФ grep-verified): a row of seven sleepy, breathing creatures, each a bold color + a pentatonic note. Tap one and a visible "bump" travels down the line вАФ each creature wakes, squashes-and-stretches, and SINGS as the wave reaches it вАФ then the wave reflects off the far end and rolls back for a return melody. One little push вЖТ a whole melodic wave you can watch travel, bounce, and return.** It is alive on load: an auto-demo fires a bump from the left every ~5.5s while idle, and the creatures breathe perpetually, so it's playing with zero interaction at the 06:30 review (AudioContext is created on the first tap вАФ visuals run silently until then, iOS-safe). **Impulse-propagation engine (`page.tsx`)**: a `Wave` object holds a floating-point position in *creature-index units* + a direction; each rAF frame it advances at `WAVE_SPEED` (2.6 creatures/s) and, when it crosses a creature it hasn't triggered, fires that creature's bounce + note; at each end it **reflects** with `BOUNCE_DECAY` (0.88) energy loss until it falls below threshold and vanishes (Newton's-cradle there-and-back). Tapping a creature in the *middle* spawns **two** waves (both directions); tapping both ends makes two waves **meet in the middle**. **Drag to reorder** creatures swaps their array positions live, so the wave plays whatever order the child arranges вАФ composition by rearrangement. **Pitch mapping**: 7 creatures вЖТ C3 E3 G3 A3 C4 E4 G4 (C-major pentatonic, two octaves), left = lowest/biggest вЖТ right = highest/smallest (BANDIMAL). **Synthesis (`audio.ts`)**: each note = additive sine (fundamental + octave + 3rd harmonic) + a 4√Ч triangle "knock" for marimba warmth, fast attack / 0.9вАУ1.4s decay; always-on C3+E3+G3 drone (~0.018 gain, slow fade-in); master gain вЖТ `BiquadFilter` lowpass 9kHz вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` (вИТ6dB, 20:1) so it can never blast (safe sounds, KIDS.md #7). **Render**: SVG inline JSX only (creatures as circles with faces, eyes that wake, cheek blush, squash-stretch, music-note sparkle) вАФ **NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT WebGL/WebGPU/three.js**. No reading; color is the language; tap targets are full creatures (вЙЂ64px). Graceful: `buildRig()` in try/catch + `resume()` catch вЖТ if Web Audio is unavailable, the rAF loop + auto-demo + all animations still run. Clean teardown (rAF cancel, audio teardown, listeners removed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ the lab's FIRST chain-reaction / Rube-Goldberg / cause-and-effect-cascade piece, and first impulse-propagation/Newton's-cradle physics; grep-verified 0 across all kids READMEs)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ impulse-propagation wave engine + reflection state + additive marimba synthesis + drone/limiter + SVG character render + drag-reorder = 6)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Newton's cradle ¬Ј "pass it down the line" physical toy ¬Ј Rube Goldberg ¬Ј BANDIMAL pitch-size convention)** [+#5 RESEARCH ¬І328, this fire]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **touch INPUT** (cooled to ~1√Ч in the last 10 вАФ recent kids were device-orientation/multi-user; fresh again) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (**NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT raw-WebGL2 (warm 3√Ч), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt)** вАФ honest soft-flag: SVG is now warm, this fire takes it to 4√Ч in the last 10, so the next kids/adult renderer should cool to DOM/CSS or audio-only) ¬Ј **collision/impulse-cascade TECHNIQUE** (fresh) ¬Ј **kids-playful-construction VIBE** (sanctioned on the kids rotation). The most **legible** of the slate (jury's #1 live priority brought to kids: one tap вЖТ an ordered, visible, repeatable melodic wave; rearrange вЖТ recompose) and the lowest-skill-floor (tap a big creature вАФ no setup, no precision). **Deliberately NOT the queued `348-kids-song-catcher`** (cycle-326 bank) вАФ that repeats `346-kids-sound-hunt`'s device-orientation+HRTF+DOM/CSS recipe shipped *last* kids cycle, which would be the "too similar in design and theme" the mandate exists to stop. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on ONE concept (the lab's first chain-reaction music machine, explored via competing physics models); siblings **`348-kids-domino-song`** (drag a domino trail, tap to topple a melody вАФ highest charm + cleanest render; **banked as the strong next-kids build**, fix the precise tap-to-tip trigger first) + **`349-kids-marble-bells`** (drop a marble through bells you place, each collision a chime вАФ strongest love-pull via `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП + Plinko wow; banked, refactor the per-frame setState first) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј DEEP ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: touch + Web Audio + SVG; no mic, no network, no secrets) ¬Ј 5.26 kB (**111 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + SVG, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH ¬І328. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вЬУ 29.7 s, `вЧЛ Static`), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: live audio playback + the SVG animation feel on a real iPad; whether **drag-to-reorder** feels snappy on iOS Safari (pointer capture on SVG `<g>` can be finicky вАФ the tap-to-bump core works regardless); whether a real 4-year-old reads the traveling wave as "I did that" (the auto-demo + one-tap payoff are the in-sandbox proxy). Minor polish nit for next cycle: two meta-labels use `text-white/45` (just under the /55 hint floor).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/350-kids-bump-along/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 327 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/347-the-place](/dream/347-the-place)** вАФ The Place Where You Go to Listen. `demoable`
  **A long-form adult drone scored by your REAL local sky вАФ the actual clock hour, the sun's position, the moon's phase, the season вАФ so the piece is genuinely different at 3am than at noon and slowly evolves as real time passes. Nothing repeats on a timer: the score IS the sky.** It auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if the browser blocks autoplay; alive at the 06:30 review with zero further interaction). It reads your device clock and вАФ optionally, with a 3 s timeout вАФ your geolocation, then computes **locally, with no network** where the sun and moon actually are (`astronomy.ts`: a NOAA-style solar-altitude/azimuth approximation + a synodic-month moon phase/illumination + season from day-of-year). The mapping (`audioEngine.ts`, just-intonation over a low root, master вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`): **solar altitude** вЖТ register + brightness (deep night = a low warm cellar drone; civil twilight near the horizon = a slow blooming mid cluster; midday = bright high JI partials on top); **solar azimuth** вЖТ slow stereo-pan drift of the lead voice across the day (sun eastвЖТleft, westвЖТright; the moon shimmer pans gently opposite); **moon illumination** вЖТ a high shimmering harmonic voice that waxes with the lit fraction (full moon present, new moon silent); **season** вЖТ the JI scale color morphs (winter leans darker/minor + a lower root, summer brighter/major). Visual (`skyRenderer.ts`, **raw WebGL2** вАФ hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, full-screen triangle, NOT three.js / NOT Canvas2D / NOT SVG): a horizon band + sun-disc glow tracking altitude & azimuth, a phase-shaded moon disc, and a star density that rises as the sun sets. Legible monospace readouts: local time, sun altitude (¬∞), sun azimuth (¬∞), moon (% lit), season, place. **The verifiability move that won curation: a two-axis TIME SCRUBBER** (hour-of-day + day-of-year sliders) that lets a reviewer hear the whole dawnвЖТnoonвЖТduskвЖТnight arc and the winterвЖФsummer color shift **in a few seconds** without waiting; untouched, the piece tracks real wall-clock time, and **return to now** releases it back to live. Graceful: no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + the music keeps playing and tracking the sky; geolocation denied/slow вЖТ a fixed high-latitude fallback (61.2, вИТ149.9, a nod to Fairbanks) used silently; autoplay blocked вЖТ one **Begin** tap. Full teardown (rAF cancel, GL dispose, audio nodes closed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ local-astronomy engine + JI drone/choir synth + long-form evolving state + raw-WebGL2 sky = 4)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen*, his Fairbanks installation that sonifies the local sun/moon/aurora/seismic in real time; + Brian Eno's generative-ambient lineage)** + **multi-cycle/long-form(#4 вАФ genuinely different across the day and across the year, an evolving state machine, not a loop)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **clock+place (no-network) INPUT** (fresh; **NOT his-recording** вАФ the jury-banned adult input) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 sky OUTPUT** (**NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT SVG (audit-banned вЙ•5√Ч), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt)** вАФ raw-WebGL2 is warm at 2√Ч and cleared the floor; soft-flag that the next adult renderer should cool it) ¬Ј **local-astronomy sonification + long-form state TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј **place-based contemplative VIBE** (the jury's #1 ask вАФ about *something real*, LEGIBLE via the readouts, NOT another "his-piano вЖТ abstract luminous Anadol cloud he watches"). The most faithful adult answer to **jury provocation #1** (kill the forming his-pianoвЖТnebula rut; if you sonify, make it legible and about something) and a clean re-entry on the long-form/state axis the jury celebrated (`308`/`314`/`322`/`325`). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`348-erosion`** (a Basinski-style tape that physically WEARS OUT as you listen + decays even while you're away вАФ a grep-verified lab-FIRST generative-degradation piece, pure DOM/CSS, the strongest BANK; flagged for the next adult/conceptual cycle) + **`349-strange-attractor`** (Lorenz/R√ґssler/Chua as composer, scale-snapped + edge-of-chaos + a Lyapunov regime label вАФ but honestly a deepening of the 9-yr-old `10-strange`, NOT a lab-first) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј WIDE ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: device clock + optional geolocation + Web Audio + raw WebGL2; no mic, no network fetch, no secrets) ¬Ј 7.43 kB (114 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + raw WebGL2, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І327. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вЬУ 22.1 s, `вЧЛ Static`), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: live audio playback + the WebGL render + the geolocation-timeout branch (headless sandbox, no GPU/audio); the solar/lunar math is an intentional contemplative approximation, not an ephemeris; whether the dayвЖТnight musical arc reads as expressive vs. monotonous over a real multi-hour listen (the scrubber is the in-sandbox proxy).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/347-the-place/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 326 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 interaction-model approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt](/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt)** вАФ Sound Hunt. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-FIRST piece in 300+ prototypes: put on headphones, and TURN your phone or your body to *find* six singing animals hidden in the space around you, then collect them into a song. You play music with your EARS, not your eyes вАФ the screen is just a dim compass.** Tap **вЦЄ Listen for the animals** (creates/resumes the `AudioContext` and, on iOS 13+, requests `DeviceOrientationEvent` permission вАФ both inside the same gesture, iOS-safe). Six animals вАФ рЯ¶Й owl, рЯРЄ frog, рЯР¶ bird, рЯРЛ whale, рЯ¶Ч cricket, вЬ® firefly вАФ are placed at fixed azimuths/elevations all around you, each humming its own note in **D-Dorian** with its own synthesized timbre (owl = sine + slow tremolo; frog = triangle rhythmic AM; bird = warble; whale = slow-FM moan; cricket = fast square tremolo; firefly = pulse), over a quiet always-on **D2+A2** drone. **Turn** to sweep the spatial field past your ears вАФ the animal you FACE gets louder and the compass glows brighter; **hold facing it ~1.2 s** (or **tap the glowing center dot**) and it **swoops in** with a chime, a sparkle, and a soft haptic. Collect all six вЖТ a short D-Dorian melody plays from their voices, then they bloom together as a chord. No score, no timer, no fail, no reading. **HRTF spatial engine (`audio.ts`)**: each animal is its own `PannerNode { panningModel:"HRTF" }`; the listener's heading rotates the `AudioListener` forward vector each frame (`forwardX/Z` AudioParam with legacy `setOrientation` fallback); master вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (вИТ6 dB, 20:1) so it can never blast. **Heading/collect state machine (`hunt.ts`)**: per-animal facing cone (¬±24¬∞ half-width вЖТ 0вАУ1 strength), dwell accumulator (1.2 s вЖТ collect), fly-in animation (3.5 m вЖТ 0.3 m over 600 ms). **Dim compass (`page.tsx`, DOM/CSS only вАФ NO Canvas2D, NO SVG, NO three.js)**: a `border-radius:50%` ring, animal dots positioned by azimuth, a rotating heading needle, and a conic-gradient dwell arc вАФ the visual is intentionally secondary. **Graceful for the 06:30 phone review with NO sensor and NO headphones**: no `deviceorientation`/desktop вЖТ **pointer-drag** turns the heading **and** a gentle **auto-demo** sweeps one full rotation per 24 s, auto-catching each animal through the IDENTICAL `applyHeading вЖТ computeFacing вЖТ collectAnimal` audio path (the whole findвЖТcollectвЖТcelebrate loop plays itself); iOS denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + drag/auto-demo continue; no headphones вЖТ HRTF degrades to a softer stereo image (still spatially distinguishable); no Web Audio вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice. Full teardown (rAF cancel, audio nodes disconnect, `ctx.close()`, listeners removed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first KIDS piece; the only prior non-screen piece in 300+ is the ADULT `308-orbit-choir`, and every one of the lab's 108 kids prototypes is full-screen-viz-primary вАФ grep-verified)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ device-orientation listener + 6-voice HRTF spatial bank w/ per-animal synthesis + drone + brick-wall limiter + DOM/CSS compass + dwell/collect state machine + auto-demo = 6+)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Janet Cardiff *audio walks* ¬Ј *Papa Sangre* / *Audio Defence* eyes-free audio games ¬Ј Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ¬Ј this lab's `308-orbit-choir` HRTF lineage)** [+#5 RESEARCH ¬І326, this fire]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **device-orientation INPUT** (0√Ч in the last 10 вАФ the freshest modality; not touch, not voice, not his-recording) ¬Ј **HRTF-spatial-audio + dim-DOM/CSS-compass OUTPUT** (**NOT SVG вАФ the renderer the audit bans at вЙ•5√Ч вАФ NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT three.js (warm), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt)**) ¬Ј **HRTF-spatial-listening TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј listening-adventure VIBE (fresh; NOT another consonance-duet вАФ `341` already shipped that, a 4th would be the monoculture the mandate exists to stop) ¬Ј **D-Dorian**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #2** ("build the SECOND non-screen piece вАФ `308` found the freshest axis the lab owns and *nothing followed it*"), brought to the kids lane for the first time, and it varies the kids trick OFF persistence and OFF the consonance-duet rut. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on ONE concept (the lab's first non-screen / audio-first kids listening adventure, explored via competing interaction models); siblings **`348-kids-song-catcher`** (turn toward each hidden note to catch a *known* D-Dorian melody in order, assembling a visible ribbon вАФ the most jury-#1-legible model; **banked as the strong next-kids build**) + **`347-kids-echo-cave`** (call into the dark and creatures echo back from fixed 3-D addresses, building a spatial round; banked but flagged вАФ the echo lane is jury-saturated and its own README concedes the differentiation is "real but subtle") build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј DEEP ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: device-orientation + Web Audio + DOM/CSS; no mic, no network, no secrets) ¬Ј 6.01 kB (**109 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH ¬І326. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вЬУ 26.1 s), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: real HRTF localization quality (generic KEMAR head model; front/back confusion is common without head movement, and a 4-year-old's small ears differ) вАФ though the dim compass glow + the tap-the-center shortcut mean the loop completes *visually* even when HRTF perception is weak; real `deviceorientation` feel + the iOS permission branch on a physical phone; whether a real 4-year-old will "turn to find" something invisible; haptics no-op on iOS.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 325 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/345-speech-melody](/dream/345-speech-melody)** вАФ Speech Melody. `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST natural-language вЖТ music piece: type a line вАФ a poem, a memory вАФ and Resonance compiles its SPEECH into a Jan√°ƒНek-style "speech melody," then lights up your words one at a time as they sing, so you RECOGNIZE your own words being sung.** It auto-plays a gentle Welcome-Home line on load (alive at the 06:30 review with zero typing); type or paste your own into the box, or tap an example, and press **Play**. The mapping (`text-music.ts`, deterministic вАФ same text вЖТ same melody): each word is split into syllable-ish units by **vowel cluster**; each vowel class carries a **height** on a front/high вЖТ back/low axis (EE/IH high & bright, OO/UH low & dark) that indexes a two-octave **D-Dorian** ladder, so vowel colour becomes pitch height (with a gentle downward drift across the phrase вАФ Jan√°ƒНek observed spoken lines tend to fall); **consonant clusters** become percussion (plosive `p t k`вЖТbright click, voiced-stop `b d g`вЖТthud, sibilant/fricativeвЖТhiss, liquid/nasalвЖТsoft ring); **prosody** (word-initial syllables, capitalized words, the opening word) drives accent/duration; **punctuation** inserts rests + phrase breaks. Audio (`audio.ts`): a warm voice (sine + slightly-detuned triangle through a brightness-tracking lowpass + click-free ADSR) for vowels + filtered-noise bursts for consonants, over an always-on soft **D2 + A2** drone (breathing filter LFO), shared feedback delay + procedural-impulse reverb, master вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`. Visuals (`page.tsx`, **raw WebGL2** вАФ hand-written GLSL ES 3.00): ~480 additive glow points draw the **pitch-contour ribbon** in a violetвЖТamber palette keyed to brightness, with a moving **playhead** that brightens the contour as it passes; over the GL canvas a DOM word layer shows the words large (`text-xl`/`text-2xl`) and each word **lights amber + lifts** the instant it sounds вАФ the legibility that won curation (you watch your words being sung even with the sound off). Legible readout: mode/key, the word now sounding, playback %. Graceful: no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + audio and word-highlights still play; iOS-safe (`AudioContext` created inside the first gesture; auto-play falls back to "tap Play to begin"). Full teardown (rAF cancel, GL program/VAO/buffer delete, ctx close). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ the lab's FIRST natural-languageвЖТmusic piece; grep-verified distinct from `22-code-score`, which is a note-DSL where you literally write pitch names, NOT language sonification)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ graphemeвЖТphoneme-ish parser/prosody mapper + vowel-voice + consonant-percussion + drone/delay/reverb engine + raw-WebGL2 contour renderer + synced DOM word-highlight layer)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Leo≈° Jan√°ƒНek *n√°pƒЫvky mluvy* ("speech melodies") ¬Ј Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* ¬Ј Fluxus text/event scores ¬Ј Jaap Blonk sound poetry)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **keyboard-text INPUT** (0√Ч in the lab's entire history вАФ the freshest possible modality, and verifiable on a phone by typing) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (clean 1√Ч; **NOT SVG вАФ the renderer the audit bans at вЙ•5√Ч вАФ NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt), NOT three.js (warm 321+337)**) ¬Ј **natural-languageвЖТspeech-melody cross-modal TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј literary/Fluxus VIBE (fresh; NOT Anadol-cloud, NOT his-recording, NOT voiceвЖТHRTFвЖТsacred) ¬Ј **D-Dorian**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #1** ("make his music *legible* вАФ let him recognize what he played, not another nebula"): 345 literally shows him his words being sung вАФ the inverse of a glowing cloud he watches. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`343-live-accompanist`** (listen to a live acoustic instrument and a generative band locks to your tempo + key and comps under your phrases вАФ the BOLDEST swing + Karel's "jazz-responsive" wishlist + the вЙИ0√Ч score-following axis; **lost a THIRD time on verifiability** вАФ its headline needs a live instrument no sandbox can provide, so it's now flagged for a *dedicated real-instrument verification cycle*, not another fan-out slot) + **`344-slow-machine`** (a deterministic seeded 6-section long-form machine, "different at minute 5," Ikeda-minimal; reliable + fully verifiable, three.js, banked) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј WIDE ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client-only: keyboard text вЖТ deterministic compile вЖТ Web Audio + raw WebGL2; no mic, no network) ¬Ј 6.4 kB (113 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + raw WebGL2, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І325. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вЬУ), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: whether a listener *recognizes* a specific sentence by ear (English spelling isn't phonetic вАФ the syllable heuristic is approximate; the visual word-highlight carries legibility regardless); the wall-clock-rAF playhead may lead/lag sample-accurate audio under load; the glow-contour look on a real GPU; very long pastes may feel washy (fixed reverb/delay).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/345-speech-melody/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 324 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 interaction-model approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/341-kids-star-pair](/dream/341-kids-star-pair)** вАФ Star Pair. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide (or hum) it up and down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light.** Tap **Play together вЦЄ** (creates/resumes the `AudioContext` + asks for the mic inside the gesture, iOS-safe; mic is analysis-only вАФ never recorded, stored, or transmitted). Your **violet star** sits on the left arc, your friend's **cyan star** on the right. **Drag** your star up/down (the reliable, 4yo-primary control) вАФ or **hum**, and the mic moves your star to your pitch (it yields to drag, so drag always wins). The two stars define a musical **interval**; out of tune you **hear real acoustic beating** (the two voices physically interfere вАФ we don't fake it) and **see** the stars jitter at the beat rate with only a faint dotted reach-line between them. Land within **¬±35¬Ґ** of a pure just-intonation ratio (`1:1, 6:5, 5:4, 4:3, 3:2, 5:3, 2:1`, folded into one octave over a **D2 вЙИ 73.42 Hz** drone, voices riding вЙИ D4вЖТ624 Hz) and the stars **LOCK**: a bright flowing **beam of light** links them, the jitter stops, the stars pulse together, a soft chime + shimmer plays, and ~60 **sparkles вЬ® burst** along the beam вАФ one discrete, wordless, *silently-legible* "the two stars connected!" event (the heart of the toy, and the reason it won curation: the lock reads even with the sound off). **Fully demoable SOLO on one phone** (the 06:30 review case): if no second tab answers within ~3s, a gentle **robot рЯ§Ц** drives the friend-star, drifting slowly and **pausing near consonances** so a lone child (or Karel) can chase and catch the beam вАФ and because **drag is the primary control, the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no mic at all**. Badge flips violet **friend рЯСЂ** the instant a real second tab is heard vs amber **robot рЯ§Ц** when solo; mic denied вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + drag still fully plays; no WebGL2 вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + audio and the tuning loop keep running. Always-on warm **D** drone so it's never silent; master through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (safe for small ears). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): (1) **`sync.ts`** вАФ `BroadcastChannel("resonance-star-pair-341")` ~3 Hz pitch + presence (319-hub-score lineage); (2) **`audio.ts`** вАФ D drone + two warm voices (sine + detuned triangle, lowpass) + lock chime/shimmer through the brick-wall limiter; (3) **`tuning.ts`** вАФ pitchвЖФarc-position mapping + JI consonance scoring (nearest ratio, cents, beat Hz, lock); (4) **`pitch.ts`** вАФ analysis-only autocorrelation mic (`AnalyserNode` only, tracks stopped on teardown); (5) **`scene.ts`** вАФ **raw WebGL2** renderer (two hand-written GLSL ES 3.00 programs: bg gradient/starfield/arc-tracks quad + additive glow-quads streamed into one dynamic VBO for the stars, beam, and sparkles). `page.tsx` runs ONE refs-driven rAF loop (the React tree never re-renders per frame); full teardown (rAF cancel, `bye` broadcast + channel close, mic stop, scene + audio dispose). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play; grep-verified distinct from the SOLO `272-kids-tune-purr` (one child, fixed drone) and the TURN-TAKING `334-kids-pass-the-song`)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ five)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Hermann von Helmholtz *On the Sensations of Tone* (consonance = absence of beating) ¬Ј this lab's `319-hub-score` BroadcastChannel lineage ¬Ј Reggio Emilia group-synchrony / joint-attention ¬Ј honest contrast w/ solo `272`)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **multi-user + drag/voice INPUT** (multi-user 1√Ч in the last 10, jury-wanted) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (**NOT SVG вАФ the renderer the audit bans at вЙ•5√Ч вАФ NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT three.js (warming 321+337), NOT WebGPU**) ¬Ј **real-time consonance/beating TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј collaborative-kids VIBE ¬Ј **D just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. Deepens **jury provocation #3** (multi-user for kids вАФ varies the trick off `334`'s turn-taking and off the localStorage-persistence default the jury flagged). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on ONE concept (real-time two-child consonance duet, explored via competing interaction models); siblings **`342-kids-whale-song`** (each child HUMS to bend their own whale's call until the two whales lock + swim together вАФ the boldest/warmest swing, voice-forward, oceanic; **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build with a real-device hum pass** вАФ it lost only on the unauditioned hum-primary headline) + **`340-kids-duet-bridge`** (the literal seeded shared-rope, balanced hum+drag, gold catenary lock; banked вАФ its continuous lock reads less discretely than the beam) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј DEEP ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (client BroadcastChannel + Web Audio + analysis-only mic + WebGL2) ¬Ј 7.21 kB (113 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + raw WebGL2, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І324. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вЬУ), not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: real two-tab co-play + the peer/robot badge flip on a second running tab; whether the autocorrelation tracker handles a real 4-year-old's hum; the exact look of the stars/beam/sparkles on a GPU; and the perceptual read of the lock for a non-reader. Honest limit: `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin/same-browser вАФ true two-*device*-over-network play would need WebRTC/WebSocket (out of scope); the "two screens" promise is demoed as two tabs/windows.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/341-kids-star-pair/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 323 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/337-seismic-globe](/dream/337-seismic-globe)** вАФ Seismic Globe. `demoable`
  **Hear the LIVING PLANET: every earthquake recorded on Earth in the last day becomes a sustained voice placed in 3-D space around you, while the quakes pulse on a slowly rotating three.js globe вАФ so the ever-shifting chord you hear IS Earth's current seismic state.** The on-screen globe loads + auto-rotates immediately with sample or live quakes (visual alive hands-free); tap **вЦґ Listen to the planet** (creates/resumes the `AudioContext` inside the gesture, iOS-safe) and the spatial choir fades in. Each sounding quake owns ONE sustained voice through its **own `PannerNode { panningModel:"HRTF" }`**: **azimuth вЖР longitude, elevation вЖР latitude, distance/loudness вЖР magnitude**, pitch snapped to a **just-intonation** degree over **C2** (ratios `1, 9/8, 6/5, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2`; bigger quakes drop a register), and **depth вЖТ lowpass cutoff** вАФ so what you SEE and what you HEAR share one geometry (depth drives both the point's hue *and* the voice's darkness; magnitude drives both the point's size *and* the pitch register/loudness). Live data comes from the public, CORS-open **USGS GeoJSON** feed (`{2.5_day|all_day|all_hour}`, no API key), re-polled every 60 s вАФ new quakes fade in, aged-out ones fade away вАФ with a one-tap feed switcher (larger feed = denser chord). An always-on quiet C1+C2 root drone keeps it from ever being silent; master вЙ§ 0.42 вЖТ procedural convolver reverb вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` so a dense seismic moment never clips. **Graceful for the 06:30 phone review:** any fetch failure or empty window loads **8 globe-spanning sample quakes** so the piece always surrounds you, with an honest provenance badge (emerald **вЧП live USGS feed ¬Ј N quakes** vs amber **вЧП sample quakes**); no WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + the audio still plays; no HRTF вЖТ `StereoPanner` fallback; a "loudest voices right now" list names the places currently sounding. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`quakes.ts`** вАФ USGS fetch/normalize + sample fallback + `topByMagnitude` cap (24); (2) **`globe.ts`** вАФ raw three.js (v0.182) dark wireframe Earth + occluding shell + graticule + halo, per-quake glowing points (sizeвЖРmag, hueвЖРdepth), per-frame pulse, full dispose; (3) **`audio.ts`** вАФ the HRTF spatial JI engine + drone + reverb + compressor + StereoPanner fallback; (4) **`page.tsx`** вАФ ONE rAF loop mutating refs (the React tree never re-renders per frame), full teardown (rAF cancel, three.js dispose, audio stop + ctx close, poll clear, fetch abort). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*; Dombois & Eckel "Audification" in *The Sonification Handbook*; the 2026 Data Sonification Award / DATASONICA live-data-as-evolving-texture wave)** + **recent-research(#5 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І323, this fire)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **external-API INPUT** (0√Ч in the last 10 вАФ the freshest modality; not touch, not his-recording, not voice) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (clean ~1вАУ2√Ч; **NOT SVG вАФ the renderer the audit bans at вЙ•5√Ч вАФ NOT Canvas2D, NOT a 3rd unrun WGSL**) ¬Ј **real-world-data-sonification TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј planetary/systems VIBE ¬Ј **C2 just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #3** (real-world-data вАФ the thinnest adult shelf, which the jury praised `314-solar-wind` for filling and asked for MORE) вАФ shipped as a real **3-D globe**, "massively bigger" than the banked SVG `328-seismic-choir` it supersedes, *and dodging the SVG ban that would have compromised 328*; it also pays the most respect to **verification debt (#5)** вАФ no new unrun compute, and the sample fallback guarantees a live review regardless of network. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`338-live-accompanist`** (listen to a live acoustic instrument and a generative band locks to your tempo + key and comps under your phrases вАФ the BOLDEST swing + Karel's "jazz-responsive" wishlist; **re-flagged as the strong next-adult build, paired with a real-instrument verification pass** вАФ it lost only on the unauditioned live-tracking headline) + **`339-slow-machine`** (a deterministic seeded 6-section long-form generative machine, Ikeda-minimal; reliable + fully verifiable, banked) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј WIDE ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (read-only USGS GET) ¬Ј 5.32 kB (**293 kB First Load вАФ three.js bundled, the deliberate cost of dodging the SVG ban with a real 3-D globe**). Born from RESEARCH ¬І323. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: live USGS reachability from the review device (sample fallback + honest badge cover a no); HRTF azimuth/elevation vividness (headphone- and listener-dependent); exact loudness during a dense `all_hour` swarm (24-voice cap + brick-wall compressor mitigate).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/337-seismic-globe/README.md`
