## Previously newest (Cycle 322 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 interaction-model approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/334-kids-pass-the-song](/dream/334-kids-pass-the-song)** вАФ Pass the Song. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's FIRST multi-user / turn-taking piece (jury provocation #3): two children on two tablets (or two browser tabs) in one room PASS a glowing creature back and forth and TAKE TURNS adding notes to build ONE shared song together.** Tap **вЦґ Start** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + mic inside the gesture, iOS-safe; mic is analysis-only вАФ never recorded, stored, or transmitted). When the creature is on **your** screen ("your turn!"), you give it a note вАФ **hum/sing** (a live autocorrelation pitch detector snaps your voice to the **D-major** scale once it holds ~7 frames) or **tap** one of the big вЙ•64px glowing color-spots вАФ then tap the big **вЬ® send to friend** button and the creature **flies off the screen edge** toward your friend over a `BroadcastChannel`. On the friend's tab it **arrives flying in from the opposite edge**, it's now their turn, and the growing **song-ribbon** (one colored bead per turn) shows **identically on both screens**; every few turns the whole ribbon **replays** as a little song the two kids built. **Fully demoable SOLO on one phone** (the 06:30 review case): if no second tab answers within ~4s, a cute **robot friend** takes the other side вАФ receives the creature, adds a tasteful in-scale note after a "thinking" beat, and sends it back вАФ so one person sees the entire pass-back-and-forth loop. A badge reads violet **"Playing with a friend рЯСЂ"** when a real second tab is present (presence handshake + rev-counter reconcile) vs amber **"Playing with the robot friend рЯ§Ц"** in solo/demo mode; mic denied вЖТ a readable `text-rose-300` notice + the tap fallback still plays. Always-on soft **D drone** so it's never silent; gentle bell voices through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (safe for small ears); the SVG creature is animated by mutating refs in **one rAF loop** (the React tree is never re-rendered per frame); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, `bye` broadcast, channel close, mic stop, AudioContext dispose). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) the **BroadcastChannel presence/turn-pass sync** (`sync.ts` вАФ `resonance-pass-the-song-334`); (2) the **synthesized Web-Audio engine** (`audio.ts` вАФ D drone, bell voices, `setTargetAtTime` glides, brick-wall limiter, whoosh, analysis-only autocorrelation pitch detector); (3) the **turn-relay state machine + rev-reconcile + robot-friend fallback + ribbon playback** (`page.tsx`, refs-based rAF); (4) the **inline-SVG creature/ribbon renderer**. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ the lab's FIRST multi-user / turn-taking / networked-collaborative KIDS piece; verified by grep вАФ BroadcastChannel exists only in the adult `319-hub-score`)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ this lab's `319-hub-score` serverless-BroadcastChannel lineage ¬Ј Reggio Emilia group-synchrony / joint-attention, KIDS.md's stated high-value goal ¬Ј call-and-response pedagogy)**. **Diversity** dodges the live bans: **multi-user / networked-BroadcastChannel INPUT** (0√Ч ever for kids вАФ the freshest possible modality; not touch-primary, not his-recording, not phone-motion) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D вАФ the banned renderer вАФ NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) ¬Ј **turn-taking / pass-the-creature TECHNIQUE** (lab-first for kids) ¬Ј collaborative/playground VIBE ¬Ј **D major** over a drone, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #3** ("turn-taking / multi-user вАФ 319's BroadcastChannel idea, but for two children вАФ NOT another it-grows-while-you're-away; off touch") and it opens the lab's single most-unserved axis (multi-user, 1вЖТ2 of 300+) for kids. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on one concept (the lab's first two-child shared-music piece, explored via competing interaction models); siblings **`335-kids-duet-bridge`** (two kids co-play in REAL TIME on a shared glowing rope, tuning their ends into just-intonation consonance by ear вАФ the gold "in-tune!" lock; the boldest/most-surprising swing, **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build with a real-device perceptual pass**) + **`336-kids-echo-relay`** (sing a phrase вЖТ it flies to the friend's tablet вЖТ their creature echoes it back + adds вЖТ a networked kid-to-kid canon; banked, but its experience rhymes with the lab's saturated echo lane) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј DEEP ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 5.36 kB (108 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + SVG, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І322. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ fully verifiable in logic (no GPU/WGSL blind spot; the solo robot loop was traced end-to-end); the real unknowns are **two-live-tab on-device behavior** (presence handshake, arrival edges, `pass` rev-reconcile across two real tablets) and the **mic pitch thresholds / 7-frame sustain** on a real child's hum вАФ neither auditionable in the sandbox.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/334-kids-pass-the-song/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 321 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/331-voice-cathedral](/dream/331-voice-cathedral)** вАФ Voice Cathedral. `demoable`
  **The lab's SECOND non-screen piece (jury provocation #2) вАФ sing one note and it BLOOMS into a choir that surrounds you in 3-D HRTF space; sing again and again to stack a one-person overtone cathedral, with the chord you built printed by NAME so you recognize what you sang.** Spatial audio over headphones is the primary medium; the on-screen SVG radar is a minimal, legible companion. Tap **Start with my voice** (creates/resumes the AudioContext inside the gesture, iOS-safe; mic is analysis-only вАФ never recorded, stored, or transmitted, and never routed to the speakers). Hold a single **steady** note: a YIN-style autocorrelation detector (`pitch.ts`) tracks your pitch, a 5-wide median tracker kills octave jumps, and a note only **commits** once it holds within ~0.6 semitones for ~120 ms вАФ then a ~700 ms cooldown + a required breath-gap mean **one breath blooms exactly one voice**, not a stream. Each committed pitch **snaps to the nearest just-intonation degree of a D2 root** (ratios `1, 9/8, 6/5, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2`, octave-folded so any sung octave maps in), becomes a sustained additive voice, and is placed at a **golden-angle azimuth** on a gently **orbiting** ring through its own `PannerNode { panningModel:"HRTF" }`. An always-on JI **D2 drone** anchors the field; a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` + a procedural convolution reverb keep nine voices clip-free and cathedral-sized (a 10th commit fades out the oldest). **Legibility (jury #1):** the panel names the note you're **singing now**, the live **voice count**, and the **cathedral built so far** as named pitch-classes (e.g. `D ¬Ј A ¬Ј FвЩѓ ¬Ј CвЩѓ`) вАФ and each radar dot carries its own label, so Karel *recognizes what he sang* rather than watching a nebula. **Fully demoable with no mic:** an **Auto-demo** programmatically "sings" a slow rising JI arpeggio into the spatial field; mic denied вЖТ a `text-rose-300` notice + the demo. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) the **YIN pitch detector + median tracker** (`pitch.ts`); (2) the **commitment-gating + orbit + UI loop** (`page.tsx`, refs-based rAF, no stale closures, full teardown вАФ mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed); (3) the **HRTF spatial-voice engine** (`audio.ts` вАФ JI snap, golden-angle orbiting panners, 9-voice cap, always-on drone, compressor, reverb send); (4) the **inline-SVG radar** (`scene.tsx` вАФ breathing listener dot, color-by-degree voice dots, tethers, note labels). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ¬Ј David Hykes & the Harmonic Choir ¬Ј La Monte Young's JI drones ¬Ј this lab's own `308-orbit-choir` HRTF lineage)** + **recent-research(#5 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І321, this fire вАФ the 2026 edge-AI-pitch вЖТ browser-HRTF "spatial voice instrument" wave)**. (#1 not claimed вАФ HRTF already exists at `308-orbit-choir`; the novelty is the *build-a-named-chord-in-space* interaction, not the technique.) **Diversity** dodges **every** tag the jury banned (touch ¬Ј his-recording ¬Ј Canvas2D ¬Ј kids ¬Ј Anadol-cloud): **live-voice INPUT** (not touch, not his-recording, not phone-motion) ¬Ј **HRTF-spatial-audio + inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D вАФ the banned renderer вАФ NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) ¬Ј **real-time pitchвЖТJI-snapвЖТspatial-voice-accumulation TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј reverent/drone/sacred VIBE (NOT Anadol-cloud, NOT kids) ¬Ј **D2 just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to jury #2 (the second non-screen piece, in `308`'s crowned HRTF lineage) AND jury #1 (make his music *legible* вАФ name the notes), and it discharges the **multi-cycle-deferred `voice-cathedral` standing pick** (queued ¬І320). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire on one concept (live-voice вЖТ HRTF spatial choir, legible); siblings **`332-overtone-mirror`** (decompose your live voice into its harmonic series and spatialize EACH overtone as its own HRTF voice вАФ your timbre exploded into a sphere; the boldest/most-surprising swing, **re-flagged as a strong next-adult build**) + **`333-antiphon`** (sing a phrase вЖТ a stone cathedral re-emits it as a spatial CANON from rotating HRTF positions, layering into a round) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј DEEP ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 5.72 kB (109 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + SVG, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І321. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ fully verifiable in logic (no GPU/WGSL blind spot; pays down the jury's verification-debt note vs `323`/`327`); the real unknowns are **perceptual**: HRTF localization quality on headphones, and the pitch detector's behavior on real breathy/low voices + the "one breath = one voice" gating timings, which couldn't be auditioned in the sandbox (the Auto-demo exercises the full snap/orbit/drone/limiter chain mic-free).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/331-voice-cathedral/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 320 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 non-screen explorers)

- **[/dream/330-stillness](/dream/330-stillness)** вАФ Stillness. `demoable`
  **An ANTI-instrument that inverts the lab's entire reactive paradigm: it sings only when you are QUIET. Sustained silence blooms a just-intonation drone and a field of light; the first real sound scatters it. John Cage's *4вА≤33вА≥* turned inside out.** Tap **Begin вАФ then be still** (creates/resumes the AudioContext inside the gesture, iOS-safe; tries the mic but never blocks on it). Then *stop making noise.* While the room's smoothed RMS stays **below `QUIET=0.045`**, a low **E2 (~82.41 Hz) just-intonation drone** integrates partial-by-partial (ratios `1, 2, 6/5, 4/3, 3/2, 8/5` вАФ minor third / fourth / fifth / minor sixth, **not** C-major pentatonic), a lowpass opens, an additive SVG light-**bloom** grows at the center of a dark one-point-perspective wireframe room, ~46 motes brighten, and a **stillness streak** counts up. A **rising edge over `NOISE=0.12`** вАФ a clap, a word, a bump вАФ **STARTLES** the piece: bloom вЖТ 0, streak вЖТ 0, the motes scatter outward then settle, the lowpass collapses. The ambiguous band between the thresholds lets the bloom gently recede (you're not quiet *enough* to grow). The two named tuning constants sit at the top of `page.tsx`; a **live input meter** marks `QUIET`/`NOISE` so you can see why it blooms or breaks. **It's fully demoable with no mic**: a **Be quiet (press & hold)** control fully substitutes for silence (release = the startle), and a hands-free **breathing auto-demo** (on by default) blooms-and-rests on a ~20s cycle with occasional startle spikes so the room is alive on load. The **longest stillness streak** persists to `localStorage` ("longest stillness: Xs") so returning sessions have a goal. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) the **inverted-silence detector** with RMS hysteresis + mic/touch/auto input modes (`page.tsx`, refs-based rAF loop, no stale closures); (2) the **JI E2 drone engine** (`audio.ts` вАФ staggered partial fade-in driven by a single `bloom` level, opening/collapsing lowpass, procedural noise-burst convolver reverb, master вЙ§ 0.46 вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`, all `setTargetAtTime` glides вАФ click-free); (3) the **inline-SVG bloom/mote renderer** (`scene.tsx` вАФ radial-gradient core + halo under an `feGaussianBlur`/`feMerge` glow filter, scattering motes, live threshold meter); (4) the **longest-streak localStorage persistence**. Provenance badge: emerald **Listening рЯО§** / amber **Touch mode вЬЛ** / violet **Auto-demo (breathing)**; full teardown on unmount (mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed). **Ambition 2/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ John Cage *4вА≤33вА≥* (inverted) ¬Ј Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* ¬Ј √Йliane Radigue)**. (#1 not claimed вАФ the novelty is the *inverted interaction model*, not a new technique label.) **Diversity** dodges **every** tag the jury banned this cycle (touch ¬Ј his-recording ¬Ј Canvas2D ¬Ј kids ¬Ј Anadol-cloud): **mic-SILENCE (inverted) INPUT** (not touch, not his-recording, not phone-motion) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D вАФ the banned renderer вАФ NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) ¬Ј **inverted silence-detection anti-instrument TECHNIQUE** (the lab's first reward-quiet inversion) ¬Ј contemplative/critical/Cage VIBE ¬Ј **E2 just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The boldest answer to the jury's CORE "too similar / no-fail-noodle" critique вАФ it doesn't swap a sensor, it *inverts the instrument* вАФ and the **5-cycle-deferred standing flagged adult build** (315вЖТ319) finally shipped, resolving the ¬І319 open question. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire of **non-screen** directions; siblings **`329-voice-cathedral`** (sing one note вЖТ an HRTF-spatialized overtone choir that orbits your head, with the notes named вАФ the lab's *second non-screen piece*, jury provocation #2; **re-flagged as the TOP next-adult build**, needs its compass Canvas2DвЖТSVG) + **`331-palm-pulse`** (a song you *feel* вАФ `navigator.vibrate` as the lead voice over a 6-section generative timeline; banked, blocked by iOS's missing Vibration API) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј ROTATION OVERRIDDEN (jury bans kids vibe next cycle) ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј SVG (light). Born from RESEARCH ¬І320. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ fully verifiable in logic (no GPU/WGSL/vibration blind spot, paying down the jury's verification-debt note); the only real unknown is **RMS calibration vs a noisy review room** (`QUIET`/`NOISE` are tuned for a quiet space вАФ a loud room may never dip below `QUIET`), *mitigated* by the press-&-hold control that fully substitutes for silence + the visible threshold meter; also unverified: SVG `feGaussianBlur`/`mix-blend` glow performance + per-frame `<Scene>` re-render with ~46 motes on a low-end device; iOS AudioContext + mic resume in the Begin gesture.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/330-stillness/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 319 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/327-physarum-choir](/dream/327-physarum-choir)** вАФ Physarum Choir. `demoable`
  **You don't play notes вАФ you plant *tones as food*, and a living slime-mold network decides, over seconds, which ones to connect. The chord you hear IS which food nodes the network has currently joined: the slime composes the harmony out of its own topology вАФ and Karel's real piano plants the tones.** Tap **Plant the first tones** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + initializes WebGPU in the gesture, iOS/autoplay-safe): the app fetches one of Karel's real recordings from the public `/api/featured` вЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (the anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП/`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП use), decodes it, runs a coarse onset+autocorrelation-pitch tap, and scatters the detected tones as **"food" nodes** (pitch вЖТ position, snapped onto a D-rooted just-intonation modal set) across a dark field. Then **~1,048,576 Physarum agents** (Jones/Jenson model) run entirely in **WGSL `@compute` shaders**: each agent senses the trail field ahead-left/center/right, steers toward the strongest chemoattractant, and deposits as it moves (atomic fixed-point `atomicAdd`); the field **diffuses (3√Ч3) + decays** every frame in a ping-pong pass, and each food node **injects a hot attractant** so veins grow toward the tones and **join them into a self-organizing network**. A fullscreen render pass paints the trail as a bioluminescent indigoвЖТtealвЖТgold glow. **The piece's idea lives in the connectivity read-out:** a reduce pass downsamples the field, async `mapAsync` reads it back, and `sampleConnections()` rings each food node (skipping its own hot core) to measure how strongly the slime has reached it вЖТ that `[0,1]` per-node connection drives the harmony engine (`audio.ts`): each node owns ONE sustained JI voice whose **gain + brightness rise as the network connects it and fall as the vein dies back**, so the live chord *is* the live topology. Click anywhere to plant another tone. **Honest novelty:** physarum is NOT lab-first вАФ `260-kids-slime-garden` is already a Jones/Jenson agent sim (in WebGL); what's new here is the **WebGPU *compute* implementation** + the **connectivity-graph вЖТ just-intonation harmony mapping** (the slime as *composer*, not decoration). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`source.ts`** вАФ real-stem fetch+decode (JSON-`{url}` or raw `arrayBuffer`) + onset/pitch tap вЖТ JI seed tones, with an offline D-modal arpeggio + auto-seeded ring fallback so it's ALWAYS demoable; (2) **`gpu.ts`** вАФ the WebGPU compute physarum sim (move/sense/deposit + diffuse/decay/food-inject + reduce-for-readback + render) **AND a full Canvas2D/CPU twin** at ~4k agents with the identical model + connectivity read-out, so a no-WebGPU review device still gets the real piece; (3) **`audio.ts`** вАФ the connectivity-driven JI choir (per-node voice + sub partial + lowpass, always-on root drone, optional decoded bed, procedural convolver reverb, master 0.5 вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`); (4) the **rAF sim/harmony loop** in `page.tsx`. Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: source badge reads emerald **"вЩ™ Karel's recording"** vs amber **"synth fallback"**; backend badge reads violet **"WebGPU compute ¬Ј ~1M agents"** vs amber **"Canvas2D/CPU fallback"**; full teardown (rAF cancel, GPU buffers/device destroyed, audio disposed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Andrew Adamatzky's *Physarum* sound-synthesis/biocomputing (arXiv 1212.1203); Sage Jenson (mxsage); Jeff Jones' agent model; *Simulacra Naturae* (arXiv 2509.02924, 2025))** + **recent-research(#5 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І319, this fire вАФ the 2026 WebGPU-compute physarum creative-coding wave)**. (**#1 explicitly NOT claimed** вАФ physarum already exists at `260-kids-slime-garden`; verified by grep. The honest distinctions are the *compute* renderer and the *connectivityвЖТharmony* mapping.) **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вАФ crucially the **touch-INPUT-at-вЙ•5√Ч ban, the Canvas2D-at-4√Ч ban, and the three.js cluster**: **audio-file (his real recording) INPUT** (not touch, not phone-motion) ¬Ј **WebGPU-compute trail-field OUTPUT** (1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч in the last 10 вАФ not a cluster ban; NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT a raw-WebGL2 fragment shader) ¬Ј **Physarum-connectivity-as-composer TECHNIQUE** (never used as a harmony engine) ¬Ј systems/emergent/organic VIBE ¬Ј **D-rooted JI**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. Discharges the standing **"use his actual music"** directive in a never-reached form (his piano seeding an emergent agent network), and pulls hard from his most-loved systems/particle cluster: `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП, `243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП, `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings `326-stillness` (the Cage anti-instrument that blooms only in mic-silence вАФ SVG; **re-flagged as the top next-adult build**) + `328-seismic-choir` (the live USGS earthquake feed sung as an HRTF spatial JI chord around your head вАФ jury #3 real-world-data) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (read-only GETs) ¬Ј 9.71 kB (113 kB First Load вАФ raw WebGPU, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І319. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ the standout unverified risk (shared with `323`): **I could not execute the WGSL on real GPU hardware in the sandbox**, so a runtime WGSL validation/perf problem on the actual review device is possible вАФ *mitigated* by the genuinely full Canvas2D/CPU fallback (same model + same connectivity read-out вЖТ the real experience, just fewer agents). Also unverified: whether the connectivityвЖТvoice swell reads as "the slime is choosing the chord" by eye/ear (connection thresholds are hand-tuned, time-smoothed); 1M-agent + readback frame rate on a phone GPU; the CPU fallback's per-frame 256¬≤ diffuse + 4k-agent loop on a low-end device; iOS Safari WebGPU at review; whether `/api/featured` returns his album from prod (synth + auto-seeded ring covers the no).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/327-physarum-choir/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 318 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 3 approaches)

- **[/dream/325-kids-paper-boat](/dream/325-kids-paper-boat)** вАФ Paper Boat. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's FIRST long-form, stateful, REMEMBERED kids JOURNEY: drag a glowing paper boat down an auto-scrolling night river from dusk to dawn; the music evolves through a real harmonic arc, and at the river's mouth the voyage sings your remembered path back.** Tap the big **вЦґ Begin the voyage** (creates/resumes the AudioContext inside the gesture, iOS-safe). The river **scrolls forward on its own** (3-layer SVG parallax вАФ stars slowest, far hills medium, near reeds fastest вАФ so you're always *traveling* toward dawn), and the child **drags the glowing paper boat** anywhere across the river. Steer **into the glowing lily-pad gates** and each one *sings* a note; **up/down** chooses which of four lanes you're in (low warm tones near the bottom вЖТ bright bell tones near the top), **left/right** opens/closes the chord voicing under everything; drift toward a bank and the texture thins, stay mid-river and it's full. **No way to crash, nothing is ever "wrong"** вАФ every note is quantized to the current mode. This is the lab's first kids piece that *travels and remembers*: every kids prototype in 150+ before it was a short loop toy. The music is **NOT** C-major pentatonic вАФ it's a **D-rooted modal arc** that advances by act with elapsed time: **Departure** (dusk, Dm7, D **Dorian**, indigo) вЖТ **River** (deep night, Fmaj7, F **Lydian**, night-blue) вЖТ **Rapids** (before dawn, C7, C **Mixolydian**, magenta) вЖТ **Home** (dawn, Dmaj7, D major, amber), so minute 6 sounds and looks genuinely different from minute 1 and the home chord *resolves* the journey. **It remembers:** every gate passed is recorded as a `MemoryNote{t,midi,lane,act}`; at the river's mouth **`playReplay()`** sings the last ~24 remembered notes back as a gentle lullaby over the resolving home chord вАФ the voyage recounts the path *you* steered вАФ and the whole `VoyageState` persists to `localStorage` on a 3s wall-clock interval + on unmount, so reopening offers **вЖї Continue your river**. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) the **drag-steer pointer/lane tracker + auto-scrolling 3-layer-parallax SVG world** (`page.tsx`, single rAF loop mutating SVG attributes / one gate-layer `innerHTML` per frame вАФ the React tree is never re-rendered per frame); (2) the **harmonic-arc audio engine** (`audio.ts` вАФ per-act retuned chord pad + lane-voicing `steer`/`setAct`, scale-quantized gate chimes, always-on filtered-noise water/wind pad, synthesized convolver reverb, master 0.5 вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` for small ears); (3) the **voyage state machine + path memory/replay** (`voyage.ts`); (4) the **wall-clock localStorage persistence + act/hue/darkness interpolation** (`hueAtProgress`/`darknessAtProgress`: dusk вЖТ deepest night near the middle вЖТ warm dawn). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Joseph Campbell's monomyth departureвЖТinitiationвЖТreturn + Resonance's own multi-phase journey engine, reimagined for a 4yo + the 2026 adaptive/generative game-music frontier)** + **multi-cycle/long-form(#4 вАФ explicitly long-form/stateful/persistent; README specs a cycle-2 deepening: branching tributaries, a two-boat duet, tides/day-night by real clock)**. (#1 NOT claimed вАФ auto-scroll/parallax isn't a lab-first *technique*; the honest novelty is the *first long-form remembered kids journey*, under #4.) **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вАФ crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4√Ч ban AND the emerging three.js-at-3√Ч cluster** that together ruled the renderer: **inline-SVG-parallax OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) ¬Ј **touch drag-to-steer INPUT** (not phone-motion, not mic) ¬Ј **long-form auto-scrolling voyage + harmonic-arc state machine + lane-voicing + path memory/replay + persistence TECHNIQUE** (NOT a no-fail trigger bed вАФ it has memory/evolution/travel) ¬Ј duskвЖТnightвЖТdawn river VIBE ¬Ј **D-rooted modal arc**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. **Breaks the jury's kids no-fail-noodle FORM** with genuine long-form memory + harmonic evolution + a sense of travel, and is a clean break from the just-shipped voice-garden (which it was deliberately curated *against*). Pulls from Karel's loved drift/travel + paint/grow kids cluster (`166-kids-lantern`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП) + his *journeys/paths* lineage (`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП, `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire; siblings `324-kids-firefly-journey` (the same journey via the simplest tap-to-drift control вАФ strong, ready) + `326-kids-sing-home` (hum/sing a lost star home via autocorrelation pitch вЖТ lane, with a full touch fallback + auto-demo вАФ resurrect once voice cools) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј SVG (light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І318. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether the 6вАУ12 min *felt* pacing stays engaging for a 4yo (act boundaries are proportional so a short demo still crosses real harmonic territory, but the middle minutes are untested); SVG parallax + per-frame gate `innerHTML` at 60fps on a low-end tablet as gates accumulate; iOS AudioContext resume; whether drag-the-boat reads as control vs. the auto-scroll; on resume the music/act/memory restore faithfully but the gate layout regenerates (not gate-for-gate); reverb/limiter loudness by ear.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/325-kids-paper-boat/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 317 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/323-latent-condensation](/dream/323-latent-condensation)** вАФ Latent Condensation. `demoable`
  **Karel's own *Welcome Home* piano pulls 120,000 GPU particles out of turbulent chaos вАФ condensing into a flowing form on each phrase, dissolving back into noise in the rests вАФ the whole simulation running in a WebGPU compute shader.** Tap **Play Karel's piano** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + initializes WebGPU in the gesture, iOS/autoplay-safe): the app fetches one of his real recordings from the public `/api/featured` вЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (the same anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП/`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП use), decodes it, taps an `AnalyserNode`, and runs **120k particles whose positions+velocities live entirely in a GPU storage buffer** through a **raw WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(256)` pass** every frame: a curl-of-value-noise flow field (divergence-free turbulence) blended against an attraction term that pulls each particle toward a slowly morphing target shape (sphere вЖТ torus вЖТ lissajous). A second WGSL **render pipeline** draws them as additive glowing billboards on near-black вАФ a luminous, Anadol-like latent cloud. The chaosвЖФorder blend is a single `condensation` value produced by the audio: a **6-band FFT + RMS envelope** drives a phrase state machine (`chaos вЖТ condense вЖТ form вЖТ release`); low bands widen the flow, treble adds sparkle, a phrase swell condenses, a rest dissolves. **Honest novelty:** WebGPU compute is NOT lab-first (`16-particle-life-gpu`, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП, `75-houdini-particle-flock`, `55-webgpu-audio-fx` predate it) вАФ the novelty is the **application**: a chaosвЖФform *condensation dramaturgy* conditioned phrase-by-phrase by his **real recording**. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`audio.ts`** вАФ real-stem fetch+decode (handles JSON-`{url}` and raw `arrayBuffer`) with an offline-rendered A-natural-minor Karplus-Strong fallback + explicit source label so it is ALWAYS demoable; (2) **`analysis.ts`** вАФ the 6-band FFT + RMS phrase state machine producing the `condensation` coupling; (3) **`gpu.ts`** вАФ raw WebGPU (no three.js, no TSL): seeded storage buffer, compute pass, additive render pass, full `destroy()`; (4) the **rAF transport loop** in `page.tsx`. Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: source badge reads emerald **"вЩ™ Welcome Home вАФ Karel's recording"** vs amber **"synth fallback"**; **no WebGPU вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a live DOM level-meter that still pulses to the audio** (the screen is never blank, nothing throws); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, GPU buffers/device destroyed, source stopped, ctx closed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ nibi by monoton-music, a 2026 WebGPU/TSL compute particle music-video engine, github.com/monoton-music/nibi; + Refik Anadol latent-flow point clouds)** + **recent-research(#5 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І317, this fire)**. (#1 explicitly NOT claimed вАФ WebGPU compute already exists in the lab; verified by grep.) **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вАФ crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4√Ч ban** AND the **emerging three.js-at-3√Ч cluster**: **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0√Ч in the last 10; neither Canvas2D, nor three.js-WebGL, nor a raw-WebGL2 fragment shader) ¬Ј **audio-file (his real recording) INPUT** (not touch [4√Ч banned], not phone-motion) ¬Ј **GPU curl-noise particle-condensation conditioned by a phrase state machine TECHNIQUE** ¬Ј immersive/latent/Anadol VIBE ¬Ј his real recording / A-natural-minor fallback, **NOT C-major-pentatonic**. Discharges the standing **"use his actual music"** directive in a new (GPU-particle-dramaturgy) form, and pulls from his most-loved cluster: real music (`227`вЭ§пЄП/`163`вЭ§пЄП) + immersive/particle/systems (`243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП, `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП, `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings `324-stillness` (the Cage anti-instrument that blooms only in mic-silence вАФ SVG; re-flagged as the next adult build) + `325-seismic-choir` (the live USGS earthquake feed sung as an HRTF spatial just-intonation chord around your head) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (read-only GETs) ¬Ј 8.62 kB (111 kB First Load вАФ raw WebGPU, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH ¬І317. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether the WGSL validates + runs on the actual review GPU (could not execute WGSL on hardware in the sandbox вАФ the DOM-meter fallback covers a no, but the headline experience depends on it); whether the chaosвЖФform condensation reads legibly as the *shape of his phrasing* by eye; 120k-particle frame rate on a phone GPU; iOS Safari WebGPU support at review; whether `/api/featured` returns his album from the prod origin (synth fallback covers the no).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/323-latent-condensation/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 316 вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches)

- **[/dream/322-kids-voice-garden](/dream/322-kids-voice-garden)** вАФ Kids Voice Garden. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ GROW a living musical garden with your VOICE: sing or hum and glowing branches race toward the sound and bloom notes; the garden keeps its real age, so it's taller and a different color of music every visit.** Tap the big **вЦґ Start singing** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + mic inside the gesture, iOS-safe); a dusk SVG sky with a moon, stars and soil appears, and a first seedling sprouts. **Sing/hum and a glint of "light" (an attractor point) appears in the sky вАФ higher pitch places it higher, louder voice grows faster вАФ and the nearest plant's branches *climb toward it* and bloom a note** the instant a tip reaches the light. This is the lab's **FIRST space-colonization growth** in 320+ prototypes (our only prior botanical growth was a recursive L-system): branch tips compete for and *consume* nearby attractor points (influence-radius association вЖТ grow one step toward the averaged attractor direction вЖТ kill-radius consumption вЖТ bloom), producing growth that looks genuinely *alive* and reaches for the child rather than unfolding deterministically. **It's long-form and it remembers:** plants are saved to `localStorage` every 5s with millisecond timestamps and **age by real wall-clock time** вАФ a garden seeded last night runs capped offline-regrowth and greets the child *fuller this morning*; and the harmony **journeys** through a D-Lydian progression (a new chord ~every 40s, each with its own dusk hue) so blooms at minute 5 are a different *color of music* than minute 1. Audio = always-on detuned root drone (never silent) + per-bloom Karplus-Strong plucks on the current chord вЖТ generated-impulse convolver reverb вЖТ 0.5 master вЖТ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (safe for small ears even when dense); after ~13 min it drifts to a soft lullaby. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`voice.ts`** вАФ analysis-only mic (smoothed RMS loudness + autocorrelation pitch; never recorded/stored/transmitted; tracks stopped on unmount); (2) **`garden.ts`** вАФ the space-colonization sim + localStorage persistence/offline-growth; (3) **`audio.ts`** вАФ the safe Web-Audio harmonic engine (drone + KS plucks + D-Lydian journey + reverb/limiter); (4) the **wall-clock persistence + harmonic-clock state machine** in `page.tsx`. Scale: **D Lydian** (D E FвЩѓ GвЩѓ A B CвЩѓ) over a low D drone вАФ deliberately **NOT** C-major-pentatonic (banned this cycle). No-reading: pitch=height is the only "control," the sky IS the canvas; a hands-free **auto-demo** drifts light and grows a plant on load so it's alive at a glance. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: mic denied/unavailable вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a full **touch fallback** (tap the sky to plant a small cluster of light, full-screen вЙ•64px target) + provenance label emerald **"Listening рЯО§"** vs amber **"Touch mode вЬЛ"**; SVG mutated via one `innerHTML` write/frame through refs (the React tree is not re-rendered each frame); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, save-timer clear, mic stop, audio dispose, ctx close). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ first space-colonization growth in 320+ prototypes; verified via grep вАФ all prior plant growth was recursive L-system)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **multi-cycle/long-form(#4 вАФ persists + ages across sessions, harmonic journey; README specs a cycle-2 duet/seasons/pollinator deepening)**. Named ref: **Runions, Lane & Prusinkiewicz (2007), "Modeling Trees with a Space Colonization Algorithm" (algorithmicbotany.org)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вАФ crucially the **touch-INPUT-at-5√Ч ban AND the Canvas2D-at-4√Ч ban** that both ruled this cycle: **voice/mic INPUT** (the freshest modality вАФ 0√Ч in the last 10, KIDS.md-endorsed; not touch, not phone-motion) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js [the emerging 3√Ч cluster], NOT a raw fragment shader) ¬Ј **space-colonization voice-grown-garden TECHNIQUE** (not L-system, not a no-fail trigger bed вАФ it has long-form memory) ¬Ј **D-Lydian** not C-major-pentatonic. **Breaks the kids-recipe critique** (the no-fail-modal-noodle) with genuine long-form persistence/evolution, and the touch+Canvas2D/three.js renderer monoculture with voice+SVG. Pulls from Karel's loved kids-paint/grow cluster (`140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП, `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП) + systems/emergent (`236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП). Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach kids fire; the differential-growth sibling `323-kids-coral-bloom` (a bioluminescent voice-grown reef вАФ self-avoiding ring + spatial-bucket-grid repulsion + node insertion buckling into coral folds, in three.js; gorgeous, near-ship) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 6.3 kB (109 kB First Load вАФ SVG, light). Born from RESEARCH ¬І316. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether autocorrelation tracks a wobbly toddler hum steadily enough that "sing higher = grow higher" reads as *control*; SVG `innerHTML`-per-frame at 60fps as the canopy fills on a phone; iOS AudioContext + mic resume in the Start gesture; whether the colonization growth reads as "racing toward my voice" by eye; whether offline-regrowth feels magical vs. arbitrary; mic accuracy in a noisy room (touch fallback covers the no).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/322-kids-voice-garden/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 315 вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/321-spectral-flight](/dream/321-spectral-flight)** вАФ Spectral Flight. `demoable`
  **Fly through the INSIDE of Karel's own recording вАФ his *Welcome Home* piano turned into a navigable 3D spectral landscape you pilot in sync with playback.** Tap **Fly through his recording** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe): the app fetches one of Karel's real recordings from the public `/api/featured` (finds the `/welcome|karel/i` album) вЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (the same anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП / `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП use), decodes it, and runs the **whole track through a hand-written offline STFT** (radix-2 FFT, 2048/1024, Hann, mono mix) into a **340 √Ч 128** time √Ч log-frequency dB-normalized magnitude grid. That grid becomes a **three.js `THREE.Points` landscape** вАФ x = time, y = log-frequency, height/brightness = magnitude, additive glow sprites colored violet (bass) вЖТ cyan вЖТ white (treble), with fog вАФ and the **camera flies forward along the time axis locked to `currentTime/duration`** so the world can never drift from the music. **Drag (pointer) or arrow keys** bank the look (eased back to center when idle); **space** play/pauses; a transport shows `m:ss / total`. It's the standing **"use his actual music"** directive finally in the *immersive flythrough* form вАФ where `308-orbit-choir` put his recording in the *spatial-audio* layer, this puts you *inside* its spectrogram as a place. Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`audio.ts`** вАФ the real-stem fetch+decode pipeline (handles both JSON-`{url}` and raw `arrayBuffer`, `decodeAudioData`) with an **offline-rendered A-natural-minor arpeggio fallback** + explicit source labels so it is ALWAYS demoable; (2) **`fft.ts`** вАФ the from-scratch CooleyвАУTukey FFT + offline STFT that downsamples the whole track into the landscape grid; (3) **`scene.ts`** вАФ the three.js additive point-cloud flythrough (camera locked to playback, smoothed yaw/pitch banking, full `dispose()`); (4) the **transport-sync loop** in `page.tsx` (AudioContext-time bookkeeping, looping source, iOS resume). Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: source label reads violet **"Karel's recording вАФ <title>"** vs `text-rose-300` **"demo (his album unreachable)"**; no WebGL вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, source stop/disconnect, scene dispose, ctx close). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Refik Anadol *Latent City* (BRUSK, 2026) + Ryoji Ikeda *data-verse* вАФ inhabiting data as a navigable landscape)** + **multi-cycle(#4 вАФ README specs a cycle-2 spatialized/branching-flight deepening)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вАФ crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4√Ч ban that ruled the renderer this cycle** (319,317,314,313 were all Canvas2D): three.js point-cloud OUTPUT (not Canvas2D, not a raw fragment shader) ¬Ј audio-file (his real recording) + drag/keyboard INPUT (not phone-motion, not mic, not camera) ¬Ј offline-STFT navigable-landscape TECHNIQUE (not a live-reactive cloud, not FFT-bar-viz) ¬Ј immersive/Anadol-Ikeda VIBE ¬Ј fallback in A-natural-minor, **NOT C-major-pentatonic**. Pulls squarely from Karel's **most-loved cluster**: his real music (`227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП, `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП) + immersive/spectral (`243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП, `267-spectral-drift`вЭ§пЄП, `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings `322-strange-attractor` (a Lorenz attractor synthesized at audio rate in a custom AudioWorklet вАФ the sound IS the phase-space sculpture; on Karel's named wishlist) + `323-stillness` (a Cage anti-instrument that blooms only in mic-silence and collapses at the first sound вАФ flagged as the next adult build) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (read-only GETs) ¬Ј 6.06 kB (294 kB First Load вАФ three.js). Born from RESEARCH ¬І315. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether `/api/featured` returns a usable Welcome Home album from the prod origin at review (the labeled synth fallback covers the no); whether flying through the point-cloud reads as a coherent *place* vs. a fog of dots; STFT build time + frame rate for a multi-minute track on a phone; iOS AudioContext resume; whether the camera-locked-to-playback sync feels tight by eye.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/321-spectral-flight/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 314 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/320-kids-light-loom](/dream/320-kids-light-loom)** вАФ Kids Light Loom. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's FIRST *bowed* string: drag across glowing strings of light to make them SING and sustain, instead of plucking them.** Tap the big **вЦґ Start Playing** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe); six luminous vertical strings stand on a dark three.js stage, each a bold color + pitch (lower = bigger). **Drag a finger along a string and it *bows*:** it lights up, ripples with a visible standing wave, and sings a **sustained** tone that swells in while the finger moves and gently fades when you stop or lift вАФ completely different from every prior string in the lab, which were one-shot *plucks*. **Bow speed is the expression:** drag slowly for a soft, dark, breathy sound; drag fast for a bright, loud, singing tone (the characteristic stick-slip / Helmholtz feel вАФ faster bow = more energy = purer, brighter Helmholtz motion). **Multi-touch:** two fingers (two kids, or two hands) bow two strings at once вЖТ they harmonize. No wrong notes, no score, no timer. This is the lab's **first continuous-excitation bowed-string physical model** in 300+ prototypes вАФ every prior string (105/108/140/152/184/311/321) is *plucked* Karplus-Strong (one noise burst вЖТ decay); a bow keeps feeding energy in, so the string never decays while bowed. Audio = approach (b): per-string sawtooth + white-noise вЖТ bow-gain (bow-speedвЖТamplitude) вЖТ HP+LP filters (bow-speedвЖТbrightness) вЖТ swell envelope, through a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb (built in code, no files) вЖТ a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter вЖТ 0.5 master, plus an always-on D2+A2 root+fifth drone so it's never silent вАФ all `setTargetAtTime`-glided (no clicks), safe for small ears even when all six are mashed. Subsystems (вЙ•3): (1) the **bowed-string synth engine** (`audio.ts`); (2) a **multi-touch bow-gesture tracker** (`bow.ts`) вАФ per-pointer velocity EMA вЖТ normalized bow-speed, simultaneous fingers, вЙ•72px hit bands; (3) a **raw three.js scene** (`scene.ts`) вАФ emissive `THREE.Line` strings whose position buffer is rewritten every frame for a 1вАУ3-mode standing wave (modes scale with bow energy), additive-blended glow planes, and sparkle `THREE.Points` at the bow contact, on a dark fog stage with full geometry/material disposal on unmount. Scale: **D-Dorian hexachord / just-intonation 5ths over a D root** (D2 A2 D3 G3 A3 D4) вАФ deliberately **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned). No-reading: colors are the strings, the drag IS the instrument; an auto-demo gently bows string 0 on Start so it's alive at a phone-first glance. Degrades for the 06:30 review: no WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вЖТ non-fatal notice, the three.js strings still animate and respond to touch. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ first continuous-excitation/bowed string in 300+ prototypes; all prior strings are one-shot plucked Karplus-Strong)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ bowed synth + multi-touch bow tracker + three.js standing-wave scene)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ Stefania Serafin & Christophe Vergez real-time violin friction model + Julius O. Smith digital-waveguide bowed strings, CCRMA + Helmholtz motion/stick-slip; nods to loved `140-kids-string-bridge`)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вАФ crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4√Ч ban that ruled the renderer this cycle** (319,317,314,313 were all Canvas2D): three.js glowing-string OUTPUT (not Canvas2D, not a raw fragment shader, not a creature-with-pads) ¬Ј multi-touch-bow INPUT (not phone-motion, not camera, not solo-tap) ¬Ј continuous-bowed-string TECHNIQUE (not plucked KS, not a no-fail trigger bed) ¬Ј D-Dorian not C-major-pentatonic. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `321-kids-seed-garden` (a long-form generative garden that grows + sings + **persists to localStorage with real wall-clock age** while you're away вАФ near-ship, a future DEEP/long-form candidate) + `322-kids-sing-up` (sing higher вЖТ a paper bird climbs the sky; autocorrelation pitch-match, SVG cut-paper) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 5.14 kB (296 kB First Load вАФ three.js). Born from RESEARCH ¬І314. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether the bowed timbre actually *sustains and sings* by ear (vs. buzzes) and whether bow-speedвЖТbrightness reads as expressive on a real touch device; standing-wave frame rate on a phone; two-finger bowing on a real iPad; `linewidth>1` is GPU-dependent (strings may render 1px thin on some devices вАФ the glow plane mitigates); iOS AudioContext resume; whether a 4-year-old discovers "drag, don't tap" without a prompt.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/320-kids-light-loom/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 313 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches)

- **[/dream/319-hub-score](/dream/319-hub-score)** вАФ Hub Score. `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST networked / multi-instance piece вАФ every open browser tab is one sustained voice in a serverless, wall-clock-synced just-intonation ensemble, and any tab can take the baton to conduct the whole room's harmony.** Press **вЦґ Start / Join the room** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe): you become one voice holding a chord-tone of a slow D-rooted just-intonation drone, with two gentle "ghost" voices already holding the chord so a single tab sounds full. **Open the same URL in a 2nd/3rd tab** and each becomes another sustained voice вАФ they all **breathe together** because the breath is the **wall clock**: `globalPhase(Date.now())` is a pure function returning a 0..1 phase over a ~30s cycle, so every same-origin tab evaluates the same swell at the same instant with **zero clock-sync handshake** (the shared clock IS the conductor's baton; the BroadcastChannel only carries *what* to play, never *when*). Tap a **degree** (1/1, 9/8, 6/5 вА¶) to choose which chord-tone you sing; press **Take the baton** to become conductor and `вЧА chord / chord вЦґ` steps the shared field through a slow modal progression while brighter/darker ¬Ј denser/sparser ¬Ј oct ¬± reshape the whole room вАФ **every tab glides to match** (last tab to take the baton wins). Rendered as a **Canvas2D living graphic score**: a horizontal time-river, one lane per player on its JI-degree line, each lane's band breathing with its live gain; a vertical sweep marks the wall-clock phase, your lane glows, the conductor's carries a caret вАФ Ikeda-restrained, thin lines on near-black, **deliberately no glow** (NOT a fragment shader, NOT three.js-bloom, NOT a creature-with-pads). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **`sync.ts`** вАФ the JI set + chord progression + wall-clock phase/breath envelope + identity/hue + the BroadcastChannel protocol (`hello`/`welcome`/`voice`/`field`/`conductor`/`heartbeat`/`leave`, ~5s prune, rev-counter reconciliation); (2) **`audio.ts`** вАФ a continuous additive-voice drone ensemble (fundamental + 3 quiet partials вЖТ per-voice lowpass(brightness) вЖТ breathing-LFO gain вЖТ shared synthesized convolver reverb вЖТ master brick-wall limiter, all `setTargetAtTime`-glided); (3) **`score.ts`** вАФ the Canvas2D living graphic score; (4) the **conductor harmony-field state machine** (take-the-baton, last-writer-wins, the shared `{chordIndex, octave, brightness, density}` field everyone glides to). Scale: **just intonation over a D root** вАФ 1, 9/8, 6/5, 4/3, 3/2, 8/5, 9/5, 2 (D-Dorian colour as pure ratios), explicitly **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned this cycle). Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: fully playable SOLO (ghost chord + you can conduct the ghosts); no `BroadcastChannel` вЖТ amber notice + solo voice; audio survives a missing 2D context. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ first networked/multi-instance/BroadcastChannel shared-state piece in 319 prototypes; the multi-user shelf was empty 15+ cycles)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)** + **named-reference(#3 вАФ The Hub (Bischoff/Perkis, 1980s) + The League of Automatic Music Composers (1978) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Ryoji Ikeda)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (multi-tab-presence+baton INPUT not phone-motion/mic/camera ¬Ј Canvas2D-graphic-score OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not three.js-bloom ¬Ј serverless shared-state + wall-clock-breath + conductor TECHNIQUE not a no-fail trigger bed ¬Ј just-intonation-over-D not C-major-pentatonic) вАФ and opens the **multi-user / networked axis** the lab had never shipped. Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire; the rhythmic sibling `318-ensemble-room` (an editable 16√Ч8 D-Dorian **step-sequencer** with a Chris-Wilson lookahead scheduler + a **three.js 3D orbital constellation** вАФ the obvious WebRTC-cross-device next step) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 5.61 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І313. **Known scope limit:** `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin same-browser-profile only вАФ "the room" is one machine's tabs, NOT cross-device (true cross-device needs WebRTC + signaling). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether 3 tabs feel genuinely synchronized on a real machine, whether the lone-tab ghost-chord + conductor experience reads at a phone-first review (the multi-tab payoff needs вЙ•2 tabs), JI drone timbre + reverb loudness by ear, the baton-handoff race under simultaneous claims, iOS AudioContext resume.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/319-hub-score/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 312 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/317-kids-color-bells](/dream/317-kids-color-bells)** вАФ Kids Color Bells. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the room becomes your instrument: show the camera a colored object and a bell rings.** Tap the big **вЦґ Start** (resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe) and the rear camera opens; a "magic circle" reticle sits at the center of the live feed. Point the camera at something colorful вАФ a red toy, a blue cup, a green leaf вАФ and **hold it steady for ~0.5s** (a clockwise progress arc fills the reticle): that color's **bell rings**, a full-screen color wash flashes, and a **bead is added to a growing "song basket"** along the bottom. Tap **вЦґ Play song** to replay the collected colors as a little melody (each bead lights as it sounds); **рЯІЇ** empties the basket. No fail, no score, no timer вАФ showing a new color just adds another bead. This is the lab's **first camera region-color sampling** technique: each frame the video is drawn to an offscreen canvas, the **average RGB inside the reticle box** is computed вЖТ HSV, and (if saturated/bright enough) the **hue is mapped to one of 6 bins** вЖТ a note вАФ *no ML, no body/face tracking, no optical flow*, deliberately simple and robust for a 4-year-old. HueвЖТnote over the **D major hexachord** (red D3 ¬Ј orange E3 ¬Ј yellow FвЩѓ3 ¬Ј green G3 ¬Ј blue A3 ¬Ј violet B3 вАФ warm colors low, cool colors ascending; **NOT** C-major-pentatonic, banned this cycle). Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) the **camera-color sampler** (`color.ts`) вАФ offscreen `drawImage` вЖТ `getImageData` center box вЖТ average RGB вЖТ RGBвЖТHSV вЖТ saturation/value gate вЖТ 6-bin hue map + a cross-origin-taint guard; (2) an **FM bell audio engine** (`audio.ts`) вАФ sine carrier + inharmonic modulator (ratio 2.756) + bright 2nd partial for a warm marimba/gamelan bell, through a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter вЖТ 0.5 master, plus a barely-there D3+A3+D4 pad so it's never silent; (3) a **Canvas2D scene** (`scene.ts`) вАФ live video feed, animated reticle with hold-progress arc, color splash, and the bead strand (explicitly **not** a raw full-screen fragment shader and **not** a creature-with-tappable-pads); (4) the **song-memory state machine** (collect вЖТ cap at 24 beads вЖТ replay/clear). Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: camera denied/unsupported вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a **touch fallback** of six big (вЙ•68px) color buttons you can tap to ring bells and build a song, plus a hands-free auto-demo that rings a few colors on load; provenance shown as emerald **"Camera on"** vs amber **"Touch mode."** Full cleanup (rAF cancel, camera `track.stop()`, AudioContext close on unmount). **Ambition 2/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вАФ camera region-color sampling вЖТ sound, a lab-first)** + **вЙ•3-subsystems(#2 вАФ four)**. Named refs in README: **Toshio Iwai *SimTunes* (1996)** + the color-organ / Castel *clavecin oculaire* / Len Lye / Oskar Fischinger visual-music lineage. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (camera-color INPUT not phone-motion/touch ¬Ј Canvas2D-over-camera OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not creature-with-pads ¬Ј hueвЖТbell + collected-song-memory TECHNIQUE not the no-fail-noodle ¬Ј D-major-hexachord not C-major-pentatonic) вАФ and brings a **fresh INPUT modality (camera)** the lab hadn't shipped in the recent window, where the last two kids ships were both touch+Canvas2D (311, 313). **Directly discharges JURY 2026-06-04 provocation #2** (break the kids recipe with memory/consequence; break the creature-with-pads/full-screen-shader monoculture). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `316-kids-seed-garden` (a generative *Bloom*-garden that grows + sings + **persists with wall-clock age** while you're away вАФ gorgeous, near-ship) + `315-kids-sing-up` (sing a pitch to climb a balloon, autocorrelation pitch-match) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 5.6 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І312. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: color-bin accuracy under real-room lighting (no white-balance; generous thresholds mitigate), iOS rear-camera `facingMode:environment` only on Safari (falls through to touch otherwise), FM bell timbre by ear, hold-to-confirm feel + frame rate on a real phone.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/317-kids-color-bells/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 311 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches)

- **[/dream/314-solar-wind](/dream/314-solar-wind)** вАФ Solar Wind. `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST live SPACE-weather sonification вАФ a long-form drone scored, in real time, by the Sun.** Tap **Begin** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe); a sustained just-intonation overtone drone over D2 (ratios 1, 3/2, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 вАФ deliberately **not** C-major-pentatonic) starts, and a sky of layered **aurora curtains** glows over a star field. There are no plucks or triggers вАФ the **live solar wind continuously glides the harmony and texture**: three keyless, CORS-open **NOAA SWPC** feeds (`solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json` speed+density ¬Ј `solar-wind/mag-1-day.json` `bz_gsm`+`bt` ¬Ј `json/planetary_k_index_1m.json` Kp) are fetched directly from the browser, merged on one timeline, and re-polled every ~60s. **Faster wind вЖТ brighter/higher; denser plasma вЖТ thicker texture + shimmer; southward Bz вЖТ detunes the 5th partial into slow beating (storm tension), northward settles to a pure ratio; a high Kp вЖТ storm climax + curtains turn magenta and turbulent.** A HUD shows the Sun's *actual numbers right now* (speed km/s ¬Ј density ¬Ј Bz nT ¬Ј Kp, with a STORM flag at KpвЙ•5). Two modes: **Live** (sonifies the present moment, slowly drifting вАФ genuinely different after a few minutes) and **Replay 24h** (time-compresses the fetched day into ~3 min so you hear a whole day of the Sun, storm and all, as one arc, with a progress bar). It's the **sky *above* you**, where the loved-cluster-adjacent `279-tremor-score` sonified the Earth *beneath* you вАФ a different external feed, taken because ¬І289 already filled the seismic shelf. Subsystems (вЙ•3): (1) three NOAA feed pipelines with **defensive header-by-name column lookup** + bad-value (`null`/`""`/`-9999.9`) filtering + UTC merge + a bundled ~54-row synthetic-storm fallback so it plays/animates offline; (2) the fixed-bank just-intonation **overtone drone engine** (`setTargetAtTime` glides over ~4s, brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` + 0.42 master so a Kp-9 climax can never blast); (3) the Canvas2D **aurora-curtain renderer** (folded-sheet geometry, greenвЖТmagenta gradient, additive crossings, star field, storm-reactive horizon glow вАФ explicitly **not** a single full-screen noise shader); (4) the live/replay-24h state machine. Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: provenance line states emerald **"Live ¬Ј NOAA SWPC"** vs amber **"Sample data (NOAA feed offline)"**, errors in `text-rose-300`. **Ambition 3/5**: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, **Terry Riley & Kronos Quartet *Sun Rings* 2002**, built from Don Gurnett's real NASA plasma-wave recordings + NOAA SWPC + SeismoDome lineage) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH ¬І311). **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (live-API INPUT not phone-motion/touch ¬Ј Canvas2D aurora-curtains OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not creature-with-pads ¬Ј continuous-drone data-sonification TECHNIQUE not discrete triggers ¬Ј just-intonation overtones not C-major-pentatonic). **Directly discharges JURY 2026-06-04 provocation #3** ("compose from the live planet вАФ the empty real-world-data shelf"). Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire; the clinical Ikeda sibling `315-helios-stream` (granular cloud + inharmonic spectral comb + data.matrix field) build-explored and banked in IDEAS. Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (read-only third-party GETs) ¬Ј 5.5 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І311. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: NOAA CORS reachability from the prod origin at review (sample fallback covers the no), whether live ranges feel as dramatic as the synthetic storm, whether the Bz beating reads as "tension" vs. mud, aurora frame rate + iOS AudioContext resume on a phone.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/314-solar-wind/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 310 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/313-kids-tone-tower](/dream/313-kids-tone-tower)** вАФ Kids Tone Tower. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ consequence made PHYSICAL: a tower the child's *memory* builds.** Tap **Build it taller вЦ≤** (resumes the AudioContext + a soft pad so it's never silent); a 2-block tower stands and **sings its song** (blocks light bottomвЖТtop, each playing its note вАФ self-demos on Start). A clear *your turn* cue (pulsing green base + рЯСЖ, no reading). **Echo the melody** on the 4 big colored note-tiles (color = pitch): each **correct** note lights the matching block with a soft landing chime; **finishing the whole song** sends a shimmer up the tower, plays a rising arpeggio, and **grows it by one note** вАФ a new glowing block drops and settles on top, so the tower is **taller and persists**. A **wrong** note makes the top block **wobble and topple off** with a gentle descending "aw" (NOT a buzzer, NOT game-over); the song shrinks by one and is re-sung from the bottom вАФ **slower after 2 misses** вАФ so a 4yo never gets stuck (never below the 2-block base). The tower at minute 3 is a visible record of how far the child's memory reached. This is the **right/wrong-consequence half** of the JURY's #2 provocation ("break the kids recipe вАФ a piece with memory or consequence where the child can make something *wrong* and fix it"); cycle 308's `311-kids-music-box` took the *persistence* half, and `313` is the only one of this fire's three explorers that **breaks the over-represented Canvas2D-creature-with-pads form** (the consequence is architectural/spatial, not a creature reacting). Subsystems (вЙ•3): (1) an **always-safe Web Audio engine** (`audio.ts`) вАФ warm mallet/marimba voices (sine + bright triangle-octave partial), a soft landing thud, a topple "aw" (triangle gliding 330вЖТ160 Hz), a soft always-on G/D-fifth pad, a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb (no files), all through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + modest 0.5 master so dense stacking stays safe for small ears; (2) a **Canvas2D `TowerScene`** (`tower.ts`) with a small block-physics model (settle / gravity / topple / sway / shimmer); (3) the **growing-sequence game state machine** (demo вЖТ yourTurn вЖТ celebrate) with per-tap match-detection and the generous miss/shorten/slow-re-sing logic. Scale: **G-major tetrachord G¬ЈA¬ЈB¬ЈD** (from the G-major hexachord; growth notes drawn only from the 4 playable tiles so every appended note is echoable) вАФ deliberately **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned this cycle). No-reading: color-tiles, a pointing-finger turn cue, a рЯІ±-count for the grown-up. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: sings its starting tower on Start hands-free; no Web Audio вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice, the tower still builds and animates silently. **Ambition 3/5**: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, **Simon** Milton Bradley 1978 + classic block/stacking toys + **JMIR Serious Games 2026** process-over-pass/fail) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH ¬І310). **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (touch INPUT not phone-motion ¬Ј Canvas2D-block-TOWER OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not creature-with-pads ¬Ј memoryвЖТpersistent-stacking-with-topple-consequence FORM not the no-fail-noodle ¬Ј G-major-tetrachord not C-major-pentatonic). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `312-kids-sing-back` (literal Simon-grows echo-singing, creature "Pip") + `314-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator/MIROR reflexive duet, the "it remembered!" motif-weave) build-explored and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 5.29 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І310. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: tap-to-sound latency on a real device, whether the settle/topple physics *feel* right at 60 fps on a phone, iOS/Android AudioContext resume, reverb loudness on real speakers.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/313-kids-tone-tower/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 309 вАФ adult ¬Ј DEEP-continue, solo вАФ multi-cycle thread #3 вЖТ cycle 2)

- **[/dream/308-orbit-choir](/dream/308-orbit-choir)** вАФ Orbit Choir **(cycle 2: now sung by Karel's own album)**. `demoable`
  **The spatial thread, deepened with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano вАФ the first time the "use your actual music" directive has reached the lab's non-screen spatial layer.** Cycle 1 was a synthesised resolving chord; **cycle 2 replaces the seven synth voices with Karel's actual recordings**, fetched live from the public `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids) вЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (returns a signed URL per track) вАФ the same anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП / `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП use. Each recording becomes one HRTF-panned voice scattered around your head, **detuned (`playbackRate` вЙИ ¬±¬љ-semitone) and dark (low `lowpass` cutoff)** вАФ a blurred, distant cluster of his own music; over the ~6-minute arc each one **orbits inward, sharpens (cutoff opens), and settles to true pitch (`playbackRate вЖТ 1.0`)**: you literally gather his album into a clear room around your head, a head-tracked **spatial *Forty Part Motet*** of his own piano. **Two lab-firsts shipped alongside:** (1) **haptics** вАФ `navigator.vibrate` pulses a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you are facing* locks home, and a triple-pulse when the whole room resolves (the lab's first haptic output in 300+ prototypes); (2) **persistence** вАФ how far you'd gathered the room is saved to `localStorage`, so returning reads *"Return to the room ¬Ј your room was N% gathered"* and the arc **resumes where you left it** ("Begin again" deliberately re-scatters). Still wear **headphones** (binaural HRTF). Graceful fallback is load-bearing: if `/api/featured` is unreachable or no track decodes (offline / private preview / CDN block), it reverts to the **original synthesised resolving-chord choir** and the top label says which source is playing. Subsystems (вЙ•3): DeviceOrientation head-tracker + an N-voice HRTF panner scene of looping `AudioBufferSource`s + a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb + the 360 s azimuth/sharpen/playbackRate **convergence state machine** + the featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + localStorage room-memory. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1 вАФ first haptic output + first real-stem source on the spatial layer) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3 вАФ **Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* 2001**, on tour MIMOCA/NGC 2026; La Monte Young *Dream House*; Pauline Oliveros) + multi-cycle(#4 вАФ thread #3, cycle 2). **Diversity**: stays on the non-screen adult-spatial axis (output is audio, screen a footnote) вАФ dodges the JURY's banned raw-WebGL2-shader / phone-motion-noodle-kids / pentatonic tags. **Directly discharges JURY 2026-06-04 provocation #1** ("Deepen 308 with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems вАФ do NOT ship a sixth sensor-noodle вА¶ the standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer"). Born from RESEARCH ¬І307/¬І309. Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route created ¬Ј no guard (read-only GETs) ¬Ј 5.35 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether 7 simultaneous piano recordings, spatially separated + only-the-faced-one-bright, read as a coherent "listening room" vs. mush; whether `/api/featured` returns a usable Welcome Home album in prod (fallback covers the no); the haptic + resume feel on a real phone.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 308 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/311-kids-music-box](/dream/311-kids-music-box)** вАФ Kids Music Box. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вАФ the lab's first kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions.** A slowly-spinning 3D music-box **cylinder** the child studs with pins to *compose* a looping tune; a fixed glowing **comb** at the front plucks each pin as it rolls past. Tap a slot on the front face вЖТ a colored pin pops up and sings on its next pass; tap again to remove it. The pattern **persists to `localStorage`**, so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and **the box remembers the tune even after you close and reopen it** вАФ a little machine the child builds, not a momentary forgettable wash. This is the **direct answer to the JURY's #2 provocation** ("break the kids recipe вАФ ship a piece with memory or consequence, where *what they did persists and grows*; five straight kids fires were a sensor wired to a no-fail modal noodle"). It also breaks the **Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pattern** its two WIDE siblings shared, and is the only candidate whose output is a **3D physical-object metaphor** (three.js) rather than a full-screen shader or a flat creature. Subsystems (вЙ•3): (1) a **Karplus-Strong** plucked-string engine (`ks-audio.ts`) вАФ one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch (filtered noise burst вЖТ tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback вЖТ attack/release envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + modest master gain (0.55) so dense patterns stay safe for small ears; (2) a **three.js / @react-three/fiber** 3D scene (`cylinder.tsx`) вАФ rotating wooden barrel with brass caps, a color-coded comb, raised pin studs that "pop" + glow when plucked, and a front-face-only invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body via a shared rotation ref (back-face taps rejected by surface-normal¬Јcamera test); (3) a per-frame **step-sequencer clock** вАФ the comb-step is sampled each frame and any pins at that step pluck; (4) **localStorage persistence** (`store.ts`) with try/catch degrade + a seed tune so the box is already singing at a glance. Scale: **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B вАФ the raised-4th sparkle), bright + consonant, explicitly **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned this cycle). No-reading: colors are the notes, the studs the child taps ARE the melody, a tiny caption is for the grown-up. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: auto-spins a seeded tune on Start; no WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вЖТ notice, box still spins. The curating fire **fixed a real pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle was a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. **Ambition 3/5**: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, **Swiss cylinder musical box** c.1796 Geneva + **Karplus-Strong** 1983) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH ¬І308 вАФ reflexive interaction / Pachet *Continuator* + Addessi *MIROR*: carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed). **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (touch INPUT not phone-motion ¬Ј three.js 3D-object OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader ¬Ј persistence/sequencer FORM not the no-fail-noodle ¬Ј D-Lydian not C-major-pentatonic). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator/MIROR call-and-response duet) + `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows memory game with real-but-kind right/wrong) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 4.74 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І308. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: KS timbre by ear (brightness/damping per row), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, and three.js disposal across an unmount in a live session.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/311-kids-music-box/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 307 вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP, 2 approaches вАФ Orbit Choir cycle 1, superseded above)

- **[/dream/308-orbit-choir](/dream/308-orbit-choir)** вАФ Orbit Choir (cycle 1, synth voices). `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST audio-first / non-screen spatial piece** вАФ and its first HRTF spatial-audio output + first `DeviceOrientation`-as-listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes. **Wear headphones.** Near-black screen; tap *Begin the orbit* (one tap resumes the AudioContext + requests iOS motion permission). Seven sustained HRTF-panned voices start **scattered around your head and detuned into a soft cluster**; over a **6-minute** eased scheduler they **orbit inward to an even ring AND glide into a warm A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth chord** вАФ so the spatial field and the harmony resolve *together* and the room is audibly different at minute 6 than minute 0 (long-form / stateful, not a loop). **Turn your phone (or your head):** `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener`; the voice you face swells **and** its personal resolution is nudged forward вАФ so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace of the convergence. The core gesture is load-bearing science, not decoration: generic Web-Audio HRTF is notoriously front/back-ambiguous, and **active head movement is the known fix** (RESEARCH ¬І307 / arXiv:2510.09161) вАФ turning is what makes the cheap generic HRTF legible. Three+ subsystems: (1) DeviceOrientation head-tracker (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); (2) a 7-voice HRTF panner scene вАФ each voice 2-3 sine `OscillatorNode`s + breathing-LFO gain вЖТ lowpass вЖТ its own `PannerNode panningModel="HRTF"`; (3) a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no audio files); (4) a 360s azimuth+pitch **convergence state machine**. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: no sensor / desktop вЖТ pointer-drag + arrow-keys + a hands-free **auto-tour** that demos itself; no Web Audio вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice. Faint violet **orbital-map** canvas (listener at center, facing marker, dim voice-dots drifting together) + a thin progress ring with `M:SS вАФ scatteredвЖТdrifting inвЖТgatheringвЖТalmost homeвЖТresolved` + a "Begin again" hold state вАФ the screen is a footnote by design. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1, first HRTF output + first DeviceOrientation listener-rotation) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, La Monte Young *Dream House* ¬Ј √Йliane Radigue ¬Ј Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) + recent-research(#5, ¬І307/¬І295). **Diversity** executes JURY #5 head-on вАФ the FIRST build whose **output is not a screen visualizer** (pure spatial audio); dodges the banned kids-vibe / tilt-screen-object input / matte-canvas+three.js output / pentatonic tags. **Winner of a DEEP 2-approach fire**; the faithful fixed-room sibling `307-still-room` (Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*, 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn-to-tune-in) was build-verified and banked in IDEAS as the calmer companion. Directly discharges the JURY's standing provocations #3 ("ship the spatial breadth banked-but-never-shipped вАФ ZERO of 3 spatial pieces had shipped") + #4 (build ¬І295's un-spent head-tracked shelf) + #5 (ban the audioвЖТvisual driver). Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 3.92 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І307. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, and the shepherding feel.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 306 вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker](/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker)** вАФ Rain-Shaker. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+).** Hold the phone and **shake it like a rainstick or maraca** вАФ gentle shakes make a soft trickle of beads, bigger shakes tumble a warm rain down the screen and each strong shake-peak strikes a **D-Dorian** bell. An always-on pad keeps it alive; no fail, no timer, no score. This is the lab's **first `devicemotion`/accelerometer input** вАФ distinct from the `deviceorientation` *tilt* (303) and *heading* (290): it reads shake-ENERGY, not orientation. Three subsystems: (1) `shake.ts` вАФ `accelerationIncludingGravity` вЖТ per-axis running-average **high-pass** (removes gravity) вЖТ magnitude вЖТ smoothed shake-energy envelope вЖТ threshold "hit" events (~130 ms refractory); every input path (motion / pointer-shake / auto-demo) feeds the IDENTICAL detector; (2) `rain-audio.ts` вАФ a soft D-Dorian pad + a rainstick trickle of filtered-noise bead grains (density вИЭ energy) + FM bell chimes struck on hits (panned, lowpassed), all through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so vigorous shaking can NEVER blast (matters more here than anywhere); (3) `rain-gl.ts` вАФ raw WebGL2 (hand-written GLSL ES 3.00), a darkвЖТdawn gradient that warms with energy + up-to-600 soft point-sprite rain beads in **matte premultiplied alpha-over** (the non-additive house style вАФ switched from the builder's additive blend during curation to respect the JURY's anti-glow ban) + warm glow blooms on each bell. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` inside the Start tap; denied/no-sensor вЖТ pointer-shake + a hands-free auto-demo that rains by itself; no WebGL2 вЖТ rose notice, audio plays on. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, devicemotion shake-energy) + named-reference(#3, rainstick/maraca) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH ¬І306 вАФ CHI 2026 movement-sonification). **Diversity** dodges every standing JURY ban: devicemotion INPUT (not touch), raw-WebGL2 matte OUTPUT (not three.js, not matte-Canvas2D, not additive), shake-energy TECHNIQUE (not pentatonic-poke), D-Dorian (not pentatonic). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `304-kids-clap-band` (clapвЖТonset-detection layered groove, Steve Reich *Clapping Music*, D-Mixolydian) + `305-kids-blow-sail` (blowвЖТWiener-entropy breath sailing, C-Lydian) build-verified and re-banked in IDEAS. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 7 kB. Born from RESEARCH ¬І306. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: shake threshold/scale *feel* on a real phone, the auto-demo cadence, point-size across GPUs.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker/README.md`
