- **[/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute](/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute)** вАФ Bottle Flute. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 374. **For**: kids (4+).

  **A row of glowing glass bottles you BLOW into вАФ and they're real physically-modeled flutes that breathe, resonate, and overblow to the octave when you blow hard.** Press **Start**, then tap a bottle to pick its note and blow into the mic (or just blow вАФ loudness = how hard you blow); no mic, just tap and a preset breath-puff plays the note. Big bottle = low, small = high (C D E G A, a warm C-Lydian pentatonic subset, so every combination is consonant). The sound is **not** a sample or a plain oscillator: it's a digital **waveguide flute** вАФ a delay-line bore + one-pole reflection filter, excited by breath-noise through a soft-clip cubic *jet* nonlinearity, so it has a breathy attack, a resonant body, and a genuine overblow (the cubic term shifts the operating point at high pressure вЖТ the octave emerges, same physics as a real flute). This is **the lab's first physically-modeled WIND instrument** вАФ distinct from KarplusвАУStrong (`140`/`184`), which is the simplest *plucked-string* waveguide; this is a *breath-excited bore*, a different physical regime.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): (1) **`flute.ts` digital-waveguide DSP** вАФ an **AudioWorklet** processor (source inlined as a string вЖТ Blob URL, so no `public/` file is needed; a **ScriptProcessorNode** fallback runs the identical loop if `addModule` throws): circular delay line of length `N = round(sampleRate/freq)`, one-pole lowpass reflection, `jet = pressure + bore¬Ј0.4` soft-clipped by `x вИТ x¬≥/3`, feedback < 1 with a hard ¬±1.15 clamp + NaN guard so it can never screech. (2) **Breath input** вАФ mic RMS envelope (AnalyserNode `getFloatTimeDomainData`, analysis-only, never recorded) drives the `breath` AudioParam; OR a pure-touch preset envelope when there's no mic. (3) **Reverb** вАФ a 4-comb Schroeder + 2-allpass network (no deps). (4) **Always-on ambient pad** (C3 E3 G3 triangles + slow LFO) so it's never silent, all through a **DynamicsCompressor** brick-wall limiter (kids-safe). (5) **Inline-SVG visuals** вАФ five graduated glowing bottles, `feGaussianBlur` glow + warm-glass `linearGradient`, a breath-shimmer ellipse + rising bubbles that grow with blow strength, animated by rAF DOM-attribute writes (no Canvas2D, no WebGL). Auto-demo blows a gentle 15-note tune hands-free ~3 s after load.

  References: **Julius O. Smith III**, *Physical Audio Signal Processing* (CCRMA вАФ waveguide bore modeling, reflection filters) ¬Ј **Perry R. Cook**, *Real Sound Synthesis for Interactive Applications* (2002) + the **STK Flute** model (jet delay + breath-noise architecture) ¬Ј **McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse**, "On the oscillations of musical instruments" (JASA 1983 вАФ the nonlinear-exciter + linear-resonator framing). Born from RESEARCH ¬І374 (the dive that bound this fire **off** the GPU-physics-sim kids monoculture toward embodied breath/voice). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (first **breath-excited bore waveguide / physically-modeled WIND** instrument in the lab вАФ grep-verified: prior "waveguide" hits `140`/`184` are KarplusвАУStrong *plucked strings*, a different regime) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (waveguide DSP ¬Ј breath-mic envelope ¬Ј touch ¬Ј Schroeder reverb ¬Ј SVG render = 5) + **#3** named references (Smith ¬Ј Cook/STK ¬Ј McIntyre et al. 1983). **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the refs are foundational, not <14-day. **Diversity** (vs the cycle's bans вАФ AI-image OUT [4√Ч] ¬Ј Canvas2D OUT [jury] ¬Ј **GPU-physics-sim TECH** [451/456/460 = 3 straight kids cycles] ¬Ј drum-machine TECH [jury] ¬Ј refuse-to-resolve & pentatonic-lullaby VIBE [jury]): **breath/mic-RMS + touch INPUT** (fresh вАФ amplitude, not pitch, not tilt) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (dodges BOTH the jury-banned Canvas2D AND the 5√Ч WebGL-render monoculture) ¬Ј **digital-waveguide physical-modeling TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new audio primitive вАФ dodges both GPU-physics-sim and drum-machine) ¬Ј **warm breathy resolving Lydian VIBE** (not a pentatonic lullaby). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire fired deliberately off the GPU-physics rut; siblings `466-kids-sing-kite` (SING to fly a kite along a scrolling melody contour, YIN pitch-detect, SVG) + `467-kids-shadow-band` (WAVE your body вАФ camera motion-energy conducts a 3-zone particle band, three.js) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS ¬І374. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, prerendered `/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute` 6.96 kB in the manifest; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no mic / audio / real hardware in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether a 4-year-old's breath drives the RMS envelope into the overblow regime (`envвЙИ0.75вАУ0.85`) at real mic gain/distance; AudioWorklet Blob-URL loading on iOS Safari (the ScriptProcessor fallback + touch-only path cover it); whether the waveguide *feels* breathy/flute-like vs. buzzy on phone speakers behind the limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + getUserMedia-in-gesture. No API route, no network, no camera, no secrets вЖТ no `guard` needed. Zero new npm deps.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute/README.md`

- **[/dream/471-helios-orbit](/dream/471-helios-orbit)** вАФ Helios вАФ Orbit. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 375.

  **Watch a dark Earth from orbit while a live geomagnetic storm conducts an EDM build-and-drop вАФ the auroral ovals igniting and the music resolving the instant the storm peaks.** Press **Begin** and three live **NOAA SWPC** feeds (solar-wind plasma, IMF Bz, planetary Kp) stream in client-side: **wind speed вЖТ master filter brightness + tempo**, **density вЖТ pad shimmer/thickness**, **Bz-negative вЖТ harmonic tension** (the pad drifts A-major вЖТ minor/suspended), **Kp вЖТ the master anticipation** (a riser sweep + quickening 16th-note hi-hats build). At **Kp вЙ• 5 the DROP fires exactly once** (a `prevStormActive` one-shot): a sub-bass swell + a 4-on-the-floor kick at 128 BPM + the harmony **snaps minorвЖТmajor вАФ it resolves on purpose** + the **auroral ovals ignite** (colatitude expands ~25¬∞вЖТ40¬∞ toward the equator, hue greensвЖТmagenta/red as in real oxygen/nitrogen storm physics) + the **magnetosphere blooms** (an additive halo surge). Then it eases back to a warm ambient bed. Stateful, hands-free, **never silent**; a scripted ~22-s storm auto-fires (and a **"Simulate storm now"** button forces it) so it has a guaranteed buildвЖТdrop payoff with no network. This is **cycle 2 of the "Living Earth" spine** (cycle 1 = `463-terra-gamelan`) вАФ it keeps a multi-cycle commitment alive (jury 2026-06-09 #1) and carries forward `463`'s luminous Fibonacci-dot-globe visual language, while delivering Karel's explicitly-wanted **EDM build-and-drop journey-engine alternative** and the jury's missing **"warm AND structured AND resolves on purpose"** middle.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ ~4): (1) **live space-weather ingest** (`spaceweather.ts`) вАФ three NOAA SWPC public-CORS JSON feeds, 60-s poll with `AbortController` + 8-s timeout, exponential glide (~0.92/s) so values breathe rather than step; a complete **synthetic random-walk + scripted-storm fallback** (quiet вЖТ build вЖТ KpвЙ•6.5 drop вЖТ decay over ~66 s) so the piece is a full instrument with **no network** (what the build check sees); NaN-guarded parsing вЖТ silent synthetic fallback on any fetch/CORS/schema failure. (2) **EDM build-and-drop audio engine** (`audio.ts`) вАФ warm A-major pad bed, minor/suspended drift on Bz-negative, riser + hi-hat accumulator on the Kp build, sub-bass + 4-on-the-floor kick + major-chord resolve + aurora-bloom chord on the drop; everything вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` вЖТ brick-wall limiter (20:1, вИТ1 dBFS) so nothing clips or is silent. (3) **three.js orbital globe** (`scene.ts`) вАФ dark Fibonacci dot-sphere + additive atmosphere halo (continuity with `463`); **auroral ovals** as 1,200-particle shimmer-rings around the IGRF magnetic poles (~80.7¬∞N/72¬∞W, ~64.5¬∞S/136¬∞E) whose colatitude/brightness/hue track Kp (70%) + Bz-southward (30%); a **magnetosphere bloom** shell (2.8√Ч globe) + corona that `triggerBloom()` flashes then exp-decays on the drop; drag-to-rotate, slow auto-rotation, full geometry/material/renderer dispose on unmount; WebGL-absent вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + audio still runs. **No API route, no `guard`** (public CORS, read-only, no secrets). No new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **arXiv 2605.21874** (Alunno & Bientinesi, *Real-time, EDM-inspired sonification*, **May 21 2026** вАФ EDM's build-tension-release as a continuous, fatigue-resistant monitoring sonification grammar; the basis for the build-and-drop arc; carried from RESEARCH ¬І373) ¬Ј **NASA HARP** (Heliophysics Audified: Resonances in Plasmas) + **NASA/Chandra aurora sonifications** (Mar 2026 вАФ brightness/position/energy вЖТ pitch/volume/timbre) ¬Ј **NOAA SWPC Aurora Dashboard (Experimental)** (live data + auroral-oval colatitude-expansion lineage) ¬Ј **IGRF** (magnetic-pole coordinates) ¬Ј **Refik Anadol** / **Ryoji Ikeda** (data-as-light, but warm). Born from RESEARCH ¬І375 (the dive bound the build via path (b)/(c) вАФ continue a research-seeded multi-cycle spine). **Ambition 4/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (live ingest + EDM engine + orbital-globe-with-ovals) + **#3** named refs (above) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 2 of the Living Earth spine) + **#5** carried ¬І373 research within 14 days (arXiv 2605.21874, the EDM arc). **#1 NOT claimed вАФ grep-honest:** a live-NOAA-space-weather aurora already exists (`262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП, the lab's 2nd real-world-data sonification); the fresh moves are the **EDM build-and-drop structural arc** (262 is an ambient drone), the **orbital-globe vantage** (262 is sky-facing curtains), and the **spine framing** вАФ application novelty, not a new primitive. **Diversity** (cycle bans: AI-image OUT [4√Ч count] ¬Ј Canvas2D OUT [jury] ¬Ј drum-machine TECH [jury] ¬Ј refuse-to-resolve & pentatonic-lullaby VIBE [jury]): **live-space-weather INPUT** ¬Ј **three.js orbital-globe + auroral-ovals OUTPUT** (zero Canvas2D, zero AI-image; the globe is **declared spine continuity with `463`**, not an unintentional rut вАФ the one diversity caveat, accepted because a multi-cycle spine extending its own visual language is the #4 commitment the jury asked for) ¬Ј **EDM build-and-drop data-sonification TECHNIQUE** (warm, resolves вАФ not drum-machine) ¬Ј **warm space-observatory-that-resolves VIBE** (the jury's missing middle). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-attack adult fire (one Helios concept вАФ *NOAA space-weather вЖТ EDM build-and-drop, storm = the drop* вАФ three renderers: orbital globe vs. fbm sky-curtain vs. volumetric raymarch). **The grep-audit overturned the first instinct:** siblings `469-helios-aurora` (three.js fbm sky-curtain veil) + `470-helios-raymarch` (raw WebGL2 volumetric raymarch) were complete and real but **NOT banked** вАФ both duplicate the register of the loved `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП (whose own banked siblings are literally `aurora-raymarch` + `aurora-drone-field`), so re-seeding them would re-seed the "too similar" rut; `471` won precisely because the orbital globe is the **one approach visually distinct from 262** AND the only one that continues the `463` spine. Rides loved `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП (here as a *caution*, not a pull) + `321-spectral-flight`вЭ§пЄП + `323-latent-condensation`вЭ§пЄП (luminous data-light). **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/471-helios-orbit` 8.96 kB prerendered as static in the manifest; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no live network / GPU / audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: NOAA SWPC CORS + the assumed column indices (plasma `[t,density,speed,temp]`, mag Bz idx 3, Kp idx 1; all NaN-guarded вЖТ synthetic fallback if wrong) from Karel's network; whether the auroral-oval colatitude rebuild (>1.5¬∞ вЖТ particle regen) shimmers on a fast synthetic ramp (only ~1√Ч/min on real 60-s polling); the kick/sub/pad balance behind the limiter; the iOS AudioContext-in-tap path; whether the orbital globe reads as clearly distinct from `262` on a real GPU.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/471-helios-orbit/README.md`

- **[/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom](/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom)** вАФ Scan Bloom рЯМЄ. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 376. **For**: kids (4+).

  **Squeeze a soft glowing flower and HEAR its outline sing вАФ the shape you see IS the waveform you hear.** Press **Start**, then tap a petal: it rings a warm note (C-major / Lydian, C3вАУC5 вАФ every petal consonant) AND the bloom's outline wobbles, then slowly relaxes back into a calm round hum. This is the lab's **first SCANNED SYNTHESIS** instrument (Max Mathews, Bill Verplank, Rob Shaw, "Scanned Synthesis," ICMC 2000): instead of a static wavetable, the oscillator reads a **slowly-vibrating physical ring of 128 coupled masses** (closed toroidal topology, the original Mathews form). A phase accumulator scans that ring at audio rate вАФ `scanFreq` is the pitch вАФ so the deforming radial outline on screen is literally the live waveform. Poking it injects a Gaussian displacement bump; light damping dissipates the higher harmonics over a few seconds, so a squeeze brightens the timbre and then **resolves on its own** back toward a near-sine. It is **never silent** (a quiet seeded sinusoid hums at rest) and **never clips/hurts ears** (everything through a DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter). This is **cycle 1 of the new "Living Wavetable" kids spine** вАФ the jury's (2026-06-09) #2 ask realized for the kids lane: *restart a multi-cycle commitment* (#4 was dead since 414).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **scanned-synthesis AudioWorklet** (`bloom-worklet-src.ts` / `bloom-audio.ts`) вАФ a `BloomProcessor` owning `r[128]`/`v[128]` in the audio thread, stepping the closed mass-spring ring once per 128-sample render quantum (`Kn=0.25, Kc=0.002, damp=0.04, dt=1`, circular neighbor coupling) and synthesizing each output sample by **linear-interpolated circular scan** at `scanFreq/sampleRate`; inlined as a string вЖТ Blob URL вЖТ `addModule`, with a **ScriptProcessorNode fallback** running the identical loop, posting `r[]` snapshots out ~33√Ч/sec; all вЖТ DynamicsCompressor limiter. (2) **multi-touch petal control** вАФ 6 invisible вЙ•72px tap-targets ringed around the bloom that each poke the ring at their angular index AND set the scan pitch in one gesture; a squeeze/drag anywhere on the canvas rings the *nearest* petal (angle-based hit test). (3) **WebGL2 bloom renderer** (`bloom-renderer.ts`) вАФ a two-pass glow (triangle-fan radial-gradient fill + additive LINE_STRIP rim) whose outline radius at each angle = `baseRadius + r[i]¬Јamp`, rebuilt every frame from the exact `r[]` being scanned, warm per-petal color, on a dark `#0a0514` field; ResizeObserver-driven sizing + full GL dispose on unmount. (4) **3s hands-free auto-demo** (taps a gentle 7-note tune, stops on first touch) so it demos with zero interaction. **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + WebGL2 only вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Max V. Mathews, Bill Verplank, Rob Shaw вАФ "Scanned Synthesis," Proceedings of the ICMC 2000, Berlin** (the technique: a slow dynamical wavetable scanned at audio rate; this is the lab's first use, closed-toroidal form). Born from RESEARCH ¬І376 (the dive surfaced the Continuator/MIROR reflexive-turn-taking lineage, a grep-audit killed it as a "too-similar" target вАФ `251-live-duet-trader` already does live Markov, and 142/154/213/230/280/298/334 are the echo cluster вАФ and **steered the search onto scanned synthesis, a grep-verified untouched primitive**). **Ambition 4/5** (the jury's named regression fix вАФ zero pieces were at 4вАУ5/5): **#1** never-used technique (scanned synthesis вАФ grep-verified: "scanned synthesis"/"verplank"/"wavetable" all absent across 470+ folders) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named reference (Mathews/Verplank/Shaw ICMC 2000) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Living Wavetable spine). **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the technique is foundational (2000), not <14 days; honest. **Diversity** (vs jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬Ј drum-machine/percussion-synth-TECH ¬Ј refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE ¬Ј calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids-template ¬Ј AND the recent kids GPU-physics-sim rut [451/456/460] ¬Ј the second-consecutive-SVG [468]): **multi-touch petal INPUT** ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (dodges the banned Canvas2D AND the three.js cluster [471/463/451] AND a 2nd SVG) ¬Ј **scanned-synthesis TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new audio primitive вАФ dodges drum-machine AND the kids physics-sim-game rut: the mass-spring here is a tiny audio *wavetable*, not a physics toy you watch) ¬Ј **warm self-resolving Lydian VIBE** (the squeeze brightens then relaxes вАФ the jury's "warm AND structured AND resolves on purpose" middle, neither refuse-to-resolve nor pentatonic-lullaby). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-attack kids fire (one concept вАФ *poke a glowing object and it sings its own shape* вАФ three topologies/renderers: open-string/SVG vs. toroidal-ring/three.js vs. radial-bloom/WebGL2). Siblings `472-kids-scan-string` (pluck a giant SVG harp-string of light, pluck-x = pitch вАФ the most legible "see the wave" read) + `473-kids-scan-ring` (poke a three.js toroidal halo, the dent travels around вАФ the most reference-pure topology) are complete, build-reviewed real scanned-synthesis implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І376 as the spine's cycle-2/3 candidates. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom` 6.35 kB prerendered static in the manifest), NOT browser-verified** (no audio / GPU / touch in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the scanned-synthesis timbre reads as warm-and-alive vs. buzzy behind the limiter on phone speakers; whether a 4yo perceives the see-shape/hear-shape correspondence at low pitch (the ~33fps `r[]` snapshot averages sub-period detail below ~150 Hz, though the complexвЖТsmooth *trend* always mirrors); the iOS AudioWorklet Blob-URL + AudioContext-in-gesture path (ScriptProcessor fallback covers it); WebGL2 availability on older tablets (DOM-bloom + audio fallback covers it); whether free-drag "squeeze" lands on the petal the child intended (angle-based nearest-petal, polished this cycle from an always-C4 bug).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom/README.md`

- **[/dream/475-resonant-room](/dream/475-resonant-room)** вАФ Resonant Room рЯПЫпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 377. **For**: adults / live performance.

  **Karel's actual recorded piano played into a room that rings back in the SAME KEY вАФ hold "Swell" and the space fills with a warm in-key halo; release and it rings out to the tonic and decays to silence.** Press **Start** (or wait вАФ 3s hands-free auto-start), pick a **Key** (C/D/E/F/G/A/Bb), and **hold the Swell control** (or Space): the feedback gain `g` ramps toward 0.95, the room blooms, a golden-amber lattice lights up; **release** and `g` ramps to 0 so the room **resolves to the tonic and fades to silence** вАФ the defining gesture of this new spine. This is the lab's **first FEEDBACK DELAY NETWORK** (Jot/StautnerвАУPuckette reverb): an N=8 lossless **Householder-matrix** feedback network of delay lines whose lengths are **tuned to the harmonic series of the chosen key** (`L = SR/freq` + a mutually-prime nudge), with a **per-line one-pole lowpass** for Jot-style frequency-dependent warmth (highs decay faster, like a real room). Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano is the excitation (read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET); on any fetch/decode failure it falls back to a **resolving CвАУAmвАУFвАУG7вАУCmaj9** synth progression so it always sounds and always demos. This is **cycle 1 of the new adult "Resonant Room" multi-cycle spine** вАФ the jury's (2026-06-09) **warm-AND-structured-AND-resolves-on-purpose adult middle**, on his **real piano** (cold 15+ cycles), restarting the multi-cycle commitment (#4) the jury said died at 414.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **real-piano source** вАФ fetch `/api/audio/549fc519вА¶` вЖТ `decodeAudioData` вЖТ looping `AudioBufferSourceNode`, with a warm synthesized **fallback chord progression** (CвАУAmвАУFвАУG7вАУCmaj9) that itself resolves. (2) **FDN reverb AudioWorklet** (`fdn-worklet-src.ts`) вАФ `FdnProcessor` owning 8 ring-buffer delay lines, mixing tails through a precomputed **Householder matrix** `H = I вИТ (2/N)¬Ј11бµА`, scaling by global feedback `g` (k-rate param, вЙ§0.97 for stability), per-line warm LP, injecting the dry source, posting per-line **RMS energy** ~40√Ч/sec; inlined вЖТ Blob URL вЖТ `addModule`, with a **ScriptProcessorNode fallback** running the identical loop; all вЖТ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter. (3) **WebGL2 ring-lattice renderer** вАФ 8 glowing nodes (one per delay line) connected by the mixing-matrix edges; node brightness/size = that line's current RMS, edges pulse as energy flows; golden-amber additive glow on deep indigo `#0a0514`; `ResizeObserver` sizing + full GL dispose on unmount; DOM fallback if WebGL2 absent. (4) **interaction** вАФ 6-key selector (retunes delays live), Space/pointer **Swell** gesture (the `g` ramp), 3s auto-start. **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + one read-only same-origin `/api/audio` GET вАФ no mic, camera, write, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Jean-Marc Jot & Antoine Chaigne, "Digital Delay Networks for Designing Artificial Reverberators," AES 90th Convention, 1991** + **Stautner & Puckette, "Designing Multichannel Reverberators," Computer Music Journal, 1982** (the original FDN). Born from RESEARCH ¬І377 (the dive ruled out the freshest concepts вАФ Live Music Diffusion Models, arXiv 2605.22717, 2026-05-21, and latent-diffusion co-performance вАФ as server-heavy / not client-buildable, **negatively steering** onto the jury's real-piano + warm-resolving asks realized via a lab-first FDN). **Ambition 4/5** (the jury's named regression fix вАФ zero pieces were at 4вАУ5/5): **#1** never-used technique (Feedback Delay Network вАФ grep-verified: "feedback delay network"/"FDN"/"Jot" all absent across 470+ folders; architecturally distinct from 468's single Schroeder *allpass*, the modal resonators of 202/284/286, and the Karplus combs of 140/184) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named reference (Jot & Chaigne 1991 / Stautner & Puckette 1982) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Resonant Room spine). **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ FDN is foundational (1982/1991), not <14 days; honest. **Diversity** (vs jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬Ј drum-machine/percussion-synth-TECH ¬Ј refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE ¬Ј calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids-template ¬Ј AND the over-used three.js cluster [471/463/451]): **audio-file(real WH piano) INPUT** (first real-piano source in 16 cycles) ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (dodges banned Canvas2D AND the three.js cluster AND a repeat-SVG) ¬Ј **feedback-delay-network TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new reverb architecture вАФ dodges drum-machine) ¬Ј **warm in-key resolving VIBE** (hold-to-swell вЖТ release rings out to the tonic вАФ the jury's "warm AND structured AND resolves on purpose" adult middle, neither refuse-to-resolve nor pentatonic-lullaby). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire (one concept вАФ *real piano вЖТ an in-key sympathetic room that resolves* вАФ three resonance architectures: FDN/WebGL2 vs. biquad-resonator-bank/three.js vs. tuned-comb-waveguide/WebGL2). Siblings `476-tarab-strings` (high-Q biquad sympathetic-resonator bank вЖТ three.js light-strings вАФ the most legible per-string energy portrait) + `477-resonant-caustics` (tuned comb/waveguide bank вЖТ WebGL2 caustic interference field вАФ the most beautiful render) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І377 as the spine's cycle-2/3 candidates. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/475-resonant-room` 8.7 kB prerendered static), NOT browser-verified** (no audio / GPU in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the FDN reads as a warm sympathetic *room* vs. metallic/comby behind the limiter on phone speakers; whether the in-key delay tuning produces an audible *resolution to the tonic* on Swell-release vs. a generic reverb tail; whether `/api/audio/549fc519вА¶` actually streams + decodes in the deployed prototype (synth fallback covers silence, but the real-piano directive is only *met* if it loads); the iOS AudioWorklet Blob-URL + AudioContext-in-gesture path (ScriptProcessor fallback covers it); WebGL2 on older tablets (DOM fallback + audio-without-GL covers it).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/475-resonant-room/README.md`

- **[/dream/478-kids-wave-pond](/dream/478-kids-wave-pond)** вАФ Wave Pond рЯМК. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 378. **For**: kids (4+).

  **Tap a glowing top-down pond and watch REAL waves spread, bounce off the rim, and cross through each other вАФ and hear that rippling field as sound.** Press **Touch the Pond**, then tap/drag anywhere on the luminous circle: a Gaussian displacement pulse is injected into a 64√Ч64 grid, ripples radiate, **reflect off the fixed boundary**, and **interfere** where they cross (constructive = brighter/cyan, destructive = dimmer/violet). A small amber **pickup** cell reads the local displacement out as audio, and the field's liveliness drives a warm C-pentatonic tone over an always-on Lydian pad вАФ so the audio and the visual are the *same solved field*, not a sim layered on a separate synth. Multi-touch: several taps = several wave sources crossing. This is **cycle 1 of the new "Wave Field" kids spine**.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4+): (1) **FDTD 2-D wave solver** вАФ a genuine time-domain finite-difference 2-D digital-waveguide mesh (Van Duyne & Smith, ICMC 1993): every cell steps `u_next = 2u вИТ u_prev + c¬≤¬Ј(вИЗ¬≤u)` (c = 0.35 Courant-stable, light damping, Dirichlet "rim" boundaries) вАФ **no pre-computed modes, no spectral bank, no cosmetic ripple**; propagation/reflection/interference emerge from the coupled cell updates alone. (2) **AudioWorklet** owning the grid, stepping at audio rate and posting the field to the main thread ~30√Ч/s (inlined вЖТ Blob URL, no `public/` file), with an **identical ScriptProcessorNode fallback** if `addModule` throws. (3) **audio chain** вАФ pickup-cell displacement + a field-energy-driven C4вАУA4 pentatonic sine voice + a 5-partial Lydian pad (never silent) вЖТ 9 kHz lowpass (kids-safe) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter. (4) **three.js renderer** вАФ top-down `OrthographicCamera` over a `PlaneGeometry` (64√Ч64 vertices) whose per-vertex `color` BufferAttribute is rewritten each frame from the field (trough = deep violet, crest = cyanвЖТwhite) on a dark indigo field; full geometry/material/renderer dispose on unmount; WebGL-absent вЖТ readable `text-rose-300` notice + audio still runs. (5) **3 s hands-free auto-demo** drops four gentle ripples, cancelled on first touch; multi-touch independent injection; iOS AudioContext created inside the Start gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + three.js only вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **Dana C. Van Duyne & Julius O. Smith III, "Physical Modeling with the 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh," ICMC 1993** (the technique вАФ a solved 2-D wave-equation field, not a modal mode-bank). Born from RESEARCH ¬І378 (the dive's grep-audit killed three would-be re-treads вАФ bowed-string already exists at `320-kids-light-loom`, kids-weather at `293-kids-sky-band`, modal membrane-drum at `202`/`284` вАФ and surfaced the genuinely-open FDTD time-domain field). **Ambition 4/5** (the jury's named regression fix вАФ climb to 4вАУ5/5): **#1** never-used technique (time-domain FDTD 2-D wave-equation / digital-waveguide-mesh вАФ grep-verified: the lab's membranes `202`/`284` are *modal* Bessel-mode banks with a cosmetic ripple, never a solved finite-difference field) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4+, above) + **#3** named reference (Van Duyne & Smith 1993) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Wave Field spine). **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the reference is foundational (1993), not <14 days; honest. **Diversity** (vs jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT ¬Ј drum-machine/percussion-synth-TECH ¬Ј refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE ¬Ј calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids-template ¬Ј AND the count-banned **WebGL2 OUTPUT** [5√Ч in last-10: 475/474/460/456/451]): **multi-touch INPUT** ¬Ј **three.js vertex-color OUTPUT** (dodges the banned Canvas2D AND the count-banned raw-WebGL2; three.js is 2√Ч вАФ under the count line) ¬Ј **FDTD wave-field TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new physical-modeling primitive вАФ dodges drum-machine AND the recent kids GPU-physics-sim rut: this is a *solved acoustic field you hear*, not a physics toy you watch) ¬Ј **warm self-resolving water VIBE** (ripples spread then settle вАФ neither refuse-to-resolve nor pentatonic-lullaby). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire fired off three grep-verified-fresh registers: siblings `479-kids-duet-bloom` (first cooperative two-player kids instrument вАФ the chord only blooms when *both* play together; dual-input synchrony engine, SVG) + `480-kids-sing-bird` (SING and your pitch flies a bird along a melody contour; real-time YIN voice-pitch, SVG) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І378. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/478-kids-wave-pond` prerendered in the manifest; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no GPU / audio / touch in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether a 64√Ч64 grid stepped at 44.1 kHz in an AudioWorklet holds real-time on a low-end phone (builder flags it ~180 MFLOP/s вАФ a production version would sub-rate the stepping or shrink the grid; ScriptProcessor fallback is heavier); whether the raw single-cell pickup reads as a pleasing "water-strike" vs. a low rumble behind the limiter (the pentatonic tone-synth layer carries the pitched warmth); whether tap-to-sound lands <50 ms (injection bypasses React state via a ref); the iOS AudioWorklet Blob-URL + AudioContext-in-gesture path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/478-kids-wave-pond/README.md`

- **[/dream/486-third-room](/dream/486-third-room)** вАФ Third Room рЯПЫпЄП. `demoable` ¬Ј Cycle 381. **For**: adults / live performance.

  **Cycle 3 of the Resonant Room spine: a live-MIDI room split into a tritone clash вАФ but now with a THIRD room a just-fifth above that shares Room A's harmonics, so you can negotiate the tritone into rest by routing it through a consonant intermediary, not just collapsing it.** Every played note feeds three parallel banks of N=8 high-Q biquad bandpass resonators: **Room A** (reference, panned вИТ20¬∞ L, violet), **Room B** (the tritone interloper, +detune 0вАУ600 ¬Ґ, default 600 ¬Ґ, +35¬∞ R, rose), and **Room C** (a **just-fifth, 702 ¬Ґ = 3:2** above A, вИТ35¬∞ L, emerald вАФ its 2nd/4th/6th partials lock onto A's 3rd/6th/9th, so AвЖФC is intrinsically consonant). A **Room C blend slider** brings the bridge in from silence; the resolution gesture is *blend C in вЖТ find the pivot note where all three rooms momentarily agree вЖТ then collapse the detune*. A real-time **PlompвАУLevelt / Sethares roughness** engine (computed over all cross-room partial pairs, C weighted by its blend) drives a Tension bar (Resolved вЖТ Settling вЖТ Tense вЖТ Dissonant вЖТ Clashing) and a **steepest-descent pivot-note hint layer** that analytically scans MIDI 48вАУ84 each ~18 frames and glows the 2вАУ3 notes that most lower total three-room roughness emerald on the keyboard вАФ a partner that whispers crossroads without forcing one. Rendered as a **WebGPU compute vorticity field** (the lab's starved renderer): ~4,000 particles in a WGSL ping-pong compute shader, three room-attractors, roughness вЖТ per-room vorticity (Room C calms to laminar emerald as you find consonance while AвЖФB stays turbulent at full tritone), with a real Canvas2D three-attractor fallback. Live Web MIDI + on-screen + QWERTY input; 3-s hands-free auto-demo (plays at full tritone then blends C in); brick-wall limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client-side Web Audio + Web MIDI + WebGPU/Canvas2D вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Plomp & Levelt 1965** / **Sethares 1993** / **MacCallum & Einbond, "Real-Time Analysis of Sensory Dissonance," CMMR 2008** (the roughness model) ¬Ј **Stautner & Puckette 1982** / **Jot & Chaigne 1991** (FDN/tuned-resonator lineage) ¬Ј **just intonation 3:2 = 702 ¬Ґ** (the Pythagorean fifth вАФ the consonant bridge). Born from RESEARCH ¬І381 (the dive confirmed no fresh <14-day sensory-dissonance paper вАФ the foundational MacCallumвАУEinbond real-time roughness model stays the right tool вАФ and positively bound the renderer: WebGPU compute particle fields with ping-pong buffers [ShaderVine's 16 compute sims, nibi's TSL flow patterns] are the live 2026 register). **Ambition 4/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (live Web MIDI + **three** coupled resonator rooms + real-time roughness analysis + steepest-descent pivot-note suggestion engine + WebGPU compute vorticity field = 5) + **#3** named refs (above) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 3 of the Resonant Room spine вАФ the truest *extension*: one room [475] вЖТ two [483] вЖТ three) + (#5 honestly NOT claimed вАФ refs foundational, no <14-day binding; #1 NOT claimed вАФ WebGPU compute exists at `444`, roughness at `483`). **This directly answers the JURY (2026-06-10): #1** bring genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (blend вЖТ pivot вЖТ collapse, never auto-resolved), **#2** *deepen* an existing lab-first into cycle 3 by extension rather than grabbing a 5th DSP primitive, **#3** ban three.js + pick a starved renderer (**WebGPU**, 0√Ч in the last 10; dodges the WebGL2 4√Ч count-ban). **Diversity** `picked=[**live-MIDI INPUT** (starved, jury's pick, spine continuity) ¬Ј **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (0√Ч starved, jury-flagged; dodges banned three.js + WebGL2-4√Ч count-ban) ¬Ј **three-room tritone-vs-just-fifth negotiation + real-time roughness TECHNIQUE** (a spine *extension*, not a new primitive вАФ dodges the jury's "first-DSP-primitive" treadmill) ¬Ј **cold/ambiguous-tension-you-resolve-through-action VIBE** (the jury's exact #1 ask вАФ the opposite of the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture)]`. **Love signal:** `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП (a loved GPU-compute particle piece) softly backs the WebGPU vorticity field; `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП / `140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП back a resonator piece вАФ additive, the jury + spine governed. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire (one cycle-3 concept вАФ *deepen 483 with a steepest-descent partner + the starved WebGPU renderer* вАФ three resolution mechanics): siblings `485-resolving-room` (the whisper-panel note-hint engine + detune gradient arrow) + `487-guided-descent` (a roughness *landscape* with a shared-control "descend toward rest" autopilot) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І381 as cycle-4 fold-ins. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/486-third-room/page` in `app-paths-manifest.json`; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean вАФ one unused eslint-disable directive removed as the single fix), NOT browser-verified** (no MIDI device / GPU / audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the analytically-predicted pivot notes actually *sound* resolved to the ear (the PlompвАУLevelt model is an approximation, not ground truth вАФ players may explore a few candidates); whether 3√Ч8 high-Q biquads per held note stays clean polyphonically behind the limiter; whether the just-fifth AвЖФC consonance reads as a genuine *bridge* vs. just more sound on phone speakers; `requestMIDIAccess` + hotplug on Karel's controller (on-screen/QWERTY fallback covers no-device); whether WebGPU initializes on Karel's review phone (Canvas2D fallback covers no-`navigator.gpu`); the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/486-third-room/README.md`

### [493-kids-feeling-forest](/dream/493-kids-feeling-forest) ¬Ј kids ¬Ј cycle 384 ¬Ј demoable
  **Cross a glowing "feeling forest" with your BODY вАФ every place sounds like a different feeling, and you find calm (or stay in the bittersweet middle) by *moving*, not by pressing a "resolve" button.** The lab's first **explorable continuous harmony-tension MAP**: the screen is a top-down world; a glowing spirit sits at the child's position; **6 mood anchors** вАФ Storm (m2+tritone+m9 cluster, 22¬Ґ beating, sawtooth, fast tremolo, 380 Hz LP), Electric (aug+dom7), Bittersweet sus2 center, Dream whole-tone, Sweet major, Calm (open fifth+octave, 0¬Ґ detune, no tremolo, 2200 Hz) вАФ are blended at every position by **inverse-distance-weighting (power 2)**. Chord voicing (fractional semitone offsets вАФ no scale-snapping), detune, oscillator timbre, per-voice filter cutoff, and tremolo rate all morph **continuously**, so dissonanceвЖФconsonance is a smooth **spatial gradient the child drives by walking**. There is no pre-baked cadence вАФ tension is the subject; you resolve it (or dwell in it) through navigation. **Navigation by BODY/camera (primary, the jury's starved depth-camera input):** MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (loaded from CDN at runtime, no npm dep) maps the child's mirrored body/nose position onto the canvas; **drag/pointer fallback** if camera denied (`text-rose-300` banner) or MediaPipe CDN fails; **always-on auto-demo** wanders pricklyвЖТelectricвЖТbittersweetвЖТsweetвЖТcalmвЖТdreamy (~14 s loop) from page load so the sandbox always makes evolving sound + visuals hands-free; any touch/camera input stops it. **Canvas2D only** (8√Ч8 mood-tinted grid вАФ cold/jittering where dissonant, warm/steady where calm вАФ + glowing creature that vibrates & sprouts spiky rays in tense zones, trail, tension-keyed particles, tiny live camera-position indicator). DynamicsCompressor limiter (вИТ6 dBFS) so it can never get harsh-loud; AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS). **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + Canvas2D + on-device camera; the only network is the MediaPipe CDN + model; no mic-audio leaves the browser, no secrets). No new npm deps.

  Reference: **Chu, A., Smith, J. B. & Pardo, B., *FXplorer: A Map-Based Interface for Exploratory Audio Effect Design*, arXiv 2606.08286 (NIME 2026, listed 2026-06-09)** вАФ replace menus/sliders with a continuous 2-D map you *navigate*; discover sound by *wandering*. This adapts it for pre-readers: the map encodes harmony+tension (not effect params) and the **body** is the cursor. Born from RESEARCH ¬І384 (the dive *implemented* a <14-day finding вАФ the missing 5th criterion the jury said kept every recent piece at 4/5). **Ambition 5/5**: **#1** never-used technique (explorable continuous harmony-tension map navigated by movement вАФ grep-verified lab-first; `148-spatial-palette` is a pan/pitch *arranger*, `410-conchordal-garden` is autonomous a-life, neither is a navigable mood field) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (MediaPipe pose camera input + IDW harmony-morph synth + Canvas2D field/creature renderer + auto-demo wanderer = 4) + **#3** named ref (FXplorer) + **#4** multi-cycle (cycle 1 of a new **Sound-Map / explorable-harmony kids spine**) + **#5** binds a <14-day finding (FXplorer, 2026-06-09 вАФ implemented, not negatively-steered). **Answers the JURY (2026-06-10): #1** brings genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (a dissonant region you walk out of, never a pre-baked VвАУI) вАФ breaking the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture; **#3** picks a *starved* input (**depth-camera, 0√Ч**) and a fresh renderer (**Canvas2D**, 1√Ч in last 10 вАФ dodges banned three.js + WebGL2-4√Ч count-ban) вАФ and is the **first build to claim #5/hit 5/5** in the window (the jury: "no piece hit 5/5 because the dive never binds"). **Diversity** `banned=[touch INPUT (~5√Ч), three.js + WebGL2-4√Ч OUTPUT, FAL-latent + real-piano + DSP-physical-modeling-treadmill + physics-sim TECHNIQUE, warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[**body/camera-pose INPUT** (starved depth-camera, jury's pick; love-aligned вАФ 104вЭ§пЄП/101вЭ§пЄП/234вЭ§пЄП) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh, dodges three.js + WebGL2) ¬Ј **explorable-harmony-map / IDW-morph TECHNIQUE** (lab-first, not a DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **tension-gradient-you-resolve-by-moving VIBE** (the jury's exact #1 ask)]` вАФ no banned tag. **Love signal:** camera-driven kids pieces are loved (`104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП, `101-camera-song`вЭ§пЄП, `234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП) вАФ additive backing for body-navigation; the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire (one Sound-Map concept, three navigation inputs): siblings `494-kids-weather-walk` (drag baseline вАФ lost on the banned touch input) + `495-kids-singing-valley` (voiceвЖТXY via hand-written YIN вАФ strong, banked) are complete build-reviewed implementations in IDEAS ¬І384. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/493-kids-feeling-forest` 5.91 kB prerendered static), NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio/GPU in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether MediaPipe pose tracks a small child held close (HandLandmarker may track better вАФ flagged for cycle 2); whether the dissonantвЖТconsonant gradient *reads* on phone speakers behind the limiter; whether a 4yo connects body-motion to the sound; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + MediaPipe Blob/WASM load. The always-on auto-demo + drag fallback are the safety nets so absent camera never blocks the 06:30 demo.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/493-kids-feeling-forest/README.md`

### [496-voyager-room](/dream/496-voyager-room) ¬Ј adults / live performance ¬Ј cycle 385 ¬Ј demoable
  **You don't play notes вАФ you CONDUCT a room of five autonomous machine musicians who listen to each other and to you, leaning the collective harmony into deliberate dissonance and releasing it back to consonance.** Press **Start / Conduct the room** and five named agents are already improvising together: **VEGA** (Leader вАФ states the root motif), **LYRA** (Harmonist вАФ roughness-*minimizing*), **DRACO** (Provocateur вАФ roughness-*raising*, tritone/m2-biased, dial-weighted), **ECHO** (Follower вАФ imitates the loudest peer transposed, drawing the lit answering edge), **NEBULA** (Drifter вАФ whole-tone pad). You shape them with a **TENSION dial** (consonanceвЗДdissonance, the primary control), **TEMPO**, and **spotlight** (tap an orb to make it lead). All notes snap to **D dorian** so dissonance is always a *layered choice*, never noise. This is the lab's **first multi-agent autonomous machine-improviser ensemble** (every prior improviser вАФ 251/256/375/380/391/210/298 вАФ is a *single* partner that follows YOU; this is a room of agents with their own will that you conduct) and the new **Machine Ensemble / Voyager spine**, cycle 1.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5+): (1) **5 per-agent probabilistic generators** (`agents.ts`) вАФ each with its own personality bias, timbre (oscillator + partial set), stereo pan, color. (2) **Shared listening buffer** вАФ every due agent reads the *previous frame's* collective events. (3) **Real-time PlompвАУLevelt/Sethares sensory-roughness steering** (`roughness.ts`) вАФ each candidate note is scored by the predicted roughness *if it joined the currently-sounding partials*, then steered (softmax-sampled) toward the conductor's tension target; Harmonist pulls roughness down, Provocateur pushes it up. (4) **Frame-synchronous beat clock** вАФ agents emit in lock-step (StreamMUSE's frame-synchronous streaming inference, on-device). (5) **Conducting UI** + (6) **Canvas2D constellation** вАФ orbs size/brightness = activity, lit edges = imitation, center tension-ring (Resolved¬ЈSettling¬ЈTense¬ЈClashing) + live roughness, orbs sprout spikes when tense, beat pulse. Always-on **auto-conduct** runs a ~20 s settleвЖТbuildвЖТrelease arc so the room is alive hands-free on load. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture; audio-only graceful degrade if Canvas2D null. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **George Lewis, _Voyager_ (1980sвАУpresent)** вАФ the canonical autonomous machine-improviser "virtual orchestra" that listens and responds with its own musical will (the machines have agency; the human conducts a collective, not a tool). **StreamMUSE вАФ "Real-Time Language Model Jamming: A Case Study for Live Music Accompaniment Generation," Bowen Zheng et al., arXiv 2606.11886 (submitted 2026-06-10)** вАФ *frame-synchronous streaming inference*, implemented on-device as the lock-step generation loop. **Plomp & Levelt 1965 / Sethares 1998** вАФ the sensory-roughness model. Born from RESEARCH ¬І385 (the dive *implemented* a <14-day finding and logged two negative results: the JURY-flagged WebRTC-multi-user lane is *occupied* by 319/334/341 BroadcastChannel collab, and the responsive-accompanist lane is *saturated* вАФ both rejected as "too similar" traps, triangulating onto the genuine gap). **Ambition 5/5:** **#1** never-used technique (multi-agent autonomous machine-improviser ensemble you conduct вАФ grep-clean) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (5+) + **#3** named refs (Voyager / StreamMUSE / PlompвАУLeveltвАУSethares) + **#4** multi-cycle (Machine Ensemble spine cycle 1) + **#5** binds a <14-day finding (StreamMUSE 2026-06-10 вАФ implemented, not cited). The window's 2nd 5/5. **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** **#1** genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (conduct the dial вАФ never a pre-baked cadence; breaks the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture) ¬Ј **#3** bans three.js (Canvas2D) and picks a fresh non-saturated direction. **Diversity** `banned=[three.js / AI-image-FAL / real-piano / DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim / warm-consonant-resolves] ¬Ј picked=[**conductor-gesture INPUT** (dial/tap вАФ fresh) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (dodges three.js + WebGL2-4√Ч count) ¬Ј **multi-agent-autonomous-improvisation TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **tension-you-conduct-and-resolve VIBE** (the JURY's exact #1 ask)]` вАФ no banned tag. **Love signal:** `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП (a-life agents) + `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП softly back an autonomous-agent ensemble; additive, the JURY + gates governed. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-agent-brain adult fire (one concept, three machine-ensemble brains): siblings `497-call-ring` (ring-canon of imitation, SPREAD knob, Canvas2D) + `498-swarm-score` (48-agent circle-of-fifths consensus + tritone dissidents, WebGL2) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І385 as the spine's cycle-2/3 candidates. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/496-voyager-room` in `app-paths-manifest.json`; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the tension dial *audibly* swings consonanceвЖФdissonance at typical chord density (roughness-normalization constants are empirical, may need a numeric tweak); the by-ear balance of the five voices (saw/square brightness, drifter pad level); `setTimeout`-chained clock jitter under load; phone tap-to-spotlight ergonomics; iOS audio-unlock. Auto-conduct + audio-only degrade are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always makes evolving sound.

### [500-kids-aurora-tilt](/dream/500-kids-aurora-tilt) ¬Ј kids (4+) ¬Ј cycle 386 ¬Ј demoable
  **Tilt a tablet to bend a glowing aurora вАФ tilt it far and the sky goes tense, shimmery and electric-violet; hold it flat and still and the lights widen, warm, and the music resolves home. The child holds all the tension in their hands and chooses, at any moment, to let it go.** A kids piece whose whole subject is **tension the listener resolves *through action*** (the jury's exact #1 ask) вАФ embodied as the simplest possible gesture: level the device. No reading, no menus, no "right answer"; just a beautiful sky that calms when you hold steady.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): (1) **device-tilt / gyro input** вАФ `deviceorientation` (`beta`/`gamma`), one-pole smoothed (ќ±=0.08), iOS 13+ `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` called inside the Start gesture; denied/missing вЖТ **pointer-drag fallback** (drag sets virtual ќ≤/ќ≥). (2) **WebGL2 domain-warp aurora shader** вАФ raw GLSL ES 3.00 full-screen fragment shader using I√±igo Quilez's recursive `fbm(p + fbm(p + fbm(p)))` domain-warp; three aurora layers + wisps whose fold sharpness, flow speed, fBm octave count (3вЖТ6), lacunarity and palette (warm-green/teal вЖТ electric violet/magenta) all scale with tension; deep-indigo sky + deterministic star field; rendered at 65% DPR for perf; WebGL2-absent вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + audio continues. (3) **evolving modal pad synth** вАФ four sine+triangle voice pairs that voice-lead from an open-fifth+octave home voicing (C3 G3 C4 G4) to a sus4/add9 "yearning but never ugly" tense voicing (C3 F3 D4 BвЩ≠4) via `setTargetAtTime`, with tilt-scaled tremolo depth/rate on the upper voices; DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter (вИТ6 dB, 20:1) + 8.8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext created inside the Start gesture. (4) **tilt-tension engine** вАФ `tension = clamp(вИЪ(ќ≤¬≤+ќ≥¬≤)/45¬∞, 0, 1)` from the smoothed 2-D tilt vector, fed every frame to BOTH the shader uniforms and the audio params so visual and harmonic tension move as one. (5) **always-on auto-demo** вАФ a hands-free Lissajous wander (`sin(t¬Ј0.31)¬Ј28¬∞`, `sin(t¬Ј0.19+1.2)¬Ј22¬∞`) drives the aurora + music on load with **zero permissions**, cancelled on the first real tilt/drag вАФ so a no-touch 06:30 phone glance always shows it singing and moving. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client-side Web Audio + WebGL2 вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  Reference: **I√±igo Quilez, "Domain Warping"** (iquilezles.org/articles/warp) вАФ the recursive `fbm(p + fbm(p + fbm(p)))` technique that yields organic curtain/cloud structure; the visual metaphor echoes real aurora-borealis physics (charged particles folded along magnetic field lines). Born from RESEARCH ¬І386 (the dive's honest meta-finding: at ~360 prototypes the lab has exhausted easy all-time kids #1-lab-firsts, so the floor is cleared via #2+#3 and the cycle competes on surprise + diversity + execution). **Ambition 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named reference (iq Domain Warping). (#1 NOT claimed вАФ domain warping / tilt / aurora all exist in the lab individually; the fresh element is the *tilt-as-tension-dial resolve-by-leveling* interaction, an interaction pattern, not a new primitive вАФ honest. #5 NOT claimed вАФ ref is foundational, no <14-day binding.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** **#1** genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (level the device вАФ never a pre-baked cadence; opposite of the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture) ¬Ј **#3** bans three.js (raw WebGL2) and dodges the count-banned Canvas2D (4√Ч last-10). **Diversity** `banned=[touch INPUT; Canvas2D-4√Ч + three.js OUTPUT; AI-image/FAL + real-piano + DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim TECH; warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[**device-tilt/gyro INPUT** (fresh, 0√Ч last-10) ¬Ј **WebGL2-shader OUTPUT** (2√Ч last-10, dodges Canvas2D + three.js) ¬Ј **domain-warp-aurora + tilt-tension TECH** ¬Ј **tension-by-tilt-resolved-by-leveling VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вАФ no banned tag. **Love signal:** `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП (aurora palette) + `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП (tilt input) softly back the pick; additive вАФ the gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer kids fire** (three orthogonal fresh-tag directions): siblings `499-kids-sky-bells` (the **real live sky singing** вАФ Open-Meteo weather вЖТ WebGL2 soundscape; highest surprise + the starved real-world-data menu category, but observational tension вЖТ better as an adult/all-ages piece) + `501-kids-hum-garden` (bloom an SVG flower by humming **steadily**, not on-target вАФ freshest resolution mechanic, but child-voice YIN unverified) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І386. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/500-kids-aurora-tilt` prerendered static 6.03 kB; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean вАФ one react-hooks/exhaustive-deps ref-cleanup warning fixed via `const live = liveRef.current`), NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/gyro/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the 3-layer domain-warp aurora (~72 noise evals/px, 65% DPR) holds вЙ•30 fps on an older mobile GPU; whether `deviceorientation` + iOS `requestPermission` works on Karel's review phone (pointer-drag + auto-demo cover no-gyro); whether the chord *audibly* swings homeвЖФtense behind the limiter on phone speakers; the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. Auto-demo (no permission) + drag fallback + WebGL2-absent audio-only are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always shows evolving sound + light.

### [502-atmosphere-veil](/dream/502-atmosphere-veil) ¬Ј adults / ambient / live data ¬Ј cycle 387 ¬Ј demoable
  **The entire planet's *live* weather, breathing as one sustained, unresolved chord вАФ and the dissonance only relaxes when the real sky calms, never on a timer, never on a tap.** A long-form (8+ minute), ever-evolving ADULT ambient instrument. Press **Start** once (AudioContext gesture) and leave it: a sustained spectral drone breathes under a WebGPU compute-driven field of ~60,000 particles riding a global wind field, and **both** the harmonic tension and the visual turbulence track the same scalar вАФ **global atmospheric instability** read live from the real weather. This is **cycle 3 of the Living Earth spine** (earthquakes вЖТ space-weather вЖТ atmosphere; after `463-terra-gamelan` and `471-helios-orbit`).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **live real-world-data engine** (`weather.ts`) вАФ ONE batched Open-Meteo request for 12 globe-spanning cities (London/NY/Tokyo/Sydney/Moscow/Singapore/S√£o Paulo/Mexico City/Delhi/Nairobi/Reykjav√≠k/Ushuaia), polled every 75 s, fetched directly client-side (no API route, no secret), with previous-poll pressure memory so a **falling barometer** (the classic building-storm tell) adds tension; per-city instability = wind(0.40) + low/falling-pressure(0.35 +0.25 bonus) + cloud(0.25); global tension = 0.6¬Јmean + 0.4¬Јpeak so one violent storm reads against a calm planet. (2) **sustained-tension drone synth** (`audio.ts`) вАФ open fifths+octaves (just-intonation ratios) at rest; as tension rises, partials detune into audible **beating** (¬±14¬Ґ), **tension tones** (m2 16/15, tritone 45/32, b9) fade in on a quadratic curve, and a roughness tremolo deepens; relaxation is **asymmetric** (rises faster than it falls) and the smoother only ever moves toward the data's value вАФ **no scheduled cadence anywhere**. (3) **WebGPU compute particle field** (`gpu.ts`) вАФ a compute shader advects ~60k particles through 12 city "vortices" (swirl вИЭ instability) + tension-scaled value-noise turbulence; speed/turbulence/color-temp (cool indigo вЖТ warm amber/rose) all climb with tension; `navigator.gpu` absent вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D dot-field fallback driven by the same wind model, audio always continues. (4) **long-form memory** вАФ the tonal center drifts ¬±70¬Ґ on a very slow sinusoid and a voicing-mutation phase slowly re-weights the partials, so **minute 8 differs from minute 1** even at identical tension; it never loops. Plus an **always-on synthetic-weather auto-demo** (per-city sinusoids + a low-pressure system that drifts across and wraps the planet) that drives sound + light from the first frame and on any fetch failure, with an honest `LIVE`вЖФ`DEMO DATA` HUD вАФ so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows it evolving. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вИТ6 dB / 12:1) + вЙ§0.5 master gain, 4 s fade-in (intentionally quiet). **No API route, no `guard`** (Open-Meteo fetched directly from the client; no mic, camera, or secrets). No new npm deps (`@webgpu/types` is existing dev-only typings).

  Reference: **√Йliane Radigue** (ARP-2500 works вАФ *Trilogie de la Mort*, *Adnos* вАФ where slow sustained tones' beating interference patterns *are* the music; this borrows that beating-as-tension language) + spectral-tradition thinking after **G√©rard Grisey** (*Partiels* вАФ consonance/dissonance as a continuous instability-driven axis, not chord changes). **Ambition 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4, above) + **#4** multi-cycle (Living Earth spine cycle 3). (#1 NOT claimed вАФ WebGPU, long-form, and external-API sonification all already exist in the lab individually; the fresh element is *atmosphere-as-sustained-tension*, a concept not a new primitive вАФ honest. #5 NOT claimed вАФ today's arxiv cs.SD (Jun 11) is server-side ML only, nothing client-implementable; said plainly rather than gamed.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** brings genuine **sustained, unresolved harmonic tension the data resolves** (breaks the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture вАФ provocation #1) ¬Ј **deepens an existing spine** instead of farming a new DSP primitive (provocation #2) ¬Ј picks the **starved real-world-data input** and the **starved WebGPU output** (1√Ч in the window), explicitly dodging the banned three.js + the over-represented raw-WebGL2 (4√Ч) + Canvas2D (4√Ч) (provocation #3). **Diversity** `banned=[touch + real-piano INPUT; three.js + Canvas2D-4√Ч + raw-WebGL2-4√Ч OUTPUT; AI-image/FAL + physics-sim + DSP-physical-modeling-first TECH; warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[**live-weather-API INPUT** (real-world-data, starved menu category) ¬Ј **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (starved 1√Ч, dodges three.js/WebGL2/Canvas2D) ¬Ј **live-data-sonification + spectral-tension TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **sustained-unresolved-atmospheric-tension-the-data-resolves VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вАФ no banned tag. **Love signal:** `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП (atmospheric particle palette) + `233-earth-pulse`/`314-solar-wind` lineage softly back a planetary-data particle field; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach adult fire** (one atmosphere concept, three renderers): siblings `503-atmosphere-front` (WebGL2 raymarched **volumetric storm-clouds** + lightning-on-rise вАФ lost on the diversity audit, WebGL2 over-represented) + `504-atmosphere-isobar` (Canvas2D **isobar/pressure-gradient instrument**, Ikeda data-grid вАФ the most rigorous dataвЖТtension math but rendered in banned Canvas2D) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І387. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/502-atmosphere-veil` prerendered; folder `tsc`+`eslint` clean per builder), NOT browser-verified** (no WebGPU/audio/network in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the WGSL compute/render pipelines compile + run on a real WebGPU device (binding layouts/vertex strides may need a first-run tweak; Canvas2D fallback covers WebGPU-absent); whether Open-Meteo's live payload shape + CORS resolve from Karel's browser (synthetic auto-demo covers fetch failure); whether the instability thresholds (tuned on m/s) read as a real calmвЖФstorm arc against live values; whether the drone *audibly* swings consonanceвЖФdissonance behind the limiter; the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. Synthetic auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback + audio-only degrade are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always shows evolving sound + light.

### [505-kids-pulse-bridge](/dream/505-kids-pulse-bridge) ¬Ј kids (4+) ¬Ј cycle 388 ¬Ј demoable
  **The music can only resolve home when two children tap *together* вАФ when their two separate pulses lock into the same shared rhythm, a bridge of light completes between them and the chord blooms warm.** The screen splits into two giant tap-pads (warm **gold** left, cool **teal** right), one child per side. Each taps a steady beat; a glowing ring blooms on every tap. Out of sync, the two voices hold a yearning major-2nd and the bridge between the halves is broken into separate sparks вАФ *not wrong, just "not yet together."* As the two players lock into the same rhythm, the voices voice-lead home to a warm open fifth, the bridge completes into a continuous glowing arc, and fireflies stream across it. There is **no wrong move and no fail state** вАФ out of sync is "not yet," in sync is "together вЬ®." This is the lab's **first piece where synchrony *between two humans* gates the harmonic resolution** (every prior two-finger kids piece вАФ `484-two-suns` spatial blend, `489-pond-pair` energy transfer вАФ maps the fingers independently; none measures whether the two players are *in time with each other*), and cycle 1 of the new **"Together" spine**.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): (1) **dual pointer tracking** вАФ Pointer-Events `pointerId` + pointer-capture so two fingers on two halves register simultaneously; each side's recent inter-tap intervals вЖТ a mean tempo. (2) **synchrony engine** вАФ each player is a phase oscillator `ѕЖ(t) = 2ѕА¬Ј((tвИТlastTap) mod ITV)/ITV`; the **Kuramoto order parameter** `R = |ќ£ exp(i¬Ј(ѕЖ_LвИТѕЖ_R))| / N` over a sliding window measures phase lock, gated by a tempo-similarity factor (penalised above 1.25√Ч) and compressed `R^0.65` so partial sync still feels good, then **asymmetrically smoothed** (ѕД_rise 1.8 s / ѕД_fall 3.2 s) so a lock must be *sustained* but a single late tap doesn't collapse it. (3) **adaptive voice-leading synth** вАФ two pluck voices `setTargetAtTime`-glide from a yearning A3/B3 major-2nd toward a warm C4/G4 open fifth **as synchrony rises**, with a CвАУEвАУG arrival shimmer on the lock-threshold crossing; a C2+G2 ambient pad always underneath so it's never silent. (4) **Canvas2D bridge + firefly renderer** вАФ a cubic-bezier light bridge broken/dim at low sync вЖТ continuous glowing arc with particles flowing across + warm radial bloom at lock; expanding tap rings. (5) **26 s auto-demo** вАФ two simulated tappers walk an apartвЖТconvergingвЖТlockedвЖТdrifting arc driving all subsystems hands-free on load (cancels on first real tap), so a no-touch 06:30 glance always shows a completing bridge. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + вЙ§9 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock); Canvas2D-null вЖТ audio continues + `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **The Moving Mandala** (Carreras et al., *Int. J. of Clinical and Health Psychology*, 2025вАУ26) вАФ rhythmic music as a *temporal scaffold* for child interpersonal synchrony and prosocial closeness; the finding that *shared rhythmic entrainment promotes felt closeness between children* is exactly why lock-in (not a score, not a reward) is the resolution here. **"Finding Our Tempo: Exploring Embodied Synchrony Through Full-Body Play in Children"** (TEI 2026) вАФ synchrony must be *felt, not read*. Born from RESEARCH ¬І388 (the dive's convergent 2025вАУ26 finding that two children coming into sync is the highest-value musical interaction for them). **Ambition 4/5**: **#1** never-used technique (interpersonal two-human synchrony / Kuramoto phase-coupling gating resolution вАФ grep-clean) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Moving Mandala / Finding Our Tempo) + **#4** multi-cycle ("Together" spine cycle 1). (#5 NOT claimed вАФ the cited papers are weeksвАУmonths old, not <14 days; said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** genuine tension the players resolve **through action** (playing in time together вАФ never a pre-baked cadence; the resolution is withheld until synchrony, breaking the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture) and dodges the banned three.js. **Diversity** `banned=[three.js OUTPUT ¬Ј AI-image/FAL + DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim TECH ¬Ј real-piano INPUT ¬Ј warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[**two-child-multitouch-tap INPUT** (fresh, 0√Ч last-10) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (not in the hard-ban list) ¬Ј **interpersonal-synchrony/Kuramoto TECH** (fresh, not a DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **prosocial-tension-resolved-by-playing-TOGETHER VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вАФ no hard-ban tag. **Love signal:** `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП + `98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП (embodied/rhythmic kids play) softly back a two-player rhythmic-synchrony piece; additive вАФ the gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach kids fire** (one "Together" concept, three synchrony inputs): siblings `506-kids-orbit-meet` (continuous **motion**-phase Kuramoto orbits вЖТ braided mandala) + `507-kids-hum-meet` (**voice**-pitch-lock to a virtual partner via child-tuned YIN, in SVG) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І388. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/505-kids-pulse-bridge` prerendered static 5.44 kB, in `app-paths-manifest`), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/multitouch in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the 0.82 lock-threshold is reachable by a real 4-year-old's ¬±300 ms timing jitter (the 0.65 compressive curve + 25% tempo tolerance + 3-tap window may need loosening); by-ear balance of major-2nd tension vs open-fifth resolution; two-children-one-phone ergonomics (designed for iPad вАФ each half вЙИ45 mm on a 6" phone); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. The 26 s permission-free auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 demo always shows a completing bridge + evolving sound.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/505-kids-pulse-bridge/README.md`

### [508-accord-call](/dream/508-accord-call) ¬Ј adults / multi-user / live ¬Ј cycle 389 ¬Ј demoable
  **Two people in different places, each holding one voice вАФ and the harmony resolves only when *both* move toward agreement, over a real peer-to-peer connection with no server in the middle.** Each browser is one continuous voice (vertical pointer-drag sets pitch in a ~130вАУ520 Hz just-intonation field); each sends its pitch over an `RTCDataChannel` ~20√Ч/s and synthesizes BOTH voices locally. The **PlompвАУLevelt / Sethares sensory-roughness** between the two voices drives everything: far from a consonant interval = audible beating + a jagged red "tension cord"; cooperate into unison/fourth/fifth/third/octave = the roughness drops, a shimmer pad blooms, and the cord becomes a smooth golden arc. **Neither player can resolve it alone** вАФ the resolution is literally inaccessible to one will. This is the lab's **first true WebRTC peer-to-peer piece** (grep-verified: `RTCPeerConnection`/`createOffer`/`setRemoteDescription` appear in zero prior prototypes вАФ the existing "collab" pieces 319/334/341 are same-origin **BroadcastChannel**, not a real peer connection), and **cycle 2 of the "Together" spine** (388's two-children-in-sync, now crossed from one-device-two-fingers to two-people-two-cities).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **WebRTC P2P signaling** (`webrtc.ts`) вАФ pure `RTCPeerConnection`, no server/relay/WebSocket: "Create room" вЖТ `createOffer` вЖТ wait for ICE-gathering-complete (8 s cap) вЖТ copyable SDP blob; peer `joinRoom(offer)` вЖТ `createAnswer` вЖТ copyable answer blob; creator `receiveAnswer` completes the handshake. STUN `stun:stun.l.google.com:19302`; an **unreliable, unordered** `RTCDataChannel` carries `{pitch:0..1}` at ~20 Hz (UDP-like, drops stale frames instead of queueing). (2) **dual-voice Web Audio synth** (`audio.ts`) вАФ two 5-partial harmonic voices (1/k amplitudes) with stereo pan + slow tremolo; a 4-sine shimmer pad blooms via `shimmerGain` as consonance rises; `setVoicePitch` ramps via `setTargetAtTime`; `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вЙИ вИТ6 dB) on master; `AudioContext` created inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (3) **PlompвАУLevelt/Sethares roughness model** (`roughness.ts`) вАФ pairwise partial roughness `r = aвВБaвВВ(e^(вИТbвВБ¬Јs¬Јdf) вИТ e^(вИТbвВВ¬Јs¬Јdf))`, `s = 0.24/(0.0207¬ЈfMin + 18.96)`, summed over both harmonic series and normalized 0..1; physically grounded, not an aesthetic heuristic. (4) **SVG renderer + rAF loop** (`page.tsx`) вАФ two glowing orbs (yours warm-gold, theirs cool-teal) positioned by pitch, a tension cord that morphs jagged-redвЖФsmooth-gold, ambient glow filters; attributes updated directly in a requestAnimationFrame loop (no React re-render). **Always-on practice partner:** on load / whenever no peer is connected, a simulated bot voice wanders and drifts toward consonant JI ratios 60% of the time so a SOLO visitor (and the hands-free 06:30 glance) hears + sees the full dissonanceвЖТconsonance arc with zero setup; labeled honestly ("practice partner вАФ no one's connected yet") and yields the instant a real peer's data channel opens. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG + P2P data channel вАФ no mic, camera, server, or secrets; the only network is the STUN handshake + the direct peer link). No new npm deps.

  References: **Plomp, R. & Levelt, W. J. M. (1965)**, "Tonal consonance and critical bandwidth," *JASA* 38(4) ¬Ј **Sethares, W. A. (1998)**, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (the roughness formulation) ¬Ј **Pauline Oliveros, *Deep Listening* (1988/2005)** вАФ mutual, attentive sonic negotiation between players across space as the conceptual spine. Born from RESEARCH ¬І389 (the dive's honest cs.SD meta-finding вАФ this week's audio ML is server-side only, so #5 is unclaimable вАФ pivoted to the platform read: WebRTC is now native across >85% of browsers, and the JURY 2026-06-10 named WebRTC-multi-user as the 0√Ч starved input in both provocations #3 and #5). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (true WebRTC `RTCPeerConnection` P2P вАФ grep-verified lab-first; BroadcastChannel вЙ† peer connection) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4, above) + **#4** multi-cycle ("Together" spine cycle 2). (#3 named refs are foundational not the claim's backbone here; #5 NOT claimed вАФ no <14-day finding implemented, said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** genuine **tension the players resolve through action** (cooperate into consonance over the network вАФ never a pre-baked cadence; breaks the 15√Ч warm-consonant monoculture) ¬Ј **deepens an existing spine** instead of farming a new DSP primitive (provocation #2) ¬Ј picks the **explicitly-named starved input** WebRTC-multi-user (provocations #3 + #5) ¬Ј bans three.js (SVG output). **Diversity** `banned=[touch + real-piano INPUT; three.js + Canvas2D-4√Ч + raw-WebGL2-4√Ч OUTPUT; AI-image/FAL + DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim TECH; warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[**WebRTC-peer INPUT** (0√Ч starved, jury-named) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (fresh, dodges three.js/Canvas2D/WebGL2) ¬Ј **P2P-negotiated-roughness TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **dissonant-until-you-both-agree VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вАФ no banned tag. **Love signal:** `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП (multi-agent interaction) + the embodied/together kids loves (`83`/`98`) softly back a two-human cooperative piece; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (three orthogonal directions, each hitting a *different* jury-named starved menu category): siblings `509-spectral-loom` (**Web MIDI** keyboard вЖТ a long-form **WebGPU** "loom" of harmonic threads that sour toward dissonance unless you keep tending them; Grisey *Partiels* вАФ the long-form-evolving-adult + MIDI menu category) + `510-the-withholding` (a **conceptual/critical, non-screen** piece whose suspension resolves only when you set the phone down and give it sustained **stillness** вАФ mic-quiet + motion stillness; Cage/Lucier/Radigue) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS ¬І389. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/508-accord-call` prerendered static 7.37 kB / 110 kB First Load; two trivial lint fixes applied вАФ unescaped quotes вЖТ `&ldquo;`/`&rdquo;`, removed an unused `eslint-disable`), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio / second peer / network in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether STUN traversal opens the data channel on Karel's network (strict symmetric NAT would need a TURN server вАФ the practice-partner bot covers the no-peer case for the demo); whether the dissonanceвЖТconsonance arc *audibly* reads behind the вИТ6 dB limiter on phone speakers; the fixed shimmer-pad frequencies (262/330/392/523) can mildly beat against non-C settling points; the SVG `preserveAspectRatio="none"` stretch on extreme aspect ratios; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. The always-on labeled practice partner is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows + hears the full arc with no second device.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/508-accord-call/README.md`

### [537-kids-sky-murmuration](/dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration) ¬Ј kids (4+) ¬Ј cycle 398 ¬Ј demoable
  **Look UP into a deep 3D dusk sky where a real murmuration of thousands of glowing starlings swirls in volumetric depth вАФ and the murmuration SINGS; a finger gently shepherds it, and when the cloud splits into sub-flocks you HEAR it split into harmony, resolving back to a chord when it re-merges.** A living weather of birds you stand under вАФ joyful, awe, no score, no wrong move. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one singing-murmuration concept on three renderers).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): (1) **3D boids flock engine** (`flock.ts`) вАФ Craig Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion in 3D with spatial-hash neighbour lookups (capped neighbour checks) + boundary avoidance, ~2.5вАУ4k agents in typed `Float32Array`s. (2) **spatial clustering** (`computeClusters`) вАФ grid-bucket detection of up to 4 sub-flocks every ~200 ms. (3) **emergent-state вЖТ harmony sonification** (`audio.ts`) вАФ cohesion/alignment-order вЖТ harmonic richness & consonance; centroid height (Y) вЖТ C-major-pentatonic register; each cluster sustains its OWN pentatonic voice so a **split is audible as a new interval and a merge resolves toward unison/octave**; mean speed/turbulence вЖТ gentle tremolo + airy wash; always-on C2+G2 pad; master `gain вЖТ lowpass(8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 18:1) вЖТ destination`, all `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **three.js volumetric render** вАФ one `THREE.Points` cloud, additive blending + soft sprite, depth-coded colour (near-warm/far-violet), `ExpFog`, a slowly drifting camera so depth reads; geometry/material disposed on unmount. (5) **ghost-shepherd auto-demo** вАФ a scripted 3D attractor wanders a Lissajous path and a second attractor phases in/out on a ~12 s cycle so the cloud **divides into harmonising flocks and re-merges from frame one with zero permission**; cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle. Touch = a soft 3D attractor the murmuration swirls toward (single + multi-touch вЖТ split). **Degradation:** three.js/WebGL context fail вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D 2D dot-flock (CPU boids ~300) that still flocks + sings; audio always continues. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вАФ no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally вАФ not via CDN, not added).

  References: **Craig Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds and Schools: A Distributed Behavioral Model," SIGGRAPH 1987** (the canonical boids rules); **starling-murmuration collective-motion science** (Cavagna et al., *Scale-free correlations in starling flocks*, PNAS 2010). Born from RESEARCH ¬І398 (cs.SD this window = server-side ML вЖТ #5 unclaimable; a grep-audit confirmed the easy kids #1s are spent at ~360 prototypes вАФ TF.js/Hands/FaceLandmarker/Pose/WebGPU/AudioWorklet/GPU-fluid/boids all taken вАФ so the honest move is a *bigger, more diverse* concept on the *scarcest renderer*). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Reynolds 1987 / Cavagna PNAS 2010) + **#4** multi-cycle ("living flock that sings" spine cycle 1). (#1 NOT cleanly claimed вАФ flocking already exists in the lab; the fresh element is *emergent-collective-flock-state-as-a-harmony-instrument, at scale, for kids* вАФ an interaction/sonification pattern, not a clean 0√Ч primitive, said plainly. #5 NOT claimed вАФ cs.SD is server-ML.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вЙ•4√Ч)=["solitary-never-resolves" VIBE] ¬Ј also-avoid (wouldвЖТ4√Ч)=[Canvas2D + SVG OUTPUT] ¬Ј picked=[**touch/multi-touch INPUT** ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer at 0√Ч вЖТ hardest diversification; iPad-safe where WebGPU isn't; dodges the Canvas2D/SVG 4√Ч trap) ¬Ј **emergent-3D-boids вЖТ collective-harmony TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) ¬Ј **joyful/awe/wonder VIBE** вАФ neither banned pole]` вАФ no banned tag; deliberately steers OFF yesterday's drawing-ML theme (529) so the kids set isn't two "draw вЖТ magic ML" pieces back to back. **Love signal:** Karel's loved particle/glowing-swarm lane (`130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП, `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `262-aurora-particle`вЭ§пЄП) вАФ a singing murmuration of light at scale; additive, the kids/ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `535-kids-starling-choir` (raw WebGL2 transform-feedback GPU boids ~2.5k вАФ the technical-scale resurrect) + `536-kids-lantern-shoal` (Canvas2D friendly-character shoal вАФ the best 4yo legibility, lost only on the Canvas2D-4√Ч diversity gate) banked in IDEAS ¬І398. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 83s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (434/434)`, `/dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration 6.21 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static вАФ the First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes), **NOT browser-verified** (no three.js/WebGL/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether 2вАУ4 simultaneous cluster voices read as an audibly distinct *splitвЖТmerge* on a phone speaker behind the limiter (the cluster threshold may need tuning вАФ the key thing to check live); ~2.5вАУ4k `THREE.Points` + per-frame CPU boids holding вЙ•30 fps on an older iPad (Canvas2D ~300-agent fallback covers the worst case); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; whether the slow camera drift gives enough parallax for 3D depth on a small phone. The ghost-shepherd auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a swirling, singing, splitting murmuration.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration/README.md`

### [538-xenharmonic-lattice](/dream/538-xenharmonic-lattice) ¬Ј adults / microtonal / cerebral ¬Ј cycle 399 ¬Ј demoable
  **Wander a tuning system the piano can't play вАФ a navigable harmonic lattice in 5-limit Just Intonation, BohlenвАУPierce (the non-octave 3:1 tritave), and 19-EDO, where the tension lives in the TUNING itself, not in beating partials.** Drag across an SVG Tonnetz; each node sounds an EXACT rational-ratio pitch (no 12-TET rounding) via a 4-partial luminous synth. JI chords lock in eerily pure; the syntonic-comma "pump" drifts the pitch around a loop; **BohlenвАУPierce refuses Western resolution entirely**; 19-EDO sits in the uncanny valley. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire.
