  Subsystems / tech: SVG vector Tonnetz (9√Ч7 / 7√Ч5 / 9√Ч5 node grids, indigo/violet edges, active-node glow, draggable pan) ¬Ј exact-ratio Web Audio synthesis (`freq = baseHz √Ч uRatio^u √Ч vRatio^v`; partials [1,2,3,5]√Ч; master `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ6 dB, 16:1) вЖТ destination`) ¬Ј three tuning systems in `tuning.ts` (5-JI on 3/2 √Ч 5/4; BP on 7/3 √Ч 5/3 over the 3:1 tritave; 19-EDO on 2^(3/19) √Ч 2^(5/19)) ¬Ј **ghost-finger auto-demo** walks a curated path (the 5-JI path is literally a comma loop) sounding nodes from first load with zero permission, cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no permissions** (pure client SVG + Web Audio вАФ no mic/camera/network/secrets).

  References: **Heinz Bohlen & John R. Pierce** (the non-octave BohlenвАУPierce scale, 3:1 tritave / odd-harmonic 3:5:7:9); **Erv Wilson** (pitch lattices); **Harry Partch** *Genesis of a Music* (43-tone JI, tonality diamond); **Leonhard Euler** (the original Tonnetz, 1739). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І399** (the 2026 microtonal-tooling wave вАФ Microtone Fox May-2026 gallery, Microtonal Fabric, Entonal Studio вАФ a <30-day dive bound directly into the build). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (xenharmonic *tuning-space instrument* вАФ BohlenвАУPierce / Tonnetz-lattice / 19-EDO all grep-verified 0√Ч prior; JI *ratios* alone appeared only as a chord detail at 456/397, never as a navigable lattice вАФ framed honestly) + **#3** named refs (Bohlen/Pierce/Wilson/Partch/Euler) + **#5** binds a <14-day RESEARCH ¬І399 finding (the 2026 microtonal wave). Directly answers **JURY 2026-06-11 provocation #1 verbatim** ("tension that lives in TUNING, not beating partials вАФ BohlenвАУPierce, 19-TET"), and also hits jury #2 (BP *refuses* resolution), #3 (SVG, not Canvas2D), #5 (one lattice you explore вАФ not "two parties negotiating"). **Diversity** `banned/over-rep (rolling-10)=[kids-joyful VIBE вЙ•4 ¬Ј Canvas2D & WebGL2 OUTPUT ~3 each ¬Ј touch INPUT] ¬Ј picked=[**pointer/drag INPUT** ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (fresh вАФ dodges the Canvas2D/WebGL2 crowding) ¬Ј **xenharmonic-exact-ratio-tuning TECH** (lab-first, not a roughness-engine reuse) ¬Ј **cerebral/microtonal/luminous-restrained VIBE** вАФ not kids, not warm-resolve, not two-party]` вАФ no over-represented tag. **Love signal:** none directly applicable (microtonal is a new lane); the ambition/diversity/jury gates governed. Siblings `539-tremor-globe` (live USGS earthquake sonification on a three.js globe вАФ lost: its "first data-sonification" #1 is false, 4+ priors incl. 337) + `540-slime-cantor` (WebGPU Physarum вАФ lost: incomplete build + 327-physarum-choir already exists) banked in IDEAS ¬І399. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 66s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (435/435)`, `/dream/538-xenharmonic-lattice 5.8 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: whether the ~21.5¬Ґ syntonic-comma drift is audible in a casual 10-s glance (it's genuine but subtle); whether BP's "alien" quality reads on a phone speaker behind the limiter; ghost-finger 1.4 s/step pacing (meditative vs sluggish); unlimited polyphony could click under stress (a max-8 voice cap is the suggested cycle-2 hardening); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture resume. The ghost-finger auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a lattice lighting up and sounding its alien intervals.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/538-xenharmonic-lattice/README.md`

### [545-motion-loom](/dream/545-motion-loom) ¬Ј adults / polytempo / cerebral ¬Ј cycle 401 ¬Ј demoable
  **The MOTION IN A ROOM conducts a Nancarrow polytempo canon вАФ the left and right halves of the camera each carry their own moving rhythm, extracted with NO machine learning (just optical motion energy), and because two real-world motions never lock to a clean tempo ratio, the canon drifts forever and cannot be made to agree.** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` (which was 5 autonomous voices at fixed irrational ratios) вАФ now the two master tempi are *conducted* by your body / the room, off the glass. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE conducted-canon concept, three input/render attacks).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **no-ML motion extraction** вАФ `getUserMedia` вЖТ hidden 64√Ч48 offscreen canvas вЖТ per-pixel luma frame-difference, accumulated separately for the LEFT half and RIGHT half of the frame (two "conductors"); one motion-energy scalar per half per frame, zero neural net / MediaPipe / WASM. (2) **tempo by autocorrelation** вАФ each half's motion-energy signal buffers ~6 s; mean-subtracted autocorrelation finds the dominant lag in the 40вАУ170 BPM band вЖТ BPM, smoothed (ѕДвЙИ1.5 s), **never quantized** so the two halves' tempi form an irrational ratio by default (the classic onset/tempo-induction self-similarity method, applied to optical motion rather than audio). (3) **polytempo canon engine** ("A Tale of Two Clocks," Chris Wilson 2013) вАФ 5 voices: voices 0вАУ1 locked to conductor A (√Ч1, √Ч1/вИЪ2), voices 2вАУ4 to conductor B (√Ч1, √Ч1/ѕЖ, √ЧѕЖ/2) вАФ two conducted masters spawn a 5-voice Nancarrow canon; 25 ms `setInterval` + 120 ms lookahead into `AudioContext.currentTime`, sample-accurate `osc.start(t)`; D-pentatonic across 2 octaves (zero harmonic tension вАФ all drama is metric); sine + 2.756√Ч inharmonic partial bell timbre; master `gain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, вИТ12 dBFS) вЖТ destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **three.js loom renderer** вАФ 5 glowing `THREE.Line` threads whose 201 vertices are sinusoidal waves phase-driven by each voice's running BPM (threads on different conductors visibly drift apart вАФ the visual drift IS the tempo drift); 160 pooled `THREE.Mesh` node-pulse spheres on beat-onsets (rise 5 ms / decay 1.8 s, no GC churn); slow ~90 s camera orbit; Ikeda-clinical violet/blue/emerald/cyan/purple on near-black (#020208); HTML overlay readouts "Left motion вЖТ X BPM / Right motion вЖТ Y BPM / ratio ZвА¶ вАФ never rational"; full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-motion auto-demo:** before any camera grant, two synthetic motion-energy signals at incommensurate rates (AвЙИ72, BвЙИ72вИЪ2вЙИ101.8 BPM) feed the same autocorrelator so the threads weave + drift from frame one with zero permission; audio after Start, pre-Start animates on `performance.now()`; the room takes over when motion is detected; ghost resumes after ~4 s still.

  References: **Conlon Nancarrow**, *Studies for Player Piano* вАФ tempo canons at irrational ratios; **Study No. 40 "Transcendental"** (the e:ѕА canon Kyle Gann says "probably never aligns," ganntrax.com). **Ryoji Ikeda** (the near-monochrome data-grid visual register). **Autocorrelation tempo-induction by self-similarity** (the classic onset/feature-function method), here applied to optical motion. Grounded in **spontaneous-motor-tempo science** (biorxiv 2025 "From Individual to Shared Tempo" / "Similarity in Spontaneous Tempo Impacts Flow вА¶ Joint Performance") вАФ each body's innate preferred tempo rarely matches another's, so the drift is a human condition, not just a math trick. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І401**. **Ambition 3/5 solid (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems ¬Ј #3 named refs ¬Ј #4 multi-cycle вАФ 514 polytempo spine, cycle 2), with an honest case for 4/5 via #1** вАФ *first tempo/rhythm EXTRACTION from camera motion* (optical-flow energy вЖТ autocorrelation вЖТ BPM): the lab has audio-onset/beat detection from the MIC (106-beat-cut, 147-kids-beat-pulse) and pitch-autocorrelation/YIN (507), but has **never derived a beat-RATE from visual motion** вАФ a genuine cross-modal first, flagged as application-level (not a brand-new primitive) so it discounts cleanly to 3/5 if the jury disagrees. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the freshest *relevant* findings (the biorxiv SMT papers) are ~9 months old, not <14 days; said plainly even after heeding the jury's "mine beyond cs.SD" and searching the motor-tempo + conducting-perception literature. **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 directly:** provocation #1 (take 514 to cycle 2 вАФ chase a 4/5 above the floor) + provocation #4 (a conducted tempo-canon where gestures set incommensurable tempi вАФ the SECOND time-tension piece, now embodied). **Diversity** `banned (jury rolling-15)=[WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**camera-motion INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger; NOT ML) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч, the scarcest non-banned renderer вАФ and crucially NOT SVG, which a sibling would have pushed to 4√Ч) ¬Ј **motionвЖТautocorr-tempoвЖТpolytempo-canon TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU-drone) ¬Ј **cerebral / Ikeda-clinical / metric-tension VIBE** вАФ NOT calm-sensory-kids]` вАФ clean on every jury ban. **Love signal:** none directly (polytempo/time-tension is a cerebral lane); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe **Hands** two-hand conducting вЖТ **SVG** scrolling loom вАФ the precision/continuity resurrect, complete + clean, lost on the diversity audit because SVG is already 3√Ч and a ship would make it 4√Ч) + `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe **Pose** full-body two-arm conducting вЖТ **SVG orbital phase-clock** idiom, dots that sweep and never realign вАФ complete, the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect) banked in IDEAS ¬І401. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 105s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (437/437)`, `/dream/545-motion-loom 5.71 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static вАФ the First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes; builder reported `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors + `eslint --max-warnings=0` clean on the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: (a) **whether autocorrelation on REAL room motion yields a musically-meaningful tempo** вАФ the autocorrelator finds *a* BPM even for near-random motion, so moderate noisy scenes may give erratic readings until the 6 s buffer fills (the single most important thing to check live; the core interaction's fidelity); (b) WebGL `linewidth>1` is not honored on most drivers, so the threads render ~1px rather than as glowing ribbons (the node-pulse spheres carry the glow; cycle-3 fix = `Line2`/`LineMaterial`); (c) the O(n¬≤) autocorr over ~360 samples runs per video frame вАФ fine on desktop, may need batching to every 5th frame on low-end mobile; (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; (e) the node-pool wraps at 160 simultaneous pulses (artifacts only at 170 BPM √Ч 5 voices). The ghost-motion auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a weaving, drifting, (post-Start) singing canon with zero permission.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/545-motion-loom/README.md`

### [549-kids-song-friend](/dream/549-kids-song-friend) ¬Ј kids (4+) / companion / voice ¬Ј cycle 402 ¬Ј demoable
  **A creature whose body is literally MADE of the songs a 4-year-old sings it вАФ it remembers the actual melodies (not a vague energy, not a timer) forever, across calendar days, and sings them back, woven and changed, every visit.** Sing or hum; the friend grows a new petal shaped like your melody, keeps every song, and greets you bigger tomorrow. Cycle 2 of the kids **Companion / Presence** spine (`518-kids-living-ember` = cycle 1, which remembered only humming *energy* within one session). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "remembers your songs across days" concept on three renderers).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **forgiving voiceвЖТpitch capture** (`audio.ts`) вАФ `getUserMedia` вЖТ `AnalyserNode` вЖТ autocorrelation pitch detector tuned for a 4-year-old's high/breathy/wandering voice (clarity threshold + **babble-note fallback** so any vocalization still teaches a note), snapped to **C-major pentatonic** ~2 octaves; a melody = note-index array (cap 12; a ~1.2 s pause commits the song). (2) **cross-day melodic-memory engine** (`memory.ts`) вАФ `localStorage` (`resonance.dream.549`, try/catch): song library + visit count + monotonic `totalNotesEver` + `lastVisit` + simulated `day`; on load the friend GREETS, is visibly bigger, and surfaces a new-calendar-day return. (3) **recall re-synthesis** (`audio.ts`) вАФ never raw playback: transpose + gently slow + **weave two different days' melodies** into soft counterpoint, the active petal pulsing + mouth opening on each recalled note; warm pentatonic voice; kid-safe master `gain вЖТ lowpass 8 kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, вИТ10 dBFS) вЖТ destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **the body IS the songs (SVG)** вАФ each remembered song is a teardrop/petal path whose vertical shape traces that melody's pitch contour (pentatonic degree вЖТ hue), radiating around a friendly face (blinking eyes, a mouth that opens when it sings); idle breathing via direct rAF attribute mutation (no per-frame React re-render); `feGaussianBlur` glow. **Two demo affordances** so the 06:30 glance never has to wait a real day: pre-seeded "yesterday's songs" sing hands-free from frame one with zero permission, AND an honestly-labelled **"вЬ® pretend it's tomorrow"** button that bumps the visit, regrows the body, and plays a transposed/slowed/woven recall instantly. **Degradation:** mic denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` message + the friend keeps singing its remembered songs hands-free (SVG is universal; a cute base body guards the zero-songs case). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Tamagotchi** (Aki Maita / Bandai, 1996) вАФ the original persistent virtual companion that *remembers* and rewards return; **Brian Eno** вАФ long-form, non-repeating (the recall is never twice the same); and the design thesis that a young child's bond with a voice companion deepens through *memory of content* (it knows your songs), not a clock вАФ explicitly transcending `322-kids-voice-garden` (a timer-aged plant) by changing because of *what was sung*. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І402** (cs.SD still server-ML вЖТ #5 unclaimable, said plainly; the relevant fresh-ish finding is a 2026 AccScience study on children's developmental preference for known, responsive voice agents вАФ backs the design but isn't verifiably <14 days). **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 provocation #6 directly** вАФ extend `518-living-ember` into "a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow," not another 90-second glow toy. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вЙ•3 subsystems ¬Ј #3 named refs Tamagotchi/Eno ¬Ј #4 multi-cycle Companion/Presence spine cycle 2; honest contestable #1 вАФ remembering melodic *content* across days recalled as woven counterpoint with the body drawn from contours is an interaction-first, but localStorage persistence itself isn't lab-first [322 aged a creature; 71 persisted a gallery], so it discounts cleanly; #5 NOT claimed). **Diversity** `banned (jury rolling-15)=[WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**voice/mic INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger вАФ the 7√Ч reflex) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вАФ both banned; and NOT three.js, which 545 just shipped) ¬Ј **pitchвЖТpersistent-memoryвЖТrecall TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics-sim drone) ¬Ј **companion / it-remembers-you VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ the bond/memory IS the differentiator, jury #6's point)]` вАФ clean on every jury ban. **Love signal:** Karel's loved kids voice/mark-making cluster (`158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП вАФ a child's voice/mark becoming a visible kept thing) softly backs it; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `547-kids-songkeeper` (three.js glowing creature, each song an orbiting contour-strand вАФ richest idle presence, lost: three.js 2-in-a-row + less legible than petals-with-a-face) + `548-kids-songbloom` (raw WebGL2 GLSL bioluminescent shader grown from memory-seed uniforms вАФ the freshest generative-shader-from-memory idea, lost: memoryвЖТuniform-hash is the least legible "see your own songs," no face) banked in IDEAS ¬І402. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (438/438)`, `/dream/549-kids-song-friend 5.75 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static; zero build warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: (a) **pitch accuracy on a REAL 4-year-old's voice** is the core unknown (autocorrelation is octave-error-prone, a child's voice is breathy; clarity threshold + babble fallback + pentatonic snapping hide a lot, but capture timings want field tuning); (b) **SVG perf with a large library** вАФ unbounded petal count under a blur filter could stress an old iPad after weeks of songs (cycle-3 cap/LOD); (c) the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, a lab-wide pattern); (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; (e) the single shared `rafRef` (idle vs listening) is slightly fragile though only one is ever live. The pre-seeded memory + "pretend it's tomorrow" button are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a friend made of songs, greeting + singing + visibly growing, with zero permission and no 24h wait.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/549-kids-song-friend/README.md`

### [553-kids-tilt-fountain](/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain) ¬Ј kids (4+) / tilt / playful-constructive ¬Ј cycle 404 ¬Ј demoable
  **TIP the whole tablet to pour a stream of glowing orbs down through a 3D vertical garden of chimes, bells, and strings вАФ composing a singing waterfall by where you AIM the flow.** Tilt left/right/forward steers the gravity that pulls the cascade; each instrument-zone an orb falls through rings a warm pentatonic note (different timbre per zone). Active, constructive play вАФ you aim and BUILD a tune вАФ not a calm staring-glow toy. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal off-glass inputs √Ч three non-banned renderers).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **tilt input + gravity model** (`page.tsx` + `physics.ts`) вАФ `deviceorientation` (gamma=L/R, beta=front/back) вЖТ a smoothed (EMA ќ±вЙИ0.08) 2D gravity vector applied to every orb (gravity never reverses); iOS 13+ permission via `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` on the Start gesture; desktop fallback pointer X/Y вЖТ gravity + arrow-key steer; denied/absent вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + pointer fallback auto-on. (2) **orb physics + emitter** (`physics.ts`) вАФ continuous emitter drips one orb / 100 ms; Euler integration under tilt-gravity; per-orb **AABB collision** vs 5 instrument zones; **hard cap 180 orbs**, retire >12 s / below floor, pool recycled each frame, drag 0.985. *Discrete rigid orbs triggering notes on contact вАФ NOT a simulated fluid/field whose statistics are sonified (the jury-banned GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone move).* (3) **zone-based spatial pentatonic synth** (`audio.ts`) вАФ 5 zones, distinct timbres (bell sine+partials / Karplus-ish string / triangle chime / marimba / low-bell), pitch by horizontal hit position, all C-major-pentatonic (always consonant), per-zone rate-limiting, master `gain вЖТ lowpass(8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dBFS, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter, `setTargetAtTime` envelopes, AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **three.js render** вАФ additive-emissive glowing orbs + 5 luminous zone-panels that flash on hit, dark background, additive glow (no postprocessing dep); full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-tilt auto-demo** вАФ a figure-8 synthetic tilt pours + sings from frame one with zero permission, cancels on real tilt/pointer, resumes after ~4 s idle (the 06:30 hands-free safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вАФ no mic/camera/network/secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally).

  References: **Toshio Iwai** вАФ *Electroplankton* / *SimTunes* (the playful music-toy lineage where moving a thing composes); **Pythagoras' monochord** (pitch by position); **Rube Goldberg** (the cascade/chain idea); **Harry Partch**. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І404** (face/expression music is the kids autopilot the jury warned against вАФ grep-verified at 258/423 вАФ so it was dropped; the easy kids lab-firsts are spent at ~360+ prototypes вЖТ compete on ambition + diversity + execution, the 537/549 precedent). **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 provocation #3** (take the off-glass lane вАФ TILT, not a finger on glass) **AND #6** (break the calm-sensory-kids autopilot вАФ active/constructive play, not a 90-second glow toy). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (tilt+gravity + orb-physics/emitter + 5-timbre zone synth + three.js = 4) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Pythagoras / Rube Goldberg / Partch). (**#1 contestable, discounted** вАФ "first tilt-poured cascade instrument" is application-level but tilt-marbles exist [169/184], so it discounts cleanly to 3/5. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ no <14-day bind for a kids cycle; cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly, the ninth jury running.) **Diversity** `banned (jury rolling-15)=[WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√Ч) ¬Ј GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone TECH (4√Ч) ¬Ј finger-on-glass INPUT (7√Ч) ¬Ј calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[**device-TILT INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger вАФ the scarcest off-glass kids input recently used: 549 voice / 537 camera / 541 finger) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вАФ both banned) ¬Ј **discrete-orb-gravity-physics вЖТ spatial-chime TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone) ¬Ј **playful/constructive/joyful-fountain VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ the directest break of jury #6)]` вАФ clean on every jury ban. **Love signal:** the loved kids embodied cluster (`83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП вАФ tilt; `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП / `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП вАФ a child's action becoming an audible/visible thing) softly backs a tilt-driven constructive instrument; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `554-kids-giant-shadow` (camera full-body Pose вЖТ raw WebGL2 GLSL metaball aura вЖТ continuous choir; Krueger *Videoplace*/Theremin вАФ the biggest visual/technical swing, lost: heaviest real-iPad risk [PoseLandmarker-CDN + 33-joint metaball shader loop + camera permission] + Pose is the most-used kids input lane) + `555-kids-echo-canyon` (voice вЖТ SVG canyon вЖТ staggered 4-voice canon/round, distinct from 549/142; round-form/Oliveros вАФ the most musically refined + most reliable, lost: least fresh, 549 last cycle was also voice) banked in IDEAS ¬І404. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 41s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (440/440)`, `/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain 5.08 kB / 296 kB First Load` prerendered static вАФ the 296 kB is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes; zero warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/tilt/WebGL in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: (a) **iOS AudioContext unlock inside the async `onClick` after the `requestPermission()` await** (the builder's flagged risk вАФ Safari may drop the gesture-association across the await; a tap-to-resume guard is the cycle-2 fix); (b) **180-orb smoothness on an older iPad** (`MAX_ORBS` is the knob; additive-emissive per-orb meshes are the cost); (c) **whether aiming the flow reads as deliberate melody-making vs pretty randomness** вАФ the core unverified interaction claim (zone layout + pitch-by-position is designed for it; only a real child's hands confirm); (d) extreme tilt could starve top zones (gravity never reverses, so the top always feeds); (e) the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide pattern). The ghost-tilt auto-demo + pointer fallback need zero permission, so the 06:30 glance reliably shows a pouring, glowing, singing fountain with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain/README.md`

### [559-kids-clap-canon](/dream/559-kids-clap-canon) ¬Ј kids (4+) / rhythm / time-tension ¬Ј cycle 406 ¬Ј demoable
  **Steve Reich's phasing, for a 4-year-old: clap a rhythm into the mic, two friendly blobs clap it back, then one drifts ~1.8% faster so the patterns slide unison вЖТ shimmering interlock вЖТ unison over ~30вАУ40 s вАФ and a big phase-wheel with two chasing dots makes the drift VISIBLE.** Active rhythmic discovery, not a calm glow toy: the child performs a clap, then watches a minimalist *process* unfold. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal off-glass inputs √Ч three renderers).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **mic clap/onset detection** вАФ `getUserMedia({audio})` вЖТ `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); per-rAF time-domain RMS vs a fast-attack/slow-decay EMA background; onset fires when `rms > max(0.015, ema¬Ј2.5)` with a 120 ms refractory; 2вАУ6 claps вЖТ an inter-onset-interval array (~2 s silence commits; <2 claps вЖТ a default Reich-style 6-clap pattern so it always works). (2) **phase-canon scheduler** вАФ two voices share the IOI array; voice B's interval √Ч `(1вИТ0.018)` вЙИ 1.8% shorter loop; a 25 ms `setInterval` schedules sample-accurate `start(t)` 120 ms ahead (look-ahead, no `setTimeout`-per-note); voice A = warm bandpass-noise clap + low sine body, voice B = bright highpass woodblock + triangle. (3) **SVG render via direct rAF attribute mutation** (no per-frame React `setState`) вАФ phase-wheel dots, character body-scale, glow opacity, hand positions all `setAttribute`'d each frame; React state only for discrete UI. (4) **character animation** вАФ two cute SVG blob-creatures (ellipses + eyes + hands) flash/scale on each scheduled clap (decay 6√Ч/s), `feGaussianBlur` glow pulse. Master `gain(0.75) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10 dBFS, 20:1) вЖТ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **Hands-free auto-demo:** phase-wheel + blobs animate from frame one with a built-in pattern at zero clicks (audio waits for the Start gesture), cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Mic-denied вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-anywhere clap fallback** (fully playable). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG вАФ no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Steve Reich** вАФ *Clapping Music* (1972, two performers clap the same 12-note pattern; one shifts an eighth-note every 12 bars until back in unison) and *It's Gonna Rain* (1965, tape phasing вАФ two identical loops drift and realign). The gradual phase-shift IS the prototype, not decoration ("music that is about process, that would make the process perceptible"). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І406** (no kid-appropriate <14-day client-buildable bind surfaced вАФ WebGPU-baseline-via-Interop-2026 is a platform note not a technique; cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly the 10th jury running; the structural read holds that at ~360+ kids prototypes the easy lab-firsts are spent вЖТ compete on ambition + diversity + a named concept new TO CHILDREN). **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 provocation #4 literally** вАФ the jury mourned that the time-tension vocabulary (tempo canons, polymeter, Reich phase, Nancarrow) "had no children"; this is that piece, for children вАФ **AND #3** (off-glass input вАФ mic clap, not a finger) **AND #6** (break the calm-sensory-kids autopilot вАФ active rhythmic discovery). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (mic onset + phase-canon scheduler + SVG rAF render + character animation = 4) + **#3** named ref that drives the piece (Steve Reich). (**#1 contestable, discounted** вАФ phasing was touched once in an alt-lineage cycle 305 + tempo-canon exists at 514/545, so "first phasing piece" discounts cleanly; the fresh element is *phasing made legible + joyful for a 4-year-old*, an audience-first, framed honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ no <14-day kids bind.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вЙ•4√Ч)=[finger-on-glass INPUT (529/537/541/538)] ¬Ј picked=[**microphone clap/onset INPUT** (off-glass вАФ the directest dodge of the finger reflex; the child performs in space) ¬Ј **SVG OUTPUT** (rAF attribute mutation; SVG sat at 3√Ч, not banned; NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-flagged], NOT three.js [553/545/537 just used]) ¬Ј **onset вЖТ looping phase-canon TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics-sim drone) ¬Ј **rhythmic/playful/active-discovery VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вАФ only 1√Ч in the last 10)]` вАФ clean on the live finger-on-glass ban and every standing jury ban. **Love signal:** the loved kids embodied/rhythm cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП вАФ rhythm play; `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП / `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП вАФ a child's physical action becoming an audible/visible thing) softly backs a clap-driven rhythm instrument; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `560-kids-shadow-band` (camera no-ML frame-diff silhouette вЖТ three.js ~4k-particle creature вЖТ 3 zone-gated instruments; Krueger *Videoplace*/Rozin вАФ the most embodied/"wow", lost: the most-redundant camera-body input lane + most lighting-fragile for the hands-free glance) + `561-kids-rainmaker` (device SHAKE/`devicemotion` magnitude вЖТ Canvas2D rain/lightning вЖТ Xenakis stochastic grain-cloud percussion, Poisson ќї = shake intensity¬≤; *Achorripsis* 1957 вАФ robust pooling + fresh off-glass shake input, lost: the least conceptually surprising, a sensory weather toy) banked in IDEAS ¬І406. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 30.6s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (442/442)`, `/dream/559-kids-clap-canon 6.04 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static; clean first run, no fix attempt needed; zero warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: (a) **clap detection on a real 4-year-old in a real room** (standard EMA onset detector, claps are sharp transients = the easy case, but a noisy room / quiet claps may mis-fire; the default-pattern + tap-anywhere fallbacks guarantee it always plays); (b) **whether the ~1.8% drift reads as Reich phasing over a real listen** вАФ the phase-wheel makes it visible immediately (the legibility crutch), but whether a child *hears* the slide as one evolving groove is the core unverified perceptual claim; (c) iOS AudioContext unlock + mic-permission timing (no `await` before `ctx.resume`, lower risk than 553); (d) the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The zero-permission SVG auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the wheel turning and the two blobs drifting in and out of sync with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/559-kids-clap-canon/README.md`

### [564-piano-splat-cathedral](/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral) ¬Ј adult / audio-file / architectural-volumetric ¬Ј cycle 407 ¬Ј demoable
  **Karel's real Welcome Home piano doesn't just make a cloud вАФ it BUILDS A CATHEDRAL.** A luminous Gothic nave of anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian splats вАФ floor вЖТ columns вЖТ arches вЖТ transept вЖТ vault вЖТ rose window вАФ raised element-by-element by the music's onsets (in architectural order), lit by pitch, that you fly down the centre of. Stateful, not a loop: a floor + one column pair at second 10; the full vault and a blooming rose window by minute 3. **Cycle 2 of the Gaussian-splat spine** (`557-piano-splat-galaxy` = cycle 1, the lab's first 4/5 вАФ an isotropic additive *cloud*; 564 is the depth-sorted anisotropic *architecture*). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "his real piano sculpts a real anisotropic sorted splat field" concept on three forms/renderers).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3): (1) **audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch** (`audio.ts`) вАФ `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048) on the Begin gesture; fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, 4 s timeout, looped) вЖТ always-on **synth-piano fallback** so it sounds offline; master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; spectral flux vs adaptive EMA вЖТ onset, spectral peak вЖТ pitch вЖТ hue, energy вЖТ loudness. (2) **procedural cathedral geometry + build sequencer** (`cathedral.ts`) вАФ the nave pre-generated at startup as typed-array splat positions/axes/radii for an ordered element list (floor ¬Ј 5 column pairs ¬Ј 5 arches ¬Ј 2 transept arms ¬Ј 4 vault bays ¬Ј rose window ¬Ј ambient); onsets raise the next element in build order, permanent once raised, re-lit by later onsets вЖТ demonstrably different at minute 3 than second 10 (long-form state/memory, not a loop). (3) **anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian-splat rasterizer (the cycle-2 technique leap)** вАФ each splat an **oriented ellipse** (not 557's isotropic circle), per-splat world axes aligned to its surface (column shaft vertical / arch tangent / vault flat / rose radial); vertex shader projects axis tips to screen (EWA-style tip-projection, Zwicker 2001 вАФ a two-axis approximation, not full covariance) вЖТ oriented stretched quad; fragment evaluates an elliptical Gaussian + small additive emissive core. **Every frame the live splats are depth-SORTED back-to-front by view-Z and composited with `SRC_ALPHA, ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA`, depth-test OFF** вАФ real alpha-over occlusion (a near column hides a far one), the correctness leap 557's additive-no-sort renderer lacked. Camera flies forward down the nave + auto-rotate; orbit-on-drag + wheel zoom. **Pre-Begin auto-demo** builds + lights the cathedral from frame one, zero permission (the 06:30 hands-free safety net); audio waits for the Begin gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET вАФ no side effects, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Kerbl, Kopanas, Leimk√Љhler, Drettakis** вАФ "3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering" (SIGGRAPH 2023); **Zwicker, Pfister, van Baar, Gross** вАФ "EWA Volume Splatting" (IEEE Vis 2001, the anisotropic-projection algebra); **antimatter15/splat** (the canonical CPU per-frame depth-sort WebGL viewer); **James Turrell** (architectural light вАФ being *inside* the light, not lit by it); **Refik Anadol** (volumetric data architecture). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І407** вАФ the 2026 in-browser splatting wave (SparseStreet arXiv 2606.03909 June 2026; MOBILE-GS ICLR 2026, 116 FPS sorted 3DGS on a phone; WebSplatter arXiv 2602.03207) establishes real-time sorted anisotropic 3DGS as a browser commodity, so cycle 2 leaps from 557's cheap isotropic+additive+unsorted path to the honest sorted-anisotropic renderer. **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 #1** (chase the ceiling вАФ take the splat lineage that landed ¬І405's first 4/5 to cycle 2 as a *massively bigger concept* with an added long-form-stateful axis) **AND #5** (mine a non-cs.SD well at current-month freshness). **Ambition 3/5, 4/5 arguable**: **#1** anisotropic + depth-sorted alpha-over splat rendering (a technique the lab has never rendered вАФ 557 was explicitly isotropic + additive + unsorted; contestable only because the anisotropy is a two-axis approximation, discounted honestly) + **#4** multi-cycle splat spine (cycle 2) + **#3** named refs that drive it (Kerbl / Zwicker / antimatter15 / Turrell / Anadol); plus a real extra signal the sibling clouds lacked вАФ **long-form STATEFUL build** (the jury's "long-form generative with state/memory" menu). **#5 soft/contestable** (the dive is genuinely current-month and motivates the leap, but the rendering math is foundational вАФ not hard-claimed; honestly 3/5, not a gamed 4/5). **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вЙ•4√Ч = SVG OUTPUT [559/552/549/538] + standing jury set: WebGPU-compute / Canvas2D / GPU-physics-simвЖТdrone / finger-on-glass-default / calm-sensory-kids) ¬Ј picked=[**audio-file INPUT** (his real piano вАФ off-glass, the inverse of every banned input) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [4√Ч], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [banned], NOT three.js; WebGL2 sat at 2√Ч) ¬Ј **anisotropic depth-sorted Gaussian-splat TECH** (renders his RECORDED music вАФ the inverse of the banned "simulate a medium, sonify its statistics" drone) ¬Ј **architectural/sacred/Turrell-Anadol VIBE** (a built spectacle you fly through, NOT calm-sensory-kids, NOT the meditative-drone cluster)]` вАФ clean on the live SVG ban and every standing jury ban. **Love signal:** the loved piano-visualizer cluster (`163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП, pattern reused by 283/532/557) softly backs feeding his real Welcome Home piano; additive вАФ the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `563-piano-splat-ewa` (full EWA covariance projection вАФ quaternionвЖТќ£вЖТJacobianвЖТconicвЖТeigenvalue-bounded quad + premultiplied alpha-over; the reconstruction-grade renderer, the cleanest #1-technique вАФ lost: another orbitable cloud adjacent to 557; **the cycle-3 path is to swap 564's two-axis approx for this full covariance**) + `562-piano-splat-aurora` (anisotropic splats stretched into flowing aurora ribbons via axisвЖТscreen ќЄ + ѕГMajor/ѕГMinor; Anadol palette вАФ lost: also a cloud-you-orbit; the anisotropy-from-flow trick is the keeper) banked in IDEAS ¬І407. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 45s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (443/443)`, `/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral 8.48 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static; clean first run, no fix attempt; zero warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio in this sandbox) вАФ unverified surface: (a) the real-piano fetch JSON-vs-bytes shape / CORS / `decodeAudioData` codec (synth fallback is the guaranteed path); (b) onset thresholds drive the *build sequence* вАФ dense passages may race the cathedral up or stall (ear-estimated, untuned to the recording); (c) the anisotropy is a **two-axis approximation, not full covariance** вАФ non-orthogonal axes get slight ellipse shear (563's full-EWA is the cycle-3 fix); (d) ~10k CPU-sorted splats + per-frame `bufferSubData` target 60 fps on a laptop, may dip on weak GPUs / high-DPI phones (JS `Array.sort`, not radix); (e) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The pre-Begin auto-build + forward-fly need zero permission, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a living cathedral raising itself with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral/README.md`

### [576-presence-room](/dream/576-presence-room) ¬Ј adults / embodied-spatial / meditative ¬Ј cycle 413 ¬Ј demoable
  **Your own face is the listener.** A webcam tracks your head pose (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker, CDN runtime load) and feeds it straight into the Web Audio **`AudioListener`** вАФ lean and turn your head and a warm just-intonation Dream-House chord physically re-spatialises around you; lean toward a voice and it blooms. The lab's **first head-tracked binaural** piece and its first genuinely *embodied*-spatial one вАФ the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-13 provocation #1 ("zero embodied-spatial prototypes after 570 builds / get off the glass") and #4 (warmth, not a puzzle). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 explorers).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3): (1) **face tracking** (`face.ts`) вАФ MediaPipe FaceLandmarker dynamically imported from jsDelivr CDN (no npm dep); one face/frame вЖТ heavily EMA-smoothed (ќ±вЙИ0.15) head pose: planar position from eye centroid, depth from inter-ocular scale, yaw from eye asymmetry, pitch from eye-to-nose span. (2) **spatial audio** (`audio.ts`) вАФ 6 soft drone voices at JI ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8, 2/1) over a warm A2 (110 Hz) root, each = sine + triangle sub + detuned partial вЖТ its own **HRTF `PannerNode`** on a ring; every frame the pose drives `audioCtx.listener` position + forward orientation (modern `positionX/forwardX.setTargetAtTime`, `setPosition`/`setOrientation` fallback); multi-second swells; master `gain вЖТ lowpass вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (limiter) вЖТ destination`. (3) **visuals** (`render.ts`) вАФ hand-written GLSL ES 3.00 fullscreen-triangle fragment shader (NOT three.js): warm amber/rose/violet volumetric haze tracking where you look + one glowing orb per voice that brightens with its bloom. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (camera frames analysed in-browser only вАФ never recorded/sent). Fallbacks for the 06:30 phone glance: camera denied / FaceLandmarker fails / no webcam вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice + **pointer-drag "look around"** + a **silent Lissajous auto-demo** that orbits the field within seconds (cancels on real input, resumes after ~5s idle); WebGL2 absent вЖТ audio-only; audio blocked вЖТ visuals-only.

  References: **Maryanne Amacher** (perceived sound changes as you move your head вАФ the body is part of the instrument); **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela** *Dream House* (a sustained-JI environment you physically move through); **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* (attention/presence over performance). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І413** (webcam head-tracking вЖТ Web Audio binaural listener вАФ open-source Spatial-Head-Tracking-Audio + webcam-auralization research, an actively-developing 2026 browser technique). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** first head-poseвЖТ`AudioListener` (head-tracked binaural) in the lab вАФ the lab's many HRTF pieces (`7-spatial`/`29`/`148`/`394`/`400`) all moved the listener by dragging a dot or singing, never by the visitor's own body, so this is a genuine interaction-first + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (above) + **#3** named refs; **#5 soft/qualified** (the webcam-auralization dive is genuinely 2026-current and motivates the build, but HRTF + landmarkвЖТEuler math is foundational вАФ held as a soft bind, not hard-claimed). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-13)=[three.js OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј SVG OUTPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј onset/beat/tempo TECH 6√Ч ¬Ј pentatonic-wash + adult-cerebral-puzzle VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[**camera/head-pose INPUT** (off-glass, not mic, not a finger) ¬Ј **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not three.js/SVG) ¬Ј **head-poseвЖТAudioListener HRTF-binaural TECH** (not onset extraction) ¬Ј **warm meditative Dream-House VIBE** (feel, not solve)]` вАФ clean on every ban. Winner of the adult WIDE fire; banked `577-still-bloom` (device-motion stillness вЖТ audio-first Radigue drone) + `578-magnetosphere` (live NOAA space-weather вЖТ WebGPU geomagnetic choir) as IDEAS ¬І413. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 34.1s`, `/dream/576-presence-room 6.48 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox) вАФ the silent auto-demo + pointer-drag mean the field always moves on a glance with zero permission.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/576-presence-room/README.md`

### [587-kids-button-garden](/dream/587-kids-button-garden) ¬Ј kids (4+) / game-controller / off-the-glass ¬Ј cycle 418 ¬Ј demoable
  **A 4-year-old's first instrument is a GAME CONTROLLER, not a screen вАФ mash the big buttons and a garden of warm light blooms and sings.** The lab's **first game-controller (Gamepad API) instrument** and its **first haptic-rumble output** вАФ the directest answer yet to the standing jury #1 ("get off the glass / off the touchscreen / mic over-used"). The child grips a physical pad in two hands and watches the wall bloom; no analog-stick coordination, no reading, just the most toddler-native gesture there is вАФ button-mashing вАФ turned into music. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "a controller becomes a 4-year-old's instrument" concept on three interaction models).

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 5): (1) **Gamepad input** (`page.tsx`) вАФ `navigator.getGamepads()` polled inside the rAF loop with `gamepadconnected`/`disconnected` listeners; **edge-triggered** button presses (rising-edge detect вЖТ each press fires once, holds sustain cleanly); W3C "standard gamepad" mapping (face 0вАУ3, d-pad 12вАУ15, triggers 6вАУ7, left-stick axes 0вАУ1) with deadzone. (2) **warm just-intonation synth** (Web Audio only) вАФ the four face buttons are voices at ratios **1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8** (root / major third / fifth / major seventh) over a low root+fifth sine drone + band-passed "wind" noise; each voice = triangle + gently-detuned sine, soft attack + ~1.6 s release; **deliberately NOT the C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-wrong" wash**. The **d-pad shifts the SEASON** вАФ springвЖТsummerвЖТautumnвЖТwinter transposes the root (F3/G3/D3/C3) AND swaps the palette, so the whole world changes mood. Kid-safe master chain `gain вЖТ lowpass(8 kHz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter 20:1, вИТ10 dBFS) вЖТ destination`; `AudioContext` built in the first gesture (iOS unlock) + `webkitAudioContext` fallback. (3) **Canvas2D render only** вАФ additive (`lighter`) glowing flowers (radial halo + six rotating petal lobes + white core) bloom and breathe over a dark season sky with motion-blur trails; the whole field parallax-sways with the left stick. No three.js/WebGL/WebGPU/SVG. (4) **triggers** swell the wind/pad drone; (5) **dual-rumble haptics** вАФ `vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", вА¶)` thumps on each bloom + a quickening heartbeat as more flowers live, feature-detected + try/catch-wrapped (absent on Safari/many pads вЖТ the piece works fully without it). **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (no network I/O). Fallbacks for the 06:30 phone glance: no pad вЖТ friendly **amber** prompt + **A/S/D/F (or J/K/L/;) keyboard** voices + **arrow-key seasons** + big **on-screen tappable** buttons; **idle auto-demo** blooms flowers + drifts seasons on its own after ~2 s (and on first load) so a muted glance shows a living, singing garden вАФ any real input takes over instantly.

  References: **Toshio Iwai** вАФ *Electroplankton* (Nintendo DS, 2005) / *TENORI-ON* (Yamaha, 2007), the playful "anyone can make beautiful music with a controller" lineage; **the May 2026 Steam Controller (2nd gen)** haptic-song demos (a game controller that plays whole songs through its rumble) вАФ the direct inspiration for routing blooms into sympathetic haptics. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І418** (a controller is a 2026 music-and-haptics instrument + the browser Gamepad API gives it to us free + grep-verified `gamepad` = 0 hits in the lab вЖТ a genuine never-used INPUT and never-used haptic OUTPUT). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** first game-controller input AND first haptic-rumble output in the lab (grep-verified) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Steam Controller); **#5 soft** (the Steam Controller news is ~5вАУ6 weeks, just past the strict 30-day line, and the Gamepad/haptic primitive is foundational вАФ held soft, not hard-claimed). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-13 + rolling-10 saturation)=[three.js OUTPUT ¬Ј SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT ¬Ј onset/beat/tempo TECH ¬Ј pentatonic-wash VIBE ¬Ј growing-creature SPINE ¬Ј camera INPUT (3√Ч last 10) ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT (3√Ч last 10)] ¬Ј picked=[**game-controller/Gamepad INPUT** (lab-first, off-glass вАФ not camera/mic/touch) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off three.js/SVG/WebGL2/WebGPU) ¬Ј **controllerвЖТwarm-JI-synth + dual-rumble-haptic TECH** (not onset/beat/tempo, not data-sonification 2√Ч) ¬Ј **kids playful-warm tactile VIBE** (not a creature, not a puzzle, not the pentatonic wash)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. Winner of the kids DEEP fire; banked `586-kids-light-painter` (two-stick continuous chord-bend "light painter") + `588-kids-glow-drive` (steer-a-comet / wake-singing-stars spatial field) as IDEAS ¬І418. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 110s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (454/454)`, `/dream/587-kids-button-garden 4.67 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no physical gamepad/audio/iOS in sandbox) вАФ the idle auto-demo + keyboard + on-screen-button fallbacks mean the garden always blooms and sings on a glance with zero hardware.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/587-kids-button-garden/README.md`

### [588-tidal-organ](/dream/588-tidal-organ) ¬Ј adults / live-ocean-data / oceanic-warm ¬Ј cycle 419 ¬Ј demoable
  **A warm breathing instrument tuned by the LIVE state of a real ocean right now.** Pick (or geolocate) a coastline and the piece fetches the real current marine swell (Open-Meteo Marine API, no key, CORS-direct) and lets it *play* a slow just-intonation **sea-organ** drone over a luminous WebGPU ocean-energy field (Canvas2D fallback): wave-period = the breath of the whole texture, wave-height = how many stacked JI voices + brightness, swell-period = root pitch, swell-direction = stereo pan. The directest hit on the 2026-06-13 jury's loudest, repeatedly-named, every-jury-starved adult ask вАФ **real-world-data sonification, "music *about* something other than music," tension in the data not a synth knob** вАФ and it's warm, not a puzzle. Refs: Zadar Sea Organ / Annea Lockwood / "Pulse of an Ocean" buoy lineage / arXiv 2602.14560 (ENSOвЖТgamelan, Feb 2026). ~3s auto-start on a drifting demo-swell so a silent 06:30 glance still breathes. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (banked `589-still-bloom` device-motion-stillnessвЖТRadigue-drone WebGPU reaction-diffusion + `590-star-atlas` aim-the-phone-at-the-real-sky Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* вАФ IDEAS ¬І419).

### [594-disintegration-loop](/dream/594-disintegration-loop) ¬Ј adults / long-form-generative / elegiac ¬Ј cycle 421 ¬Ј demoable
  **A recording that crumbles as it plays.** A warm just-intonation lullaby fragment is rendered once into a "tape" (a single mutable `Float32Array`), then **re-recorded onto itself pass after pass** through a wear chain вАФ a downward-creeping one-pole lowpass (highs flake first, ~9 kHz вЖТ ~420 Hz floor), accumulating **oxide dropouts** (a persistent `dropoutMap` that only ever deepens, punching permanent holes), wow/flutter resampling jitter, and `tanh` tape saturation вАФ so the erosion is **genuine compounding state, never reset and never an LFO**. The music at minute 5 is materially hollower than at minute 0; it decays into a ghost. The **only** interaction is one vertical lever: top = *hold on* (slows the decay, mixes a whisper of the pristine seed back in вАФ buys time, never undoes), bottom = *let go* (accelerates the crumble) вАФ a moral choice about letting a recording disappear, **tension you feel, not a puzzle you solve.** The Canvas2D waveform strip is driven by the *actual* degradation state (live peak envelope + dropout map + lowpass cutoff): bars wear down, holes punch through, warm amber desaturates to ash, a violet playhead sweeps each pass. The lab's **first piece built on audible decay/disintegration as accumulating state** вАФ distinct from its many spectral (`243`/`267`/`321`) and granular (`227`) treatments, which visualize or scatter sound but never temporally self-degrade. A genuinely different **register** from the four warm reactive screen-toys before it (576/580/583/588): long-form, witnessed, about memory and loss. Refs: **William Basinski вАФ *The Disintegration Loops* (2002)** + **Music Thing Modular "Degenerator"** self-overwriting looper (Synthtopia, 2026-05-28). ~2.5s idle auto-start so a silent 06:30 glance shows the tape visibly crumbling and (un-muted) hear it hollow. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire вАФ one concept attacked by 3 techniques; banked `595-disintegration-spectral` (frequency-domain erosion) + `596-disintegration-dust` (granular WebGPU crumble) as IDEAS ¬І421.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/594-disintegration-loop/README.md`

### [597-kids-water-bowls](/dream/597-kids-water-bowls) ¬Ј kids / friction-resonator-synthesis / serene-watery ¬Ј cycle 422 ¬Ј demoable
  **Six glowing water bowls a 4-year-old can play with no reading вАФ TAP to ring them like bells, RUB a finger round the rim to make them SING.** The heart is the lab's **first friction-excited resonator / modal-synthesis primitive** (grep-verified 0√Ч across 594 prior prototypes): each bowl is one resonator excited two ways. **Rub = a sustained glass-armonica friction tone** вАФ looping pink-ish noise through a **high-Q bandpass** (Q 14вЖТ26) tuned to the bowl's pitch + 3 quiet inharmonic shimmer sines, where **drag speed** (smoothed px/ms) drives amplitude + brightness (bandpass opens upward) + Q in real time, so rub faster вЖТ louder/brighter/more focused, stop вЖТ it decays over ~0.6s. **Tap = a struck inharmonic bell** (additive sines at 1, 2.01, 3.0, 4.2√Ч, ~4ms attack, higher partials decay faster). Tuning is deliberately **not** pentatonic: just-intonation Lydian-ish `1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8, 3/2, 5/3` over ~F3 (the 11/8 raised-4th = a watery floating color). Higher water = lower pitch (real physics, drawn so it teaches itself). Canvas2D glowing vessels with bold per-bowl colors, tap ripples + brightness bloom, rub standing-wave caustic shimmer, finger-glow trail, ambient water bed (never silent). Engineered for kids: вЙ•64px well-spaced bowls, pre-created nodes for <50ms response, multi-touch (two bowls sing at once), no fail states, kid-safe master chain (lowpass 7200 + compressor вИТ18/6/12, gains capped), and a clever **audio-rate smoothing loop decoupled from the visual rAF** so the rub stays smooth even if the canvas hitches. ~2.5s idle auto-rub demo so a silent 06:30 glance sees + hears a bowl singing. Refs: Indian **Jal Tarang** (struck water bowls) + Benjamin Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761, rubbed glass). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire вАФ one instrument, 3 synthesis cores; banked `598-kids-water-bowls` (modal additive) + `599-kids-water-bowls` (bowed-waveguide AudioWorklet) as IDEAS ¬І422. Resurrects the ¬І420-banked seed `592`.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/597-kids-water-bowls/README.md`

### [601-feedback-howl](/dream/601-feedback-howl) ¬Ј adults / no-input-feedback-synthesis ¬Ј cycle 423 ¬Ј demoable
  **An instrument that is nothing but its own scream.** No oscillator, no sample, no microphone вАФ the sound IS a Web Audio graph fed back into itself, self-oscillating on the edge of runaway, and you sculpt the howl OFF the glass: keyboard and (on a phone) device-tilt bend, choke, and spike it without ever touching the screen. The lab's **first no-input self-oscillating feedback synthesis** (grep-verified: many oscillator/sampler/granular synths, but nothing whose sound is its own feedback loop), and the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-14's demand to swing OUT of the cozy attractor (warm-JI bed ~7√Ч/15, warm-serene VIBE ~9√Ч/15, Canvas2D 6√Ч/15) and build something with **edges** вАФ abrasive, on-the-brink, felt-tension-not-a-puzzle вАФ that renders **off Canvas2D** and takes input from **something other than a fingertip**. Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal abrasive explorers).

  Signal path (no external source): a single ring вАФ `feedbackGain вЖТ delay вЖТ bandpass вЖТ peaking вЖТ waveShaper(soft saturation) вЖТ dcBlock(highpass) вЖТ feedbackGain` вАФ kicked into self-oscillation by one short decaying noise seed at start, loop gain sitting just below 1.0 so it howls without running away. A post-shaper tap вЖТ `masterGain вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(brick-wall limiter) вЖТ AnalyserNode вЖТ destination`. **Safety (non-negotiable for feedback):** hard loop-gain cap `LOOP_GAIN_MAX = 0.985` (never true runaway), master brick-wall limiter (вИТ8 dB, knee 0, ratio 20, 2 ms attack), a ~90 Hz DC-blocking highpass (kills the sub-pile-up that wrecks feedback loops), an instant **PANIC** that ramps loop gain + master to 0, sane start volume (~0.16 auto-demo / ~0.32 play) + always-visible mute вАФ abrasive, never literally painful or speaker-destroying.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **feedback DSP network** (`audio.ts`) вАФ the self-oscillating ring + every safety clamp + `applyParams`/`applyStab`/`applyPanic`/`readAnalyser`, all param changes glided via `setTargetAtTime`. (2) **keyboard control mapping** (`page.tsx`) вАФ вЖС/вЖУ loop gain (tension toward the edge), вЖР/вЖТ delay time (pitch of the howl), `[`/`]` cutoff, `-`/`=` resonance Q, `1`вА¶`9` jump cutoff across the band, space = a "stab" gain-spike screech, `P`/Escape = PANIC. (3) **tilt control mapping** вАФ `deviceorientation` (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the start gesture) вЖТ forward/back bends cutoff, left/right bends delay/pitch; falls back silently to keyboard-only. (4) **WGSL reactive spectrum render** (`gpu.ts`) вАФ a violent full-screen frequency lattice that smears and whites out at resonant peaks, driven by the live `AnalyserNode`, with a real Canvas2D fallback (writhing lattice + tearing scanlines + waveform ghost). **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU; nothing recorded or sent). Fallbacks, each with a visible `text-rose-300` notice: tilt denied/unavailable вЖТ keyboard-only; WebGPU absent вЖТ Canvas2D; audio gated вЖТ the Start button is the gesture; ~2.5 s idle **auto-demo** self-starts a safe low-level feedback so a muted 06:30 glance already shows a living, writhing field, and the demo "wander" resumes after ~5 s idle.

  References: **Toshimaru Nakamura** вАФ *no-input mixing board* (an instrument that is nothing but its own feedback); **David Tudor** вАФ live-electronic feedback works (*Rainforest* / *Pulsers* lineage). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І423** (the abrasive register is 0√Ч in the lab; GPU-compute AV spectacle is a current 2026 technique вАФ nibi/ShaderVine; and a grep caught that the obvious edgy ideas were already shipped вАФ `387-drop-engine` EDM build-drop, `422-shatter-piano` granular destruction вАФ so this swung to a genuinely un-built synthesis paradigm instead). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** first no-input self-oscillating feedback synthesis in the lab (grep-verified) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named refs (Nakamura / Tudor). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-14)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј touch INPUT 4√Ч ¬Ј warm-JI-drone/chord bed ~7√Ч ¬Ј warm/serene/cozy VIBE ~9√Ч ¬Ј third real-ocean-data] ¬Ј picked=[**keyboard + device-tilt INPUT** (off-glass, not a fingertip, not mic) ¬Ј **WebGPU OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D; Canvas2D only as fallback) ¬Ј **no-input feedback self-oscillation TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat) ¬Ј **abrasive / on-the-brink VIBE** (felt tension, the opposite of cozy)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. Winner of the adult WIDE fire; banked `600-data-scream` (voice вЖТ WebGPU Ikeda test-pattern data-strobe) + `602-motion-thrash` (camera optical-flow вЖТ violent industrial noise + WebGPU strobe) as IDEAS ¬І423. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 44s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (459/459)`, `/dream/601-feedback-howl 6.66 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/tilt in sandbox) вАФ the auto-demo + keyboard + Canvas2D/keyboard-only fallbacks mean the field writhes on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can ride the brink himself at his desk.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/601-feedback-howl/README.md`

### [603-kids-yell-blob](/dream/603-kids-yell-blob) ¬Ј kids / comic-vocal-resynthesis / silly-monster ¬Ј cycle 424 ¬Ј demoable
  **The lab's FIRST funny prototype вАФ a giant wobbly googly blob you YELL at, and it squashes, inflates, and HONKS your own voice back like a kazoo.** After 600+ pieces not one was comedic (every kids toy warm/gentle/awe вАФ the exact cozy autopilot JURY 2026-06-14 banned). The kid-safe translation of the jury's demand for "edges" (fast/loud/abrasive/**funny**/unsettling) is the one register a 4-year-old can take loud: **silly.** Roar/sing/shout into the mic вЖТ a 40-point spring-mass **soft-body blob** (raw WebGL2, hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, big googly eyes) inflates, jiggles, and overshoots with squash-and-stretch (loudness raises the rest-radius + `popBlob` kicks the rim so it bounces back, a per-axis squash spring flattens-then-stretches on a loud onset), tinted cyan (high voice) вЖТ pink (low voice) by spectral centroid вАФ and the kid's voice is **honked back, exaggerated**: detuned saw+square вЖТ **ring modulator** вЖТ **WaveShaper** (cartoon clip) вЖТ **swept bandpass**, pitched/bent by their voice with a drooping "HONKвА¶ honkвА¶" envelope (rate-limited so it's comedic, not a buzz), plus a quiet distorted live-voice echo. It's a real **instrument** (the kid's yell IS transformed into the sound вАФ the paradigm that won `601-feedback-howl`), not a reactive visualizer. Kid-safe master chain `gain вЖТ lowpass 7kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall, вИТ10/0/20, 3ms/250ms) вЖТ destination`, pre-created nodes for <50ms response, no painful transients. Graceful: mic denied вЖТ visible `text-rose-300` notice + **hold-the-screen / mash-any-key fake-yell** (still bounces + honks); WebGL2 absent вЖТ notice. ~2.5s idle **auto-demo** yells at itself so a silent 06:30 glance shows it alive; real input preempts instantly, demo resumes after ~5s quiet. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client Web Audio + raw WebGL2; nothing recorded or sent). References: **Disney squash-and-stretch** (Preston Blair, *Cartoon Animation*); **holtsetio (Niklas Niehus) WebGPU `softbodies` / Softbody Tetris (2026-03-13)** for the gooey soft-body feel; classic cartoon foley (**Carl Stalling / Treg Brown** honks). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І424** (soft-body squish is a current 2026 WebGPU technique; the lab is 0√Ч comedic вАФ "funny" is the kid-native form of the jury's "edges"). **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (mic RMS+centroid analysis ¬Ј spring-mass soft-body ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 render ¬Ј comic ring-mod/waveshaper honk DSP = 4) + **#3** named refs (Blair / holtsetio / Stalling-Brown). #1 NOT claimed (grep: Verlet [303] / ball-pit physics [460] / "jelly" toys [125/286] pre-exist вАФ squish isn't a clean lab-first; the genuine novelty is the comedic REGISTER, a diversity win not an ambition criterion); #5 NOT claimed (Softbody Tetris ~3 mo). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-14)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј touch INPUT 4√Ч ¬Ј warm-JI-drone/chord bed ~7√Ч ¬Ј warm/serene/cozy VIBE ~9√Ч ¬Ј camera over-mined ¬Ј gamepad just-used ¬Ј third-ocean-data] ¬Ј picked=[**mic-voice INPUT** (off-glass, not a fingertip, not camera/gamepad) ¬Ј **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D) ¬Ј **comic-vocal-resynthesis + soft-body-squish TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat) ¬Ј **silly-monster VIBE** (loud + funny, the opposite of cozy)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag, and the directest fill of the lab's 0√Ч-comedic gap. Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal silly explorers); banked `604-kids-stomp-band` (shake вЖТ three.js cartoon-foley junk pile) + `605-kids-blow-parade` (blow вЖТ WebGPU balloon raspberry parade) as IDEAS ¬І424. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 45s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (460/460)`, `/dream/603-kids-yell-blob 5.7 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real mic/audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ the auto-demo + tap/keyboard fake-yell mean it wobbles + honks on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can yell at it himself.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/603-kids-yell-blob/README.md`

### [619-kids-plinko-bells](/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells) ¬Ј kids / Galton-quincunx-stochastic-physics / emergent-STEM-wonder ¬Ј cycle 430 ¬Ј demoable
  **"Marble Bells" вАФ a 4-year-old drops a glowing marble into a peg field and watches *chance itself* play a chord.** Tap anywhere up top to release a little cluster of marbles; they cascade through a triangular **Galton / quincunx** peg lattice (~12 rows), bouncing left or right at every row with a slight center-pull plus real collision jitter (so the binomial вЖТ normal distribution emerges and no two runs look alike), and land in one of **9 just-intonation bins**. Each landing rings that bin's warm **struck bell** (additive sines at ~1, 2.0, 3.0, 4.2√Ч, ~4ms attack, higher partials decaying faster). Because more marbles end up in the middle (the bell curve), the **center bins fill fastest** вАФ and the bins are tuned symmetrically so the center IS the root/fifth/octave: the emergent chord is rooted and warm, richest at the middle, gentle color at the edges. The histogram bars ARE the live distribution; counts slowly bleed off so it can play forever. Nine JI bins over F3 вЙИ 174.6 Hz (`1/2, 2/3, 3/4, 5/6, 1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1`), each a bold saturated hue вАФ color is the language, nothing is ever "wrong." The lab's **first Galton-board / quincunx stochastic-physics instrument** (grep-verified 0√Ч across 618 prior prototypes), and the directest break from the kids **silly-googly-creature 3-peat** (603/609/617): a mesmerizing STEM-wonder register вАФ chance, made audible вАФ not a creature, not mic, not cozy. Renders on **WebGL2** (raw GLSL ES 3.00, instanced glowing marbles/pegs/bins вАФ the deliberately *under*-used renderer, off both the over-corrected WebGPU and jury-flagged Canvas2D), with a full **Canvas2D fallback** + a live backend badge. Kid-safe master chain (`gain вЖТ lowpass 7.5kHz вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вИТ16/6/12 вЖТ destination`, gains capped, bells micro-rate-limited), gesture-gated AudioContext, always-on root+fifth+octave pad so it's never silent. ~2.2s idle **auto-rain** so a silent 06:30 glance is already cascading + singing; real taps preempt instantly. Refs: **Sir Francis Galton's quincunx / "bean machine" (1894)** (central-limit-theorem, binomialвЖТnormal); **Wintergatan's Marble Machine** (marbles-as-instrument); **Insook Choi, "Interactive Sonification Exploring Emergent Behavior" (2018)**. Love-aligned to Karel's emergent-music cluster (`236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers); banked `620-kids-music-mill` (rotating music-box peg sequencer, self-playing) + `621-kids-duet-bloom` (two-finger cooperative consonance, the social lane) as IDEAS ¬І430. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 40s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (467/467)`, `/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells 5.36 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox) вАФ the auto-rain + Canvas2D fallback mean it cascades and chimes on a glance with zero hardware.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells/README.md`

### [622-wolfram-rhythm](/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm) ¬Ј adults / 1D-elementary-CA-Wolfram-rule / austere-mechanical ¬Ј cycle 431 ¬Ј demoable
  **"Wolfram Rhythm" вАФ a single integer composes the music.** A 1D **elementary cellular automaton** unfolds row by row on a musical clock: each cell's next state comes from its left/self/right neighbourhood via an 8-bit **rule number** (0вАУ255), and every newly-born row's live cells fire short, edged percussion panned by column over a whole-tone set. The **rule number IS the composition** вАФ `30` chaotic/noisy, `90` a self-similar Sierpinski fractal, `110` complex/Turing-complete (gliders collide), `184` traffic, etc. вАФ change it (the one lever: a ¬±stepper, a 0вАУ255 slider, and six labeled presets) and the entire character transforms. The lab's **first 1D elementary-CA / Wolfram-rule instrument** (grep-verified 0√Ч вАФ the existing CA pieces are 2D: `25`/`180` Conway Life, `264` Lenia, `360`/`377` sandpile), and a deliberate swing OFF the adult **edges/real-data autopilot** (601 howl ¬Ј 606 vivisection ¬Ј 613 seismic ¬Ј 618 solar) into an austere, rule-driven register вАФ edged (Rule 30 is literally chaos) but neither loud-abrasive nor cozy.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 4): (1) **1D-CA rule engine** (`engine.ts`) вАФ toroidal `stepRow`, centered/soup seeds, the 256-rule lookup, `PRESETS`. (2) **long-form watchdog** (`StagnationDetector`) вАФ detects dead / frozen / short-cycle states and `perturb`s (flips cells) or re-seeds so the piece keeps evolving for minutes rather than locking up. (3) **CAвЖТpercussion synth** (`audio.ts`) вАФ metal-FM / band-passed-noise-click / snappy-pluck voices, columnвЖТwhole-tone pitch + columnвЖТpan, 24-voice steal-oldest cap, master вЖТ brick-wall limiter (no warm drone anywhere). (4) **WebGL2 render** вАФ the iconic scrolling Wolfram diagram via a texture-uploaded grid + fragment shader (newest row flashes at a bright playhead line, old rows fade as they scroll), with a real **Canvas2D fallback** + visible notice. Idle visual auto-start on mount (audio gated behind **Begin** per autoplay), so a silent glance is already a self-drawing diagram. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; nothing recorded or sent).

  References: **Stephen Wolfram, _A New Kind of Science_ (2002)** (elementary CA, rules 30/90/110); **Matthew Cook** (Rule-110 Turing-completeness, 2004); **Iannis Xenakis** (cellular automata in composition вАФ the severe/architectural register). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (3 CA paradigms вАФ 2D Conway Life, 1D Wolfram, continuous Lenia); the **only duplication-clean** candidate (`620-life-engine` duplicated `25`/`180`, `622-quickening` duplicated `264`), banked both as cautionary IDEAS ¬І431. **Ambition honest 3/5**: #1 first 1D-elementary-CA/Wolfram instrument (grep-0√Ч) + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (4) + #3 named refs (Wolfram / Cook / Xenakis); #5 not claimed (foundational). **Diversity** `banned=[WGSL-WebGPU 5√Ч over-corrected ¬Ј edges/real-data adult autopilot ¬Ј JURY-14 Canvas2D/touch/warm-JI/cozy/ocean] ¬Ј picked=[rule-number-stepper + sparse-perturb INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј 1D-elementary-CA TECH ¬Ј austere-mechanical VIBE]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 73s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (467/467)`, `/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm 6.15 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio in sandbox) вАФ the on-mount auto-running diagram + Canvas2D fallback mean it draws on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that rules 30/90/110 are audibly distinct and the metallic voices read as edged-not-harsh.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm/README.md`

### [630-piano-refract](/dream/630-piano-refract) ¬Ј adults / NMF-spectral-factorization / dissective-prismatic ¬Ј cycle 434 ¬Ј demoable
  **"Piano Refract" вАФ the lab's FIRST genuine cycle-2 deepening: Karel's own solo piano refracted like light through a prism into five voices you solo, mute & re-mix.** This is the deepening of the loved standout `606-piano-vivisection` the jury begged for by hand ("606 is the model вАФ it just needed a cycle 2 to actually reach 4/5") two juries running. Stage 1 keeps 606's bulletproof median-filter **HPSS** split (strings vs. hammers) as the legible *ground*; stage 2 is the new refraction вАФ the harmonic (strings) layer is re-analyzed and fanned by **NMF** (non-negative matrix factorization, the lab's first вАФ grep-0√Ч across 600+ prototypes) into **four pitched register voices** (Low / Low-mid / High-mid / High). Five independently-mixable looping voices in total (Hammers + the 4 registers): solo isolates one, mute drops it, faders re-balance вАФ all **instant & click-free** (every buffer plays continuously, sample-aligned; only gain nodes ramp). The technique register the jury praised in 606 ("clinical not cozy, his own music") вАФ analytical and prismatic, neither doom nor warm.

  **The legibility fix (what makes this a real cycle-2, not a restart):** plain unsupervised NMF returns abstract components that are unstable run-to-run and impossible to name вАФ the exact weakness that lost the *original* ¬І425-banked `607-piano-prism` seed to 606. This build **warm-starts** the NMF basis `W`: each of the four columns is seeded as a Gaussian-in-log-frequency bump centered at **~150 / 350 / 800 / 1800 Hz** (with a positive floor so updates still adapt to Karel's real partials), biasing every component to settle into a **stable, musically-meaningful register regardless of the run**. The seeded-basis idea is Smaragdis & Brown (2003) applied for *legibility* rather than transcription.

  Subsystems (вЙ•3 вЖТ 6): (1) **audio loader** (`audio.ts`, copied verbatim from 606) вАФ fetches Karel's real solo-piano recording via the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` route, synthesized piano fallback. (2) **median-filter HPSS** (`hpss.ts`, from 606) вАФ STFT/ISTFT, per-bin/per-frame medians, soft Wiener masks (phase kept). (3) **register-seeded KL-NMF** (`nmf.ts`) вАФ warm-started multiplicative updates (~70 iters), chunked with `await` yields + progress bar. (4) **per-component Wiener resynthesis** вАФ `Mk = Vk/ќ£Vj` applied to the original complex harmonic STFT вЖТ ISTFT вЖТ four register PCM buffers. (5) **5-voice mixer** вАФ `BufferSource вЖТ GainNode вЖТ AnalyserNode вЖТ master вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, sample-aligned, instant solo/mute/gain. (6) **WebGL2 "prism" render** (`gl.ts`) вАФ an incoming white beam splits into five colored bands (steel hammers + violetвЖТroseвЖТamberвЖТemerald registers), each driven by its live level, soloed glows / muted dims, with a real **Canvas2D fallback** + backend badge; idle animation on mount + ~2.5s auto-demo cycles the solo so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (READ-only of the existing audio route; nothing recorded or sent).

  Off-glass controls: keyboard `1`вАУ`5` solo / `0` reset / `m` mute selected / `вЖРвЖТ` select / `вЖСвЖУ` gain / space play-pause; device-tilt "spectral spotlight" (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the Begin gesture, silent keyboard fallback + `text-rose-300` notice if denied). References: **Lee & Seung, _Nature_ 1999** (NMF + multiplicative updates); **Smaragdis & Brown, WASPAA/ISMIR 2003** (NMF on music spectrograms; seeded basis); **Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010** (the HPSS ground). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І434** (NMF source-separation is a live 2026 front вАФ Deep Non-Negative Autoencoders, arXiv 2510.08816; piano is "particularly amenable, beautiful key-hammer extraction" вАФ Collins, eContact). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept, 2 legibility approaches): beat `629-piano-prism` (random-init NMF + post-hoc centroid pitch-SORT) on **reliability + legibility** вАФ the warm start is deterministic where the sort still rode the random-init lottery; banked 629 as IDEAS ¬І434. **Ambition honest 4/5** вАФ the lab's first honest #4 in two juries: **#1** first NMF in the lab (grep-0√Ч) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (6) + **#3** named refs (Lee&Seung / Smaragdis&Brown / Fitzgerald) + **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (cycle 2 of the 606 decomposition spine, claimed honestly for the first time). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√Ч ¬Ј 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] ¬Ј picked=[**his-piano-file + keyboard/tilt INPUT** (off-glass, not touch) ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not WebGPU; Canvas2D fallback) ¬Ј **NMF spectral-factorization TECH** (grep-0√Ч, not real-data) ¬Ј **dissective/prismatic VIBE** (analytical, neither doom nor cozy вАФ the "his own material, clinical" register the jury praised in 606)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 37.3s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (470/470)`, `/dream/630-piano-refract 10.1 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio in sandbox) вАФ the idle prism animation + auto-demo + Canvas2D/keyboard fallbacks mean it reads as alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that the warm-started registers separate cleanly on Karel's actual recording and that solo/mute is as click-free as designed.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/630-piano-refract/README.md`

### `632-polymeter-loom` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 435, 2026-06-15)
[/dream/632-polymeter-loom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/632-polymeter-loom) вАФ **"Polymeter Loom": interlocking Euclidean rhythms woven into a hypnotic groove you watch being woven.** Five pitched-percussion voices (kick ¬Ј bass ¬Ј marimba ¬Ј bell ¬Ј shaker) each play a **Euclidean rhythm** E(k,n) вАФ k onsets spread maximally-evenly over n steps via the **Bjorklund** algorithm вАФ on *different* step-counts (16/8/16/16/12), so the combined groove is **polymetric** and only realigns after the LCM of all step-counts (a long, evolving loop). The marimba+bell share a pattern but one runs **1.2% faster** вАФ **Steve Reich phasing** вАФ sliding out of unison and slowly back, so minute 2 sounds unlike minute 0 (long-form state without a loop). A **three.js loom** renders each voice as a concentric bead ring; beads flash (emissive + scale pop) on each onset, and the phasing rings visibly counter-rotate вАФ the weave tightening and loosening. Off-glass controls: **Weave/Pause**, keys `1`вАУ`5` toggle voices, `q/a w/s e/d r/f t/g` nudge each voice's onset count k, `space` toggles phasing, tempo slider 70вАУ150 BPM. Idle auto-demo (loom rotates/breathes + rings drift before any audio); AudioContext created/resumed inside the first gesture (iOS unlock); graceful `text-rose-300` fallbacks for missing WebGL/AudioContext. References: **Steve Reich** (*Music for 18 Musicians*, *Clapping Music* вАФ phasing); **Godfried Toussaint**, *The Euclidean Algorithm Generates Traditional Musical Rhythms* (2005). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І435** (groove = microtiming/interlocking-meter science; JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 "build the missing middle вАФ danceable/groove"). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 missing-middle registers): beat `631-drop-engine` (euphoric EDM build-and-drop + lab-first sidechain pump) and `633-slow-burn` (tender neo-soul microtiming) on honest ambition (two canonical refs that drive it) + output diversity (three.js, 0√Ч in last 10) + cleanest vibe-threading (groove that dodges BOTH banned poles вАФ doom AND cozy/warm); both losers banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І435** seeds. **Ambition honest 3/5** вАФ **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (Euclidean generator + phasing clock/lookahead scheduler + multi-voice FM/pluck synth + three.js loom = 4) + **#3** named refs (Reich + Toussaint). #1 not claimed (euclidean/polymeter/Reich all referenced earlier in the corpus вАФ only `sidechain`, which was 631's, was grep-0√Ч). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√Ч ¬Ј 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] + rolling-10 over-rep=[WebGL2 OUTPUT 4√Ч] ¬Ј picked=[**keyboard + voice-toggle INPUT** (off-glass, not touch) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (0√Ч in last 10 вАФ off banned WebGPU AND over-rep WebGL2) ¬Ј **Euclidean-polymeter + Reich-phasing TECH** ¬Ј **hypnotic/groove VIBE** (danceable, neither doom nor cozy)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, 471/471 static pages, `/dream/632-polymeter-loom` prerendered static вЧЛ, in `app-path-routes-manifest.json`, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio in sandbox) вАФ the idle loom rotation + bead pulse + WebGL/audio fallbacks mean it reads as alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that the Reich phasing pair audibly drifts and the polymetric weave grooves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/632-polymeter-loom/README.md`
