### `636-kids-star-pilot` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј kids ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 436, 2026-06-15)
[/dream/636-kids-star-pilot](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/636-kids-star-pilot) вАФ **"Star Pilot": a 4-year-old flies a glowing comet with a game controller through a field of musical star-gates вАФ and the gates they pass keep echoing back, so a melody builds itself.** Push the **left stick** (or **arrow keys / WASD** вАФ automatic fallback, live `gamepadconnected` switch) to fly a momentum-driven ship through six **just-intonation-tuned star-gates** that bloom and ring soft additive bell-tones; face buttons (or **space / 1вАУ4**) drop sparkly mallet+shimmer percussion. The heart is a **lookahead-scheduled loop-memory sequencer**: the last ~8 gates you visited are remembered and echo back on a slow pulse, so the music *accumulates and evolves* вАФ minute 2 sounds unlike minute 0 (genuine state, not a loop). **No score, no fail state, no reading** вАФ the ship softly bounces off the edges, it can't crash. Idle ~5s and a gentle auto-flight resumes so the scene is never silent and a glance always shows it alive. Renders on **Canvas2D** (a glowing additive-trail starfield вАФ the deliberately under-used renderer, 0√Ч in the last 10, off both the jury-banned WebGPU and the over-rep WebGL2). Kid-safe master chain (`gain вЖТ lowpass 7.5kHz вЖТ fast-attack DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, gains capped, triggers rate-limited), Start-gesture AudioContext unlock, `text-violet-300` "connect a controller or use arrow keys" hint / `text-rose-300` canvas-fail notice. References: **Toshio Iwai, _Electroplankton_ (Nintendo DS, 2005)** + **Tetsuya Mizuguchi, _Rez_ / _Child of Eden_** (flying-through-a-synaesthetic-music-space). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І436** (kid-native NON-touch inputs are under-used вАФ the kids side keeps reaching for mic + camera-optical-flow; gamepad is 0√Ч recently + jury-blessed via 587; and the active-wonder *middle* register is what the kids side lacks per JURY 2026-06-15). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal NON-touch explorers, honoring JURY provocation #4's touch ban): beat `634-kids-tilt-river` (tilt вЖТ flow-field light river, three.js) and `635-kids-sing-kite` (voice-pitch вЖТ kite altitude, Canvas2D) on diversity (gamepad is the rarest lab input) + genuine evolving state (loop-memory) + cleanest build; both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І436** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the kids norm): **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (gamepad-poll + keyboard fallback ¬Ј flight physics + gate collision ¬Ј bell/percussion + loop-memory sequencer w/ lookahead clock ¬Ј Canvas2D starfield = 4) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Mizuguchi). #1 not claimed (gamepad used by 587; sequencer not lab-first). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT ¬Ј adult "edges" reflex ¬Ј 4th real-data] + rolling-10=[WebGL2 OUTPUT 4√Ч] ¬Ј picked=[**gamepad+keyboard INPUT** (off-glass; rarest in lab) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (0√Ч in last 10) ¬Ј **gamepad-flight + loop-memory-sequencer TECH** ¬Ј **playful arcade-wonder VIBE** (the missing middle вАФ neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 33.9s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (472/472)`, `/dream/636-kids-star-pilot 4.54 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real gamepad/audio in sandbox) вАФ the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean it flies + sings on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can fly it with arrow keys; unverified by ear/hand: that the JI gates read as a melody and the loop-memory echo audibly evolves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/636-kids-star-pilot/README.md`

### `649-chess-duet` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 441, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/649-chess-duet](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/649-chess-duet) вАФ **"Chess Duet": a famous chess game played as a slow, inevitable TWO-VOICE counterpoint вАФ White and Black are two instruments, and you hear the whole drama (quiet opening вЖТ escalating sacrifices вЖТ the sudden-quiet вЖТ the inevitable mate) as a piece that composes itself move by move.** The lab's FIRST piece that sonifies a *structured real-world game* as music вАФ not a physical sensor feed, not an FFT of a sound: the combinatorial structure of a played game **is** the score (the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #5, "music about something other than music вАФ a live chess game as a duet"). Bundled game: **Anderssen vs Kieseritzky, "The Immortal Game," London 1851** (45 plies, ending `23. Be7#`), parsed by a from-scratch SAN parser (no npm dep, no network). Two alternating voices read as call-and-response counterpoint вАФ **White** = warm triangle+sine ("left hand", upper staff), **Black** = a darker FM/reedy saw ("right hand", lower staff); file aвАУh вЖТ scale degree in **D harmonic minor** (dramatic mode), rank 1вАУ8 вЖТ register, piece type вЖТ articulation (pawn short ¬Ј queen long & rich ¬Ј knight grace-note leap ¬Ј bishop gliding ¬Ј rook firm). Game *events* drive the drama: a **capture** = a dissonant clash that resolves; a **check** = a held low tension pedal tone; **castling** = a settled perfect-fifth cadence; the final **checkmate** = a darkly resolving held chord; a running **material-balance** signal biases the timbre brighter/darker so the arc is *felt*. Renders on **inline SVG** (the scarcest renderer вАФ last SVG was 637; off the jury-banned WebGPU, off the rolling-hot three.js [3√Ч], off the over-rep WebGL2): an 8√Ч8 board lights each move's from/to squares (captures glow red, mate glows indigo) beside an unfolding two-staff score with a tracking playhead, plus the legible SAN of the current move. Ear-safe master chain (`gain 0.42 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`); AudioContext created inside the Play gesture (iOS); **auto-starts the game ~2.5s after load** so a silent 06:30 glance is fully alive (board lighting up move by move + the duet playing, zero interaction/hardware). Tempo slider 1.0вАУ3.5 s/move. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client SVG + Web Audio вАФ no network/mic/camera/secret). References: **Anderssen vs Kieseritzky, "The Immortal Game," 1851** (the bundled game); the informal lineage of chess-as-music / game-sonification, reframed here as strict two-voice counterpoint over a real master game with *events* (not just squares) driving the harmony. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І441** (a corpus check killed two "0√Ч" jury claims вАФ MIDI-OUT already exists in `291-harmonograph`, WebRTC in `508-accord-call` вАФ steering ambition toward the genuinely-0√Ч lanes: structured-data-as-counterpoint and AI-pipeline chains; browser generative-composition is a live 2026 front вАФ Loopstate/Riffer/KOSMOS sequencers, GEDMAS/GESMI algorithmic-EDM lineage, SMDIM arXiv 2603.00576 Feb-2026). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers mapping 3 jury-named open lanes): beat `648-latent-chain` (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline chain, audioвЖТimageвЖТwordsвЖТimage вАФ bolder #1 but budget-gated + invisible/unverifiable at a silent glance) and `650-endless-lift` (an ecstatic Shepard-fold gospel key-lift вАФ the bulletproof ecstatic-register fill); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І441** seeds. **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** first structured-game / counterpoint sonification in the lab (a genuinely new "machine," not the banned 588/613/618 physical-feed template) + **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (from-scratch SAN parser + board model ¬Ј two-voice contrapuntal mapper + Web Audio scheduler ¬Ј event-driven harmony/drama state ¬Ј SVG board+score renderer = 4) + **#3** the named game. #4 not claimed (single cycle); #5 not hard-claimed (SMDIM ~3.5mo, server-side вАФ grounding only). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√Ч ¬Ј 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] + renderer-watch=[three.js hot 3√Ч (632/643/645)] ¬Ј picked=[**structured-game-data INPUT** (off touch, off recent mic/audio-file/physical-feed) ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer вАФ off banned WebGPU AND off hot three.js AND off over-rep WebGL2) ¬Ј **game-structureвЖТtwo-voice-counterpoint sonification TECH** (a new "machine," not the banned physical-feed template) ¬Ј **cinematic / narrative-tension VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles вАФ dramatic, not the ominous-austere autopilot, not cozy)]` вАФ clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 91s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (477/477)` [476 from cycle 440 + 649 = 477, confirming 648/650 absent], `/dream/649-chess-duet 6.93 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio in sandbox) вАФ but uniquely low-risk: pure SVG + Web Audio with zero GPU/network/key/sensor surface, the 45 plies were verified against the historical game, and the 2.5s auto-start means the board + duet are alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified: whether the D-harmonic-minor counterpoint + event-drama actually *feel* like the game's arc by ear (the one tuning surface).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/649-chess-duet/README.md`

### `652-kids-dance-band` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј kids ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 442, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/652-kids-dance-band](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/652-kids-dance-band) вАФ **"Dance Band": a 4-year-old makes a whole band play by DANCING in front of the camera вАФ move more and more layers stack and the lights erupt; stand still and it eases back to a gentle pad.** The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15's standing #1 kids critique ("warm-or-silly with nothing between вАФ build the danceable/groovy register with *body* that nobody is building"). The webcam frame is drawn mirrored into a tiny `32√Ч24` offscreen canvas; each rAF reads that grid, takes the **per-cell absolute frame-difference** from the previous frame (noise floor zeroed), and sums to a **global motion-energy** `0..1` plus a diff-weighted **spatial centroid** вАФ **no ML model, no skeleton, pure pixels** (the ISMM "movement *energy* not pose" insight, RESEARCH ¬І442). Energy passes an asymmetric low-pass (fast attack / slow release) and selects one of **5 groove tiers with hysteresis** (separate UP/DOWN thresholds so layers don't chatter): pad вЖТ +kick вЖТ +bass+hats вЖТ +snare backbeat вЖТ FULL-PARTY syncopated melody. A **112 BPM, 16-step Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval(25ms)` pump, ~120ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`, **never** rAF) clocks every layer change and hit to the step grid, so intensity changes feel musical not twitchy; everything is **A-minor-pentatonic** so all movement is in-key (no wrong). The horizontal centroid pans the melody; energy raises filter/gain and brightness. **Output:** a Canvas2D glowing particle/energy field that erupts from the motion centroid (spark count/speed/hue scale with energy вАФ violet calm вЖТ gold full-party), a coarse motion-heat overlay where the body moved, and a ring that flashes on every downbeat. **Privacy:** camera is `getUserMedia` on-device only, **no frames stored or sent** (zero network), with a reassuring note. Audio starts before the camera so the band is **never silent/broken**; soft attack envelopes + 1.2s master fade-in, no harsh transients. **Graceful degrade:** camera denied/unavailable вЖТ `text-rose-300` message + large (вЙ•64px) рЯМЩ-calm / **DANCE!** / рЯФ•-more fallback buttons and Arrow Up/Down, all driving the same energy signal so it fully demos with audio+visuals. References: **Golan Levin & Zachary Lieberman** вАФ *Messa di Voce* / *Manual Input Sessions* (body as continuous reactive AV input); **IRCAM ISMM** research on sonifying movement *qualities* (energy/fluidity/impulsivity) + children's-spontaneous-movement sonification (RESEARCH ¬І442). Born from RESEARCH ¬І442 (movement-energy вЖТ groove; the visible researchвЖТbuild chain). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal NON-touch explorers in the missing-middle register, honoring the jury touch ban): beat `651-kids-choir-leader` (mic voice-pitch вЖТ in-key choir, tender вАФ the realization of banked seed `635-kids-sing-kite`, love-aligned `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП) and `653-kids-bounce-band` (tilt вЖТ collision-quantized beat, bouncy); both banked as built-and-proven **IDEAS ¬І442** seeds. **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5** (the kids norm): **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (camera frame-diff motion-energy + centroid ¬Ј 5-tier hysteresis mapper ¬Ј clocked layered look-ahead groove engine ¬Ј Canvas2D particle/heat field = 4) + **#3** named refs (Levin/Lieberman ¬Ј ISMM). #1 contestable (optical-flow exists in the corpus; whole-body-motion-energyвЖТlayered-groove is application-level, discounted). **Love-aligned** with `234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП (camera/body) + the embodied kids cluster. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј adult "edges" reflex ¬Ј 4th real-data template] ¬Ј picked=[**webcam whole-body-motion-energy INPUT** (off-glass, NOT touch; camera absent from last 10) ¬Ј **Canvas2D particle-field OUTPUT** (NOT WebGPU) ¬Ј **frame-diff motion-energy вЖТ hysteresis-tiered layered groove TECH** ¬Ј **ecstatic/danceable VIBE** (the jury's exact missing middle вАФ NOT warm-glow, NOT silly-foley)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 47s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (478/478)`, `/dream/652-kids-dance-band 4.54 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ, `.html` emitted, `package-lock.json` restored so nothing outside the dream zone is committed), **NOT browser-verified** (no real camera/audio in sandbox) вАФ the always-on soft groove + the DANCE! fallback button mean it plays + erupts on a glance with zero hardware (Karel can drive it with the on-screen buttons / arrow keys even with no camera); unverified by body: that the motion-energy thresholds + `6√Ч` normalization feel right for a real child in a real room (lighting/distance will shift them вАФ needs live calibration), and that the layered groove actually grooves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/652-kids-dance-band/README.md`

### `659-pulse-cathedral` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 445, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/659-pulse-cathedral](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/659-pulse-cathedral) вАФ **"Pulse Cathedral": the lab's FIRST shipped ecstatic/euphoric adult piece вАФ a euphoric EDM build-and-drop journey arc whose energy NEVER lands (riser вЖТ impact вЖТ DROP вЖТ climb вЖТ riser), with a sidechain pump that is both audible AND visible, and a Shepard-folded bass so the key reads as forever-rising.** The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 ("build the missing middle вАФ ecstatic/danceable/groovy; the lab banks every ecstatic candidate [650/653-endless-lift] and never ships it"), and a journey-engine alternative Karel explicitly asked for (care #4: EDM build-and-drop as an alternate arc вАФ still 0√Ч). Audio: a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval(25ms)`, ~120ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`, **never** rAF) clocks a layered Web-Audio bed вАФ four-on-the-floor kick (sine pitch-drop + click), an offbeat rolling bass that is **sidechain-ducked by the kick** (a "pump bus" gain ramped down on each kick and released вАФ the audible French-house pump), a detuned **supersaw** chord stack + pad, a bandpassed plucky arp, a filtered **noise riser** that sweeps a lowpass up through the BUILD, and a tasteful **impact** at the DROP вАФ all in a bright Lydian-leaning mode. A **BUILD(8 bars)вЖТDROPвЖТSUSTAIN(4 bars)вЖТBUILD arc state machine** (`arc.ts`) raises density/cutoff/intensity through the build and **Shepard-folds the bass octave** each cycle so the energy reads as a forever-climb (the "never-landing causal stream" from RESEARCH ¬І445's LiveBand, made literal). **Output:** a raw **WebGL2** fragment-shader **cathedral nave** вАФ brightness pulses with the kick and the **sidechain duck is *visible*** as a brightness dip-and-bloom, light-shafts/sparks erupt at the DROP, color sweeps violet (BUILD) вЖТ gold/white (DROP); animates before audio unlocks, with a **Canvas2D fallback** if WebGL2 is missing. Controls: **Start** (creates/resumes AudioContext in-gesture вАФ iOS unlock + ~0.8s master fade-in), **SPACE / DROP** forces the next drop early, **вЖС/вЖУ ENERGY** adds/removes layers, **TEMPO** 120вАУ130 BPM; ~2.5s idle вЖТ the arc runs itself (autonomous BUILDвЖТDROPвЖТSUSTAIN) so a silent glance is alive. Ear-safe master `gain вЙ§0.45 вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no network/key/mic/camera** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2). References: the **EDM build-and-drop form** (riser вЖТ impact вЖТ drop); **sidechain "pumping" compression** (French-house / Eric Prydz lineage), modeled here as scheduled gain automation; **Roger Shepard**, *"Circularity in Judgments of Relative Pitch"* (1964) вАФ the endless-climb illusion, folded into the bass; and the real-time *continuous causal music stream* research it echoes (Google DeepMind **Lyria RealTime** / **"LiveBand," arXiv 2606.03803, June 2026**) вАФ cited as honest conceptual lineage, NOT implemented with ML. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І445** (the reactive-accompaniment headline was killed by a corpus grep [251/256 already own that lane]; its surviving value вАФ LiveBand's never-landing causal stream вАФ bent the flagship into a euphoric arc that climbs forever). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers across genuinely-open adult registers): beat `660-glasswork` (a tender 3am music-box, inline-SVG, Eno/Budd/Satie вАФ the lab's intimacy gap; lower-leverage register + lower ambition) and `661-murmur-engine` (a boids murmuration AS the music, Canvas2D, Reynolds/Vicsek вАФ but Canvas2D is HOT 3√ЧвЖТ4√Ч and flocking is not lab-first, so no #1); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І445** seeds. **Ambition honest 2вАУ3/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (look-ahead scheduler ¬Ј sidechain-pumped layered bed ¬Ј build-drop arc state machine ¬Ј WebGL2 nave + Canvas2D fallback = 4) + **#3** named refs (EDM build-drop form ¬Ј Prydz sidechain-pumping ¬Ј Shepard 1964 ¬Ј LiveBand/Lyria frame). **#1 SOFT** (Shepard foundational [40/132/187]; the audible+visible sidechain pump is plausibly lab-first but not hard-claimed); **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (LiveBand within-window but server-side ML вАФ lineage only). The real value is the **0√Ч-shipped ecstatic register fill** + a Karel-care-#4 journey-engine alternative. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5√Ч ¬Ј WebGPU OUTPUT 6√Ч ¬Ј adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5√Ч ¬Ј 4th real-data sonification on the 588/613/618 physical-feed template] + renderer-watch=[three.js HOT 3√Ч ¬Ј Canvas2D HOT 3√Ч] ¬Ј picked=[**keyboard + autonomous INPUT** (off banned touch; off recent mic/camera) ¬Ј **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST screen renderer вАФ off banned WebGPU AND off BOTH hot three.js & Canvas2D; Canvas2D fallback only) ¬Ј **EDM build-drop-arc + sidechain-pump + Shepard-fold TECH** ¬Ј **ecstatic/euphoric VIBE** (the jury's exact 0√Ч-shipped missing middle вАФ dodges BOTH banned poles: NOT doom, NOT cozy)]` вАФ clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 77s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (481/481)` [480 from cycle 444 + 659 = 481, confirming 660/661 absent], `/dream/659-pulse-cathedral 7.65 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ the ~2.5s idle auto-demo runs the BUILDвЖТDROPвЖТSUSTAIN arc and the WebGL2 nave animates before audio unlocks (Canvas2D fallback), so a silent 06:30 glance shows the cathedral pulsing + dropping with zero hardware; unverified: whether the pump *feels* like a pump, the drop *hits*, and the Shepard-fold reads as a forever-climb on real speakers (mix tuned by reasoning, not heard); the autonomous-demo visual kick is an approximation so its beat may drift slightly from the shader pulse.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/659-pulse-cathedral/README.md`

### `669-kids-hum-answer` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј kids ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 448, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/669-kids-hum-answer](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/669-kids-hum-answer) вАФ **"Hum & Answer": a child hums one note, closes their eyes, and an unseen friend answers вАФ not by resolving sweetly, but by LEANING on a tense note and then SIGHING down to rest, so the child discovers tensionвЖТrelease with no screen at all.** The lab's **FIRST off-the-glass KIDS piece** вАФ the directest hit on the jury's (2026-06-16) loudest, most-repeated, still-unaddressed directive ("get at least one builder off the glass; 13 of 15 render to a glass screen; the 2 that aren't are the best things here" + the Karel-facing line) вАФ and it shipped the в≠Р PRIORITY off-glass banked seed (`664-kids-hum-answer`, ¬І446) while pushing it past the banked single 4вАУ3 into a full chain. **Off-the-glass / audio-first:** near-black screen, ONE soft CSS radial glow that breathes with post-limiter amplitude and shifts hue (violet/blue while a suspension is TENSE вЖТ warm amber as it RESOLVES); the whole experience is meant to work eyes-closed, the glow is there only for a glancing eye. **Input:** mic (`getUserMedia({audio})`); real-time monophonic pitch detection by **autocorrelation (Chris-Wilson approach)** вАФ RMS gate + clarity gate + parabolic-interpolation refine, ~75вАУ1000 Hz, **octave-collapsed** into a child-voice band (~G3вАУG4) to defend against octave errors; a short stability window means it answers a *deliberate* hum, not a passing slide. **The harmonic event (NOT pentatonic / NOT scale-snap):** the detected hum becomes a tonic and an unseen synthesized choir walks a genuine **suspension CHAIN** of three textbook common-practice figures that all resolve **DOWN by step** вАФ **4вАУ3** (P4 sighing to the M3), then **7вАУ6** (m7 leaning to the M6), then **2вАУ1** (M2 settling to the unison) вАФ each tension held ~1.1 s, a ~0.3 s downward portamento "sigh," then ~0.9 s of rest, over a tonic drone an octave below. The child meets a tense note and hears it resolve: the denial of closure, then closure. **Synthesis (NO samples, NO AI voice):** formant-bandpassed sawtooth "ah" voices (three parallel bandpass resonators ~800/1150/2900 Hz). Safe master chain `gain (0.34) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`, capped per-voice gain 0.16, soft envelopes, no harsh transients. **Privacy:** no API route, no network вАФ the mic stream is connected only to an analyser, never routed to output, never recorded or sent (stated on screen). **Idle / no-mic auto-demo:** mic denied/silent вЖТ a self-playing loop fires a synthesized "child" note that triggers the suspension-chain answer every several seconds with a `text-rose-300` notice, so a silent 06:30 glance still hears tensionвЖТresolution with zero hardware; full cleanup of MediaStream tracks / AudioContext / rAF / timers on unmount. References: the **4вАУ3 / 7вАУ6 / 2вАУ1 suspension figures** of common-practice voice leading; **tonal closure and its denial as perceived emotional cues in children** (developmental music-cognition literature, RESEARCH ¬І448 вАФ children read closure/its-denial before they can label major/minor, making tensionвЖТrelease the most age-robust harmonic event here); **Bobby McFerrin's "Circlesong"** call-and-response model. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І448** (which harmonic event a 4yo can actually perceive: *change* + *closure* before *mode*) вЖТ the dive's finding + the jury's off-glass directive jointly selected this from a kids **WIDE** fire of three orthogonal harmonic-event explorers: beat **`668-kids-two-suns`** (continuous majorвЖФminor third-glide, tilt вЖТ three.js, cosmic-dramatic вАФ strongest renderer-diversity, but the mode-flip premise is developmentally shaky for a 4yo and 669 was the only off-glass sibling) and **`670-kids-drone-cave`** (shifting tanpura drone under fixed bells, gamepad вЖТ WebGL2, mysterious вАФ fresh moving-pedal mechanism, but WebGL2 is over-represented 4√Ч and gamepad-fly overlaps 636); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І448** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the kids norm): **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (autocorrelation pitch-detect w/ gates+octave-collapse ¬Ј suspension-chain voice-leading engine ¬Ј formant "ah" synth + tonic drone ¬Ј amplitude/tension-driven glow + demo fallback = 4) + **#3** named refs (the suspension figures ¬Ј McFerrin ¬Ј developmental tonal-closure literature). **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ honest: the micвЖТharmonized-answer core has lab precedent (`280-kids-echo-canyon`); the fresh layer is the suspension *chain* pedagogy (tensionвЖТrelease walked across several figures), which is why this lost the ¬І446 tie-break to 662 but wins now on the binding off-glass directive. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-16)=[pentatonic/scale-snap "no-wrong-notes" TECH 6√Ч ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT 4√Ч ¬Ј look-ahead-scheduler-generative-bed as the only idea 7√Ч ¬Ј warm/cozy kids VIBE 4√Ч ¬Ј glass-screen as the primary deliverable (13/15)] ¬Ј picked=[**mic/voice INPUT** (love-aligned `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП) ¬Ј **audio-first / OFF-GLASS OUTPUT** (the rarest+best-rated output in the lab; the kids side's first ever) ¬Ј **autocorrelation pitch-detect вЖТ suspension-chain voice-leading TECH** (genuine dissonanceвЖТresolution, explicitly NOT pentatonic, NOT a scheduler-bed) ¬Ј **hushed/sacred, tender-curious VIBE** (NOT warm-cozy, NOT silly)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag, and the only sibling that breaks the glass-screen monoculture. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 37.0s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (484/484)`, `.next/server/app/dream/669-kids-hum-answer.html` emitted вАФ prerendered static вЧЛ; losers `668`/`670` confirmed absent), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio/mic in sandbox) вАФ the no-mic demo loop means the suspensionвЖТresolution plays on a glance with zero hardware; unverified: pitch-detection accuracy on a real child's breathy voice, and the felt musicality/timing of the leans and sighs (the one tuning surface, on a real device).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/669-kids-hum-answer/README.md`

### `671-glasswork` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 449, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/671-glasswork](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/671-glasswork) вАФ **"Glasswork": a tender, intimate, 3am generative music-box whose harmony *breathes* through REAL four-part voice-leading вАФ on every chord change each voice glides (audible portamento) to its NEAREST chord tone, so you both SEE the threads cross and HEAR the pad slide rather than jump.** The directest hit on JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #5 ("declare the missing middle solved and freeze groove/EDM for a week вАФ the un-built adult register is now **tender / intimate** (the banked `660-glasswork`) вАФ go there") вАФ the explicit, named adult ask for this window, and the realization of the long-banked tender seed. **Audio (all Web Audio, no samples, no deps):** key is **D Dorian** (the natural-6 gives the wistful-not-sad colour, deliberately NOT C-major-pentatonic) with a rare Lydian-#11 tint; harmony is a **tension/resolution-weighted random walk** over a small diatonic palette (Dm7 ¬Ј G ¬Ј C ¬Ј Am7 ¬Ј Em ¬Ј F ¬Ј IVadd9 ¬Ј a rare tint) with hand-tuned transition weights giving a homeward gravity, a new chord every ~6вАУ10 s, never a fixed loop (`compose.ts`). The technique anchor: an **exhaustive 4-voice nearest-tone assignment** (`voiceleading.ts`) that minimizes total semitone motion with doubling/unison penalties so the chord stays open, then each pad voice **portamentos ~0.4вАУ0.8 s** to its target вАФ the glide is the point. A separate **never-repeating weighted melody** arches over each phrase (sine register-arch + woven rests, `compose.ts`). Synth (`synth.ts`): FM music-box bell (melody) ¬Ј 4 portamento glass-pad voices ¬Ј soft sub following the root ¬Ј ConvolverNode reverb (synthetic generated impulse) ¬Ј filtered feedback-delay shimmer ¬Ј master ends in a **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** (вИТ6 dB / ratio 12 / master 0.34) so it can never clip or blast. **Output: inline SVG** (the scarcest renderer вАФ last SVG was `649`; off the jury-banned **Canvas2D**, off the hot three.js/WebGL2): a dark constellation of soft `<radialGradient>`+`<feGaussianBlur>` nodes (one per pad voice, y = pitch) that bloom on each onset, **faint threads tracing the voice-leading** (a fading `<line>` from each voice's old tone to its new one вАФ you watch the harmony move), and brief brighter sparks for melody bells; React re-render throttled to ~24 fps with all per-frame state in refs. **Interaction is gentle and optional** вАФ pointer height = brighter register + more shimmer, pointer-right = busier (shorter chords/faster melody); a tap "drops a stone" pulling harmony toward rest on the next change; ~1.5 s idle eases back to autonomous. **It plays itself** вАФ Begin and the pad swells in, the melody enters, chords change on their own, so a silent 06:30 glance sees blooming nodes + crossing threads and hears the piece with zero interaction or hardware. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no network/mic/camera/GPU/secret** (pure client Web Audio + inline SVG вАФ the lowest failure surface in the lab; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture for iOS, full teardown on unmount). References: **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports*, *Reflection* вАФ generative ambient) ¬Ј **Harold Budd** (*The Pearl*) ¬Ј **Erik Satie** (*Gymnop√©dies* вАФ intimate melancholy); technique anchor: classical four-part **voice-leading**. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І449** (generative-ambient that obeys voice-leading rules вАФ minimize each voice's motion, omit minor-9ths вАФ is a live browser lineage [Alex Bainter / generative.fm], anchored in Eno's *Music for Airports*; tagged `[older, foundational]` honestly вАФ the build is jury-directive + IDEAS-seed driven, path (c)). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers across under-built adult registers, each a different input √Ч output √Ч technique √Ч vibe, none touching a banned tag): beat **`672-cinema-swell`** (a cinematic orchestral-swell instrument вАФ hold chords вЖТ film-score string divisi blooms with crescendo swells + a tension arc, MIDI/keyboard вЖТ three.js, Zimmer/Richter/J√≥hannsson; Karel care #4 journey-engine alt) and **`673-kepler-chimes`** (the music of the spheres вАФ planets whose orbital periods snap to small-integer mean-motion resonance become an audible consonant polyrhythm that locks from phasing, tilt вЖТ raw WebGL2, Kepler/Matt-Russo-System-Sounds); both banked as strong **IDEAS ¬І449** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the lab norm): **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (harmonic random-walk ¬Ј exhaustive nearest-tone voice-leading engine ¬Ј weighted never-repeating melody + scheduler ¬Ј 4-voice glass synth w/ reverb + feedback-delay shimmer ¬Ј inline-SVG renderer = 5) + **#3** named refs (Eno/Budd/Satie + voice-leading). **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ generative-ambient voice-leading is worked territory; the value is the explicitly-named **tender register fill** + the scarcest renderer + the lowest-risk glance candidate. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-16, rolling-15)=[pentatonic/scale-snap "no-wrong-notes" TECH 6√Ч ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT 4√Ч ¬Ј look-ahead-scheduler-generative-bed as the only idea 7√Ч ¬Ј warm/cozy kids VIBE 4√Ч ¬Ј glass-screen as the sole deliverable] ¬Ј picked=[**pointer (gentle/optional) INPUT** ¬Ј **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer вАФ off banned Canvas2D AND off hot three.js/WebGL2) ¬Ј **tension-weighted harmonic walk + exhaustive nearest-tone voice-leading TECH** (explicitly NOT pentatonic, NOT a scheduler-bed-as-only-idea вАФ it has 5 distinct ideas) ¬Ј **intimate / wistful / melancholy VIBE** (the jury's named open adult register; NOT warm-cozy, NOT ecstatic/groove вАФ which the jury froze this week)]` вАФ clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 117s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (485/485)`, `.next/server/app/dream/671-glasswork.html` emitted вАФ prerendered static вЧЛ, `/dream/671-glasswork 5.43 kB / 108 kB First Load`; losers `672`/`673` confirmed absent), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio in sandbox) вАФ but uniquely low-risk (pure SVG + Web Audio, zero GPU/sensor/network/key surface) and the piece is fully autonomous on Begin so a silent 06:30 glance is alive with zero hardware; unverified: the felt glide timing, the chord-walk weights, melody rest rates, and reverb/shimmer balance (reasoned defaults вАФ the one tuning surface, on a real device).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/671-glasswork/README.md`

### `677-presence-field` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј DEEP-winner (cycle 451, 2026-06-17)
[/dream/677-presence-field](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/677-presence-field) вАФ **"Presence Field": step back from the screen and your whole body, tracked as a luminous skeleton, conducts a SPATIAL ensemble вАФ each limb is a sustained voice placed in 3D around you, so spreading and raising your arms sweeps the music through the room.** The directest hit on the lab's single biggest untouched first, named across THREE consecutive juries (JURY 2026-06-16 #2 + standing: "depth-camera / room-presence / projection installation вАФ zero embodied-spatial builds still") вАФ the first ADULT installation/room-presence piece, and Karel's care #3 (live-performance) + #5 (installation mode). **The core idea вАФ spatialization IS the instrument:** one Web-Audio `AudioListener` at the origin, and **seven sustained voices (head, both wrists, both elbows, torso, hips) each routed through its OWN `PannerNode` with `panningModel="HRTF"`** placed at the live 3D position of its tracked joint (screen-x вЖТ left/right, height вЖТ register + y, implied depth вЖТ z). Moving the body audibly moves the voices around the listener вАФ that sweep is the payload (the realization of RESEARCH ¬І451's spatializationвЖТpresence finding and "Sounding Bodies" poseвЖТspatial-sound). **Harmony (NOT pentatonic вАФ banned this cycle):** a slow drifting D-Dorian chord cycle (Dm7вЖТG7вЖТAm7вЖТFmaj7вЖТDm7, ~9вАУ13s, 2.2s glides), adult/meditative, not a no-wrong-notes pad and not a groove look-ahead scheduler; ear-safe master gain (вЙ§0.32) вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` вЖТ destination, dry + convolution-reverb wet send, ~0.7s fade-in; stillness eases to a soft enveloping drone (`settle()`). **Input:** webcam **full-body pose** via **MediaPipe Pose** (Tasks-Vision `PoseLandmarker`), loaded from the jsDelivr **CDN at runtime** via an indirect `new Function('return import(...)')` so the bundler never resolves it (no npm dep, build never depends on it). **Output: three.js** (the scarcest renderer вАФ 0√Ч in the last 10 ships; off the jury-banned Canvas2D, off the hotter WebGL2) вАФ a dark foggy room with a faint grid floor, glowing additive joint spheres + skeleton bone-lines, and a hued glowing marker at each voice's live spatial position; slow auto-rotate for installation feel; animates BEFORE audio unlocks. **Privacy:** camera is on-device only, analysed in-browser, never stored or sent (stated on screen); no API route, no guard needed (no network/server/secret вАФ the only network is the public MediaPipe model/wasm CDN). **Graceful degrade (the 06:30-glance path is MediaPipe-independent):** an **idle preview** runs a *synthetic* drifting body through the three.js room + spatial ensemble before Start is even pressed, and any failure (camera denied, MediaPipe/CDN/WASM load error, WebGL loss, no pose, or ~2.5s idle) shows a `text-rose-300` notice and runs that same self-playing virtual body sweeping the full ensemble вАФ so a silent glance hears + sees the spatial room with zero hardware and zero CDN dependency. Full teardown on unmount (MediaStream tracks stopped, landmarker closed, three.js renderer/geometries/materials disposed, AudioContext closed, rAF cancelled, resize listener removed). References: **arXiv:2601.22082** (Jan 2026 вАФ spatialization + situated audio raise the felt *sense of presence*) ¬Ј **"Sounding Bodies," arXiv:2311.06285** (3D spatial sound from body pose) ¬Ј **Myron Krueger, *Videoplace* (1974)** (the body as the interface, no wearables) ¬Ј **Refik Anadol** room-scale presence. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І451** (the embodied-spatial room is the lab's biggest untouched first; the research front says the payload is the *spatialization itself*, not the viz) and realizes the long-banked **`442-body-orchestra`** seed. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (ONE concept вАФ body-presence вЖТ spatial-audio вАФ via three body-sensing approaches): beat **`678-presence-flow`** (the BULLETPROOF no-dependency twin вАФ webcam frame-differencing вЖТ the same HRTF ensemble, raw WebGL2; banked в≠Р as the safest spatial-presence resurrect) and **`679-presence-veil`** (the ENVELOPMENT take вАФ selfie-segmentation silhouette MASS widens the per-voice azimuth fan from a frontal arc to a surround RING as you approach, raw WebGL2 veil; banked); both **IDEAS ¬І451**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (MediaPipe-Pose body tracking ¬Ј 7-voice HRTF spatial-panner ensemble + drifting D-Dorian harmony ¬Ј three.js luminous-room renderer + synthetic-body auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named refs (arXiv:2601.22082 ¬Ј "Sounding Bodies" ¬Ј Krueger ¬Ј Anadol). **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ MediaPipe pose/hands/segmentation is used across the KIDS side (217/287/295/419/444/582/617); the genuinely-open frontier is the *register* (an ADULT installation/room-presence piece with spatialization-as-instrument = 0√Ч builds), not the sensor. **#5 NOT hard-claimed** вАФ the spatialization-presence paper is Jan 2026 (~5 months, not a <30-day drop). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-16)=[pentatonic/scale-snap TECH ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬Ј look-ahead-scheduler-generative-bed as the only idea ¬Ј warm/cozy kids VIBE ¬Ј glass-screen as the primary/default-reflex deliverable] ¬Ј picked=[**full-body-pose / room-presence INPUT** (embodied, off the glass-control reflex вАФ you play it from across the room with your body, not a finger on the screen) ¬Ј **three.js OUTPUT** (scarcest renderer, 0√Ч in last 10; NOT Canvas2D) ¬Ј **HRTF spatialization-as-instrument + drifting modal voice-leading TECH** (explicitly NOT pentatonic, NOT a scheduler-groove-bed) ¬Ј **adult meditative / installation / awe VIBE** (NOT warm-cozy kids, NOT the frozen ecstatic/groove, NOT doom)]` вАФ clean on every banned tag; addresses the *embodied-spatial / get-off-the-couch* reading of the off-glass ask (vs the audio-first reading 669/666/655 already serve). **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 48s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (487/487)` [486 from cycle 450 + 677 = 487, confirming 678/679 absent], `/dream/677-presence-field 6.36 kB / 298 kB First Load` prerendered static вЧЛ, `.next/server/app/dream/677-presence-field.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ the idle-preview + auto-demo guarantee a live glance with zero hardware; unverified by body/ear: whether MediaPipe Pose loads + tracks well on Karel's phone, whether the jointвЖТHRTF placement reads as voices genuinely moving *around* you (HRTF front/back/elevation cues are weaker on speakers than headphones), and the felt latency/smoothing of the skeleton on a real device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/677-presence-field/README.md`

### `702-kids-monster-band` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј kids ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 460, 2026-06-17)
[/dream/702-kids-monster-band](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/702-kids-monster-band) вАФ **"Monster Band": two little kids on two phones build ONE goofy 16-step monster groove neither could make alone.** The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-17 on **three** provocations at once: **#3 "ship a multi-user / two-player piece вАФ still 0√Ч across the entire window"** (the genuinely unbuilt register; *breaks the standing solo monoculture* вАФ every one of the last 15 was one person alone), **#1 "groove, not a cadence"** (a beat built by tapping, emphatically NOT the harmonic-event/voice-leading template banned on the kids side), and **#5 "make a kid laugh"** (googly monsters that squash and BOING). Two browser tabs/phones open the same URL вЖТ join the same room over same-origin **`BroadcastChannel`** (no network, no server, **no api route, no guard, no secret**) вЖТ both phase-lock to **one shared 16-step ~96 BPM loop** via a broadcast beat-zero **epoch** (first player claims epoch 0; joiners adopt it; ties resolve last-write-wins toward the earliest). Each kid taps four giant вЙ•96px buttons вАФ **рЯ•Б BOOM** (low sine thump) ¬Ј **рЯУѓ HONK** (triangle+FM down-glide) ¬Ј **рЯЂІ POP** (band-passed noise blip) ¬Ј **рЯМА BOING** (rubbery saw up-glide) вАФ that drop sounds onto the nearest of the 16 steps and **loop forever**; the two kids' patterns overlay into one emergent groove. **Each monster squashes and bounces on EVERY hit вАФ including the friend's hits** (instant `hit` messages + last-write-wins per-player 16-step pattern beads), so each kid *sees* the other playing in real time. **Input:** multi-user (same-origin BroadcastChannel) + big-button tap вАФ the social co-play is the mechanic (off the jury-banned touch-as-primary reflex). **Output: three.js via @react-three/fiber** вАФ bouncy googly 3D monsters with per-hit squash-and-stretch envelopes (off the banned WebGL2 + audio-first-SVG; three.js 1√ЧвЖТ2√Ч in the rolling-10, well under the 4√Ч ban line). **Technique:** Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler (~25ms tick / ~120ms look-ahead) scheduling audio LOCALLY against the shared epoch (only the epoch + patterns cross the channel вАФ audio is never streamed, which is what keeps the loops phase-locked); presence via hello/welcome/bye + a ~1.6s silence timeout; the two monsters detuned ¬±6% so they sound like siblings. **A real tapped GROOVE, emphatically NOT a harmonic event/cadence.** **Solo glance covered:** if no second player is present a friendly рЯСї ghost-friend monster auto-plays a complementary pattern, and a ~2.5s idle auto-demo seeds a starter beat вАФ so it sounds and bounces from the first second on one device; the ghost steps aside the instant a real friend joins and returns if they leave. Kids-safe by construction: вЙ•96px targets, <100ms response, master gain ~0.3 вЖТ lowpass вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` (nothing harsh), iOS AudioContext unlock in the Start gesture, full teardown (close BroadcastChannel, cancel rAF, close AudioContext, clear timers). References: **Toca Band** (Toca Boca вАФ the no-reading tap-a-character-to-add-a-part toy this is modelled on) ¬Ј **Yamaha Tenori-on** (the lit 16-step grid sequencer) ¬Ј **The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers** (1970sвАУ80s networked ensembles вАФ *send control data, not audio*; "an ensemble nobody could play alone"). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І460** (the multi-user register is the jury's 0√Ч ask; The Hub's control-signal architecture ported to a kid-legible Toca-Band interface). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 divergent silly/groove explorers on different embodied inputs): beat **`703-kids-boing-zoo`** в≠Р (tilt вЖТ jelly-animal physics bonks вЖТ emergent slapstick rhythm; Canvas2D, zero deps/GPU/permission вАФ the most bulletproof + funniest, banked в≠Р as the safest silly-kids resurrect) and **`704-kids-funny-face-party`** (front-camera motion вЖТ googly creature + a FREEZE-dance game; Canvas2D вАФ the directest off-glass/embodied take with a fresh freeze-dance mechanic, banked); both **IDEAS ¬І460**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel presence + last-write-wins beads sync ¬Ј shared-epoch look-ahead scheduler ¬Ј local Web Audio FM/noise monster synth ¬Ј three.js/r3f bouncy-monster viz = 4) + **#3** named refs (Toca Band ¬Ј Tenori-on ¬Ј The Hub/League of Automatic Music Composers). **#1 NOT claimed** вАФ BroadcastChannel multi-user already exists in the lab (319/334/341); this is a fresh *framing/recency* win (multi-user is 0√Ч in the whole window) + breaks the solo monoculture, not a technique-first. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading/tension-resolution TECH (esp. kids) ¬Ј audio-first+minimal-SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬Ј touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј hushed/tender VIBE ¬Ј standing single-user/solo] ¬Ј picked=[**multi-user / BroadcastChannel INPUT** (two players are the input; secondary tap; *breaks the solo ban*) ¬Ј **three.js/r3f OUTPUT** (off WebGL2 + audio-first-SVG) ¬Ј **shared-clock 16-step tapped-groove TECH** (NOT a harmonic event) ¬Ј **silly/friendly monster-band VIBE** (off hushed/tender вАФ laugh-first)]` вАФ clears EVERY ban and actively *breaks the standing solo monoculture*. **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates exit 0; then authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0, `Generating static pages (497/497)`** [+1 route = the winner], `/dream/702-kids-monster-band` present), **NOT browser/two-device-verified** (no second device/audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ the ghost-friend + idle auto-demo guarantee a live sounding glance on one device; unverified by hand: true two-device sync convergence under contention (epoch-adoption + presence-timeout logic is in place and degrades to the ghost), and whether the monster voices + squash read as "a band two kids built together" on a real phone.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/702-kids-monster-band/README.md`

### `704-spectral-seance` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј DEEP-winner (cycle 461, 2026-06-17)
[/dream/704-spectral-seance](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/704-spectral-seance) вАФ **"Spectral S√©ance": a generative sound dreams an austere data-image вАФ and then the image *becomes the next instrument you hear*, re-sonified column-by-column as a spectrogram while a cyan scan-line sweeps it in lock-step. You literally see AND hear the picture being played.** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #4** ("extend the two ceiling builds [689, 666] instead of starting a sixth tonal-tension toy") вАФ the lab's first true **closed audioвЖТimageвЖТAUDIO loop**, where ceiling-build `689-dream-chapters` only went one-way (audioвЖТimage). **The closed loop, four subsystems:** (1) a generative **inharmonic spectral bed** вАФ 8 partials at NON-integer ratios (1, 2.07, 3.31, 4.62вА¶) so it stays a *texture* and never collapses into a chord/cadence (the harmonic-event/voice-leading template the jury banned this cycle); (2) an **AnalyserNode spectral descriptor** (low/mid/high band split, centroid brightness, flatness/roughness, density) вЖТ a **controlled-vocabulary prompt** (bright+sparse вЖТ "high thin filaments of white light on black, austere data grid"; dark+rough вЖТ "dense low charcoal static"); (3) the dreamed image вАФ **guarded `fal-ai/flux/schnell`** when a key exists, else a **deterministic descriptor-seeded procedural data-image** (domain-warped interference/line-field + grid); (4) **the return trip** вАФ the image is downsampled to a 128√Ч48 offscreen buffer and read as a **spectrogram/score**: each column = a moment, each row = a log-spaced frequency bin (~80HzвАУ6kHz, top = high pitch), and a bank of **48 oscillators** has its per-row gains driven directly by per-column pixel brightness as the scan-line sweeps (~75ms/column, ~9.6s per 128-column pass); the re-sonified spectrum then feeds the *next* descriptor, closing the loop. **Input:** autonomous/generative + AI-image (NO mic, NO touch-as-primary вАФ it runs itself; a single "Begin" gesture unlocks audio for iOS, ~2.5s idle auto-start). **Output: raw WebGL2** вАФ the dreamed image + sweeping cyan scan-line + Ikeda grid/vignette rendered as a textured quad in a fragment shader (Canvas2D used ONLY for the tiny offscreen pixel-sampler, never for output). **Technique:** image-as-spectrogram cross-modal re-sonification вАФ a genuinely never-used mechanic in the lab (689/441 were one-way audioвЖТimage; this is the literal *return trip*). **Vibe:** Ryoji Ikeda austere data-spectacle (black ground, white/cyan, precise) вАФ deliberately far from the jury-banned hushed/tender pole. **Bulletproof keyless glance:** any non-200 / network error / CORS-taint silently falls through to the procedural data-image, re-sonified through the *identical* column-by-column path вАФ so with no `FAL_KEY` (how the public preview usually runs) it still dreams an image AND plays it back as sound; the status line shows "dreaming (procedural)" in `text-emerald-300/95` so it reads as fine-without-a-key. WebGL2 absence shows a graceful notice and still runs audio. Ear-safe: 48 osc summed with tiny per-osc gains вЖТ lowpass вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` вЖТ master hard-capped at 0.34, smooth gain ramps (no zipper clicks); full teardown on unmount (stop all oscillators, close audioCtx, clear timers, cancel rAF). References: **Ryoji Ikeda** (data-spectacle) ¬Ј **Iannis Xenakis *UPIC*** (1977, draw-the-sound) ¬Ј **the *ANS synthesizer*** (1958, image-as-spectrogram) ¬Ј the spectrogramвЖФwaveform synthesis lineage. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (ONE concept вАФ *the music dreams a picture and the dream changes the music* вАФ via 2 approaches to **how the image returns to audio**): beat **`703-latent-oracle`** в≠Р (the SOFT-closure twin вАФ the loop closes via *dominant color*вЖТsynth [hueвЖТcutoff, brightnessвЖТshimmer, saturationвЖТdissonance], WebGL2 ping-pong feedback smear, Anadol/Memo Akten *Learning to See*; the long-banked 687 seed, fully built вАФ banked в≠Р **IDEAS ¬І461** as the resurrect for a key-awake night, since its color-drift narrows keyless). **Ambition honest 4/5**: **#1** never-used technique (image-as-spectrogram literal re-sonification вАФ the closed *return trip*; 689/441 were one-way) ¬Ј **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (inharmonic generative bed + FFT descriptorвЖТprompt + guarded-flux/procedural image gen + 48-osc re-sonifier = 4) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (Ikeda ¬Ј Xenakis UPIC ¬Ј ANS) ¬Ј **#5** recent research (RESEARCH ¬І461 dive + the ¬І455-banked seed it consumes). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading/tension-resolution TECH ¬Ј audio-first+minimal-SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬Ј touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј hushed/tender VIBE ¬Ј standing single-user/solo] ¬Ј picked=[**autonomous/generative + AI-image INPUT** (it dreams itself; off the touch reflex) ¬Ј **WebGL2 raster OUTPUT** ¬Ј **image-as-spectrogram cross-modal re-sonification TECH** (emphatically NOT a harmonic event) ¬Ј **Ikeda austere data-spectacle VIBE** (off hushed/tender)]`. *Note on the two flagged tensions:* (a) **WebGL2** вАФ the jury banned it on its rolling-**15** (4√Ч: 658/659/662/675), but the diversity-audit's hard gate is the rolling-**10**, where WebGL2 is **cold** (last use 675, 9 ships back; 0√Ч in the last 10) вАФ so reviving it is legitimately diverse by the binding mechanic; flagged honestly. (b) **solo** вАФ this is single-user, but the standing solo monoculture was *just broken* by 694 (cycle 457) + 702 (cycle 460), and JURY #4 (extend the inherently-contemplative ceiling builds) explicitly trumps for an adult cycle. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0**, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 34.7s`, `вЬУ Generating static pages (499/499)`, `/dream/704-spectral-seance 6.9 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered **static вЧЛ** + its `/api` route), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio/GPU in sandbox) вАФ the ~2.5s auto-start + procedural fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance with zero key/hardware; unverified on a real device: whether the 48-osc spectrogram playback reads as "the picture is the instrument," whether the inharmonic bed stays pleasant over minutes, and the felt latency of scan-lineвЖФaudio lock.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/704-spectral-seance/README.md`

### `710-presence-bloom` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј adult ¬Ј DEEP-winner (cycle 463, 2026-06-18)
[/dream/710-presence-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/710-presence-bloom) вАФ **"Presence Bloom": the genuine cycle-2 of `677-presence-field`. Where 677 placed STATIC point-voices at your joints, here a deliberate wrist gesture (reach вЖТ dwell ~0.65s вЖТ outward flick) LEAVES BEHIND a persistent HRTF voice fixed in 3D that keeps singing вАФ so over minutes you build a spatial chord-architecture around your own ears, rendered as a 60k-particle WebGPU storm where each voice is an attractor.** Two new capabilities over 677: **(1) accretion / long-form memory** вАФ voices persist and accrete (cap ~24, oldest fades), each taking the next pitch in a slowly drifting **D-Dorian** modal field (Dm9вЖТGmaj9вЖТEm11вЖТDadd9 region, homeward gravity on D/A), so the set is an evolving spatial chord and the field is genuinely *different at minute 5 than minute 1* (the 689/701-coral accreting-memory ceiling the jury asked the lab to extend); **(2) distance + room reverberation as a felt axis** вАФ each voice's `PannerNode` (HRTF, inverse distance) has a reverb send into a shared `ConvolverNode` that GROWS with distance, so near voices are present+dry, far voices quiet+wet (the literal realization of RESEARCH ¬І463's **arXiv:2505.18020** distance-cues+reverb finding). **The core idea вАФ spatialization IS the instrument:** one Web-Audio `AudioListener` at the origin (your ears); harmony is the *material*, the *subject* is building luminous spatial architecture (emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/cadence вАФ the jury's banned template). **Input:** webcam **full-body pose** via **MediaPipe Tasks-Vision `PoseLandmarker`** loaded from CDN at runtime via `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ вА¶)` (bundler never resolves it; no npm dep; build never depends on it). **Output: WebGPU compute** (`render.ts вЖТ makeRenderer`) вАФ tens of thousands of GPU particles advected by a WGSL compute shader, each persistent voice an **attractor** particles gather/orbit/bloom around (nearer = brighter/larger), additive instanced point-sprite render; **with a first-class Canvas2D fallback** (~3600 particles, the SAME accreting-attractor behavior, additive trails + glow haloes) that is the EXPECTED path on most devices, so a WGSL failure *degrades* rather than breaks. **Vibe:** luminous architectural **AWE**, Anadol-scale вАФ deliberately pushed away from 677's meditative-hush (the jury-banned tender/hushed pole, the explicit risk of a 677 cycle-2). **Privacy/safety:** camera analysed on-device only, never stored/sent; no API route, no guard needed (no server/secret; only network is the public MediaPipe CDN). Ear-safe: per-voice `GainNode` вЖТ HRTF `PannerNode` вЖТ (dry + distance-scaled reverb send) вЖТ master вЙ§0.32 (scaled down as voice count grows) вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` вЖТ destination; soft attacks, ~0.7s fade-in, AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS). **Graceful degrade (the 06:30-glance path is MediaPipe/GPU-independent):** visuals animate on mount (idle preview) before audio unlocks, and any failure (camera denied, MediaPipe/CDN load error, no pose, ~2.5s idle, or no WebGPU) runs a **synthetic ghost body** that drifts and places voices on its own вАФ building the architecture hands-free вАФ and falls to the Canvas2D particle field if WebGPU is absent, all with visible `text-rose-300` error notices; full teardown on unmount (cancel rAF, destroy GPU buffers, close AudioContext, stop camera tracks, remove listeners). References: **Refik Anadol** (*Latent City* / *Machine Hallucinations* вАФ GPU particle data-architecture awe) ¬Ј **arXiv:2505.18020** ("Effects of auditory distance cues and reverberation on spatial perception" вАФ distance+reverb as the spatial signal, the cycle-2 deepening) ¬Ј **arXiv:2407.13083** ("Modeling and Driving Human Body Soundfields through Acoustic Primitives" вАФ body movement shapes spatial sound). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І463** (the embodied-spatial cycle-2's real upgrade is persistence + distance/reverb, not more joints). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (ONE concept вАФ *body leaves behind persistent accreting HRTF voices вЖТ a resonant architecture* вАФ via 3 renderers): beat **`708-presence-cathedral`** (the most literal 677 cycle-2 вАФ MediaPipe-Pose + three.js cathedral of emissive light-pillars; banked **IDEAS ¬І463**, lost on renderer over-use [three.js вЖТ 4√Ч] + CDN risk without a GPU-fallback safety net) and **`709-presence-tide`** в≠Р (the BULLETPROOF zero-dependency twin вАФ webcam frame-diff [no ML/CDN/network] + Canvas2D top-down room-map; banked в≠Р **IDEAS ¬І463** as the safest spatial-presence resurrect, realizing the long-banked 678-presence-flow lane). **Ambition honest 3вАУ4/5**: **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (MediaPipe-Pose + gesture detector ¬Ј persistent-accreting HRTF spatial-voice engine w/ distance attenuation + distance-scaled reverb ¬Ј drifting D-Dorian field w/ accretion + chord-drift ¬Ј WebGPU WGSL particle storm + Canvas2D fallback = 4вАУ5) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (Anadol ¬Ј arXiv:2505.18020 ¬Ј arXiv:2407.13083) ¬Ј **#4** genuine **cycle-2 of 677-presence-field** (the persistence + distance-reverb capability 677 lacked) ¬Ј **#5** RESEARCH ¬І463 same-day. **#1 NOT hard-claimed** вАФ HRTF-spatialization-as-instrument + MediaPipe Pose both exist at 677; the fresh capability is *accretion + distance/reverb* (a cycle-2 deepening), not a lab-first technique. **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading TECH ¬Ј audio-first+SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬Ј touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј hushed/tender VIBE ¬Ј standing solo] ¬Ј picked=[**full-body-pose / embodied-spatial INPUT** (off the touch reflex вАФ played from across the room) ¬Ј **WebGPU OUTPUT** (scarcest non-banned renderer, 1√Ч in window; off banned WebGL2, off warming three.js [677/689/699=3√Ч], off hot Canvas2D) ¬Ј **persistent-accreting HRTF-spatialization + distance/reverb TECH** (NOT a harmonic event) ¬Ј **luminous architectural AWE / Anadol VIBE** (NOT hushed/tender)]` вАФ clears every banned tag; WebGPU is the renderer-diverse choice. **Build-verified** (all-3-present `npm run build` exit 0 / 503 pages; then authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0**, `вЬУ Generating static pages (501/501)`, `/dream/710-presence-bloom 9.41 kB / 116 kB First Load` prerendered **static вЧЛ**), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/camera/audio in sandbox) вАФ idle preview + ghost-body auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance with zero hardware/CDN; unverified on a real device: the WGSL compute path on real hardware (degrades to Canvas2D, not breaks), whether placed voices read as moving *around* you (HRTF cues weaker on speakers than headphones), the dwell-then-flick thresholds, MediaPipe load on Karel's phone, iOS audio unlock.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/710-presence-bloom/README.md`

### `711-kids-beat-buddies` вАФ `demoable` ¬Ј kids ¬Ј WIDE-winner (cycle 464, 2026-06-18)
[/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies) вАФ **"Beat Buddies": the lab's FIRST two-player / multi-user kids piece. Two little kids sit on opposite sides of ONE tablet and build a silly band together вАФ every pad they tap snaps onto ONE shared looping groove, so the result is always a beat, never noise.** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #3** ("ship a multi-user / two-player piece вАФ still 0√Ч across the entire window, the genuinely unbuilt register") at the same time as **#1** ("groove/rhythm, not a cadence") and **#5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH") вАФ and it was the only one of this cycle's three explorers to hit the multi-user gap. **Interaction:** the screen splits into two stacked player zones; the **top zone is rotated 180¬∞** (`rotate-180`) so the kid across the table reads it right-way-up вАФ Player A warm/orange (top), Player B cool/teal (bottom). Each kid has **four big silly-sound pads** (`clamp(64px,18vh,150px)`, emoji glyphs, no reading): drum, boing, honk, slide-whistle. **The core mechanic вАФ shared-clock loop-stacking (Incredibox/Sprunki):** a single Web-Audio **look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms `setInterval`, scheduling ~104 BPM 16th-notes ~120 ms ahead) runs ONE clock for BOTH players; a tap doesn't fire raw вАФ it registers a *looping layer* with a fixed 16th-note pattern, quantized onto the next step, so adding pads builds a thickening shared groove and tapping again removes the layer. A soft synth kick + shaker always keep the pulse, so there's a beat to lock onto from the first tap. **The togetherness payload:** when BOTH players are active at once the two googly conductor blobs **high-five** with a confetti burst + spark line вАФ pure co-play, no winning, no competition (the entrainment science of RESEARCH ¬І464's **arXiv:2504.03958**: quantize both kids to one clock so locking-in is engineered, not demanded). **Input:** two-player same-device touch (each zone its own pad-state вАФ emphatically NOT the jury-banned lone-finger-on-glass reflex; the second person IS the novelty). **Output: Canvas2D** вАФ two squash-stretch googly conductor creatures that bop on every beat, grow brighter/bigger as layers stack, flash on each scheduled hit (splashes synced to `ctx.currentTime`), plus confetti. **Technique:** shared-clock quantized loop-stacking groove (a never-before-built mechanic in the lab вАФ the lab's first *multi-user* anything on the kids side). **Vibe:** silly co-op band/dance-floor вАФ groove + laughter, deliberately NOT a harmonic-event/tension-resolution machine (the jury's banned kids template). **Bulletproof glance (the most robust of the three explorers):** pure tap + synthesis, **no sensors, no camera, no permissions, no network, no CDN, no samples** вАФ works instantly for any reviewer on any device, even solo (one person tapping both halves); a ~2.5 s-idle **auto-demo** gently toggles pads itself so a passing glance sees+hears the groove build and thin on its own. Ear-safe: all voices through `gain(0.28) вЖТ lowpass(7500Hz) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor вЖТ destination`; full teardown on unmount (cancel rAF, stop scheduler interval, close/disconnect AudioContext). If AudioContext can't start, a `text-rose-300` notice asks for one more tap. References: **Incredibox / Sprunki** (stackable looping beat layers locked to a shared clock вАФ the dominant 2026-live kids beat-making form, RESEARCH ¬І464) ¬Ј **Toshio Iwai's Tenori-on** (shared lit grid-instrument played by touch). Born from **RESEARCH ¬І464** (Incredibox-2026 mechanic + ensemble-entrainment science вЖТ a two-player shared-clock groove). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 divergent groove+laugh explorers on 3 inputs): beat **`712-kids-roll-a-beat`** (tilt-physics slapstick вЖТ bonks quantized onto a groove, velocityвЖТcomedic-pitch; banked **IDEAS ¬І464**, lost on tilt-physics over-use [286/451/603/703]) and **`713-kids-dance-drum`** в≠Р (off-glass webcam-motion freeze-dance groove + spring-physics mirror creature; banked в≠Р **IDEAS ¬І464** as the directest "get off the glass" / revives the abandoned dance register). **Ambition honest 4/5**: **#1** never-used technique (first multi-user / two-player piece in the lab; shared-clock loop-*stacking* quantizer driving two co-located players on a split+rotated screen) ¬Ј **#2** вЙ•3 subsystems (shared look-ahead groove scheduler + 6 synth voices ¬Ј split/rotated two-player tap UI w/ per-zone state ¬Ј Canvas2D reactive creatures/splashes/confetti ¬Ј idle auto-demo driver = 4) ¬Ј **#3** named refs (Incredibox/Sprunki ¬Ј Tenori-on) ¬Ј **#4** multi-cycle (a reusable two-player co-op kids line вАФ clean teardown + idle-demo; deepen with two-marble co-op, more pads, streak meter). **#5 NOT claimed** (a play piece about shared groove, not grounded in a specific algorithm-paper вАФ though the design *choice* is motivated by ¬І464's entrainment finding). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-17)=[harmonic-event/voice-leading/tension-resolution TECH ¬Ј audio-first+minimal-SVG/glow OUTPUT ¬Ј touch/on-glass-primary INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј hushed/tender VIBE ¬Ј standing single-user/solo] ¬Ј picked=[**two-player same-device INPUT** (the breaks-the-solo-monoculture move вАФ the second person is the point; off the lone-finger reflex) ¬Ј **Canvas2D OUTPUT** ¬Ј **shared-clock quantized loop-stacking groove TECH** (emphatically NOT a harmonic event) ¬Ј **silly co-op band VIBE** (NOT hushed/tender)]` вАФ clears every banned tag, and is the rare build that *breaks the standing solo monoculture* (every one of the prior 15 was one person alone). Love-signal: backed by Karel's loves of `98-kids-drum-circle` (rhythm), `217-dance-avatar`, `234-kids-hand-creature`, `169-kids-marble-run`, `83-kids-tilt-rain`. **Build-verified** (two losers `rm -rf`'d, then authoritative winner-only `npm run build` **EXIT 0**, `вЬУ Compiled successfully in 46s`, `/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies 4.8 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered **static вЧЛ**), **NOT browser-verified by ear/touch** (no audio in sandbox) вАФ pure-tap + auto-demo guarantee a live, sounding glance with zero hardware; unverified on a real device: whether two 4-year-olds *feel* the shared lock, the rotated-split ergonomics on a real tablet, and whether the quantize-on-tap latency reads as responsive to a kid.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/711-kids-beat-buddies/README.md`

[/dream/712-seismic-room](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/712-seismic-room) вАФ **"Tremor": the world's earthquakes, live вАФ the moment each one is detected by the global seismic network, it becomes a struck resonant tone and an expanding ripple on a Canvas2D world map; you sit inside the seismic present of the whole planet and hear it tick.** The lab's FIRST real-world EXTERNAL-live-data instrument (683 sonified market data; this is the planet itself) and the literal realization of JURY 2026-06-17 provocation #4 ("sonify a non-market live stream вАФ seismic вАФ for free"). **Input:** the free, no-auth **EMSC / SeismicPortal real-time WebSocket** (`wss://www.seismicportal.eu/standing_order/websocket`, GeoJSON FDSN events). **Always sounds even with no network:** a GutenbergвАУRichter **Poisson synthetic-swarm** fallback (small quakes vastly outnumber large), so a glance is always live and moving; a badge flips emerald on live connect, amber-calm on fallback, and a toggle forces sim/live. **Sonification (all Web Audio, no samples, no deps):** magnitudeвЖТfundamental (140вЖТ38 Hz, bigger=lower) + loudness + decay; depthвЖТtimbre (shallow=bright triangle + a band-passed noise "crack"; deep=pure low sine, no crack); longitudeвЖТ`StereoPanner`; a procedural `ConvolverNode` reverb + a low detuned room-tone drone; master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so a magnitude-7 can never blast. **Visual:** Canvas2D equirectangular world map (faint 30¬∞ graticule + dotted equator/meridian, no raster assets), each event an expanding ring + bright core colored by depth (shallow=amber, mid=violet, deep=blue) with a lingering glow for large quakes, plus a monospace event log. **Named refs:** Florian Dombois вАФ *Auditory Seismology* ¬Ј EMSC real-time feed ¬Ј Ryoji Ikeda data aesthetics. Adult ¬Ј WIDE-fire winner (cycle 465; banked 713-shadow-duet в≠Р first-WebMIDI + 714-physarum-choir вАФ see IDEAS ¬І465). Status: **demoable** (build-verified, not browser-verified вАФ live-feed schema + by-ear seismic reading untested in sandbox; the synthetic swarm covers any no-network glance).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/712-seismic-room/README.md`

[/dream/713-kids-rubber-face](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/713-kids-rubber-face) вАФ **"Rubber Face Sing-Along": a 4-year-old grabs a giant googly face and SCULPTS a silly voice with their fingers вАФ no microphone, the voice is shaped entirely by how the face is squished.** The lab's first **gestural-deformation вЖТ formant ("vowel") synthesis** (grep-confirmed: every prior vowel/formant kids piece вАФ `393`, `413` вАФ drove the synth from a real microphone; this one is sculpted by touch). **Mapping:** pull the **nose** up/down вЖТ fundamental pitch slides like a slide-whistle (~120вАУ500 Hz, loosely snapped to a friendly set so there's never a harsh note); stretch the **mouth** wide vs. tall вЖТ morph three parallel bandpass formants between vowels **oooвЖФaaaвЖФeee**; squish the **cheeks** inward вЖТ a wah lowpass-cutoff wobble; pull the **ears/eyes** вЖТ vibrato depth + goofy warble; **release вЖТ the feature springs back (boing)** and the voice glides to a whisper. **Input:** single/multi-finger touch-deformation (NOT a mic, NOT a button-grid, NOT two-player вАФ deliberately breaks the kids side's just-formed two-player-groove streak `702`/`711`). **Output:** Canvas2D rubbery googly face (spring-loaded handles, rosy cheeks, big tongue, eyes that track the nose). **Audio:** sawtooth glottal source + vibrato LFO вЖТ 3-formant bandpass bank вЖТ wah lowpass вЖТ the kids-safe chain `masterGain(0.3) вЖТ lowpass(7500) вЖТ DynamicsCompressor(вИТ10/20:1) вЖТ destination`, always-on soft ambient pad, AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS), `text-rose-300` retry-tap fallback, full teardown (rAF/osc/AudioContext). **Bulletproof glance:** a ~2.5s-idle **ghost-finger auto-demo** pulls the face around and sings on its own with zero permission/camera/CDN вАФ yields instantly to a real touch. **Named refs:** Klatt formant synthesis / source-filter vocal model ¬Ј Mr. Potato Head & stretchy-face toys ¬Ј Sesame Street puppet mouths. Born from **RESEARCH ¬І466** (density grep вЖТ deformationвЖТsynthesis is the lab's open laugh-mechanic). Kids 4+ ¬Ј WIDE-fire winner (cycle 466; banked **`715-kids-stomp-zoo`** в≠Р off-glass webcam-stomp parade + **`714-kids-feed-monster`** drag-feed groove вАФ see IDEAS ¬І466). **Ambition 2/5** (#1 never-used technique [deformationвЖТformant] + #3 named refs). Status: **demoable** (build-verified `npm run build` exit 0 / 504 pages; NOT browser-verified вАФ the cartoon-vowel timbre + sub-50ms touch latency + multitouch need a real iPad; the idle auto-demo + friendly pitch-snap cover any silent/harsh glance).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/713-kids-rubber-face/README.md`
